english_verse: “A virgin will have a baby boy, and he will be called Immanuel,” which means “God is with us.”
translation_verse: “Hatoluu kɩdɩgɩ ha aa bɩ gyɩŋ baal sɩ kaŋ luwol a lʋl boyoŋbiye dɩ ba kana ʋ kɩ yɩrɩ Imanuwɛl.”

english_verse: From David to the time of the exile in Babylonia, the ancestors of Jesus were: David, Solomon , Rehoboam, Abijah, Asa, Jehoshaphat, Jehoram; Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, Hezekiah, Manasseh, Amon, Josiah, and Jehoiachin and his brothers.
translation_verse: Gyosaya mɛ sii lʋl Gyekonaya abee ʋ naabiisi. Saŋa no tɩyaŋ nɛ ba kasɩ Iziral tɩmma mʋ Baabilɔŋ paalʋʋ.

english_verse: From the exile to the birth of Jesus, his ancestors were: Jehoiachin, Shealtiel, Zerubbabel, Abiud, Eliakim, Azor, Zadok, Achim; Eliud, Eleazar, Matthan, Jacob, and Joseph, the husband of Mary, the mother of Jesus, who is called the Messiah.
translation_verse: Gyeekɔbɩ mɛ rɛ yaŋ sii lʋl Gyosɛfʋ. Gyosɛfʋ mɛ sii kpa Mɛɛrɩ, nal hʋ aa lʋl Yesu, ba kɩ yɩrɩ Krisita, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya.

english_verse: more to the birth of the Messiah. The Birth of Jesus (Luke
translation_verse: Azɔ mɛ sii lʋl Zadɔkɩ. Zadɔkɩ mɛ sii lʋl Akimu. Akimu mɛ sii lʋl Ɛliyudu.

english_verse: This is how Jesus Christ was born. A young woman named Mary was engaged to Joseph from King David's family. But before they were married, she learned that she was going to have a baby by God's Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu Krisita lʋlɩɩ naasɩ tɩŋa: Ʋ naa Mɛɛrɩ abee Gyosɛfʋ gyɩ wee nyʋwa rɛ anɩɩ ba sɩ yal dɔmɔŋ. Amɛ ba ha gyɩ bɩ yal dɔmɔŋ, aŋka Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee leŋ Mɛɛrɩ kaŋ luwol.

english_verse: Joseph was a good man and did not want to embarrass Mary in front of everyone. So he decided to quietly call off the wedding.
translation_verse: Gyosɛfʋ gyɩ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna rɛ. Ɛɛ wɩya ʋ gyɩ bee kyɛ dɩ ʋ we Mɛɛrɩ hɩɩsɩ gyamaa tɩyaŋ, aŋ gyɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ lʋwɔlɩ vɩya ʋ.

english_verse: While Joseph was thinking about this, an angel from the Lord appeared to him in a dream. The angel said, “Joseph, the baby that Mary will have is from the Holy Spirit. Go ahead and marry her.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ aa bɩɩnɩ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ, malɩka ko ʋ lee duwoso tɩyaŋ a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Gyosɛfʋ, Kuwori Deviti doho nal, ta leŋ dɩ kambɩŋ kana ɩ, ɩ aa sɩ kpa Mɛɛrɩ a yaa ɩ haaŋ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kaŋ biye no luwol.

english_verse: Then after her baby is born, name him Jesus, because he will save his people from their sins.”
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩ lʋl boyoŋbiye, dɩ ɩ we ʋ feŋ Yesu. Feŋ hʋ memii rɛ yaa Laataal, beewɩya ʋ rɛ sɩ laa ʋ nala ta ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: After Joseph woke up, he and Mary were soon married, just as the Lord's angel had told him to do.
translation_verse: Gyosɛfʋ aa sii doo sɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ gyɩ yaa gɛɛ hʋ malɩka hʋ aa basɩ tɩya ʋ rɛ, a gyɩ kpa Mɛɛrɩ mʋ ʋ dɩya a yaa ʋ haaŋ.

english_verse: But they did not sleep together before her baby was born. Then Joseph named him Jesus.
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ beel-ʋ ha gyɩ bɩ gyɩŋ dɔmɔŋ anɩɩ baal bee haaŋ aŋka Mɛɛrɩ lʋl boyoŋbiye. Nyɛ rɛ Gyosɛfʋ we biye hʋ feŋ Yesu.

english_verse: When King Herod heard about this, he was worried, and so was everyone else in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Kuwori Hɛrɔtɩ gyɩ aa nɩɩ wɩɩ no, kambɩŋ gyɩ kaŋ ʋ bee Gyerusalɛm tɩmma buloŋ nɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: Herod brought together the chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses and asked them, “Where will the Messiah be born?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ gyɩ yɩrɩ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ a ko laŋŋɩ, a pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Lee tɩyaŋ nɛ ba sɩ lʋl Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya?”

english_verse: ‘Bethlehem in the land of Judea, you are very important among the towns of Judea. From your town will come a leader, who will be like a shepherd for my people Israel.’ ”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ baa, “Bɛtɩlɛhɛm yaa tɔbiye rɛ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, Bɛtɩlɛhɛm nala rɛ yaa nɩbala, beewɩya ba tɩyaŋ nɛ Iziral kuwori sɩ lɩɩ, nal hʋ aa sɩ kɩ deŋ ŋ nala, Iziral tɩmma.”

english_verse: He told them, “Go to Bethlehem and search carefully for the child. As soon as you find him, let me know. I also want to go and worship him.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Kuwori Hɛrɔtɩ ta ba dɩ ba mʋ Bɛtɩlɛhɛm, aŋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma mʋ kyɛ biye hʋ abee sɩfɩyasɩ. Ma yaŋ ko na ʋ pɛ, ma leŋ dɩ ŋ mɛ kaŋ duwoso, dɩ ŋ mɛ mʋ kyʋwalɩ ʋ a kpa ʋ gyɩrɩma tɩya ʋ.”

english_verse: The wise men listened to what the king said and then left. And the star they had seen in the east went on ahead of them until it stopped over the place where the child was.
translation_verse: Ba aa nɩɩ gɛɛ, ba lɩɩ kpa ŋmanɩɩ a kɩ mʋ, kyɩŋwʋlɩɩ hʋ ba fa aa naa tɩɩmemii bɩl laa ba sɩya gɛɛɛ, a mʋ sɩŋ kyugili lee hʋ biye aa we.

english_verse: They were thrilled and excited to see the star.
translation_verse: Ba aa naa kyɩŋwʋlɩɩ hʋ gɛɛ, ba tenni buloŋ fɩyɛlɩ, ba kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ.

english_verse: When the men went into the house and saw the child with Mary, his mother, they knelt down and worshiped him. They took out their gifts of gold, frankincense, and myrrh and gave them to him.
translation_verse: Ba aa mʋʋ pele lee hʋ biye hʋ aa we, ba mʋ gyʋʋ dɩya hʋ a na biye hʋ abee ʋ naa Mɛɛrɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba tuu gbinni biye hʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ a kyʋwalɩ ʋ a kpa ʋ gyɩrɩma tɩya ʋ, aŋ puri ba kyʋgɩsɩ a lɩɩ salma abee wɩsɩnaaŋ abee kɩŋ kɩdɩgɩ sʋwala aa sʋma ba kɩ yɩrɩ mɛɛ, a tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: Later they were warned in a dream not to return to Herod, and they went back home by another road. The Escape to Egypt
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ basɩ tɩya ba, ba duwoso tɩyaŋ abee sɩfɩyasɩ anɩɩ ba ta ko mɩɩgɩ mʋ Kuwori Hɛrɔtɩ lee. Nyɛ rɛ ba sii a tɩŋ ŋmaŋdɩma a mɩɩgɩ mʋ ba paalʋʋ. Gyosɛfʋ bee Mɛɛrɩ lɩɩ fá mʋ Igyipiti

english_verse: After the wise men had gone, an angel from the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream and said, “Get up! Hurry and take the child and his mother to Egypt! Stay there until I tell you to return, because Herod is looking for the child and wants to kill him.”
translation_verse: Wɩgyʋnna hʋ bee mʋyɩ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ Gyosɛfʋ duwosi na malɩka dɩ ʋ ko ʋ lee a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Sii kpa biye hʋ abee ʋ naa a fá mʋ Igyipiti. Ma we doŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ saŋa hʋ ŋ bɩl aa sɩ tɩya ma ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ma lɩɩ doŋ, beewɩya Kuwori Hɛrɔtɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ kpʋ biye hʋ rɛ.”

english_verse: where they stayed until Herod died. So the Lord's promise came true, just as the prophet had said, “I called my son out of Egypt.” The Killing of the Children
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no gyɩ yaa rɛ dɩ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaal tɩyaŋ basɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ. Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ baa, “Ŋ biye gyɩ we Igyipiti paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ lɩɩ ʋ.” Ba kpʋʋ boyoŋbiifɩllɩ Bɛtɩlɛhɛm tɩyaŋ

english_verse: When Herod found out that the wise men from the east had tricked him, he was very angry. He gave orders for his men to kill all the boys who lived in or near Bethlehem and were two years old and younger. This was based on what he had learned from the wise men.
translation_verse: Kuwori Hɛrɔtɩ gyɩ aa ko gyɩma anɩɩ wɩgyʋnna hʋ mʋrɩ ʋ rɛ, ʋ na baaŋ kɩŋkaŋ. Wɩgyʋnna hʋ gyɩ aa daga ʋ saŋa hʋ ba aa lʋl Yesu wɩya, ʋ sii ta ʋ laalyuwolo dɩ ba mʋ Bɛtɩlɛhɛm abee tɔbiisi hʋ buloŋ aa kpaga doŋ, a kpʋ boyoŋbiisi hʋ buloŋ ha aa yaa bɩsɩ balɩya a kaŋ kɩ tuu.

english_verse: So the Lord's promise came true, just as the prophet Jeremiah had said,
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no leŋ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaal Gyɛrimaya tɩyaŋ basɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: “In Ramah a voice was heard crying and weeping loudly. Rachel was mourning for her children, and she refused to be comforted, because they were dead.” The Return from Egypt
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ Gyɛrimaya gyɩ aa basa rɛ nyɛ: “Nal lɛ aa wii Rama tɩyaŋ, a wii kɩ gʋwagɩ Rekyil lɛ aa wii ʋ balɩya aa sʋba wɩya, a pɔ dɩ ʋ bee tallɩ.” Gyosɛfʋ bee Mɛɛrɩ mʋʋ Nazarɛti

english_verse: But when he heard that Herod's son Archelaus was now ruler of Judea, he was afraid to go there. Then in a dream he was told to go to Galilee,
translation_verse: Amɛ Gyosɛfʋ aa ko nɩɩ anɩɩ Kuwori Hɛrɔtɩ sʋba rɛ, ka ʋ biye Akɩlɔɔsɩ di koro Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ, kambɩŋ gyɩ fa kana ʋ rɛ doŋ mʋyɩ wɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ bɩl basɩ tɩya ʋ duwoso tɩyaŋ abee sɩfɩyasɩ anɩɩ ʋ mʋ hɔŋ Galili paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: and they went to live there in the town of Nazareth. So the Lord's promise came true, just as the prophet had said, “He will be called a Nazarene.”
translation_verse: Ʋ aa mʋʋ Galili paalʋʋ, ʋ mʋʋ hɔŋ Nazarɛti tɩyaŋ nɛ. Nyɛ yaa rɛ dɩ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaala hʋ tɩyaŋ basɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ. Ba gyɩ basa rɛ a baa, “Ba sɩ kana ʋ kɩ yɩrɩ Nazarɛti tɩɩna.”

english_verse: Do something to show you have really given up your sins.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa daga anɩɩ ma bɩrɩma lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ,

english_verse: He said, “Turn back to God! The kingdom of heaven will soon be here.”
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ basɩ tɩya ba rɛ a baa, “Ma bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kpaga rɛ!”

english_verse: John wore clothes made of camel's hair. He had a leather strap around his waist and ate grasshoppers and wild honey.
translation_verse: Nyɔgɩmaa pʋna gannɩ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ gyɩ fa kɩ laalɩ, aŋ aa kpa tɛpɩɩŋbii vʋwa ʋ tɩŋa. Nyɩŋgɩrɩgɩsɩ abee tʋʋ rɛ gyɩ yaa ʋ kɩdiiliye.

english_verse: From Jerusalem and all Judea and from the Jordan River Valley crowds of people went to John.
translation_verse: Nala gyɩ lɩɩ Gyerusalɛm abee Gyudɩya paalʋʋ abee tɔnɩ hʋ buloŋ aa kpaga Gyɔɔdaŋ fuwo hʋ buloŋ nɛ, a kɩ ko ʋ lee.

english_verse: They told how sorry they were for their sins, and he baptized them in the river.
translation_verse: Ba aa ko lusi ba wɩbɔmɔ aŋ tuu Gyɔɔdaŋ fuwo hʋ, ʋ fo ba wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ.

english_verse: Many Pharisees and Sadducees also came to be baptized. But John said to them: You bunch of snakes! Who warned you to run from the coming judgment?
translation_verse: Amɛ Gyɔɔŋ aa ko na dɩ Farasiima abee Sadusiima yʋga aa kɩ ko ʋ lee dɩ ʋ fo ba wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ gɛɛ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ɛɛdɔŋ dʋma! Ma dawarɩ yʋga ma tɩyaŋ! Ma bɩɩna ma sɩ wuwo fá nyʋgɩsɩ kyɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ di nala sarɩya rɛ koo?

english_verse: An ax is ready to cut the trees down at their roots. Any tree that doesn't produce good fruit will be chopped down and thrown into a fire.
translation_verse: Ma na, Wɩɩsɩ yaa siri abee ʋ saa rɛ dɩ ʋ ŋmaŋ tɩɩsɩ lo. Tɩya hʋ buloŋ aa bee nɔŋ nɔŋweliye, ʋ sɩ ŋmana ʋ lo a paa we diŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: His threshing fork is in his hand, and he is ready to separate the wheat from the husks. He will store the wheat in a barn and burn the husks in a fire that never goes out. The Baptism of Jesus (Mark
translation_verse: Ʋ kol ʋ mɩkyaarɩgbaha rɛ, dɩ ʋ ko ŋmaa ʋ mɩya buloŋ teŋ, dɩ ʋ kpa gbaha hʋ a kyaarɩ lɩɩ miŋbii hʋ a we ʋ busol tɩyaŋ aŋ kpa mɩŋgyɔrʋ hʋ we diŋ tɩyaŋ. Diŋ hʋ aa bɩ sɩ maakyiye dɩsɩ.” Gyɔɔŋ foo Yesu wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ Maakɩ

english_verse: Jesus answered, “For now this is how it should be, because we must do all God wants us to do.” Then John agreed.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ kɛ yaa gɛɛ ŋ aa baa ɩ yaa. Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ á yaa wɩya hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛɛ.” Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ laa nyʋwa, a fo Yesu wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ.

english_verse: So Jesus was baptized. And as soon as he came out of the water, the sky opened, and he saw the Spirit of God coming down on him like a dove.
translation_verse: Gyɔɔŋ aa yaŋ fo Yesu wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ hʋ ko teŋ, ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɩɩgɩ lɩɩ nɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ a ko dɩ ʋ lɩɩ, dɩ ʋ naa wɩɩsɩnyuu lɔgɔ suri. Ka ʋ na Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kokomo, a ko tuu saga ʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Then a voice from heaven said, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him.”
translation_verse: Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ nɩɩ taal dɩ ʋ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu a baa, “Ŋ biikyoolii rɛ nyɛ. Ŋ teŋ fɩyɛla rɛ ʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard that John had been put in prison, he went to Galilee.
translation_verse: Yesu aa ko nɩɩ dɩ ba kaŋ Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ tɔ dɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sii lɩɩ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ a kpa mʋ Galili paalʋʋ.

english_verse: But instead of staying in Nazareth, Jesus moved to Capernaum. This town was beside Lake Galilee in the territory of Zebulun and Naphtali.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ʋ sii kpa mʋ Nazarɛti a bɩl lɩɩ doŋ a mɩɩgɩ kpa mʋ hɔŋ Kapɛɛnam tɩyaŋ. Tɔɔ no kpaga Galili fuwobal hʋ rɛ, a we Zebulɔŋ abee Nafitali paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Then the devil came to him and said, “If you are God's Son, tell these stones to turn into bread.”
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Sɩtaanɩ ko basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Na ɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye rɛ, ɛɛ kɛ leŋ dɩ bʋwa no bɩrɩmɩ kɩdiiliye.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The Scriptures also say, ‘Don't try to test the Lord your God!’ ”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ba bɩl saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Ta kɩ magɩsɩ ɩ Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ.”

english_verse: Finally, the devil took Jesus up on a very high mountain and showed him all the kingdoms on earth and their power.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Sɩtaanɩ bɩl kaŋ Yesu mʋ gyɩŋ dogiŋbal kɩdɩgɩ nyuu a daga ʋ dʋnɩya koro abee ʋ weliŋ buloŋ fine,

english_verse: The devil said to him, “I will give all this to you, if you will bow down and worship me.”
translation_verse: aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ sɩ kpa kɩna no buloŋ tɩya ɩ, dɩ ɩ rɛ sɩ tuu gbinni a kyʋwalɩ ŋ abee gyɩrɩma.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Go away Satan! The Scriptures say: ‘Worship the Lord your God and serve only him.’ ”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Sɩtaanɩ, fasɩ mʋ ŋ sɩyaŋ! Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba saba rɛ a baa, Kɩ kyʋwalɩ ŋ Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ abee gyɩrɩma aŋ kɩ tɩŋa ʋ.”

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet Isaiah had said,
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no gyɩ yaa rɛ dɩ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaal Azaaya tɩyaŋ basɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ.

english_verse: “Listen, lands of Zebulun and Naphtali, lands along the road to the sea and across the Jordan. Listen Galilee, land of the Gentiles!
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ baa, “Ma nala hʋ aa we Zebulɔŋ abee Nafitali paalʋʋ aa kyaasɩ Galili fuwobal hʋ, Gyɔɔdaŋ fuwobal hʋ kyolo, abee Galili paalʋʋ nala, lee hʋ tɩyaŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma aa yʋga, ma nɩɩ daha,

english_verse: Right then the two brothers dropped their nets and went with him.
translation_verse: Haŋ lagɩlagɩbiye hʋ ba kpa ba keliŋsi hʋ ta, aŋ sii tɩŋa ʋ hal.

english_verse: While Jesus was walking along the shore of Lake Galilee, he saw two brothers. One was Simon, also known as Peter, and the other was Andrew. They were fishermen, and they were casting their net into the lake.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ kpaa Galili fuwobal hʋ nyʋwa a kpala kɩ baŋ dɩ ʋ naa fuwonaŋkasɩla balɩya dɩ ba aa kasɩ fuwonamɩɩsɩ abee ba keliŋsi. Ba gyɩ yaa nɩmmabalɩya rɛ. Kɩdɩgɩ feŋ nɛ yaa Siimɔŋ Ʋ naabiye hʋ mɛ feŋ nɛ Aŋduru.

english_verse: Jesus walked on until he saw James and John, the sons of Zebedee. They were in a boat with their father, mending their nets. Jesus asked them to come with him.
translation_verse: Yesu bɩl kpaa kɩ mʋ dɩ ʋ naa Gyemsi bee ʋ naabiye Gyɔɔŋ abee ba kuwo Zebedi, dɩ ba we nɩɩduworiboro tɩyaŋ a kɩ marɩ ba keliŋsi.

english_verse: At once they left the boat and their father and went with Jesus. Jesus Teaches, Preaches, and Heals (Luke
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu yɩrɩ ba, ba guu sii a leŋ ba nɩɩduworiboro hʋ abee ba kuwo buloŋ ta, aŋ tɩŋ Yesu hal. Yesu tɩɩbɩ wɩɩla tɩmma Luka

english_verse: Jesus went all over Galilee, teaching in their synagogues and preaching the good news about God's kingdom. He also healed every kind of disease and sickness.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu gɔllɩ Galili paalʋʋ buloŋ a kɩ daga nala Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, a basɩ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ wɩweliye wɩya a kɩ tɩya nala aŋ pɛ kɩ tɩɩbɩ nala aa kaŋ wɩɩla iriŋ iriŋ buloŋ mɛ.

english_verse: News about him spread all over Syria, and people with every kind of sickness or disease were brought to him. Some of them had a lot of demons in them, others were thought to be crazy, and still others could not walk. But Jesus healed them all.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu wɩya taalɩ Siiriya paalʋʋ buloŋ. Nala sii kaŋ ba wɩɩla tɩmma kɩ ko ʋ lee. Gbarɩga abee kpuŋkpuŋ-telle abee nala gyɩŋbɔmɔ aa kana abee wɩɩla iriŋ iriŋ buloŋ tɩmma rɛ ba kaŋ ko, Yesu tɩɩbɩ ba buloŋ.

english_verse: Large crowds followed Jesus from Galilee and the region around the ten cities known as Decapolis. They also came from Jerusalem, Judea, and from across the Jordan River.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ nɩgyamaa sii giri lɩɩ Galili paalʋʋ abee tɔnɩ fi hʋ, abee Gyerusalɛm, abee Gyudɩya paalʋʋ a paa tɩŋ Yesu hal. Ba badɔmɔŋ mɛ gyɩ lɩɩ Gyɔɔdaŋ fuwo hʋ kyolo paalʋʋ rɛ.

english_verse: You must obey God's commands better than the Pharisees and the teachers of the Law obey them. If you don't, I promise you will never get into the kingdom of heaven. Anger
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, see dɩ ma kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ a te Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla abee Farasiima hʋ, aŋ kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ, dɩ gɛɛ daa, ma bɩ sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ. Yesu basɩ baaŋ nayɩ wɩya

english_verse: So if you are about to place your gift on the altar and remember that someone is angry with you,
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ ɩ rɛ kaŋ wɩɩsʋllɩ kɩna kɩ mʋ wɩɩsʋllɩ-kogu hʋ nyuu dɩ ɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, aŋ liisi mʋ na anɩɩ ɩ yaa wɩɩ kyogi ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna rɛ,

english_verse: God blesses those people who depend only on him. They belong to the kingdom of heaven!
translation_verse: “Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa kpaa ba bayɩyɛla buloŋ we Wɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, ba aa rɛ sɩ di wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ tɔnɔ.

english_verse: God blesses those people who grieve. They will find comfort!
translation_verse: Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa wii, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ fɩyɛlɩ ba bembiye.

english_verse: God blesses those people who are merciful. They will be treated with mercy!
translation_verse: Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa fá nala sikii, Wɩɩsɩ mɛ sɩ fá ba sikii.

english_verse: God blesses those people whose hearts are pure. They will see him!
translation_verse: Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ ba aa rɛ sɩ na Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: You are the light for the whole world. A city built on top of a hill cannot be hidden,
translation_verse: Ma kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ pʋlʋŋ dʋnɩya nala buloŋ lee. Tɔɔ buloŋ aa sɩŋ dogimo nyuu tɩyaŋ, ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo faŋa.

english_verse: But I tell you not to swear by anything when you make a promise! Heaven is God's throne, so don't swear by heaven.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, dɩ mamaa rɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ma yaa wɩɩ, ma ta ŋmɩyɛsa Wɩɩsɩ. Ma ta ŋmɩyɛsɩ wɩɩsɩbee mɛ, beewɩya doŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ hɔŋ a kɩ deŋ dʋnɩya buloŋ.

english_verse: The earth is God's footstool, so don't swear by the earth. Jerusalem is the city of the great king, so don't swear by it.
translation_verse: Ma ta ko ŋmɩyɛsɩ taŋha nyuu mɛ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ naasɩ liwiyesii rɛ gɛɛ. Ma ta ŋmɩyɛsɩ Gyerusalɛm mɛ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ, á Kuworibal hʋ, bee rɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: You are the salt for everyone on earth. But if salt no longer tastes like salt, how can it make food salty? All it is good for is to be thrown out and walked on.
translation_verse: Ma kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ yɩsɩ dʋnɩya nala buloŋ lee. Yɩsɩ sʋma, amɛ dɩ ʋ sʋmɩŋ nɛ ko lɩɩ, ɩ bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa dɩ ʋ sʋma. Ʋ aa mɩɩgɩ bɩrɩmɩ kɩtɔɔ rɛ, ba kpa yuwo ta nala nʋwɔsɩ kɩ baŋ.

english_verse: and no one lights a lamp and puts it under a clay pot. Instead, it is placed on a lampstand, where it can give light to everyone in the house.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ mɛ aa kyɛ pʋlʋŋ ʋ dɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ bɩ sɩ nyɔgɔ fɩŋtɩna gyʋʋ biŋ aŋ kpa gbaha kyige tɔ. Ʋ aa kpa saga fɩŋtɩŋdaaŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, dɩ ʋ kyaanɩ tɩya nal buloŋ aa we dɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't suppose I came to do away with the Law and the Prophets. I did not come to do away with them, but to give them their full meaning.
translation_verse: Ma ta bɩɩna anɩɩ ŋ ko dɩ ŋ paa Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi fa aa saba biŋ koo Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala wɩdagɩya hʋ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ta rɛ? Ŋ bɩ ko dɩ ŋ paa ba ta, amɛ ŋ ko rɛ dɩ ŋ leŋ wɩya no su ba bʋʋsɛ.

english_verse: But I promise you if you are angry with someone, you will have to stand trial. If you call someone a fool, you will be taken to court. And if you say that someone is worthless, you will be in danger of the fires of hell.
translation_verse: Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, nal hʋ buloŋ aa naa baaŋ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna nyuu tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ di ʋ tɩɩna sarɩya. Nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa baa dɩ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna yaa nɩgyɔrɩ rɛ, ba sɩ kana ʋ mʋ di ʋ sarɩya. Nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa baa dɩ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna yaa nɩtɔɔ rɛ, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ mʋ gyʋʋ diŋ.

english_verse: leave your gift there in front of the altar. Make peace with that person, then come back and offer your gift to God.
translation_verse: ʋ maga dɩ ɩ leŋ wɩɩsʋllɩ kɩna hʋ kogu hʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ aŋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ, dɩ ɩ bee ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna hʋ marɩ dɔmɔŋ, ka dɩ ɩ na mɩɩgɩ mʋ kpa kɩna hʋ a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Before you are dragged into court, make friends with the person who has accused you of doing wrong. If you don't, you will be handed over to the judge and then to the officer who will put you in jail.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ sama ɩ, a kana ɩ kɩ mʋ sarɩya lidiilii, yaa kuwokeri aŋ leŋ dɩ ma basɩ wɩɩ hʋ marɩ dɔmɔŋ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ lagɩ lagɩ aŋ na mʋ. Dɩ gɛɛ daa, ʋ sɩ kana ɩ mʋ we sarɩdiile nosi tɩyaŋ. Sarɩdiile hʋ mɛ sɩ kpa ɩ we porisi nosi tɩyaŋ, dɩ ba mɛ kana ɩ mʋ tɔ dɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You know our ancestors were told, “Don't use the Lord's name to make a promise unless you are going to keep it.”
translation_verse: Ma bɩl nɩya dɩ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ basɩ tɩya faafaa nala rɛ a baa, “Dɩ ɩ rɛ ŋmɩyɛsɩ Wɩɩsɩ anɩɩ ɩ sɩ yaa wɩɩ, ta ko vɩya wɩɩ hʋ yayɩ. Amɛ yaa wɩɩ hʋ ɩ aa ŋmɩyɛsa baa dɩ ɩ sɩ yaa hʋ.”

english_verse: But I tell you not to try to get even with a person who has done something to you. When someone slaps your right cheek, turn and let that person slap your other cheek.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ dɩ nal lɛ yaa ɩ wɩbɔŋ, ta yaa wɩbɔŋ tuŋ ʋ tɩɩna. Dɩ nal lɛ ŋmaa ɩ noduu kyaŋkpaŋ tɩyaŋ, kaŋ ɩ nogɔbɔ kyaŋkpaŋ mɛ bɩrɩmɩ tɩya ʋ dɩ ʋ ŋmaa.

english_verse: If someone sues you for your shirt, give up your coat as well.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ sama ɩ, dɩ ʋ laa ɩ gabiye, wuri ɩ gabal mɛ pɛ tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: If a soldier forces you to carry his pack one kilometer, carry it two kilometers.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ fɩla ɩ dɩ ɩ kyʋŋ ʋ kyʋgɩsɩ a vala meeldaaŋ, leŋ dɩ ma bɩl vala meeldaaŋ a pɛ.

english_verse: When people ask you for something, give it to them. When they want to borrow money, lend it to them. Love (Luke
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ kaŋ kɩŋ, dɩ nal sʋla, kpa tɩya ʋ. Dɩ nal lɛ ko ɩ lee a kɩ kyɛ kɩŋ dɩ ʋ kyɩma, dɩ ɩ rɛ kana, kpa kyɩma ʋ. Yesu baa á kyo á dɔmɔ Luka

english_verse: You have heard people say, “Love your neighbors and hate your enemies.”
translation_verse: Ma nɩya dɩ ba baa dɩ ma kyo ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ aŋ haasɩ ma dɔmɔ.

english_verse: But I tell you to love your enemies and pray for anyone who mistreats you.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, ma kyo ma dɔmɔ aŋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya nala hʋ mɛ aa dɔgɩsɩ ma.

english_verse: Then you will be acting like your Father in heaven. He makes the sun rise on both good and bad people. And he sends rain for the ones who do right and for the ones who do wrong.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma yaa ma Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ balɩya. Ʋ leŋ ʋ wɩɩsɩ pɔsɔ kɩ we nɩbɔmɔ abee niweliye buloŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a leŋ duwoŋ nɩɩ kɩ tɩya niweliye abee nɩbɔmɔ buloŋ.

english_verse: If you love only those people who love you, will God reward you for this? Even tax collectors love their friends.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ kyo nala hʋ aa kyo ɩ dʋŋ, ɩ bɩ sɩ kaŋ tuno wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ. Beewɩya nɩbɔmɔ mɛ gba aa daga kyori no iriŋ nɛ.

english_verse: When you do good deeds, don't try to show off. If you do, you won't get a reward from your Father in heaven.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ma pɔ dɩ ma ta kɩ yaa ma wɩyaaweliye nala sɩya tɩyaŋ dɩ ba na. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ ma bɩ sɩ kaŋ tuno buloŋ ma kuwo aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ lee.

english_verse: When you give to the poor, don't let anyone know about it.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ɩ rɛ kpaa kɩŋ tɩya nyaabʋ, ta leŋ dɩ ɩ kyaŋfɩyaŋ mɛ gba gyɩma.

english_verse: When you pray, don't be like those show-offs who love to stand up and pray in the synagogues and on the street corners. They do this just to look good. I can assure you that they already have their reward.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Dɩ ma ko kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ma ta kɩɩ minaafigi tɩmma hʋ, beewɩya ba aa kyo dɩ ba sɩŋ wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ abee ŋmaŋsɩ logimo tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ dɩ nal buloŋ na ba. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ba kɛ laa ba tuno buloŋ nɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: When you pray, go into a room alone and close the door. Pray to your Father in private. He knows what is done in private and will reward you.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ma ko kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ma gyʋʋ ma dɩɩsɩ a kaŋ borisi hʋ tɔ, aŋ sʋla ma Kuwo hʋ ma aa bee na. Ʋ kɛ aa na wɩɩ hʋ ma aa faŋa kɩ yaa rɛ, ʋ sɩ tuŋ ma.

english_verse: When you pray, don't talk on and on as people do who don't know God. They think God likes to hear long prayers.
translation_verse: Dɩ ma ko kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ma ta kɩ basɩ wɩgyamaa aa bɩ kaŋ memii, anɩɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kɩ yaa gɛɛ. Ba bɩɩna anɩɩ ba wɩbasɩgyamaa no rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ nɩɩ ba kyʋwala.

english_verse: Don't be like them. Your Father knows what you need even before you ask.
translation_verse: Ma ta kɩɩ ba. Beewɩya ma Kuwo kɛ gyɩŋ kɩŋ hʋ ma aa kyɛ rɛ, dɩ ma ha gba bɩ sʋla ʋ.

english_verse: You should pray like this: Our Father in heaven, help us to honor your name.
translation_verse: Dɩ ma ko kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ma baa, “Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ, leŋ dɩ ɩ feŋ na bigisii.

english_verse: Come and set up your kingdom, so that everyone on earth will obey you, as you are obeyed in heaven.
translation_verse: Leŋ dɩ ɩ koro ko. Leŋ dɩ nala kɩ tɩŋa ɩ nyʋwa taŋha no tɩyaŋ anɩɩ ba aa tɩŋ gɛɛ wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If you forgive others for the wrongs they do to you, your Father in heaven will forgive you.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna rɛ yaa ɩ wɩbɔŋ, ka dɩ ɩ kpa kyɛ ʋ, ɩ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ mɛ sɩ kpa ɩ wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ɩ.

english_verse: But if you don't forgive others, your Father will not forgive your sins. Worshiping God by Going without Eating
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ɩ rɛ bɩ kpaa wɩya kɩ kyɛ ɩ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ, ɩ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ mɛ bɩ sɩ kpa ɩ wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ɩ.” Yesu daga nala nyʋwa vʋwayɩ

english_verse: Instead, comb your hair and wash your face.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ ko vʋwa nyʋwa, ma sɔŋ ma sɩya a kyaasɩ ma nyuni

english_verse: Then others won't know you are going without eating. But your Father sees what is done in private, and he will reward you. Treasures in Heaven (Luke
translation_verse: dɩ nala ta wuwo gyɩma anɩɩ ma vʋwa nyʋwa rɛ, see ma Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ, nal hʋ ma aa bee na dʋŋ. Ʋ kɛ na wɩɩ hʋ ma aa faŋa yaa rɛ, ɛɛ wɩya ʋ sɩ tuŋ ma.” Wɩɩsɩbee dʋwa Luka

english_verse: But more than anything else, put God's work first and do what he wants. Then the other things will be yours as well.
translation_verse: Amɛ, ma laa sɩya kyɛ kɩna hʋ aa we Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, a kyɛ gɛɛ hʋ ma aa sɩ yaa a kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ʋ sɩ kpa kɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ mɛ a pɛ tɩya ma.

english_verse: Don't worry about tomorrow. It will take care of itself. You have enough to worry about today.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ kyiye wɩya kyɩl ma. Kyɛɛ buloŋ kaŋ ʋ wɩgyʋʋlɩya rɛ. Ma ta bɩl kpaa wɩdʋma buloŋ pɛ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bee ʋ wɩgyʋʋlɩya tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Don't store up treasures on earth! Moths and rust can destroy them, and thieves can break in and steal them.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Ma ta kyɛɛ kɩna kɩ biŋ ma tɩɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Beewɩya, dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ, pʋgɩma sɩ di badɔmɔŋ ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ sʋ, ka dɩ gaala mɛ wuwo gyʋʋ gaa badɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Instead, store up your treasures in heaven, where moths and rust cannot destroy them, and thieves cannot break in and steal them.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kyɛ kɩna kɩ biŋ ma tɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ, lee hʋ pʋgɩma aa bɩ sɩ wuwo di ba, ba bɩ sɩ sʋ, ka gaala mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo gaa ba.

english_verse: But when your eyes are bad, everything is dark. If the light inside you is dark, you surely are in the dark. Money (Luke
translation_verse: amɛ dɩ ɩ sɩya bee na, ɩ teŋ buloŋ aa we bilhuu tɩyaŋ nɛ. Dɩ kyaanʋʋ hʋ aa we ɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ko bɩrɩmɩ bilhuu, bilhuu kɩŋkaŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ɩ paalɩ we gɛɛ.” Yesu daga nala dɩ ba ta kyɩla kɩdiiliye abee gannɩ wɩya Luka

english_verse: You cannot be the slave of two masters! You will like one more than the other or be more loyal to one than the other. You cannot serve both God and money. Worry (Luke
translation_verse: Ba bɩ sɩ wuwo kpa dʋŋdɔɔdɩgɩ a dɔbɔ dʋŋdɔɔ-nɩmma balɩya, beewɩya ʋ sɩ kyo kɩdɩgɩ aŋ haasɩ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ. Ʋ sɩ kɩ tɩŋ kɩdɩgɩ nyʋwa weliŋ aŋ kɩ vɩya kɩdɩgɩ hʋ mɛ nyʋwa. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nal buloŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo kyo dʋnɩya no kɩna aŋ bɩl tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ.

english_verse: Don't worry and ask yourselves, “Will we have anything to eat? Will we have anything to drink? Will we have any clothes to wear?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya ma ta leŋ kɩdiiliye hʋ ma aa sɩ di, koo kɩŋ hʋ ma aa sɩ nyʋwa, koo kɩŋ hʋ mɛ ma aa sɩ laalɩ wɩya kyɩl ma.

english_verse: Look at the birds in the sky! They don't plant or harvest. They don't even store grain in barns. Yet your Father in heaven takes care of them. Aren't you worth much more than birds?
translation_verse: Ma deŋ na digibiisi, ba bee pala, ba bɩ kaŋ busolo mɛ a kɩ we kɩdiiliye, amɛ á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ nɛ aa tɩya ba kɩdiiliye. Ma yaŋ daa kaŋ tɔnɔ a te digibiisi no?

english_verse: Why worry about clothes? Look how the wild flowers grow. They don't work hard to make their clothes.
translation_verse: Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ gannɩ wɩya kyɩl ma? Ma deŋ na tɩɩfɩɩla aa we ɔhɔ tɩyaŋ. Ba bee tʋŋ tʋma, ba bɩ ala gannɩ mɛ kɩ laalɩ,

english_verse: But I tell you that Solomon with all his wealth wasn't as well clothed as one of them.
translation_verse: amɛ ba weliye rɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Kuwori Solomɔn gyɩ kaŋ kɩna rɛ weliŋ. Amɛ abee gɛɛ buloŋ ʋ gannɩ fa bɩ weliye a maga tɩɩfɩɩla no kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: God gives such beauty to everything that grows in the fields, even though it is here today and thrown into a fire tomorrow. God will surely do even more for you! Why do you have such little faith?
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ aa sɩ wuwo leŋ ɔhɔ aa sɩ we doŋ gyɩnaŋ bee kyiye dʋŋ weliye gɛɛ, ma bɩɩna anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ma na gannɩ tɔ ma tɩɩ rɛ koo. Ma na gɛɛ ma Wɩɩsɩ laadii aa maga?

english_verse: Only people who don't know God are always worrying about such things. Your Father in heaven knows you need all of these.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, ba aa rɛ aa leŋ kɩna no wɩya kyɩl ba. Ma Kuwo aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma maga dɩ ma kaŋ kɩna no buloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Don't condemn others, and God won't condemn you.
translation_verse: Ta dii ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna sarɩya, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ ta dii ɩ sarɩya.

english_verse: God will be as hard on you as you are on others! He will treat you exactly as you treat them.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ɛɛ hʋ tɩɩ ɩ aa yaŋ di ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna sarɩya, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ sɩ di ɩ sarɩya. Ɩ aa yaŋ kpa gɛɛ tɩŋ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ sɩ kpa tɩŋa ɩ.

english_verse: You can see the speck in your friend's eye, but you don't notice the log in your own eye.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ yaa a wuwo na gyagɩŋ hʋ aa we ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna sɩɩ tɩyaŋ aŋ bee na daakuu hʋ kɛ aa we ɩ tɩɩ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ?

english_verse: How can you say, “My friend, let me take the speck out of your eye,” when you don't see the log in your own eye?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ sɩ yaa basɩ tɩya ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna a baa dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ɩ lɩɩ gyagɩŋ hʋ aa we ʋ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ ta, aŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo lɩɩ daakuu hʋ aa we ɩ tɩɩ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ kɛ.

english_verse: You're nothing but show-offs! First, take the log out of your own eye; then you can see how to take the speck out of your friend's eye.
translation_verse: Ɛɛdɔŋ minaafigi tɩɩna! Laa sɩya lɩɩ daakuu hʋ aa we ɩ tɩɩ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ dɩ ɩ sɩya wuwo kɩ na weliŋ, dɩ ɩ na wuwo lɩɩ gyagɩŋ hʋ aa we ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna sɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: As bad as you are, you still know how to give good gifts to your children. But your heavenly Father is even more ready to give good things to people who ask.
translation_verse: Ma nala no yaŋ aa bɔmɔ nyɛ, aŋ gyɩŋ dɩ ma kpa kɩweliye tɩya ma biisi, ɛɛ rɛ ma kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ sɩ yaa a bɩ sɩ kpa kɩweliye aa tee gɛɛ tɩya nal hʋ aa sʋla ʋ kɩ kyɛ?

english_verse: Would any of you give your hungry child a stone, if the child asked for some bread?
translation_verse: Ma kɩbee rɛ sɩ laa nyʋwa kpa bʋyɩ tɩya ʋ biye dɩ ʋ rɛ baa ɩ tɩya ʋ kɩdiiliye?

english_verse: Ask, and you will receive. Search, and you will find. Knock, and the door will be opened for you.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ sʋl kɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ lee, ɩ aa na ʋ rɛ.

english_verse: Would you give your child a snake if the child asked for a fish?
translation_verse: Koo dɩ ʋ baa ɩ tɩya ʋ fuwonamɩya, ɩ sɩ kpa dʋŋ tɩya ʋ? Aayɩ, ɩ bɩ sɩ yaa gɛɛ!

english_verse: Treat others as you want them to treat you. This is what the Law and the Prophets are all about. The Narrow Gate (Luke
translation_verse: Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi gyɩ aa bine dɩ nala kɩ tɩŋa abee Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala wɩbasɩya hʋ buloŋ, ba wɩnyuu rɛ yaa wɩɩ no: Ɩ aa bee kyɛ wɩɩ ta kpaa ʋ yaa ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna. Ma tɩŋ dimbeenyʋwa hʋ aa bɩ gyalɩya a gyʋʋ wɩɩsɩbee Luka

english_verse: Anyone who hears and obeys these teachings of mine is like a wise person who built a house on solid rock.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Nal hʋ buloŋ aa gyegile nɩɩ wɩya no ŋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, a kɩ tɩŋ ba, ʋ tɩɩna kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ wɩgyʋnnɩ aa saa ʋ dɩya sɩgɩ bʋnyɩŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But the gate to life is very narrow. The road that leads there is so hard to follow that only a few people find it. A Tree and Its Fruit (Luke
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩsɩbee dimbeenyʋwa hʋ kɛ muro rɛ, ka ŋmanɩɩ hʋ mɛ aa mʋ doŋ valɩɩ hayɛ. Nala baŋmana dʋŋ nɛ wuwo na ŋmanɩɩ no a kɩ tɩŋa.” Tɩya abee ʋ nɔnɔ Luka

english_verse: You can tell what they are by what they do. No one picks grapes or figs from thornbushes.
translation_verse: Ba wɩyaalɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ ma sɩ tɩŋa a gyɩŋ ba. Beewɩya sɔgyaŋ bee nɔŋ kyʋkyɔyɩ, sugulugu mɛ bee nɔŋ tutogi-naŋkpɩlɩya.

english_verse: A good tree produces good fruit, and a bad tree produces bad fruit.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ yaŋ, tɩya hʋ buloŋ aa kaŋ laaŋfɩya aa nɔŋ nɔŋweliye rɛ, tɩya hʋ mɛ aa bɩ kaŋ laaŋfɩya ʋ aa nɔŋ nɔŋbɔŋlɔrɩnɩ rɛ.

english_verse: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.
translation_verse: Tɩya hʋ aa kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋbɔŋlɔrɩnɩ, tɩya hʋ mɛ aa bɩ kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋweliye.

english_verse: Every tree producing bad fruit will be chopped down and burned.
translation_verse: Tɩya hʋ buloŋ aa bee nɔŋ nɔŋweliye, ba aa ŋmaŋ lo rɛ, a paa we diŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You can tell who the false prophets are by their deeds. A Warning (Luke
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nala no wɩyaalɩya rɛ ma sɩ kpa a gyɩŋ ba.

english_verse: Anyone who hears my teachings and doesn't obey them is like a foolish person who built a house on sand.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa gyegile nɩɩ wɩya no ŋ aa basɩ, aŋ bee tɩŋ ba, ʋ tɩɩna kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bambugi aa saa ʋ dɩya sɩgɩ bumbugulo tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Rain poured down, rivers flooded, and the winds blew and beat against that house. Finally, it fell with a crash.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ duwoŋ ko nɩɩ. Fuwoni su a gbarɩ, puwobal mɛ gyigisi dɩya hʋ, ʋ tele ʋ buloŋ muŋsi muno muno.”

english_verse: Not everyone who calls me their Lord will get into the kingdom of heaven. Only the ones who obey my Father in heaven will get in.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa yɩrɩ ŋ, “Tɩɩna, Tɩɩna” daa sɩ gyʋʋ wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, see nala hʋ aa tɩŋ ŋ Kuwo aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: On the day of judgment many will call me their Lord. They will say, “We preached in your name, and in your name we forced out demons and worked many miracles.”
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ sarɩya kyɛdiilii hʋ rɛ ko pele, nala yʋga sɩ baa, “Á Tɩɩna, á Tɩɩna, á basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya a tɩya nala rɛ ɩ feŋ tɩyaŋ, aŋ kpa ɩ feŋ a kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ mɛ nala tɩyaŋ, aŋ ha yaa wɩmagɩla mɛ yʋga ɩ feŋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: But I will tell them, “I will have nothing to do with you! Get out of my sight, you evil people!” Two Builders (Luke
translation_verse: Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ yaŋ sɩ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Mamaa wɩbɔŋyaala, ma nyʋgɩsɩ ŋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ŋ bɩ gyɩŋ ma!” Yesu maga dɩɩsaala balɩya namaga Luka

english_verse: Rain poured down, rivers flooded, and winds beat against that house. But it was built on solid rock, and so it did not fall.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ duwoŋ ko nɩɩ. Fuwoni su a gbarɩ, puwobal mɛ gyigisi dɩya hʋ, ka ʋ bɩ tele, beewɩya bʋnyɩŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba saa ʋ.

english_verse: But the ones who should have been in the kingdom will be thrown out into the dark. They will cry and grit their teeth in pain.”
translation_verse: amɛ Iziral tɩmma hʋ fa aa maga dɩ ba we Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ aŋ bɩ gyʋwa, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa ba yuwo ta gyaŋhal tɩyaŋ dɩ ba we bilhuu tɩyaŋ a pɩŋ kɩ wii aŋ kɩ kyaŋ ba nyɩŋa.”

english_verse: That evening many people with demons in them were brought to Jesus. And with only a word he forced out the evil spirits and healed everyone who was sick.
translation_verse: Ʋ dɩdaana aa ko pele, nala kaŋ nɩgyamaa a ko Yesu lee. Gyɩŋbɔmɔ rɛ gyɩ kaŋ badɔmɔŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu nɔsɩ gyɩŋbɔmɔ hʋ ta ba lɩɩ ka ʋ tɩɩbɩ nala hʋ buloŋ gyɩ fa aa wɩɩlɩ.

english_verse: Suddenly a man with leprosy came and knelt in front of Jesus. He said, “Lord, you have the power to make me well, if only you wanted to.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ gbege kɩdɩgɩ ko tuu gbinni Yesu sɩya aŋ sʋla ʋ a baa, “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, dɩ ɩ rɛ kyo, ɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ŋ deye.”

english_verse: Jesus put his hand on the man and said, “I want to! Now you are well.” At once the man's leprosy disappeared.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu lɩɩ ʋ noŋ a dige ʋ aŋ baa, “Ŋ kyo rɛ. Deye!” Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ gbegisi hʋ pirigi teŋ doŋ.

english_verse: “I will go and heal him,” Jesus replied.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ sɩ ko leŋ dɩ ʋ deye.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he was so surprised that he turned and said to the crowd following him, “I tell you in all of Israel I've never found anyone with this much faith!
translation_verse: Yesu aa nɩɩ wɩya no, ʋ nyʋwa fɩyɛlɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya nɩgyamaa hʋ fa aa tɩŋa ʋ hal a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ŋ ha bɩ maakyiye na laadii no iriŋ Iziral paalʋʋ nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: “Lord, my servant is at home in such terrible pain that he can't even move.”
translation_verse: “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, ŋ dɩya tʋŋtʋnnɩ rɛ aa wɩɩlɩ a pɩŋ dɩya tɩyaŋ a kɩ na tʋwara kɩŋkaŋ. Ʋ bɩ wuwo kɩ vala.”

english_verse: Many people will come from everywhere to enjoy the feast in the kingdom of heaven with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, nala sɩ lɩɩ dʋnɩya logiŋ buloŋ a ko hɔŋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ba bee Abɩraham abee Azɩkɩ abee Gyeekɔbɩ kɩ di kɩna,

english_verse: Then Jesus said to the officer, “You may go home now. Your faith has made it happen.” Right then his servant was healed. Jesus Heals Many People (Mark
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya laalyuwolo nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ a baa, “Kɩ mʋ dɩya, wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ ɩ aa laa di baa ʋ sɩ yaa, ʋ rɛ sɩ yaa.” Saŋa no tɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ laalyuwolo nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ na laaŋfɩya. Yesu tɩɩbɩ nala yʋga Maakɩ

english_verse: Suddenly they shouted, “Jesus, Son of God, what do you want with us? Have you come to punish us before our time?”
translation_verse: Ba aa naa Yesu, ba pirigi kyiyesi a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ Biye, bee rɛ ɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ɩ yaa ma? Ɩ ko dɩ ɩ dɔgɩsɩ ma rɛ ka saŋa hʋ na pele koo?”

english_verse: Everyone in town came out to meet Jesus. When they saw him, they begged him to leave their part of the country.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ bee hʋ nala buloŋ sii lɩɩ mʋ dɩ ba na Yesu. Ba aa mʋʋ na ʋ, ba sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ lɩɩ ba paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Jesus went to the home of Peter, where he found that Peter's mother-in-law was sick in bed with fever.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mʋ Piita dɩya. Ʋ aa gyʋwa dɩ Piita hɩɩlhaaŋ pɩna kɩ wɩɩlɩ, ʋ teŋ buloŋ nɩma.

english_verse: He took her by the hand, and the fever left her. Then she got up and served Jesus a meal.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu mʋ dige ʋ noŋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ teŋ fa aa nɩma gɛɛ, ʋ fɩyɛlɩ. Ʋ sii yaa kɩdiiliye tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet Isaiah had said, “He healed our diseases and made us well.” Some Who Wanted To Go with Jesus (Luke
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa wɩɩ no dɩ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaal Azaaya tɩyaŋ a basɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ʋ gyɩ baa, “Ʋ rɛ laa ma ta á wɩɩla buloŋ tɩyaŋ.” Nala aa maga dɩ ba tɩŋ Yesu hal Luka

english_verse: A teacher of the Law of Moses came up to him and said, “Teacher, I'll go anywhere with you!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩl kɩdɩgɩ ko ʋ lee a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, ŋ yaa siri rɛ dɩ ŋ tɩŋa ɩ hal a mʋ lee kɛ buloŋ ɩ aa mʋʋ.”

english_verse: so the disciples went over to him and woke him up. They said, “Lord, wake up! Save us before we drown!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ mʋ kyisi ʋ a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Á Tɩɩna, laa ma ta, dɩ ɛɛ daa á sɩ sʋba.”

english_verse: After Jesus left in a boat with his disciples,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mʋ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro, ʋ hatɩnna mɛ tɩŋa ʋ hal a mʋ gyʋʋ.

english_verse: a terrible storm suddenly struck the lake, and waves started splashing into their boat. Jesus was sound asleep,
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ba aa mʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ puwoduwo kɩdɩgɩ pirigi kɩ dɔŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ nɩɩpuwo tɔ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ buloŋ. Nɩɩduworiboro hʋ fa kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ tuu nɩɩmemii. Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Yesu kɛ pɩŋ doo.

english_verse: The men in the boat were amazed and said, “Who is this? Even the wind and the waves obey him.” Two Men with Demons in Them (Mark
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba buloŋ nyʋʋsɩ fɩyɛlɩ, ba kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Nɩgɛɛ iriŋ nɛ nyɛ? Fuwoni abee puwoni buloŋ kɩ tɩŋa ʋ nyʋwa?” Yesu kile gyɩŋsɩ ta baala balɩya tɩyaŋ Maakɩ

english_verse: After Jesus had crossed the lake, he came to shore near the town of Gadara and started down the road. Two men with demons in them came to him from the tombs. They were so fierce that no one could travel that way.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii kpa mʋ Gadara paalʋʋ fuwo hʋ kyolo. Dɩ baala balɩya lɩɩ bilni tɩyaŋ a ko kyeme ʋ. Gyɩŋbɔmɔ rɛ gyɩ kaŋ baala no ba kɩ yaarɩ. Nal buloŋ gyɩ bɩ wuwo kɩ tɩŋ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ baala no balɩya aa we, beewɩya, ba gyɩ bɔmɔ rɛ weliŋ.

english_verse: Not far from there a large herd of pigs was feeding.
translation_verse: Dɩ poriku-gyamaa mɛ sɩŋ kpaga doŋ a kɩ di kɩna.

english_verse: So the demons begged Jesus, “If you force us out, please send us into those pigs!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ gyɩŋbɔmɔ hʋ sʋla Yesu a baa, “Dɩ ɩ ko kil ma ta dɩ á lɩɩ nala no tɩyaŋ, leŋ dɩ á mʋ gyʋʋ porikusi no tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus told them to go, and they went out of the men and into the pigs. All at once the pigs rushed down the steep bank into the lake and drowned.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma lɩɩ kɩ mʋ.” Ɛɛ rɛ ba lɩɩ baala hʋ tɩyaŋ a mʋ gyʋʋ porikusi hʋ tɩyaŋ, porikusi hʋ buloŋ sii fá a lɩɩ fuwo hʋ nyʋwa a tuu gyʋʋ fuwo hʋ tɩyaŋ a sʋba.

english_verse: The people taking care of the pigs ran to the town and told everything, especially what had happened to the two men.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ porikudaala hʋ fá mʋ gyʋʋ bee hʋ tɩyaŋ a basɩ wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ aa yaa doŋ abee wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa baala hʋ gyɩ aa kaŋ gyɩŋbɔmɔ hʋ mɛ tɩyaŋ a tɩya bee hʋ nala.

english_verse: Jesus got into a boat and crossed back over to the town where he lived.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro a kyol fuwo hʋ a mɩɩgɩ kpa mʋ ʋ bee.

english_verse: Jesus heard them and answered, “Healthy people don't need a doctor, but sick people do.
translation_verse: Yesu aa nɩɩ wɩɩ no, ʋ mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Nala hʋ aa kaŋ laaŋfɩya, ba bee kyɛ tɩɩba tɩɩna, see nala hʋ aa wɩɩlɩ.”

english_verse: No one pours new wine into old wineskins. The wine would swell and burst the old skins. Then the wine would be lost, and the skins would be ruined. New wine must be put into new wineskins. Both the skins and the wine will then be safe. A Dying Girl and a Sick Woman (Mark
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nal buloŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa kpa sɩhuwo a we pulbɩnɩɩ tɩyaŋ, see dɩ ʋ kpa we pulfalɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ gɛɛ daa pulbɩnɩɩ hʋ sɩ pɔsɔ dɩ sɩŋ hʋ bɩsɩ ta. Sɩhuwo maga dɩ ɩ kpa we pulfalɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ dɩ sɩŋ hʋ bee pul hʋ buloŋ ta kyogo ta.” Yesu kyisi Gyuuma nɩhɩyawʋ toluu sʋʋ tɩyaŋ aŋ tɩɩba haaŋ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ Maakɩ

english_verse: News about this spread all over that part of the country. Jesus Heals Two Blind Men
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no Yesu aa yaa taalɩ haŋ paalʋʋ hʋ buloŋ. Yesu tɩɩba nyʋlma balɩya

english_verse: Some teachers of the Law of Moses said to themselves, “Jesus must think he is God!”
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla badɔmɔŋ mɩɩgɩ hɔŋ kɩ gʋrɩmɩ wɩya a baa, “Baal no aa basɩ wɩya gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ʋ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ.”

english_verse: But Jesus knew what was in their minds, and he said, “Why are you thinking such evil things?
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu kɛ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ba gyɩ aa bɩɩnɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma kɩ bɩɩnɩ wɩbɔmɔ no.

english_verse: But I will show you that the Son of Man has the right to forgive sins here on earth.” So Jesus said to the man, “Get up! Pick up your mat and go on home.”
translation_verse: Ŋ sɩ dagɩ ma dɩ ma gyɩma anɩɩ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye kaŋ dee rɛ ŋ aa sɩ wuwo kpa dʋnɩya nala wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ba.” Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ basɩ tɩya baal hʋ a baa, “Sii kpa ɩ wasa a kɩ mʋ dɩya.”

english_verse: The man got up and went home.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ baal hʋ nyagɩ sii sɩŋ, a kɩ mʋ dɩya.

english_verse: Go and learn what the Scriptures mean when they say, ‘Instead of offering sacrifices to me, I want you to be merciful to others.’ I didn't come to invite good people to be my followers. I came to invite sinners.” People Ask about Going without Eating (Mark
translation_verse: Ma mʋ deŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a na wɩɩ no ba aa saba memii. Ba saba rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa, “Ma aa fá nala sikii, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ma aa lɩɩ wɩɩsʋllɩ kɩna a kpʋ tɩya ŋ.” Wɩbɔŋyaala wɩya rɛ ŋ ko, ŋ bɩ ko tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma wɩya. Ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu nyʋwa vʋwayɩ wɩya Maakɩ

english_verse: As Jesus was leaving that place, two blind men began following him and shouting, “Son of David, have pity on us!”
translation_verse: Yesu bɩl aa lɩɩ doŋ kɩ mʋ, nyʋlma balɩya mɛ sii kɩ tɩŋa ʋ hal aŋ huwori kɩ yɩrɩ ʋ a baa, “Yesu, Deviti Biye, fá á sikii.”

english_verse: As Jesus and his disciples were on their way, some people brought to him a man who could not talk because a demon was in him.
translation_verse: Nyʋlɩma hʋ balɩya aa yaŋ lɩɩ dɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ nala badɔmɔŋ mɛ kaŋ baal kɩdɩgɩ gyɩŋbɔmɔ aa kana ʋ bɩ wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩya, a ko Yesu lee.

english_verse: As Jesus was leaving, he saw a tax collector named Matthew sitting at the place for paying taxes. Jesus said to him, “Follow me.” Matthew got up and went with him.
translation_verse: Yesu aa lɩɩ doŋ kɩ mʋ, dɩ lampolaal kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Matiwu rɛ hɔŋ ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɩya tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu yɩrɩ ʋ a baa, “Sii ko kɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal.” Ʋ sii a kɩ tɩŋ Yesu hal.

english_verse: Later, Jesus and his disciples were having dinner at Matthew's house. Many tax collectors and other sinners were also there.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ buloŋ kpa mʋ Matiwu dɩya, a hɔŋ kɩ di kɩna. Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ lampolaala bee wɩbɔŋyaala mɛ ko pɛ ba tɩyaŋ, ba buloŋ kɩ di kɩna hʋ.

english_verse: Some Pharisees asked Jesus' disciples, “Why does your teacher eat with tax collectors and other sinners?”
translation_verse: Farasiima badɔmɔŋ aa naa gɛɛ, ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma nɩhɩyawʋ bee lampolaala abee wɩbɔŋyaala no buloŋ hɔŋ kɩ di kɩna?”

english_verse: While Jesus was still speaking, an official came and knelt in front of him. The man said, “My daughter has just now died! Please come and place your hand on her. Then she will live again.”
translation_verse: Yesu ha gyɩ aa basɩ wɩya hʋ gɛɛ rɛ, Gyuuma nɩhɩyawʋ kɩdɩgɩ ko ʋ lee, a tuu gbinni ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ toluu rɛ sʋba lagɩlagɩ no, amɛ ko kpa ɩ nosi dɔbɔ ʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus turned. He saw the woman and said, “Don't worry! You are now healed because of your faith.” At that moment she was healed.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɩɩgɩ galdaasɩ a na ʋ, a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ toluu, ta leŋ kambɩŋ kana ɩ, ɩ aa laa ŋ di rɛ tɩŋ ɩ deye.” Haaŋ hʋ pirigi na laaŋfɩya haŋ lagɩlagɩbiye hʋ.

english_verse: After Jesus had forced the demon out, the man started talking. The crowds were so amazed they began saying, “Nothing like this has ever happened in Israel!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ hʋ baal hʋ tɩyaŋ, ka baal hʋ piili kɩ basɩ wɩya. Ʋ yaa nal buloŋ wɩkperii. Ɛɛ rɛ ba baa, “Á ha bɩ maakyiye na wɩɩ no iriŋ Iziral paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Some followers of John the Baptist came and asked Jesus, “Why do we and the Pharisees often go without eating, while your disciples never do?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ hatɩnna ko Yesu lee a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ á bee Farasiima kɩ vʋwa nyʋwa aŋka ɩ hatɩnna hʋ kɛ bee vʋwa nyʋwa?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: The friends of a bridegroom aren't sad while he is still with them. But the time will come when he will be taken from them. Then they will go without eating.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa “Dɩ nal lɛ kpaa hafalɩɩ ka dɩ ʋ bee ʋ kyaŋsɩ hɔŋ, ʋ kyaŋsɩ hʋ tɩya sɩ kyogi? Aayɩ, amɛ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ we doŋ ba aa sɩ kaŋ baal hʋ mʋ lee kɩdɩgɩ ka dɩ ʋ kyaŋsɩ hʋ vʋwa nyʋwa.”

english_verse: No one uses a new piece of cloth to patch old clothes. The patch would shrink and tear a bigger hole.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl maga namaga tɩya ba a baa, “Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ kpa taŋfalɩɩ a ala tɔ gabɩnɩɩ bol. Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa gɛɛ, taŋfalɩɩ hʋ sɩ kʋʋrɩ, dɩ gabɩnɩɩ hʋ marɩ kɩyasɩ pɛ.

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples got up and went with the man.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ buloŋ sii tɩŋ baal hʋ hal ba kpa kɩ mʋ.

english_verse: When Jesus went into the home of the official and saw the musicians and the crowd of mourners,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka Yesu kpa gyʋʋ Gyuuma nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ dɩya. Ʋ gyʋwa dɩ haŋye-taala abee lodaala hʋ sɩna a kɩ wii.

english_verse: he said, “Get out of here! The little girl isn't dead. She is just asleep.” Everyone started laughing at Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma buloŋ mʋ lɩɩ, haŋtolibiye hʋ bɩ sʋba, ʋ ta pɩŋ doo rɛ.” Ɛɛ rɛ ba buloŋ mɩɩgɩ kɩ mʋma ʋ.

english_verse: But after the crowd had been sent out of the house, Jesus went to the girl's bedside. He took her by the hand and helped her up.
translation_verse: Amɛ ba aa kile nala hʋ buloŋ ba lɩɩ gɛɛ, Yesu mʋ gyʋʋ haŋtolibiye hʋ dɩya, a mʋ kaŋ ʋ noŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ sii.

english_verse: After Jesus had gone indoors, the two blind men came up to him. He asked them, “Do you believe I can make you well?” “Yes, Lord,” they answered.
translation_verse: Yesu aa mʋʋ gyʋʋ dɩya hʋ, nyʋlma hʋ balɩya mɛ kpa ko ʋ lee. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ma laa di anɩɩ ŋ sɩ wuwo tɩɩbɩ ma dɩ ma deye rɛ koo?” Ɛɛ rɛ ba baa, “Waa, á Tɩɩna, á laa di rɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus touched their eyes and said, “Because of your faith, you will be healed.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu dige dige ba sɩya tɩyaŋ aŋ baa, “Ɛɛ hʋ ma aa laa di anɩɩ ʋ sɩ yaa, ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ɛɛ yaa.”

english_verse: They were able to see, and Jesus strictly warned them not to tell anyone about him.
translation_verse: Ba sɩya suri, ka Yesu basɩ tɩya ba abee sɩfɩyasɩ a baa, “Ma ta ko basɩ wɩɩ no tɩya nal buloŋ.”

english_verse: But they left and talked about him to everyone in that part of the country. Jesus Heals a Man Who Could Not Talk
translation_verse: Amɛ ba vɩya aŋ lɩɩ basɩ ʋ wɩya a taalɩ paalʋʋ hʋ buloŋ. Yesu tɩɩba ganɩɩ

english_verse: But the Pharisees said, “The leader of the demons gives him the power to force out demons.” Jesus Has Pity on People
translation_verse: Amɛ Farasiima hʋ kɩ basɩ anɩɩ gyɩŋbɔmɔ kuwori rɛ tɩya ʋ dee ʋ wuwo kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ kɩ ta gɛɛ. Yesu fáá nala sikii

english_verse: Jesus went to every town and village. He taught in their synagogues and preached the good news about God's kingdom. Jesus also healed every kind of disease and sickness.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii gɔllɩ tɔbala abee tɔbiisi hʋ buloŋ a kɩ daga nala Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, aŋ pɛ kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ wɩweliye wɩya, aŋ kɩ tɩɩbɩ nala hʋ wɩɩla iriŋ iriŋ buloŋ aa kana.

english_verse: When he saw the crowds, he felt sorry for them. They were confused and helpless, like sheep without a shepherd.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa naa nɩgyamaa hʋ, sikii buloŋ kana ʋ, beewɩya ʋ naa nɩɩ wɩya yʋga aa dɔŋ ba rɛ, ka ba bɩ kaŋ nal aa sɩ kyiyeli ba. Ba kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ piyese aa bɩ kaŋ pedaal.

english_verse: He said to his disciples, “A large crop is in the fields, but there are only a few workers.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ baa, “Kɩkʋmɩya hʋ yʋga rɛ baga hʋ tɩyaŋ, amɛ tʋŋtʋnna hʋ bɩ yʋga ba aa sɩ kʋŋ kɩna hʋ.

english_verse: Ask the Lord in charge of the harvest to send out workers to bring it in.”
translation_verse: Ma yaŋ sʋla baga hʋ tɩɩna dɩ ʋ kyɛ tʋŋtʋnna yʋga dɩ ba kʋŋ baga hʋ kɩna.”

english_verse: Philip, Bartholomew, Thomas, Matthew the tax collector, James the son of Alphaeus, and Thaddaeus were also apostles.
translation_verse: abee Fɩlɩpɩ, abee Batolomi, abee Tɔmaasɩ, abee Matiwu lampolaal hʋ, abee Alfiyasɩ biibaal Gyemsi, abee Tadiyo,

english_verse: But when someone arrests you, don't worry about what you will say or how you will say it. At that time you will be given the words to say.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba ko kaŋ ma mʋ nala no sɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ ma bembiye kɩ sii wɩya hʋ ma aa sɩ basɩ laa ma tɩɩ wɩya. Beewɩya, dɩ saŋa hʋ rɛ ko pele, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ daga ma wɩɩ hʋ ma aa sɩ basɩ.

english_verse: Go only to the people of Israel, because they are like a flock of lost sheep.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma mʋ Iziral nala lee, nala no kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ piyese aa nyʋgɩsa.

english_verse: The others were Simon, known as the Eager One, and Judas Iscariot, who later betrayed Jesus. Instructions for the Twelve Apostles (Mark
translation_verse: abee Siimɔŋ, nal hʋ aa kyɩl ʋ nala wɩya kɩŋkaŋ, abee Gyudasɩ Isɩkarɔtɩ nal hʋ a ko yaa minaafigi tɩɩna, a kpa Yesu yallɩ.

english_verse: Jesus sent out the twelve apostles with these instructions: Stay away from the Gentiles and don't go to any Samaritan town.
translation_verse: Tɩŋdarɩ hʋ Yesu gyɩ aa kpaa tɩya ʋ kpambɩsɩ fi abee balɩya hʋ ba lɩɩ rɛ nyɛ. Ʋ baa, “Ma ta ko mʋ nala aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma paalʋʋ koo Samaarɩya paalʋʋ tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ kɛ buloŋ.

english_verse: And don't carry a traveling bag or an extra shirt or sandals or a walking stick. Workers deserve their food.
translation_verse: Ma ta kpaa diiku ma ŋmanɩɩ no valɩɩ tɩyaŋ, a ta paa gatʋŋnyʋwa bʋlɩya koo naatɔbɔ tʋŋnyʋwa bʋlɩya mɛ. Ma ta kol daatɩgɩya balɩya mɛ. Tʋŋtʋnnɩ buloŋ maga dɩ ba tɩya ʋ kɩna hʋ aa maga dɩ ʋ kana rɛ.

english_verse: So when you go to a town or a village, find someone able and willing to have you as their guest and stay with them until you leave.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko mʋ pele tɔɔ buloŋ, ma kyɛ nal hʋ aa sɩ laa nyʋwa laa ma biŋ, dɩ ma we ʋ lee a mʋ pele saŋa hʋ ma aa sɩ lɩɩ tɔɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I promise you the day of judgment will be easier for the towns of Sodom and Gomorrah than for that town. Warning about Trouble (Mark
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, dʋnɩya sarɩya hʋ kyɛdiilii, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ haŋ tɔɔ hʋ nala a te gɛɛ hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa dɔgɩsɩ Sodɔm bee Gomora tɩmma ba wɩbɔmɔ nyuniŋ.” Tʋwara hʋ ma aa sɩ na Maakɩ

english_verse: Brothers and sisters will betray one another and have each other put to death. Parents will betray their own children, and children will turn against their parents and have them killed.
translation_verse: Nɩmmabalɩya sɩ kaŋ dɔmɔŋ a mʋ tɩya dɩ ba kpʋ. Dɩ kuwoma mɛ yaa ba biisi gɛɛ tɩɩ. Biisi mɛ sɩ vɩya ba kuwoma abee ba nɩmma nyʋʋsɩ tɩŋɩɩ aŋ kaŋ ba mʋ tɩya dɩ ba kpʋ.

english_verse: Watch out for people who will take you to court and have you beaten in their synagogues.
translation_verse: Ma pɔ ma tɩɩ weliŋ abee nala no, beewɩya ba sɩ kaŋ ma mʋ nɩhɩyasɩ sɩya dɩ ba di ma sarɩya aŋ vɩɩrɩ ma ba wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Because of me, you will be dragged before rulers and kings to tell them and the Gentiles about your faith.
translation_verse: Ba sɩ kuu ŋ wɩya, a kaŋ ma mʋ paalʋʋsɩ nɩbala abee kuworo sɩya dɩ ba di ma sarɩya ka dɩ ma di ŋ daŋsɩya a tɩya ba abee nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma buloŋ.

english_verse: But you will not really be the one speaking. The Spirit from your Father will tell you what to say.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ ma aa sɩ basɩ, ba bɩ sɩ yaa ma tɩɩ wɩbasɩya. Ma Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩŋ ma tɩyaŋ a basɩ wɩya no tɩya ma.

english_verse: Everyone will hate you because of me. But if you remain faithful until the end, you will be saved.
translation_verse: Nal nal buloŋ sɩ kuu ŋ wɩya a haasɩ ma. Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa kaŋ mala ʋ laadii tɩyaŋ a mʋ teŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa ʋ ta.

english_verse: When people mistreat you in one town, hurry to another one. I promise you before you have gone to all the towns of Israel, the Son of Man will come.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba ko kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ma tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ, ma lɩɩ a fá mʋ tɔdʋma. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ma bɩ sɩ wuwo tʋŋ tʋma hʋ ŋ aa kpaa tɩya ma teŋ Iziral paalʋʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye na mɩɩgɩ ko.

english_verse: Students are not better than their teacher, and slaves are not better than their master.
translation_verse: Sakuuribiye bee te ʋ dɩdagɩl. Ɛɛ rɛ yoŋ mɛ bee te ʋ tɩɩna.

english_verse: It is enough for students to be like their teacher and for slaves to be like their master. If people call the head of the family Satan, what will they say about the rest of the family? The One To Fear (Luke
translation_verse: Amɛ sakuuribiye maga dɩ ʋ mɛ kɩɩ dɩdagɩl hʋ aa daga ʋ rɛ. Yoŋ mɛ maga dɩ ʋ kɩɩ nal hʋ aa deŋe ʋ rɛ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ yaŋ kaŋ dɩya tɩɩna kɩ yɩrɩ Sɩtaanɩ, ɛɛ kɛ, ba sɩ tɩya dɩya hʋ nala fene aa lɔrɔ te Sɩtaanɩ. Nal hʋ aa maga dɩ ma kɩ fá ʋ Luka

english_verse: Don't be afraid of people. They can kill you, but they cannot harm your soul. Instead, you should fear God who can destroy both your body and your soul in hell.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma ta kɩ fáá nala hʋ aa sɩ wuwo kpʋ ma dʋŋ. Amɛ ma kɩ fá Wɩɩsɩ, beewɩya ʋ rɛ kaŋ dee ʋ aa sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ɩ sʋba, a kaŋ dee mɛ ʋ aa sɩ maakyiye kpa ɩ we diŋ.

english_verse: Aren't two sparrows sold for only a penny? But your Father knows when any one of them falls to the ground.
translation_verse: Kokobiisi balɩya yalɩɩ yaa baŋmɛ rɛ? Amɛ dɩ ma kuwo Wɩɩsɩ mɛ yaŋ bɩ tɩya ŋmanɩɩ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bee sʋba.

english_verse: Even the hairs on your head are counted.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ paalɩ gyɩŋ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nyupʋna nyʋwa rɛ.

english_verse: So don't be afraid! You are worth much more than many sparrows. Telling Others about Christ (Luke
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ kambɩŋ kaŋ ma. Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ sɩya kɛ tɩyaŋ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ kaŋ tɔnɔ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ a te kokogyamaa.

english_verse: If you tell others you belong to me, I will tell my Father in heaven you are my followers.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ wuwo sɩŋ gyamaa tɩyaŋ a baa dɩ ʋ yaa ŋ nal lɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ŋ mɛ sɩ basɩ ʋ tɩɩna wɩya ŋ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But if you reject me, I will tell my Father in heaven you don't belong to me. Not Peace, but Trouble (Luke
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ mɛ aa sɩ vɩya ŋ wɩya gyamaa tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ŋ mɛ sɩ vɩya ʋ tɩɩna wɩya ŋ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't think I came to bring peace to the earth! I came to bring trouble, not peace.
translation_verse: Ma ta bɩɩna anɩɩ ŋ ko dʋnɩya dɩ nala sʋma rɛ? Aayɩ, yuwo rɛ ŋ kaŋ ko.

english_verse: Your worst enemies will be in your own family.
translation_verse: Nal dɩya nala tɩɩ rɛ sɩ yaa ʋ dɔmɔ, a haasɩ ʋ te nal buloŋ.

english_verse: If you love your father or mother or even your sons and daughters more than me, you are not fit to be my disciples.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyo ʋ kuwo abee ʋ naa a te ŋ, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ maga dɩ ʋ yaa ŋ hatɩnnɩ. Nal hʋ buloŋ mɛ aa kyo ʋ biibaal koo ʋ toluu a te ŋ, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ maga dɩ ʋ yaa ŋ hatɩnnɩ.

english_verse: And unless you are willing to take up your cross and follow me, you are not fit to be my disciples.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ baasɩ ʋ tɩɩ daagarɩɩ, a kɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ maga dɩ ʋ yaa ŋ hatɩnnɩ.

english_verse: If you try to save your life, you will lose it. But if you give it up for me, you will surely find it. Rewards (Mark
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyo ʋ tɩɩ mɩɩbol, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ kpa ʋ mɩɩbol ta. Amɛ nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa sɩ kuu ŋ wɩya a vɩya ʋ mɩɩbol ta ʋ tɩɩna sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: Anyone who welcomes a prophet, just because that person is a prophet, will be given the same reward as a prophet. Anyone who welcomes a good person, just because that person is good, will be given the same reward as a good person.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal weliŋ akuu ʋ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩya ʋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal tuno rɛ. Nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna weliŋ akuu ʋ aa yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩya ʋ tɩɩna mɛ tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna tuno rɛ.

english_verse: Anyone who welcomes you welcomes me. And anyone who welcomes me also welcomes the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ kaŋ ma weliŋ, mɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ weliŋ gɛɛ. Nal hʋ buloŋ mɛ aa kana ŋ weliŋ, Tɩɩna hʋ aa tɩma ŋ mɛ rɛ ʋ kaŋ weliŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: And anyone who gives one of my most humble followers a cup of cool water, just because that person is my follower, will be rewarded.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa sɩ yaa nɩɩfɩyɛlɩɩ mɛ gba tɩya ŋ hatɩnna no tɩyaŋ nɩbiye akuu ʋ aa yaa ŋ hatɩnnɩ wɩya, wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma Wɩɩsɩ kɔnɩ sɩ tuŋ ʋ tɩɩna.”

english_verse: As John's followers were going away, Jesus spoke to the crowds about John: What sort of person did you go out into the desert to see? Was he like tall grass blown about by the wind?
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ Gyɔɔŋ hatɩnna hʋ aa kpaa kɩ mʋ, ɛɛ rɛ Yesu piili basɩ Gyɔɔŋ wɩya a kɩ tɩya gyamaa hʋ. Ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba rɛ a baa, “Ma gyɩ aa mʋʋ Gyɔɔŋ lee pogo hʋ tɩyaŋ nɩgɛɛ iriŋ nɛ ma gyɩ fa kɩ yɩyɛlɩ anɩɩ ma sɩ mʋ na. Ma gyɩ bɩɩna Gyɔɔŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ɔhɔ puwo a kaŋ kɩ viisi rɛ ma mʋ ma na koo?

english_verse: John the Baptist did not go around eating and drinking, and you said, “That man has a demon in him!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ yaŋ, saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Gyɔɔŋ gyɩ aa ko ma lee, ʋ gyɩ aa vʋwa nyʋwa rɛ, aŋ bee nyʋwa sɩŋ mɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ nala baa dɩ gyɩŋbɔŋ nɛ kana ʋ.

english_verse: After Jesus had finished instructing his twelve disciples, he left and began teaching and preaching in the towns.
translation_verse: Yesu a basɩ wɩya no a tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ fi abee balɩya ko teŋ, ʋ lɩɩ doŋ a mʋ dɩ ʋ daga nala aŋ pɛ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya Galili paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: John was in prison when he heard what Christ was doing. So John sent some of his followers
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ gyɩ we nɩtɔdɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ʋ aa nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Krisita aa yaa, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ tɩŋ ʋ hatɩnna badɔmɔŋ,

english_verse: to ask Jesus, “Are you the one we should be looking for? Or must we wait for someone else?”
translation_verse: ba mʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Basɩ tɩya ma, ɩ rɛ yaa nal hʋ Gyɔɔŋ fa aa baa dɩ ʋ sɩ ko laa ma ta hʋ, koo á ha kɩ gyegili nɩdɩma?”

english_verse: The blind are now able to see, and the lame can walk. People with leprosy are being healed, and the deaf can hear. The dead are raised to life, and the poor are hearing the good news.
translation_verse: Ma mʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ dɩ nyʋlɩma sɩya suro rɛ, gbarɩga kɩ vala, gbegisi mɛ kɩ deye, wonni kɩ nɩɩ wɩya, nala hʋ a sʋba kɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Ka ba basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ mɛ a kɩ tɩya nyaaba.

english_verse: What kind of man did you go out to see? Was he someone dressed in fine clothes? People who dress like that live in the king's palace.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɛɛ yaŋ daa, nɩgɛɛ iriŋ nɛ ma lɩɩ dɩ ma na? Ma lɩɩ dɩ ma na nal a laalɩ gaweliye rɛ? Aayɩ. Deŋ na, nala hʋ aa laalɩ gannɩ no iriŋ, ba aa we kuworidɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: What did you really go out to see? Was he a prophet? He certainly was. I tell you that he was more than a prophet.
translation_verse: Ma yaŋ daga ŋ nal hʋ iriŋ ma aa lɩɩ doŋ dɩ ma na. Ma mʋwa dɩ ma na Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ koo? Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nal hʋ ma gyɩ aa naa, ʋ tee Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ.

english_verse: I tell you no one ever born on this earth is greater than John the Baptist. But whoever is least in the kingdom of heaven is greater than John.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya nala hʋ a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ba ha bɩ maakyiye lʋl nal buloŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ ʋ tee Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ. Amɛ nal hʋ yaŋ aa yaa nɩbiye Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna mɛ rɛ tee Gyɔɔŋ.

english_verse: From the time of John the Baptist until now, violent people have been trying to take over the kingdom of heaven by force.
translation_verse: A yaŋ lɩɩ saŋa hʋ Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool aa piile basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya a kaŋ kɩ ko gyɩnaŋ, nala kaŋ Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ wɩya kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ nɛ, ɛɛ rɛ gaduwogo kɩ lʋga dɩ ba kaŋ fasɩ.

english_verse: “We played the flute, but you would not dance! We sang a funeral song, but you would not mourn!”
translation_verse: ‘Á yɩɩ yɩɩla rɛ tɩya ma, ka ma vɩya gʋwayɩ. Á taa haŋyee mɛ tɩya ma ka ma vɩya wiyi.”’

english_verse: But the Son of Man goes around eating and drinking, and you say, “That man eats and drinks too much! He is even a friend of tax collectors and sinners.” Yet Wisdom is shown to be right by what it does. The Unbelieving Towns (Luke
translation_verse: Aŋka mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye mɛ ko a kɩ di kɩna aŋ kɩ nyʋwa sɩŋ mɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ nala baa dɩ baal no kɛ yaa naboliŋ tɩɩna rɛ, a yaa sɩnyʋwal mɛ aŋ pɛ kaŋ lampolaala abee wɩbɔŋyaala buloŋ mɛ yaa ʋ kyaŋsɩ. Nala hʋ aa kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩgyʋŋ hʋ, ba wɩyaalɩya rɛ aa daga.” Tɔnɩ hʋ nala aa bɩ laa Yesu wɩya di Luka

english_verse: In the towns where Jesus had worked most of his miracles, the people refused to turn to God. So Jesus was upset with them and said:
translation_verse: Tɔnɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ Yesu gyɩ aa yaa wɩmagɩla hʋ gyeniŋ buloŋ nala gyɩ bɩ bɩrɩma lɩɩ ba wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ ba sɩya wɩya tɩya ba a baa,

english_verse: So I tell you on the day of judgment the people of Sodom will get off easier than you. Come to Me and Rest (Luke
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ yaŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, sarɩya hʋ kyɛdiilii Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ Kapɛɛnam tɩmma a te sodɔm tɩmma.” Yesu basɩ tɩya nala dɩ ba ko ʋ lee a na wiyese Luka

english_verse: At that moment Jesus said: My Father, Lord of heaven and earth, I am grateful that you hid all this from wise and educated people and showed it to ordinary people.
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu baa, “Ŋ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ, ɩ rɛ yaa wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha buloŋ Tɩɩna. Ŋ aa dannɩ ɩ rɛ akuu wɩya hʋ ɩ aa kpaa faŋa wɩgyʋnna, aŋ kpa ba daga nala hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ.

english_verse: My Father has given me everything, and he is the only one who knows the Son. The only one who truly knows the Father is the Son. But the Son wants to tell others about the Father, so they can know him too.
translation_verse: Ŋ Kuwo kpaa kɩŋ buloŋ dee tɩya ŋ nɛ. Ŋ Kuwo dʋŋ nɛ gyɩŋ gɛɛ ŋ aa kɩya. Ŋ dʋŋ mɛ rɛ gyɩŋ gɛɛ ŋ Kuwo aa kɩya. Nal buloŋ bɩ gyɩma ʋ, see nala hʋ dʋŋ ŋ aa lɩya a daga ʋ tɩya ba.”

english_verse: If you are tired from carrying heavy burdens, come to me and I will give you rest.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma nala hʋ buloŋ aa lɔlɔ, aŋka wɩya vʋwa ma biŋ, ma ko ŋ lee, dɩ ŋ tɩya ma wiyese.

english_verse: Take the yoke I give you. Put it on your shoulders and learn from me. I am gentle and humble, and you will find rest.
translation_verse: Ma tɩŋ ŋ nyʋwa dɩ á yaa nyʋʋdɩgɩ, dɩ ma wuwo gyɩŋ tʋma hʋ ŋ aa kpaa tɩya ma dɩ ma tʋma weliŋ, beewɩya, ŋ sɩya fɩyɛla rɛ ka ŋ gyɩŋ ŋ tɩɩ kanɩɩ mɛ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ yaa gɛɛ, ŋ sɩ tɩya ma wiyese.

english_verse: Some Pharisees noticed this and said to Jesus, “Why are your disciples picking grain on the Sabbath? They are not supposed to do this!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima badɔmɔŋ na ba a pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Ɩ bɩ naa? Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ sɩna daa ɩ hatɩnna hʋ kɩ kyogi gɛɛ.”

english_verse: But when I force out demons by the power of God's Spirit, it proves that God's kingdom has already come to you.
translation_verse: Aayɩ Bɛlizebul daa tɩya ŋ dee hʋ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ wuwo kɩ kil gyɩŋbɔmɔ nala tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Nyɛ rɛ yaŋ daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ ko we ma lee rɛ.

english_verse: Haven't you read in the Law of Moses that the priests are allowed to work in the temple on the Sabbath? But no one says they are guilty of breaking the law of the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ tʋma hʋ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala hʋ aa kɩ tʋma Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ yaa kyɛɛ no sɩna rɛ. Amɛ ma tɩɩ naa rɛ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba tɩyaŋ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɩ sɩ kpa kyogisi tɩya ba ɛɛwɩya.

english_verse: He went into the house of God, and then they ate the sacred loaves of bread that only priests are supposed to eat.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ mʋʋ gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ dɩya hʋ rɛ, a kpa paanʋʋ hʋ ba gyɩ aa kaŋ ko biŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya, a lɩɩ ʋ bee ʋ hatɩnna kyaŋ. Ʋ fa yaa sɩna rɛ dɩ nɩwaasɩ buloŋ kyaŋ haŋ paanʋʋ hʋ, see wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala hʋ dʋŋ.

english_verse: Don't you know what the Scriptures mean when they say, “Instead of offering sacrifices to me, I want you to be merciful to others?” If you knew what this means, you would not condemn these innocent disciples of mine.
translation_verse: Ba saba rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Ma aa fá nala sikii, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ma aa lɩɩ wɩɩsʋllɩ kɩna a kpʋ tɩya ŋ.” Dɩ mamaa rɛ kɔnɩ fa gyɩŋ wɩɩ no memii, ma fa bɩ sɩ kpa kyogisi kɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii.

english_verse: Jesus left and went into one of their synagogues,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu lɩɩ doŋ, a mʋ gyʋʋ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya kɩdɩgɩ,

english_verse: Then Jesus told the man, “Hold out your hand.” The man did, and it became as healthy as the other one.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya nosʋʋ hʋ tɩɩna a baa, ‘Kaŋ ɩ noŋ hʋ tannɩ.’ Nyɛ rɛ ʋ kaŋ ʋ noŋ tannɩ. Ʋ mɩɩgɩ kɩɩ noduwo hʋ.”

english_verse: When Jesus found out what was happening, he left there and large crowds followed him. He healed all of their sick,
translation_verse: Yesu aa ko gyɩma anɩɩ nala hʋ aa vʋʋlɩ ʋ kpʋyɩ wɩya rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sii lɩɩ doŋ. Amɛ nɩgyamaa ha gyɩ sii tɩŋa ʋ hal. Nyɛ rɛ ʋ tɩɩbɩ nala hʋ buloŋ fa aa wɩɩlɩ ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as Isaiah the prophet had said,
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ aa basɩ wɩɩ no leŋ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaal Azaaya tɩyaŋ basɩ kɔnɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: If you are not on my side, you are against me. If you don't gather in the harvest with me, you scatter it.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ yaa ŋ nal, ʋ tɩɩna lɩɩ ŋ hal lɛ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ pɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ dɩ á gbaa nala kɩ we lɩdɩgɩ, ʋ tɩɩna leŋ nala kɩ vɩya Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Some people brought to Jesus a man who was blind and could not talk because he had a demon in him. Jesus healed the man, and then he was able to talk and see.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ nala badɔmɔŋ kaŋ baal kɩdɩgɩ gyɩŋbɔmɔ aa kana, ʋ nyʋlɩmɩ, aŋ bɩ wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩya mɛ, a ko Yesu lee. Nyɛ rɛ Yesu tɩɩbɩ baal hʋ, ʋ bɩl wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩya aŋ kɩ na mɛ.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking, so he said to them: Any kingdom where people fight each other will end up ruined. And a town or family that fights will soon destroy itself.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ba aa bɩɩnɩ ba tɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, a basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ paalʋʋdɩgɩ nala rɛ we doŋ a bɩ kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ, ba paalʋʋ hʋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ aŋ tele. Dɩ bedɩgɩ nala koo gyaŋwuwodɩgɩ nala mɛ rɛ we doŋ a bɩ kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ, ba bee hʋ koo ba gyaŋwuwo hʋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ aŋ tele.

english_verse: If I use the power of Beelzebul to force out demons, whose power do your own followers use to force them out? Your followers are the ones who will judge you.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɛɛ hʋ ma aa basɩ kɔnɩ yaŋ yaa wɩtɩɩ anɩɩ gyɩŋbɔmɔ kuwori Bɛlizebul lɛ tɩya ŋ dee ŋ kɩ kil gyɩŋbɔmɔ, ɛɛ kɛ aŋnɛ rɛ tɩya ma tɩɩ hatɩnna hʋ mɛ dee ba kɩ kil gyɩŋbɔmɔ. Ma hatɩnna hʋ wɩyaalɩya yaŋ daga anɩɩ ma wɩbasɩɩ hʋ buloŋ yaa wɩnyɩyɛl lɛ.

english_verse: When an evil spirit leaves a person, it travels through the desert, looking for a place to rest. But when the demon doesn't find a place,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Dɩ ba ko kile gyɩŋbɔŋ dɩ ʋ lɩɩ nal tɩyaŋ, ʋ aa gɔllɩ taŋhahɩlɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ kyɛ lee dɩ ʋ wiyesi, amɛ dɩ ʋ ko kyɛ lee lɔlɔ,

english_verse: it goes off and finds seven other evil spirits even worse than itself. They all come and make their home there, and the person ends up in worse shape than before. That's how it will be with you evil people of today. Jesus' Mother and Brothers (Mark
translation_verse: ʋ aa mɩɩgɩ mʋ kaŋ gyɩŋbɔmɔ bapɛ aa bɔmɔ te ʋ tɩɩ rɛ a pɛ dɩ ba ko kɩ gyʋʋ. Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, ba sɩ lɔrɩ ʋ tɩɩna tɩyaŋ a te ʋ fa aa kɩɩ gɛɛ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba sɩ kɩɩ ma gyɩnaŋ nɩbɔmɔ no mɛ tɩyaŋ.” Yesu nɩɩna abee ʋ naabalɩya Maakɩ

english_verse: You are a bunch of evil snakes, so how can you say anything good? Your words show what is in your hearts.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ma mɛ yaŋ kɩɩ anɩɩ dʋma, ma bɔmɔ rɛ weliŋ, ɛɛwɩya ma bɩ sɩ wuwo basɩ wɩwelii kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ. Beewɩya, nihuwobiŋ wɩbasɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ɩ aa gyɩŋ nihuwobiŋ hʋ iriŋ ʋ aa yaa.

english_verse: On that day they will be told they are either innocent or guilty because of the things they have said. A Sign from Heaven (Mark
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ nyʋʋdaasɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa di ma sarɩya, dɩ ma laa wɩsʋma koo ma laa kyogisi tɩya ma tɩɩ.” Nala aa kyɛ dɩ Yesu yaa wɩmagɩl Maakɩ

english_verse: Some Pharisees and teachers of the Law of Moses said, “Teacher, we want you to show us a sign from heaven.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla abee Farasiima sii ko Yesu lee a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, á aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ yaa wɩmagɩl lɛ dɩ á na a gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɔnɩ we ɩ lee rɛ.”

english_verse: But Jesus replied: You want a sign because you are evil and won't believe! But the only sign you will get is the sign of the prophet Jonah.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ma gyɩnaŋ nala yaa nɩbɔmɔ rɛ, a bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ. Ma aa sɩ yaa gɛɛ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya bɩ kyɩl ma see wɩmagɩla dʋŋ wɩya rɛ kyɩl ma. Wɩmagɩl hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ yaa dɩ ma na rɛ yaa wɩmagɩl hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa yaa ʋ tɩŋdaal Gyoona tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: He was in the stomach of a big fish for three days and nights, just as the Son of Man will be deep in the earth for three days and nights.
translation_verse: Gyoona gyɩ aa yaŋ we fuwonaŋbal hʋ fuu tɩyaŋ kyɛyɛ kpaŋkpaŋ boto gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye mɛ sɩ we bʋwa tɩyaŋ kyɛyɛ boto.

english_verse: On the day of judgment the people of Nineveh will stand there with you and condemn you. They turned to God when Jonah preached, and yet here is something far greater than Jonah.
translation_verse: Sarɩya hʋ kyɛdiilii, Ninive nala sɩ kpa kyogisi tɩya ma gyɩnaŋ nala. Beewɩya saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Gyoona gyɩ aa mʋʋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya tɩya ba, ba gyɩ bɩrɩma lɩɩ ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ aŋ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ. Ma yaŋ leŋ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ lagɩlagɩ no nal lɛ we ma tɩyaŋ a te Gyoona.”

english_verse: it says, “I will go back to the home I left.” When it gets there and finds the place empty, clean, and neat,
translation_verse: ʋ aa mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ tɩɩ rɛ a baa, ‘Ŋ sɩ mɩɩgɩ mʋ lee hʋ ŋ aa lɩya.’ Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko mɩɩgɩ ko dɩ ba marɩ dɩya hʋ buloŋ weliŋ, ka nal buloŋ tuwo ʋ tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: While Jesus was still speaking to the crowds, his mother and brothers came and stood outside because they wanted to talk with him.
translation_verse: Yesu ha gyɩ aa basɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya nɩgyamaa hʋ gɛɛ, dɩ ʋ naa abee ʋ naabalɩya ko sɩŋ gyaŋhal tɩyaŋ a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba na ʋ.

english_verse: Someone told Jesus, “Your mother and brothers are standing outside and want to talk with you.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ kɩdɩgɩ basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Ɩ naa bee ɩ naabalɩya rɛ sɩŋ gyaŋhal tɩyaŋ a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba na ɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Who is my mother and who are my brothers?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɩɩgɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Kɩbee rɛ yaa ŋ naa? Kɩbeema rɛ yaa ŋ naabalɩya?”

english_verse: Then he pointed to his disciples and said, “These are my mother and my brothers!
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ka Yesu mɩɩgɩ lɩɩ ʋ noŋ a daga ʋ hatɩnna hʋ aŋ baa, “Ŋ naa abee ŋ naabalɩya rɛ nyɛ.

english_verse: Anyone who obeys my Father in heaven is my brother or sister or mother.”
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa yaa wɩya hʋ ŋ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ aa kyɛ, ʋ tɩɩna rɛ yaa ŋ naabiye abee ŋ naatoluu abee ŋ naa.”

english_verse: Such large crowds gathered around him that he had to sit in a boat, while the people stood on the shore.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ nala ko gol ʋ kyige. Ʋ aa ko na dɩ nala hʋ yʋga gɛɛ, ʋ sii mʋ gyʋʋ hɔŋ nɩɩduworiboro tɩyaŋ, nɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ, ka nɩgyamaa hʋ buloŋ sɩŋ fuwo hʋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: Then he taught them many things by using stories. He said: A farmer went out to scatter seed in a field.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kpa namagɩsɩ a basɩ wɩya yʋga tɩya ba. Ʋ gyɩ maga namaga tɩya ba rɛ a baa, “Baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ gyɩ siye a kaŋ ʋ kɩdoho mʋ dɩ ʋ gyaasɩ.

english_verse: Other seeds fell on thin, rocky ground and quickly started growing because the soil wasn't very deep.
translation_verse: Badɔmɔŋ mɛ gyɩ tele bʋnyɩŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, a pesi nyʋ.

english_verse: Some other seeds fell where thornbushes grew up and choked the plants.
translation_verse: Ka kɩdoho hʋ badɔmɔŋ mɛ gyɩ tele sɔsɩ tɩyaŋ, a nyʋ amɛ sɔsɩ hʋ sii waa gɩrɩgɩ ba, ba pʋgɩmɩ.

english_verse: Jesus' disciples came to him and asked, “Why do you use stories to speak to the people?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ sii ko pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ aa kaŋ namagɩsɩ a basɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya nala hʋ?”

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet Isaiah had said, “These people will listen and listen, but never understand. They will look and look, but never see.
translation_verse: Wɩya no aa yaa nala no tɩyaŋ nyɛ leŋ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Azaaya gyɩ aa basa kɔnɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ʋ gyɩ baa, “Nala no sɩ gyegili gyegili wɩya aŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ wɩɩ buloŋ memii, ba sɩ deŋ deŋ lee buloŋ, aŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo na kɩŋ buloŋ mɛ,

english_verse: Many prophets and good people were eager to see what you see and to hear what you hear. But I tell you they did not see or hear. Jesus Explains the Story about the Farmer (Mark
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala abee tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma yʋga rɛ fa kyo dɩ ba na wɩya no ma aa naa nyɛ, aŋ bɩ wuwo na, a fa kyo dɩ ba nɩɩ wɩya no ma aa nɩɩ, aŋ bɩ wuwo nɩɩ ba. Yesu daga kɩdohɩl namaga hʋ memii Maakɩ

english_verse: The seeds that fell among the thornbushes are also people who hear the message. But they start worrying about the needs of this life and are fooled by the desire to get rich. So the message gets choked out, and they never produce anything.
translation_verse: Kɩna hʋ aa tele sɔsɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ amɛ dʋnɩya no kɩna wɩya kyɩl ba, ba kyo dɩ ba kaŋ kɩna. Ɛɛ wɩya, ba aa bɩ laa nyʋwa dɩ ba tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ, ka wɩya hʋ mɛ aa bee kaŋ doho ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Jesus then told them this story: The kingdom of heaven is like what happened when a farmer scattered good seed in a field.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl maga namaga kɩdɩgɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ baal aa sii kpa kɩdoho weliye a mʋ doho ʋ baga tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But while everyone was sleeping, an enemy came and scattered weed seeds in the field and then left.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ tebine, saŋa hʋ nala buloŋ aa ko pɩŋ doni gɛɛ, baal hʋ dɔŋ sii kaŋ ɔbii a mʋ mɩsɩ baga hʋ tɩyaŋ, aŋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ ʋ lɩmʋʋlɩya.

english_verse: When the plants came up and began to mature, the farmer's servants could see the weeds.
