translation_verse: Kɩdoho hʋ aa nyʋwa, a ko kɩ lʋla a kɩ we biye gɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba gyɩma nɩɩ ɔhɔ mɛ pɛɛ rɛ.

english_verse: The servants came and asked, “Sir, didn't you scatter good seed in your field? Where did these weeds come from?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ baga-tʋŋtʋnna ko basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, kɩweliye rɛ ɩ doho ɩ baga hʋ tɩyaŋ, ka lee rɛ ɔhɔ mɛ lɩɩ a we baga hʋ tɩyaŋ?”

english_verse: “An enemy did this,” he replied. His servants then asked, “Do you want us to go out and pull up the weeds?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ liise ŋ dɔŋ nɛ mʋʋ yaa gɛɛ.” Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ tʋŋtʋnna hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ kɛ leŋ á mʋ kyuri ɔhɔ hʋ ta?”

english_verse: Although it is the smallest of all seeds, it grows larger than any garden plant and becomes a tree. Birds even come and nest on its branches.
translation_verse: Kɩdoho no bii bɩ maga wɩɩ buloŋ. Ʋ muro rɛ weliŋ a te kɩdoho kɛ buloŋ aa we doŋ. Amɛ dɩ ʋ rɛ ko nyʋ, ʋ aa waa a yaa tɩɩbal lɛ, a yʋga te baga kɩdohii kɛ buloŋ. Digibiisi aa ko sʋwa ba gyannɩ ʋ naasɩ tɩyaŋ.” Yesu maga sɩbʋl namaga Luka

english_verse: Jesus told them another story: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a farmer plants a mustard seed in a field.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl kpa namaga kɩdɩgɩ lo a baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ baal kɩdɩgɩ aa sii kpa kɩdoho kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ masɩtadɩ a mʋ doho ʋ baga tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Jesus used stories when he spoke to the people. In fact, he did not tell them anything without using stories.
translation_verse: Namagɩsɩ rɛ Yesu gyɩ aa kpa a basɩ wɩya no buloŋ kɩ tɩya gyamaa hʋ. Ʋ gyɩ bɩ sɩ basɩ wɩɩ buloŋ dɩ ʋ bɩ kaŋ namaga maga.

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet had said, “I will use stories to speak my message and to explain things hidden since the creation of the world.” Jesus Explains the Story about the Weeds
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaal Azaaya tɩyaŋ a basɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ. Ʋ gyɩ baa, “Namagɩsɩ rɛ ŋ sɩ kpa basɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya ba. Ŋ sɩ basɩ wɩya hʋ ba fa aa bɩ gyɩma a lɩɩ dʋnɩya piilii tɩyaŋ buloŋ a tɩya ba.” Yesu daga ɔbii namaga hʋ memii

english_verse: After Jesus left the crowd and went inside, his disciples came to him and said, “Explain to us the story about the weeds in the wheat field.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu leŋ nɩgyamaa hʋ ta aŋ sii gyʋʋ dɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ ko pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Daga ma ɔbii namaga hʋ ɩ aa maga memii.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: The one who scattered the good seed is the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Nal hʋ aa doho kɩdoho hʋ rɛ yaa mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye.

english_verse: The field is the world, and the good seeds are the people who belong to the kingdom. The weeds are those who belong to the evil one,
translation_verse: Baga hʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ aa doho kɩdoho hʋ mɛ rɛ yaa dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ ma aa wee. Kidohiweliye hʋ mɛ rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa a we Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ɔhɔ hʋ mɛ aa nyʋ baga hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ yaa Sɩtaanɩ nala.

english_verse: and the one who scattered them is the devil. The harvest is the end of time, and angels are the ones who bring in the harvest.
translation_verse: Ʋ dɔŋ hʋ mɛ aa doho ɔbii hʋ rɛ yaa Sɩtaanɩ. Kɩdoho hʋ kyɛkʋmɩɩ mɛ rɛ yaa dʋnɩya kyɛtenii. Nala hʋ mɛ aa sɩ kʋŋ kɩdoho hʋ mɛ rɛ yaa malɩkasɩ.

english_verse: Weeds are gathered and burned. That's how it will be at the end of time.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hʋ ba aa yaŋ kyuri ɔhɔ hʋ laŋŋɩ a nyɔgɔ ta gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba sɩ laŋŋɩ Sɩtaanɩ noŋ nala mɛ a we diŋ dʋnɩya kyɛtenii.

english_verse: The Son of Man will send out his angels, and they will gather from his kingdom everyone who does wrong or causes others to sin.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye, ŋ sɩ tɩŋ ŋ malɩkasɩ dɩ ba gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ a tʋwasɩ nala hʋ aa leŋ nala yaa wɩbɔmɔ abee nala hʋ buloŋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ.

english_verse: Then he will throw them into a flaming furnace, where people will cry and grit their teeth in pain.
translation_verse: A leŋ ba kpa ba yuwo we diŋbal hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ dɩsɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba sɩ wii aŋ kyaŋ ba nyɩŋa.

english_verse: But everyone who has done right will shine like the sun in their Father's kingdom. If you have ears, pay attention! A Hidden Treasure
translation_verse: Ka dɩ tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma kɩ tʋla anɩɩ wɩɩpɔsɩɩ ba Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ. Nala hʋ aa kaŋ dɩgɩna, ma gyegili nɩɩ wɩya no weliŋ.” Baal hʋ aa pal baga a mʋ mɔŋ kɩna

english_verse: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when someone finds a treasure hidden in a field and buries it again. Such a person is happy and goes and sells everything in order to buy that field. A Valuable Pearl
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Nyɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ: Baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ mʋʋ kɩ pala baga tɩyaŋ, a kuusi mʋ parɩ salma dɩ ba hogo baga hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ aa naa salma hʋ gɛɛ, ʋ mɩɩgɩ gbaa taŋha tɔ, ka ʋ teŋ buloŋ fɩyɛlɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ mʋ kpa ʋ kɩna buloŋ a yallɩ, a kaŋ molbii hʋ mʋ yɔbɔ baga hʋ.”

english_verse: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a shop owner is looking for fine pearls.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bayalʋʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ sɩfɩyaŋbʋyɩ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ pɛɛl.

english_verse: After finding a very valuable one, the owner goes and sells everything in order to buy that pearl. A Fish Net
translation_verse: Ʋ aa ko na sɩfɩyaŋbʋyɩ no kɩdɩgɩ dɩ ʋ weliye ʋ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ʋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ kpa ʋ kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ yallɩ a mʋ yɔbɔ bʋyɩ hʋ.” Yesu maga awule namaga

english_verse: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a net is thrown into a lake and catches all kinds of fish.
translation_verse: Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ fuwonaŋkasɩla aa kpaa awule a yuwo we nɩɩ tɩyaŋ, a kasɩ fuwonamɩɩsɩ iriŋ iriŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: When the net is full, it is dragged to the shore, and the fishermen sit down to separate the fish. They keep the good ones, but throw the bad ones away.
translation_verse: Fuwonamɩɩsɩ hʋ aa ko su awule hʋ, fuwonaŋkasɩla hʋ kaŋ awule hʋ tarɩ lɩɩ nɩɩ hʋ nyʋwa, a tʋwasɩ fuwonaŋweliye hʋ buloŋ aŋ kpa kɩna hʋ aa bɩ yaa a yuwo ta.

english_verse: That's how it will be at the end of time. Angels will come and separate the evil people from the ones who have done right.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ʋ yaŋ sɩ kɩɩ dʋnɩya kyɛtenii mɛ. Malɩkasɩ sɩ tʋwasɩ nɩbɔmɔ a lɩɩ niweliye tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: Then those evil people will be thrown into a flaming furnace, where they will cry and grit their teeth in pain. New and Old Treasures
translation_verse: a kpa ba yuwo we diŋbal aa bɩ sɩ dɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Doŋ nɛ ba sɩ we a kɩ wii aŋ kɩ kyaŋ ba nyɩŋa.” Yesu maga kɩna tɩɩna kɩdɩgɩ namaga

english_verse: Jesus asked his disciples if they understood all these things. They said, “Yes, we do.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ma gyɩŋ wɩya no buloŋ memii rɛ?” Ɛɛ rɛ ba baa, “Waa.”

english_verse: So he told them, “Every student of the Scriptures who becomes a disciple in the kingdom of heaven is like someone who brings out new and old treasures from the storeroom.” The People of Nazareth Turn against Jesus (Mark
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩɩ no daga anɩɩ nal hʋ buloŋ aa gʋnnɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ weliŋ a ko yaa ŋ hatɩnnɩ aŋ yaa siri dɩ ʋ gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ dɩya tɩɩna aa kuwoni mɩbɩnɩya abee mɩfalɩya ʋ busol tɩyaŋ.” Ba vɩya Yesu Nazarɛti tɩyaŋ Maakɩ

english_verse: When Jesus had finished telling these stories, he left
translation_verse: Yesu aa maga namagɩsɩ no ko teŋ, ʋ sii lɩɩ doŋ

english_verse: and went to his hometown. He taught in their synagogue, and the people were so amazed that they asked, “Where does he get all this wisdom and the power to work these miracles?
translation_verse: a mɩɩgɩ kpa mʋ ʋ bee, a kɩ daga nala ba wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya tɩyaŋ. Nala hʋ buloŋ gyɩ aa nɩɩ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa basa, ba nyʋʋsɩ gyɩ fɩyɛla rɛ weliŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Lee rɛ baal no na wɩgyʋŋ abee dee no buloŋ a kaŋ kɩ yaa wɩmagɩla no?

english_verse: Isn't he the son of the carpenter? Isn't Mary his mother, and aren't James, Joseph, Simon, and Judas his brothers?
translation_verse: Gyosɛfʋ aa yaa kapiŋta biye hʋ daa gɛɛ? Ʋ naa daa yaa Mɛɛrɩ? Gyemsi abee Gyosɛfʋ abee Siimɔŋ abee Gyudasɩ daa yaa ʋ naabalɩya?

english_verse: Don't his sisters still live here in our town? How can he do all this?”
translation_verse: Á bee ʋ naatoliye buloŋ daa we daha nyɛ? Lee tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ yaŋ na wɩya no buloŋ?”

english_verse: So the people were upset because of what he was doing. But Jesus said, “Prophets are honored by everyone, except the people of their hometown and their own family.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba bɩ laa ʋ wɩya di. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal kɛ buloŋ, ba aa kɩ tɩya ʋ gyɩrɩma rɛ weliŋ lee buloŋ tɩyaŋ, amɛ ʋ bee nala abee ʋ dɩya nala kɛ sɩɩ aa bee su ʋ.”

english_verse: And because the people did not have any faith, Jesus did not work many miracles there.
translation_verse: Akuu ba aa bɩ laa ʋ di wɩya, ʋ gyɩ bɩ yaa wɩmagɩla yʋga doŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When Jesus got out of the boat, he saw the large crowd. He felt sorry for them and healed everyone who was sick.
translation_verse: Yesu aa ko lɩɩ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ tɩyaŋ, a na nɩgyamaa hʋ aa hɔŋ kɩ gyegili ʋ, ba sikii kana ʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ tɩɩbɩ nala hʋ aa wɩɩlɩ ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: “Come on!” Jesus said. Peter then got out of the boat and started walking on the water toward him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Sii kɩ ko.” Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ, Piita sii lɩɩ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ tɩyaŋ a vala nɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ a kɩ mʋ Yesu lee.

english_verse: and told his officials, “This is John the Baptist! He has come back from death, and that's why he has the power to work these miracles.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ tʋŋtʋnna a baa, “Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ rɛ mɩɩgɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kaŋ dee a wuwo kɩ yaa wɩmagɩla no.”

english_verse: Herod had earlier arrested John and had him chained and put in prison. He did this because John had told him, “It isn't right for you to take Herodias, the wife of your brother Philip.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ Hɛrɔtɩ, paalʋʋ hʋ didenni hʋ gyɩ basɩ nyɛ rɛ yaa, ʋ gyɩ laa sɩya leŋ ba kaŋ Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ we kyɔrʋmɔ rɛ, a kpa ʋ we nɩtɔdɩya tɩyaŋ, akuu Hɛrɔtɩ aa gʋl kaŋ ʋ maana Fɩlɩpɩ haaŋ Hɛrodiya fasɩ wɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ gyɩ aa basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ʋ bɩ yaa ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ɩ kaŋ ɩ naabiye haaŋ fasɩ.”

english_verse: It was taken on a serving plate to the girl, and she gave it to her mother.
translation_verse: a we parɩtɩ tɩyaŋ a kaŋ ko tɩya haŋtolibiye hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ laa a kaŋ mʋ tɩya ʋ naa.

english_verse: John's followers took his body and buried it. Then they told Jesus what had happened. Jesus Feeds Five Thousand (Mark
translation_verse: Gyɔɔŋ hatɩnna hʋ gyɩ aa ko nɩɩ wɩɩ no, ba sii ko laa Gyɔɔŋ a kaŋ mʋ hogo, aŋ mʋ basɩ wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa a tɩya Yesu. Yesu tɩya nala tusi bɔnɔŋ kɩdiiliye Maakɩ

english_verse: But when Peter saw how strong the wind was, he was afraid and started sinking. “Save me, Lord!” he shouted.
translation_verse: Amɛ Piita aa naa nɩɩpuwo hʋ, kambɩŋ kana ʋ. Ʋ piili kɩ tuu nɩɩmemii. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kyiyesi baŋbaŋ a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, laa ŋ.”

english_verse: But they said, “We have only five small loaves of bread and two fish.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ baa, “Kɩŋ buloŋ á aa kana daha rɛ yaa paanʋʋ gama bɔnɔŋ abee fuwonamɩɩsɩ balɩya.”

english_verse: After Jesus heard about John, he crossed Lake Galilee to go to some place where he could be alone. But the crowds found out and followed him on foot from the towns.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ aa nɩɩ Gyɔɔŋ wɩya, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sii doŋ a kpa mʋ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro a mʋ lee hʋ nala aa tuwo. Amɛ nala gyɩ aa nɩɩ ʋ wɩya, nɩgyamaa gyɩ sii lɩɩ ba beye, a kɩ kile ʋ lugo abee naasɩ.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “They don't have to leave. Why don't you give them something to eat?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Nala no bɩ maga dɩ ba mʋ lee buloŋ. Ma tɩɩ mʋ kyɛ kɩdiiliye tɩya ba dɩ ba di.”

english_verse: Jesus asked his disciples to bring the food to him,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ma kaŋ ko tɩya ŋ.”

english_verse: and he told the crowd to sit down on the grass. Jesus took the five loaves and the two fish. He looked up toward heaven and blessed the food. Then he broke the bread and handed it to his disciples, and they gave it to the people.
translation_verse: Aŋ leŋ nala hʋ buloŋ tuu hɔŋ hɔŋ ɔhɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ laa paanʋʋ gama hʋ bɔnɔŋ abee fuwonamɩɩsɩ hʋ balɩya, a wil deŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ, aŋ kaŋ lɔgɔ lɔgɔ, a kpa tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ, ba laa kpaa nala hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: After everyone had eaten all they wanted, Jesus' disciples picked up twelve large baskets of leftovers.
translation_verse: Nal nal buloŋ nɛ gyɩ kyaŋ vɔgɔ, ka ʋ hatɩnna hʋ ha gyɩ paa kɩkaalɩya hʋ a su simbiisi fi abee balɩya.

english_verse: At once, Jesus made his disciples get into a boat and start back across the lake. But he stayed until he had sent the crowds away.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka Yesu leŋ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ laa sɩya mʋ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro dɩ ba duwori kyol fuwo hʋ kyolo, aŋka ʋ mɛ ta nɩgyamaa hʋ ba mʋ.

english_verse: Then he went up on a mountain where he could be alone and pray. Later in the evening, he was still there.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa taa nɩgyamaa hʋ buloŋ ba mʋ ko teŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ mʋ gyɩŋ dogimo kɩdɩgɩ nyuu dɩ ʋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ. Ʋ dɩdaana mʋ pele ka ʋ dʋŋ ha we dogimo hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: By this time the boat was a long way from the shore. It was going against the wind and was being tossed around by the waves.
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ mɛ pele nɩɩ hʋ tʋtʋʋ. Nɩɩpuwo kaŋ boro hʋ kɩ viisi, beewɩya ba fa kyaasɩ puwo hʋ rɛ.

english_verse: A little while before morning, Jesus came walking on the water toward his disciples.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩnyʋwa, anɩɩ kerifi boto bee kerifi badʋ paga tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, Yesu sii vala nɩɩ hʋ nyuu a kɩ mʋ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ lee.

english_verse: When they saw him, they thought he was a ghost. They were terrified and started screaming.
translation_verse: Ba aa naa ʋ dɩ ʋ aa vala nɩɩ nyuu tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ba kɛ bɩɩna anɩɩ nɩdʋma rɛ. Kambɩŋ kaŋ ba, ba ŋmaa kyiyesuu.

english_verse: At once, Jesus said to them, “Don't worry! I am Jesus. Don't be afraid.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu piliŋsi basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ! Mɩyaŋ nɛ. Ma ta leŋ dɩ kambɩŋ kaŋ ma.”

english_verse: Peter replied, “Lord, if it really is you, tell me to come to you on the water.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, dɩ ɩ rɛ kɔnɩ, leŋ dɩ ŋ sii val nɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ a ko ɩ lee.”

english_verse: At once, Jesus reached out his hand. He helped Peter up and said, “You surely don't have much faith. Why do you doubt?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu tarɩsɩ mʋ kana ʋ aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ kɩ yaa ŋ sige, ɩ laadii bɩ yʋga?”

english_verse: When Jesus and Peter got into the boat, the wind died down.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba buloŋ mʋ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ. Doŋ nɛ puwo hʋ mɛ sige.

english_verse: The men in the boat worshiped Jesus and said, “You really are the Son of God!” Jesus Heals Sick People in Gennesaret (Mark
translation_verse: Ʋ hatɩnna hʋ buloŋ aa we nɩɩduworiboro hʋ tɩyaŋ tuu gbinni a kyʋwalɩ ʋ a kpa ʋ gyɩrɩma tɩya ʋ aŋ baa, “Wɩtɩɩ, ɩ rɛ kɔnɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples crossed the lake and came to shore near the town of Gennesaret.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba kyol fuwo hʋ a ko pele tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Gɛnɛsarɛti.

english_verse: The people found out he was there, and they sent word to everyone who lived in this part of the country. So they brought all the sick people to Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ aa we doŋ wuwo gyɩŋ bee baa Yesu rɛ, a leŋ ʋ duwoso pel tɔnɩ hʋ buloŋ aa we doŋ. Nyɛ rɛ ba mʋ paa ba wɩɩla tɩmma buloŋ aa we tɔnɩ hʋ aa kpaga Gɛnɛsarɛti a kaŋ ko Yesu lee,

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Every plant that my Father in heaven did not plant will be pulled up by the roots.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Tɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ Kuwo aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ aa bɩ pɔɔ, ba sɩ kyuri ʋ ta.

english_verse: “Why don't your disciples obey what our ancestors taught us to do? They don't even wash their hands before they eat.”
translation_verse: “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ hatɩnna kɩ kyogi á naabaala sɩŋsɩ? Ba aa bee sɔŋ ba nosi anɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ á naabaala aa daga ma aŋ kɩ di kɩdiiliye.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: Why do you disobey God and follow your own teaching?
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma kɛ aa kuu ma lesiri wɩya a vɩya Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa tɩŋɩɩ.

english_verse: But you let people get by without helping their parents when they should. You let them say that what they have has been offered to God.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kɛ aa daga nala anɩɩ dɩ nal lɛ kaŋ kɩŋ a maga dɩ ʋ kpa kyiyeli ʋ kuwo koo ʋ naa, ka dɩ ʋ tɩɩna basɩ tɩya ba anɩɩ kɩŋ hʋ ʋ fa a sɩ kpa kyiyeli ba hʋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ kɩŋ nɛ.

english_verse: It is useless for you to worship me, when you teach rules made up by humans.” What Really Makes People Unclean (Mark
translation_verse: Ba aa kyʋwalɩ ŋ waasʋ rɛ, beewɩya ba vɩya ŋ nyʋwa rɛ aŋ kɩ daga nala mɩrɩsɩ hʋ ba tɩɩ aa bine, aŋ aa fugo baa dɩ mɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ rɛ.” Kɩna hʋ aa leŋ nihuwobiŋ kɩ kaŋ bisiŋ Maakɩ

english_verse: Stay away from those Pharisees! They are like blind people leading other blind people, and all of them will fall into a ditch.”
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ ba wɩya kɩ dɔŋ ma, beewɩya ba yaa nyʋlɩma rɛ aŋ kɩ kaŋ nyʋlɩma daatɩgɩya. Dɩ nyʋlʋŋ nɛ yaŋ kaŋ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna nyʋlʋŋ daaŋ tɩyaŋ, ba buloŋ balɩya sɩ tele bootogi tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus did not say a word. But the woman kept following along and shouting, so his disciples came up and asked him to send her away.
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu gyɩ bɩ basɩ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩya ʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ hatɩnna hʋ ko sʋla ʋ a baa, “Leŋ dɩ haaŋ hʋ mʋ, beewɩya ʋ kaŋ kyagɩŋsɩ kɩ tɩŋ á hal lɛ.”

english_verse: The food you put into your mouth doesn't make you unclean and unfit to worship God. The bad words that come out of your mouth are what make you unclean.”
translation_verse: Nal kɩdiiliye bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa bisiŋ tɩɩna. Kɩŋ kɛ buloŋ aa tuu nal fuu, ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ tɩɩna kaŋ bisiŋ. Amɛ wɩya hʋ aa lɩɩ ʋ tɩɩna nyʋwa tɩyaŋ nɛ sɩ wuwo leŋ ʋ yaa bisiŋ tɩɩna.”

english_verse: Then his disciples came over to him and asked, “Do you know you insulted the Pharisees by what you said?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ ko ʋ lee a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ aa basɩ gɛɛ Farasiima hʋ tɩya kyogo rɛ?”

english_verse: Peter replied, “What did you mean when you talked about the things that make people unclean?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita baa, “Daga ma namaga no ɩ aa maga tɩya Farasiima hʋ memii.”

english_verse: Jesus then said: Don't any of you know by now what I am talking about?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ɛɛ kɛ ma mɛ buloŋ nɛ yaŋ gɛɛ?

english_verse: Don't you know that the food you put into your mouth goes into your stomach and then out of your body?
translation_verse: Ma bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ no memii? Kɩŋ kɛ buloŋ aa tɩŋ nal nyʋwa gyʋʋ, ʋ aa tuu ʋ fuu rɛ, a tɩŋ ʋ memii lɩɩ.

english_verse: But the words that come out of your mouth come from your heart. And they are what make you unfit to worship God.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩya hʋ aa tɩŋ ɩ nyʋwa lɩɩ, ba aa lɩɩ ɩ tɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ. Wɩya no rɛ aa leŋ nal kaŋ bisiŋ.

english_verse: These are what make you unclean. Eating without washing your hands will not make you unfit to worship God. A Woman's Faith (Mark
translation_verse: Wɩya no rɛ aa leŋ nal kaŋ bisiŋ. Amɛ dɩ nal bɩ sɔmɔ ʋ noŋ aŋ di kɩna anɩɩ ma naabaala a daga gɛɛ, ɛɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ bisiŋ.” Yesu tɩɩbɩ Keenaŋ tɩɩna Maakɩ

english_verse: Jesus said, “I was sent only to the people of Israel! They are like a flock of lost sheep.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ tɩma ŋ nɛ dɩ ŋ ko kyɛ kasɩ nala hʋ aa kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ penyʋgɩsɩya Iziral tɩmma dʋŋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Large crowds came and brought many people who were paralyzed or blind or lame or unable to talk. They placed them, and many others, in front of Jesus, and he healed them all.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nɩgyamaa sii paa gbarɩga abee nyʋlɩma abee ganɩya abee nala aa kaŋ wɩɩla iriŋ buloŋ a ko biŋ Yesu sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ʋ tɩɩbɩ ba.

english_verse: Jesus left and went to the territory near the towns of Tyre and Sidon.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii lɩɩ doŋ a mʋ Taaya abee Siidɔŋ paalʋʋ.

english_verse: Suddenly a Canaanite woman from there came out shouting, “Lord and Son of David, have pity on me! My daughter is full of demons.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Keenaŋ tɩmma haaŋ kɩdɩgɩ fa aa we doŋ sii ko Yesu lee, a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, Deviti nihii, fá ŋ sikii. Gyɩŋbɔŋ nɛ kaŋ ŋ toluu, ʋ kɩ na tʋwara kɩŋkaŋ.”

english_verse: The woman came closer. Then she knelt down and begged, “Please help me, Lord!”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ haaŋ hʋ ko tele Yesu naasɩ tɩyaŋ aŋ baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, pɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “It isn't right to take food away from children and feed it to dogs.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ʋ bɩ yaa ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ɩ kpa biisi kɩdiiliye a tɩya vasɩ.”

english_verse: “Lord, this is true,” the woman said, “but even puppies get the crumbs that fall from their owner's table.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ haaŋ hʋ baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, wɩtɩɩ rɛ ɩ basɩ, amɛ dɩ vasɩ hʋ tɩmma rɛ aa di kɩna, kɩna hʋ aa tele taŋha rɛ vasɩ hʋ mɛ aa paa kɩ di.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Dear woman, you really do have a lot of faith, and you will be given what you want.” At that moment her daughter was healed. Jesus Heals Many People
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya haaŋ hʋ a baa, “Ɩ laadii kɔnɩ yʋga rɛ. Wɩɩ hʋ ɩ aa kyɛɛ, ŋ sɩ yaa tɩya ɩ.” Saŋa no tɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ haaŋ hʋ toluu hʋ na laaŋfɩya. Yesu tɩɩbɩ nala yʋga

english_verse: From there, Jesus went along Lake Galilee. Then he climbed a hill and sat down.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl sii doŋ a kpa tɩŋ Galili fuwo hʋ dɩɩlaŋ kɩ mʋ, a mʋ gyɩŋ hɔŋ dogimo kɩdɩgɩ nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Everyone was amazed at what they saw and heard. People who had never spoken could now speak. The lame were healed, the paralyzed could walk, and the blind were able to see. Everyone was praising the God of Israel. Jesus Feeds Four Thousand (Mark
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa hʋ aa naa dɩ ganɩya hʋ aa basɩ wɩya, gbarɩga kɩ vala, ka nyʋlɩma sɩya mɛ suri gɛɛ, ʋ yaa ba wɩkperii, ba dannɩ Iziral tɩmma Wɩɩsɩ hʋ. Yesu tɩya nala tusi banaa kɩdiiliye Maakɩ

english_verse: Jesus called his disciples together and told them, “I feel sorry for these people. They have been with me for three days, and they don't have anything to eat. I don't want to send them away hungry. They might faint on their way home.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu yɩrɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ aa naa nala no, sikii kana ŋ nɛ. Ba kyɛyɛ boto rɛ nyɛ ba aa we ŋ lee aŋ bɩ naa kɩdiiliye di. Ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ ta ba abee losi. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa gɛɛ, ba sɩ ko mʋ yiyegi ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: His disciples said, “This place is like a desert. Where can we find enough food to feed such a crowd?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ rɛ á sɩ yaa a na kɩdiiliye pogo no tɩyaŋ a tɩya nɩgyamaa no buloŋ dɩ ba di.”

english_verse: Jesus asked them how much food they had. They replied, “Seven small loaves of bread and a few little fish.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Paanʋʋ gama baŋmɛ rɛ ma kana?” Ba baa, “Kɩna bapɛ rɛ abee fuwonamɩɩsɩ baŋmana.”

english_verse: After Jesus had told the people to sit down,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu leŋ nala hʋ buloŋ tuu hɔŋ taŋha.

english_verse: he took the seven loaves of bread and the fish and gave thanks. He then broke them and handed them to his disciples, who passed them around to the crowds.
translation_verse: Ka ʋ kpa paanʋʋ gama hʋ bapɛ abee fuwonamɩɩsɩ hʋ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ, aŋ kaŋ lɔgɔ lɔgɔ, a tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ ba laa kpaa nɩgyamaa hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: Everyone ate all they wanted, and the leftovers filled seven large baskets.
translation_verse: Ba buloŋ di a vɔgɔ, ka Yesu hatɩnna hʋ ha paa kɩkaalɩya hʋ a su simbiisi bapɛ.

english_verse: After Jesus had sent the crowds away, he got into a boat and sailed across the lake. He came to shore near the town of Magadan.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu ta nɩgyamaa hʋ aŋ mʋ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro, a kpa mʋ Magadaŋ paalʋʋ.

english_verse: Don't you know by now that I am not talking to you about bread? Watch out for the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees!
translation_verse: Ɛɛ kɛ ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ kɩdiiliye wɩya daa ŋ kɩ basɩ ma lee? Ma kɩ gyɩŋ Farasiima bee Sadusiima sɩbʋl hʋ wɩya.”

english_verse: When Jesus and his disciples were near the town of Caesarea Philippi, he asked them, “What do people say about the Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii mʋ Sizaariya Filipi paalʋʋ. Doŋ nɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Kɩbee rɛ nala baa dɩ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye yaa?”

english_verse: Finally, the disciples understood that Jesus wasn't talking about the yeast used to make bread, but about the teaching of the Pharisees and Sadducees. Who Is Jesus? (Mark
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ bɩ baa dɩ ba pɔ ba tɩɩ abee sɩbʋl hʋ ba aa kpa we paanʋʋ tɩyaŋ, amɛ ʋ baa dɩ ba pɔ ba tɩɩma rɛ abee Farasiima bee Sadusiima wɩdagɩya tɩyaŋ. Beewɩya nala no wɩdagɩya kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ sɩbʋl. Piita daga nal hʋ Yesu aa yaa Maakɩ

english_verse: He told them: If the sky is red in the evening, you say the weather will be good.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ ko kɩ gyʋʋ, dɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu fɩyɛsɩ, na ma aa baa dɩ nyɛ kɛ lee hʋ pollo rɛ?

english_verse: But if the sky is red and gloomy in the morning, you say it is going to rain. You can tell what the weather will be like by looking at the sky. But you don't understand what is happening now.
translation_verse: Kyɩkyʋwala mɛ, dɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu rɛ ko kɩɩ gyununu, na ma aa baa dɩ duwoŋ sɩ nɩɩ gyɩnaŋ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa sɩ wuwo deŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu a gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ aa sɩ yaa, bee rɛ tɩŋ ma bɩ sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ lagɩlagɩ no.

english_verse: The disciples answered, “Some people say you are John the Baptist or maybe Elijah or Jeremiah or some other prophet.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba baa, “Badɔmɔŋ baa dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ. Badɔmɔŋ mɛ baa dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa Ɛlaagya. Ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ baa dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa Gyɛrimaya, koo faafaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ kɩdɩgɩ.”

english_verse: From then on, Jesus began telling his disciples what would happen to him. He said, “I must go to Jerusalem. There the nation's leaders, the chief priests, and the teachers of the Law of Moses will make me suffer terribly. I will be killed, but three days later I will rise to life.”
translation_verse: A piili haŋ saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Yesu aa basɩ wɩya polli kɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ rɛ a baa, “Ʋ maga dɩ ŋ mʋ Gyerusalɛm nɛ a na tʋwara weliŋ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ abee ba wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla nosi tɩyaŋ. Ba sɩ kpʋ ŋ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyisi ŋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ kyɛyɛ boto kyɛɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus then warned them, “Watch out! Guard against the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma pɔ ma tɩɩma weliŋ a kɩ gyɩŋ Farasiima bee Sadusiima sɩbʋl hʋ wɩya.”

english_verse: The disciples talked this over and said to each other, “He must be saying this because we didn't bring along any bread.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba piili basɩ kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Á aa bɩ kaŋ paanʋʋ ko hʋ nɛ tɩŋ ʋ basɩ wɩɩ no.”

english_verse: The Son of Man will soon come in the glory of his Father and with his angels to reward all people for what they have done.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ nyɛ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ beewɩya, mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko abee ŋ kuwo gaŋdarɩ. Ŋ bee malɩkasɩ rɛ sɩ ko. Dɩ ámaa rɛ ko ko, ŋ sɩ tuŋ nal buloŋ a maga gɛɛ hʋ ʋ tɩɩna aa tʋma.

english_verse: So I will call you Peter, which means “a rock.” On this rock I will build my church, and death itself will not have any power over it.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya Piita, ŋ basɩ tɩya ɩ rɛ anɩɩ ɩ feŋ hʋ memii rɛ yaa bʋyɩ, bʋyɩ no tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ sɩ kaŋ nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa ŋ wɩya di ko laŋŋɩ. Sʋʋ mɛ gba bɩ sɩ wuwo yige nala no lo.

english_verse: Then Jesus asked, “But who do you say I am?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ mɛ a baa, “Ka ma mɛ, aŋnɛ rɛ ma baa ŋ yaa?”

english_verse: Simon Peter spoke up, “You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Siimɔŋ Piita baa, “Ɩ rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ, Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa weye biye.”

english_verse: Jesus told him: Simon, son of Jonah, you are blessed! You didn't discover this on your own. It was shown to you by my Father in heaven.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Siimɔŋ, Gyɔɔŋ biibaal, nyusʋŋtɩɩna rɛ yaa ɩ, beewɩya wɩgyʋŋ no ɩ aa kaŋ lɩɩ wɩɩ no sɩɩ, nihuwobiŋ daa tɩya ɩ. Ŋ Kuwo aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ nɛ tɩya ɩ.

english_verse: I will give you the keys to the kingdom of heaven, and God in heaven will allow whatever you allow on earth. But he will not allow anything you don't allow.
translation_verse: Ŋ sɩ kpa Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ saafɩɩbiye tɩya ɩ. Wɩɩ hʋ ɩ aa sɩŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ kɩ sɩna, wɩɩ hʋ mɛ ɩ aa sɩ laa dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ sɩ laa”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples not to tell anyone he was the Messiah. Jesus Speaks about His Suffering and Death (Mark
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ abee sɩfɩyasɩ dɩ ba ta basɩ tɩya nal buloŋ anɩɩ ʋ rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ, Laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya. Yesu basɩ ʋ sʋʋ wɩya Maakɩ

english_verse: Peter took Jesus aside and told him to stop talking like that. He said, “God would never let this happen to you, Lord!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita kana ʋ fasɩ lɩɩ saŋkala, a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa “Ta basɩ gɛɛ! Ŋ Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ ta laa nyʋwa dɩ wɩɩ no maakyiye yaa ɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus turned to Peter and said, “Satan, get away from me! You're in my way because you think like everyone else and not like God.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩrɩmɩ kyaasɩ Piita aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ baa, “Fasɩ mʋ ŋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Sɩtaanɩ wɩya rɛ ɩ kɩ basɩ gɛɛ. Ɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ mʋrɩ ŋ dɩ ŋ vɩya ŋ kuwo nyʋwa rɛ. Beewɩya nihuwobiŋ tɩliise rɛ ɩ kana ɩ bɩ kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩliise.”

english_verse: Then Jesus said to his disciples: If any of you want to be my followers, you must forget about yourself. You must take up your cross and follow me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ tɩŋa ŋ, see dɩ ʋ vɩya ʋ tɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ ta aŋ kpa ʋ daagarɩɩ baasɩ a kɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal.

english_verse: If you want to save your life, you will destroy it. But if you give up your life for me, you will find it.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ laa ʋ tɩɩ mɩɩbol, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ sɩ na ʋ mɩɩbol. Amɛ nal hʋ mɛ aa kuu ŋ wɩya a vɩya ʋ mɩɩbol ta ʋ tɩɩna sɩ na mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: What will you gain, if you own the whole world but destroy yourself? What would you give to get back your soul?
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ tɩŋ dʋnɩya no kɩŋ buloŋ, aŋ bɩ sɩ na mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii, bekiŋ tɔnɔ rɛ ɩ na? Dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, bekiŋ nɛ ɩ sɩ wuwo kpa lenni laa ɩ mɩɩbol?

english_verse: I promise you some of those standing here will not die before they see the Son of Man coming with his kingdom.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nala badɔmɔŋ we ma tɩyaŋ daha, ba bɩ sɩ sʋba see dɩ ba na mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye ko di dʋnɩya buloŋ koro.”

english_verse: There in front of the disciples, Jesus was completely changed. His face was shining like the sun, and his clothes became white as light.
translation_verse: Ba ko baa dɩ ba deŋ, dɩ ba naa Yesu bɩrɩma, ʋ sɩya buloŋ kɩ tʋla gɛɛ anɩɩ wɩɩpɔsɩɩ aŋka ʋ gannɩ mɛ pʋllɩ gɛɛ peretete a kɩ tʋla.

english_verse: Then the disciples understood Jesus was talking to them about John the Baptist. Jesus Heals a Boy (Mark
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ gyɩma anɩɩ Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ wɩya rɛ ʋ basɩ gɛɛ. Yesu kile gyɩŋbɔŋ ta biye kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ Maakɩ

english_verse: Six days later Jesus took Peter and the brothers James and John with him. They went up on a very high mountain where they could be alone.
translation_verse: Ʋ kyɛyɛ badʋ hal tɩyaŋ, Yesu kaŋ Piita abee Gyemsi bee ʋ naabiye Gyɔɔŋ, a mʋ gyɩŋ dogiŋbal kɩdɩgɩ nyuu ba dʋŋ.

english_verse: All at once Moses and Elijah were there talking with Jesus.
translation_verse: Haŋ lagɩlagɩ hʋ dɩ ba naa Moosi abee Ɛlaagya dɩ ba bee Yesu sɩŋ kɩ basɩ wɩya.

english_verse: So Peter said to him, “Lord, it is good for us to be here! Let us make three shelters, one for you, one for Moses, and one for Elijah.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Á Tɩɩna, ʋ yaa wɩwelii rɛ anɩɩ á aa we daha. Dɩ ɩ rɛ aa kyɛ, ŋ sɩ we gyama boto daha, dɩ ɩ tɩŋ kɩdɩgɩ, dɩ Moosi mɛ tɩŋ kɩdɩgɩ, ka dɩ Ɛlaagya mɛ tɩŋ kɩdɩgɩ.”

english_verse: While Peter was still speaking, the shadow of a bright cloud passed over them. From the cloud a voice said, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him. Listen to what he says!”
translation_verse: Piita ha fa aa basɩ wɩya hʋ gɛɛ dɩ taal tʋlɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ ko tuu tɔ ba, ka taal lɩɩ taal tʋlɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Ŋ Biikyoolii rɛ nyɛ. Ŋ teŋ fɩyɛla rɛ ʋ tɩyaŋ. Ma gyegili kɩ nɩɩ ʋ nyʋwa.”

english_verse: When the disciples heard the voice, they were so afraid they fell flat on the ground.
translation_verse: Yesu hatɩnna hʋ aa nɩɩ taal hʋ gɛɛ, kambɩŋ kaŋ ba, ba tuu tele kyige taŋha.

english_verse: But Jesus came over and touched them. He said, “Get up and don't be afraid!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu ko ba lee a dige ba aŋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma sii, ma ta leŋ kambɩŋ kaŋ ma.”

english_verse: When they opened their eyes, they saw only Jesus.
translation_verse: Ba aa siye, ba deŋ lee buloŋ, ka ba bɩ naa nal buloŋ, see Yesu dʋŋ.

english_verse: The disciples asked Jesus, “Don't the teachers of the Law of Moses say Elijah must come before the Messiah does?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ baa dɩ Ɛlaagya rɛ sɩ laa sɩya ko, ka dɩ Krisita, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya na ko?”

english_verse: Jesus told them, “Elijah certainly will come and get everything ready.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, Ɛlaagya rɛ kɔnɩ sɩ laa sɩya ko, a kaŋ kɩŋ buloŋ marɩ biŋ.

english_verse: In fact, he has already come. But the people did not recognize him and treated him just as they wanted to. They will soon make the Son of Man suffer in the same way.”
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ Ɛlaagya paalɩ ko rɛ, aŋka nala bɩ wuwo gyɩma ʋ, aŋ kana ʋ yaa gɛɛ ba aa kyɛ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba yaŋ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye mɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples returned to the crowd. A man knelt in front of him
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ boto sii mɩɩgɩ ko nɩgyamaa hʋ lee. Doŋ nɛ baal kɩdɩgɩ gyɩ ko Yesu lee a tuu gbinni ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: and said, “Lord, have pity on my son! He has a bad case of epilepsy and often falls into a fire or into water.
translation_verse: aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ baa, “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, fá ŋ biibaal sikii, ʋ aa tele kpuŋkpuŋsi rɛ. Wɩɩl hʋ gyʋʋ ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ kɩŋkaŋ, ʋ aa kɩ tele diŋ koo nɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I brought him to your disciples, but none of them could heal him.”
translation_verse: Ŋ kana ʋ ko ɩ hatɩnna hʋ lee rɛ, amɛ ba bɩ wuwo tɩɩbɩ ʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus said, “You people are too stubborn to have any faith! How much longer must I be with you? Why do I have to put up with you? Bring the boy here.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ma gyɩnaŋ nala aa bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di, ma yaa nɩbɔmɔ rɛ. Abaa! Kyɛyɛ baŋmɛ rɛ ŋ tɩɩ baa ŋ we ma lee?” Doŋ nɛ ka ʋ basɩ tɩya baal hʋ a baa, “Kaŋ biye hʋ ko daha.”

english_verse: Then Jesus spoke sternly to the demon. It went out of the boy, and right then he was healed.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu nɔsɩ gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ ʋ lɩɩ biye hʋ tɩyaŋ, ka biye hʋ teŋ pirigi deye.

english_verse: Later the disciples went to Jesus in private and asked him, “Why couldn't we force out the demon?”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ ko ʋ lee a lʋwɔlɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ á kɛ bɩ wuwo kile gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ?”

english_verse: While Jesus and his disciples were going from place to place in Galilee, he told them, “The Son of Man will be handed over to people
translation_verse: Yesu hatɩnna hʋ buloŋ aa ko laŋŋɩ Galili tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ba sɩ kpa Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye a we nala nosi tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: who will kill him. But three days later he will rise to life.” All of this made the disciples very sad. Paying the Temple Tax
translation_verse: dɩ ba kpʋ ŋ, amɛ ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyisi ŋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ kyɛyɛ boto kyɛɛ.” Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, ʋ hatɩnna hʋ tɩsɩ buloŋ kyogi. Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ lampoo tunii wɩya

english_verse: When Jesus and the others arrived in Capernaum, the collectors for the temple tax came to Peter and asked, “Does your teacher pay the temple tax?”
translation_verse: Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ aa ko pele Kapɛɛnam, nala hʋ aa laa Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ lampoo ko Piita lee a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ma nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ aa tuŋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ lampoo rɛ?”

english_verse: “Yes, he does,” Peter answered. After they had returned home, Jesus went up to Peter and asked him, “Simon, what do you think? Do the kings of this earth collect taxes and fees from their own people or from foreigners?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita baa dɩ ʋ aa tuŋ nɛ. Piita aa basɩ gɛɛ aŋ mɩɩgɩ gyʋʋ dɩya, Yesu laa sɩya pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Piita, ɛɛ rɛ ɩ bɩɩnɩ? Kɩbee rɛ aa tuŋ lampoo a kɩ tɩya dʋnɩya no kuworo, tɔɔ hʋ nala tɩɩ koo nɩhʋwala?”

english_verse: Peter answered, “From foreigners.” Jesus replied, “Then their own people don't have to pay.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita baa dɩ nɩhʋwala rɛ. Yesu bɩl baa, “Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ tɔɔ hʋ nala tɩɩ kɛ bee tuŋ kɩŋ buloŋ.”

english_verse: But we don't want to cause trouble. So go cast a line into the lake and pull out the first fish you hook. Open its mouth, and you will find a coin. Use it to pay your taxes and mine.”
translation_verse: Amɛ á kɛ bee kyɛ dɩ á yaa wɩɩ buloŋ kyogi ba, ɛɛ wɩya kpa bɩyaŋ a tuu fuwo a lo, laasɩya fuwonamɩya hʋ ɩ aa sɩ lɩɩ kaŋ ʋ nyʋwa suri a tʋʋ lɩɩ molbinʋʋ ʋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ molbii hʋ mʋ tuŋ ŋ beel-ɩ buloŋ nyuu lampoo.

english_verse: If your eye causes you to sin, poke it out and get rid of it. You would be better off to go into life with only one eye than to have two eyes and be thrown into the fires of hell. The Lost Sheep (Luke
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ sɩɩ rɛ leŋ ɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ, lɩɩ ta. Ɩ aa gyʋʋ wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ abee sɩtogo, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ɩ aa kaŋ sɩya balɩya ka ba kpa ɩ yuwo we diŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't you think you should show pity to someone else, as I did to you?”
translation_verse: Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ɩ kɛ bɩ wuwo dɩ ɩ fá ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna hʋ sikii anɩɩ ŋ aa fáá ɩ sikii gɛɛ?”

english_verse: But if you are as humble as this child, you are the greatest in the kingdom of heaven.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ hʋwɔlɩ anɩɩ biibiye no, ʋ tɩɩna rɛ yaa nɩbal wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And when you welcome one of these children because of me, you welcome me. Temptations To Sin (Mark
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ kuu ŋ wɩya a kaŋ biibiye no dɔŋtɩɩna weliŋ, mɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ weliŋ gɛɛ.” Yesu basɩ wɩya hʋ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ nala yaa wɩbɔmɔ Maakɩ

english_verse: If the follower refuses to listen to them, report the matter to the church. Anyone who refuses to listen to the church must be treated like an unbeliever or a tax collector. Allowing and Not Allowing
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ʋ rɛ ha ko bɩ gyegili nɩɩ ba mɛ nyʋwa, basɩ wɩɩ hʋ tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ buloŋ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ha ko bɩl bɩ gyegili nɩɩ ba mɛ nyʋwa, ɛɛ kɛ kpa ʋ tɩɩna anɩɩ nal aa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ koo wɩbɔŋ yaal.

english_verse: It will be terrible for people who cause even one of my little followers to sin. Those people would be better off thrown into the deepest part of the ocean with a heavy stone tied around their necks!
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ ko leŋ dɩ nala no aa laa ŋ di, anɩɩ biibiisi no kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ko vɩya ŋ nyʋwa, ba aa kpaa nɔŋ a vʋwa laalɩ ʋ tɩɩna bagɩna tɩyaŋ a kpa ʋ yuwo we nɩɩbɩŋ tɩyaŋ ʋ nyʋwa nɩɩ sʋba, ʋ rɛ sɩ kpɩya ʋ tɩɩna aa weye.

english_verse: If your hand or foot causes you to sin, chop it off and throw it away! You would be better off to go into life paralyzed or lame than to have two hands or two feet and be thrown into the fire that never goes out.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ noŋ koo ɩ naaŋ nɛ leŋ ɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ, keri ʋ ta. Ɩ aa gyʋʋ wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ abee nokuu koo naakuu, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ɩ aa sɩ kaŋ nopilime abee naapilime ka dɩ ba kpa ɩ yuwo we diŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If one of my followers sins against you, go and point out what was wrong. But do it in private, just between the two of you. If that person listens, you have won back a follower.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Dɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna krisitabiye rɛ yaa wɩɩ kyogi ɩ, mʋ basɩ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa yaa kyogi ɩ tɩya ʋ, amɛ leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa ɩ beel-ʋ dʋŋ wɩgyɩmɩɩ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko gyegili nɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ ɩ aa basɩ tɩya ʋ, ɛɛ kɛ ɩ beel-ʋ mɩɩgɩ marɩ dɔmɔŋ nɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Don't be cruel to any of these little ones! I promise you their angels are always with my Father in heaven.
translation_verse: “Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye ko dɩ ŋ kyɛ a laa nala hʋ aa nyʋgɩsa rɛ a ta.” Yesu maga piyesi hʋ aa nyʋgɩsa namaga Luka

english_verse: That's how it is with your Father in heaven. He doesn't want any of these little ones to be lost. When Someone Sins (Luke
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ma kuwo aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ mɛ bee kyɛ dɩ ma nala no aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di aŋ kaŋ ma tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ anɩɩ biibiisi kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nyʋgɩsɩ.” Dɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna ko yaa wɩɩ kyogi ɩ

english_verse: I promise you God in heaven will allow whatever you allow on earth, but God will not allow anything you don't allow.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, wɩɩ hʋ ma aa sɩŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ sɩna. Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ ma aa laa dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ sɩ laa.

english_verse: I promise that when any two of you on earth agree about something you are praying for, my Father in heaven will do it for you.
translation_verse: Ŋ marɩ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, dɩ ma balɩya rɛ yaa nyʋʋdɩgɩ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ kyɛ kɩŋ, ŋ Kuwo aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ sɩ yaa ʋ tɩya ma.

english_verse: Whenever two or three of you come together in my name, I am there with you. An Official Who Refused To Forgive
translation_verse: Lee hʋ nala balɩya koo boto aa laŋŋa ŋ feŋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ we ba lee rɛ.” Yesu daga nala dɔmɔŋ wɩbɔmɔ kpakyɛyɩ wɩya

english_verse: Peter came up to the Lord and asked, “How many times should I forgive someone who does something wrong to me? Is seven times enough?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita ko Yesu lee a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Tɩɩna, dɩ ŋ dɔŋtɩɩna rɛ yaa wɩɩ kyogi ŋ, naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa bʋŋmɛ rɛ ŋ maga dɩ ŋ kpa kyɛ ʋ? Ŋ kpa kyɛ ʋ naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa bʋpɛ koo?”

english_verse: This story will show you what the kingdom of heaven is like: One day a king decided to call in his officials and ask them to give an account of what they owed him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kaŋ wɩɩ no maga namaga a baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ kuwori kɩdɩgɩ aa sii yɩrɩ ʋ tʋŋtʋnna dɩ ʋ gyɩŋ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ aa dii ʋ kyɩŋ mɔɔgɛɛ.

english_verse: As he was doing this, one official was brought in who owed him
translation_verse: Ʋ aa piile dɩ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ kyɩma hʋ gɛɛ, ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ kɩdɩgɩ aa di ʋ kyɩŋ molbiye tusi tusi ko ʋ lee.

english_verse: But he didn't have any money to pay what he owed. The king ordered him to be sold, along with his wife and children and all he owned, in order to pay the debt.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ bɩ kaŋ molbii ʋ aa sɩ tuŋ. Nyɛ rɛ ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ baa dɩ ba kaŋ ʋ bee ʋ haaŋ abee ʋ balɩya abee kɩŋ buloŋ ʋ aa kana, a kaŋ mʋ yallɩ a ko tuŋ kyɩŋ hʋ.

english_verse: The official got down on his knees and began begging, “Have pity on me, and I will pay you every cent I owe!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ tuu gbinni a sʋla ʋ, a baa, ‘Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, di kenyiri tɩya ŋ, ŋ sɩ tuŋ kyɩŋ hʋ buloŋ.”’

english_verse: The king felt sorry for him and let him go free. He even told the official that he did not have to pay back the money.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ fá ʋ sikii a kpa kyɩŋ hʋ kyɛ ʋ aŋ leŋ ʋ mʋ.

english_verse: But as this official was leaving, he happened to meet another official, who owed him
translation_verse: Amɛ baal no aa lɩɩ, a kyeŋ ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋtɩɩna mɛ aa dii ʋ kyɩŋ molbiwarɩ tusi, ʋ kyɩɩrɩ gal we ʋ bagɩna tɩyaŋ a baa dɩ ʋ tuŋ kyɩŋ hʋ.

english_verse: The man got down on his knees and began begging, “Have pity on me, and I will pay you back.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋtɩɩna hʋ mɛ tuu gbinni a sʋla ʋ a baa, ‘Di kenyiri tɩya ŋ, ŋ sɩ tuŋ kyɩŋ hʋ.’

english_verse: But the first official refused to have pity. Instead, he went and had the other official put in jail until he could pay what he owed.
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ vɩya aŋ leŋ ba kana ʋ mʋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ saŋa hʋ ʋ aa sɩ tuŋ kyɩŋ hʋ teŋ.

english_verse: When some other officials found out what had happened, they felt sorry for the man who had been put in jail. Then they told the king what had happened.
translation_verse: Ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋtɩŋsɩ hʋ aa naa wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa yaa, ʋ yaa ba tɩkyogi. Ba mʋ basɩ tɩya ba nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ.

english_verse: The king called the first official back in and said, “You're an evil man! When you begged for mercy, I said you did not have to pay back a cent.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ kuwori hʋ yɩrɩ ʋ, a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ dɔŋ tahaa tɩɩna! Ɩ aa sʋla ŋ nɛ tɩŋ, ŋ kpaa kyɩŋ hʋ ɩ aa diye buloŋ a kyɛ ɩ.

english_verse: The king was so angry that he ordered the official to be tortured until he could pay back everything he owed.
translation_verse: Kuwori hʋ na baaŋ weliŋ ʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ aŋ leŋ ba kana ʋ mʋ tɩya nɩtɔdɩya nala dɩ ba dɔgɩsɩ ʋ a mʋ pele saŋa hʋ ʋ aa sɩ tuŋ kyɩŋ hʋ buloŋ teŋ.

english_verse: That is how my Father in heaven will treat you, if you don't forgive each of my followers with all your heart.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Nyɛ tɩɩ rɛ ŋ kuwo aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ mɛ sɩ yaa ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ, dɩ mamaa rɛ ko bɩ kpaa wɩya kɩ kyɛ ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ abee ma tɩsɩ buloŋ.”

english_verse: When Jesus finished teaching, he left Galilee and went to the part of Judea east of the Jordan River.
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ wɩya no teŋ, ʋ lɩɩ Galili paalʋʋ a mʋ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ Gyɔɔdaŋ fuwo hʋ kyolo tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Some people are unable to marry because of birth defects or because of what someone has done to their bodies. Others stay single in order to serve God better. Anyone who can accept this teaching should do so.” Jesus Blesses Little Children (Mark
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ baala badɔmɔŋ bee paa haana, ba yaa wɩgyamaa rɛ. Ba aa lʋl badɔmɔŋ dɩ ba paalɩ bɩ kaŋ barɩ. Badɔmɔŋ mɛ nihuwobisi rɛ farɩ ba, ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ kuu Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ wɩya a vɩya haana paayɩ. Nal hʋ aa sɩ wuwo laa wɩɩ no di, ʋ tɩɩna laa di.” Yesu sʋl Wɩɩsɩ tɩya biibiisi Maakɩ

english_verse: Large crowds followed him, and he healed their sick.
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa sii tɩŋa ʋ hal. Ʋ tɩɩbɩ nala hʋ aa wɩɩlɩ ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Some Pharisees wanted to test Jesus. They came up to him and asked, “Is it right for a man to divorce his wife for just any reason?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima badɔmɔŋ mɛ sii ko ʋ lee a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba magɩsɩ ʋ, a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ʋ yaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ dɩ baal kuu wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ wɩya a vɩya ʋ haaŋ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Don't you know in the beginning the Creator made a man and a woman?
translation_verse: Yesu mɩɩgɩ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ma bɩ karɩma Wɩɩsɩ teŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ saŋa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa marɩ dʋnɩya, baal bee haaŋ nɛ ʋ gyɩ ta aŋ baa,

english_verse: That's why a man leaves his father and mother and gets married. He becomes like one person with his wife.
translation_verse: nyɛ wɩya baal aa sɩ leŋ ʋ kuwo abee ʋ naa rɛ ka dɩ ʋ bee ʋ haaŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ a kɩ gyʋʋ.

english_verse: Then they are no longer two people, but one. And no one should separate a couple God has joined together.”
translation_verse: Ba bɩl bɩ yaa nala balɩya, ba bɩrɩma nɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa leŋ ba yaa nɩdɩgɩ ʋ bɩ maga dɩ nihuwobiŋ kaŋ ba porigi dɔmɔŋ.”

english_verse: The Pharisees asked Jesus, “Why did Moses say a man could write out divorce papers and send his wife away?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima hʋ bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ Moosi fa baa dɩ dɩ baal lɛ aa kyɛ ʋ vɩya ʋ haaŋ, dɩ ʋ laa sɩya sabɩ haaŋ vɩyayɩ teŋ tɩya ʋ aŋ na vɩya ʋ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “You are so heartless! That's why Moses allowed you to divorce your wife. But from the beginning God did not intend it to be that way.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma dagɩɩ aa hayɛ rɛ tɩŋ Moosi gyɩ tɩya ma ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ma kɩ vɩya ma haana gɛɛ. Amɛ nyɛ daa ʋ fa kɩɩ dʋnɩya piilii hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I say if your wife has not committed some terrible sexual sin, you must not divorce her to marry someone else. If you do, you are unfaithful.”
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, a lɩɩ sɔŋsɔŋ hal, dɩ baal lɛ kuu wɩɩ buloŋ wɩya a vɩya ʋ haaŋ, aŋ bɩl mʋ kpa hadɩma, ɩ tɩɩna yaa basɔŋsɔnnɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus told them, “Only those people who have been given the gift of staying single can accept this teaching.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩɩ no bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ nal buloŋ nɛ sɩ wuwo yaa ʋ. Amɛ nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa ɛɛ dee tɩya dʋŋ nɛ sɩ wuwo yaa gɛɛ.

english_verse: Some people brought their children to Jesus, so he could place his hands on them and pray for them. His disciples told the people to stop bothering him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala badɔmɔŋ sii kaŋ biisi ko Yesu lee, dɩ ʋ kpa ʋ nosi dɔbɔ ba tɩyaŋ a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ tɩya ba. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ kɩ kil ba.

english_verse: A man came to Jesus and asked, “Teacher, what good thing must I do to have eternal life?”
translation_verse: Baal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ rɛ gyɩ siye a ko Yesu lee a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, wɩwelibee rɛ ŋ sɩ yaa a na mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii?”

english_verse: “Which ones?” the man asked. Jesus answered, “Do not murder. Be faithful in marriage. Do not steal. Do not tell lies about others.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ abaa, “Mɩrɩbeema rɛ gɛɛ?” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ba aa rɛ nyɛ: Ta kpʋʋ nal, ta kɩ sɔnnɔ, ta gaa, ta nyɩya wɩya tɩya nal,

english_verse: After Jesus had placed his hands on the children, he left. A Rich Young Man (Mark
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kpa ʋ nosi dɔbɔ ba tɩyaŋ aŋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩya ba aŋ lɩɩ doŋ kpa mʋ. Bapʋwasɩɩ hʋ aa yaa kɩna tɩɩna Maakɩ

english_verse: Jesus said to him, “Why do you ask me about what is good? Only God is good. If you want to have eternal life, you must obey his commandments.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ kɩ pɩyɛsɩ ŋ wɩweliye wɩya? Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ nɛ weliye. Dɩ ɩ rɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii, kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ ba aa saba biŋ.”

english_verse: But Jesus said, “Let the children come to me, and don't try to stop them! People who are like these children belong to God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Yesu aa naa gɛɛ, ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma ta kil ba. Ma leŋ dɩ ba ko ŋ lee, beewɩya nala hʋ aa kaŋ ba tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ anɩɩ biibiisi no aŋ kɩ tɩŋ ŋ hal, ba aa rɛ sɩ gyʋʋ wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: But many who are now first will be last, and many who are last will be first.
translation_verse: Amɛ nala hʋ aa yaa nɩbala dʋnɩya sɩya tɩyaŋ, ba sɩ maakyiye ko yaa nɩbiisi, ka nala hʋ mɛ aa yaa nɩbiisi dʋnɩya sɩya tɩyaŋ ba mɛ sɩ maakyiye ko yaa nɩbala.”

english_verse: Respect your father and mother. And love others as much as you love yourself.”
translation_verse: kɩ tɩya ɩ kuwo abee ɩ naa gyɩrɩma, kyo ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna anɩɩ ɩ aa kyo ɩ tɩɩ gɛɛ.”

english_verse: The young man said, “I have obeyed all of these. What else must I do?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ baa, “Wɩya no kɛ buloŋ nɛ ŋ kɩ tɩŋa. Wɩbee rɛ ha kaa?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If you want to be perfect, go sell everything you own! Give the money to the poor, and you will have riches in heaven. Then come and be my follower.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ abaa, “Dɩ ɩ rɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ kɔnɩ yaa niwelii Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ, a ta kaŋ gyoŋ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, mʋ kpa ɩ kɩna hʋ buloŋ yallɩ, a kpa molbiye hʋ tɩya nyaaba, aŋ ko kɩ tɩŋa ŋ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa gɛɛ, ɩ sɩ kaŋ kɩna wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: When the young man heard this, he went away sad, because he was very rich.
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, baal hʋ tɩya buloŋ kyogi, ʋ sii mʋ, beewɩya ʋ gyɩ kaŋ kɩna rɛ weliŋ.

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “I tell you, it's terribly hard for rich people to get into the kingdom of heaven!
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ʋ yaa wɩduwo rɛ abee kɩna tɩɩna aa sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ.

english_verse: In fact, it's easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to get into God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩl basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, nyɔgɩmaa aa sɩ tɩŋ gahaŋ sɩɩ a lɩɩ, ʋ rɛ yaa mɔl a te kɩna tɩɩna aa sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: When the disciples heard this, they were greatly surprised and asked, “How can anyone ever be saved?”
translation_verse: Ʋ hatɩnna hʋ gyɩ aa nɩɩ wɩya no, ba nyʋʋsɩ gyɩ fɩyɛlɩ weliŋ ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Dɩ ba aa rɛ kɩɩ nyɛ, kɩbee rɛ yaŋ sɩ na Wɩɩsɩ laatayɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus looked straight at them and said, “There are some things people cannot do, but God can do anything.”
translation_verse: Yesu mɩɩgɩ deŋ ba aŋ baa, “Wɩɩ no kperi nihuwobiŋ nɛ, amɛ wɩɩ buloŋ tuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa.”

english_verse: Peter replied, “Remember, we have left everything to be your followers! What will we get?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita baa, “Na, á kɛ leŋ á kɩŋ buloŋ nɛ aŋ kɩ tɩŋa ɩ hal. Bekiŋ tɔnɔ rɛ á sɩ na?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: Yes, all of you have become my followers. And so in the future world, when the Son of Man sits on his glorious throne, I promise you will sit on twelve thrones to judge the twelve tribes of Israel.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, saŋa hʋ dʋnɩfalɩɩ hʋ aa sɩ ko tɩyaŋ, mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye sɩ hɔŋ ŋ gaŋdaa-kuworikpasa tɩyaŋ. Saŋa no tɩyaŋ, ma nala hʋ fi abee balɩya hʋ aa tɩŋa ŋ hal, ma mɛ sɩ hɔŋ kuworikpasɩnɩ fi abee balɩya tɩyaŋ a kɩ di Iziral bekyige fi abee balɩya hʋ sarɩya.

english_verse: As Jesus was telling what the kingdom of heaven would be like, he said: Early one morning a man went out to hire some workers for his vineyard.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl maga namaga a tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a daga wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa basɩ memii. Ʋ baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ baga tɩɩna kɩdɩgɩ aa sii kyɩkyʋwala, a lɩɩ kɩ kyɛ nala dɩ ʋ paa baadee dɩ ba mʋ pala ʋ baga.

english_verse: After he had agreed to pay them the usual amount for a day's work, he sent them off to his vineyard.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa ko na nala hʋ aa sɩ mʋ baga hʋ, ʋ laa nyʋwa anɩɩ ʋ sɩ tuŋ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ kyɛdɩgɩ tuno, aŋ leŋ ba mʋ baga hʋ.”

english_verse: About nine that morning, the man saw some other people standing in the market with nothing to do.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa ko maga gyinyɛ, ʋ bɩl lɩɩ a na baala badɔmɔŋ dɩ ba sɩŋ bee tɩyaŋ waasʋ.

english_verse: He promised to pay them what was fair, if they would work in his vineyard.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa “Ma mɛ mʋ ŋ baga, ka dɩ ŋ tuŋ ma gɛɛ hʋ buloŋ aa maga.” Ɛɛ rɛ ba mɛ mʋ baga hʋ.

english_verse: So they went. At noon and again about three in the afternoon he returned to the market. And each time he made the same agreement with others who were loafing around with nothing to do.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ bɩl aa ko maga nyutʋtʋʋ, ʋ bɩl lɩɩ a na baala badɔmɔŋ a leŋ ba mɛ mʋ baga hʋ. Sɔnnɩ bɩl aa ko viisi saŋa hʋ, ʋ bɩl lɩɩ na nala badɔmɔŋ a leŋ ba mɛ mʋ baga hʋ.

english_verse: Finally, about five in the afternoon the man went back and found some others standing there. He asked them, “Why have you been standing here all day long doing nothing?”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa ko tuu fɩyɛlɩ gɛɛ, ʋ bɩl lɩɩ bee a na nala badɔmɔŋ mɛ dɩ ba sɩŋ waasʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba abaa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma sɩŋ daha waasʋ gyɩnaŋ buloŋ, ma bɩ kaŋ tʋŋ buloŋ?”

english_verse: “Because no one has hired us,” they answered. Then he told them to go work in his vineyard.
translation_verse: Ba basɩ tɩya ʋ anɩɩ ba bɩ naa tʋma dɩ ba tʋma. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ba dɩ ba mɛ mʋ ʋ baga hʋ. Nyɛ rɛ ba mɛ kpa mʋ.

english_verse: That evening the owner of the vineyard told the man in charge of the workers to call them in and give them their money. He also told the man to begin with the ones who were hired last.
translation_verse: Dɩdaana aa ko pele, ɛɛ rɛ baga hʋ tɩɩna yɩrɩ nal hʋ aa deŋ ʋ baga hʋ a basɩ tɩya ʋ dɩ ʋ yɩrɩ nala hʋ aa ko tʋŋ tʋma baga hʋ tɩyaŋ a tuŋ ba. Ʋ baa dɩ ʋ laasɩya tuŋ nala hʋ aa laa hal ko a mʋ tuu pele nala hʋ a laa sɩya ko tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When the workers arrived, the ones who had been hired at five in the afternoon were given a full day's pay.
translation_verse: Baala hʋ aa laa hal mʋ baga hʋ, ʋ tuŋ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ kyɛdɩgɩ tuno.

english_verse: they began complaining to the owner of the vineyard.
translation_verse: Ba laa molbiye hʋ aŋ gʋrɩmɩ baga hʋ tɩɩna wɩya kɩ basɩ,

english_verse: They said, “The ones who were hired last worked for only one hour. But you paid them the same that you did us. And we worked in the hot sun all day long!”
translation_verse: a baa, “Nala no aa laa hal ko, ba tʋŋ tʋma hawa dɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ, aŋka á kɛ tʋma kyɩkyʋwala buloŋ gɛɛ wɩɩsɩ no mʋ gyʋʋ, aŋka ɩ tuŋ á buloŋ maga dɔmɔŋ.”

english_verse: The owner answered one of them, “Friend, I didn't cheat you. I paid you exactly what we agreed on.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baga hʋ tɩɩna basɩ tɩya ba kɩdɩgɩ a baa, “Ŋ bagyʋwa gyegile nɩɩ daha, ŋ bɩ firimi ma. Na ma laa nyʋwa rɛ anɩɩ ma sɩ tʋma dɩ wɩɩsɩ gyʋʋ, ka dɩ ma laa kyɛdɩgɩ tuno.

english_verse: Take your money now and go! What business is it of yours if I want to pay them the same that I paid you?
translation_verse: Ma laa ma molbiye kɩ mʋ. Ŋ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ tuŋ baala no aa laa hal ko gɛɛ tɩɩ ŋ aa tuŋ ma mɛ.

english_verse: Don't I have the right to do what I want with my own money? Why should you be jealous, if I want to be generous?”
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ŋ kaŋ ŋ molbiye yaa gɛɛ hʋ ŋ aa kyɛɛ? Koo ma tɩsɩ aa hɔllɩ akuu ŋ aa kaŋ bɔnyɛ wɩya rɛ?”

english_verse: When Jesus heard them, he stopped and asked, “What do you want me to do for you?”
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Yesu sɩŋ aŋ yɩrɩ ba a pɩyɛsɩ ba, “Bekiŋ nɛ ma kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ yaa tɩya ma?”

english_verse: Jesus felt sorry for them and touched their eyes. At once they could see, and they became his followers.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu fá ba sikii a dige dige ba sɩyasɩ ba pirigi suri, ba sii kɩ tɩŋa ʋ hal.

english_verse: The crowd told them to be quiet, but they shouted even louder, “Lord and Son of David, have pity on us!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nɩgyamaa hʋ nɔsɩ ba dɩ ba leŋ ba kyagɩŋsɩ hʋ. Amɛ ba marɩ yɩrɩ te gɛɛ a baa, “Á nɩhɩyawʋ, Deviti nihii, fá á sikii.”

english_verse: As Jesus was on his way to Jerusalem, he took his twelve disciples aside and told them in private:
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna fi abee balɩya hʋ gyɩ aa we ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ a kɩ mʋ Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ gyɩ kaŋ ba dʋŋ gɩɩgɩ lɩɩ a basɩ tɩya ba a baa,

english_verse: and then they will hand him over to foreigners who will make fun of him. They will beat him and nail him to a cross. But on the third day he will rise from death. A Mother's Request (Mark
translation_verse: aŋ kpa ŋ we nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma nosi tɩyaŋ. Ba sɩ yaa ŋ sɩya, a vɩɩrɩ ŋ, aŋ kpaasɩ ŋ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ʋ kyɛtoo kyɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyisi ŋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.” Zebedi haaŋ sʋla Yesu kɩ kyɛ lɩhɔnɩya dɩ ʋ tɩya ʋ balɩya Maakɩ

english_verse: The mother of James and John came to Jesus with her two sons. She knelt down and started begging him to do something for her.
translation_verse: Zebedi haaŋ gyɩ sii kaŋ ʋ biisi balɩya ko Yesu lee rɛ a tuu gbinni ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, aŋ sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ pɛ ʋ bee wɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: Jesus asked her what she wanted, and she said, “When you come into your kingdom, please let one of my sons sit at your right side and the other at your left.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Wɩbee rɛ ɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ yaa tɩya ɩ?” Nyɛ rɛ ʋ baa, “Dɩ ɩ ko di ɩ koro hʋ a hɔŋ ɩ gaŋdaa-kuworikpasa hʋ tɩyaŋ, leŋ dɩ ŋ biisi no balɩya kɩdɩgɩ hɔŋ ɩ noduu, dɩ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ hɔŋ ɩ nogɔbɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Not one of you knows what you are asking. Are you able to drink from the cup that I must soon drink from?” James and John said, “Yes, we are!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya biisi hʋ a baa, “Ma bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ma aa kyɛ. Ma sɩ wuwo kaŋ kenyiri a na tʋwara hʋ ŋ aa sɩ na?” Ba baa “Waa á sɩ wuwo.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “You certainly will drink from my cup! But it isn't for me to say who will sit at my right side and at my left. This is for my Father to say.”
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ma basɩ. Tʋwara hʋ ŋ aa sɩ na, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ ma mɛ sɩ na. Amɛ ŋ noduu abee ŋ nogɔbɔ hʋhɔnnɔ hʋ kɛ, ŋ daa sɩ lɩɩ ba. Ŋ kuwo Wɩɩsɩ marɩ doŋ nɛ a tɩya nala hʋ ʋ tɩɩ aa sɩ lɩɩ dɩ ba hɔŋ doŋ.”

english_verse: When the ten other disciples heard this, they were angry with the two brothers.
translation_verse: Yesu hatɩnnɩ kaalɩya hʋ aa nɩɩ wɩɩ no ba kɩ na baaŋ Gyemsi bee Gyɔɔŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But Jesus called the disciples together and said: You know foreign rulers like to order their people around. And their great leaders have full power over everyone they rule.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu yɩrɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ buloŋ ko laŋŋɩ, a basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Na ma gyɩma anɩɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma, ba kuworo aa hɔŋ ba nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ, ba sɩlaala mɛ kaŋ ba kɩ fɩla.

english_verse: But don't act like them. If you want to be great, you must be the servant of all the others.
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ma kɛ kɩ yaa gɛɛ. Ma tɩyaŋ nal hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ yaa ma nɩbal, ʋ maga dɩ ʋ tɩɩna tʋma kɩ tɩya ma rɛ.

english_verse: And if you want to be first, you must be the slave of the rest.
translation_verse: Ma nal hʋ mɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ yaa ma tɩyaŋ sɩlaal, ʋ maga dɩ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ yaa yoŋ nɛ ma tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: The Son of Man did not come to be a slave master, but a slave who will give his life to rescue many people. Jesus Heals Two Blind Men (Mark
translation_verse: anɩɩ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye aa kɩɩ gɛɛ. Ŋ bɩ ko dɩ nala tʋma kɩ tɩya ŋ, amɛ nala rɛ ŋ ko dɩ ŋ tʋma tɩya, aŋ kpa ŋ mɩɩbol mɛ lenni sʋʋ a laa nala yʋga ta ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ.” Yesu suro nyʋlɩma balɩya sɩya Maakɩ

english_verse: Jesus was followed by a large crowd as he and his disciples were leaving Jericho.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal lɛ ba mʋ lɩɩ tɩŋ Gyɛriko tɩyaŋ kɩ mʋ, nɩgyamaa mɛ sii paa tɩŋ ba hal.

english_verse: Two blind men were sitting beside the road. And when they heard that Jesus was coming their way, they shouted, “Lord and Son of David, have pity on us!”
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ dɩ banyʋlma balɩya mɛ hɔŋ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ nyʋwa aŋ nɩɩ dɩ Yesu rɛ aa baŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba huwori yɩrɩ ʋ a baa, “Á nɩhɩyawʋ, Deviti nihii, fá á sikii.”

english_verse: Jesus said: I will tell you a story about a man who had two sons. Then you can tell me what you think. The father went to the older son and said, “Go work in the vineyard today!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu maga namaga a tɩya Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Gyuuma a baa, “Baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ gyɩ we doŋ a kaŋ ʋ biibaala balɩya. Ʋ sii mʋ ʋ biihɩyawʋ hʋ lee a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, ‘Ŋ biye, mʋ baga gyɩnaŋ a tʋŋ tʋma.’

english_verse: But when they saw the man's son, they said, “Someday he will own the vineyard. Let's kill him! Then we can have it all for ourselves.”
translation_verse: Amɛ tʋŋtʋnna hʋ aa naa biye hʋ, ba basɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Dɩ baga hʋ tɩɩna rɛ ko sʋba, biye no rɛ sɩ di ʋ kyaŋ. Ma leŋ dɩ á kpʋ ʋ. Dɩ ámaa rɛ kpʋ ʋ, ámaa rɛ sɩ mɩɩgɩ tɩŋ ʋ kɩna hʋ buloŋ.”

english_verse: If anyone asks why you are doing this, just say, ‘The Lord needs them.’ He will at once let you have the donkeys.”
translation_verse: Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko pɩyɛsɩ ma, ma basɩ tɩya ʋ anɩɩ ma Tɩɩna rɛ aa kyɛ. Ʋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma kaŋ ko lagɩ.”

english_verse: So God's promise came true, just as the prophet had said,
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no yaa dɩ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaal kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ basɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: “Announce to the people of Jerusalem: ‘Your king is coming to you! He is humble and rides on a donkey. He comes on the colt of a donkey.’ ”
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ baa, “Basɩ tɩya Zaayɔŋ nala Ma na, ma kuwori rɛ aa ko ma lee. Ʋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ hʋwɔlɩ rɛ a gyɩŋ kokumo abee ʋ biye.”

english_verse: The disciples left and did what Jesus had told them to do.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ mʋ a yaa wɩɩ hʋ Yesu aa basɩ tɩya ba.

english_verse: They brought the donkey and its colt and laid some clothes on their backs. Then Jesus got on.
translation_verse: Ba mʋ kaŋ kokumo hʋ bee ʋ biye a ko kpa ba gannɩ dɔbɔ kokumo hʋ abee ʋ biye nyuu tɩyaŋ, Yesu gyɩŋ.

english_verse: When Jesus came to Jerusalem, everyone in the city was excited and asked, “Who can this be?”
translation_verse: Yesu aa mʋʋ gyʋʋ Gyerusalɛm, bee hʋ buloŋ dɔŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ nala kɩ pɩyɛsɩ a baa, “Kɩbee rɛ nyɛ?”

english_verse: But the chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses were angry when they saw his miracles and heard the children shouting praises to the Son of David.
translation_verse: Amɛ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ aa naa wɩmagɩla hʋ ʋ aa yaa, a bɩl na gɛɛ biibiisi aa yaa kyagɩŋsɩ a kɩ dannɩ ʋ a baa “Tabarikala! Deviti nihii!” Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ gyaŋwuwo tɩyaŋ, ba baaŋ sii.

english_verse: When the chief priests and the Pharisees heard these stories, they knew Jesus was talking about them.
translation_verse: Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Farasiima aa nɩɩ Yesu aa maga namaga hʋ, ba gyɩma anɩɩ ba wɩya rɛ ʋ kɩ basɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: He told them, “The Scriptures say, ‘My house should be called a place of worship.’ But you have turned it into a place where robbers hide.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ba saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa, ‘Ŋ dɩya sɩ yaa lee hʋ nala aa sɩ kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ’, aŋka ma kɛ mɩɩgɩ kaŋ bɩrɩmɩ gaala dɩya.”

english_verse: If you have faith when you pray, you will be given whatever you ask for.” A Question about Jesus' Authority (Mark
translation_verse: Kɩna hʋ buloŋ ma aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ a kɩ kyɛ, dɩ mamaa rɛ laa Wɩɩsɩ di, ma sɩ na ba.” Ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu ʋ dee wɩya Maakɩ

english_verse: The men said to Jesus, “Don't you hear what those children are saying?” “Yes, I do!” Jesus answered. “Don't you know that the Scriptures say, ‘Children and infants will sing praises’?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Ɩ nɩɩ wɩya hʋ biisi hʋ aa basɩ rɛ?” Yesu baa, “Ŋ nɩya rɛ.” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɛ pɩyɛsɩ ba abaa, “Ma bɩ karɩmɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ lee hʋ ba aa saba a baa “Wɩɩsɩ daga biibiisi abee biifɩllɩ rɛ dɩ ba kɩ dannɩ ʋ weliŋ?”

english_verse: Then Jesus left the city and went out to the village of Bethany, where he spent the night. Jesus Puts a Curse on a Fig Tree (Mark
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Yesu leŋ ba aŋ sii mʋ pɩŋ Bɛɛtani tɩyaŋ. Yesu kaaba we tutogo tɩyaŋ Maakɩ

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I have just one question to ask you. If you answer it, I will tell you where I got the right to do these things.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ mɛ sɩ pɩyɛsɩ ma wɩdɩgɩ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko lɩɩ ʋ sɩɩ tɩya ŋ, ŋ mɛ sɩ daga ma nal hʋ aa tɩya ŋ dee ŋ kɩ yaa wɩya no buloŋ.”

english_verse: When Jesus got up the next morning, he was hungry. He started out for the city,
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩya aa gballa kyɩkyʋwala, Yesu mɩɩgɩ sii kɩ mʋ Gyerusalɛm. Ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ, losi kana ʋ.

english_verse: But Jesus said to them, “If you have faith and don't doubt, I promise you can do what I did to this tree. And you will be able to do even more. You can tell this mountain to get up and jump into the sea, and it will.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, dɩ mamaa rɛ kɔnɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di, a bee yaa sige, ma mɛ sɩ wuwo yaa wɩɩ no ŋ aa yaa tutogo hʋ. Nyɛ mɛ dʋŋ yaŋ daa, amɛ ma sɩ paalɩ wuwo basɩ tɩya dogimo no aa sɩna, a baa, ‘Sii a mʋ tele mpʋwɔnʋʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ kɔnɩ sii mʋ tele.’

english_verse: So they told Jesus, “We don't know.” Jesus said, “Then I won't tell you who gave me the right to do what I do.” A Story about Two Sons
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Á bɩ gyɩma.” Nyɛ rɛ Yesu mɛ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ɛɛ kɛ, ŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ daga ma nal hʋ aa tɩya ŋ dee ŋ wuwo kɩ yaa wɩya no buloŋ.” Biibaala balɩya namaga

english_verse: Jesus told the chief priests and leaders to listen to this story: A land owner once planted a vineyard. He built a wall around it and dug a pit to crush the grapes in. He also built a lookout tower. Then he rented out his vineyard and left the country.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl maga namaga kɩdɩgɩ a baa, “Baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ gyɩ biŋ ʋ baga a pɔ kɩna badɔmɔŋ aa kaŋ nɔŋkyɩga a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kyʋkyɔyɩ, ba kɩ yɩrɩ girepisi. Ʋ yaŋ lɩga baga hʋ gol baŋ, a hulo bʋwa baga hʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ba kyaga tɩɩnɔnɔ hʋ nɩɩ kɩ we . Ʋ gyɩ saa salnyuu dɩɩbiye mɛ rɛ, dɩ ba hɔŋ ʋ salnyuu tɩyaŋ a kɩ pɔ baga hʋ. Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ paa nala a we baga hʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ba kɩ tʋma. Ka ʋ sii kpa mʋ tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: Jesus had gone into the temple and was teaching when the chief priests and the leaders of the people came up to him. They asked, “What right do you have to do these things? Who gave you this authority?”
translation_verse: Yesu aa mɩɩgɩ mʋ gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal gyaŋwuwo hʋ, a kɩ daga nala, doŋ nɛ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Gyuuma bee-nɩhɩyasɩ buloŋ sii ko ʋ lee a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Aŋnɛ rɛ tɩya ɩ dee ɩ kɩ yaa wɩya no buloŋ?”

english_verse: On the other hand, these people think John was a prophet, and we are afraid of what they might do to us. That's why we can't say it was merely some human who gave John the right to baptize.”
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ bɩl baa dɩ ʋ lɩɩ nihuwobiŋ lee mɛ rɛ, nɩgyamaa no buloŋ bee leŋ ma. Beewɩya ba buloŋ gyɩ laa di anɩɩ Gyɔɔŋ gyɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ.”

english_verse: His son told him he would not do it, but later he changed his mind and went.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ biye hʋ baa, “Ŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo mʋ.” Amɛ gɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, ʋ bɩrɩmɩ ʋ hakɩla aŋ sii mʋ baga hʋ.

english_verse: The man then told his younger son to go work in the vineyard. The boy said he would, but he didn't go.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ mʋ a basɩ ɛɛ tɩɩ tɩya haŋbiye hʋ tɩɩna mɛ, ʋ laa nyʋwa weliŋ anɩɩ ʋ sɩ mʋ baga hʋ aŋ vɩya mʋyɩ.

english_verse: Which one of the sons obeyed his father? “The older one,” the chief priests and leaders answered. Then Jesus told them: You can be sure tax collectors and prostitutes will get into the kingdom of God before you ever will!
translation_verse: Biisi no balɩya tɩyaŋ, ba kɩbee rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kuwo hʋ nyʋwa?” Doŋ nɛ ba basɩ tɩya ʋ dɩ ʋ biihɩyawʋ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kuwo nyʋwa. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, lampolaala abee gyaŋtɩrɩsɩ laa sɩya kɩ gyʋʋ wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ rɛ ma tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When John the Baptist showed you how to do right, you would not believe him. But these evil people did believe. And even when you saw what they did, you still would not change your minds and believe. Renters of a Vineyard (Mark
translation_verse: Beewɩya Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ ko daga ma wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ rɛ ma aa sɩ tɩŋa, aŋka ma bɩ laa ʋ wɩya di, amɛ lampolaala abee gyaŋtɩrɩsɩ kɛ laa ʋ wɩya di rɛ. Abee ma aa naa gɛɛ hʋ ba aa laa ʋ wɩya di buloŋ, amɛ ma kɛ bɩ bɩrɩma ma hakɩllɩ a laa ʋ wɩya di.” Yesu maga baga tʋŋtʋnna badɔmɔŋ namaga Maakɩ

english_verse: When it was harvest time, the owner sent some servants to get his share of the grapes.
translation_verse: Tɩɩnɔnɔ hʋ tɔrɩɩ saŋa aa ko pele, ʋ tɩŋ ʋ dɩya tʋŋtʋnna dɩ ba mʋ baga tʋŋtʋnna hʋ lee a laa ʋ tɩɩnɔnɔ tol ko tɩya ʋ. Nyɛ rɛ ba mʋ.

english_verse: But the renters grabbed those servants. They beat up one, killed one, and stoned one of them to death.
translation_verse: Ba kasɩ ba a ŋmaa kɩdɩgɩ, a kpʋ kɩdɩgɩ, aŋ yaga kɩdɩgɩ hʋ mɛ abee bʋwa.

english_verse: He then sent more servants than he did the first time. But the renters treated them in the same way.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ bɩl marɩ tɩŋ ʋ dɩya tʋŋtʋnna badɔmɔŋ aa tee laasɩya nala hʋ. Ba yaa ba mɛ gɛɛ tɩɩ.

english_verse: Finally, the owner sent his own son to the renters, because he thought they would respect him.
translation_verse: Ba kateŋsi tɩyaŋ ʋ tɩŋ ʋ biye tɩɩ. Ʋ bɩɩna anɩɩ dɩ ʋ biye tɩɩ kɛ rɛ mʋwa, ba sɩ tɩya ʋ gyɩrɩma.

english_verse: So they grabbed him, threw him out of the vineyard, and killed him.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ ba kaŋ biye hʋ a kpʋ ʋ, aŋ kpa ʋ yuwo ta baga hʋ hal.

english_verse: Jesus asked, “When the owner of that vineyard comes, what do you suppose he will do to those renters?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ba aa maga nyɛ, dɩ baga hʋ tɩɩna rɛ ko, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sɩ yaa baga tʋŋtʋnna no?”

english_verse: The chief priests and leaders answered, “He will kill them in some horrible way. Then he will rent out his vineyard to people who will give him his share of grapes at harvest time.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, ‘Ʋ sɩ ko a kpʋ nɩbɔmɔ no aŋ kpa baga hʋ a tɩya nɩdʋŋsɩ, nala hʋ aa sɩ kɩ tɩya ʋ ʋ tɩɩnɔnɔ tol, dɩ ba tɔrɩɩ saŋa rɛ ko pele.”’

english_verse: Jesus replied, “You surely know that the Scriptures say, ‘The stone the builders tossed aside is now the most important stone of all. This is something the Lord has done, and it is amazing to us.’
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ nala hʋ aa nɩɩ namaga hʋ abaa, “Ma bɩ karɩmɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ hʋ lee hʋ ba aa baa, ‘Bʋyɩ hʋ dɩɩsaala a vɩya ta, ʋ rɛ mɩɩgɩ ko yaa bʋduwo ba aa kpaa biŋ dɩya hʋ gyememii ʋ kaŋ dɩya hʋ sɩgɩ. Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ tʋma rɛ gɛɛ. Á naa nɩɩ ʋ yaa wɩkperii rɛ!”’

english_verse: Anyone who stumbles over this stone will be crushed, and anyone it falls on will be smashed to pieces.”
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa tele bʋyɩ no nyuu, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ kyɔrɩsɩ kyɔrɔkyɔrɔ. Dɩ bʋyɩ no mɛ rɛ ko tele nal buloŋ nyuu, ʋ sɩ kyaŋɩsɩ ʋ tɩɩna kyaŋa kyaŋa.”

english_verse: So they looked for a way to arrest Jesus. But they were afraid to, because the people thought he was a prophet.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba kɩ lʋga dɩ ba kana ʋ tɔ dɩyaŋ. Amɛ ba fa aa fá nɩgyamaa hʋ aa we doŋ nɛ, beewɩya nɩgyamaa hʋ kpaa Yesu anɩɩ ʋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ.

english_verse: Many are invited, but only a few are chosen. Paying Taxes (Mark
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ teŋ aŋ baa, “Nɩgyamaa rɛ ba yɩrɩ amɛ nala baŋmana dʋŋ nɛ ba lɩɩ.” Ba basɩ lampoo tunii wɩya Maakɩ

english_verse: The Pharisees got together and planned how they could trick Jesus into saying something wrong.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima sii lɩɩ a vʋʋlɩ gɛɛ hʋ ba aa sɩ magɩsɩ Yesu a bara kana ʋ abee wɩpɩyɛsɩya.

english_verse: Teacher, Moses wrote that if a married man dies and has no children, his brother should marry the widow. Their first son would then be thought of as the son of the dead brother.
translation_verse: “Á nɩhɩyawʋ, Moosi daga anɩɩ dɩ baal lɛ kpaa haaŋ, dɩ ʋ bee haaŋ hʋ bɩ lʋl biye ka dɩ baal hʋ sʋba, ʋ maga dɩ ʋ naabiye kpa lohaaŋ hʋ rɛ, dɩ ʋ beel-ʋ lʋl biisi tɩya ʋ maana hʋ.

english_verse: Once again Jesus used stories to teach the people:
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl maga namaga kɩdɩgɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa pɩyɛsɩ ʋ dee wɩya,

english_verse: The kingdom of heaven is like what happened when a king gave a wedding banquet for his son.
translation_verse: a baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ kuwori kɩdɩgɩ aa leŋ ba marɩ ʋ biye hafalɩɩ gbɩyala kɩdiiliye.

english_verse: The king sent some servants to tell the invited guests to come to the banquet, but the guests refused.
translation_verse: Ba aa marɩ kɩdiiliye hʋ teŋ, ʋ tɩŋ ʋ tʋŋtʋnna dɩ ba mʋ yɩrɩ nala hʋ ʋ aa yɩra anɩɩ wɩɩ buloŋ yaa siri rɛ. Ba mʋ yɩrɩ ba, ba vɩya koyi.

english_verse: He sent other servants to say to the guests, “The banquet is ready! My cattle and prize calves have all been prepared. Everything is ready. Come to the banquet!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl tɩŋ ʋ tʋŋtʋnna badɔmɔŋ a baa, ‘Ma mʋ basɩ tɩya nala hʋ ŋ aa yɩra anɩɩ nɔbolli bee nɔfarɩsɩ buloŋ nɛ ŋ kpʋ a leŋ ba yaa kɩdiiliye hʋ. Wɩɩ buloŋ yaa siri rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya ba ko hafalɩɩ gbɩyala hʋ.”’

english_verse: But the guests did not pay any attention. Some of them left for their farms, and some went to their places of business.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ ʋ aa yɩra bɩl vɩya mʋyɩ aŋ kɩ tʋŋ ba tʋma. Ba badɔmɔŋ sii mʋ ba bagɩsɩ ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ sii mʋ ba kɩna lɩyallɩɩ.

english_verse: Others grabbed the servants, then beat them up and killed them.
translation_verse: Ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ kasɩ ʋ dɩya tʋŋtʋnna hʋ ʋ aa tɩma a ŋmaa ba weliŋ aŋ kpʋ ba.

english_verse: This made the king so furious that he sent an army to kill those murderers and burn down their city.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ kuwori hʋ na baaŋ kɩŋkaŋ a ta ʋ laalyuwolo ba mʋ kpʋ nala hʋ aa kpʋʋ ʋ dɩya tʋŋtʋnna hʋ, aŋ nyɔgɔ ba bee buloŋ ta.

english_verse: Then he said to the servants, “It is time for the wedding banquet, and the invited guests don't deserve to come.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ yɩrɩ ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩkaalɩya hʋ a bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Hafalɩɩ gbɩyala kɩdiiliye hʋ yaa siri rɛ, amɛ nala hʋ ŋ aa yɩra bɩ maga dɩ ba ko gbɩyala hʋ.

english_verse: Go out to the street corners and tell everyone you meet to come to the banquet.”
translation_verse: Ma lɩɩ gɔllɩ bee hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ a yɩrɩ nala hʋ buloŋ ma aa sɩ na a basɩ tɩya ba dɩ ba ko di kɩdiiliye hʋ.”

english_verse: When the king went in to meet the guests, he found that one of them wasn't wearing the right kind of clothes for the wedding.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ kuwori hʋ gyʋʋ dɩ ʋ na nala hʋ aa ko. Ʋ gyʋwa a na baal kɩdɩgɩ aa bɩ laalɩ hafalɩɩ gbɩyala gal.

english_verse: Tell us what you think! Should we pay taxes to the Emperor or not?”
translation_verse: Á aa kyɛ dɩ á gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ dɩ ʋ yaa ŋmanɩɩ dɩ á tuŋ lampoo kɩ tɩya Roma paalʋʋ kuworibal hʋ koo ʋ bɩ yaa ŋmanɩɩ.”

english_verse: They sent some of their followers and some of Herod's followers to say to him, “Teacher, we know that you are honest. You teach the truth about what God wants people to do. And you treat everyone with the same respect, no matter who they are.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba tɩŋ ba hatɩnna badɔmɔŋ abee kuwori Hɛrɔtɩ hatɩnna badɔmɔŋ dɩ ba mʋ Yesu lee. Ɛɛ rɛ ba ko pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Á nɩhɩyawʋ, á gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ a kɩ daga Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ mɛ abee wɩtɩɩ. Ɩ sɩya tuwo nala wɩbasɩya tɩyaŋ. Ɩ bee fa nɩbal buloŋ sɩɩ mɛ.

english_verse: Let me see one of the coins used for paying taxes.” They brought him a silver coin,
translation_verse: Ma kpa molbinʋʋ hʋ ma aa kaŋ kɩ tuŋ lampoo hʋ tɩya dɩ ŋ na.”

english_verse: His answer surprised them so much that they walked away. Life in the Future World (Mark
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, ba buloŋ nyʋʋsɩ fɩyɛlɩ, ba lem-ʋ aŋ sii mʋ. Ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu sʋʋ tɩyaŋ mɩɩgɩ siiyi wɩya Maakɩ

english_verse: At last the woman died.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ haaŋ hʋ mɛ sii sʋba.

english_verse: All the Law of Moses and the Books of the Prophets are based on these two commandments. About David's Son (Mark
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi fa aa saba biŋ abee wɩya hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ aa basa, ba buloŋ lɩɩ wɩya no balɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ba pɩyɛsɩ laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya wɩya Maakɩ

english_verse: The Sadducees did not believe people would rise to life after death. So that same day some of the Sadducees came to Jesus and said:
translation_verse: Haŋ Kyɛɛ hʋ tɩɩ rɛ nala badɔmɔŋ ba aa yɩrɩ Sadusiima mɛ sii ko Yesu lee. Nala no kɛ gyɩ baa dɩ dɩ nal lɛ sʋba ʋ tɩɩna bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba ko pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa,

english_verse: Jesus answered: You are completely wrong! You don't know what the Scriptures teach. And you don't know anything about the power of God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ, a bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ dee mɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ma ŋmaa naaŋ mɔɔnyɛ.

english_verse: When God raises people to life, they won't marry. They will be like the angels in heaven.
