translation_verse: Ʋ paalɩ ŋmɩyɛsɩ rɛ a baa, “Ɩ aa kyɛ kɩŋ hʋ buloŋ ŋ sɩ tɩya ɩ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ aa kyɛ ŋ taŋha logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ, haalɩ a pele faŋ mɛ, ŋ sɩ kpa tɩya ɩ.”

english_verse: The girl left and asked her mother, “What do you think I should ask for?” Her mother answered, “The head of John the Baptist!”
translation_verse: Haŋtolibiye hʋ sii lɩɩ, a mʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ naa a baa, “Ŋ basɩ baa bekiŋ nɛ ŋ kɩ kyɛ?” Ɛɛ rɛ Hɛrodiya baa, “Basɩ tɩya ʋ dɩ Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ nyuu rɛ ɩ kɩ kyɛ.”

english_verse: The girl hurried back and told Herod, “Here and now on a serving plate I want the head of John the Baptist!”
translation_verse: Haŋtolibiye hʋ mɩɩgɩ lagɩlagɩ a mʋ kuwori hʋ lee a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ keri Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ nyuu rɛ, a we parɩtɩ tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ ko tɩya ŋ.”

english_verse: Herod was very sorry for what he had said. But he did not want to break the promise he had made in front of his guests.
translation_verse: Kuwori hʋ aa nɩɩ wɩɩ no, ʋ tɩya buloŋ kyogi. Amɛ ʋ aa ŋmɩyɛsa nala hʋ buloŋ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ʋ bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo lugisi ʋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: At once he ordered a guard to cut off John's head there in prison.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ yɩrɩ laalyuwol kɩdɩgɩ, a tɩma ʋ dɩ ʋ mʋ keri Gyɔɔŋ nyuu kaŋ ko.

english_verse: The guard put the head on a serving plate and took it to the girl. Then she gave it to her mother.
translation_verse: Laalyuwol hʋ sii a mʋ lee hʋ ba aa kaŋ Gyɔɔŋ mʋ tɔ hʋ, a keri ʋ nyuu a we parɩtɩ tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ ko tɩya haŋtolibiye hʋ. Ʋ laa a kaŋ mʋ tɩya ʋ naa.

english_verse: When John's followers learned that he had been killed, they took his body and put it in a tomb. Jesus Feeds Five Thousand (Matthew
translation_verse: Gyɔɔŋ hatɩnna hʋ aa nɩɩ wɩɩ no, ba sii ko a laa ʋ teŋbii a kaŋ mʋ hogo. Yesu tɩya nala tusi bʋnɔŋ kɩdiiliye ba di vɔgɔ Matiwu

english_verse: But so many people were coming and going that Jesus and the apostles did not even have a chance to eat. Then Jesus said, “Let's go to a place where we can be alone and get some rest.”
translation_verse: Nala hʋ badɔmɔŋ gyɩ aa yaŋ kɩ lɩɩ rɛ ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ ko kɩ gyʋʋ. Yesu abee ʋ hatɩnna paalɩ bɩ naa sɩnɩɩ dɩ ba di kɩna mɛ gba. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma leŋ dɩ á mʋ lee hʋ nala aa tuwo dɩ ma wiyesi mʋhʋ.”

english_verse: They left in a boat for a place where they could be alone.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba sii a gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro a kɩ mʋ lee hʋ nala aa tuwo.

english_verse: That evening the disciples came to Jesus and said, “This place is like a desert, and it's already late.
translation_verse: Ʋ dɩdaana aa ko pele, ʋ hatɩnna hʋ ko basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Lee no yaa ɔhɔ rɛ, ka wɩɩsɩ fɩyɛlɩ nyɛ.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “You give them something to eat.” But they asked him, “Don't you know it would take almost a year's wages to buy all of these people something to eat?”
translation_verse: Yesu mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya a baa, “Ma mʋ kyɛ kɩdiiliye tɩya ba dɩ ba di.” Ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Gbo! Dɩ ámaa sɩ kpa molbii yɔbɔ kɩdiiliye tɩya nala no dɩ ba wuwo di vɔgɔ, ʋ sɩ te nɩdɩgɩ bɩŋpiliŋ tuno.”

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “How much bread do you have? Go and see!” They found out and answered, “We have five small loaves of bread and two fish.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Paanʋʋ baŋmɛ rɛ we doŋ? Ma mʋ na.” Ba mʋ, aŋ mɩɩgɩ ko basɩ tɩya ʋ abaa, “Kɩna bɔnɔŋ nɛ abee fuwonamɩɩsɩ balɩya.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples to tell the people to sit down on the green grass.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ dɩ ba leŋ nala hʋ buloŋ tuu hɔŋ kyige gulo gulo ɔfɩyɛl hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: All of them saw him and were terrified. But at this same time he said, “Don't worry! I am Jesus. Don't be afraid.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ piliŋsi basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ. Mɩyaŋ nɛ. Ma ta leŋ dɩ kambɩŋ kaŋ ma.”

english_verse: Jesus took the five loaves and the two fish. He looked up toward heaven and blessed the food. Then he broke the bread and handed it to his disciples to give to the people. He also divided the two fish, so everyone could have some.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kpa paanʋʋ hʋ bɔnɔŋ abee fuwonamɩɩsɩ hʋ balɩya, a wil deŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu, aŋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ, aŋ kaŋ paanʋʋ hʋ lɔgɔ a tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ dɩ ba laa mʋ kpaa nala hʋ. Ʋ bɩl kaŋ fuwonamɩɩsɩ hʋ balɩya mɛ a kpaa ba.

english_verse: After everyone had eaten all they wanted,
translation_verse: Ba buloŋ di a vɔgɔ.

english_verse: Jesus' disciples picked up twelve large baskets of leftover bread and fish.
translation_verse: Ka ba mʋ paa paanʋʋ hʋ abee fuwonamɩɩsɩ hʋ kɩkaalɩya, a su simbiisi fi abee balɩya.

english_verse: At once, Jesus made his disciples get into the boat and start back across to Bethsaida. But he stayed until he had sent the crowds away.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ leŋ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ mʋ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro, a laa ʋ sɩya duwori kyol fuwo hʋ kyolo, a kɩ mʋ Bɛsaada. Ka ʋ ta nɩgyamaa hʋ buloŋ ba mʋ.

english_verse: Then he told them goodbye and went up on the side of a mountain to pray.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa taa nala hʋ ba mʋ teŋ, ʋ sii mʋ gyɩŋ dogimo kɩdɩgɩ nyuu dɩ ʋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Later in the evening he was still there by himself, and the boat was somewhere in the middle of the lake.
translation_verse: Ʋ dɩdaana ko kɩ pele dɩ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ we nɩɩ hʋ tʋtʋʋ bee tʋtʋʋ, aŋka Yesu dʋŋ ha we dogimo tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: He could see that the disciples were struggling hard, because they were rowing against the wind. Not long before morning, Jesus came toward them. He was walking on the water and was about to pass the boat.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu deŋ na dɩ puwo kaŋ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ kɩ lʋga, a pɔ dɩ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ ta mʋwa. Ʋ sɩgballɩnyʋwa, ʋ sii a vala nɩɩ hʋ nyuu a kɩ mʋ, a ko kpaga ba, a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ parɩ ba baŋ.

english_verse: When the disciples saw Jesus walking on the water, they thought he was a ghost, and they started screaming.
translation_verse: Ba aa na ʋ dɩ ʋ aa vala nɩɩ hʋ nyuu, ba bɩɩna anɩɩ nɩdɩma rɛ. Kambɩŋ kaŋ ba, ba yaga kyiyesuu.

english_verse: He then got into the boat with them, and the wind died down. The disciples were completely confused.
translation_verse: Ka ʋ yaŋ mʋ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ. Ʋ aa gyʋʋ ko teŋ, puwo hʋ sige. Ʋ yaa ʋ hatɩnna hʋ wɩkperii.

english_verse: Their minds were closed, and they could not understand the true meaning of the loaves of bread. Jesus Heals Sick People in Gennesaret (Matthew
translation_verse: Ba gyɩ naa dɩ Yesu kaŋ paanʋʋ gama bɔnɔŋ a kpaa nala tusi bʋnɔŋ nɛ, ka ba ha gyɩ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ memii, beewɩya ba ha bɩ gyɩŋ nal hʋ Yesu aa yaa. Yesu tɩɩbɩ wɩɩla tɩmma Gyɛnɛsarɛtɩ tɩyaŋ Matiwu

english_verse: As soon as they got out of the boat, the people recognized Jesus.
translation_verse: Ba aa lɩɩ ko teŋ, dɩ nala gyɩma anɩɩ Yesu rɛ.

english_verse: So they ran all over that part of the country to bring their sick people to him on mats. They brought them each time they heard where he was.
translation_verse: Ba fá mʋ gbɛ ba paalʋʋ buloŋ, a paa wɩɩlɩ tɩmma abee ba wasɩnɩ, a kaŋ mʋ lee kɛ buloŋ ba aa nɩya dɩ Yesu we.

english_verse: In every village or farm or marketplace where Jesus went, the people brought their sick to him. They begged him to let them just touch his clothes, and everyone who did was healed.
translation_verse: Lee kɛ buloŋ Yesu a mʋwa, tɔbala koo tɔbiisi koo bagɩsɩ, nala aa paa ba wɩɩla tɩmma rɛ a kaŋ lɩɩ biŋ lɩgyalɩya tɩyaŋ, a sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ba dige ʋ gal nyʋwa mɛ gba. Ba nala hʋ buloŋ gyɩ aa wuwo dige ʋ, ba gyɩ naa laaŋfɩya rɛ.

english_verse: Some Pharisees and several teachers of the Law of Moses from Jerusalem came and gathered around Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ, Farasiima abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla badɔmɔŋ sii lɩɩ Gyerusalɛm ko, ba buloŋ sii ko Yesu lee.

english_verse: You are good at rejecting God's commands so that you can follow your own teachings!
translation_verse: Yesu bɩl baa, “Ma kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ aa wuwo vɩya Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ aŋ kɩ tɩŋ ma naabaala ŋmaŋsɩ. Ma aa yaa gɛɛ, ma tol sʋma rɛ?

english_verse: They noticed that some of his disciples ate without first washing their hands.
translation_verse: Ba aa ko ba naa dɩ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ badɔmɔŋ bɩ sɔŋ nɩɩ aŋ kɩ di kɩna. Nyɛ yaa bisiŋ nɛ ba lesiri tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The Pharisees and many others obey the teachings of their ancestors. They always wash their hands in the proper way before eating.
translation_verse: Farasiima abee Gyuuma buloŋ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa di kɩŋ buloŋ dɩ ba bɩ sɔŋ nɩɩ anɩɩ ba naabaala lesiri aa daga gɛɛ.

english_verse: None of them will eat anything they buy in the market until it is washed. They also follow a lot of other teachings, such as washing cups, pitchers, and bowls.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ ko lɩɩ yɔbɔ ko mɛ, ba aa sɔŋ nɩɩ rɛ aŋ na di kɩna. Ba sɩŋsɩ yʋga. Ba kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ rɛ ba aa kɩ vaalɩ ba nɩɩnyʋwagbaŋbiisi abee ba kɩdigbaŋsɩ abee ba hɔgɩ viini buloŋ.

english_verse: The Pharisees and teachers asked Jesus, “Why don't your disciples obey what our ancestors taught us to do? Why do they eat without washing their hands?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba ko pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ hatɩnna hʋ kɩ kyogi a naabaala sɩŋsɩ nyɛ? Bee rɛ tɩŋ ba aa bɩ sɔŋ nɩɩ aŋ kɩ di kɩna?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: You are nothing but show-offs! The prophet Isaiah was right when he wrote that God had said, “All of you praise me with your words, but you never really think about me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Minaafigi tɩmma! Ma wɩya hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Azaaya gyɩ aa basa faafaa buloŋ, ba yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ba saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ ʋ baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa, ‘Nyʋwa dʋŋ nɛ nala no kaŋ kɩ tɩya ŋ gyɩrɩma, amɛ ŋ wɩya tuwo ba tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: It is useless for you to worship me, when you teach rules made up by humans.”
translation_verse: Ba aa kɩ kyʋwalɩ ŋ waasʋ rɛ, a kɩ daga nihuwobisi ŋmaŋsɩ aŋ baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ basa.’

english_verse: You disobey God's commands in order to obey what humans have taught.
translation_verse: Nihuwobisi ŋmaŋsɩ rɛ ma kɩ tɩŋa aŋ vɩya Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa tɩŋɩɩ”

english_verse: But you let people get by without helping their parents when they should. You let them say that what they own has been offered to God.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kɛ basɩ anɩɩ dɩ nal lɛ kaŋ kɩŋ, a maga dɩ ʋ kpa kyiyeli ʋ kuwo koo ʋ naa, ka dɩ tɩɩna basɩ tɩya ba abaa, “Kɩŋ hʋ ŋ fa aa sɩ kpa kyiyeli ma hʋ, ʋ yaa ‘Kɔribaŋ’ nɛ.” Ʋ bɩl bɩ maga dɩ ʋ kpa tɩya ba.

english_verse: And you ignore God's commands in order to follow your own teaching. You do a lot of other things just as bad. What Really Makes People Unclean (Matthew
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ma yaa a vɩya Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa tɩŋɩɩ aŋ kɩ tɩŋ ma naabaala ŋmaŋsɩ, a bɩl sii kpa daga ma biisi mɛ. Wɩtesi no yʋga rɛ ma kɩ yaa.” Kɩna hʋ aa kaŋ bisiŋ Matiwu

english_verse: Then Jesus said: What comes from your heart is what makes you unclean.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl baa, “Wɩya hʋ aa lɩɩ nal tɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ aa leŋ nal kaŋ bisiŋ.

english_verse: Jesus called the crowd together again and said, “Pay attention and try to understand what I mean.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl yɩrɩ nala hʋ ba ko laŋŋɩ. Ba aa ko, ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma buloŋ gyegili nɩɩ weliŋ.

english_verse: After Jesus and his disciples had left the crowd and gone into the house, they asked him what these sayings meant.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ teŋ, ʋ leŋ nala hʋ aŋ mʋ gyʋʋ dɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ ko pɩyɛsɩ ʋ namaga hʋ memii.

english_verse: He answered, “Don't you know what I am talking about by now? You surely know that the food you put into your mouth cannot make you unclean.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ma ha bɩ kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ? Ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ dɩ nal lɛ di kɩŋ, ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ kaŋ bisiŋ?

english_verse: It doesn't go into your heart, but into your stomach, and then out of your body.” By saying this, Jesus meant that all foods were fit to eat.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ dii kɩŋ, ʋ bee gyʋʋ ɩ tɩya. Ɩ fuu rɛ ʋ aa tuu, ɩ nyɛ ta.” Yesu aa basɩ nyɛ, ʋ daga anɩɩ kɩdiiliye sɩŋsɩ bɩl tuwo rɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: unfaithfulness in marriage, greed, meanness, deceit, indecency, envy, insults, pride, and foolishness.
translation_verse: Ɩ tɩya kɩ hɔllɩ nala. Ɩ kɩ kyogi nala fene, a kɩ daga ɩ tɩɩ, a kɩ yaa bambugi wɩya.

english_verse: All of these come from your heart, and they are what make you unfit to worship God. A Woman's Faith (Matthew
translation_verse: Wɩbɔmɔ no buloŋ yaa bisiŋ wɩya rɛ, ka nihuwobiŋ tɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ ba buloŋ aa lɩɩ.” Siiriya paalʋʋ haaŋ laa Yesu wɩya di Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus left and went to the region near the town of Tyre, where he stayed in someone's home. He did not want people to know he was there, but they found out anyway.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii lɩɩ doŋ, a mʋ Taaya paalʋʋ, a mʋ gyʋʋ faŋa dɩya kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ, a bee kyɛ dɩ nal buloŋ gyɩma ʋ wɩya, ka ba vɩya aŋ gyɩma.

english_verse: A woman whose daughter had an evil spirit in her heard where Jesus was. And at once she came and knelt down at his feet.
translation_verse: Haaŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ gyɩ we doŋ a lɩɩ Fɔniisɩya aa we Siiriya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a yaa Giriki tɩɩna. Gyɩŋbɔŋ gyɩ kaŋ ʋ toluu.

english_verse: The woman was Greek and had been born in the part of Syria known as Phoenicia. She begged Jesus to force the demon out of her daughter.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ nɩɩ Yesu wɩya, a sii ko tuu tele ʋ naasɩ tɩyaŋ, a sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ kile gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ ta ʋ biye hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “That's true! You may go now. The demon has left your daughter.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya haaŋ hʋ a baa, “Ɩ aa basɩ wɩɩ no wɩya, gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ lɩya rɛ ɩ toluu hʋ tɩyaŋ. Kɩ mʋ dɩya.”

english_verse: When the woman got back home, she found her child lying on the bed. The demon had gone. Jesus Heals a Man Who Was Deaf and Could Hardly Talk
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ haaŋ hʋ kpa mʋ. Ʋ mʋwa dɩ ʋ biye hʋ pɩna, gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ kɔnɩ lɩɩ ʋ tɩyaŋ. Yesu tɩɩbɩ ganɩɩ

english_verse: Jesus left the region around Tyre and went by way of Sidon toward Lake Galilee. He went through the land near the ten cities known as Decapolis.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɩɩgɩ lɩɩ Taaya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ a mʋ tɩŋ Siidɔŋ abee tɔnɩ fi badɔmɔŋ paalʋʋ, a mʋ pele Galili fuwobal hʋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: Some people brought to him a man who was deaf and could hardly talk. They begged Jesus just to touch him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ dɩ ganɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ we doŋ. Ba kana ʋ ko, a sʋla Yesu dɩ ʋ kpa ʋ nosi dɔbɔ ʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: After Jesus had taken him aside from the crowd, he stuck his fingers in the man's ears. Then he spit and put it on the man's tongue.
translation_verse: Yesu kana ʋ kaŋ lɩɩ nala hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ba dʋŋ balɩya hɔŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kpa ʋ noniye a tʋʋ baal hʋ dɩgɩna tɩyaŋ aŋ tʋ naŋtʋwɔl dige ʋ naŋdeliŋ.

english_verse: Jesus looked up toward heaven, and with a groan he said, “Effatha!” which means “Open up!”
translation_verse: Aŋ wil deŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu aŋ wiyesi yʋga fʋ̃ʋ̃, aŋ basɩ tɩya baal hʋ baa, “Ɛfata.” Ɛfata memii rɛ yaa kaŋ suri.

english_verse: At once the man could hear, and he had no more trouble talking clearly.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ dɩgɩna suri. Ʋ naŋdeliŋ mɛ bɩrɩmɩ, ʋ kɩ basɩ wɩya weliŋ.

english_verse: Jesus told the people not to say anything about what he had done. But the more he told them, the more they talked about it.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya nala hʋ abee sɩfɩyasɩ dɩ ba ta basɩ wɩɩ no tɩya nal buloŋ. Abee gɛɛ buloŋ, ka ba ha vɩya aŋ kpa wɩɩ hʋ wuwoli lee buloŋ.

english_verse: They were completely amazed and said, “Everything he does is good! He even heals people who cannot hear or talk.”
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ a nɩɩ wɩɩ no, ba hirigi kɩŋkaŋ a baa, “Wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ nɛ ʋ wuwo kɩ yaa weliŋ. Ʋ paalɩ leŋ wonni kɩ nɩɩ wɩya rɛ, a leŋ ganɩya mɛ wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩya.”

english_verse: Then Jesus explained clearly what he meant. Peter took Jesus aside and told him to stop talking like that.
translation_verse: Ʋ kyaasɩ basɩ wɩɩ no rɛ tɩya ba. Ɛɛ rɛ Piita kana ʋ gɩɩgɩ lɩɩ, a nɔsɩ ʋ, aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ anɩɩ ʋ ta basɩ gɛɛ, dɩ ʋ bɩ basɩ weliŋ.

english_verse: “I feel sorry for these people. They have been with me for three days, and they don't have anything to eat.
translation_verse: “Ŋ aa naa nala hʋ sikii kana ŋ nɛ. Ba aa we ŋ lee ʋ kyɛyɛ boto rɛ nyɛ, dɩ ba bɩ dii kɩŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: Some of them live a long way from here. If I send them away hungry, they might faint on their way home.”
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ bɩ dii kɩŋ buloŋ, ka dɩ ŋ baa dɩ ba mɩɩgɩ, ba sɩ mʋ yiyegi ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ba badɔmɔŋ lɩɩ liboliye rɛ.”

english_verse: After Jesus told the crowd to sit down, he took the seven loaves and gave thanks. He then broke the loaves and handed them to his disciples, who passed them out to the crowd.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ leŋ nala hʋ tuu hɔŋ taŋha, ka ʋ mʋ paa paanʋʋ hʋ bapɛ, a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ, aŋ kaŋ lɔgɔ lɔgɔ a tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ dɩ ba laa kpaa nala hʋ. Ba laa kpaa ba.

english_verse: They also had a few little fish, and after Jesus had blessed these, he told the disciples to pass them around.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba kaŋ fuwonamɩɩsɩ mɛ baŋmana. Ʋ kpa ba mɛ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, aŋ leŋ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ laa kpaa nala hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: he got into the boat with the disciples and crossed to the territory near Dalmanutha. A Sign from Heaven (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ ta ba, aŋ kaŋ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ ba mʋ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ a mʋ Dalmanuta paalʋʋ. Farasiima baa dɩ Yesu yaa wɩmagɩl Matiwu

english_verse: The Pharisees came out and started an argument with Jesus. They wanted to test him by asking for a sign from heaven.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima badɔmɔŋ sii ko Yesu lee, a kɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ wɩya. Ba gyɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ba magɩsɩ ʋ na wɩya, ba baa dɩ ʋ yaa wɩmagɩl dɩ ba na a gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ dee hʋ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ.

english_verse: The disciples had forgotten to bring any bread, and they had only one loaf with them in the boat.
translation_verse: Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ aa duwori kyol fuwo hʋ kyolo tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ hatɩnna hʋ liisi anɩɩ ba yeŋŋi ba kɩdiiliye ta rɛ, aŋ kpa paanʋʋ dɩgɩ dʋŋ we nɩɩduworiboro hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking and asked, “Why are you talking about not having any bread? Don't you understand? Are your minds still closed?
translation_verse: Yesu wuwo gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ba aa vʋʋlɩ, a pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma hɔŋ kɩ vʋʋlɩ baa ma bɩ kaŋ paanʋʋ? Ma sɩya ha bɩ suro? Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma nyuni sʋba gɛɛ?

english_verse: Jesus took him by the hand and led him out of the village, where he spit into the man's eyes. He placed his hands on the blind man and asked him if he could see anything.
translation_verse: Yesu kaŋ nyʋlʋŋ hʋ noŋ tɩyaŋ a kana ʋ lɩɩ tɔɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ a tʋ naŋtʋwɔl we ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, aŋ kpa ʋ noŋ dige bal hʋ sɩya aŋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ dɩ ʋ aa na lee rɛ?

english_verse: The man looked up and said, “I see people, but they look like trees walking around.”
translation_verse: Baal hʋ deŋ lee aŋ baa, “Ŋ aa na nala rɛ, amɛ ba kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ tɩɩsɩ rɛ aa gɔllɩ.”

english_verse: Once again Jesus placed his hands on the man's eyes, and this time the man stared. His eyes were healed, and he saw everything clearly.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl kpa ʋ nosi dige bal hʋ sɩya. Baal hʋ marɩ kyirigi sɩya weliŋ. Ʋ sɩya bɩl kɩ na, ʋ na kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: Jesus said to him, “You may return home now, but don't go into the village.” Who Is Jesus? (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ dɩ ʋ ta bɩl gyʋʋ tɔɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ kɩ mʋ ʋ bee. Piita baa dɩ Yesu rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ Matiwu

english_verse: Then Jesus asked, “But who do you say I am?” “You are the Messiah!” Peter replied.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ mɛ a baa, “Ka ma mɛ, ma baa ŋ yaa aŋnɛ rɛ?” Piita baa “Ɩ rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ a lɩya.”

english_verse: Jesus warned the disciples not to tell anyone about him. Jesus Speaks about His Suffering and Death (Matthew
translation_verse: Piita a basɩ gɛɛ rɛ, Yesu basɩ tɩya ba abee sɩfɩyasɩ dɩ ba pɔ dɩ ba ta ko basɩ wɩɩ no tɩya nal buloŋ. Yesu basa ɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ na tʋwara aŋ sʋba Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus began telling his disciples what would happen to him. He said, “The nation's leaders, the chief priests, and the teachers of the Law of Moses will make the Son of Man suffer terribly. He will be rejected and killed, but three days later he will rise to life.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu piili kɩ daga ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ biye, ŋ sɩ na tʋwara kɩŋkaŋ. Bee nɩhɩyasɩ abee wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ, abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla, ba buloŋ sɩ vɩya ŋ aŋ leŋ dɩ ba kpʋ ŋ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ ko kpʋ ŋ, ŋ sɩ yaa kyɛyɛ boto aŋ mɩɩgɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: But when Jesus turned and saw the disciples, he corrected Peter. He said to him, “Satan, get away from me! You are thinking like everyone else and not like God.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩrɩmɩ kyaasɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ lee aŋ nɔsɩ Piita a baa, “Sɩtaanɩ, fasɩ lɩɩ ŋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Wɩya hʋ ɩ aa basa, nihuwobiŋ tɩbɩɩna rɛ, Wɩɩsɩ tɩbɩɩna daa.”

english_verse: Jesus then told the crowd and the disciples to come closer, and he said: If any of you want to be my followers, you must forget about yourself. You must take up your cross and follow me.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu yɩrɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ abee nala hʋ buloŋ ba ko, ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ tɩŋa ŋ, see dɩ ʋ vɩya ʋ tɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ aŋ kpa ʋ daagarɩɩ baasɩ, a tɩŋa ŋ.

english_verse: If you want to save your life, you will destroy it. But if you give up your life for me and for the good news, you will save it.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ laa ʋ mɩɩbol, ʋ bɩ sɩ na ʋ. Amɛ nal hʋ aa vɩya ʋ mɩɩbol ta ŋ wɩya, abee Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ wɩya, ʋ sɩ kɔnɩ laa ʋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: What will you gain, if you own the whole world but destroy yourself?
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ tɩŋ dʋnɩya no buloŋ aŋ bɩ sɩ na mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii, bekiŋ tɔnɔ rɛ ɩ sɩ na?

english_verse: What could you give to get back your soul?
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, bekiŋ nɛ ɩ sɩ wuwo kpa lenni ɩ mɩɩbol?

english_verse: Don't be ashamed of me and my message among these unfaithful and sinful people! If you are, the Son of Man will be ashamed of you when he comes in the glory of his Father with the holy angels.
translation_verse: Ma lagɩlagɩ no wɩbɔŋyaala aa vɩya ŋ wɩya hʋ, na ŋ bee ŋ wɩbasɩya buloŋ aa yaa ma hɩɩsɩ rɛ. Amɛ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ, mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ biye, ŋ bee malɩkasɩ buloŋ sɩ ko abee ŋ Kuwo gaŋdarɩ. Haŋ saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ wɩya aa yaa nal hʋ buloŋ hɩɩsɩ, ʋ tɩɩna wɩya mɛ sɩ yaa ŋ hɩɩsɩ.”

english_verse: I can assure you that Elijah has already come. And people treated him just as they wanted to, as the Scriptures say they would. Jesus Heals a Boy (Matthew
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no, ŋ sɩ basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ Ilaagya paalɩ ko rɛ. Ba kana ʋ yaa ʋ gɛɛ hʋ ba aa kyɛ anɩɩ ba aa saba gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ tɩyaŋ.” Yesu tɩɩbɩ biye gyɩŋbɔŋ aa kana Matiwu

english_verse: After Jesus and the disciples had gone back home and were alone, they asked him, “Why couldn't we force out that demon?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ mʋ gyʋʋ dɩya. Ba lʋwɔlɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ á kɛ bɩ wuwo kil gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ?”

english_verse: Then Jesus asked a child to stand near him. He put his arm around the child and said,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ kaŋ biibiye a ko sɩgɩ ba tʋtʋʋ, a guwori ʋ aŋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa,

english_verse: And his clothes became much whiter than any bleach on earth could make them.
translation_verse: Ʋ gannɩ buloŋ pʋrɩsɩ gɛɛ pogipogi, a kɩ tʋla gɛɛ nyʋlɩɩnyʋlɩɩ. Gasasɩl buloŋ tuwo dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ ʋ aa sɩ wuwo sasɩ gannɩ dɩ ba pʋrɩsɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Then Elijah and Moses appeared and were talking with Jesus.
translation_verse: Ka Ilaagya abee Moosi ko lɩɩ ba sɩya tɩyaŋ, ba bee Yesu sɩŋ kɩ basɩ wɩya.

english_verse: The shadow of a cloud passed over and covered them. From the cloud a voice said, “This is my Son, and I love him. Listen to what he says!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ taalbal kɩdɩgɩ ko tɔ ba, ka taal kɩdɩgɩ lɩɩ taalbal hʋ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Ŋ biikyoolii rɛ nyɛ. Ma gyegile kɩ nɩɩ ʋ wɩbasɩɩ.”

english_verse: At once the disciples looked around, but they saw only Jesus.
translation_verse: Ba aa nɩɩ taal hʋ a mɩɩgɩ galdaasɩ, ba gyɩ bɩl bɩ naa nal buloŋ, see Yesu dʋŋ.

english_verse: So they kept it to themselves. But they wondered what he meant by the words “raised from death.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba laa wɩɩ hʋ we ba nyuni tɩyaŋ, aŋ kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ, “Ʋ aa sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ memii rɛ yaa bee?”

english_verse: The disciples asked Jesus, “Don't the teachers of the Law of Moses say that Elijah must come before the Messiah does?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ basɩ anɩɩ Ilaagya rɛ sɩ laa sɩya ko, ka dɩ Krisita hʋ na ko?”

english_verse: When Jesus and his three disciples came back down, they saw a large crowd around the other disciples. The teachers of the Law of Moses were arguing with them.
translation_verse: Ba aa ko pele ʋ hatɩnna hʋ nɩkaalɩya hʋ lee, dɩ nɩgyamaa laŋŋa doŋ. Ba bee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla sɩŋ kaŋ wɩya kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: They brought the boy, and as soon as the demon saw Jesus, it made the boy shake all over. He fell down and began rolling on the ground and foaming at the mouth.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba kaŋ biye hʋ ko ʋ lee. Gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ aa naa Yesu, ʋ kaŋ biye hʋ kyele, ʋ tuu tele taŋha a kɩ biliŋsi, naŋtʋwɔ-fʋŋfʋga tɔ ʋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: “When you welcome even a child because of me, you welcome me. And when you welcome me, you welcome the one who sent me.” For or against Jesus (Luke
translation_verse: “Dɩ nal lɛ kuu ŋ wɩya a kaŋ biibiye no dɔŋtɩɩna weliŋ, mɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ kaŋ weliŋ gɛɛ. Nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa kana ŋ weliŋ, ŋ dʋŋ daa ʋ kaŋ weliŋ. Nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ mɛ rɛ ʋ kaŋ weliŋ gɛɛ.” Baal kɩdɩgɩ kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ ta Yesu feŋ tɩyaŋ Luka

english_verse: The crowd was really surprised to see Jesus, and everyone hurried over to greet him.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa naa Yesu dɩ ʋ aa ko, ba hirigi a sii fá mʋ kyem-ʋ, a kyʋwalɩ ʋ.

english_verse: Jesus said, “You people don't have any faith! How much longer must I be with you? Why do I have to put up with you? Bring the boy to me.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma lagɩlagɩ no nala, ma bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di. Kyɛyɛ baŋmɛ rɛ ma tɩɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ yaa ma lee ka ma na laa ŋ di? Ma kaŋ biye hʋ ko ŋ na.”

english_verse: Jesus asked the boy's father, “How long has he been like this?” The man answered, “Ever since he was a child.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ kuwo hʋ, “Kyɛbee rɛ ʋ piili ʋ?” Ʋ baa “Ʋ biibiri tɩyaŋ buloŋ nɛ ʋ piili ʋ.

english_verse: At once the boy's father shouted, “I do have faith! Please help me to have even more.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ biye hʋ kuwo sii sɩŋ a heeli basɩ a baa, “Ŋ laa ɩ di rɛ, amɛ ʋ bɩ maga. Pɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ŋ laa ɩ di yʋga.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw that a crowd was gathering fast, he spoke sternly to the evil spirit that had kept the boy from speaking or hearing. He said, “I order you to come out of the boy! Don't ever bother him again.”
translation_verse: Ba aa sɩŋ kɩ basɩ wɩya hʋ gɛɛ, nala yʋga fá ko kɩ laŋŋɩ. Yesu aa ko na nɩgyamaa hʋ, ʋ basɩ tɩya gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ abee sɩfɩyasɩ a baa, “Gyɩŋganɩɩ, mɩyaŋ nɛ baa dɩ ɩ lɩɩ biye hʋ tɩyaŋ. Kɩ pɔ dɩ ɩ ta bɩl maakyiye kana ʋ.”

english_verse: The spirit screamed and made the boy shake all over. Then it went out of him. The boy looked dead, and almost everyone said he was.
translation_verse: Gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ kyɩɩrɩ aŋ kaŋ biye hʋ kyɩgɩsɩ aŋ ko lɩɩ, ka biye hʋ pɩŋ gɛɛ anɩɩ ʋ aa sʋba. Nala hʋ gyeniŋ buloŋ baa dɩ biye hʋ sʋba rɛ.

english_verse: But Jesus took hold of his hand and helped him stand up.
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu mʋ kaŋ ʋ noŋ tɩyaŋ ʋ sii sɩŋ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Only prayer can force out this kind of demon.” Jesus Again Speaks about His Death (Matthew
translation_verse: Ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo kile gyɩŋbɔŋ no iriŋ, see ʋ aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ weliŋ.” Yesu bɩl basɩ ʋ sʋʋ wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus left with his disciples and started through Galilee. He did not want anyone to know about it,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba sii lɩɩ doŋ, a tuu tɩŋ Galili paalʋʋ mʋ. Yesu fa bee kyɛ dɩ nal buloŋ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ʋ aa we.

english_verse: because he was teaching the disciples that the Son of Man would be handed over to people who would kill him. But three days later he would rise to life.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ʋ gyɩ aa daga ʋ hatɩnna hʋ rɛ. Ʋ gyɩ basɩ tɩya ba rɛ a baa, “Ba sɩ kaŋ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye, a we nala nosi tɩyaŋ dɩ ba kpʋ ŋ. Amɛ ŋ sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ kyɛyɛ boto kyɛɛ, a kaŋ mɩɩbol.”

english_verse: The disciples did not understand what Jesus meant, and they were afraid to ask. Who Is the Greatest? (Matthew
translation_verse: Amɛ ba fa bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa basa memii, aŋ kɩ fá kambɩŋ ba aa sɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ. Yesu hatɩnna hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ba gyɩŋ ba tɩyaŋ nɩbal Matiwu

english_verse: If your foot causes you to sin, chop it off. You would be better off to go into life lame than to have two feet and be thrown into hell.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ naaŋ nɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ kana ɩ we wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ, keri ta. Ɩ aa sɩ mʋ wɩɩsɩbee abee naakuu, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ba aa sɩ kpa ɩ yuwo we diŋ tɩyaŋ abee naapilime. ‘Lee hʋ kyaaŋkyʋwana aa sɩ di ɩ teŋbii deŋdeŋ a bɩ sɩ sʋba, ka diŋ hʋ mɛ bɩ sɩ dɩsɩ.’

english_verse: The worms there never die, and the fire never stops burning.
translation_verse: ‘Lee hʋ kyaaŋkyʋwana aa sɩ di ɩ teŋbii deŋdeŋ a bɩ sɩ sʋba, ka diŋ hʋ mɛ bɩ sɩ dɩsɩ.’

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples went to his home in Capernaum. After they were inside the house, Jesus asked them, “What were you arguing about along the way?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba sii ko Kapɛɛnam. Ba aa gyʋʋ dɩya, Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Bekiŋ wɩɩ rɛ ma fa kaŋ kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ?”

english_verse: They had been arguing about which one of them was the greatest, and so they did not answer.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba tallɩ ba nyʋʋsɩ, beewɩya ba tɩyaŋ nɩhɩyawʋ wɩya rɛ ba fa kaŋ kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: After Jesus sat down and told the twelve disciples to gather around him, he said, “If you want the place of honor, you must become a slave and serve others!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu hɔŋ aŋ yɩrɩ ʋ hatɩnna fi abee balɩya hʋ, a basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Nal hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ yaa ma tɩyaŋ nɩbal, see dɩ ʋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ bɩrɩmɩ ma tɩyaŋ haŋbiye a tʋma tɩya ma buloŋ.”

english_verse: Everyone must be salted with fire.
translation_verse: Diŋ nɛ ba sɩ kpa pɩɩsɩ nal buloŋ bisiŋ ta.

english_verse: Salt is good. But if it no longer tastes like salt, how can it be made salty again? Have salt among you and live at peace with each other.
translation_verse: Yɩsɩ sʋma, amɛ dɩ ʋ sʋmɩŋ ko lɩɩ, ɩ bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa ʋ dɩ ʋ sʋma. Ma leŋ dɩ ma tɩsɩ sʋma anɩɩ yɩsɩ aa sʋma gɛɛ, aŋ leŋ dɩ ma buloŋ kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ.”

english_verse: John said, “Teacher, we saw a man using your name to force demons out of people. But he wasn't one of us, and we told him to stop.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Á Tɩɩna, á naa baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ kpaa ɩ feŋ a kɩ kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ nala tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ á kile ʋ dɩ ʋ ta kɩ yaa gɛɛ, beewɩya ʋ bɩ yaa á kɩdɩgɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: Don't stop him! No one who works miracles in my name will soon turn and say something bad about me.
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ ʋ rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, ma ta kile ʋ. Dɩ nal lɛ yaa wɩmagɩl buloŋ ŋ feŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ kyiye bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo kyogi ŋ feŋ.

english_verse: Anyone who isn't against us is for us.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ lɩɩ ŋ hal, ʋ yaa á kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: And anyone who gives you a cup of water in my name, just because you belong to me, will surely be rewarded. Temptations To Sin (Matthew
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nal hʋ buloŋ aa kpaa nɩɩnyʋwagbaŋbiye bee nɩɩ a tɩya ma akuu ma aa yaa ŋ hatɩnna wɩya, ʋ kaŋ ʋ tuno rɛ.” Wɩya hʋ aa sɩ kaŋ nal we wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ Matiwu

english_verse: It will be terrible for people who cause even one of my little followers to sin. Those people would be better off thrown into the ocean with a heavy stone tied around their necks.
translation_verse: “Nal hʋ buloŋ aa naa haŋbiisi no aa tɩŋa ŋ tɩyaŋ kɩdɩgɩ, a mʋrɩ ʋ dɩ ʋ yaa wɩbɔŋ, ʋ maga dɩ ba kpa nɔŋ a vʋwa laalɩ ʋ bagɩna tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kpa ʋ yuwo we mpʋwɔnʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ yaa ʋ gɛɛ, ʋ rɛ sɩ kpɩya ʋ aa weye.

english_verse: So if your hand causes you to sin, cut it off! You would be better off to go into life paralyzed than to have two hands and be thrown into the fires of hell that never go out.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ noŋ nɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ kana ɩ we wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ, keri ta. Ɩ aa sɩ mʋ wɩɩsɩbee abee nokuu, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ɩ aa kaŋ nopilime aŋ gyʋʋ diŋ, ‘Lee hʋ kyaaŋkyʋwana aa sɩ di ɩ teŋbii deŋdeŋ a bɩ sɩ sʋba, ka diŋ hʋ mɛ bɩ sɩ dɩsɩ.’

english_verse: If your eye causes you to sin, get rid of it. You would be better off to go into God's kingdom with only one eye than to have two eyes and be thrown into hell.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ sii rɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ kana ɩ we wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ, kɔrɩgɩ lɩɩ ta. Ɩ aa sɩ mʋ wɩɩsɩbee abee sɩtogo, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ba aa sɩ kpa ɩ yuwo we diŋ tɩyaŋ abee sɩya balɩya,

english_verse: After Jesus left, he went to Judea and then on to the other side of the Jordan River. Once again large crowds came to him, and as usual, he taught them.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii lɩɩ doŋ, a mʋ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ abee Gyɔɔdaŋ fuwo hʋ kyolo. Nɩgyamaa bɩl ko laŋŋɩ ʋ lee. Ʋ bɩl kɩ daga ba anɩɩ ʋ aa kɩ daga gɛɛ.

english_verse: Some Pharisees wanted to test Jesus. So they came up to him and asked if it was right for a man to divorce his wife.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima badɔmɔŋ mɛ sii ko ʋ lee, a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba magɩsɩ ʋ, a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ʋ yaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ dɩ baal vɩya ʋ haaŋ?”

english_verse: Jesus asked them, “What does the Law of Moses say about this?”
translation_verse: Yesu mɩɩgɩ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ɛɛ rɛ Moosi daga ma dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋa?”

english_verse: They answered, “Moses allows a man to write out divorce papers and send his wife away.”
translation_verse: Ba baa, “Moosi basa anɩɩ dɩ baal lɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ vɩya ʋ haaŋ, dɩ ʋ laa sɩya sabɩ haaŋ-vɩyayɩ teŋ a tɩya haaŋ hʋ aŋ na vɩya ʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Moses gave you this law because you are so heartless.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma dagɩɩ hayɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ Moosi gyɩ sabɩ gɛɛ tɩya ma.

english_verse: But in the beginning God made a man and a woman.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa piili dʋnɩya marɩɩ, baal abee haaŋ nɛ ʋ marɩ.

english_verse: That's why a man leaves his father and mother and gets married.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya baal aa sɩ leŋ ʋ kuwo abee ʋ naa rɛ, aŋ kpa haaŋ dɩ ʋ bee haaŋ hʋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: He becomes like one person with his wife. Then they are no longer two people, but one.
translation_verse: Nala no balɩya sɩ kaŋ kyaldɩgɩ, ba bɩl bɩ yaa nala balɩya, ba bɩrɩmɩ nɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: And no one should separate a couple that God has joined together.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ yaŋ aa kaŋ nala hʋ pɛ dɔmɔŋ, ʋ bɩ maga dɩ nihuwobiŋ kaŋ ba porigi.”

english_verse: When Jesus and his disciples were back in the house, they asked him about what he had said.
translation_verse: Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ mɩɩgɩ sii gyʋʋ dɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ ba bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ wɩɩ no tɩɩ.

english_verse: He told them, “A man who divorces his wife and marries someone else is unfaithful to his wife.
translation_verse: Ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Baal hʋ kɛ buloŋ aa vɩya ʋ haaŋ aŋ bɩl kpa hadɩma, ʋ tɩɩna gyʋʋ ʋ haaŋ hʋ haakye tɩyaŋ nɛ, aŋ pɛ yaa sɔŋsɔnnɩ mɛ.

english_verse: Some people brought their children to Jesus so he could bless them by placing his hands on them. But his disciples told the people to stop bothering him.
translation_verse: Nala badɔmɔŋ gyɩ kaŋ ba biibiisi ko Yesu lee rɛ, dɩ ʋ kpa ʋ nosi dɔbɔ ba tɩyaŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ pɛ ba. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ nɔsɩ ba.

english_verse: I promise you that you cannot get into God's kingdom, unless you accept it the way a child does.”
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, dɩ ɩ bɩ yelli Wɩɩsɩ anɩɩ haŋbiye aa yelli ʋ kuwo abee ʋ naa gɛɛ, ɩ bɩ sɩ na Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ gyʋʋ.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw this, he became angry and said, “Let the children come to me! Don't try to stop them. People who are like these little children belong to the kingdom of God.
translation_verse: Yesu aa naa gɛɛ, ʋ na baaŋ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, aŋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma leŋ dɩ haŋbiisi hʋ ko ŋ lee. Ma ta kil ba. Nala no iriŋ nɛ sɩ gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Jesus looked closely at the man. He liked him and said, “There's one thing you still need to do. Go sell everything you own. Give the money to the poor, and you will have riches in heaven. Then come with me.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu lurimi ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ abee kyori aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Wɩdɩgɩ rɛ kaa ɩ ha aa bɩ yaa. Mʋ kpa ɩ kɩna hʋ buloŋ yallɩ, a kpa molbiye hʋ tɩya nyaaba aŋ ko kɩ tɩŋa ŋ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa gɛɛ, ɩ sɩ kaŋ kɩna wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: When the man heard Jesus say this, he went away gloomy and sad because he was very rich.
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, baal hʋ sɩya bil, beewɩya ʋ gyɩ kaŋ kɩna rɛ weliŋ. Ʋ tɩya buloŋ kyogi, ʋ sii mʋ.

english_verse: Jesus looked around and said to his disciples, “It's hard for rich people to get into God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu deŋ nala hʋ aŋ mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ʋ yaa wɩduwo rɛ abee kɩna tɩmma aa sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ.”

english_verse: The disciples were shocked to hear this. So Jesus told them again, “It's terribly hard to get into God's kingdom!
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ nyʋʋsɩ fɩyɛlɩ. Ʋ bɩl mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ kyaŋsɩ, Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ gyʋʋyɩ yaa wɩduwo rɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: In fact, it's easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to get into God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Nyɔgɩmaa aa sɩ tɩŋ gahaŋ sɩɩ lɩɩ, ʋ rɛ yaa mɔl a te kɩna tɩɩna aa sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus' disciples were even more amazed. They asked each other, “How can anyone ever be saved?”
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, ʋ hatɩnna hʋ nyʋʋsɩ marɩ fɩyɛlɩ, ba kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Dɩ ba aa rɛ kɩɩ nyɛ, aŋnɛ rɛ yaŋ sɩ wuwo na Wɩɩsɩ laatayɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus looked at them and said, “There are some things that people cannot do, but God can do anything.”
translation_verse: Yesu mɩɩgɩ deŋ ba aŋ baa, “Wɩɩ no kpere nihuwobiŋ nɛ, amɛ ʋ bɩ kpere Wɩɩsɩ kɛ. Beewɩya, wɩɩ buloŋ tuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa.”

english_verse: The disciples were confused as Jesus led them toward Jerusalem, and his other followers were afraid. Once again, Jesus took the twelve disciples aside and told them what was going to happen to him. He said:
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ dɩ ba we ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ mʋ Gyerusalɛm. Yesu laa ba sɩya. Ʋ hatɩnna hʋ nyʋʋsɩ gyɩ fɩyɛla rɛ abee ʋ wɩbasɩya hʋ, kambɩŋ gyɩ gba kaŋ nala hʋ badɔmɔŋ aa tɩŋ ba hal. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kaŋ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ dʋŋ a gɩɩgɩ lɩɩ, a basɩ tɩya ba wɩya hʋ buloŋ nala aa sɩ yaa ʋ. Ʋ baa,

english_verse: We are now on our way to Jerusalem where the Son of Man will be handed over to the chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses. They will sentence him to death and hand him over to foreigners,
translation_verse: “Ma gyegili daha! Á aa mʋ Gyerusalɛm nɛ. Dɩ ámaa rɛ ko pele doŋ, ba sɩ kaŋ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye, a kaŋ mʋ tɩya wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ, abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla. Ba sɩ di ŋ sarɩya aŋ baa dɩ ʋ maga dɩ ba kpʋ ŋ nɛ, aŋ kana ŋ mʋ we nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma nosi tɩyaŋ dɩ ba kpʋ ŋ.

english_verse: and they answered, “When you come into your glory, please let one of us sit at your right side and the other at your left.”
translation_verse: Ba baa, “Ɩ aa sɩ di Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ, a kaŋ feŋ, a hɔŋ ɩ kuwori kpasa hʋ nyuu, leŋ dɩ á yaa ɩ logiŋ hʋhɔnnɔ, dɩ kɩdɩgɩ hɔŋ ɩ noduu, dɩ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ hɔŋ ɩ nogɔbɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus told them, “You don't really know what you're asking! Are you able to drink from the cup that I must soon drink from or be baptized as I must be baptized?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma bɩ gyɩŋ kɩŋ hʋ ma aa kyɛ. Ma sɩ wuwo kaŋ bembii a na tʋwara hʋ ŋ aa sɩ na? Ma sɩ wuwo fo dɔgɩsɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa sɩ fo?”

english_verse: “Yes, we are!” James and John answered. Then Jesus replied, “You certainly will drink from the cup from which I must drink. And you will be baptized just as I must!
translation_verse: Ba baa, “Waa, á sɩ wuwo.” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ma basɩ. Tʋwara hʋ ŋ aa sɩ na, ʋ rɛ ma mɛ sɩ na. Dɔgɩsɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa sɩ fo, ʋ rɛ ma mɛ sɩ fo.

english_verse: But it isn't for me to say who will sit at my right side and at my left. This is for God to decide.”
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ noduu abee ŋ nogɔbɔ hʋhɔnnɔ hʋ kɛ, ŋ daa sɩ lɩɩ ba. Wɩɩsɩ rɛ gyɩŋ nala hʋ ʋ aa mara doŋ biŋ pɔ.”

english_verse: When the ten other disciples heard this, they were angry with James and John.
translation_verse: Yesu hatɩnna fi hʋ aa nɩya dɩ Gyemsi bee Gyɔɔŋ basɩ gɛɛ, ba kaŋ ba kɩ di dɔŋdɔŋ.

english_verse: But Jesus called the disciples together and said: You know that those foreigners who call themselves kings like to order their people around. And their great leaders have full power over the people they rule.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu yɩrɩ ba buloŋ ko laŋŋɩ a basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma, ka ma gyɩŋ ba kuworo aa kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ. Ba aa hɔŋ ba nala nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kaŋ ba kɩ fɩla. Ka nala hʋ sɩlaala mɛ ha kaŋ ba dee wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And if you want to be first, you must be everyone's slave.
translation_verse: Ma nal hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ yaa ma tɩyaŋ kuwori, ʋ maga dɩ ʋ rɛ yaa ma tɩyaŋ yoŋ.

english_verse: The Son of Man did not come to be a slave master, but a slave who will give his life to rescue many people. Jesus Heals Blind Bartimaeus (Matthew
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye, ŋ bɩ ko dɩ ŋ kyɛ nala dɩ ba tʋma kɩ tɩya ŋ, ŋ ko dɩ ŋ tʋma tɩya ba rɛ aŋ sʋba, a kpa ŋ mɩɩbol tuŋ laa nɩgyamaa mɩɩbolo ta tɩya ba.” Yesu suro Batimeyo sɩya Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples went to Jericho. And as they were leaving, they were followed by a large crowd. A blind beggar by the name of Bartimaeus son of Timaeus was sitting beside the road.
translation_verse: Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ gyɩ sii mʋ Gyɛriko rɛ. Saŋa hʋ ba aa sii lɩɩ bee hʋ tɩyaŋ a kɩ mʋ, nɩgyamaa sii paa tɩŋ ba hal. Ba buloŋ kpaa kɩ mʋ dɩ nyʋlʋŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ hɔŋ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ nyʋwa gɛɛ, a kɩ sʋla kɩna. Ʋ feŋ nɛ yaa Batimeyo, a yaa Timeyo biibaal.

english_verse: When he heard that it was Jesus from Nazareth, he shouted, “Jesus, Son of David, have pity on me!”
translation_verse: Ʋ aa nɩɩ dɩ Yesu aa lɩɩ Nazarɛti rɛ aa ko, ʋ huwori yɩrɩ ʋ a baa, “Yesu, Deviti nihii, fá ŋ sikii.”

english_verse: Many people told the man to stop, but he shouted even louder, “Son of David, have pity on me!”
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa nɔsɩ ʋ dɩ ʋ leŋ ʋ kyagɩŋsɩ hʋ. Ka ʋ vɩya aŋ marɩ yɩrɩ te gɛɛ a baa, “Yesu, Deviti nihii, fá ŋ sikii.”

english_verse: Jesus stopped and said, “Call him over!” They called out to the blind man and said, “Don't be afraid! Come on! He is calling for you.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɩɩgɩ sɩŋ, aŋ baa dɩ ba yɩrɩ ʋ dɩ ʋ ko. Ɛɛ rɛ ba yɩrɩ nyʋlʋŋ hʋ a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Kana ɩ tɩɩ aŋ sii ko. Ʋ aa yɩrɩ ɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: The man threw off his coat as he jumped up and ran to Jesus.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa nɩɩ gɛɛ, ʋ wuri ʋ wagyɛ ta, a sii gyaa kyigisi, aŋ kpa ko pele Yesu.

english_verse: Jesus asked, “What do you want me to do for you?” The blind man answered, “Master, I want to see!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Bekiŋ nɛ ɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ yaa tɩya ɩ?” Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, leŋ dɩ ŋ sɩya suri dɩ ŋ bɩl kɩ na.”

english_verse: Jesus told him, “You may go. Your eyes are healed because of your faith.” At once the man could see, and he went down the road with Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ laa ŋ di rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ leŋ ɩ deye. Kɩ mʋ.” Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sɩya pirigi suri, ʋ kɩ tɩŋ Yesu hal ŋmanɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: After Jesus had gone to Jerusalem, he went into the temple and looked around at everything. But since it was already late in the day, he went back to Bethany with the twelve disciples. Jesus Puts a Curse on a Fig Tree (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mʋ Gyerusalɛm, a mʋ gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ, a deŋ kɩna hʋ buloŋ a we doŋ. Ʋ aa ko deŋ teŋ dɩ lee bile. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bee ʋ hatɩnna fi abee balɩya hʋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ Bɛɛtani a pɩŋ doŋ. Yesu ŋmɩyɛsɩ we tɩya tɩyaŋ Matiwu

english_verse: That evening, Jesus and the disciples went outside the city. A Lesson from the Fig Tree (Matthew
translation_verse: Ʋ dɩdaana gyɩ aa ko pele, Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ mɩɩgɩ lɩɩ tɔɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Yesu daga tɩya hʋ sʋʋ memii Matiwu

english_verse: They asked, “What right do you have to do these things? Who gave you this authority?”
translation_verse: “Bekiŋ dee rɛ ɩ kana a kɩ yaa wɩya no buloŋ? Aŋnɛ rɛ tɩya ɩ ŋmanɩɩ ɩ kɩ yaa ba?”

english_verse: If anyone asks why you are doing this, say, ‘The Lord needs it and will soon bring it back.’ ”
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko kɩ puri, dɩ ba pɩyɛsɩ ma baa bee rɛ tɩŋ ma kɩ puri, ma baa, ‘Tɩɩna hʋ rɛ aa kyɛ. Ʋ rɛ baa á puri kaŋ ko. Á sɩ mɩɩgɩ kana ʋ ko lagɩ.”’

english_verse: The disciples left and found the donkey tied near a door that faced the street. While they were untying it,
translation_verse: Ba aa tɩŋ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ kɩ baŋ dɩ ba vʋwa kokubiye sɩgɩ dɩya kɩdɩgɩ dimbee nyʋwa tɩyaŋ. Ba mʋ dɩ ba puri.

english_verse: some of the people standing there asked, “Why are you untying the donkey?”
translation_verse: Ba aa puri kokubiye hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, nala badɔmɔŋ aa sɩŋ doŋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma kɩ puri kokubiye hʋ?”

english_verse: They told them what Jesus had said, and the people let them take it.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ gɛɛ hʋ Yesu aa baa dɩ ba basɩ. Ba aa basɩ gɛɛ, ba leŋ ba puri mʋ.

english_verse: The disciples led the donkey to Jesus. They put some of their clothes on its back, and Jesus got on.
translation_verse: Ba kaŋ kokubiye hʋ ko tɩya Yesu, a wuri ba gannɩ a dɔbɔ kokubiye hʋ tɩyaŋ, Yesu gyɩŋ hɔŋ.

english_verse: In front of Jesus and behind him, people went along shouting, “Hooray! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord!
translation_verse: Nala hʋ badɔmɔŋ we ʋ sɩya, ba badɔmɔŋ mɛ kɩ tɩŋa ʋ hal. Ba buloŋ kɩ kyɩɩrɩ, a baa, “Ma dannɩ ʋ! Tabarikala! Wɩɩsɩ sɩ pɛ nal hʋ aa ko á Tɩɩna feŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God bless the coming kingdom of our ancestor David. Hooray for God in heaven above!”
translation_verse: Á naabaa Deviti koro hʋ rɛ bɩl aa ko. Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ ko. Ma leŋ dɩ á dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ.”

english_verse: The chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses heard what Jesus said, and they started looking for a way to kill him. They were afraid of him, because the crowds were completely amazed at his teaching.
translation_verse: Wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ aa ko nɩɩ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa yaa, ba piili kɩ kyɛ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ ba aa sɩ tɩŋa a lɩɩ ʋ mɩɩbol. Beewɩya ʋ wɩdagɩya hʋ gyɩ gyʋʋ gyamaa hʋ buloŋ dɩgɩŋ nɛ a yaa ba nyʋʋfɩyɛlɩ. Nyɛ rɛ tɩŋ kambɩŋ gyɩ kaŋ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ, ba kɩ kyɛ ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ba lɩɩ ʋ mɩɩbol gɛɛ.

english_verse: So Jesus said to the tree, “Never again will anyone eat fruit from this tree!” The disciples heard him say this. Jesus in the Temple (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya tɩya hʋ a baa, “Á lɩɩ gyɩnaŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ, nal buloŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ na ɩ nɔŋ di.” Ʋ hatɩnna hʋ nɩɩ ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ. Yesu kile nala hʋ aa yallɩ kɩna Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ Matiwu

english_verse: Then he taught the people and said, “The Scriptures say, ‘My house should be called a place of worship for all nations.’ But you have made it a place where robbers hide!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu piili kɩ daga ba, a baa, “Ma bɩ liisi wɩya hʋ ba aa saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ? Ba saba dɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa ʋ dɩya sɩ yaa lee hʋ paalʋʋsɩ buloŋ nala aa sɩ kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, aŋka ma kɛ mɩɩgɩ kaŋ doŋ bɩrɩmɩ gaala dɩya.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples: Have faith in God!
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma laa Wɩɩsɩ di.

english_verse: After Jesus and his disciples reached Jerusalem, he went into the temple and began chasing out everyone who was selling and buying. He turned over the tables of the moneychangers and the benches of those who were selling doves.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba mʋʋ pele Gyerusalɛm. Ba aa ko pele doŋ, Yesu mʋ gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ, dɩ nala badɔmɔŋ we doŋ a kɩ yallɩ kɩna, ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ kɩ yɔbɔ kɩna. Yesu kile ba buloŋ ta, ba lɩɩ. Baala badɔmɔŋ mɛ gyɩ we doŋ a kɩ kyeŋgi molbiye. Yesu ŋmaa ba teebʋlsɩ mɛ lo. Baala badɔmɔŋ mɛ gyɩ aa yallɩ kokosi, ʋ ŋmaa ba kpasɩnɩ mɛ lo.

english_verse: Jesus would not let anyone carry things through the temple.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ laa dɩ nal buloŋ kaŋ kɩyallɩya ko tɩŋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ gyaŋwuwo tɩyaŋ baŋ.

english_verse: Everything you ask for in prayer will be yours, if you only have faith.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya kɩna hʋ kɛ buloŋ ma aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ kyɛ, dɩ mamaa rɛ laa di anɩɩ ma sɩ na ba, ma aa na ba rɛ.

english_verse: Whenever you stand up to pray, you must forgive what others have done to you. Then your Father in heaven will forgive your sins. A Question about Jesus' Authority (Matthew
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ɩ rɛ bɩ kpaa wɩya kɩ kyɛ ɩ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ, ɩ kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ kpa ɩ wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ɩ.” Ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu ʋ dee wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples returned to Jerusalem. And as he was walking through the temple, the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses came over to him.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba bɩl ko Gyerusalɛm a mʋ gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ. Yesu aa vala Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ gyaŋwuwo tɩyaŋ gɛɛ rɛ, wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla, abee Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ buloŋ sii ko ʋ lee a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa,

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I have just one question to ask you. If you answer it, I will tell you where I got the right to do these things.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ mɛ sɩ pɩyɛsɩ ma wɩdɩgɩ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko lɩɩ ʋ sɩɩ tɩya ŋ, ŋ mɛ sɩ daga ma dee hʋ ŋ aa kana memii.”

english_verse: Who gave John the right to baptize? Was it God in heaven or merely some human being?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Kɩbee rɛ gyɩ tɩya Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ ŋmanɩɩ ʋ kɩ fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ? Wɩɩsɩ rɛ koo nihuwobiŋ nɛ? Ma daga ŋ.”

english_verse: They thought it over and said to each other, “We can't say that God gave John this right. Jesus will ask us why we didn't believe John.
translation_verse: Ba piili kaŋ wɩɩ hʋ kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Wɩbee rɛ á sɩ na tɩya ʋ? Dɩ ámaa rɛ baa Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ ʋ lɩɩ, ʋ sɩ pɩyɛsɩ ma baa bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ á bɩ laa wɩya hʋ ʋ aa basɩ di?

english_verse: On the other hand, these people think that John was a prophet. So we can't say it was merely some human who gave John the right to baptize.” They were afraid of the crowd
translation_verse: Á yaŋ sɩ wuwo baa ʋ lɩɩ nihuwobiŋ lee kɛ? Aayɩ.” Kambɩŋ gyɩ kaŋ ba rɛ nala hʋ aa we doŋ wɩya, beewɩya nala basa anɩɩ Gyɔɔŋ fa kɔnɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ.

english_verse: and told Jesus, “We don't know.” Jesus replied, “Then I won't tell you who gave me the right to do what I do.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Á bɩ gyɩma.” Yesu mɛ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ɛɛ kɛ, ŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ daga ma nal hʋ aa tɩya ŋmanɩɩ ŋ kɩ yaa wɩya no.”

english_verse: It is also true that we must love God with all our heart, mind, and strength, and that we must love others as much as we love ourselves. These commandments are more important than all the sacrifices and offerings that we could possibly make.”
translation_verse: Ɩ aa sɩ kaŋ ɩ bembii buloŋ, abee ɩ tɩbɩɩna buloŋ, abee ɩ wɩɩ wɩɩ buloŋ a kyo Wɩɩsɩ, a kyo ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna mɛ anɩɩ ɩ aa kyo ɩ tɩɩ gɛɛ, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ɩ aa sɩ kaŋ pʋsɩ kpʋ a fisi ba buloŋ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ, koo ɩ aa kpaa kɩna a lɩɩ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus asked, “What do you think the owner of the vineyard will do? He will come and kill those renters and let someone else have his vineyard.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ba aa maga nyɛ, ɛɛ rɛ baga hʋ tɩɩna sɩ yaa? Ʋ sɩ ko leŋ dɩ ba kpʋ haŋ tʋŋtʋnna hʋ buloŋ, aŋ ka dɩ ʋ kpa baga hʋ tɩya nɩdʋŋsɩ.”

english_verse: Teacher, Moses wrote that if a married man dies and has no children, his brother should marry the widow. Their first son would then be thought of as the son of the dead brother.
translation_verse: “Á Tɩɩna, Moosi saba Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ dɩ baal lɛ kpaa haaŋ, dɩ ʋ bee haaŋ hʋ bɩ lʋl biye ka dɩ baal hʋ sʋba, dɩ ʋ maga dɩ ʋ naabiye kpa haaŋ hʋ rɛ, a lʋl biisi tɩya ʋ maana hʋ.

english_verse: When it was harvest time, he sent a servant to get his share of the grapes.
translation_verse: Tɩɩnɔnɔ hʋ tɔrɩɩ gyɩ aa ko pele, ʋ tɩŋ ʋ dɩya tʋŋtʋnna hʋ kɩdɩgɩ dɩ ʋ mʋ baga tʋŋtʋnna hʋ lee a laa ʋ tɩɩnɔnɔ tol ko. Ʋ sii kpa mʋ.

english_verse: The renters grabbed the servant, beat him up, and sent him away without a thing.
translation_verse: Baga tʋŋtʋnna hʋ sii kana ʋ a ŋmaa ʋ, aŋ leŋ ʋ kaŋ nohɩlɩya mɩɩgɩ mʋ baga hʋ tɩɩna lee.

english_verse: Then the man sent another servant, and they killed him. He kept sending servant after servant. They beat some of them and killed some.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩl tɩŋ nitoo tɩɩna, ʋ mɛ bɩl mʋ. Ba paalɩ kpʋ ʋ kɛ. Nɩgyamaa hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa tɩma, gɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba yaa ba buloŋ. Ba ŋmaa badɔmɔŋ nɛ aŋ kpʋ badɔmɔŋ mɛ.

english_verse: The owner had a son he loved very much. Finally, he sent his son to the renters because he thought they would respect him.
translation_verse: Ba kateŋse tɩyaŋ, ʋ biibaal dʋŋ nɛ ko mʋ ka. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sii tɩma ʋ aŋ baa, “Dɩ ŋ biye tɩɩ kɛ rɛ mʋwa, ba sɩ tɩya ʋ gyɩrɩma.” Ʋ mɛ bɩl kpa mʋ.

english_verse: So they grabbed the owner's son, killed him, and threw his body out of the vineyard.
translation_verse: Ba kaŋ biye hʋ, a ŋmaa ʋ kpʋ, a kpa ʋ yuwo ta ɔhɔ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: This is something the Lord has done, and it is amazing to us.’ ”
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ tʋma rɛ gɛɛ. Ʋ yaa ma wɩkperii rɛ?”’

english_verse: The leaders knew that Jesus was really talking about them, and they wanted to arrest him. But because they were afraid of the crowd, they let him alone and left. Paying Taxes (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ gyɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba kana ʋ tɔ dɩyaŋ, beewɩya ba gyɩma anɩɩ ba aa rɛ ʋ maga namaga hʋ kɩ daga. Amɛ ba gyɩ aa fá nala hʋ aa we doŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba lem-ʋ aŋ mʋ. Ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu lampoo tunii wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were up to, and he said, “Why are you trying to test me? Show me a coin!”
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu gyɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ba paala rɛ a basɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma kɩ magɩsɩ ŋ nyɛ? Ma kaŋ molbinʋʋ hʋ kɩdɩgɩ ko dɩ ŋ na.”

english_verse: You surely know about people being raised to life. You know that in the story about Moses and the burning bush, God said, “I am the God worshiped by Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Na ma aa pɩyɛsɩ ŋ nala aa sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya rɛ. Ma bɩ karɩma wɩya hʋ Moosi aa saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ, lee hʋ ʋ fa aa basa tɩɩpuso hʋ aa di diŋ hʋ wɩya? Wɩɩsɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ rɛ a baa dɩ ʋ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ hʋ Abɩraham abee Azɩkɩ abee Gyeekɔbɩ gyɩ aa tɩŋa.

english_verse: The Pharisees got together with Herod's followers. Then they sent some men to trick Jesus into saying something wrong.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ ba mʋ tɩŋ Farasiima abee Hɛrɔtɩ hatɩnna badɔmɔŋ dɩ ba bɩl mʋ Yesu lee a magɩsɩ ʋ, a bara kana ʋ.

english_verse: They went to him and said, “Teacher, we know that you are honest. You treat everyone with the same respect, no matter who they are. And you teach the truth about what God wants people to do. Tell us, should we pay taxes to the Emperor or not?”
translation_verse: Ba kpa ko ʋ lee a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Á nɩhɩyawʋ, á gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ɩ sɩya tuwo nal tɩyaŋ. Ɩ bee fá nɩbal buloŋ sɩɩ. Ɩ aa daga Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩɩ rɛ. Yaŋ daga tɩya ma, ʋ yaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ dɩ á tuŋ lampoo kɩ tɩya Roma paalʋʋ kuworibal hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Siiza? Ʋ maga dɩ á tuŋ kɩ tɩya ʋ rɛ koo á ta tuŋ kɩ tɩya ʋ?”

english_verse: They brought him a silver coin, and he asked, “Whose picture and name are on it?” “The Emperor's,” they answered.
translation_verse: Ba kpa kɩdɩgɩ tɩya ʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Aŋnɛ nyuu bee ʋ feŋ nɛ ba kpaa biŋ molbii hʋ tɩyaŋ nyɛ?” Ɛɛ rɛ ba baa dɩ Roma paalʋʋ kuworibal hʋ nyuu abee ʋ feŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Then Jesus told them, “Give the Emperor what belongs to him and give God what belongs to God.” The men were amazed at Jesus. Life in the Future World (Matthew
translation_verse: Ʋ yaŋ basɩ tɩya ba baa, “Ɛɛ kɛ, kɩŋ hʋ aa yaa Roma paalʋʋ kuworibal hʋ kɩŋ, ma kpa tɩya ʋ, kɩŋ mɛ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ kɩŋ, ma kpa tɩya Wɩɩsɩ.” Yesu aa basɩ nyɛ, ba yaa kyʋra. Doŋ nɛ ba lem-ʋ aŋ mʋ. Ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu sʋʋnɩ mɩɩgɩ siiyi wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: But they cheat widows out of their homes and pray long prayers just to show off. They will be punished most of all. A Widow's Offering (Luke
translation_verse: Ba aa fugo kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ pɩɩsɩ rɛ, aŋ kaŋ lohaana kɩna kɩ fasɩ. Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ di dʋnɩya sarɩya, ba aa rɛ sɩ na dɔgɩsɩɩ a te ba dɔŋtɩŋsɩ buloŋ.” Lohaaŋ hʋ aa kpaa ʋ molbiye buloŋ a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ Luka

english_verse: The Sadducees did not believe that people would rise to life after death. So some of them came to Jesus and said:
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ badɔmɔŋ ba aa yɩrɩ Sadusiima mɛ ko Yesu lee. Sadusiima fa bɩ laa di anɩɩ dɩ nal lɛ sʋba, ʋ sɩ bɩl sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa,

english_verse: Jesus answered: You are completely wrong! You don't know what the Scriptures teach. And you don't know anything about the power of God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ, a bɩl bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ dee mɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ma nyʋgɩsɩ nyɛ.

english_verse: When Jesus saw that the man had given a sensible answer, he told him, “You are not far from God's kingdom.” After this, no one dared ask Jesus any more questions. About David's Son (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu aa naa dɩ baal hʋ lɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ sii abee wɩgyʋŋ gɛɛ, ʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ bee Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ bɩ boliye.” Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ ko teŋ, nal buloŋ bɩl bɩ kaŋ nyʋwa ʋ aa sɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ wɩɩ buloŋ. Yesu daga nala Krisita hʋ wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: One of the teachers of the Law of Moses came up while Jesus and the Sadducees were arguing. When he heard Jesus give a good answer, he asked him, “What is the most important commandment?”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩl kɩdɩgɩ aa nɩɩ dɩ ba kaŋ wɩɩ hʋ kɩ ŋmaa nyʋʋtaaduwo gɛɛ, ʋ mɛ kpa ko ba lee. Ʋ aa naa dɩ Yesu lɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ sɩɩ weliŋ gɛɛ, ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ ʋ aa biŋ tɩya nala dɩ ba kɩ tɩŋa, ba tɩyaŋ kɩbee rɛ yaa wɩbal?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The most important one says: ‘People of Israel, you have only one Lord and God.
translation_verse: Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ba basɩ tɩya Iziral nala rɛ a baa, ‘Iziral nala, ma gyegile nɩɩ ŋ taal. Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ nɛ we doŋ.

english_verse: The second most important commandment says: ‘Love others as much as you love yourself.’ No other commandment is more important than these.”
translation_verse: Wɩlɩya tɩɩna mɛ rɛ nyɛ, ‘Kyo ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna anɩɩ ɩ aa kyo ɩ tɩɩ gɛɛ.’ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ buloŋ lɩɩ wɩya no balɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: The man replied, “Teacher, you are certainly right to say there is only one God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩl hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Á Tɩɩna, wɩtɩɩ rɛ ɩ basɩ. Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ nɛ we doŋ, kɩŋ buloŋ bɩl tuwo, see Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ.

english_verse: Jesus was sitting in the temple near the offering box and watching people put in their gifts. He noticed that many rich people were giving a lot of money.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ mʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ rɛ, a mʋ hɔŋ kpaga lee hʋ nala aa kpa ba wɩɩsʋlɩɩ molbiye kɩ we, a kɩ deŋ gɛɛ hʋ ba aa we. Kɩna tɩmma hʋ ko kɩ we molbiye yʋga yʋga.

english_verse: Everyone else gave what they didn't need. But she is very poor and gave everything she had. Now she doesn't have a cent to live on.
translation_verse: nala hʋ buloŋ aa kpaa molbiye a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, ba lɩya aŋ ka rɛ. Amɛ ʋ kɛ dɩya bee ʋ bee buloŋ nɛ ʋ kaŋ mʋ we gɛɛ.”

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching in the temple, he said, “How can the teachers of the Law of Moses say the Messiah will come from the family of King David?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl kɩ daga nala Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ a pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ baa dɩ Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, sɩ yaa Deviti nihii?

english_verse: If David called the Messiah his Lord, how can the Messiah be his son?” The large crowd enjoyed listening to Jesus teach. Jesus Condemns the Pharisees and the Teachers of the Law of Moses (Matthew
translation_verse: Deviti tɩɩ yɩrɩ nal no ʋ Tɩɩna rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ yaŋ sɩ yaa a yaa ʋ nihii dʋŋ?” Nɩgyamaa rɛ gyɩ gyegile a nɩɩ Yesu wɩbasɩɩ hʋ, ba tenni fɩyɛlɩ. Yesu daga nala dɩ ba pɔ ba tɩɩma weliŋ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching, he said: Guard against the teachers of the Law of Moses! They love to walk around in long robes and be greeted in the market.
translation_verse: Yesu bɩl daga ba a baa, “Ma pɔ ma tɩɩ weliŋ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ. Ba aa gɔllɩ we gyamaa tɩyaŋ nɛ abee ba gadoliye, a kɩ kyɛ dɩ nala kɩ tɩya ba gyɩrɩma aŋ kɩ kyʋwalɩ ba.

english_verse: They like the front seats in the synagogues and the best seats at banquets.
translation_verse: Ba aa kɩ kyɛ nɩbala lɩhɔnɩya rɛ wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ yɩrɩ ba laŋŋʋʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ, ba aa kyo dɩ ba hɔŋ nɩbala lɩhɔnɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Finally, a poor widow came up and put in two coins worth only a few pennies.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ lohanyaabʋ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ ko, a mʋ kpa aniiniima balɩya a we, kobo rɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples to gather around him. Then he said: I tell you that this poor widow has put in more than all the others.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu yɩrɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, lohaaŋ no rɛ we molbii a te nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ daha, beewɩya

english_verse: As Jesus was leaving the temple, one of his disciples said to him, “Teacher, look at these beautiful stones and wonderful buildings!”
translation_verse: Yesu aa lɩɩ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ ko dɩ ʋ lɩɩ, ʋ hatɩnna hʋ kɩdɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, na haŋ bʋbala hʋ ba aa kaŋ saa dɩya hʋ, ba weliye rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, lee hʋ buloŋ mɛ weliye.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Do you see these huge buildings? They will certainly be torn down! Not one stone will be left in place.” Warning about Trouble (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ naa dɩya no aa yʋga gɛɛ rɛ. Amɛ ba sɩ ŋmaa ʋ buloŋ lo. Ba bɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ bʋdɩgɩ mɛ ka dɔbɔ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna tɩyaŋ.” Tʋwara bee dɔgɩsɩɩ hʋ aa sɩ ko Matiwu

english_verse: Many will come and claim to be me. They will use my name and fool many people.
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa sɩ ko kpa ŋ feŋ anɩɩ ba aa rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ, a mʋrɩ nala yʋga.

english_verse: Later, as Jesus was sitting on the Mount of Olives across from the temple, Peter, James, John, and Andrew came to him in private.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba sii mʋ gyɩŋ Olivi dogimo hʋ nyuu, a hɔŋ kyaasɩ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ. Doŋ nɛ Piita abee Gyemsi, abee Gyɔɔŋ, abee Aŋduru, lʋwɔlɩ ko pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa,

english_verse: Someday you will see that “Horrible Thing” where it should not be. Everyone who reads this must try to understand! If you are living in Judea at that time, run to the mountains.
translation_verse: “Dɩ ma ko na kɩbɔŋlɔrɩ hʋ aa yaa sɩna dɩ ʋ sɩŋ lee hʋ aa bɩ maga dɩ ʋ we. Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko na gɛɛ, ma leŋ dɩ nala hʋ aa we Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ fá mʋ gyɩŋ dogiŋsi nyuni a faŋa.

english_verse: When you hear about wars and threats of wars, don't be afraid. These things will have to happen first, but that isn't the end.
translation_verse: Ma sɩ nɩɩ bayuwo dɔmɔ ma paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a nɩɩ ʋ dɔmɔ liboliye tɩyaŋ mɛ. Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ ko nɩɩ ba gɛɛ, ma ta leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa ma beŋkyekpa. Wɩya no buloŋ sɩ yaa baŋ, amɛ dʋnɩya hʋ tenii ha daa gɛɛ.

english_verse: This will be the worst time of suffering since God created the world, and nothing this terrible will ever happen again.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa mara dʋnɩya aa ko pele gyɩnaŋ, nal buloŋ ha bɩ naa tʋwara no dɔŋtɩɩna, nal mɛ bɩl bɩ sɩ na tʋwara gɛɛ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ.

english_verse: They asked, “When will these things happen? What will be the sign that they are about to take place?”
translation_verse: “Saŋa bee tɩyaŋ nɛ wɩya no buloŋ sɩ yaa? Bekiŋ wɩɩ rɛ á sɩ na a daga anɩɩ wɩya no aa kyɛ ba yaa rɛ?”

english_verse: Nations and kingdoms will go to war against each other. There will be earthquakes in many places, and people will starve to death. But this is just the beginning of troubles.
translation_verse: Paalʋʋ kɩdɩgɩ nala aa sɩ sii a mʋ yuwo paalʋʋ kɩdɩgɩ nala. Tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ kuwori abee ʋ nala aa sɩ sii a mʋ yuwo kuwori kɩdɩgɩ mɛ abee ʋ nala. Taŋha sɩ gyigili leye yʋga tɩyaŋ. Losi mɛ sɩ gyʋʋ. Tʋwara no buloŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ nɩɩ haaŋ halʋllɩ-luwol aa piili kɩ wɩɩ.

english_verse: Be on your guard! You will be taken to courts and beaten with whips in their synagogues. And because of me, you will have to stand before rulers and kings to tell about your faith.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ weliŋ. Ba sɩ kaŋ ma mʋ leye hʋ ma paalʋʋ nɩhɩyasɩ aa laŋŋɩ kɩ vʋʋlɩ wɩya, dɩ ba di ma sarɩya. Ba sɩ ŋmaa ma Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Ma sɩ sɩŋ kuworo abee bee-nɩhɩyasɩ sɩya akuu ŋ wɩya, a di ŋ daŋsɩya.

english_verse: But before the end comes, the good news must be preached to all nations.
translation_verse: Amɛ see dɩ ba laa sɩya basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya nala aa we dʋnɩya paalʋʋsɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, aŋka dɩ dʋnɩya no na teŋ.

english_verse: When you are arrested, don't worry about what you will say. You will be given the right words when the time comes. But you will not really be the ones speaking. Your words will come from the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ ko kaŋ ma mʋ dɩ ba di ma sarɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ ma bembiye kɩ sii abee wɩya hʋ ma aa sɩ basɩ a laa ma tɩɩ. Ɛɛ saŋa, Wɩɩsɩ rɛ sɩ kpa wɩgyʋŋ we ma nyuni tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ hʋ kɛ buloŋ aa ko ko ma nyuu, ma basɩ. Ma tɩɩ daa sɩ basɩ, Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ sɩ kpa we ma nyuni tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Brothers and sisters will betray each other and have each other put to death. Parents will betray their own children, and children will turn against their parents and have them killed.
translation_verse: Nɩmmabalɩya sɩ kaŋ dɔmɔŋ mʋ tɩya dɩ ba kpʋ. Kuwoma mɛ sɩ yaa ba biisi gɛɛ tɩɩ. Biisi mɛ sɩ vɩya ba kuwoma abee ba nɩmma nyʋʋsɩ aŋ kaŋ ba mʋ tɩya dɩ ba kpʋ.

english_verse: Everyone will hate you because of me. But if you keep on being faithful right to the end, you will be saved. The Horrible Thing (Matthew
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ nɛ sɩ haasɩ ma, akuu ŋ wɩya. Amɛ, nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ kaŋ mala a mʋ teŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa ʋ tɩɩna ta.” Yesu basɩ kɩbɔŋlɔrɩ hʋ aa yaa sɩna wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: If you are on the roof of your house, don't go inside to get anything.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ we salnyuu tɩyaŋ, aŋ nɩɩ wɩya no, ʋ ta bɩl lɔlɔ ʋ tɩɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ tuu gyʋʋ dɩya paa ʋ kɩna.

english_verse: If the Lord doesn't make the time shorter, no one will be left alive. But because of his chosen and special ones, he will make the time shorter.
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ fa bɩ keri kyɛyɛ hʋ ta, nɩdɩgɩ mɛ fa bɩ sɩ ka. Amɛ nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya dɩ ba tɩŋa ʋ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ keri kyɛyɛ hʋ ta.

english_verse: If you are out in the field, don't go back for your coat.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ we baga tɩyaŋ aŋ nɩɩ wɩya no, dɩ ʋ ta mɩɩgɩ mʋ dɩya a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ kpa ʋ gal.

english_verse: It will be an awful time for women who are expecting babies or nursing young children.
translation_verse: Haluwokanna abee biifɩllɩ nɩmma sɩ na tʋwara yʋga.

english_verse: Pray that it won't happen in winter.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ dɩ wɩɩ no ta yaa puwo saŋa.

english_verse: But be on your guard! That's why I am telling you these things now. When the Son of Man Appears (Matthew
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ nɛ ŋ laa sɩya basɩ dɩ ŋ tɩya ma, ka dɩ saŋa hʋ na pele. Ma yaŋ gyɩŋ tɩya ma tɩɩ weliŋ.” Yesu basɩ ʋ dʋnɩya mɩɩgɩ koyi wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: So when you see all these things happening, you will know that the time has almost come.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ ko na wɩya no buloŋ aa yaa, ma gyɩma anɩɩ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye koyi kpaga rɛ.

english_verse: The sky and the earth will not last forever, but my words will. No One Knows the Day or Time (Matthew
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha nyuu buloŋ sɩ teŋ, amɛ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basa kɛ bɩ sɩ nyʋgɩsɩ maakyiye buloŋ.” Nal buloŋ bɩ gyɩŋ kyɛɛ hʋ wɩya no aa sɩ yaa Matiwu

english_verse: The stars will fall, and the powers in the sky will be shaken.”
translation_verse: Kyɩŋwʋlɩya sɩ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu ko tuu kɩ tele. Ba sɩ kile wɩɩsɩnyuu kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa kaŋ dee dɩ ba lɩɩ ba liweeliye tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Learn a lesson from a fig tree. When its branches sprout and start putting out leaves, you know summer is near.
translation_verse: “Ma kpa tɩɩsɩ a gʋnnɩ wɩgyʋŋ! Dɩ ma ko na tɩɩsɩ piile kɩ tɔsɔ, ma aa gyɩma anɩɩ yʋʋ kpaga rɛ.

english_verse: Then the Son of Man will be seen coming in the clouds with great power and glory.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ma sɩ na mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye, dɩ ŋ tɩŋ taala tɩyaŋ ko kɩ tuu abee gaŋdarɩ abee dee.

english_verse: He will send his angels to gather his chosen ones from all over the earth. A Lesson from a Fig Tree (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ sɩ tɩŋ malɩkasɩ dɩ ba mʋ dʋnɩya logiŋ kɛ buloŋ a kaŋ nala hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, a ko laŋŋɩ.” Ma kpa tɩɩsɩ a gʋnnɩ wɩgyʋŋ Matiwu

english_verse: No one knows the day or the time. The angels in heaven don't know, and the Son himself doesn't know. Only the Father knows.
translation_verse: “Amɛ nal buloŋ bɩ gyɩŋ kyɛɛ hʋ wɩya no aa sɩ yaa. Malɩkasɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ mɛ paalɩ bɩ gyɩma. Mɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ Biye tɩɩ mɛ bɩ gyɩma, see ŋ Kuwo dʋŋ.

english_verse: So be alert! You don't know when the master of the house will come back. It could be in the evening or at midnight or before dawn or in the morning.
translation_verse: Ma yaŋ kɩ pɔ, beewɩya ma bɩ gyɩŋ kyɛɛ hʋ dɩya hʋ tɩɩna aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko, dɩ dɩdaana rɛɛ, dɩ tekere rɛɛ, dɩ sɩgballɩnyʋwa rɛɛ, koo dɩ kyɩkyʋwala rɛɛ, ma bɩ gyɩma.

english_verse: So watch out and be ready! You don't know when the time will come.
translation_verse: Ma gyɩŋ tɩya ma tɩɩ weliŋ, a yaa siri kɩ pɔ, beewɩya ma bɩ gyɩŋ kyɛɛ hʋ wɩya no aa sɩ yaa.

english_verse: You can be sure that some of the people of this generation will still be alive when all this happens.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ma lagɩlagɩ no nala aa we ma mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ buloŋ bɩ sɩ sʋba teŋ, ka dɩ wɩya no yaa.

english_verse: But if he comes suddenly, don't let him find you asleep.
translation_verse: Ma gyɩŋ tɩya ma tɩɩ weliŋ aŋ kɩ pɔ dɩ ʋ ta ko pirigi ma tɩyaŋ dɩ ma aa pɩŋ doo.

english_verse: It is like what happens when a man goes away for a while and places his servants in charge of everything. He tells each of them what to do, and he orders the guard to keep alert.
translation_verse: Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ baal aa siye a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ vala ŋmanɩɩ. Dɩ ʋ ko kɩ kyɛ ʋ lɩɩ dɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ aa daga ʋ tʋŋtʋnna kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ba tʋma rɛ, aŋ basɩ tɩya nal hʋ aa pɔ dimbee mɛ dɩ ʋ pɔ dɩya hʋ weliŋ, dɩ ʋ mʋ aŋ ko.

english_verse: I tell everyone just what I have told you. Be alert!
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ʋ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya nal buloŋ, ma pɔ weliŋ.”

english_verse: They were saying, “We must not do it during the festival, because the people will riot.” At Bethany (Matthew
translation_verse: Amɛ ba mɩɩgɩ vʋʋlɩ dɩ ba ta kana ʋ ba kyɛbal hʋ kyɛɛ, beewɩya dɩ ba aa rɛ yaa gɛɛ nala hʋ sɩ laa taawɛɛ. Haaŋ kɩdɩgɩ kpaa tʋranɩɩ tɩsɩ Yesu nyuu Matiwu

english_verse: Judas walked right up to Jesus and said, “Teacher!” Then Judas kissed him,
translation_verse: Gyudasɩ aa pele lee hʋ Yesu aa we, ʋ degini ʋ lee mʋ aŋ baa, “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ,” aŋ guwori ʋ.

english_verse: Jesus was led off to the high priest. Then the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses all met together.
translation_verse: Ba gyɩ kaŋ Yesu mʋ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ dɩya rɛ. Ba aa ko doŋ dɩ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ, abee ba wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya nɩhɩyasɩ, abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla buloŋ laŋŋa.

english_verse: This made some of the guests angry, and they complained, “Why such a waste?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ badɔmɔŋ hɔŋ kɩ gʋrɩmɩ wɩya, aŋ kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ haaŋ no kaŋ tʋranɩɩ no kyogi ta nyɛ?

english_verse: You may be sure that wherever the good news is told all over the world, people will remember what she has done. And they will tell others. Judas and the Chief Priests (Matthew
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, dʋnɩya logiŋ kɛ buloŋ ba aa sɩ mʋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ, ba sɩ lɩɩ wɩɩ no haaŋ no aa yaa a basɩ.” Gyudasɩ laa nyʋwa anɩɩ ʋ sɩ kpa Yesu yallɩ Matiwu

english_verse: The two disciples went into the city and found everything just as Jesus had told them. So they prepared the Passover meal.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ sii lɩɩ a mʋ tɔɔ hʋ, a na wɩya hʋ buloŋ Yesu aa basɩ tɩya ba, dɩ ba yaa gɛɛ tɩɩ, ka ba yaa Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ kyɛbal hʋ kɩdiiliye.

english_verse: Judas Iscariot was one of the twelve disciples. He went to the chief priests and offered to help them arrest Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyudasɩ Isɩkarɔtɩ aa yaa Yesu hatɩnna fi abee balɩya hʋ kɩdɩgɩ sii mʋ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ lee dɩ ʋ kpa Yesu yallɩ tɩya ba.

english_verse: The Son of Man will die, just as the Scriptures say. But it is going to be terrible for the one who betrays me. That man would be better off if he had never been born.” The Lord's Supper (Matthew
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye, ŋ sɩ sʋba anɩɩ ba aa saba ŋ wɩya gɛɛ. Amɛ nal hʋ aa kpaa mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye yallɩ, ʋ sɩ na tʋwara yʋga. Ba fa aa bɩ lʋla ʋ rɛ kpɩya.” Kɩdiiliye hʋ Yesu aa baa dɩ á di a kɩ liisi ʋ wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus picked up a cup of wine and gave thanks to God. He gave it to his disciples, and they all drank some.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl kpa nɩɩnyʋwagbaŋbiye bee sɩŋ mɛ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ aŋ kpa tɩya ba, ba buloŋ nyʋwa nɩɩnyʋwagbaŋbiidɩgɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “This very night before a rooster crows twice, you will say three times that you don't know me.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, gyɩnaŋ tebine no, ɩ Piita, ɩ sɩ tʋwa naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa bʋto anɩɩ ɩ bɩ gyɩma ŋ, ka dɩ gyibal na wii naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa bʋlɩya.”

english_verse: But Peter was so sure of himself that he said, “Even if I have to die with you, I will never say I don't know you!” All the others said the same thing. Jesus Prays (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita basɩ abee sɩfɩyasɩ baa, “Dɩ ŋ beel-ɩ sɩ paalɩ sʋba mɛ, ŋ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa baa ŋ bɩ gyɩma ɩ.” Nɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ mɛ basɩ gɛɛ tɩɩ. Yesu kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ Gesamani tɩyaŋ Matiwu

english_verse: told them, “I am so sad that I feel as if I am dying. Stay here and keep awake with me.”
translation_verse: Ʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ŋ tɩya buloŋ nɛ kyogo, ŋ bembii kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ bori. Ma hɔŋ daha pɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus walked on a little way. Then he knelt down on the ground and prayed, “Father, if it is possible, don't let this happen to me! Father, you can do anything. Don't make me suffer by drinking from this cup. But do what you want, and not what I want.”
translation_verse: A bɩl baa, “Ŋ Kuwo, ɩ wuwo kɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ nɛ. Lɩɩ tʋwara no aa sɩ ko ŋ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ, ŋ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ daa, ɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: Stay awake and pray that you won't be tested. You want to do what is right, but you are weak.”
translation_verse: Ma kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, a kɩ pɔ dɩ Sɩtaanɩ ta wuwo mʋrɩ ma. Ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ ma kyo dɩ ma aa yaa wɩweliye rɛ, amɛ ma bɩ kaŋ gɛɛ dee ma tɩɩ.”

english_verse: But after I am raised to life, I will go ahead of you to Galilee.”
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyisi ŋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko sii, ŋ sɩ laa ma sɩya a mʋ Galili.”

english_verse: Peter spoke up, “Even if all the others reject you, I never will!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Dɩ ba buloŋ sɩ fá vɩya ɩ ta mɛ, ŋ kɛ bɩ sɩ maakyiye mɩɩgɩ ɩ hal.”

english_verse: and the men grabbed Jesus and arrested him.
translation_verse: Ba buloŋ giri ko kana ʋ.

english_verse: Jesus went back and prayed the same prayer.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩl mʋ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, a bɩl basɩ gɛɛ tɩɩ.

english_verse: Jesus went with his disciples to a place called Gethsemane, and he told them, “Sit here while I pray.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba mʋ gyʋʋ lee kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Gesamani. Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ma hɔŋ daha ka dɩ ŋ mʋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋ ko.”

english_verse: Jesus took along Peter, James, and John. He was sad and troubled and
translation_verse: Ka ʋ kaŋ Piita abee Gyemsi abee Gyɔɔŋ a mʋ doŋ. Yesu tɩya gyɩ kyogo rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, haalɩ ʋ hakɩla buloŋ gyarɩ.

english_verse: When Jesus came back and found the disciples sleeping, he said to Simon Peter, “Are you asleep? Can't you stay awake for just one hour?
translation_verse: Ʋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ teŋ aŋ sii ko ʋ hatɩnna hʋ lee, dɩ ba pɩŋ doo. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ Piita a baa, “Ɩ pɩna rɛ? Ɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo bara doo mʋhʋ anɩɩ hawadɩgɩ mɛ?

english_verse: But when he returned to the disciples, he found them sleeping again. They simply could not keep their eyes open, and they did not know what to say.
translation_verse: Ʋ mɩɩgɩ kɩ ko dɩ ba bɩl pɩŋ doo, beewɩya doo gyɩ kaŋ ba rɛ weliŋ. Ba bɩ gyɩŋ ba aa sɩ basɩ wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ a tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: When Jesus returned to the disciples the third time, he said, “Are you still sleeping and resting? Enough of this! The time has come for the Son of Man to be handed over to sinners.
translation_verse: Ʋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ tootɩɩna aŋ ko pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ma ha pɩŋ kɩ wiyesi rɛ? Ʋ maga rɛ. Ma sii, saŋa hʋ pele rɛ. Ba sɩ kaŋ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye a mʋ tɩya wɩbɔŋyaala.

english_verse: Get up! Let's go. The one who will betray me is already here.” Jesus Is Arrested (Matthew
translation_verse: Ma sii dɩ á mʋ. Ma na! Nal hʋ aa sɩ kpa ŋ yallɩ rɛ aa ko.” Ba kaŋ Yesu Matiwu

english_verse: Someone standing there pulled out a sword. He struck the servant of the high priest and cut off his ear.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa sɩŋ doŋ ba kɩdɩgɩ lɩɩ ʋ takoobii, a ŋmaŋ nal kɩdɩgɩ dɩgɩŋ kyɔl. Nal hʋ dɩgɩŋ ba gyɩ aa ŋmaŋ kyɔl hʋ fa yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ dɩya yoŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Jesus was still speaking, when Judas the betrayer came up. He was one of the twelve disciples, and a mob of men armed with swords and clubs were with him. They had been sent by the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ ʋ nyʋwa ha bɩ tele taŋha dɩ Gyudasɩ rɛ mʋ kɩ ko gɛɛ. Ʋ fa yaa Yesu hatɩnna fi abee balɩya hʋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Nɩgyamaa gyɩ giri kɩ tɩŋa ʋ hal. Badɔmɔŋ kolo takoobiye abee daŋgulo. Wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla abee ba bee-nɩhɩyasɩ rɛ gyɩ tɩŋ ba, ba ko.

english_verse: Judas had told them ahead of time, “Arrest the man I greet with a kiss. Tie him up tight and lead him away.”
translation_verse: Minaafigi tɩɩna hʋ gyɩ tɩya nala hʋ magɩl lɛ a baa, “Nal hʋ ŋ aa sɩ mʋ guwori, ʋ rɛ gɛɛ. Ma gurigi ʋ kɩ mʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to the mob, “Why do you come with swords and clubs to arrest me like a criminal?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ŋ yaa biibɔŋ nɛ, ma kol takoobiye abee daŋgulo a kɩ ko dɩ ma kana ŋ?

english_verse: Day after day I was with you and taught in the temple, and you didn't arrest me. But what the Scriptures say must come true.”
translation_verse: Na kyɛɛ kɛ buloŋ nɛ ŋ beel-ma aa we Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ kɩ daga ma Wɩɩsɩ wɩya, aŋka ma bɩ lʋga dɩ ma kana ŋ doŋ. Amɛ ŋ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ba aa saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ, see ba buloŋ aa yaa.”

english_verse: All of Jesus' disciples ran off and left him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ buloŋ vɩya ʋ ta aŋ fá.

english_verse: One of them was a young man who was wearing only a linen cloth. And when the men grabbed him,
