translation_verse: Ka bapʋwasɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ aa baasɩ ʋ wagyɛ a kɩ tɩŋa Yesu hal, ba kɩ lʋga dɩ ba kana ʋ.

english_verse: he left the cloth behind and ran away naked. Jesus Is Questioned by the Council (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ wuri ʋ wagyɛ hʋ ta aŋ kaŋ teŋbil a fá nyʋgɩsɩ. Ba kaŋ Yesu mʋ sarɩya lidiilii Matiwu

english_verse: Finally, some men stood up and lied about him. They said,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala badɔmɔŋ sii sɩŋ a nyɩya wɩya kɩ tɩya ʋ a baa,

english_verse: Peter replied, “That isn't true! I don't know what you're talking about. I don't have any idea what you mean.” He went out to the gate, and a rooster crowed.
translation_verse: Piita tʋwa a baa, “Ŋ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ɩ aa basɩ tɩyaŋ,” aŋ sii lɩɩ sɩŋ paganyʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ gyibalbuŋ wiye.

english_verse: Peter had followed at a distance, and when he reached the courtyard of the high priest's house, he sat down with the guards to warm himself beside a fire.
translation_verse: Ba aa kana ʋ kɩ mʋ gɛɛ, ka Piita lʋwɔlɩ kɩ tɩŋ ba hal a mʋ gyʋʋ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ gyaŋwuwo. Ʋ gyʋwa dɩ nala hʋ aa pɔ gyaŋwuwo hʋ hɔnɔ a kɩ wiyeni diŋ. Ʋ mɛ mʋ pɛ ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The chief priests and the whole council tried to find someone to accuse Jesus of a crime, so they could put him to death. But they could not find anyone to accuse him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ dɩ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ abee nɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ laŋŋa kɩ vʋʋlɩ wɩya, a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba na wɩɩ hʋ Yesu aa yaa kyogi, a maga dɩ ba kpʋ ʋ. Aŋ kyɛ kyɛ wɩɩ lɔlɔ.

english_verse: At once the high priest ripped his robe apart and shouted, “Why do we need more witnesses?
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ, baal hʋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ gannɩ kɩyɛsɩ aŋ baa, “Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ a bɩl kɩ kyɛ daŋsɩya tɩmma.

english_verse: This time Peter began to curse and swear, “I don't even know the man you're talking about!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita kaabɩ tɩya ʋ tɩɩ, aŋ ŋmɩyɛsɩ a baa, “Ŋ bɩ gyɩŋ baal no ma aa dagɩ.”

english_verse: “We heard him say he would tear down this temple that we built. He also claimed that in three days he would build another one without any help.”
translation_verse: “Á nɩɩ dɩ baal no baa dɩ ʋ sɩ ŋmaa Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ nala aa saa a lo, aŋ bɩl wuwo saa kɩdɩgɩ kyɛyɛ boto bʋwaŋ ʋ dʋŋ bee ʋ dʋŋ.”

english_verse: But even then they did not agree on what they said.
translation_verse: Amɛ ba mɛ ha gyɩ basɩ wɩya kɩ bɩ dɔmɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: The high priest stood up in the council and asked Jesus, “Why don't you say something in your own defense? Don't you hear the charges they are making against you?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ sii lɩɩ sɩŋ nala hʋ tʋtʋʋ tɩyaŋ a pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Ɩ bɩ nɩɩ nala no aa basɩ ɩ wɩya mɔɔ gɛɛ? Ɩ kɛ bɩ kaŋ wɩɩ ɩ aa sɩ basɩ?”

english_verse: But Jesus kept quiet and did not say a word. The high priest asked him another question, “Are you the Messiah, the Son of the glorious God?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu tallɩ ʋ nyʋwa a bɩ laa wɩɩ buloŋ basɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ rɛ yaa Krisita, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya? Ɩ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ?”

english_verse: You heard him claim to be God! What is your decision?” They all agreed he should be put to death.
translation_verse: Ma buloŋ nɩɩ ʋ aa tʋʋsɩ Wɩɩsɩ gɛɛ rɛ? Ɛɛ rɛ ma na?” Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ buloŋ baa dɩ ʋ kyogo rɛ, a maga dɩ ba kpʋ ʋ.

english_verse: Some of the people started spitting on Jesus. They blindfolded him, hit him with their fists, and said, “Tell us who hit you!” Then the guards took charge of Jesus and beat him. Peter Says He Doesn't Know Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Badɔmɔŋ sii, a tʋ naŋtʋwɔl we ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, aŋ vʋwa ʋ sɩya tɔ, aa ŋmaa ʋ, aŋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ dɩ ʋ daga nal hʋ aa ŋmaa ʋ. Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ ba kana ʋ mʋ tɩya laalyuwolo hʋ, ba mɛ ŋmaa ʋ kyaŋkpaŋa tɩyaŋ. Piita tʋwa anɩɩ ʋ bɩ gyɩŋ Yesu Matiwu

english_verse: The servant girl saw Peter again and said to the people standing there, “This man is one of them!”
translation_verse: Piita aa sɩŋ doŋ ɛɛ rɛ tʋŋtʋnnɩ toluu hʋ bɩl na ʋ a basɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa sɩŋ kpaga ʋ a baa, “Baal no mɛ yaa Yesu hatɩnna hʋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: While Peter was still in the courtyard, a servant girl of the high priest came up
translation_verse: Piita aa hɔŋ gyaŋwuwo hʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ rɛ, wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ dɩya tʋŋtʋnnɩ-toluu kɩdɩgɩ ko lɩɩ

english_verse: and saw Peter warming himself by the fire. She stared at him and said, “You were with Jesus from Nazareth!”
translation_verse: a na Piita dɩ ʋ hɔŋ kɩ wiyeni diŋ hʋ. Ʋ deŋ ʋ weliŋ aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ mɛ fa aa tɩŋ Yesu aa lɩɩ Nazarɛti hal lɛ.”

english_verse: “No, I'm not!” Peter replied. A little while later some of the people said to Peter, “You certainly are one of them. You're a Galilean!”
translation_verse: Piita bɩl tʋwa a baa dɩ ʋ daa. Mʋhʋ sʋwaa, dɩ nala hʋ aa sɩŋ doŋ mɛ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ɩ mɛ yaa ba kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, ɩ lɩɩ Galili rɛ.”

english_verse: At once the rooster crowed a second time. Then Peter remembered that Jesus had told him, “Before a rooster crows twice, you will say three times that you don't know me.” So Peter started crying.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ teŋ dɩ gyibal wiye ʋ lɩya tɩɩna. Piita liisi wɩɩ hʋ Yesu aa basɩ tɩya ʋ anɩɩ ʋ sɩ tʋwa ʋ naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa bʋto, ka dɩ gyibal na wii naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa bʋlɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kaŋ ʋ nyuu gʋra a wii weliŋ.

english_verse: Early the next morning the chief priests, the nation's leaders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses met together with the whole Jewish council. They tied up Jesus and led him off to Pilate.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩya kyɩkyʋwala pipi, wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ, abee bee nɩhɩyasɩ, abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla, abee nala hʋ buloŋ aa laŋŋɩ kɩ vʋʋlɩ wɩya, ba buloŋ nɛ gyɩ ko laŋŋɩ a vʋʋlɩ gɛɛ hʋ ba aa sɩ yaa Yesu. Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ ba kana ʋ vʋwa, aŋ kana ʋ mʋ Pilato lee.

english_verse: But the chief priests told the crowd to ask Pilate to free Barabbas.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ mʋrɩ nala hʋ we anɩɩ ba leŋ ba lɩɩ Barabaasɩ ta, aŋ leŋ Yesu.

english_verse: Pilate asked, “But what crime has he done?” “Nail him to a cross!” they yelled even louder.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bekiŋ wɩbɔŋ nɛ ʋ yaa?” Ɛɛ rɛ ba marɩ nɔsɩ yʋga a baa, “Kpaasɩ ʋ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: But Jesus did not answer, and Pilate was amazed. The Death Sentence (Matthew
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu bɩl bɩ suri ʋ nyʋwa. Wɩɩ hʋ kperi Pilato. Ba laa nyʋwa anɩɩ ba sɩ kpʋ Yesu Matiwu

english_verse: They made fun of Jesus and shouted, “Hey, you king of the Jews!”
translation_verse: Ka ba aa tuu gbinni ʋ sɩya, a yaa ʋ sɩya a baa, “Gyuuma kuwori, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tɩya ɩ mɩɩbodolii!”

english_verse: Then Pilate questioned him again, “Don't you have anything to say? Don't you hear what crimes they say you have done?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato bɩl pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Ɩ bɩ kaŋ wɩɩ buloŋ ɩ aa sɩ basɩ tɩya ba? Deŋ na wɩya mɔɔgɛɛ ba baa dɩ ɩ kyogo.”

english_verse: Pilate wanted to please the crowd, so he set Barabbas free. Then he ordered his soldiers to beat Jesus with a whip and nail him to a cross. Soldiers Make Fun of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Pilato gyɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ yaa nala hʋ wɩkyɛɛlɩɩ wɩya, ʋ lɩɩ Barabaasɩ ta aŋ leŋ ba vɩɩrɩ Yesu aŋ baa dɩ ba kana ʋ mʋ kpaasɩ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Laalyuwolo yaa Yesu sɩya Matiwu

english_verse: On it was a sign that told why he was nailed there. It read, “This is the King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Ba aa baa Yesu yaa wɩya hʋ kyogi, ba aa rɛ ba gyɩ sabɩ mal daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Gyuuma kuwori hʋ rɛ nyɛ.”

english_verse: They yelled, “Nail him to a cross!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba buloŋ nɔsɩ yʋga a baa, “Kpaasɩ ʋ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: A Roman army officer was standing in front of Jesus. When the officer saw how Jesus died, he said, “This man really was the Son of God!”
translation_verse: Laalyuwolo nɩhɩyawʋ kɩdɩgɩ fa aa sɩŋ pɔ Yesu aa naa gɛɛ ʋ aa kyiyese abee gɛɛ ʋ aa sʋba, ʋ baa, “Wɩtɩɩ, baal no rɛ kɔnɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ.”

english_verse: The soldiers led Jesus inside the courtyard of the fortress and called together the rest of the troops.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ laalyuwolo hʋ kana ʋ lɩɩ ba kuworibal hʋ gyaŋwuwo tɩyaŋ, a yɩrɩ ba laalyuwolo buloŋ ko laŋŋɩ.

english_verse: And at that time there was a prisoner named Barabbas. He and some others had been arrested for murder during a riot.
translation_verse: Nala badɔmɔŋ gyɩ kaa kasɩ rɛ a kpʋ nala, ba gyɩ kasɩ tɔ dɩyaŋ. Ba kɩdɩgɩ feŋ nɛ yaa Barabaasɩ.

english_verse: The crowd now came and asked Pilate to set a prisoner free, just as he usually did.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ yʋga sii giri mʋ Pilato lee a baa dɩ ʋ yaa gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa yaa kɩ tɩya ba saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: Then Pilate asked the crowd, “What do you want me to do with this man you say is the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato bɩl pɩyɛsɩ nala hʋ baa, “Aŋka baal hʋ ma aa yɩrɩ Gyuuma kuwori hʋ, bee rɛ ma baa ŋ yaa ʋ?”

english_verse: When the soldiers had finished making fun of Jesus, they took off the purple robe. They put his own clothes back on him and led him off to be nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Ba aa yaa ʋ sɩya hʋ ko teŋ, ba wuri gafɩyaŋ hʋ aŋ paa ʋ tɩɩ gannɩ laalɩ ʋ, a kana ʋ lɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ba kana ʋ mʋ kpaasɩ daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ba kpaasɩ Yesu mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ Matiwu

english_verse: Simon from Cyrene happened to be coming in from a farm, and they forced him to carry Jesus' cross. Simon was the father of Alexander and Rufus. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Ba aa ko kɩ lɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba kyeŋ baal kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Siimɔŋ, a lɩɩ Sariini. Ʋ rɛ fa yaa Alizaŋda abee Rufusi kuwo. Dɩ ʋ lɩɩ baga a kɩ ko bee. Ba kana ʋ, a fɩla ʋ, ʋ laa daagarɩɩ hʋ baasɩ.

english_verse: The chief priests and the teachers of the Law of Moses also made fun of Jesus. They said to each other, “He saved others, but he can't save himself.
translation_verse: Wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ mɛ kɩ huuri Yesu aŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Ʋ wuwo laa nala kɩ ta rɛ, aŋ bɩ wuwo laa ʋ tɩɩ kɛ kɩ ta.”

english_verse: Pilate was surprised to hear that Jesus was already dead, and he called in the army officer to find out if Jesus had been dead very long.
translation_verse: Pilato nyʋwa gyɩ fɩyɛla rɛ Yesu teŋ aa sʋba? Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ yɩrɩ laalyuwolo hʋ nɩhɩyawʋ a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Yesu teŋ sʋba rɛ?”

english_verse: A man named Joseph from Arimathea was brave enough to ask Pilate for the body of Jesus. Joseph was a highly respected member of the Jewish council, and he was also waiting for God's kingdom to come.
translation_verse: Haŋ kyɛɛ hʋ ba aa yaa siri pɔ ba Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ dɩdaana, baal kɩdɩgɩ aa lɩɩ Arimatɩya ba kɩ yɩrɩ Gyosɛfʋ, sii mʋ Pilato lee abee bembiduwo a sʋla Yesu teŋbii. Ʋ fa yaa ba bee nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ aa laŋŋɩ kɩ vʋʋlɩ wɩya kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, nala kɩ tɩya ʋ gyɩrɩma. Ʋ mɛ fa aa gyegili Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ koyi rɛ.

english_verse: The soldiers took Jesus to Golgotha, which means “Place of a Skull.”
translation_verse: Ba gyɩ kaŋ Yesu mʋ lee kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, ba kɩ yɩrɩ doŋ Golgota.

english_verse: People who passed by said terrible things about Jesus. They shook their heads and shouted, “Ha! So you're the one who claimed you could tear down the temple and build it again in three days.
translation_verse: Ba aa kpaasɩ ʋ mal daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, nala hʋ aa tɩŋ doŋ kɩ baŋ, ba kɩ tʋʋsɩ ʋ aŋ kaŋ ba nyuni kɩ kyugisi a baa, “Oyi, ɩ rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa baa dɩ ɩ sɩ ŋmaa Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ lo aŋ bɩl wuwo saa ʋ kyɛyɛ boto pagaŋ.

english_verse: If he is the Messiah, the king of Israel, let him come down from the cross! Then we will see and believe.” The two criminals also said cruel things to Jesus. The Death of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: “Ma leŋ Krisita hʋ, Gyuuma kuwori hʋ ko tuu daaŋ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, dɩ á na a laa ʋ wɩya di.” Nala hʋ balɩya mɛ ba aa kpaasɩ pɛ Yesu tɩyaŋ mɛ gyɩ tʋʋsɩ ʋ rɛ. Yesu sʋba Matiwu

english_verse: About noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until around three o'clock.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa ko maga nyutʋtʋʋ, lee buloŋ gyɩ bile gɛɛ rɛ a mʋ pele ʋ dɩdaana, ka lee bɩl kyaanɩ.

english_verse: Then about that time Jesus shouted, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabachthani?” which means, “My God, my God, why have you deserted me?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu nɔsɩ yɩrɩ ʋ taal tɩyaŋ a baa, “Ɛloyi, Ɛloyi, lama sabakitani.” Ʋ memii rɛ yaa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ vɩya ŋ ta?”

english_verse: Some of the people standing there heard Jesus and said, “He is calling for Elijah.”
translation_verse: Dɩ nala badɔmɔŋ mɛ sɩŋ doŋ a nɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa basa. Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Na, Ilaagya rɛ ʋ kɩ yɩrɩ gɛɛ.”

english_verse: One of them ran and grabbed a sponge. After he had soaked it in wine, he put it on a stick and held it up to Jesus. He said, “Let's wait and see if Elijah will come and take him down!”
translation_verse: Nala hʋ kɩdɩgɩ fa aa sɩŋ doŋ mʋ kpa gbara a kaŋ mʋ yuu sɩkyaakyaa, a kpa vʋwa kaakelii tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ mʋ we ʋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ nyʋwa. Ʋ aa yaa gɛɛ, ʋ baa, “Ma leŋ dɩ á gyegili na dɩ Ilaagya sɩ ko kana ʋ tuu daaŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus shouted and then died.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kyiyesi yʋga aŋ wiyesi ʋ wiyesi kateŋse.

english_verse: Some women were looking on from a distance. They and many others had come with Jesus to Jerusalem. But even before this they had been his followers and had helped him while he was in Galilee. Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of the younger James and of Joseph were two of these women. Salome was also one of them. Jesus Is Buried (Matthew
translation_verse: Haana no buloŋ fa aa tɩŋ Yesu hal lɛ, a kɩ kyiyeli ʋ Galili tɩyaŋ. Haana hʋ mɛ fa aa tɩŋ Yesu hal a ko Gyerusalɛm, ba gyeniŋ buloŋ mɛ fa we doŋ nɛ. Ba hogo Yesu Matiwu

english_verse: Joseph bought a linen cloth and took the body down from the cross. He had it wrapped in the cloth, and he put it in a tomb that had been cut into solid rock. Then he rolled a big stone against the entrance to the tomb.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyosɛfʋ mʋ yɔbɔ liŋe a kaŋ mʋ we ʋ, a kpa ʋ hogo. Ʋ kana ʋ mʋ hogo bʋwa ba aa lurigo dabʋyɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ aŋ biliŋsi dabʋbal a tɔ bʋwa hʋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene and Mary the mother of Joseph were watching and saw where the body was placed.
translation_verse: Mɛɛrɩ Magidalina abee Gyoose nɩɩna Mɛɛrɩ gyɩ we doŋ a na lee hʋ ba aa kpaa ʋ hogo.

english_verse: Later, Jesus appeared in another form to two disciples, as they were on their way out of the city.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ, baala balɩya sii lɩɩ kpa ŋmanɩɩ a kɩ mʋ tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ. Ba aa mʋʋ dɩ Yesu bɩrɩma, a bɩl bɩ kɩɩ ʋ fa aa kɩɩ gɛɛ, a kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ ko daga ba.

english_verse: Then the disciples left and preached everywhere. The Lord was with them, and the miracles they worked proved that their message was true. ANOTHER OLD ENDING TO MARK'S GOSPEL
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ sii lɩɩ a mʋ lee kɛ buloŋ a kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya. Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ pɛ ba tɩyaŋ ba mʋ a kɩ yaa wɩmagɩla, dɩ nala gyɩma anɩɩ wɩya hʋ ba aa basɩ hʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Amɩ.

english_verse: Very early on Sunday morning, just as the sun was coming up, they went to the tomb.
translation_verse: Alahadi kyɛɛ kyɩkyʋwala, wɩɩsɩ aa pɔsɔ ko kɩ gyɩŋ gɛɛ, ba sii mʋ Yesu bʋwa hʋ lee.

english_verse: On their way, they were asking one another, “Who will roll the stone away from the entrance for us?”
translation_verse: Ba aa mʋʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ba kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Aŋnɛ rɛ sɩ wuwo biliŋsi dabʋyɩ hʋ ta bʋwa hʋ nyʋwa?”

english_verse: But when they looked, they saw that the stone had already been rolled away. And it was a huge stone!
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba mʋ kpaga bʋwa hʋ lee dɩ ba naa dabʋyɩ hʋ suro bʋwa hʋ nyʋwa, a biliŋsi mʋ pɩŋ. Dabʋyɩ hʋ fa yʋga rɛ weliŋ.

english_verse: The women went into the tomb, and on the right side they saw a young man in a white robe sitting there. They were alarmed.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba mʋ gyʋʋ bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ, a na bapʋwasɩbiye dɩ ʋ hɔŋ bʋwa hʋ noduu tɩyaŋ a laalɩ gapʋlʋŋ dolii. Ba hirigi.

english_verse: Now go and tell his disciples, and especially Peter, that he will go ahead of you to Galilee. You will see him there, just as he told you.”
translation_verse: Ma mʋ basɩ tɩya Piita abee Yesu hatɩnna hʋ anɩɩ ʋ sɩ laa ma sɩya a mʋ Galili. Dɩ mamaa rɛ mʋʋ doŋ, ma sɩ na ʋ doŋ anɩɩ ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ tɩya ma.”

english_verse: They will handle snakes and will drink poison and not be hurt. They will also heal sick people by placing their hands on them. Jesus Returns to Heaven (Luke
translation_verse: Ba sɩ wuwo kɩ kol dʋma, a nyʋwa daaluliye aa kpʋ nala, ka ʋ bɩ sɩ yaa ba wɩɩ buloŋ. Ba sɩ wuwo kpa ba nosi a dɔbɔ wɩɩla tɩmma tɩyaŋ dɩ ba deye.”

english_verse: But when these disciples told what had happened, the others would not believe either. What Jesus' Followers Must Do (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba mɩɩgɩ ko basɩ tɩya Yesu hatɩnna nɩkaalɩya hʋ wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa. Amɛ ba bɩ laa di. Yesu kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ ko daga ʋ hatɩnna fi bee kɩdɩgɩ hʋ Matiwu

english_verse: After the Lord Jesus had said these things to the disciples, he was taken back up to heaven where he sat down at the right side of God.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu a basɩ wɩya no teŋ, Wɩɩsɩ kpa ʋ a kaŋ mʋ wɩɩsɩbee, ʋ hɔŋ Wɩɩsɩ noduu logiŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Afterwards, Jesus appeared to his eleven disciples as they were eating. He scolded them because they were too stubborn to believe the ones who had seen him after he had been raised to life.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu hatɩnna fi abee kɩdɩgɩ hʋ hɔŋ kɩ di kɩna. Ba aa di kɩna hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, dɩ Yesu rɛ gɛɛ. Ʋ nɔsɩ ba akuu ba aa bɩ laa ʋ di wɩya, abee ba bembiye aa deye wɩya, beewɩya ba bɩ laa nala hʋ mɛ a baa ba na ʋ dɩ ʋ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ di.

english_verse: Then he told them: Go and preach the good news to everyone in the world.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma mʋ dʋnɩya logiŋ kɛ buloŋ a basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya nal kɛ buloŋ.

english_verse: Everyone who believes me will be able to do wonderful things. By using my name they will force out demons, and they will speak new languages.
translation_verse: Wɩmagɩla no rɛ ma sɩ na a gyɩŋ nala hʋ aa laa ŋ wɩya di. Ba aa rɛ nyɛ. Ba sɩ wuwo kɩ kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ ŋ dee tɩyaŋ. Ba sɩ wuwo kɩ basɩ taadʋŋsɩ mɛ.

english_verse: So I made a careful study of everything and then decided to write and tell you exactly what took place. Honorable Theophilus,
translation_verse: Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, ŋ gyegile nɩɩ wɩya no buloŋ weliŋ nɛ, a gʋnnɩ ba buloŋ mɛ weliŋ a lɩɩ ba piilii tɩyaŋ buloŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ naa anɩɩ ʋ yaa wɩwelii rɛ dɩ ŋ sabɩ wɩya no buloŋ aa vala gɛɛ a tɩya ɩ.

english_verse: I have done this to let you know the truth about what you have heard. An Angel Tells about the Birth of John
translation_verse: Ŋ sabɩ kɩ tɩya ɩ rɛ dɩ ɩ gyɩma anɩɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ba aa daga ɩ hʋ kɔnɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ba basɩ Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ lʋlɩɩ wɩya

english_verse: Both of them were good people and pleased the Lord God by obeying all that he had commanded.
translation_verse: Zakarɩya bee ʋ haaŋ buloŋ gyɩ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ba buloŋ balɩya gyɩ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa rɛ weliŋ.

english_verse: But they did not have children. Elizabeth could not have any, and both Zechariah and Elizabeth were already old.
translation_verse: Ɛlizabɛtɩ gyɩ yaa hapɩrɩ rɛ, a bɩ lʋl biye buloŋ, aŋka ʋ bee ʋ bala Zakarɩya buloŋ gyɩ hɩyasɩ.

english_verse: All at once an angel from the Lord appeared to Zechariah at the right side of the altar.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ Zakarɩya gyɩ aa nyɔgɔ wɩsɩnaaŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ dɩ malɩka ko sɩŋ kogu hʋ noduu logiŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Zechariah was confused and afraid when he saw the angel.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa naa malɩka hʋ kambɩŋ kana ʋ, ʋ kɩ kyele.

english_verse: But the angel told him: Don't be afraid, Zechariah! God has heard your prayers. Your wife Elizabeth will have a son, and you must name him John.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ malɩka hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Zakarɩya, ta leŋ dɩ kambɩŋ kana ɩ. Wɩɩ hʋ ɩ aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ kyɛ, Wɩɩsɩ laa ɩ sʋlɩɩ rɛ. Ɩ haaŋ Ɛlizabɛtɩ sɩ lʋl boyoŋbiye. Ɩ sɩ we ʋ feŋ Gyɔɔŋ.

english_verse: His birth will make you very happy, and many people will be glad.
translation_verse: Ɩ teŋ sɩ fɩyɛlɩ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, dɩ nɩgyamaa tenni mɛ fɩyɛlɩ, ʋ lʋlɩɩ wɩya.

english_verse: Your son will be a great servant of the Lord. He must never drink wine or beer, and the power of the Holy Spirit will be with him from the time he is born.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩ yaa nɩbal Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ʋ bɩ sɩ kɩ nyʋwa sɩduwo koo sɩŋ buloŋ aa wiye. Dɩ ba ko lʋla ʋ, Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ sɩ we ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ weliŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: John will lead many people in Israel to turn back to the Lord their God.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩ leŋ dɩ Iziral tɩmma yʋga bɩl mɩɩgɩ ko kɩ tɩŋ ba Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: He will go ahead of the Lord with the same power and spirit that Elijah had. And because of John, parents will be more thoughtful of their children. And people who now disobey God will begin to think as they ought to. This is how John will get people ready for the Lord.
translation_verse: Biye no sɩ laa á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya ko, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩya ʋ dee anɩɩ ʋ gyɩ aa tɩya ʋ tɩŋdaal Ɛlaagya dee gɛɛ. Ʋ sɩ leŋ dɩ biisi abee ba kuwoma mɩɩgɩ sʋma. Ʋ mɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ nala hʋ aa bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa bɩrɩmɩ ba hakɩllɩ a kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ, a leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ nala marɩ ba tɩsɩ a yaa siri pɔ ba Tɩɩna koyi.”

english_verse: Zechariah said to the angel, “How will I know this is going to happen? My wife and I are both very old.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Zakarɩya pɩyɛsɩ malɩka hʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ sɩ yaa a gyɩma anɩɩ wɩya hʋ ɩ aa basɩ kɔnɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ? Beewɩya ŋ hɩyasa rɛ, ŋ haaŋ mɛ hɩyasɩ.”

english_verse: The angel answered, “I am Gabriel, God's servant, and I was sent to tell you this good news.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ malɩka hʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ feŋ nɛ yaa Geebiral. Ŋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ. Ʋ rɛ tɩma ŋ dɩ ŋ ko basɩ wɩweliye no a tɩya ɩ.

english_verse: You have not believed what I have said. So you will not be able to say a thing until all this happens. But everything will take place when it is supposed to.”
translation_verse: Wɩya no ŋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ɩ kɔnɩ sɩ ko yaa, amɛ ɩ aa bɩ laa di nyɛ, ɩ bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo basɩ wɩya a lɩɩ gyɩnaŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ kyɛɛ hʋ wɩya no aa sɩ yaa.”

english_verse: When he did come out, he could not speak, and they knew he had seen a vision. He motioned to them with his hands, but did not say a thing.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ malɩka hʋ kpa mʋ, aŋka Zakarɩya ko lɩɩ gyaŋwuwo nala hʋ lee. Ʋ gyɩ aa ko lɩɩ, ʋ bɩl bɩ wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩya. Nosi rɛ ʋ gyɩ kaŋ kɩ basɩ wɩya ba lee. Doŋ nɛ ba gyɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ aa bɩ wuwo kɩ basɩ nyɛ, ʋ naa wɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ Wɩɩsɩ kyʋwalɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When Zechariah's time of service in the temple was over, he went home.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Zakarɩya tʋma ko teŋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ dɩya.

english_verse: Soon after this, his wife was expecting a baby, and for five months she did not leave the house. She said to herself,
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ bɩ pɩɩsa, ka ʋ haaŋ Ɛlizabɛtɩ kaŋ luwol. Ʋ gyɩ aa kaŋ luwol hʋ gɛɛ, ʋ gyɩ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ faŋa dɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ peŋsi bɔnɔŋ dɩ ʋ bɩ lɩɩ bee.

english_verse: “What the Lord has done for me will keep people from looking down on me.” An Angel Tells about the Birth of Jesus
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ baa, “Wɩɩsɩ pɩɩsa, ka lagɩlagɩ no ʋ kyiyeli ŋ nyɛ. Ʋ tɔɔ ŋ hɩɩsɩ rɛ dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ.” Ba basɩ Yesu lʋlɩɩ wɩya

english_verse: One month later God sent the angel Gabriel to the town of Nazareth in Galilee
translation_verse: Ɛlizabɛtɩ aa kaŋ luwol hʋ, ʋ peŋsi badʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ malɩka Geebiral dɩ ʋ mʋ Nazarɛti aa we Galili paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: The angel greeted Mary and said, “You are truly blessed! The Lord is with you.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ malɩka hʋ ko ʋ lee a kyʋwalɩ ʋ, a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ fɩyɛlʋʋ we ɩ lee! Wɩɩsɩ we ɩ lee rɛ, aŋ pɛ ɩ tɩyaŋ mɛ weliŋ.”

english_verse: Mary was confused by the angel's words and wondered what they meant.
translation_verse: Mɛɛrɩ aa nɩɩ wɩɩ no malɩka hʋ aa basa tɩya ʋ, wɩɩ hʋ kegimi ʋ. Ʋ kɩ bɩɩnɩ wɩɩ hʋ memii.

english_verse: Then the angel told Mary, “Don't be afraid! God is pleased with you,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ malɩka hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Mɛɛrɩ, Wɩɩsɩ kyo ɩ wɩya rɛ, ta leŋ dɩ kambɩŋ kana ɩ.

english_verse: and you will have a son. His name will be Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɩ sɩ kaŋ luwol a lʋl boyoŋbiye, a we ʋ feŋ Yesu.

english_verse: He will be great and will be called the Son of God Most High. The Lord God will make him king, as his ancestor David was.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩ sii yaa nɩbal, dɩ ba kana ʋ kɩ yɩrɩ Wɩɩbal hʋ Biye. Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ di koro anɩɩ ʋ naabaa Deviti gyɩ aa dii koro gɛɛ.

english_verse: He will rule the people of Israel forever, and his kingdom will never end.”
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩ di koro Gyeekɔbɩ doho nala tɩyaŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ. Ʋ koro hʋ bɩ sɩ teŋ maakyiye kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ.”

english_verse: Mary asked the angel, “How can this happen? I am not even married!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Mɛɛrɩ basɩ tɩya malɩka hʋ a baa, “Ŋ ha bɩ gyɩŋ baal, ɛɛ rɛ wɩɩ no sɩ yaa, a wuwo yaa?”

english_verse: The angel answered, “The Holy Spirit will come down to you, and God's power will come over you. So your child will be called the holy Son of God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ malɩka hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ sɩ ko gyʋʋ ɩ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ɩ kaŋ luwol Wɩɩsɩ dee tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, biye hʋ ɩ aa sɩ lʋla, ʋ sɩ yaa Tɩpʋlʋŋ Tɩɩna dɩ ba kana ʋ kɩ yɩrɩ Wɩɩsɩ Biye.

english_verse: Your relative Elizabeth is also going to have a son, even though she is old. No one thought she could ever have a baby, but in three months she will have a son.
translation_verse: Na ɩ lʋllɩ Ɛlizabɛtɩ aa hɩyasa gɛɛ. Ba kɩ basɩ anɩɩ ʋ yaa hapɩrɩ rɛ, amɛ ʋ yaŋ aa kaŋ luwol, ʋ peŋsi badʋ rɛ nyɛ.

english_verse: Nothing is impossible for God!”
translation_verse: Beewɩya wɩɩ buloŋ tuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa.”

english_verse: Mary said, “I am the Lord's servant! Let it happen as you have said.” And the angel left her. Mary Visits Elizabeth
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Mɛɛrɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ rɛ. Wɩya hʋ buloŋ ɩ aa basɩ tɩya ŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ba yaa wɩtɩɩ.” Ɛɛ rɛ malɩka hʋ leme ʋ, aŋ mʋ. Mɛɛrɩ mʋʋ dɩ ʋ na Ɛlizabɛtɩ

english_verse: A short time later Mary hurried to a town in the hill country of Judea.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Mɛɛrɩ sii lagɩ lagɩ, a kpa mʋ Ɛlizabɛtɩ bee aa we Gyudɩya paalʋʋ dogiŋsi hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ na ʋ.

english_verse: She went into Zechariah's home, where she greeted Elizabeth.
translation_verse: Mɛɛrɩ aa mʋʋ pele doŋ, ʋ mʋ gyʋʋ Zakarɩya dɩya a mʋ kyʋwalɩ ʋ haaŋ Ɛlizabɛtɩ.

english_verse: When Elizabeth heard Mary's greeting, her baby moved within her. The Holy Spirit came upon Elizabeth.
translation_verse: Ɛlizabɛtɩ aa nɩɩ Mɛɛrɩ kyʋwala hʋ, biye hʋ aa we ʋ luwol tɩyaŋ sii lugisi. Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ ko gyʋʋ Ɛlizabɛtɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Then in a loud voice she said to Mary: God has blessed you more than any other woman! He has also blessed the child you will have.
translation_verse: Ʋ heeli basɩ tɩya Mɛɛrɩ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ kyiyeli ɩ rɛ a te haana buloŋ, a kyiyeli biye hʋ mɛ ɩ aa sɩ lʋla.

english_verse: As soon as I heard your greeting, my baby became happy and moved within me.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa laa ɩ kyʋwala hʋ gɛɛ, biye hʋ aa we ŋ luwol tɩyaŋ teŋ mɛ fɩyɛla rɛ, ʋ sii lugusi.

english_verse: The Lord has blessed you because you believed that he will keep his promise. Mary's Song of Praise
translation_verse: Ɩ yaa nyusʋŋtɩɩna rɛ ɩ aa laa di anɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa basɩ tɩya ɩ sɩ kɔnɩ yaa.” Mɛɛrɩ yɩɩ yɩɩl a dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ

english_verse: Mary said: With all my heart I praise the Lord,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Mɛɛrɩ yɩɩ yɩɩl a baa, “Ŋ teŋ fɩyɛla rɛ yʋga, ŋ kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: and I am glad because of God my Savior.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa ŋ Laataal. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ.

english_verse: God cares for me, his humble servant. From now on, all people will say God has blessed me.
translation_verse: Ŋ yaa ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩbiye rɛ, ka ʋ liisi ŋ wɩya. A lɩɩ gyɩnaŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ, nal buloŋ sɩ kana ŋ kɩ yɩrɩ nyusʋŋtɩɩna.

english_verse: God All-Powerful has done great things for me, and his name is holy.
translation_verse: Akuu wɩbal no Wɩɩbal hʋ aa yaa tɩya ŋ wɩya. Ʋ yaa Tɩpʋlʋŋ Tɩɩna rɛ.

english_verse: He always shows mercy to everyone who worships him.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa fá Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ mɛ aa fá ba sikii rɛ, nihuwobiŋ doho kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The Lord has used his powerful arm to scatter those who are proud.
translation_verse: Ʋ gaŋdaa-noŋ hʋ rɛ ʋ kaŋ tannɩ, a ŋmaa babiibala abee ba tɩbɩɩna buloŋ pɩsa.

english_verse: God drags strong rulers from their thrones and puts humble people in places of power.
translation_verse: Ʋ kile kuworibala rɛ ba kuworikpasɩnɩ nyuni tɩyaŋ, aŋ mɩɩgɩ leŋ nɩbiisi laa doŋma hɔŋ.

english_verse: God gives the hungry good things to eat, and sends the rich away with nothing.
translation_verse: Ʋ kpa kɩweliye rɛ a tɩya nyaaba aŋ kile kɩna tɩmma ta abee nohɩllɩ.

english_verse: The Lord made this promise to our ancestors, to Abraham and his family forever!
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ fá Abɩraham sikii rɛ. Ʋ yaŋ sɩ fá ʋ doho nala buloŋ mɛ sikii a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ.”

english_verse: Mary stayed with Elizabeth about three months. Then she went back home. The Birth of John the Baptist
translation_verse: Mɛɛrɩ gyɩ hɔŋ Ɛlizabɛtɩ lee rɛ peŋsi boto, aŋ na mɩɩgɩ mʋ bee. Ba lʋl Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ

english_verse: When Elizabeth's son was born,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Ɛlizabɛtɩ lʋl ko pele. Ʋ lʋla boyoŋbiye.

english_verse: her neighbors and relatives heard how kind the Lord had been to her, and they too were glad.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa lʋla gɛɛ, ʋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ abee ʋ lʋlla buloŋ nɩɩ gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa fáá ʋ sikii. Ba tenni buloŋ gyɩ fɩyɛlɩ, ba beel-ʋ buloŋ kɩ dɩyɛsɩ.

english_verse: Eight days later they did for the child what the Law of Moses commands. They were going to name him Zechariah, after his father.
translation_verse: Biye hʋ gyɩ aa ko pele kyɛyɛ kyori, ba ko dɩ ba keri ʋ peŋ aŋ we ʋ feŋ. Ba gyɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ba kpa ʋ kuwo Zakarɩya feŋ nɛ a tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: But Elizabeth said, “No! His name is John.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ naa bɩ laa nyʋwa aŋ baa dɩ ba we ʋ feŋ Gyɔɔŋ.

english_verse: The people argued, “No one in your family has ever been named John.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ tɩya ʋ anɩɩ ba doho nal buloŋ ha bɩ maakyiye di Gyɔɔŋ.

english_verse: So they motioned to Zechariah to find out what he wanted to name his son.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba kaŋ nosi pɩyɛsɩ ʋ kuwo dɩ feŋbee rɛ ʋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ we biye hʋ.

english_verse: Zechariah asked for a writing tablet. Then he wrote, “His name is John.” Everyone was amazed.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Zakarɩya leŋ ba kpa daaparɩ ko tɩya ʋ, ʋ sabɩ biye hʋ feŋ we a baa dɩ ʋ feŋ nɛ yaa Gyɔɔŋ. Ba na feŋ hʋ, ʋ yaa ba wɩkperii.

english_verse: At once, Zechariah started speaking and praising God.
translation_verse: Haŋ lagɩlagɩbiye hʋ, Zakarɩya bɩl piili a kɩ basɩ wɩya a kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: All the neighbors were frightened because of what had happened, and everywhere in the hill country people kept talking about these things.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ fa aa we doŋ a naa wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa, ʋ yaa ba kambɩŋ. Ba kaŋ wɩɩ hʋ lɩɩ a basɩ taalɩ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ logiŋ hʋ aa kaŋ dogiŋsi hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: Everyone who heard about this wondered what this child would grow up to be. They knew the Lord was with him. Zechariah Praises the Lord
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa nɩɩ gɛɛ, ba kaŋ wɩɩ hʋ kɩ bɩɩnɩ ba tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ a kɩ basɩ, “Biye no yaŋ sɩ yaa nɩgɛɛ doho rɛ nyɛ?” Ba naa anɩɩ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ dee we ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba kɩ basɩ gɛɛ. Zakarɩya dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ

english_verse: Praise the Lord, the God of Israel! He has come to save his people.
translation_verse: “Ma leŋ dɩ á dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ, Wɩɩsɩ hʋ Iziral tɩmma aa tɩŋ. Beewɩya, ʋ ko dɩ ʋ pɛ ʋ nala tɩyaŋ nɛ a laa ba ta.

english_verse: Our God has given us a mighty Savior from the family of David his servant.
translation_verse: Ʋ lɩɩ niduwo rɛ ʋ ko, dɩ ʋ laa ma ta. Nal no lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ Deviti doho nala tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Long ago the Lord promised by the words of his holy prophets
translation_verse: Faafaa buloŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaala tɩyaŋ, a basɩ tɩya ma

english_verse: to save us from our enemies and from everyone who hates us.
translation_verse: anɩɩ ʋ sɩ laa ma ta á dɔmɔ abee nala hʋ buloŋ aa haasɩ ma nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: by being holy and good as long as we live.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ á sɩ wuwo yaa nɩtɩɩma, a kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ á mɩɩbol buloŋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: You, my son, will be called the prophet of God Most High. You will go ahead of the Lord to get everything ready for him.
translation_verse: Zakarɩya gyɩ aa basɩ wɩya no ko teŋ, ʋ mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ biye hʋ mɛ a baa, “Ŋ biye, ɩ sɩ yaa Wɩɩbal hʋ tɩŋdaal Ɩ sɩ laa á Tɩɩna sɩya mʋ, a marɩ ʋ ŋmanɩɩ bin-ʋ.

english_verse: You will tell his people that they can be saved when their sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Ɩ sɩ basɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ nala anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa ba wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ba aŋ laa ba ta.

english_verse: God's love and kindness will shine upon us like the sun that rises in the sky.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ bɔnyɛ rɛ, a kɩ fá nala sikii mɛ. Ʋ sɩ laa ma ta, a leŋ dɩ á hɔŋ pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: On us who live in the dark shadow of death this light will shine to guide us into a life of peace.
translation_verse: Pʋlʋŋ no sɩ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee, a kyaanɩ we nala hʋ buloŋ aa we bilhuu tɩyaŋ, ka sʋʋ wɩya yaa ba beŋkyekpa. Ʋ sɩ daga ma ŋmanɩɩ hʋ aa kaŋ fɩyɛlʋʋ dɩ á kɩ tɩŋa.”

english_verse: As John grew up, God's Spirit gave him great power. John lived in the desert until the time he was sent to the people of Israel.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ biye hʋ sii waa abee dee, a kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ mɛ. Biye no gyɩ sii mʋ we pogo tɩyaŋ nɛ, a mʋ pele kyɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa piile kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya Iziral nala buloŋ na ʋ.

english_verse: At this time a man named Simeon was living in Jerusalem. Simeon was a good man. He loved God and was waiting for him to save the people of Israel. God's Spirit came to him
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ gyɩ we Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ ba kɩ yɩrɩ Simiyɔŋ. Ʋ fa yaa nɩtɩɩ rɛ a kɩ fá Wɩɩsɩ, aŋ fa kɩ gyegili dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa Iziral tɩmma ta.

english_verse: Everyone had to go to their own hometown to be listed.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nal buloŋ mʋ ʋ bee dɩ ba dɩɩsɩ ʋ doŋ.

english_verse: So Joseph had to leave Nazareth in Galilee and go to Bethlehem in Judea. Long ago Bethlehem had been King David's hometown, and Joseph went there because he was from David's family.
translation_verse: Gyosɛfʋ mɛ gyɩ sii lɩɩ Nazarɛti aa we Galili paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a mʋ Bɛtɩlɛhɛm aa we Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Bɛtɩlɛhɛm nɛ Gyosɛfʋ naabaa Kuworo Deviti gyɩ lɩɩ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ gyɩ mʋ doŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Mary was engaged to Joseph and traveled with him to Bethlehem. She was soon going to have a baby,
translation_verse: Ʋ bee Mɛɛrɩ buloŋ nɛ gyɩ mʋwa dɩ ba dɩɩsɩ ba doŋ, beewɩya ba gyɩ wee nyʋwa tɩya dɔmɔŋ nɛ, nal buloŋ gyɩma, anɩɩ ba sɩ yal dɔmɔŋ. Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Mɛɛrɩ gyɩ kaŋ luwol hʋ rɛ.

english_verse: she gave birth to her first-born son. She dressed him in baby clothes and laid him on a bed of hay, because there was no room for them in the inn. The Shepherds
translation_verse: amɛ ba gyɩ bɩ naa lee dɩ ba gyʋʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba gyɩ mʋ gyʋʋ gyadɩya kɩdɩgɩ. Doŋ nɛ Mɛɛrɩ gyɩ lʋl ʋ hatobiye, ʋ yaa boyoŋbiye. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kaŋ gakɔsʋŋsɩ bɔ tɔ ʋ, a kpa ʋ biŋ gya-ɔhɔ nyuu tɩyaŋ. Malɩkasɩ basɩ Yesu lʋlɩɩ wɩya tɩya pedaala

english_verse: That night in the fields near Bethlehem some shepherds were guarding their sheep.
translation_verse: Haŋ saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ pedaala badɔmɔŋ mɛ gyɩ we paalʋʋ hʋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ, a kyʋwa ɔhɔ tɩyaŋ, a kɩ deŋ ba piyese.

english_verse: All at once an angel came down to them from the Lord, and the brightness of the Lord's glory flashed around them. The shepherds were frightened.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ malɩka kɩdɩgɩ ko ba lee. Ʋ aa ko gɛɛ, Wɩɩsɩ pʋlʋŋ kyaanɩ we ba tɩyaŋ. Kambɩŋ gyɩ kaŋ ba, ba nyuni gyɩ ŋmala ŋmala.

english_verse: This very day in King David's hometown a Savior was born for you. He is Christ the Lord.
translation_verse: Gyɩnaŋ ba lʋl ma Laataal lɛ Bɛtɩlɛhɛm tɩyaŋ, ba kɩ yɩrɩ ʋ á Tɩɩna Krisita, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya dɩ ʋ laa ʋ nala ta.

english_verse: You will know who he is, because you will find him dressed in baby clothes and lying on a bed of hay.”
translation_verse: Dɩ ma ko mʋ, nyɛ rɛ ma sɩ kpa gyɩma ʋ. Ma sɩ na biye dɩ ba kaŋ gakɔsʋŋsɩ bɔ tɔ ʋ, a kpa ʋ biŋ gya-ɔhɔ nyuu tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Suddenly many other angels came down from heaven and joined in praising God. They said:
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ malɩkasɩ yʋga pirigi ko lɩɩ, a pɛ malɩka hʋ tɩyaŋ, ba yɩɩ yɩɩla a kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ a baa,

english_verse: “Praise God in heaven! Peace on earth to everyone who pleases God.”
translation_verse: “Ma leŋ dɩ á dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ nikyooliye mɛ aa we taŋha nyuu tɩyaŋ sɩ na fɩyɛlʋʋ.”

english_verse: After the angels had left and gone back to heaven, the shepherds said to each other, “Let's go to Bethlehem and see what the Lord has told us about.”
translation_verse: Malɩkasɩ hʋ aa mɩɩgɩ mʋ wɩɩsɩbee ko teŋ, pedaala hʋ basɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Ma leŋ dɩ á mʋ Bɛtɩlɛhɛm, a na wɩɩ hʋ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ aa leŋ ʋ malɩkasɩ hʋ ko basɩ tɩya ma.”

english_verse: They hurried off and found Mary and Joseph, and they saw the baby lying on a bed of hay.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ ba sii fá lagɩ lagɩ, a mʋ na Mɛɛrɩ abee Gyosɛfʋ, aŋ na biye hʋ mɛ dɩ ʋ pɩŋ gya-ɔhɔ nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When the shepherds saw Jesus, they told his parents what the angel had said about him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ pedaala hʋ basɩ tɩya biye hʋ nɩɩna abee ʋ kuwo wɩya hʋ malɩka hʋ aa basɩ tɩya ba a mʋ kɩ tile biye hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But Mary kept thinking about all this and wondering what it meant.
translation_verse: Ka Mɛɛrɩ kɛ laa wɩya hʋ buloŋ a we ʋ hakɩla tɩyaŋ a kaŋ kɩ bɩɩnɩ.

english_verse: As the shepherds returned to their sheep, they were praising God and saying wonderful things about him. Everything they had seen and heard was just as the angel had said.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ pedaala hʋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ ba pedaa. Ba aa mʋʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba yɩɩ yɩɩla a kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ, beewɩya wɩya hʋ buloŋ malɩka hʋ aa basɩ tɩya ba, ba kɔnɩ naa ba rɛ. Ba wee Yesu feŋ

english_verse: Eight days later Jesus' parents did for him what the Law of Moses commands. And they named him Jesus, just as the angel had told Mary when he promised she would have a baby. Simeon Praises the Lord
translation_verse: Biye hʋ gyɩ aa ko pele kyɛyɛ kyori, ba keri ʋ peŋ aŋ we ʋ feŋ Yesu. Feŋ no rɛ malɩka hʋ gyɩ daga tɩya Mɛɛrɩ ka ʋ na kaŋ luwol hʋ. Ba kaŋ Yesu mʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ

english_verse: The time came for Mary and Joseph to do what the Law of Moses says a mother is supposed to do after her baby is born. They took Jesus to the temple in Jerusalem and presented him to the Lord,
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ gyɩ aa ko pele dɩ Mɛɛrɩ bee Gyosɛfʋ pɩɩsɩ ba bisiŋ ta anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi fa aa saba aa daga gɛɛ, ba sii kaŋ biye hʋ mɛ pɛ mʋ Gyerusalɛm dɩ ba kpa ʋ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ, beewɩya ba saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa,

english_verse: just as the Law of the Lord says, “Each first-born baby boy belongs to the Lord.”
translation_verse: “Dɩ baal bee ʋ haaŋ nɛ ko lʋl ba biibuŋbuŋ, dɩ ʋ rɛ ko yaa boyoŋbiye, ʋ maga dɩ ba kpa ʋ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: The Law of the Lord also says parents have to offer a sacrifice, giving at least a pair of doves or two young pigeons. So that is what Mary and Joseph did.
translation_verse: Ba bɩl saba rɛ anɩɩ ʋ maga dɩ ba kpa kokosi balɩya mɛ rɛ a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ Gyosɛfʋ bee Mɛɛrɩ sii mʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ dɩ ba yaa wɩya no.

english_verse: When Mary and Joseph brought Jesus to the temple to do what the Law of Moses says should be done for a new baby, the Spirit told Simeon to go into the temple.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kuwo abee ʋ naa mʋ gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ dɩ ba kpa Yesu tɩya Wɩɩsɩ aŋ pɛ yaa gɛɛ hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ aa daga. Haŋ saŋa hʋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ kaŋ Simiyɔŋ mɛ ko gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ.

english_verse: Simeon took the baby Jesus in his arms and praised God,
translation_verse: Simiyɔŋ na biye hʋ, a laa ʋ we ʋ nosi tɩyaŋ aŋ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ a baa,

english_verse: “Lord, I am your servant, and now I can die in peace, because you have kept your promise to me.
translation_verse: “Ŋ Tɩɩna, ɩ aa wee nyʋwa a baa ɩ sɩ yaa wɩɩ hʋ, ɩ kɔnɩ yaa ʋ rɛ. Nyɛ kɛ, leŋ dɩ mɩyaŋ ɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ sʋba a mʋ bee laaŋfɩya.

english_verse: With my own eyes I have seen what you have done to save your people,
translation_verse: Ŋ kɔnɩ naa nal hʋ aa ko dɩ ʋ laa dʋnɩya nala ta rɛ abee ŋ sɩɩ.

english_verse: and foreign nations will also see this.
translation_verse: Ɩ tɩma ʋ rɛ ʋ ko dɩ nal buloŋ na ʋ.

english_verse: Your mighty power is a light for all nations, and it will bring honor to your people Israel.”
translation_verse: Biye no sɩ yaa pʋlʋŋ a daga nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma ɩ ŋmanɩɩ, ka dɩ ɩ nala Iziral tɩmma mɛ na feŋ.”

english_verse: and you, Mary, will suffer as though you had been stabbed by a dagger. But all this will show what people are really thinking.” Anna Speaks about the Child Jesus
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya Mɛɛrɩ a baa, “Ɩ tɩɩ tɩya mɛ sɩ kyogi rɛ weliŋ ɩ biye no wɩya, a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ba aa kpaa takoobii kyɔgɔ ɩ.”

english_verse: The prophet Anna was also there in the temple. She was the daughter of Phanuel from the tribe of Asher, and she was very old. In her youth she had been married for seven years, but her husband died.
translation_verse: Hanɩhɩyawʋ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ rɛ gyɩ we doŋ, ba kɩ yɩrɩ Ana. Ʋ gyɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ. Ʋ kuwo feŋ nɛ gyɩ yaa Fanuwɛl, a lɩɩ Asa doho tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: At this time Anna came in and praised God. She spoke about the child Jesus to everyone who hoped for Jerusalem to be set free. The Return to Nazareth
translation_verse: Simiyɔŋ fa aa basɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya Mɛɛrɩ tɩyaŋ, dɩ Ana mɛ rɛ ko gyʋʋ gɛɛ. Ʋ aa naa biye hʋ, ʋ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋ basɩ ʋ wɩya tɩya nala hʋ buloŋ fa aa gyegili dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa Iziral tɩmma ta. Yesu bee ʋ kuwo abee ʋ naa mɩɩgɩ mʋ Nazarɛti

english_verse: After Joseph and Mary had done everything that the Law of the Lord commands, they returned home to Nazareth in Galilee.
translation_verse: Gyosɛfʋ bee Mɛɛrɩ aa yaa wɩya hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ aa daga dɩ ba yaa Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ ko teŋ, ba mɩɩgɩ mʋ ba bee Nazarɛti aa we Galili paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The child Jesus grew. He became strong and wise, and God blessed him. The Boy Jesus in the Temple
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Biye hʋ sii waa weliŋ, a kaŋ dee abee wɩgyʋŋ, ka Wɩɩsɩ noŋ mɛ dɔbɔ ʋ tɩyaŋ saŋa buloŋ. Yesu we Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ

english_verse: Every year Jesus' parents went to Jerusalem for Passover.
translation_verse: Bɩna kɛ buloŋ Yesu kuwo abee ʋ naa aa mʋ Gyerusalɛm nɛ a di Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ.

english_verse: And when Jesus was twelve years old, they all went there as usual for the celebration.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ aa ko yaa bɩsɩ fi abee balɩya, ʋ bee ʋ kuwo bee ʋ naa mʋ Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ, anɩɩ ba aa kɩ yaa gɛɛ bɩna bɩna buloŋ.

english_verse: After Passover his parents left, but they did not know that Jesus had stayed on in the city.
translation_verse: Kyɛbal hʋ wɩkanɩya aa ko teŋ, ba mɩɩgɩ kɩ mʋ bee aŋka Yesu kɛ mɩɩgɩ ka Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ naa bee ʋ kuwo bɩ gyɩma.

english_verse: When they could not find him with their relatives and friends, they went back to Jerusalem and started looking for him there.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba kyɛ ʋ lɔlɔ ba tɩyaŋ, aŋ mɩɩgɩ kile ʋ lugo mʋ Gyerusalɛm, a deŋ kɩ kyɛ ʋ doŋ.

english_verse: Three days later they found Jesus sitting in the temple, listening to the teachers and asking them questions.
translation_verse: Ʋ kyɛtoo kyɛɛ rɛ ba mʋ na ʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ bee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hɔnɔ. Ʋ kɩ gyegili wɩya hʋ ba aa basɩ aŋ pɛ kɩ pɩyɛsɩ ba wɩya mɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who heard him was surprised at how much he knew and at the answers he gave.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa we doŋ a nɩɩ ʋ aa lɩɩ wɩya hʋ sɩya abee wɩgyʋŋ gɛɛ, ba nyʋʋsɩ fɩyɛlɩ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: When his parents found him, they were amazed. His mother said, “Son, why have you done this to us? Your father and I have been very worried, and we have been searching for you!”
translation_verse: Ʋ kuwo bee ʋ naa gyɩ aa ko na ʋ, ba nyʋʋsɩ mɛ gyɩ fɩyɛla rɛ. Doŋ nɛ ʋ naa pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ŋ biye, deŋ na ɩ aa yaa ma gɛɛ! Ŋ bee ɩ kuwo buloŋ gɔllɔ kyɛ ɩ gɛɛ rɛ a mʋ lɔlɔ á buloŋ, haalɩ ɩ wɩya mɩɩgɩ yaa ma beŋkyekpa.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Why did you have to look for me? Didn't you know that I would be in my Father's house?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ ŋ? Ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ maga dɩ ŋ we ŋ Kuwo dɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ?”

english_verse: But they did not understand what he meant.
translation_verse: Amɛ ba fa bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa basɩ tɩya ba memii.

english_verse: Jesus became wise, and he grew strong. God was pleased with him and so were the people.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii waa weliŋ, a kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ mɛ. Wɩɩsɩ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ ʋ tɩyaŋ, nihuwobisi mɛ kyo ʋ wɩya weliŋ.

english_verse: When tax collectors came to be baptized, they asked John, “Teacher, what should we do?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ lampolaala badɔmɔŋ mɛ ko dɩ ʋ fo ba wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ. Ba mɛ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, ɛɛ rɛ á mɛ sɩ yaa?”

english_verse: Do something to show that you really have given up your sins. Don't start saying you belong to Abraham's family. God can turn these stones into children for Abraham.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ ma wɩyaalɩya daga anɩɩ ma bɩrɩma lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, aŋ ta leŋ ma aa yaa Abɩraham doho nala wɩya dʋŋ yaa wɩɩ. Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa wuwo ʋ leŋ bʋwa no ma aa naa nyɛ sii bɩrɩmɩ Abɩraham doho nala rɛ.

english_verse: Everyone became excited and wondered, “Could John be the Messiah?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ fa aa gyegili Krisita hʋ koyi fa piili kɩ bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ Gyɔɔŋ nɛ yaa Krisita hʋ.

english_verse: Then everyone will see the saving power of God.’ ”
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya nala buloŋ sɩ na gɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa laa nala kɩ ta.”’

english_verse: Crowds of people came out to be baptized, but John said to them, “You bunch of snakes! Who warned you to run from the coming judgment?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nɩgyamaa ko lɩɩ Gyɔɔŋ lee dɩ ʋ fo ba wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ. Ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ɛɛdɔŋ dʋma! Ma dawarɩ yʋga ma tɩyaŋ. Kɩbee rɛ mʋrɩ ma anɩɩ wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ no ŋ aa sɩ fo ma dʋŋ sɩ wuwo laa ma ta Wɩɩsɩ sarɩya hʋ kyɛdiilii?

english_verse: The crowds asked John, “What should we do?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ rɛ yaŋ maga dɩ á yaa?”

english_verse: Some soldiers asked him, “And what about us? What do we have to do?” John told them, “Don't force people to pay money to make you leave them alone. Be satisfied with your pay.”
translation_verse: Laalyuwolo badɔmɔŋ mɛ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Aŋka á mɛ, ɛɛ rɛ á mɛ sɩ yaa?” Ʋ basɩ tɩya ba mɛ a baa, “Ma ta fugisi nal buloŋ a laa molbiye, a ta nyɩya wɩya a kɩ tɩya nala mɛ. Ma leŋ dɩ tuno hʋ ma aa laa maga ma.”

english_verse: John said, “I am just baptizing with water. But someone more powerful is going to come, and I am not good enough even to untie his sandals. He will baptize you with the Holy Spirit and with fire.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ basɩ tɩya ba buloŋ a baa, “Nɩɩ dʋŋ nɛ ŋ kɛ kaŋ kɩ fo ma. Amɛ nal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ sɩ ko, ʋ rɛ yaa nɩbal a te ŋ. Ŋ paalɩ bɩ maga dɩ ŋ kpaga ʋ, a kaŋ ʋ naatɔbɔ ŋmasɩ mɛ puri. Ʋ kɛ sɩ kpa Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ abee diŋ a fo ma wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ.

english_verse: Finally, Herod put John in jail, and this was the worst thing he had done. The Baptism of Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Hɛrɔtɩ gyɩ yaŋ aa sɩ marɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ hʋ rɛ yaa, ʋ gyɩ bɩl sii leŋ ba kaŋ Gyɔɔŋ tɔ nɩtɔdɩya tɩyaŋ. Gyɔɔŋ foo Yesu wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ Matiwu

english_verse: Enosh, and Seth. The family of Jesus went all the way back to Adam and then to God.
translation_verse: Kayinaŋ mɛ kuwo feŋ nɛ yaa Inɔsɩ. Inɔsɩ mɛ kuwo feŋ nɛ yaa Sɛɛtɩ. Sɛɛtɩ mɛ kuwo feŋ nɛ yaa Adama. Wɩɩsɩ rɛ ta Adama.

english_verse: The Scriptures say: ‘God will tell his angels to take care of you. They will catch you in their arms, and you will not even hurt your feet on the stones.’ ”
translation_verse: Ba bɩl saba rɛ anɩɩ ‘Ba sɩ kyeŋ kana ɩ dɩ ɩ naaŋ mɛ ta paalɩ dige taŋha.”’

english_verse: After the sun had set, people with all kinds of diseases were brought to Jesus. He put his hands on each one of them and healed them.
translation_verse: Ʋ dɩdaana aa ko pele, nala hʋ buloŋ aa kaŋ kyaŋsɩ ba kaŋ wɩɩla iriŋ iriŋ buloŋ, ba mʋ kaŋ ba ko Yesu lee dɩ ʋ tɩɩbɩ ba. Yesu kpa ʋ nosi dɔbɔ ba kɩdɩgɩ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ ba na laaŋfɩya.

english_verse: The devil said to Jesus, “If you are God's Son, tell this stone to turn into bread.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Sɩtaanɩ ko basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Dɩ ɩ baa ɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye kɛ, leŋ dɩ bʋwa no aa pɩna sii bɩrɩmɩ paanʋʋ.”

english_verse: Then the devil led Jesus up to a high place and quickly showed him all the nations on earth.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, Sɩtaanɩ bɩl kana ʋ kpa gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu, aŋ leŋ ʋ gul lurimi na dʋnɩya paalʋʋsɩ abee ba korisi buloŋ gɛɛ fine.

english_verse: Finally, the devil took Jesus to Jerusalem and had him stand on top of the temple. The devil said, “If you are God's Son, jump off.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Sɩtaanɩ bɩl kana ʋ mʋ Gyerusalɛm, a kana ʋ gyɩŋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ nyugbaŋfara, aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Dɩ ɩ baa ɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye kɛ, sɩŋ daha aŋ gyaa kyigisi taŋha.

english_verse: He taught in the Jewish synagogues, and everyone praised him. The People of Nazareth Turn against Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ ʋ kɩ daga nala Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, nal nal buloŋ kɩ bigisi ʋ. Nazarɛti tɩmma vɩya Yesu Matiwu

english_verse: “The Lord's Spirit has come to me, because he has chosen me to tell the good news to the poor. The Lord has sent me to announce freedom for prisoners, to give sight to the blind, to free everyone who suffers,
translation_verse: “Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ʋ lɩɩ ŋ nɛ dɩ ŋ ko basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya nyaaba. Ʋ tɩma ŋ nɛ dɩ ŋ ko basɩ tɩya yosi anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa ba ta, a bɩl basɩ tɩya nyʋlɩma mɛ dɩ ba sɩya sɩ suri. Ʋ tɩma ŋ nɛ dɩ ŋ laa nala hʋ buloŋ ba aa kaŋ kɩ tɩya sikii ta,

english_verse: and to say, ‘This is the year the Lord has chosen.’ ”
translation_verse: aŋ basɩ tɩya ba anɩɩ saŋa hʋ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ laa ʋ nala ta pele rɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus closed the book, then handed it back to the man in charge and sat down. Everyone in the synagogue looked straight at Jesus.
translation_verse: Yesu aa karɩmɩ teŋ hʋ teŋ, ʋ kaŋ tɔ aŋ kpa tɩya nal hʋ aa biŋ teŋ hʋ aŋ tuu hɔŋ. Nala hʋ buloŋ aa we wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ mɩɩgɩ kyirigi sɩya we ʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: All the people started talking about Jesus and were amazed at the wonderful things he said. They kept on asking, “Isn't he Joseph's son?”
translation_verse: Yesu wɩbasɩɩ hʋ buloŋ gyɩ yaa nala hʋ teŋfɩyɛl lɛ, ba nyʋʋsɩ mɛ gyɩ fɩyɛlɩ abee wɩweliye hʋ ʋ aa basa wɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ ba kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Gyosɛfʋ biibaal hʋ daa nyɛ dʋ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: You will certainly want to tell me this saying, “Doctor, first make yourself well.” You will tell me to do the same things here in my own hometown that you heard I did in Capernaum.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma sɩ maga namaga no tɩya ŋ a baa, ‘Tɩɩba tɩɩna, tɩɩbɩ ɩ tɩɩ.’ Ma bɩl sɩ basɩ tɩya ŋ a baa dɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ma aa nɩya dɩ ŋ aa yaa Kapɛɛnam tɩyaŋ, dɩ ŋ yaa ba ŋ tɩɩ bee tɩyaŋ mɛ.”

english_verse: But you can be sure that no prophets are liked by the people of their own hometown.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal kɛ buloŋ, ʋ bee tɩɩ nala aa bee tɩya ʋ gyɩrɩma.”

english_verse: During the time of the prophet Elisha, many men in Israel had leprosy. But no one was healed, except Naaman who lived in Syria.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Ilaasa mɛ gyɩ aa we ʋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ, gbegisi gyɩ yʋga rɛ a we Iziral paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ bɩ leŋ Ilaasa tɩɩbɩ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ, see gbege kɩdɩgɩ aa lɩɩ Siiriya paalʋʋ ba kɩ yɩrɩ Naamaŋ dʋŋ.”

english_verse: But Jesus slipped through the crowd and got away. A Man with an Evil Spirit (Mark
translation_verse: ka ʋ vala tɩŋ nala hʋ tɩyaŋ a lɩɩ mʋ. Yesu kile gyɩŋbɔŋ ta baal kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ Maakɩ

english_verse: Jesus went to the town of Capernaum in Galilee and taught the people on the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu lɩɩ Nazarɛti tɩyaŋ, a kpa mʋ Kapɛɛnam aa we Galili paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ, ʋ mʋ gyʋʋ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya a kɩ daga nala.

english_verse: There in the synagogue was a man with an evil spirit. He yelled out,
translation_verse: Dɩ baal kɩdɩgɩ gyɩŋbɔŋ aa kana mɛ gyɩ we wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ faasɩ kyɩɩrɩ

english_verse: They all were amazed and kept saying to each other, “What kind of teaching is this? He has power to order evil spirits out of people!”
translation_verse: Ba aa naa gɛɛ, ʋ yaa nal buloŋ wɩkperii. Ɛɛ rɛ ba kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Bekine wɩduwoni rɛ ʋ kɩ basɩ nyɛ? Baal no paalɩ kaŋ dee rɛ, a wuwo gyɩŋbɔmɔ, a nɔsɩ ba ba kɩ lɩɩ nala tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: News about Jesus spread all over that part of the country. Jesus Heals Many People (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu wɩya taalɩ lee hʋ buloŋ. Yesu tɩɩbɩ nala yʋga Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus left the synagogue and went to Simon's home. When Jesus got there, he was told that Simon's mother-in-law was sick with a high fever.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu lɩɩ wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ, a kpa mʋ baal kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Siimɔŋ dɩya. Ʋ mʋwa dɩ Siimɔŋ hɩɩla pɩna a kɩ wɩɩlɩ, ʋ teŋ buloŋ nɩma. Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ ʋ wɩya tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: The next morning Jesus went out to a place where he could be alone, and crowds came looking for him. When they found him, they tried to stop him from leaving.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩnyʋwa, Yesu sii lɩɩ bee hʋ tɩyaŋ, a mʋ lee hʋ nala aa tuwo. Ɛɛ rɛ ka bee hʋ nala piili kɩ kyɛ ʋ. Ba aa ko na ʋ, ba kɩ lʋga dɩ ba kana ʋ biŋ dɩ ʋ ta bɩl mʋʋ lee buloŋ.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “People in other towns must hear the good news about God's kingdom. This is why I was sent.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ʋ maga dɩ ŋ mʋ tɔnɩ badɔmɔŋ mɛ rɛ, a basɩ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ wɩya doŋma mɛ. Beewɩya, ɛɛ wɩya rɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩma ŋ, ŋ ko.”

english_verse: So he kept on preaching in the synagogues in Judea.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ gɔllɩ kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya Gyudɩya paalʋʋ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But Jesus would often go to some place where he could be alone and pray. Jesus Heals a Man Who Could Not Walk (Matthew
translation_verse: Ka Yesu aa sii mʋ lee hʋ nala aa tuwo, a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ. Yesu tɩɩbɩ gbarɩgɩ Matiwu

english_verse: When Jesus saw how much faith they had, he said to the man, “My friend, your sins are forgiven.”
translation_verse: Ba aa yaa gɛɛ rɛ Yesu na anɩɩ ba laa ʋ di rɛ weliŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya gbarɩgɩ hʋ a baa, “Ŋ bagyʋwa, ŋ kpa ɩ wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus got into the boat that belonged to Simon and asked him to row it out a little way from the shore. Then Jesus sat down in the boat to teach the crowd.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mʋ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiborisi hʋ kɩdɩgɩ aa yaa Siimɔŋ kɩŋ, aŋ leŋ ʋ yige ʋ bee boro hʋ we nɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Nyɛ rɛ Yesu hɔŋ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ tɩyaŋ aŋ kɩ daga nɩgyamaa hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: “Master,” Simon answered, “we have worked hard all night long and have not caught a thing. But if you tell me to, I will let the nets down.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Siimɔŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, á yuwo gyoŋsi rɛ dɩya tebine buloŋ, aŋ bɩ kaŋ kɩŋ buloŋ. Amɛ ʋ aa yaa ɩ kɛ aa baa dɩ ŋ yuwo wɩya, ŋ sɩ yuwo.”

english_verse: They did this and caught so many fish that their nets began ripping apart.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba yuwo ba gyoŋsi, a kasɩ fuwonamɩɩsɩ kɩŋkaŋ, ba gyoŋsi gba kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba pʋʋrɩ.

english_verse: Then they signaled for their partners in the other boat to come and help them. The men came, and together they filled the two boats so full that they both began to sink.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba dɔŋtɩŋsɩ badɔmɔŋ mɛ we nɩɩduworiboro kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba kolli yɩrɩ ba dɩ ba ko kyiyeli ba. Ba ko kuwoni fuwonamɩɩsɩ hʋ, a su nɩɩduworiborisi hʋ balɩya buloŋ. Borisi hʋ su, a paalɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba tuu nɩɩmemii.

english_verse: The men pulled their boats up on the shore. Then they left everything and went with Jesus. Jesus Heals a Man (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ, ba sii a kaŋ nɩɩduworiborisi hʋ tarɩ ko lɩɩ nɩɩ hʋ nyʋwa, a leŋ ba kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ ta doŋ, aŋ sii tɩŋ Yesu hal. Yesu tɩɩbɩ gbege Matiwu

english_verse: News about Jesus kept spreading. Large crowds came to listen to him teach and to be healed of their diseases.
translation_verse: Aŋka wɩɩ hʋ ha vɩya aŋ marɩ taalɩ lee buloŋ a gyʋʋ mʋ. Nala yʋga kɩ ko ʋ lee dɩ ba nɩɩ ʋ wɩbasɩɩ, aŋka dɩ ʋ pɛ tɩɩbɩ ba mɛ.

english_verse: But because of the crowd, they could not get him to Jesus. So they went up on the roof, where they removed some tiles and let the mat down in the middle of the room.
translation_verse: Amɛ, akuu nala fa aa yʋga lee hʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya, ba gyɩ bɩ wuwo na ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ba kana ʋ gyʋʋ dɩya hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba kana ʋ kaŋ gyɩŋ dɩya hʋ nyuu a luri lee, a kpa ʋ ta ʋ tɩŋ doŋ a tuu pɩŋ Yesu sɩya tɩyaŋ nɩgyamaa hʋ tʋtʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Is it easier for me to tell this man that his sins are forgiven or to tell him to get up and walk?
translation_verse: Ŋ aa sɩ baa dɩ ŋ kpaa ʋ wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ʋ rɛ, abee ŋ aa sɩ baa dɩ ʋ sii kɩ vala, ba tɩyaŋ kɩbee basɩɩ rɛ yaa mɔl?

english_verse: But now you will see that the Son of Man has the right to forgive sins here on earth.” Jesus then said to the man, “Get up! Pick up your mat and walk home.”
translation_verse: Ŋ sɩ daga ma anɩɩ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye kaŋ dee rɛ dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ ŋ aa sɩ wuwo kpa wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ nala.” Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ basɩ tɩya gbarɩgɩ hʋ a baa, “Sii, a kpa ɩ wasa kɩ mʋ dɩya.”

english_verse: At once the man stood up in front of everyone. He picked up his mat and went home, giving thanks to God.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ gbarɩgɩ hʋ nyagɩ sii sɩŋ ba sɩya tɩyaŋ, a kpa ʋ wasa hʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ fa aa pɩna, a vala kɩ mʋ dɩya aŋ kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Everyone was amazed and praised God. What they saw surprised them, and they said, “We have seen a great miracle today!” Jesus Chooses Levi (Matthew
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ yaa nala hʋ buloŋ fa aa we doŋ wɩkperii. Kambɩŋ gyʋʋ ba, ba dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ a baa, “Á naa wɩkperiye rɛ gyɩnaŋ.” Yesu yɩrɩ Levi Matiwu

english_verse: Later, Jesus went out and saw a tax collector named Levi sitting at the place for paying taxes. Jesus said to him, “Follow me.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu sii lɩɩ a na lampolaal kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Levi dɩ ʋ hɔŋ ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ dɩya tɩyaŋ. Nyɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Sii ko kɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal.”

english_verse: In his home Levi gave a big dinner for Jesus. Many tax collectors and other guests were also there.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, Levi gyɩ leŋ ba marɩ kɩdiiliye yʋga ʋ dɩya tɩyaŋ a tɩya Yesu, a yɩrɩ nɩgyamaa mɛ. Nɩgyamaa hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa yɩra tɩyaŋ, lampolaala yʋga gyɩ we ba tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: The Pharisees and some of their teachers of the Law of Moses grumbled to Jesus' disciples, “Why do you eat and drink with these tax collectors and other sinners?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima badɔmɔŋ abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla mɛ aa yaa Farasiima sii ko, a pɩyɛsɩ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma bee lampolaala abee wɩbɔŋyaala buloŋ laŋŋɩ hɔŋ kɩ di kɩna?”

english_verse: I didn't come to invite good people to turn to God. I came to invite sinners.” People Ask about Going without Eating (Matthew
translation_verse: Ŋ ko dɩ ŋ yɩrɩ wɩbɔŋyaala rɛ dɩ ba leŋ ba wɩbɔmɔ. Ŋ bɩ ko dɩ ŋ yɩrɩ tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma.” Ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu nyʋwa vʋwayɩ wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: Some people said to Jesus, “John's followers often pray and go without eating, and so do the followers of the Pharisees. But your disciples never go without eating or drinking.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala badɔmɔŋ ko pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ hatɩnna aa kɩ vʋwa nyʋwa rɛ, a kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ saŋa buloŋ. Farasiima hatɩnna mɛ kɩ yaa gɛɛ tɩɩ. Amɛ ɩ hatɩnna kɛ bee vʋwa nyʋwa.”

english_verse: Jesus told them, “The friends of a bridegroom don't go without eating while he is still with them.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Dɩ nal lɛ kpaa haaŋ, dɩ ʋ bee ʋ kyaŋsɩ kɩ gbɩyalɩ hafalɩɩ hʋ gbɩyala, ʋ kyaŋsɩ hʋ sɩ wuwo vʋwa nyʋwa? Aayɩ, ba bɩ sɩ wuwo vʋwa nyʋwa.

english_verse: But the time will come when he will be taken from them. Then they will go without eating.”
translation_verse: Amɛ saŋa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ sɩ pele, dɩ ba kaŋ hafalɩɩ bala hʋ mʋ lee kɩdɩgɩ. Ɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ kyaŋsɩ hʋ yaŋ sɩ vʋwa nyʋwa.”

english_verse: Jesus then told them these sayings: No one uses a new piece of cloth to patch old clothes. The patch would shrink and make the hole even bigger.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl maga namaga no tɩya ba a baa, “Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ lɔgɔ taŋfalɩɩ a kpa ala tɔ gabɩnɩɩ bol. Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa gɛɛ, ɩ sɩ kyogi gafalɩɩ hʋ, ka dɩ taŋfalɩɩ hʋ bee gabɩnɩɩ hʋ mɛ bɩ sɩ kɩɩ dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: No one pours new wine into old wineskins. The new wine would swell and burst the old skins. Then the wine would be lost, and the skins would be ruined.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nal mɛ bɩ sɩ kpa sɩhuwo a we pulbɩnɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa gɛɛ, pul hʋ sɩ pɔsɔ, dɩ sɩŋ hʋ buloŋ bɩsɩ ta.

english_verse: New wine must be put only into new wineskins.
translation_verse: Sɩhuwo maga dɩ ɩ kpa we viiweliye tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: No one wants new wine after drinking old wine. They say, “The old wine is better.”
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ aa nyʋwa sɩwiilii, ʋ bɩl bɩ sɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ nyʋwa sɩhuwo, beewɩya tɩɩna aa baa dɩ sɩwiilii rɛ weliye te sɩhuwo.”

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking, so he told the man to stand up where everyone could see him. And the man stood up.
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu fa gyɩŋ ba tɩbɩɩna buloŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya nosʋʋ hʋ tɩɩna a baa dɩ ʋ sii ko lɩɩ sɩŋ ba sɩya tɩyaŋ. Nyɛ rɛ baal hʋ sii mʋ lɩɩ sɩŋ doŋ.

english_verse: Some Pharisees said, “Why are you picking grain on the Sabbath? You're not supposed to do that!”
translation_verse: Dɩ Farasiima badɔmɔŋ mɛ gyɩ we doŋ a na ba. Doŋ nɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma kɩ yaa nyɛ? Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ sɩna daa ma kɩ kyogi gɛɛ?”

english_verse: Long ago your own people did these same things to the prophets. So when this happens to you, be happy and jump for joy! You will have a great reward in heaven.
translation_verse: Dɩ gɛɛ rɛ ko puu ma, ma leŋ dɩ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ, dɩ ma kɩ gʋwa a kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ, beewɩya ma tuno yʋga rɛ a pɩŋ wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba naabaala mɛ gyɩ dɔgɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ gyɩ aa laa sɩya ko.

english_verse: Ask God to bless anyone who curses you, and pray for everyone who is cruel to you.
translation_verse: Ma sʋl Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya nal buloŋ aa basɩ wɩbɔmɔ kɩ tɩya ma, aŋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya nala hʋ buloŋ aa dɔgɩsɩ ma.

english_verse: Then Jesus asked, “On the Sabbath should we do good deeds or evil deeds? Should we save someone's life or destroy it?”
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ daga dɩ á kɩ yaa Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ? Dɩ á kɩ kyiyeli nala koo dɩ á kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ba? Dɩ á kɩ laa nala mɩɩbolo koo dɩ á kɩ kpʋ ba?”

english_verse: One was Simon, and Jesus named him Peter. Another was Andrew, Peter's brother. There were also James, John, Philip, Bartholomew,
translation_verse: Nala hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa lɩya rɛ nyɛ: Siimɔŋ abee ʋ naabiibaal Aŋduru, abee Gyemsi abee Gyɔɔŋ abee Fɩlɩpɩ abee Batolomi

english_verse: On another Sabbath Jesus was teaching in a synagogue, and a man with a paralyzed right hand was there.
translation_verse: Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ Yesu bɩl sii gyʋʋ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya, a kɩ daga nala, dɩ baal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ gyɩ we doŋ, ʋ noduu noŋ sʋba.

english_verse: The teachers and the Pharisees were furious and started saying to one another, “What can we do about Jesus?” Jesus Chooses His Twelve Apostles (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu aa yaa gɛɛ, nala hʋ buloŋ baaŋ sii kɩŋkaŋ. Ba kɩ vʋʋlɩ wɩɩ hʋ ba aa sɩ yaa ʋ. Yesu lɩɩ ʋ kpambɩsɩ fi abee balɩya Matiwu

english_verse: The next morning he called his disciples together and chose twelve of them to be his apostles.
translation_verse: Sɩya aa gballa, ʋ yɩrɩ ʋ hatɩnna buloŋ ba ko ʋ lee. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ lɩɩ ba tɩyaŋ nala fi abee balɩya dɩ ba yaa ʋ kpambɩsɩ.

english_verse: Everyone was trying to touch Jesus, because power was going out from him and healing them all. Blessings and Troubles (Matthew
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ gyɩ aa we doŋ kɩ lʋga dɩ ba dige ʋ, beewɩya ba gyɩ naa anɩɩ dee kɩdɩgɩ rɛ aa lɩɩ ʋ tɩyaŋ, a leŋ nala buloŋ kɩ na laaŋfɩya. Teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ abee tɩkyogi Matiwu

english_verse: Matthew, Thomas, and James the son of Alphaeus. The rest of the apostles were Simon, known as the Eager One,
translation_verse: abee Matiwu abee Tɔmaasɩ abee Alfiyasɩ biibaal Gyemsi, abee Siimɔŋ, nal hʋ aa kyɩl ʋ nala wɩya kɩŋkaŋ,

english_verse: You well-fed people are in for trouble. You will go hungry! You people who are laughing now are in for trouble. You are going to cry and weep!
translation_verse: Ma nala hʋ mɛ aa vɔgɔ gyɩnaŋ, ma mɛ sɩ na tʋwara dɩ losi kpʋ ma. Ma nala hʋ mɛ aa mʋŋ gyɩnaŋ, ma sɩ na tʋwara. Ma tɩsɩ sɩ kyogi, dɩ ma wii sɩnɩɩl.

english_verse: These people had come to listen to Jesus and to be healed of their diseases. All who were troubled by evil spirits were also healed.
translation_verse: Nala no buloŋ gyɩ ko dɩ ba gyegili nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Yesu aa basɩ rɛ aŋ ka dɩ ʋ tɩɩbɩ ba. Nala badɔmɔŋ mɛ gyɩŋbɔmɔ aa kana mɛ gyɩ ko rɛ dɩ Yesu tɩɩbɩ ba.

english_verse: God will bless you hungry people. You will have plenty to eat! God will bless you people who are now crying. You will laugh!
translation_verse: Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa ma nala hʋ losi aa kpʋʋ gyɩnaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma vɔgɔ. Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa ma nala hʋ aa wii gyɩnaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma mʋma.

english_verse: God will bless you when others hate you and won't have anything to do with you. God will bless you when people insult you and say cruel things about you, all because you are a follower of the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa ma nala hʋ ba aa haasa, a lɩɩ ma kɩ ta nala tɩyaŋ a kɩ tʋʋsɩ ma a kɩ kyogi ma feŋ aŋ baa dɩ ma yaa nɩbɔmɔ rɛ, akuu ma aa tɩŋ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye hal wɩya.

english_verse: You are in for trouble when everyone says good things about you. That is what your own people said about those prophets who told lies. Love for Enemies (Matthew
translation_verse: Dɩ dʋnɩya nala buloŋ nɛ ko kɩ bigisi ma, ma gyɩma anɩɩ tʋwara tɩyaŋ nɛ ma we gɛɛ, beewɩya, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba naabaala gyɩ kɩ bigisi nala hʋ gyɩ aa nyɩya wɩya baa dɩ ba yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala rɛ.” Ma kyo ma dɔmɔ Matiwu

english_verse: If you give to others, you will be given a full amount in return. It will be packed down, shaken together, and spilling over into your lap. The way you treat others is the way you will be treated.
translation_verse: Ma kpa kɩna kɩ tɩya nala. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, Wɩɩsɩ mɛ sɩ kpa kɩna kɩ tɩya ma. Ʋ sɩ magɩsɩ kɩna a su kɩŋ yurutu, a nyagɩ we, ka dɩ ba ha yuwori kɩ tuu, dɩ ʋ kpa tɩya ma. Amɛ kɩŋ hʋ ɩ aa kaŋ magɩsɩ kɩna tɩya ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ sɩ kaŋ magɩsɩ tɩya ɩ.”

english_verse: is like someone who dug down deep and built a house on solid rock. When a flood came and the river rushed against the house, it was built so well that it didn't even shake.
translation_verse: Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ nal aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ saa dɩya, a hulo dɩya hʋ memii ʋ tuu yɩ bʋyɩ, ka ʋ na saa. Ɛɛ rɛ duwoŋ ko nɩɩ, fuwo su gbarɩ, nɩɩ ko gyɩŋ sɩna dɩya hʋ, ka ʋ bɩ gyigise mɛ gba, beewɩya, ba saa ʋ weliŋ nɛ.

english_verse: If someone slaps you on one cheek, don't stop that person from slapping you on the other cheek. If someone wants to take your coat, don't try to keep back your shirt.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ ŋmaa ɩ nogɔbɔ kyaŋkpaŋ, kaŋ ɩ noduu kyaŋkpaŋ mɛ tɩya ʋ dɩ ʋ ŋmaa. Dɩ nal lɛ kaŋ ɩ gabal fasɩ, wuri ɩ gabiye mɛ pɛ tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: Give to everyone who asks and don't ask people to return what they have taken from you.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ ko sʋla ɩ kɩŋ, kpa tɩya ʋ. Dɩ nal mɛ rɛ kyɩma ɩ kɩŋ, ta pɩyɛsɩ ʋ laa.

english_verse: If you love only someone who loves you, will God praise you for that? Even sinners love people who love them.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ kyo nala hʋ aa kyo ma dʋŋ, ma bɩ kaŋ tuno buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ lee, beewɩya wɩbɔŋyaala mɛ gba kyo nala hʋ aa kyo ba rɛ.

english_verse: Have pity on others, just as your Father has pity on you. Judging Others (Matthew
translation_verse: Ma kɩ fá nala sikii anɩɩ ma Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa fá nala sikii gɛɛ. Ma ta kɩ dii nala sarɩya Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus said: Don't judge others, and God won't judge you. Don't be hard on others, and God won't be hard on you. Forgive others, and God will forgive you.
translation_verse: Ta dii ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna sarɩya, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ ta dii ɩ sarɩya. Ta kpaa kyogisi tɩya ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna dɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ ta kpaa kyogisi tɩya ɩ. Ma kpa wɩya kɩ kyɛ ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, Wɩɩsɩ mɛ sɩ kpa wɩya kɩ kyɛ ma.

english_verse: Jesus also used some sayings as he spoke to the people. He said: Can one blind person lead another blind person? Won't they both fall into a ditch?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl maga namaga tɩya ba a baa, “Nyʋlʋŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo kaŋ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna nyʋlʋŋ daaŋ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ yaa gɛɛ, ba buloŋ balɩya sɩ tele bootogi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Are students better than their teacher? But when they are fully trained, they will be like their teacher.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa gʋnnɩ wɩɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo te nal hʋ aa daga ʋ, amɛ dɩ ʋ rɛ ko gʋnnɩ wɩɩ hʋ teŋ, ʋ mɛ aa kɩɩ nal hʋ aa daga ʋ rɛ.

english_verse: You can see the speck in your friend's eye, but you don't notice the log in your own eye.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ sɩ yaa na gyagɩŋ hʋ aa we ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna sɩɩ tɩyaŋ, aŋ bɩ naa daakuu hʋ aa we ɩ tɩɩ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: How can you say, “My friend, let me take the speck out of your eye,” when you don't see the log in your own eye? You show-offs! First, get the log out of your own eye; then you can see how to take the speck out of your friend's eye. A Tree and Its Fruit (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ sɩ yaa baa dɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna leŋ dɩ ɩ lɩɩ gyagɩŋ hʋ aa we ʋ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ ta tɩya ʋ, aŋ bee na daakuu hʋ kɛ aa gɩrɩga ɩ tɩɩ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛdɔŋ minaafigi tɩɩna kɩdɩgɩ! Laasɩya lɩɩ daakuu hʋ aa we ɩ tɩɩ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ ɩ wuwo kɩ na weliŋ, a na lɩɩ gyagɩŋ hʋ aa we ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna sɩɩ tɩyaŋ.” Tɩya abee ʋ nɔnɔ Matiwu

english_verse: You can tell what a tree is like by the fruit it produces. You cannot pick figs or grapes from thornbushes.
translation_verse: Tɩya nɔnɔ rɛ aa daga tɩya hʋ doho ʋ aa yaa. Sɔgyaŋ bee nɔŋ tutogo nɔnɔ, kanɩɩ mɛ bee nɔŋ babɩlɩya.

english_verse: Good people do good things because of the good in their hearts, but bad people do bad things because of the evil in their hearts. Your words show what is in your heart. Two Builders (Matthew
translation_verse: Niwelii aa kaŋ tɩbɩɩŋweliye rɛ ʋ tɩya tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kɩ yaa wɩweliye. Nɩbɔŋ mɛ aa kaŋ tɩbɩɩŋbɔmɔ rɛ ʋ tɩya tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ mɛ kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ. Beewɩya, wɩɩ hʋ aa we ɩ tɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ ɩ nyʋwa kɩ basɩ.” Yesu maga dɩɩsaala balɩya namaga Matiwu

english_verse: Why do you keep on saying that I am your Lord, when you refuse to do what I say?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma kɩ yɩrɩ ŋ ma Tɩɩna, aŋ bee yaa wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ma?

english_verse: But anyone who hears what I say and doesn't obey me is like someone whose house wasn't built on solid rock. As soon as the river rushed against that house, it was smashed to pieces!
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ aa gyegile nɩɩ ŋ wɩbasɩya aŋ bee tɩŋ ba, ʋ tɩɩna kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ nal hʋ aa saa ʋ dɩya, aŋ bɩ hulo dɩya hʋ memii ʋ tuu aŋ saa dɩya hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ duwoŋ ko nɩɩ, fuwo su gbarɩ, nɩɩ ko gyɩŋ sɩna dɩya hʋ, ʋ tele wuroo, a muŋsi ʋ buloŋ muno muno.”

english_verse: I have officers who give orders to me, and I have soldiers who take orders from me. I can say to one of them, ‘Go!’ and he goes. I can say to another, ‘Come!’ and he comes. I can say to my servant, ‘Do this!’ and he will do it.”
translation_verse: Ŋ mɛ aa tɩŋ ŋ nɩhɩyasɩ nyʋwa rɛ, ka laalyuwolo badɔmɔŋ mɛ yaa ŋ noŋ nala, a mɛ kɩ tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ baa dɩ kɩdɩgɩ mʋ daha, ʋ aa mʋʋ rɛ. Dɩ ŋ bɩl baa kɩdɩgɩ mɛ ko daha, ʋ aa ko rɛ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ basɩ tɩya ŋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ dɩ ʋ yaa wɩɩ no, ʋ aa yaa rɛ.”

english_verse: He loves our nation and even built us a synagogue.”
translation_verse: Ʋ kyo á nala rɛ weliŋ, haalɩ a gba saa á wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya tɩya ma.”

english_verse: When the Lord saw the woman, he felt sorry for her and said, “Don't cry!”
translation_verse: Á tɩɩna Yesu aa naa haaŋ hʋ, sikii buloŋ kana ʋ. Ʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa “Ta kɩ wiye.”

english_verse: The leaders went to Jesus and begged him to do something. They said, “This man deserves your help!
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba sii mʋ Yesu lee a sʋla ʋ abee sɩfɩyasɩ buloŋ a baa, “Baal no yaa nɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ʋ maga dɩ ɩ pɛ ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Simon answered, “I suppose it would be the one who had owed more and didn't have to pay it back.” “You are right,” Jesus said.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Siimɔŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ liise anɩɩ nal hʋ kyɩŋ aa yʋga hʋ rɛ sɩ kyo baal hʋ wɩya yʋga.” Doŋ nɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ɩ basɩ.”

english_verse: And when he heard about Jesus, he sent some Jewish leaders to ask him to come and heal the servant.
translation_verse: Laalyuwolo nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ aa nɩɩ Yesu wɩya, ʋ sii lɩɩ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ badɔmɔŋ dɩ ba mʋ sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ ko tɩɩbɩ ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ.

english_verse: So Jesus went with them. When Jesus wasn't far from the house, the officer sent some friends to tell him, “Lord, don't go to any trouble for me! I am not good enough for you to come into my house.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kpa tɩŋ ba hal kɩ mʋ. Ba aa mʋ kpaga laalyuwolo nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ dɩya, ʋ tɩma ʋ kyaŋsɩ dɩ ba ko lɩɩ basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, ta dɔgɩsɩ ɩ tɩɩ ko ŋ dɩya. Ŋ bɩ maga dɩ ɩ ko gyʋʋ ŋ dɩya.

english_verse: And I am certainly not worthy to come to you. Just say the word, and my servant will get well.
translation_verse: Ŋ tɩɩ mɛ gba bɩ maga dɩ ŋ ko ɩ lee. Amɛ dɩ ɩ yaŋ suri ɩ nyʋwa a baa dɩ ŋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ deye mɛ, ka ʋ sɩ deye.

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he was so surprised that he turned and said to the crowd following him, “In all of Israel I've never found anyone with this much faith!”
translation_verse: Yesu aa nɩɩ wɩya no, ʋ nyʋwa fɩyɛlɩ kɩŋkaŋ. Doŋ nɛ ʋ mɩɩgɩ galdaasɩ ʋ hal a basɩ tɩya nɩgyamaa hʋ fa aa tɩŋa ʋ hal a baa, “Ŋ ha bɩ naa nal aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di nyɛ Iziral tɩmma tɩɩ mɛ gba tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: The officer's friends returned and found the servant well. A Widow's Son
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ tɩŋdaala hʋ mɩɩgɩ kpa mʋ laalyuwolo nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ dɩya, dɩ ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ kɔnɩ deye. Yesu kyisi lohaaŋ kɩdɩgɩ biibaal sʋʋ tɩyaŋ

english_verse: As they came near the gate of the town, they saw people carrying out the body of a widow's only son. Many people from the town were walking along with her.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ aa mʋʋ kɩ pele bee hʋ, ʋ naa dɩ nɩgyamaa mʋʋ kɩ ko gɛɛ bilili, a kpa bapʋwasɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ aa sʋba, a kaŋ kɩ mʋ dɩ ba hogo. Bapʋwasɩɩ no dʋŋ nɛ ʋ naa gyɩ lʋla, ka ʋ naa hʋ mɛ yaa lohaaŋ.

english_verse: Jesus went over and touched the stretcher on which the people were carrying the dead boy. They stopped, and Jesus said, “Young man, get up!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ kpa mʋ, a dige sʋʋdaga hʋ. Nala hʋ fa aa kyʋŋ daga hʋ mɩɩgɩ sɩŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya sʋʋ hʋ a baa, “Bapʋwasɩbiye, sii.”

english_verse: The boy sat up and began to speak. Jesus then gave him back to his mother.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ baal hʋ sii hɔŋ, a piili kɩ basɩ wɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kpa ʋ tɩya ʋ naa.

english_verse: Everyone was frightened and praised God. They said, “A great prophet is here with us! God has come to his people.”
translation_verse: Kambɩŋ kaŋ nala hʋ buloŋ, ba kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaalbal lɛ ko tuu á lee nyɛ. Wɩɩsɩ rɛ ko dɩ ʋ laa ma ta.”

english_verse: News about Jesus spread all over Judea and everywhere else in that part of the country. John the Baptist (Matthew
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no Yesu aa yaa gyɩ taalɩ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ abee tɔbiisi hʋ aa gol doŋ buloŋ. Gyɔɔŋ, Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ tɩŋ nala Yesu lee Matiwu

english_verse: John's followers told John everything that was being said about Jesus. So he sent two of them to ask the Lord, “Are you the one we should be looking for? Or must we wait for someone else?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ, Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ yɩrɩ ba tɩyaŋ nala balɩya, a tɩŋ ba dɩ ba mʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu lee, a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ rɛ yaa nal hʋ Gyɔɔŋ aa baa dɩ ʋ sɩ ko hʋ, koo á ha kɩ gyegili nɩdɩma?”

english_verse: When these messengers came to Jesus, they said, “John the Baptist sent us to ask, ‘Are you the one we should be looking for? Or are we supposed to wait for someone else?’ ”
translation_verse: Ba aa ko Yesu lee, ba basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Gyɔɔŋ, Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ rɛ tɩŋ ma dɩ á ko pɩyɛsɩ ɩ anɩɩ ɩ rɛ yaa nal hʋ ʋ aa baa dɩ ʋ sɩ ko hʋ, koo á ha kɩ gyegili nɩdɩma?”

english_verse: At that time Jesus was healing many people who were sick or in pain or were troubled by evil spirits, and he was giving sight to a lot of blind people.
translation_verse: Haŋ saŋa hʋ tɩɩ tɩyaŋ dɩ Yesu tɩɩbɩ wɩɩla tɩmma yʋga, a kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ mɛ ta nala tɩyaŋ, aŋ suri nyʋlɩma mɛ yʋga sɩya.

english_verse: Jesus said to the messengers sent by John, “Go and tell John what you have seen and heard. Blind people are now able to see, and the lame can walk. People who have leprosy are being healed, and the deaf can now hear. The dead are raised to life, and the poor are hearing the good news.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya Gyɔɔŋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ma mɩɩgɩ mʋ a basɩ tɩya Gyɔɔŋ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ma aa nɩya abee wɩya hʋ buloŋ ma aa naa. Nyʋlɩma sɩya aa suri rɛ, gbarɩga kɩ vala, gbegisi kɩ deye. Wonni kɩ nɩɩ wɩya. Nala aa sʋba kɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Nyaaba mɛ kɩ nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ.

english_verse: God will bless everyone who doesn't reject me because of what I do.”
translation_verse: Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa bee yaa ŋ sige.”

english_verse: After John's messengers had gone, Jesus began speaking to the crowds about John: What kind of person did you go out to the desert to see? Was he like tall grass blown about by the wind?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ hatɩnna hʋ mɩɩgɩ kpa mʋ, ka Yesu piili basɩ Gyɔɔŋ wɩya kɩ tɩya nɩgyamaa hʋ. Ʋ gyɩ pɩyɛsɩ ba rɛ a baa, “Ma gyɩ aa lɩɩ mʋ Gyɔɔŋ lee pogo hʋ tɩyaŋ, bekiŋ nɛ ma fa liisi anɩɩ ma sɩ na? Ma gyɩ mʋʋ dɩ ma na ɔhɔ puwo aa kaŋ kɩ gyiyegi rɛ koo?

english_verse: What kind of man did you really go out to see? Was he someone dressed in fine clothes? People who wear expensive clothes and live in luxury are in the king's palace.
translation_verse: Bekiŋ nɛ ma gyɩ yaŋ lɩɩ mʋ dɩ ma na? Ma gyɩ lɩɩ mʋ dɩ ma na nal aa laalɩ gaweliye rɛ koo? Aayɩ, beewɩya nala hʋ aa laalɩ gaweliye, ba aa hɔŋ kuworidɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kɩ nɩɩ sʋma.

english_verse: What then did you go out to see? Was he a prophet? He certainly was! I tell you that he was more than a prophet.
translation_verse: Ma yaŋ daga ŋ kɩŋ hʋ ma gyɩ aa lɩɩ mʋ dɩ ma na. Ma gyɩ lɩɩ mʋ dɩ ma na Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ koo? Ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ nal hʋ ma gyɩ aa mʋʋ na hʋ, ʋ tee Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ.

english_verse: In the Scriptures, God calls John his messenger and says, “I am sending my messenger ahead of you to get things ready for you.”
translation_verse: Haŋ Gyɔɔŋ hʋ wɩya rɛ ba sabɩ biŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ, a baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa, ‘Ŋ sɩ tɩma ŋ tɩŋdaal dɩ ʋ laa ɩ sɩya a mʋ a marɩ ɩ ŋmanɩɩ bin-ɩ.”’

english_verse: No one ever born on this earth is greater than John. But whoever is least important in God's kingdom is greater than John.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya nala hʋ a baa, “Gyɔɔŋ nɛ tee nihuwobiŋ buloŋ ba aa lʋla. Amɛ nal hʋ aa yaa nɩbiye Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ tee Gyɔɔŋ.”
