english_verse: Everyone had been listening to John. Even the tax collectors had obeyed God and had done what was right by letting John baptize them.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ gyɩ nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Yesu aa basa rɛ. Nala no buloŋ gyɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa hʋ Gyɔɔŋ gyɩ aa daga rɛ, haalɩ ba bee lampolaala buloŋ, beewɩya ba gyɩ leŋ Gyɔɔŋ fo ba wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: But the Pharisees and the experts in the Law of Moses refused to obey God and be baptized by John.
translation_verse: Amɛ Farasiima abee Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ kɛ gyɩ vɩya Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa rɛ, beewɩya ba gyɩ bɩ leŋ Gyɔɔŋ gyɩ fo ba wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ.

english_verse: Jesus went on to say: What are you people like? What kind of people are you?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Bekiŋ nɛ ŋ sɩ kpa gyɩnaŋ nala magɩsɩ? Ɛɛ rɛ ba kɩɩ?

english_verse: You are like children sitting in the market and shouting to each other, “We played the flute, but you would not dance! We sang a funeral song, but you would not cry!”
translation_verse: Ba kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ biibiisi aa gbɩyalɩ bee tɩyaŋ, a nɔsɩ basɩ kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa, ‘Á mʋʋ loŋbiye tɩya ma rɛ, ka ma vɩya gʋwayɩ, á yɩɩ haŋyee mɛ tɩya ma, ka ma vɩya wiyi’

english_verse: John the Baptist did not go around eating and drinking, and you said, “John has a demon in him!”
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ gyɩ aa ko ma lee, ʋ gyɩ aa vʋwa nyʋwa rɛ a bee nyʋwa sɩŋ mɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ma baa dɩ gyɩŋbɔŋ nɛ kana ʋ.

english_verse: But because the Son of Man goes around eating and drinking, you say, “Jesus eats and drinks too much! He is even a friend of tax collectors and sinners.”
translation_verse: Aŋka Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye kɛ ko ma lee, a kɩ di kɩna aŋ kɩ nyʋwa sɩŋ mɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ma basɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa dɩ baal no kɛ yaa laboriŋ tɩɩna rɛ, a yaa sɩnyʋwal mɛ, aŋ pɛ kaŋ lampolaala abee wɩbɔŋyaala buloŋ yaa ʋ kyaŋsɩ.

english_verse: A Pharisee invited Jesus to have dinner with him. So Jesus went to the Pharisee's home and got ready to eat.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ Farasii kɩdɩgɩ yɩrɩ Yesu dɩ ʋ ko ʋ dɩya di kɩna. Yesu mʋ a hɔŋ dɩ ʋ di kɩna hʋ.

english_verse: When a sinful woman in that town found out that Jesus was there, she bought an expensive bottle of perfume.
translation_verse: Dɩ hasɔŋsɔnnɩ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ gyɩ we tɔɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Haaŋ no gyɩ aa nɩɩ Yesu wɩya anɩɩ ʋ we Farasii hʋ dɩya tɩyaŋ a kɩ di kɩna, ʋ sii kpa pʋrʋŋtʋwa bee tʋranɩɩ a kaŋ mʋ gyʋʋ dɩya hʋ.

english_verse: Then she came and stood behind Jesus. She cried and started washing his feet with her tears and drying them with her hair. The woman kissed his feet and poured the perfume on them.
translation_verse: Haaŋ hʋ aa ko gyʋʋ dɩya hʋ, ʋ mʋ sɩŋ Yesu hal, aŋ wii sɩnɩɩl kɩ we ʋ naasɩ tɩyaŋ. Sɩnɩɩl hʋ aa tuu Yesu naasɩ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ʋ kaŋ ʋ nyupʋna tɩɩgɩ tɩɩgɩ, aŋ tuu gbinni, a kaŋ Yesu naaŋ tɩyaŋ, aŋ kpa tʋranɩɩ hʋ bɩsɩ we ʋ naasɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The Pharisee who had invited Jesus saw this and said to himself, “If this man really were a prophet, he would know what kind of woman is touching him! He would know that she is a sinner.”
translation_verse: Dɩya hʋ tɩɩna aa naa wɩɩ no haaŋ hʋ aa yaa, ʋ hɔŋ kɩ liisi ʋ tɩya tɩyaŋ a baa, “Dɩ baal no fa kɔnɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal, ʋ fa sɩ gyɩma anɩɩ haaŋ no aa dige ʋ hʋ yaa wɩbɔŋyaal lɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to the Pharisee, “Simon, I have something to say to you.” “Teacher, what is it?” Simon replied.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Siimɔŋ, ŋ kaŋ wɩɩ rɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ɩ.” Siimɔŋ mɛ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, basɩ tɩya ŋ.” Nyɛ rɛ Yesu baa,

english_verse: Jesus told him, “Two people were in debt to a moneylender. One of them owed him
translation_verse: “Baala balɩya rɛ sii mʋ kyɩŋ molbiye kɩna tɩɩna kɩdɩgɩ lee. Kɩdɩgɩ kyɩŋ bʋwara tusi kɔɔ rɛ, kɩdɩgɩ mɛ kyɩŋ bʋwara tusi.

english_verse: But Jesus told the woman, “Because of your faith, you are now saved. May God give you peace!”
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya haaŋ hʋ a baa, “Ɩ laadii rɛ laa ɩ ta. Kɩ mʋ abee laaŋfɩya.”

english_verse: Since neither of them could pay him back, the moneylender said that they didn't have to pay him anything. Which one of them will like him more?”
translation_verse: Baala no balɩya tɩyaŋ, ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ wuwo tuŋ kyɩŋ hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ kɩna tɩɩna hʋ kpa kyɩma hʋ a kyɛ ba buloŋ balɩya. Baala no balɩya tɩyaŋ, ba kɩbee rɛ sɩ kyo kɩna tɩɩna hʋ wɩya yʋga?”

english_verse: He turned toward the woman and said to Simon, “Have you noticed this woman? When I came into your home, you didn't give me any water so I could wash my feet. But she has washed my feet with her tears and dried them with her hair.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu yaŋ mɩɩgɩ deŋ haaŋ hʋ aŋ basɩ tɩya Siimɔŋ a baa, “Na ɩ naa haaŋ no rɛ? Ŋ ko ɩ dɩya rɛ, aŋka ɩ bɩ yaa nɩɩ tɩya ŋ dɩ ŋ sɔmɔ ŋ naasɩ, aŋka ʋ kɛ kpaa ʋ sɩnɩɩl sɔmɔ ŋ naasɩ aŋ kaŋ ʋ nyupʋna mɛ tɩɩgɩ ŋ naasɩ tɩya ŋ.

english_verse: You didn't greet me with a kiss, but from the time I came in, she has not stopped kissing my feet.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa ko ɩ dɩya, ɩ bɩ guwori ŋ, amɛ ŋ aa ko gyʋʋ daha buloŋ, haaŋ no ko tuu gbinni kana ŋ naaŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a ha bɩ siye bee nyɛ buloŋ.

english_verse: You didn't even pour olive oil on my head, but she has poured expensive perfume on my feet.
translation_verse: Ɩ bɩ tɩsɩ ŋ nyuu bee nʋʋ, ka ʋ kɛ yaa tʋranɩɩ tɩsɩ ŋ naasɩ.

english_verse: So I tell you that all her sins are forgiven, and that is why she has shown great love. But anyone who has been forgiven for only a little will show only a little love.”
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ɩ rɛ anɩɩ ʋ wɩbɔŋgyamaa hʋ buloŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ kpa kyɛ ʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kyo ŋ wɩya yʋga gɛɛ. Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ ba aa kpaa ʋ wɩbɔmɔ mʋhʋ kyɛ ʋ, ʋ mɛ aa kyo tɩɩna mʋhʋ rɛ.”

english_verse: Then Jesus said to the woman, “Your sins are forgiven.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka Yesu basɩ tɩya haaŋ hʋ a baa, “Ŋ kpaa ɩ wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: Some other guests started saying to one another, “Who is this who dares to forgive sins?”
translation_verse: Nɩkaalɩya hʋ fa aa hɔŋ kɩ di kɩdiiliye hʋ mɩɩgɩ kɩ bɩɩnɩ ba tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ kɩbee rɛ paalɩ yaa baal no, a kpa wɩbɔmɔ kɩ kyɛ nala?

english_verse: The seeds that fell on rocky ground are the people who gladly hear the message and accept it. But they don't have deep roots, and they believe only for a little while. As soon as life gets hard, they give up.
translation_verse: Kɩna hʋ mɛ aa tele bʋnyɩŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ, a laa di abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ. Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ bɩ kaŋ lɩpɩnɩɩ ba tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Ba aa laa wɩɩ hʋ rɛ, a tɩŋa mʋ maga gɛɛ, amɛ dɩ wɩɩ rɛ ko gyʋʋ ba wɩɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ba aa kpaa ta rɛ.

english_verse: Other seeds fell on rocky ground and started growing. But the plants did not have enough water and soon dried up.
translation_verse: Badɔmɔŋ mɛ tele bʋnyɩŋ tɩyaŋ, a nyʋ aŋ sʋba, beewɩya fɩyɛl gyɩ tuwo doŋ.

english_verse: Some other seeds fell where thornbushes grew up and choked the plants.
translation_verse: Badɔmɔŋ mɛ gyɩ tele sɔsɩ tɩyaŋ a nyʋ, ba bee sɔsɩ buloŋ sii waa we dɔmɔŋ, ka sɔsɩ hʋ nʋŋ kaŋ ba, ba pʋgɩmɩ.

english_verse: So he answered: I have explained the secrets about God's kingdom to you. But for others I use stories, so they will look, but not see, and they will hear, but not understand. Jesus Explains the Story about a Farmer (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma nala no rɛ Wɩɩsɩ daga wɩya hʋ aa yaa wɩfaŋɩya ʋ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ memii tɩya. Amɛ nɩkaalɩya hʋ kɛ buloŋ, namagɩsɩ rɛ ʋ aa kaŋ kɩ daga ba. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba aa gyegili gyegili, aŋ bee gyɩŋ ba memiye, a bɩl deŋ deŋ mɛ aŋ bee na kɩŋ buloŋ. Yesu daga kɩdohil namaga hʋ memii Matiwu

english_verse: There is nothing hidden that will not be found. There is no secret that will not be well known.
translation_verse: Wɩfaŋɩɩ buloŋ tuwo dɩ ʋ bɩ sɩ ko lɩɩ lɩgyalɩɩ. Wɩɩ buloŋ mɛ aa we bilhuu tɩyaŋ, ʋ mɛ sɩ ko lɩɩ pʋlʋŋ.

english_verse: and while they were sailing across, he went to sleep. Suddenly a storm struck the lake, and the boat started sinking. They were in danger.
translation_verse: Ba aa duwori kɩ mʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, Yesu kpa doo pɩŋ. Ka puwoduwo kɩdɩgɩ mɛ piili kɩ yaa, a ko ŋmaa nɩɩ kɩ we nɩɩduworiboro hʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ su. Boro hʋ fa kaa mʋhʋ ka dɩ ʋ tuu nɩɩmemii.

english_verse: This is what the story means: The seed is God's message,
translation_verse: Kɩdohil namaga hʋ memii rɛ nyɛ: Kɩdoho hʋ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ.

english_verse: The seeds that fell among the thornbushes are also people who hear the message. But they are so eager for riches and pleasures that they never produce anything.
translation_verse: Kɩna hʋ mɛ aa tele sɔsɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ, ka dʋnɩya kɩna abee dʋnɩya wɩyaalɩya wɩya kyɩl ba. Dʋnɩya kɩna wɩya, ba aa bɩ wuwo dɩ ba tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ mʋ sɩya, aŋ kpa ta.

english_verse: Those seeds that fell on good ground are the people who listen to the message and keep it in good and honest hearts. They last and produce a harvest. Light (Mark
translation_verse: Kɩna hʋ aa tele taŋhawelii hʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ, a laa we ba hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ, aŋ kaŋ kenyiri abee mala wɩɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ʋ mʋ kaŋ doho.” Yesu maga fɩŋtɩna namaga Maakɩ

english_verse: Then Jesus asked the disciples, “Don't you have any faith?” But they were frightened and amazed. They said to each other, “Who is this? He can give orders to the wind and the waves, and they obey him!” A Man with Demons in Him (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma bɩ laa ŋ di?” Wɩɩ hʋ yaa ba buloŋ wɩkperii, haalɩ kambɩŋ kaŋ ba. Ɛɛ rɛ ba kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Nɩgɛɛ iriŋ nɛ paalɩ yaa baal no? Ʋ nɔsɩ puwo abee nɩɩgbaŋpumo, ba buloŋ tɩŋa ʋ nyʋwa?” Yesu tɩɩbɩ baal kɩdɩgɩ gyɩŋbɔmɔ aa kana Matiwu

english_verse: No one lights a lamp and puts it under a bowl or under a bed. A lamp is always put on a lampstand, so people who come into a house will see the light.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ baa, “Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ nyɔgɔ fɩŋtɩna ʋ dɩya tɩyaŋ, aŋ bɩl kpa sɩgɩ godo memii tɩyaŋ, koo a kpa gbaha kyige tɔ. Ʋ aa kpaa dɩ ʋ saga fɩŋtɩŋdaaŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ dɩ ʋ kyaanɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa ko kɩ gyʋʋ dɩya hʋ.

english_verse: But Jesus answered, “Someone touched me, because I felt power going out from me.”
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu ha baa, “Nal kɩdɩgɩ dige ŋ nɛ, beewɩya ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ dee lɩɩ ŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he told Jairus, “Don't worry! Have faith, and your daughter will get well.”
translation_verse: Yesu aa nɩɩ gɛɛ, ʋ basɩ tɩya Gyeerusi a baa, “Ta leŋ dɩ kambɩŋ kana ɩ. Ɩ kɛ laa ŋ di, ʋ sɩ sii.”

english_verse: The people went out to see what had happened, and when they came to Jesus, they also found the man. The demons had gone out of him, and he was sitting there at the feet of Jesus. He had clothes on and was in his right mind. But the people were terrified.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ nala sii lɩɩ mʋ lee hʋ Yesu aa we, dɩ ba na wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa. Ba aa ko dɩ baal hʋ tɩyaŋ Yesu aa kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ hʋ, dɩ ʋ deye, a hɔŋ Yesu logiŋ a laalɩ gawelii. Ba aa naa gɛɛ, ʋ yaa ba kambɩŋ.

english_verse: Jesus' mother and brothers went to see him, but because of the crowd they could not get near him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu nɩɩna abee ʋ naabalɩya sii ko ʋ lee, dɩ ba na ʋ. Amɛ nala gyɩ aa yʋga doŋ wɩya, ba gyɩ bɩ wuwo dɩ ba na ʋ.

english_verse: As Jesus was getting out of the boat, he was met by a man from this town. The man had demons in him. He had gone naked for a long time and no longer lived in a house, but in the graveyard.
translation_verse: Ba aa mʋʋ pele doŋ, Yesu lɩɩ nɩɩ hʋ nyʋwa. Ʋ lɩɩ dɩ ʋ sɩŋ, dɩ baal kɩdɩgɩ gyɩŋbɔmɔ aa kana mɛ lɩɩ tɔɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ a ko kyeme ʋ. Ʋ gyɩ aa gɔllɩ we bilni nyuni tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ gbɛ abee ʋ teŋbil aŋ pɔ ʋ bee gyʋʋ dɩya.

english_verse: One day, Jesus and his disciples got into a boat, and he said, “Let's cross the lake.” They started out,
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ dɩ ba leŋ dɩ ba kyol fuwo hʋ kyolo. Ɛɛ rɛ ba sii gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro, a duwori kɩ mʋ.

english_verse: So they went to Jesus and woke him up, “Master, Master! We are about to drown!” Jesus got up and ordered the wind and waves to stop. They obeyed, and everything was calm.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ mʋ lee hʋ ʋ fa aa pɩna, a kyisi ʋ a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Á nɩhɩyawʋ, ba aa nɩɩ ma rɛ! Boro hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ tuu nɩɩmemii rɛ.” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii doo hʋ tɩyaŋ, a nɔsɩ puwo hʋ bee nɩɩ hʋ buloŋ dɩ ba fɩyɛlɩ pɩŋ. Doŋ nɛ puwo hʋ sige, ka lee buloŋ yaa siyee.

english_verse: The man saw Jesus and screamed. He knelt down in front of him and shouted, “Jesus, Son of God Most High, what do you want with me? I beg you not to torture me!”
translation_verse: Ʋ aa naa Yesu, ʋ kyiyesi, aŋ tuu tele ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, aŋ kyɩɩrɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Yesu, Wɩɩbal hʋ Biye, bee rɛ ɩ kɩ kyɛ ɩ yaa ŋ? Ŋ aa sʋla ɩ, ta dɔgɩsɩ ŋ.”

english_verse: When the men taking care of the pigs saw this, they ran to spread the news in the town and on the farms.
translation_verse: Porikudaala hʋ aa naa wɩɩ no aa yaa, ba fá mʋ heeli basɩ tɩya bee hʋ nala abee nala hʋ aa we bagɩsɩ tɩyaŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: He said this because Jesus had already told the evil spirit to go out of him. The man had often been attacked by the demon. And even though he had been bound with chains and leg irons and kept under guard, he smashed whatever bound him. Then the demon would force him out into lonely places.
translation_verse: Yesu fa nɔsɩ gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ rɛ dɩ ʋ lɩɩ baal hʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ baal hʋ basɩ gɛɛ. Gyɩna hʋ gyɩ ville kɩ kana ʋ rɛ saŋa buloŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, ba gyɩ aa kana ʋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ, a we ʋ nosi bee ʋ naasɩ buloŋ kpɩyasɩ aŋ ha lɩɩ nala we dɩ ba kɩ deŋ ʋ. Amɛ ʋ gyɩ aa kaŋ kpɩyasɩ hʋ tɔrɩ rɛ, ka gyɩŋbɔmɔ hʋ kpa ʋ gyʋʋ pogo.

english_verse: Jesus asked the man, “What is your name?” He answered, “My name is Lots.” He said this because there were “lots” of demons in him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ feŋ nɛ bee?” Baal hʋ baa “Ŋ feŋ nɛ yaa kɩgyamaa.” Gyɩŋgyamaa rɛ gyɩ we ʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ baa dɩ ʋ feŋ nɛ kɩgyamaa gɛɛ.

english_verse: A large herd of pigs was feeding there on the hillside. So the demons begged Jesus to let them go into the pigs, and Jesus let them go.
translation_verse: Dɩ poriku-gyamaa badɔmɔŋ mɛ sɩŋ dogimo kɩdɩgɩ aa kpaga doŋ logiŋ tɩyaŋ, a kɩ di kɩna. Ɛɛ rɛ gyɩŋsɩ hʋ sʋla Yesu dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ba mʋ gyʋʋ porikusi hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ tɩya ba ŋmanɩɩ.

english_verse: Then the demons left the man and went into the pigs. The whole herd rushed down the steep bank into the lake and drowned.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba lɩɩ baal hʋ tɩyaŋ a mʋ gyʋʋ porikusi hʋ tɩyaŋ. Porikusi hʋ buloŋ sii fá a lɩɩ dogimo hʋ logiŋ aa geese yʋga a mʋ tuu tele fuwo hʋ tɩyaŋ, a nyʋwa nɩɩ sʋba.

english_verse: Everyone from around Gerasa begged Jesus to leave, because they were so frightened. When Jesus got into the boat to start back,
translation_verse: Ba aa nɩɩ wɩya hʋ, kambɩŋ kaŋ ba weliŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ paalʋʋ hʋ nala buloŋ ko basɩ tɩya Yesu dɩ ʋ lɩɩ ba paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Nyɛ rɛ Yesu sii gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro, ʋ bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ duwori mʋ.

english_verse: the man who had been healed begged to go with him. But Jesus sent him off and said,
translation_verse: Baal hʋ tɩyaŋ Yesu gyɩ aa kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ hʋ mɛ sʋla ʋ, dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ʋ ko dɩ ba mʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kaŋ vɩya, aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa,

english_verse: “Go back home and tell everyone how much God has done for you.” The man then went all over town, telling everything that Jesus had done for him. A Dying Girl and a Sick Woman (Matthew
translation_verse: “Mɩɩgɩ mʋ dɩya a basɩ tɩya nala wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa yaa tɩya ɩ.” Doŋ nɛ baal hʋ mʋ gɔllɩ bee hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ a kɩ basɩ wɩɩ hʋ Yesu aa yaa tɩya ʋ. Yesu kyisi Gyeerusi toluu sʋʋ tɩyaŋ Matiwu

english_verse: In the crowd was a woman who had been bleeding for twelve years. She had spent everything she had on doctors, but none of them could make her well.
translation_verse: Haaŋ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ gyɩ we nala hʋ tɩyaŋ, a gyɩ kɩ yaa ʋ hawɩya ka ba bee teŋ bɩsɩ fi abee balɩya, haalɩ ʋ gɔllɩ yaa luliye weliŋ, a kpa ʋ molbiye buloŋ kyogi ta waasʋ, ka nal buloŋ bɩ wuwo tɩɩbɩ ʋ.

english_verse: As soon as she came up behind Jesus and barely touched his clothes, her bleeding stopped.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ lugisi nala hʋ tɩyaŋ a ko sɩŋ Yesu hal, aŋ dige ʋ galnyʋwa tɩyaŋ. Ʋ aa dige Yesu galnyʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, wɩɩl hʋ pirigi teŋ doŋ.

english_verse: The woman knew that she could not hide, so she came trembling and knelt down in front of Jesus. She told everyone why she had touched him and that she had been healed at once.
translation_verse: Haaŋ hʋ aa naa anɩɩ ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo kaŋ wɩɩ hʋ faŋa, ʋ ko tuu gbinni Yesu sɩya tɩyaŋ, a kɩ kyele, a basɩ tɩya nala hʋ wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ ʋ dige ʋ, a daga gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa dige ʋ, a pirigi na laaŋfɩya.

english_verse: Jesus said to the woman, “You are now well because of your faith. May God give you peace!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ toluu, ɩ aa laa ŋ di rɛ tɩŋ ɩ deye. Kɩ mʋ abee laaŋfɩya.”

english_verse: While Jesus was speaking, someone came from Jairus' home and said, “Your daughter has died! Why bother the teacher anymore?”
translation_verse: Yesu ha fa aa basɩ wɩya no gɛɛ, dɩ ba tɩŋ nal ʋ lɩɩ Gyeerusi dɩya ko, a ko basɩ tɩya Gyeerusi a baa, “Ɩ toluu hʋ sʋba rɛ, ta bɩl kɩ dɔŋ á nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus went into the house, but he did not let anyone else go with him, except Peter, John, James, and the girl's father and mother.
translation_verse: Yesu aa mʋʋ pele baal hʋ dɩya, ʋ bɩ leŋ nal buloŋ tɩŋa ʋ hal gyʋʋ dɩya hʋ, see Piita abee Gyɔɔŋ abee Gyemsi, a pɛ biye hʋ kuwo abee ʋ naa tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The people laughed at him because they knew she was dead.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba buloŋ kpa ʋ mʋma, beewɩya ba gyɩma anɩɩ biye hʋ sʋba rɛ.

english_verse: Jesus took hold of the girl's hand and said, “Child, get up!”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu tuu kaŋ biye hʋ noŋ tɩyaŋ aŋ yɩrɩ ʋ a baa, “Ŋ biye, sii.”

english_verse: She came back to life and got right up. Jesus told them to give her something to eat.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ ʋ mɩɩgɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ haŋ lagɩlagɩbiye hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa dɩ ba yaa kɩdiiliye tɩya biye hʋ dɩ ʋ di.

english_verse: Her parents were surprised, but Jesus ordered them not to tell anyone what had happened.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no gyɩ yaa biye hʋ kuwo abee ʋ naa buloŋ wɩkperii rɛ, ka Yesu basɩ tɩya ba abee sɩfɩyaŋ dɩ ba ta ko basɩ wɩɩ hʋ tɩya nal buloŋ.

english_verse: The apostles came back and told Jesus everything they had done. He then took them with him to the village of Bethsaida, where they could be alone.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu kpambɩsɩ hʋ mɩɩgɩ ko ʋ lee, a yaa ba ŋmanɩɩ duwoso tɩya ʋ, ka ʋ beel-ba dʋŋ sii kpa tɩŋ Bɛsaada dɩɩlaŋ mʋ.

english_verse: They did this, and all the people sat down.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ leŋ nala hʋ buloŋ tuu hɔŋ gulo gulo.

english_verse: Herod the ruler heard about all that was happening, and he was worried. Some people were saying John the Baptist had come back to life.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ gyɩ aa deŋ Galili paalʋʋ ba kɩ yɩrɩ Hɛrɔtɩ gyɩ aa nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ aa gɔllɔ kɩ yaa, ʋ hakɩla buloŋ gyɩ vʋgɩma rɛ, beewɩya nala badɔmɔŋ gyɩ aa basɩ rɛ anɩɩ Gyɔɔŋ Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ rɛ mɩɩgɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: He told them, “Don't take anything with you! Don't take a walking stick or a traveling bag or food or money or even a change of clothes.
translation_verse: Aŋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋmanɩɩ no valɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ma ta paa daatɩgɩya, koo ma diikusi, a ta kol kɩdiiliye koo molbiye. Ma ta paa gannɩ pɛ gannɩ hʋ ma aa sɩ laalɩ tɩyaŋ. Kɩŋ buloŋ paalɩ bɩ maga dɩ ʋ tɩŋ ma hal.

english_verse: Late in the afternoon the twelve apostles came to Jesus and said, “Send the crowd to the villages and farms around here. They need to find a place to stay and something to eat. There is nothing in this place. It's like a desert!”
translation_verse: Dɩdaana aa ko pele, Yesu kpambɩsɩ hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Leŋ dɩ nala hʋ mʋ tɔnɩ hʋ abee bagɩsɩ hʋ aa kpaga daha, a kyɛ kɩdiiliye abee lɩpɩnɩya, beewɩya kɩŋ buloŋ tuwo daha ba aa sɩ di.”

english_verse: Jesus strictly warned his disciples not to tell anyone about this. Jesus Speaks about His Suffering and Death (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba abee sɩfɩyasɩ dɩ ba ta ko basɩ wɩɩ no kɩ tɩya nal buloŋ. Yesu basɩ ʋ tʋwara nayɩ abee ʋ sʋʋ wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: “Pay close attention to what I am telling you! The Son of Man will be handed over to his enemies.”
translation_verse: “Ma ta ko yeŋŋi wɩɩ no ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma! Ba sɩ kpa mɩyaŋ, Nihuwobiŋ Biye a yallɩ tɩya dʋnɩya nala.”

english_verse: But a lot of people found out about this and followed him. Jesus welcomed them. He spoke about God's kingdom and healed everyone who was sick.
translation_verse: Nala aa nɩɩ Yesu wɩya anɩɩ ʋ mʋʋ Bɛsaada, ba sii kile ʋ lugo mʋ doŋ. Ba aa mʋʋ pele doŋ, ʋ lɔllɩ ba weliŋ, aŋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ wɩya tɩya ba, aŋ tɩɩbɩ wɩɩla tɩmma mɛ.

english_verse: “Don't stop him!” Jesus said. “Anyone who isn't against you is for you.” A Samaritan Village Refuses To Receive Jesus
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya Gyɔɔŋ abee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ nɩkaalɩya a baa, “Ma ta kile ʋ, beewɩya nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ lɩɩ á hal tɩyaŋ, ʋ yaa á kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.” Samaarɩya tɩmma vɩya Yesu wɩya

english_verse: About eight days later Jesus took Peter, John, and James with him and went up on a mountain to pray.
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ wɩya no hal tɩyaŋ, ʋ kyɛyɛ kyori kyɛɛ, ʋ sii kaŋ Piita bee Gyɔɔŋ abee Gyemsi, a mʋ gyɩŋ dogimo kɩdɩgɩ nyuu dɩ ʋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: If you want to save your life, you will destroy it. But if you give up your life for me, you will save it.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ laa ʋ tɩɩ mɩɩbol, ʋ bɩ sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii, amɛ nal hʋ aa kuu ŋ wɩya a vɩya ʋ mɩɩbol ta, ʋ tɩɩna rɛ sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: What will you gain, if you own the whole world but destroy yourself or waste your life?
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ tɩŋ dʋnɩya no buloŋ, aŋka dɩ ɩ bɩ sɩ na mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii, bekiŋ tɔnɔ rɛ ɩ na?

english_verse: If you are ashamed of me and my message, the Son of Man will be ashamed of you when he comes in his glory and in the glory of his Father and the holy angels.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko leŋ dɩ Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye bee ŋ wɩbasɩya yaa ʋ hɩɩsɩ, ʋ tɩɩna wɩya mɛ sɩ yaa ŋ hɩɩsɩ kyɛɛ hʋ ŋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko dʋnɩya abee gaŋdarɩ abee ŋ kuwo Wɩɩsɩ gaŋdarɩ abee ʋ malɩkaweliye hʋ gaŋdarɩ.

english_verse: While Peter was still speaking, a shadow from a cloud passed over, and they were frightened as the cloud covered them.
translation_verse: Piita ha fa aa basɩ wɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, taalbal kɩdɩgɩ pirigi ko tuu tɔ ba. Ɛɛ rɛ kambɩŋ kaŋ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ.

english_verse: From the cloud a voice spoke, “This is my chosen Son. Listen to what he says!”
translation_verse: Ka taal kɩdɩgɩ lɩɩ taalbal hʋ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Ŋ Biye rɛ nyɛ. Ʋ rɛ yaa nal hʋ ŋ aa lɩya. Ma gyegili kɩ nɩɩ ʋ nyʋwa.”

english_verse: After the voice had spoken, Peter, John, and James saw only Jesus. For some time they kept quiet and did not say anything about what they had seen. Jesus Heals a Boy (Matthew
translation_verse: Taal hʋ aa basɩ wɩya no ko teŋ, dɩ Yesu dʋŋ nɛ kaa sɩŋ doŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ tallɩ ba nyʋwa. Ba bɩ laa nyʋwa basɩ wɩɩ no ba aa naa a tɩya nal buloŋ. Yesu kile gyɩŋbɔŋ ta boyoŋbiye kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ Matiwu

english_verse: A demon often attacks him and makes him scream. It shakes him until he foams at the mouth, and it won't leave him until it has completely worn the boy out.
translation_verse: Gyɩŋbɔŋ nɛ kana ʋ, ʋ kɩ tele kpuŋkpuŋsi. Dɩ ʋ ko sii ʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ, ʋ aa pirigi kyɩɩrɩ rɛ aŋ lɩɩ tele, a kɩ kyele, ka ʋ nyʋwa buloŋ tɔ naŋtʋwɔ-fʋŋfʋga. Ʋ aa villi kɩ sii ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ saŋa buloŋ, a kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ.

english_verse: Jesus said to them, “You people are stubborn and don't have any faith! How much longer must I be with you? Why do I have to put up with you?” Then Jesus said to the man, “Bring your son to me.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma gyɩnaŋ nala, ma yaa nɩnyʋgɩsɩya rɛ, a bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ mɛ di. Abaa! Kyɛyɛ baŋmɛ rɛ ŋ baa ŋ yaa ma lee?” Aŋ mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya baal hʋ a baa, “Kaŋ ɩ biye hʋ ko daha.”

english_verse: While the boy was being brought, the demon attacked him and made him shake all over. Jesus ordered the demon to stop. Then he healed the boy and gave him back to his father.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ biye hʋ sii kpa dɩ ʋ mʋ. Doŋ nɛ gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ lɩɩ ʋ lo taŋha ʋ pɩŋ kɩ kyele. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu nɔsɩ gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ dɩ ʋ lɩɩ biye hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ lɩɩ, ka biye hʋ deye. Yesu mɩɩgɩ kpa ʋ tɩya ʋ kuwo. Yesu bɩl basɩ ʋ sʋʋ wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: But the disciples did not know what he meant. The meaning was hidden from them. They could not understand it, and they were afraid to ask. Who Is the Greatest? (Matthew
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ gyɩ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa basa memii. Ʋ yaa wɩfaŋɩɩ rɛ ba lee. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba gyɩ bɩ wuwo gyɩŋ ʋ memii. Amɛ ba kɩ fá kambɩŋ ba aa sɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ wɩɩ hʋ memii. Yesu hatɩnna hʋ kaŋ ba tɩyaŋ nɩbal wɩya kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus' disciples were arguing about which one of them was the greatest.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ kaŋ ba tɩyaŋ nɩbal wɩya kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking, and he had a child stand there beside him.
translation_verse: Yesu fa gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ba aa bɩɩnɩ rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kaŋ biibiye ko sɩgɩ ʋ logiŋ,

english_verse: Then he said to his disciples, “When you welcome even a child because of me, you welcome me. And when you welcome me, you welcome the one who sent me. Whichever one of you is the most humble is the greatest.” For or against Jesus (Mark
translation_verse: aŋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ kuu ŋ wɩya a kaŋ biibiye no weliŋ, mɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ weliŋ gɛɛ. Nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa kana ŋ weliŋ, ŋ dʋŋ daa ʋ kaŋ weliŋ gɛɛ. Nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ mɛ rɛ ʋ kaŋ weliŋ gɛɛ. Nal hʋ aa yaa nɩbiye ma tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ yaa ma tɩyaŋ nɩbal.” Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ haasɩ ɩ, ʋ kyo ɩ rɛ Maakɩ

english_verse: John said, “Master, we saw a man using your name to force demons out of people. But we told him to stop, because he isn't one of us.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, á fa naa baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ kpaa ɩ feŋ a kɩ kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ nala tɩyaŋ. Á kile ʋ dɩ ʋ ta kɩ yaa gɛɛ, beewɩya ʋ bɩ yaa á kɩdɩgɩ.”

english_verse: Not long before it was time for Jesus to be taken up to heaven, he made up his mind to go to Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ hʋ aa ko kpaga dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpa Yesu gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩbee, Yesu sii yaa ʋ siri, a lɩɩ kpa ŋmanɩɩ kɩ mʋ Gyerusalɛm.

english_verse: He sent some messengers on ahead to a Samaritan village to get things ready for him.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ taa nala rɛ dɩ ba laa sɩya mʋ marɩ lee bine ʋ Samaarɩya paalʋʋ tɔbiye kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But he was on his way to Jerusalem, so the people there refused to welcome him.
translation_verse: Amɛ doŋ nala gyɩ bɩ yaa siri dɩ ba laa ʋ, beewɩya ba gyɩ gyɩma anɩɩ Gyerusalɛm nɛ ʋ kɩ mʋ.

english_verse: When the disciples James and John saw what was happening, they asked, “Lord, do you want us to call down fire from heaven to destroy these people?”
translation_verse: Gyemsi abee Gyɔɔŋ aa naa wɩɩ no, ba pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Á Tɩɩna, ɩ bɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ á sʋla Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ʋ leŋ diŋ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu ko tuu kpa ba di?”

english_verse: But Jesus turned and corrected them for what they had said.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɩɩgɩ bɩrɩmɩ kyaasɩ ba, aŋ nɔsɩ ba.

english_verse: Then they all went on to another village. Three People Who Wanted To Be Followers (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal lɛ ka ba parɩ mʋ tɔdɩma. Nala hʋ aa maga dɩ ba tɩŋ Yesu hal Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus said, “Foxes have dens, and birds have nests, but the Son of Man doesn't have a place to call his own.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋmanyɔnɩ kaŋ bʋʋsɩ rɛ a kɩ gyʋʋ, digibiisi mɛ kaŋ gyannɩ a kɩ pɩŋ, amɛ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye kɛ bɩ kaŋ lee ŋ aa sɩ kpa ŋ nyuu biŋ a wiyesi.”

english_verse: Jesus told someone else to come with him. But the man said, “Lord, let me wait until I bury my father.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya baal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ a baa, “Ko kɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal.” Ʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, leŋ dɩ ŋ laa sɩya mʋ kpa ŋ kuwo hogo.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Let the dead take care of the dead, while you go and tell about God's kingdom.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Leŋ dɩ sʋʋnɩ kɩ hogo ba tɩɩ sʋʋnɩ, aŋ ka dɩ ɩ mɛ mʋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ wɩya kɩ tɩya nala.”

english_verse: Then someone said to Jesus, “I want to follow you, Lord, but first let me go back and take care of things at home.”
translation_verse: Nal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ bɩl basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, ŋ sɩ tɩŋa ɩ hal, amɛ leŋ dɩ ŋ mʋ ta ŋ dɩya nala aŋ ko.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Anyone who starts plowing and keeps looking back isn't worth a thing to God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nal hʋ buloŋ aa tɩga nɔpalɩya pal kɩ pala, aŋ kpa ʋ sɩya ta gama, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: He said to them: A large crop is in the fields, but there are only a few workers. Ask the Lord in charge of the harvest to send out workers to bring it in.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Baga hʋ kɩkʋmɩya yʋga, amɛ kɩkʋnna hʋ bɩ yʋga. Ɛɛ wɩya ma sʋla baga hʋ tɩɩna dɩ ʋ ta tʋŋtʋnna dɩ ba ko kʋŋ kɩna hʋ.

english_verse: Now go, but remember, I am sending you like lambs into a pack of wolves.
translation_verse: Ma sii mʋ! Ma kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ pebiisi, ŋ kɩ tɩŋ ma dɩ ma mʋ guwosi gboni tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't take along a moneybag or a traveling bag or sandals. And don't waste time greeting people on the road.
translation_verse: Ma ta kol molbiye, a ta paa diikusi mɛ. Ma ta paa naatɔbɔ pɛ kɩna hʋ ma aa sɩ tʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a ta sɩŋ kyʋwalɩ nala mɛ kɩ pɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: As soon as you enter a home, say, “God bless this home with peace.”
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko mʋ gyʋʋ dɩya buloŋ, ma laa sɩya basɩ tɩya dɩya hʋ nala a baa, ‘Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ fɩyɛlʋʋ we dɩya no tɩyaŋ.’

english_verse: If the people living there are peace-loving, your prayer for peace will bless them. But if they are not peace-loving, your prayer will return to you.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ ko we doŋ, a kyo fɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ ma aa sʋla tɩya ba, ma leŋ dɩ ʋ hɔŋ abee laaŋfɩya anɩɩ ma aa sʋla gɛɛ. Amɛ dɩ nal ko tuwo dɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ a kyo fɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ, ma leŋ dɩ fɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ ma aa sʋla mɩɩgɩ ko ma lee.

english_verse: Stay with the same family, eating and drinking whatever they give you, because workers are worth what they earn. Don't move around from house to house.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ ko tɩya ma lɩpɩnɩɩ, ma we doŋ, a di aŋ kɩ nyʋwa kɩŋ hʋ kɛ buloŋ ba aa sɩ tɩya ma. Beewɩya tʋŋtʋnnɩ buloŋ maga dɩ ba tun-ʋ rɛ. Ma ta gɔllɩ kɩ pɩŋ nala dɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If the people of a town welcome you, eat whatever they offer.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko mʋ tɔɔ buloŋ, dɩ ba laa ma weliŋ, kɩŋ kɛ buloŋ ba aa sɩ tɩya ma, ma di.

english_verse: But if the people of a town refuse to welcome you, go out into the street and say,
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ ko mʋ tɔɔ buloŋ, dɩ ba bɩ laa ma weliŋ, ma lɩɩ sɩŋ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ aŋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa,

english_verse: I tell you that on the day of judgment the people of Sodom will get off easier than the people of that town! The Unbelieving Towns (Matthew
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, Sarɩya hʋ kyɛdiilii, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ haŋ tɔɔ hʋ nala a te Sodɔm nala.” Tɔnɩ hʋ nala aa bɩ laa Yesu wɩya di Matiwu

english_verse: But don't be happy because evil spirits obey you. Be happy that your names are written in heaven! Jesus Thanks His Father (Matthew
translation_verse: Amɛ ma ta leŋ dɩ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ akuu gyɩŋbɔmɔ aa tɩŋ ma nyʋwa wɩya, ma leŋ dɩ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ ba aa sabɩ ma fene biŋ wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ wɩya.” Yesu dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ Matiwu

english_verse: Many prophets and kings were eager to see what you see and to hear what you hear. But I tell you they did not see or hear.” The Good Samaritan
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala abee kuworo buloŋ fa aa kyɛ dɩ ba na wɩya no ma aa naa rɛ, amɛ ba bɩ wuwo na ba; a fa lʋga mɛ dɩ ba nɩɩ wɩya no ma aa nɩɩ, aŋ bɩ wuwo nɩɩ ba.” Yesu daga ɛɛ aa maga dɩ á kyo á dɔŋtɩŋsɩ

english_verse: On the day of judgment the people of Tyre and Sidon will get off easier than you will.
translation_verse: Sarɩya hʋ kyɛdiilii, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ fá Taaya abee Siidɔŋ nala sikii a te ma.

english_verse: People of Capernaum, do you think you will be honored in heaven? Well, you will go down to hell!
translation_verse: Mamaa Kapɛɛnam tɩmma, ma aa kyɛ dɩ ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩbee rɛ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa ma yuwo ta dɩ ma tuu gyʋʋ diŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus told them: I saw Satan fall from heaven like a flash of lightning.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ naa Sɩtaanɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu ko tuu tele gɛɛ anɩɩ duwoŋ aa lɩgɩsa.”

english_verse: An expert in the Law of Moses stood up and asked Jesus a question to see what he would say. “Teacher,” he asked, “what must I do to have eternal life?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩl kɩdɩgɩ ko kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ magɩsɩ Yesu, a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, ɛɛ rɛ ŋ sɩ yaa a kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii?”

english_verse: The man replied, “The Scriptures say, ‘Love the Lord your God with all your heart, soul, strength, and mind.’ They also say, ‘Love your neighbors as much as you love yourself.’ ”
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ baal hʋ basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Ba saba baa ‘Kyo ɩ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ abee ɩ tɩya buloŋ, abee ɩ dʋma buloŋ, abee ɩ dee buloŋ, abee ɩ hakɩla buloŋ, aŋ kyo ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna mɛ anɩɩ ɩ aa kyo ɩ tɩɩ gɛɛ.”’

english_verse: At that same time, Jesus felt the joy that comes from the Holy Spirit, and he said: My Father, Lord of heaven and earth, I am grateful that you hid all this from wise and educated people and showed it to ordinary people. Yes, Father, this is what pleased you.
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ leŋ Yesu teŋ fɩyɛlɩ. Nyɛ rɛ ʋ baa, “Ŋ Kuwo, ɩ rɛ yaa wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha buloŋ Tɩɩna. Ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ ɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ yʋga, beewɩya, wɩya hʋ ɩ aa kpaa faŋa wɩgyʋnna, ba aa rɛ ɩ kpaa daga nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa wɩgyʋnna. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ Kuwo, ɩ tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ɩ yaa wɩya no buloŋ.”

english_verse: My Father has given me everything, and he is the only one who knows the Son. The only one who really knows the Father is the Son. But the Son wants to tell others about the Father, so they can know him too.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ŋ Kuwo kpaa kɩŋ buloŋ dee tɩya ŋ nɛ. Nal buloŋ tuwo a gyɩŋ gɛɛ hʋ mɩyaŋ biye hʋ aa kɩya, see ŋ kuwo dʋŋ. Ŋ dʋŋ mɛ rɛ gyɩŋ gɛɛ ŋ kuwo aa kɩya, abee nala hʋ ŋ aa daga ɛɛ ŋ Kuwo hʋ aa kɩya a tɩya ŋ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus then turned to his disciples and said to them in private, “You are really blessed to see what you see!
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu mɩɩgɩ bɩrɩmɩ kyaasɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ dʋŋ aŋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma nyuu sʋma rɛ abee ma aa na wɩya no.

english_verse: Jesus said, “You have given the right answer. If you do this, you will have eternal life.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Wɩya hʋ buloŋ ɩ aa basa yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ aa tɩŋ ba, ɩ sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol.”

english_verse: But the man wanted to show that he knew what he was talking about. So he asked Jesus, “Who are my neighbors?”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩl hʋ ha kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ daga anɩɩ ʋ yaa nɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Aŋnɛ rɛ yaa ŋ dɔŋtɩɩna?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: As a man was going down from Jerusalem to Jericho, robbers attacked him and grabbed everything he had. They beat him up and ran off, leaving him half dead.
translation_verse: Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu maga namaga no a baa, “Baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ gyɩ siye, a lɩɩ Gyerusalɛm a kɩ mʋ Gyɛriko. Ʋ aa mʋʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, gaala ko lɩɩ bori ʋ ŋmanɩɩ, a kaŋ ʋ kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ laa, aŋ ŋmaa ʋ a bɔŋsɩ, aŋ vɩya ʋ ta doŋ, ʋ pɩŋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ sʋba.

english_verse: A priest happened to be going down the same road. But when he saw the man, he walked by on the other side.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ dɩ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ kpaa ŋmanɩɩ hʋ kɩ ko. Ʋ aa ko a na baal hʋ, ʋ tɩŋ gama, a kpala baŋ mʋ.

english_verse: Later a temple helper came to the same place. But when he saw the man who had been beaten up, he also went by on the other side.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal tʋŋtʋnnɩ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ bɩl kɩ ko, a na ʋ, a mɛ kpala tɩŋ gama baŋ mʋ.

english_verse: A man from Samaria then came traveling along that road. When he saw the man, he felt sorry for him
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ dɩ Samaarɩya tɩmma baal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ fa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ hʋ kɩ ko. Ʋ aa ko na baal hʋ, sikii kana ʋ.

english_verse: and went over to him. He treated his wounds with olive oil and wine and bandaged them. Then he put him on his own donkey and took him to an inn, where he took care of him.
translation_verse: Ʋ kpa mʋ pele ʋ, a sasɩ ʋ dʋgʋlɩya hʋ, a we luliye aŋ vʋwa, aŋ kpa ʋ saga ʋ tɩɩ kokumo tɩyaŋ a kana ʋ mʋ nɩhʋwala dɩya kɩdɩgɩ, a leŋ ba kɩ deŋ ʋ.

english_verse: The next morning he gave the innkeeper two silver coins and said, “Please take care of the man. If you spend more than this on him, I will pay you when I return.”
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩya, ʋ sii kpa molbii tɩya dɩya hʋ tɩɩna aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, ‘Kɩ deŋ ʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ weliŋ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko mɩɩgɩ ko, kyɩŋ mɔɔgɛɛ buloŋ ɩ aa ŋmaa pɛ baal hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, ŋ sɩ tuŋ tɩya ɩ.’

english_verse: Then Jesus asked, “Which one of these three people was a real neighbor to the man who was beaten up by robbers?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩl hʋ a baa, ‘Ɩ aa naa, nala no boto tɩyaŋ, kɩbee rɛ yaa baal hʋ gaala aa ŋmaa hʋ dɔŋtɩɩna?’

english_verse: The expert in the Law of Moses answered, “The one who showed pity.” Jesus said, “Go and do the same!” Martha and Mary
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩl hʋ baa, ‘Baal hʋ aa fáá ʋ sikii hʋ.’ Yesu yaŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ, ‘Tɔɔ, ɩ mɛ mʋ a kɩ yaa gɛɛ tɩɩ.”’ Yesu mʋʋ dɩ ʋ na Maata abee Mɛɛrɩ

english_verse: The Lord and his disciples were traveling along and came to a village. When they got there, a woman named Martha welcomed him into her home.
translation_verse: Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ sii kpa ŋmanɩɩ kɩ mʋ, a ko pele tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ. Haaŋ kɩdɩgɩ gyɩ we tɔɔ no tɩyaŋ, ba kɩ yɩrɩ Maata. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kaŋ Yesu gyʋʋ ʋ dɩya.

english_verse: She had a sister named Mary, who sat down in front of the Lord and was listening to what he said.
translation_verse: Maata nɩɩnatoluu mɛ fa we doŋ, ba kɩ yɩrɩ Mɛɛrɩ. Yesu aa hɔŋ dɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ, Mɛɛrɩ ko hɔŋ ʋ logiŋ a kɩ gyegile wɩya hʋ ʋ aa basɩ,

english_verse: Martha was worried about all that had to be done. Finally, she went to Jesus and said, “Lord, doesn't it bother you that my sister has left me to do all the work by myself? Tell her to come and help me!”
translation_verse: ka Maata sii mɛ fɩyɛsɩ, ʋ kɩ tʋŋ tʋma dɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ na dɩ tʋma hʋ yʋga tɩya ʋ, ʋ ko basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, ɩ bɩ naa ŋ naabiye aa leŋ tʋma hʋ buloŋ tɩya ŋ dʋŋ? Leŋ dɩ ʋ sii ko lɩɩ kyiyeli ŋ.”

english_verse: The Lord answered, “Martha, Martha! You are worried and upset about so many things,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Maata, ɩ leŋ wɩgyamaa rɛ kɩ dɔm-ɩ.

english_verse: but only one thing is necessary. Mary has chosen what is best, and it will not be taken away from her.”
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ. Haŋ wɩɩ hʋ rɛ Mɛɛrɩ kɛ kpa gɛɛ. Nal buloŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo kaŋ wɩɩ no laa ʋ lee.”

english_verse: So I tell you to ask and you will receive, search and you will find, knock and the door will be opened for you.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, dɩ ɩ rɛ aa sʋl kɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ lee deŋdeŋ, ʋ sɩ kpa tɩya ɩ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ aa kyɛ kɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ lee mɛ, ɩ sɩ na ʋ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ aa ŋmaa boro hʋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kaŋ suri tɩya ɩ.

english_verse: As bad as you are, you still know how to give good gifts to your children. But your heavenly Father is even more ready to give the Holy Spirit to anyone who asks. Jesus and the Ruler of Demons (Matthew
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa yaŋ aa yaa nɩbɔmɔ rɛ gyɩŋ ma aa sɩ kpa kɩweliye tɩya ma biisi. Ɛɛ rɛ ma Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa yaa wɩweliye buloŋ tɩɩna, a we Wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ, kɛ sɩ yaa ʋ bɩ kpaa Wiyesi Welii hʋ kɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa sʋla ʋ kɩ kyɛ.” Yesu abee Bɛlizebul Matiwu

english_verse: And suppose your friend answers, “Don't bother me! The door is bolted, and my children and I are in bed. I cannot get up to give you something.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ kyana hʋ we dɩya tɩyaŋ aŋ basɩ tɩya ɩ a baa, ‘Ta kɩ dɔmɩ-ŋ, ŋ dimbee lara rɛ. Ka ŋ bee ŋ balɩya buloŋ mɛ pɩŋ. Ŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo sii a yaa wɩɩ buloŋ tɩya ɩ.’

english_verse: Which one of you fathers would give your hungry child a snake if the child asked for a fish?
translation_verse: Kuwo bee rɛ we daha, aa sɩ kpa dʋŋ a tɩya ɩ biye dɩ ʋ rɛ sʋla fuwonamɩya ɩ lee?

english_verse: So Jesus told them, “Pray in this way: ‘Father, help us to honor your name. Come and set up your kingdom.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ ma ko kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ buloŋ, ma baa, “Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ, leŋ dɩ ɩ feŋ gyɩŋ, leŋ dɩ ɩ koro hʋ ko.

english_verse: Forgive our sins, as we forgive everyone who has done wrong to us. And keep us from being tempted.’ ”
translation_verse: Kpa á wɩbɔmɔ kɩ kyɛ ma anɩɩ á mɛ aa kpaa á dɔŋtɩŋsɩ wɩbɔmɔ kɩ kyɛ ba gɛɛ, aŋ lɩɩ ma wɩɩ buloŋ aa sɩ kaŋ ma we wɩbɔŋ yayɩ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Just as Jonah was a sign to the people of Nineveh, the Son of Man will be a sign to the people of today.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Gyoona gyɩ aa yaa magɩl a tɩya Ninive tɩmma, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye mɛ sɩ yaa magɩl a tɩya gyɩnaŋ nala.

english_verse: While Jesus was still talking, a woman in the crowd spoke up, “The woman who gave birth to you and nursed you is blessed!”
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ teŋ, dɩ haaŋ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ we nɩgyamaa hʋ tɩyaŋ a faasɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nyusʋŋtɩɩna rɛ yaa haaŋ hʋ aa lʋla ɩ, a dɩyɛsɩ ɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus forced a demon out of a man who could not talk. And after the demon had gone out, the man started speaking, and the crowds were amazed.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ kile gyɩŋbɔŋ kɩ ta baal kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Gyɩna hʋ aa lɩɩ ko teŋ, baal hʋ wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩya, beewɩya gyɩna hʋ fa leŋ ʋ ganɩya rɛ. Wɩɩ no gyɩ yaa gyamaa hʋ buloŋ aa laŋŋa doŋ wɩkperii rɛ.

english_verse: Others wanted to put Jesus to the test. So they asked him to show them a sign from God.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ badɔmɔŋ mɛ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba magɩsɩ Yesu. Ɛɛ rɛ ba baa dɩ ʋ yaa wɩmagɩl dɩ ba na, a gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ tɩya ʋ dee ʋ kɩ yaa gɛɛ.

english_verse: Jesus knew what they were thinking, and he said: A kingdom where people fight each other will end up in ruin. And a family that fights will break up.
translation_verse: Yesu wuwo gyɩŋ ba tɩbɩɩna a basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ paalʋʋ nala rɛ we doŋ a bɩ kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ, ba paalʋʋ hʋ sɩ tele. Dɩ nɩmmabalɩya mɛ rɛ we doŋ a bɩ kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ, ba dɩya sɩ tele.

english_verse: If Satan fights against himself, how can his kingdom last? Yet you say that I force out demons by the power of Beelzebul.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ Sɩtaanɩ nala rɛ we doŋ a gʋla kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ, Sɩtaanɩ koro hʋ mɛ bɩ sɩ sɩŋ.”

english_verse: If I use his power to force out demons, whose power do your own followers use to force them out? They are the ones who will judge you.
translation_verse: “Na ma baa dɩ Bɛlizebul lɛ tɩya ŋ dee ŋ kaŋ kɩ kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ nala tɩyaŋ. Dɩ gɛɛ rɛ yaa wɩtɩɩ, kɩbee rɛ yaŋ tɩya ma hatɩnna mɛ dee ba kɩ kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ nala tɩyaŋ? Ma hatɩnna no tɩɩ daga anɩɩ ma yaa wɩnyɩyɛla rɛ.

english_verse: When a strong man arms himself and guards his home, everything he owns is safe.
translation_verse: Dɩ gaduwogi rɛ vʋwa ʋ tʋwanɩ, a hɔŋ pɔ ʋ dɩya, nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ dɩya hʋ a kpa kɩŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: You Pharisees are in for trouble! You love the front seats in the synagogues, and you like to be greeted with honor in the market.
translation_verse: Mamaa Farasiima, ma sɩ na tʋwara yʋga! Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko gyʋʋ wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ, ma aa kɩ kyɛ nɩbala nɩhɔnɩya rɛ dɩ ma hɔŋ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko gyʋʋ gyamaa tɩyaŋ mɛ, ma aa kɩ kyɛ dɩ nal nal buloŋ yʋwɔgɩ kɩ kyʋwalɩ ma rɛ abee gyɩrɩma.

english_verse: A teacher of the Law of Moses spoke up, “Teacher, you said cruel things about us.”
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ teŋ, Wɩɩsɩ teŋ dɩdagɩl kɩdɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, ɩ aa ko kɩ basɩ wɩya no, ɩ aa kɩ tʋʋsɩ ma mɛ rɛ gɛɛ.”

english_verse: When an evil spirit leaves a person, it travels through the desert, looking for a place to rest. But when it doesn't find a place, it says, “I will go back to the home I left.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya nala hʋ a baa, “Dɩ gyɩŋbɔŋ nɛ ko lɩɩ nal tɩyaŋ, ʋ aa mʋ gɔllɩ taŋhahɩlɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ kyɛ liwiyesii. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko bɩ naa lee, ʋ aa basɩ tɩya ʋ tɩɩ rɛ a baa, ‘Ŋ sɩ mɩɩgɩ mʋ lee hʋ ŋ aa lɩya.’

english_verse: When it gets there and finds the place clean and fixed up,
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko mɩɩgɩ mʋ a na dɩ bisiŋ tuwo dɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ, ka ba marɩ ʋ buloŋ weliŋ,

english_verse: it goes off and finds seven other evil spirits even worse than itself. They all come and make their home there, and that person ends up in worse shape than before. Being Really Blessed
translation_verse: ʋ aa mɩɩgɩ lɩɩ rɛ, a kaŋ gyɩŋbɔmɔ bapɛ, kɩna mɛ aa bɔmɔ te ʋ tɩɩ, ba ko gyʋʋ a pɛ ʋ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba yaŋ sɩ lɔrɩ nal hʋ tɩyaŋ a te buŋbuŋ hʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “That's true, but the people who are really blessed are the ones who hear and obey God's message!” A Sign from God (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ daa! Amɛ nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya, a kɩ tɩŋ ba.” Ba baa dɩ Yesu yaa wɩmagɩl Matiwu

english_verse: The Pharisee was surprised that he did not wash his hands before eating.
translation_verse: Farasii hʋ aa naa gɛɛ, ʋ nyʋwa fɩyɛlɩ.

english_verse: You Pharisees are in for trouble! You give God a tenth of the spices from your gardens, such as mint and rue. But you cheat people, and you don't love God. You should be fair and kind to others and still give a tenth to God.
translation_verse: Mamaa Farasiima, ma sɩ na tʋwara yʋga! Paaponni hʋ buloŋ ma aa kpa we kɩdiiliye tɩyaŋ ba sʋwala sʋma, ma aa kaŋ ba kpaa leye fi rɛ, a kpa lɩdɩgɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ. Ma aa yaa wɩmʋlla no buloŋ nɛ, aŋ aa vɩya wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ kɛ, a bɩ kyo Wɩɩsɩ mɛ. Ma aa kaŋ ma kɩna kpaa leye fi fi, a kpa lɩdɩgɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ gɛɛ, ʋ yaa wɩwelii rɛ, amɛ ɛɛ bɩ daga anɩɩ ma vɩya wɩkaalɩya hʋ kɛ ta.

english_verse: As crowds were gathering around Jesus, he said: You people of today are evil! You keep looking for a sign from God. But what happened to Jonah is the only sign you will be given.
translation_verse: Nala aa gol Yesu gɛɛ, ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma gyɩnaŋ nala bɔmɔ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Ma baa dɩ ŋ yaa wɩmagɩl dɩ ma na a gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ dee hʋ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ. Ŋ bɩ sɩ yaa gɛɛ. Wɩmagɩl hʋ ma aa kyɛ, ma bɩ sɩ na ʋ, see wɩmagɩl hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa yaa ʋ tɩŋdaal Gyoona tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: No one lights a lamp and then hides it or puts it under a clay pot. A lamp is put on a lampstand, so everyone who comes into the house can see the light.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl daga ba a baa, “Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ nyɔgɔ fɩŋtɩna ʋ dɩya tɩyaŋ, aŋ kpa faŋa, koo a kpa gbaha kyige tɔ. Ʋ aa kpa dɩ ʋ saga fɩŋtɩŋdaaŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ dɩ ʋ kyaanɩ dɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ a tɩya nala hʋ buloŋ aa ko kɩ gyʋʋ.

english_verse: Your eyes are the lamp for your body. When your eyes are good, you have all the light you need. But when your eyes are bad, everything is dark.
translation_verse: Ɩ sɩya rɛ yaa ɩ teŋ kyaanʋʋ. Dɩ ɩ sɩya rɛ weliye, ɩ teŋ buloŋ aa kaŋ kyaanʋʋ rɛ, amɛ dɩ ɩ sɩya rɛ bɩ weliye, ɩ teŋ buloŋ we bilhuu tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: So be sure your light isn't darkness.
translation_verse: Ma pɔ dɩ kyaanʋʋ hʋ ma aa kana ta ko bɩrɩmɩ bilhuu.

english_verse: You fools! Didn't God make both the outside and the inside?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ dɔŋ bambugo! Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa marɩ ma teŋbiye, ʋ rɛ marɩ ma tɩsɩ mɛ.

english_verse: Yes, you are really in for trouble. You build monuments to honor the prophets your own people murdered long ago.
translation_verse: Ma sɩ na tʋwara yʋga! Ma aa saa bilweliye rɛ a we Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ tɩɩ ma naabaala aa kpʋwa.

english_verse: If you would only give what you have to the poor, everything you do would please God.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ma tɩsɩ pʋllɩ, ma kpa gbaŋsɩ hʋ tɩya kɩna tɩya nyaaba.

english_verse: But you are in for trouble! You are like unmarked graves that people walk on without even knowing it.
translation_verse: Ma sɩ na tʋwara yʋga! Ma kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bilni bee taŋha aa pɩŋ maga dɔmɔŋ, nala bɩ gyɩma aŋ kɩ vala ba nyuu, a kyogi ba sɩna.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: You teachers are also in for trouble! You load people down with heavy burdens, but you won't lift a finger to help them carry the loads.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Mamaa Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla mɛ, ma sɩ na tʋwara yʋga. Ma aa kpa kyʋgɩyoho rɛ a kyʋgɩ nala, ba bɩl lɔlɔ ba kyʋŋ. Aŋka ma tɩɩ mɛ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa pɛ ba tɩyaŋ mʋhʋ mɛ dɩ ba wuwo kyʋŋ kyʋgɩsɩ hʋ.

english_verse: You must think that was the right thing for your people to do, or else you would not have built monuments for the prophets they murdered.
translation_verse: Nyɛ daga anɩɩ ma laa di anɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ ma naabaala aa yaa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ. Beewɩya, ba kpʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ rɛ, ma mɛ saa bilni we ba.

english_verse: Because of your evil deeds, the Wisdom of God said, “I will send prophets and apostles to you. But you will murder some and mistreat others.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ wɩgyʋŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ basa rɛ a baa, ‘Ŋ sɩ ta ŋ tɩŋdaala abee ŋ kpambɩsɩ dɩ ba mʋ ba lee. Ba sɩ kpʋ ba badɔmɔŋ aŋ dɔgɩsɩ ba badɔmɔŋ mɛ.’

english_verse: You people living today will be punished for all the prophets who have been murdered since the beginning of the world.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ gyɩnaŋ nala akuu Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ ba aa kpʋwa a lɩɩ dʋnɩya piili tɩyaŋ buloŋ wɩya,

english_verse: This includes every prophet from the time of Abel to the time of Zechariah, who was murdered between the altar and the temple. You people will certainly be punished for all of this.
translation_verse: a lɩɩ saŋa hʋ ba aa kpʋʋ Abɛl a kaŋ mʋ pele saŋa hʋ ba aa kpʋʋ Zakarɩya Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ gyaŋwuwo tɩyaŋ, kogu hʋ tɩyaŋ ba aa kpa kɩna a lɩɩ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ abee Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩɩ paga tɩyaŋ. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ gyɩnaŋ nala buloŋ kɩŋkaŋ akuu nala no buloŋ wɩya.

english_verse: You teachers of the Law of Moses are really in for trouble! You carry the keys to the door of knowledge about God. But you never go in, and you keep others from going in.
translation_verse: Mamaa Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla, ma mɛ sɩ na tʋwara yʋga! Ma kaŋ dɩya hʋ nala aa sɩ gyʋʋ a na wɩgyʋŋ lara rɛ, aŋ lɩɩ saafɩɩbiye hʋ faŋa. Ma tɩɩ bee kyɛ dɩ ma gyʋʋ dɩya hʋ aŋ pɔ dɩ nala hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ba gyʋʋ mɛ ta gyʋwa.”

english_verse: Jesus was about to leave, but the teachers and the Pharisees wanted to get even with him. They tried to make him say what he thought about other things,
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ wɩya no tɩya ba ko teŋ, aŋ kɩ lɩɩ, Wɩɩsɩ teŋ dɩdagɩla hʋ abee Farasiima hʋ piili kɩ basɩ ʋ wɩya abee baaŋ, a kɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ wɩgyamaa.

english_verse: As thousands of people crowded around Jesus and were stepping on each other, he told his disciples: Be sure to guard against the dishonest teaching of the Pharisees! It is their way of fooling people.
translation_verse: Gyamaa hʋ gyɩ aa ko laŋŋɩ Yesu lee gyɩ bɩ kyalla, lee hʋ buloŋ gyɩ su abee nala, haalɩ ba kɩ fɩrɩgɩ dɔmɔŋ lee buloŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu laa sɩya basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ma gyɩŋ tɩya ma tɩɩ ma weliŋ abee Farasiima hʋ wɩya, beewɩya ba yaa minaafigi tɩmma rɛ. Ba wɩdagɩya kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ sɩbʋl. .

english_verse: God gives such beauty to everything that grows in the fields, even though it is here today and thrown into a fire tomorrow. Won't he do even more for you? You have such little faith!
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ rɛ aa leŋ ɔhɔ nyʋ, a waa, a weliye, ka ba aa bee pɩɩsɩ aŋ hɩla, ba kpa diŋ nyɔgɔ ta. Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ aa wuwo leŋ ɔhɔ weliye gɛɛ, bee rɛ tɩŋ ma kɩ bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo tɩya ma ma teŋbii kɩna? Ma bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di yʋga!

english_verse: But put God's work first, and these things will be yours as well. Treasures in Heaven (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma laa sɩya leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ wɩya kyɩl ma. Ʋ sɩ kpa ma kɩkyɛɛlɩya buloŋ pɛ tɩya ma.” Wɩɩsɩbee dʋwa Matiwu

english_verse: My friends, don't be afraid of people. They can kill you, but after that, there is nothing else they can do.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Ŋ kyaŋsɩ, ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, ma ta kɩ fáá nal hʋ aa sɩ wuwo kpʋ ma teŋbiye dʋŋ, aŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa ma wɩbɔŋ buloŋ pɛ.

english_verse: Even the hairs on your head are counted. So don't be afraid! You are worth much more than many sparrows. Telling Others about Christ (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ wɩɩ buloŋ wɩya yaa ma kambɩŋ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ paalɩ gyɩŋ ma nyupʋna mɛ gba nyʋwa rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ lee tɩyaŋ, ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ kaŋ tɔnɔ te kokogyamaa rɛ.

english_verse: Sell what you have and give the money to the poor. Make yourselves moneybags that never wear out. Make sure your treasure is safe in heaven, where thieves cannot steal it and moths cannot destroy it.
translation_verse: Ma kpa ma kɩna buloŋ yallɩ a kpa molbiye hʋ tɩya nyaaba. Ma kɩ kyɛ kɩna hʋ aa bee kyogi a biŋ ma tɩɩ Wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ. Doŋ nɛ ba bɩ sɩ teŋ, beewɩya gaal tuwo doŋ aa sɩ gaa ba, tuyi mɛ tuwo doŋ aa sɩ di ba.

english_verse: At that time the Holy Spirit will tell you what to say. A Rich Fool
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩɩ tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ sɩ daga ma wɩɩ hʋ ma aa sɩ basɩ.” Yesu maga kɩna tɩɩna kɩdɩgɩ aa yaa bambugi namaga

english_verse: But God said to him, “You fool! Tonight you will die. Then who will get what you have stored up?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ, ‘Ɛɛ dɔŋ bambugi! Tebine no buloŋ ŋ sɩ laa ɩ mɩɩbol ɩ lee. Ka dɩ á na nal hʋ aa sɩ tɩŋ kɩna hʋ ɩ aa kyɛɛ biŋ.’

english_verse: If you tell others that you belong to me, the Son of Man will tell God's angels that you are my followers.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ suri ʋ nyʋwa gyamaa tɩyaŋ a baa dɩ ʋ yaa ŋ hatɩnna rɛ, Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye mɛ sɩ basɩ gɛɛ tɩɩ tɩya ʋ Wɩɩsɩ malɩkasɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But if you reject me, you will be rejected in front of them.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa vɩya ŋ wɩya gyamaa tɩyaŋ, Mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye mɛ sɩ vɩya ʋ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ malɩkasɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When you are brought to trial in the synagogues or before rulers or officials, don't worry about how you will defend yourselves or what you will say.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ kaŋ ma gyʋʋ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ, koo a kaŋ ma mʋ kuworo abee nɩhɩyasɩ sɩya dɩ ba di ma sarɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ ma bembiye kɩ sii abee gɛɛ ma aa sɩ basɩ a laa ma tɩɩ, koo wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ ma aa sɩ basɩ.

english_verse: A man in a crowd said to Jesus, “Teacher, tell my brother to give me my share of what our father left us when he died.”
translation_verse: Yesu fa aa basɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya nɩgyamaa hʋ tɩyaŋ, baal kɩdɩgɩ sii basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, á kuwo sʋba rɛ aŋ ka ʋ kyaŋ. Ŋ aa sʋla ɩ dɩ ɩ basɩ tɩya ŋ maana dɩ ʋ kaŋ kyaŋ hʋ kpaa, a kpa ŋ tol tɩya ŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Who gave me the right to settle arguments between you and your brother?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ bagyʋwa, aŋnɛ rɛ lɩɩ ŋ dɩ ŋ di ma wɩɩ no sarɩya, koo dɩ ŋ kaŋ ma kuwo kyaŋ kpaa ma.”

english_verse: and he said to himself, “What can I do? I don't have a place large enough to store everything.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ gyɩ kɩ bɩɩnɩ ʋ tɩya tɩyaŋ a baa, ‘Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ sɩ yaa? Ŋ bɩ kaŋ lee ŋ aa sɩ we ŋ kɩna no buloŋ.’

english_verse: Later, he said, “Now I know what I'll do. I'll tear down my barns and build bigger ones, where I can store all my grain and other goods.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ ʋ liisi ʋ tɩya tɩyaŋ a baa, ‘Nyɛ rɛ ŋ sɩ yaa! Ŋ sɩ kyeŋŋi ŋ busolo ŋ aa kana, aŋ marɩ saa kɩbala, a yaŋ kpa ŋ panyʋwa kɩna hʋ buloŋ a we doŋ.

english_verse: Look how the wild flowers grow! They don't work hard to make their clothes. But I tell you Solomon with all his wealth wasn't as well clothed as one of these flowers.
translation_verse: Ma na tɩɩfɩɩla! Ba bee tʋŋ tʋma, ba bɩ sʋwa gannɩ mɛ kɩ laalɩ, amɛ ba weliye rɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Saŋa hʋ Kuwori Solomɔn fa aa we ʋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ, ʋ fa kaŋ kɩna rɛ weliŋ. Amɛ ʋ gannɩ mɛ gba fa bɩ weliye maga tɩɩfɩɩla no.

english_verse: Only people who don't know God are always worrying about such things. Your Father knows what you need.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, ba aa rɛ aa lʋga kɩ kyɛ kɩna no. Ma Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ma aa kyɛ kɩna no rɛ.

english_verse: But suppose one of the servants thinks that the master won't return until late. Suppose that servant starts beating all the other servants and eats and drinks and gets drunk.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ rɛ ko liisi ʋ tɩya tɩyaŋ anɩɩ ʋ dɩya hʋ tɩɩna sɩ pɩɩsɩ, ka dɩ ʋ piili kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ hʋ, ba baala abee haana buloŋ, aŋ kɩ di kɩdigalma, a nyʋwa sɩŋ kɩ bugo,

english_verse: Do you think that I came to bring peace to earth? No indeed! I came to make people choose sides.
translation_verse: Ma bɩɩna anɩɩ fɩyɛlʋʋ rɛ ŋ kaŋ ko dʋnɩya? Fɩyɛlʋʋ daa! Ŋ ko rɛ dɩ nala kuu ŋ wɩya a porigi dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Servants are fortunate if their master finds them awake and ready when he comes! I promise you he will get ready and let his servants sit down so he can serve them.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩ yaa wɩwelii rɛ a tɩya tʋŋtʋnna hʋ dɩ ba dɩya tɩɩna hʋ rɛ ko puu ba dɩ ba hɔŋ kɩ gyegili ʋ. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ʋ sɩ wuri ʋ gabal, aŋ leŋ dɩ tʋŋtʋnna hʋ hɔŋ dɩ ʋ yaa kɩdiiliye tɩya ba dɩ ba di.

english_verse: Those servants are really fortunate if their master finds them ready, even though he comes late at night or early in the morning.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ rɛ mɩɩgɩ ko tekere koo saŋa kɛ buloŋ, aŋ ko puu ba dɩ ba hɔŋ kɩ gyegili ʋ, ʋ sɩ yaa wɩwelii rɛ kɩŋkaŋ a tɩya ba.

english_verse: You would surely not let a thief break into your home, if you knew when the thief was coming.
translation_verse: Ma bɩɩnɩ wɩɩ no na weliŋ! Dɩ nal lɛ gyɩŋ saŋa hʋ gaala aa sɩ ko gaa ʋ dɩya kɩna, ʋ sɩ bara doo a hɔŋ pɔ ʋ dɩya hʋ dɩ gaala hʋ ta ko gaa ʋ kɩna.

english_verse: Peter asked Jesus, “Did you say this just for us or for everyone?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Tɩɩna, á dʋŋ nɛ ɩ maga namaga no kɩ tɩya koo, ɩ maga kɩ tɩya nal buloŋ nɛ?”

english_verse: The Lord answered: Who are faithful and wise servants? Who are the ones the master will put in charge of giving the other servants their food supplies at the proper time?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ á Tɩɩna Yesu mɩɩgɩ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Kɩbee rɛ yaŋ yaa tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ abee wɩgyʋŋ? Ʋ rɛ yaa nal hʋ ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ aa lɩya dɩ ʋ kɩ deŋ ʋ dɩya, aŋ pɛ kɩ tɩya ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ mɛ kɩdiiliye saŋa hʋ ʋ aa maga dɩ ʋ tɩya ba.

english_verse: A servant who is always faithful will surely be put in charge of everything the master owns.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ sɩ kpa ʋ kɩna buloŋ we tʋŋtʋnnɩ no nosi tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ kɩ deŋ.

english_verse: If that happens, the master will come on a day and at a time when the servant least expects him. That servant will then be punished and thrown out with the servants who cannot be trusted.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ hʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ no aa bɩ yɩyɛla abee saŋa hʋ ʋ aa bɩ gyɩma, haŋ kyɛɛ hʋ rɛ ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko. Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ sɩ kana ʋ, a dɔgɩsɩ ʋ weliŋ, aŋ kile ʋ ta, a leŋ dɩ ʋ na tʋwara hʋ nala hʋ aa bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di aa sɩ na.

english_verse: If servants are not ready or willing to do what their master wants them to do, they will be beaten hard.
translation_verse: Tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ aa gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ yaa aŋ bɩ yaa siri dɩ ʋ yaa haŋ wɩɩ hʋ, ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ sɩ vɩɩrɩ ʋ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: But servants who don't know what their master wants them to do will not be beaten so hard for doing wrong. If God has been generous with you, he will expect you to serve him well. But if he has been more than generous, he will expect you to serve him even better. Not Peace, but Trouble (Matthew
translation_verse: Amɛ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ aa bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ yaa, aŋ yaa wɩɩ hʋ aa maga dɩ ba vɩɩrɩ ʋ mɛ, ba sɩ vɩɩrɩ ʋ mʋhʋ. Dɩ ba kpaa kɩna yʋga a tɩya nal dɩ ʋ kɩ deŋ, ba sɩ kɩ kyɛ kɩna yʋga rɛ a lɩɩ ʋ lee. Dɩ ba kpaa kɩna yʋga kɩŋkaŋ mɛ a tɩya nal dɩ ʋ kɩ deŋ, ba sɩ kɩ kyɛ kɩna yʋga kɩŋkaŋ a lɩɩ ʋ lee.” Nala sɩ kuu Yesu wɩya a porigi dɔmɔŋ Matiwu

english_verse: I came to set fire to the earth, and I wish it were already on fire!
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Ŋ ko dɩ ŋ we dʋnɩya diŋ nɛ. Ŋ kɛ wɩkyɛɛlɩɩ rɛ fa gba yaa dɩ diŋ hʋ fa piili kɩ di lagɩlagɩ no.

english_verse: I am going to be put to a hard test. And I will have to suffer a lot of pain until it is over.
translation_verse: Nɩɩfori kɩdɩgɩ rɛ we doŋ ba aa sɩ fo ŋ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ bɩ foo ŋ teŋ, ŋ hakɩla bɩ sɩ pɩŋ lɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: Fathers and sons will turn against one another, and mothers and daughters will do the same. Mothers-in-law and daughters-in-law will also turn against each other. Knowing What To Do (Matthew
translation_verse: Kuwoma bee ba biibaala sɩ gʋla kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ, dɩ nɩmma bee ba toliye mɛ gʋla kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ. Balama nɩmma bee ba biihaana sɩ gʋla kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ.” Ʋ maga dɩ ma gyɩŋ saŋa hʋ wɩya no aa sɩ yaa rɛ Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus said to all the people: As soon as you see a cloud coming up in the west, you say, “It's going to rain,” and it does.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya nala hʋ a baa, “Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko na taala sɩŋ ma dosɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ma aa baa dɩ duwoŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ nɩɩ rɛ. Duwoŋ mɛ kɔnɩ aa nɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: When the south wind blows, you say, “It's going to get hot,” and it does.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ bɩl ko na puwo lɩɩ fuwomemii dɩɩlaŋ, ma aa baa dɩ lee sɩ nɩma. Lee mɛ kɔnɩ aa nɩma rɛ.

english_verse: Are you trying to fool someone? You can predict the weather by looking at the earth and sky, but you don't really know what's going on right now.
translation_verse: Minaafigi tɩmma! Ma aa wuwo deŋ taŋha rɛ a deŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu mɛ a wuwo daga wɩɩ hʋ aa sɩ yaa. Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ma bɩ sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ aa yaa dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ lagɩlagɩ no memii?” Dɔmɔŋ mɩɩgɩ marɩɩ Matiwu

english_verse: When someone accuses you of something, try to settle things before you are taken to court. If you don't, you will be dragged before the judge. Then the judge will hand you over to the jailer, and you will be locked up.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ sama ɩ, a kana ɩ kɩ mʋ sarɩya lidiilii, yaa kuwokeri dɩ ma basɩ wɩɩ hʋ we dɔmɔŋ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ aŋ na pele. Dɩ gɛɛ daa, ʋ sɩ kana ɩ tarɩ mʋ sarɩdiil lee, dɩ ʋ mɛ kpa ɩ we porisi noŋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ba kana ɩ mʋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You won't get out until you have paid the last cent you owe.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, ba bɩ sɩ lɩɩ ɩ dɩya no tɩyaŋ, see dɩ ɩ tuŋ kyɩŋ hʋ ba aa kere tɩya ɩ teŋ.”

english_verse: About this same time Jesus was told that Pilate had given orders for some people from Galilee to be killed while they were offering sacrifices.
translation_verse: Yesu ha gyɩ aa basɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya nala hʋ gɛɛ rɛ, nala badɔmɔŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ gɛɛ hʋ Pilato gyɩ aa leŋ ba kpʋ Galili tɩmma badɔmɔŋ. Galili tɩmma no gyɩ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, a kpa kɩna kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, ka Pilato gyɩ kpʋ ba.

english_verse: Jesus replied: Do you think that these people were worse sinners than everyone else in Galilee just because of what happened to them?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ma bɩɩna anɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ Pilato gyɩ aa kpʋʋ Galili tɩmma no daga anɩɩ ba aa rɛ yaa wɩbɔmɔ a te Galili tɩmma buloŋ koo?

english_verse: Not at all! But you can be sure that if you don't turn back to God, every one of you will also be killed.
translation_verse: Aayɩ, ɛɛ daa. Dɩ mamaa rɛ bɩ bɩrɩma lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ, ma buloŋ mɛ sɩ sʋba.

english_verse: Jesus said, “What is God's kingdom like? What can I compare it with?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ nala hʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ kɩɩ? Bekiŋ nɛ ŋ sɩ kpa ʋ magɩsɩ?

english_verse: Not at all! But you can be sure that if you don't turn back to God, every one of you will also die. A Story about a Fig Tree
translation_verse: Aayɩ, ɛɛ daa. Ma leŋ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma, dɩ ma bɩ bɩrɩma lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ, ma buloŋ mɛ sɩ sʋba.” Tɩya hʋ aa bee nɔnɔ namaga

english_verse: Jesus then told them this story: A man had a fig tree growing in his vineyard. One day he went out to pick some figs, but he didn't find any.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu maga namaga tɩya ba a baa, “Baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ gyɩ pɔɔ tutogo ʋ baga tɩyaŋ. Nyɛ rɛ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ ʋ mʋ dɩ ʋ tɔrɩ ʋ nɔnɔ dɩ tɩya hʋ bɩ nɔnɔ.

english_verse: The gardener answered, “Master, leave it for another year. I'll dig around it and put some manure on it to make it grow.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ bagɩdaal hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, ‘Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, leŋ dɩ ʋ ha sɩŋ bɩndɩgɩ pɛ dɩ á na. Ŋ sɩ hulo baarɩ ʋ memii, a we nɔbɩŋ.

english_verse: Maybe it will have figs on it next year. If it doesn't, you can have it cut down.” Healing a Woman on the Sabbath
translation_verse: Bɩna dɩɩlaŋ dɩ ʋ rɛ ko nɔnɔ, ʋ yaa wɩwelii rɛ. Amɛ dɩ ʋ rɛ ko bɩ nɔnɔ, ɛɛ kɛ ɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ŋ ŋmaŋ ta.”’ Yesu tɩɩbɩ haaŋ kɩdɩgɩ Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ

english_verse: One Sabbath, Jesus was teaching in a synagogue,
translation_verse: Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ Yesu gyɩ aa daga nala Wɩɩsɩ wɩya gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: When Jesus saw the woman, he called her over and said, “You are now well.”
translation_verse: Yesu aa naa haaŋ hʋ, ʋ yɩrɩ ʋ a baa, “Haŋtolibiye, ɩ wɩɩla hʋ lɩɩ ɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: The Lord replied, “Are you trying to fool someone? Won't any one of you untie your ox or donkey and lead it out to drink on a Sabbath?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ á Tɩɩna Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ dɔŋ minaafigi tɩmma! Ma kɩbee rɛ we doŋ aa bɩ sɩ puri ʋ nɔpalɩya koo ʋ kokumo a kaŋ mʋ dɩ ba nyʋwa nɩɩ Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ?

english_verse: This woman belongs to the family of Abraham, but Satan has kept her bound for
translation_verse: Haaŋ no yaa Abɩraham doho nal lɛ. Sɩtaanɩ kana ʋ vʋwa biŋ bɩsɩ fi abee kyori. Ʋ yaŋ bɩ maga dɩ á laa ʋ ta Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ koo?”

english_verse: Jesus' words made his enemies ashamed. But everyone else in the crowd was happy about the wonderful things he was doing. A Mustard Seed and Yeast (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, hɩɩsɩ kaŋ ʋ dɔmɔ hʋ buloŋ, aŋka nɩkaalɩya hʋ kɛ tenni fɩyɛlɩ wɩmagɩla hʋ Yesu aa yaa wɩya. Yesu maga namagɩsɩ balɩya a daga ɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ aa kɩya Matiwu

english_verse: At that time some Pharisees came to Jesus and said, “You had better get away from here, because Herod wants to kill you!”
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ Farasiima badɔmɔŋ mʋ Yesu lee, a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ʋ maga dɩ ɩ lɩɩ Galili paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya Kuwori Hɛrɔtɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ kpʋ ɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: But I am going on my way today and tomorrow and the next day. After all, Jerusalem is the place where prophets are killed. Jesus Loves Jerusalem (Matthew
translation_verse: Abee gɛɛ buloŋ, ʋ maga dɩ ŋ we ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ gyɩnaŋ abee kyiye abee kyiyetuwo buloŋ, a kɩ mʋ Gyerusalɛm. Beewɩya, ka doŋ dʋŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba foŋ kɩ kpʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala buloŋ.

english_verse: There the ones who are now least important will be the most important, and those who are now most important will be least important. Jesus and Herod
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, nala aa yaa nɩbiisi gyɩnaŋ, ba sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko yaa nɩbala, ka dɩ nala mɛ aa yaa nɩbala gyɩnaŋ mɩɩgɩ ko yaa nɩbiisi.” Yesu kyo Gyerusalɛm nala Matiwu

english_verse: Jesus said to them: Go tell that fox, “I am going to force out demons and heal people today and tomorrow, and three days later I'll be through.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma mʋ basɩ tɩya haŋ badarɩ hʋ, dɩ ŋ aa kile gyɩŋbɔmɔ rɛ nala tɩyaŋ, aŋ kɩ tɩɩbɩ nala mɛ daha gyɩnaŋ abee kyiye, dɩ kyiyetuwo rɛ ŋ sɩ teŋ ŋ tʋma.

english_verse: It is like what happens when someone plants a mustard seed in a garden. The seed grows as big as a tree, and birds nest in its branches.”
translation_verse: Ʋ kɩɩ kɩdoho kɩdɩgɩ bii aa muro kɩŋkaŋ nɛ ba kɩ yɩrɩ masɩtadɩ. Baal kɩdɩgɩ kpa doho ʋ baga tɩyaŋ. Ʋ nyʋ, a waa, a bɩrɩmɩ tɩɩbal. Ɛɛ rɛ digibiisi ko sʋwa ba gyannɩ ʋ naasɩ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “What can I compare God's kingdom with?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bekiŋ nɛ ŋ bɩl sɩ kpa Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ magɩsɩ?

english_verse: As Jesus was on his way to Jerusalem, he taught the people in the towns and villages.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ sii kɩ mʋ Gyerusalɛm nɛ, a gɔllɩ tɩŋ tɔnɩ hʋ buloŋ aa we doŋ dɩɩlaŋ, a kɩ daga nala Wɩɩsɩ wɩya.

english_verse: Once the owner of the house gets up and locks the door, you will be left standing outside. You will knock on the door and say, “Sir, open the door for us!” But the owner will answer, “I don't know a thing about you!”
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ dɩya hʋ tɩɩna sɩ kaŋ ʋ dimbee tɔ. Ka dɩ ma ko sɩŋ gyaŋhala tɩyaŋ, a kɩ ŋmaa boro hʋ a baa, ‘Á Tɩɩna, kaŋ dimbeenyʋwa hʋ suri tɩya ma.’ Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ sɩ basɩ tɩya ma a baa, ‘Ŋ kɛ bɩ gyɩŋ ma lee buloŋ tɩyaŋ.’

english_verse: But he will say, “I really don't know who you are! Get away from me, you evil people!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl sɩ basɩ tɩya ma a baa, ‘Ŋ baa ŋ bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ma aa lɩya. Ma fasɩ lɩɩ ŋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ dɔŋ nɩbɔmɔ!’

english_verse: Then when you have been thrown outside, you will weep and grit your teeth because you will see Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, and all the prophets in God's kingdom.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ ma sɩ na Abɩraham abee Azɩkɩ abee Gyeekɔbɩ, abee Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala buloŋ, dɩ ba hɔŋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ ma kɛ sɩŋ gyaŋhal tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ma sɩ wii sɩnɩɩl, a kyaŋ ma nyɩŋa, aŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ doŋ.

english_verse: People will come from all directions and sit down to feast in God's kingdom.
translation_verse: Nala sɩ lɩɩ dʋnɩya logiŋ logiŋ buloŋ a gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ, a hɔŋ kɩ di kɩna aŋ kɩ gbɩyalɩ.

english_verse: Jerusalem, Jerusalem! Your people have killed the prophets and have stoned the messengers who were sent to you. I have often wanted to gather your people, as a hen gathers her chicks under her wings. But you wouldn't let me.
translation_verse: O! Gyerusalɛm tɩmma! Mamaa rɛ aa kpʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ buloŋ, aŋ paa bʋwa kɩ yaga nala hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩma dɩ ba ko ma lee. Ŋ lʋga rɛ dɩ ŋ fa kaŋ ma buloŋ ko laŋŋɩ dɔmɔŋ, a kyige tɔ ma anɩɩ gyimii aa kyige tɔ ʋ biisi gɛɛ, ka ma bɩ laa.

english_verse: Now your temple will be deserted. You won't see me again until the time when you say, “Blessed is the one who comes in the name of the Lord.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, Wɩɩsɩ baanɩ ma bee tɩya ma rɛ. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ma bɩl bɩ sɩ na ŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ kyɛɛ hʋ ma aa sɩ na ŋ a baa, ‘Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyiyeli nal hʋ aa ko á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ feŋ tɩyaŋ.”’

english_verse: All of a sudden a man with swollen legs stood up in front of him.
translation_verse: Dɩ baal kɩdɩgɩ naasɩ bee ʋ nosi buloŋ aa pʋʋsa mɛ gyɩ we doŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sii kpa mʋ Yesu lee.

english_verse: Jesus turned and asked the Pharisees and the teachers of the Law of Moses, “Is it right to heal on the Sabbath?”
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ dɩdagɩla abee Farasiima hʋ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩya ŋmanɩɩ dɩ á kɩ tɩɩbɩ nala Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ koo gɛɛ ŋmanɩɩ tuwo?”

english_verse: But they did not say a word. Jesus took hold of the man. Then he healed him and sent him away.
translation_verse: Ba buloŋ tallɩ ba nyʋʋsɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kaŋ baal hʋ, a tɩɩbɩ ʋ aŋ leŋ ʋ mʋ dɩya.

english_verse: There was nothing they could say. How To Be a Guest
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ nyɛ, ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ wuwo laa wɩɩ basɩ. Yesu basɩ á tɩɩ kaŋ hʋwɔlɩɩ abee bɔnyɛ wɩya

english_verse: Jesus saw how the guests had tried to take the best seats. So he told them:
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Yesu na dɩ nala hʋ ba aa yɩra ko gyʋʋ bagɩsɩ lɩɩ nɩbala lɩhɔnɩya a kɩ hɔŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ maga namaga no tɩya ba a baa,

english_verse: When you are invited to a wedding feast, don't sit in the best place. Someone more important may have been invited.
translation_verse: “Dɩ ba yɩrɩ ɩ dɩ ɩ ko laŋŋɩbal, ta laa sɩya mʋ bagɩsɩ lɩɩ nɩbal lɩhɔnɩɩ a hɔŋ. Kapuwo ba yɩrɩ nal mɛ aa te ɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ ko laŋŋʋʋ hʋ.

english_verse: If you put yourself above others, you will be put down. But if you humble yourself, you will be honored.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa gyigisi ʋ tɩɩ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kana ʋ hʋwɔlɩ. Nal hʋ mɛ aa kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa ʋ yohuŋ.”

english_verse: Then Jesus said to the man who had invited him: When you give a dinner or a banquet, don't invite your friends and family and relatives and rich neighbors. If you do, they will invite you in return, and you will be paid back.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya nal hʋ aa yɩrɩ ʋ dɩ ʋ ko di kɩdiiliye hʋ a baa, “Dɩ ɩ rɛ ko yaa kɩdiiliye, ta yɩrɩ ɩ kyaŋsɩ koo ɩ naabalɩya, koo ɩ lʋlla, koo ɩ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ kɩna tɩmma. Beewɩya ba mɛ sɩ wuwo maakyiye yɩrɩ ɩ dɩ ɩ ko di kɩdiiliye ba lee a tuŋ ɩ kyɩŋ.

english_verse: They cannot pay you back. But God will bless you and reward you when his people rise from death. The Great Banquet (Matthew
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa gɛɛ, Wɩɩsɩ mɛ sɩ pɛ ɩ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ba aa rɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo tuŋ ɩ kyɩŋ. Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tuŋ ɩ kyɩŋ kyɛɛ hʋ tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma aa sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.” Yesu maga laŋŋɩbal namaga Matiwu

english_verse: When the servant returned, he said, “Master, I've done what you told me, and there is still plenty of room for more people.”
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ dɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ lɩya rɛ, a yɩrɩ nala hʋ buloŋ ba ko gyʋʋ. Ka ʋ gyʋʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ anɩɩ nala hʋ ko rɛ, dɩ amɛ lee ha kaa rɛ.

english_verse: After Jesus had finished speaking, one of the guests said, “The greatest blessing of all is to be at the banquet in God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ wɩɩ no, ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ aa hɔŋ kɩ di kɩna hʋ kɩdɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa sɩ di kɩna Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus told him: A man once gave a great banquet and invited a lot of guests.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu maga namaga no a baa, “Baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ gyɩ sii yɩrɩ laŋŋɩbal, a leŋ ba yaa kɩdiiliye su lee buloŋ.

english_verse: When the banquet was ready, he sent a servant to tell the guests, “Everything is ready! Please come.”
translation_verse: Kɩdiiliye hʋ gyɩ aa ko yaa siri, ʋ tɩŋ ʋ tʋŋtʋnna kɩdɩgɩ dɩ ʋ mʋ basɩ tɩya nala hʋ ʋ aa yɩra anɩɩ wɩɩ buloŋ yaa siri rɛ, dɩ ba kɩ ko.

english_verse: One guest after another started making excuses. The first one said, “I bought some land, and I've got to look it over. Please excuse me.”
translation_verse: Ʋ aa mʋʋ yɩrɩ ba, ba buloŋ vɩya, ka kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ kɩ daga wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo mʋ. Laa sɩya nal hʋ baa, ‘Baga rɛ ŋ yɔbɔ a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ mʋ na. Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ aa sʋla ɩ rɛ, ŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo ko.’

english_verse: Another guest said, “I bought five teams of oxen, and I need to try them out. Please excuse me.”
translation_verse: Kɩdɩgɩ mɛ baa, ‘Nɔpalɩya tʋŋnyʋwa bʋnɔŋ nɛ ŋ yɔbɔ a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ kaŋ mʋ pala na. Ɛɛwɩya, sʋlɩɩ rɛ, ŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo ko.’

english_verse: The servant told his master what happened, and the master became so angry he said, “Go as fast as you can to every street and alley in town! Bring in everyone who is poor or paralyzed or blind or lame.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ. Ʋ aa nɩɩ gɛɛ, ʋ baaŋ sii kɩŋkaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, ‘Lɩɩ lagɩlagɩ, a mʋ ŋmaŋbala hʋ nyʋʋsɩ abee bee hʋ tɩyaŋ ŋmaŋbiisi buloŋ, a yɩrɩ nyaaba abee gbarɩga abee nyʋlɩma, abee nala hʋ naasɩ abee ba nosi aa sʋba buloŋ.’

english_verse: His master then told him, “Go out along the back roads and make people come in, so my house will be full.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, ‘Bɩl lɩɩ mʋ bagɩsɩ ŋmaŋsɩ abee bagɩsɩ hʋ tɩɩ, a yɩrɩ nala dɩ ba ko gyʋʋ, dɩ dɩya hʋ su.’

english_verse: Not one of the guests I first invited will get even a bite of my food!” Being a Disciple (Matthew
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, nala hʋ ŋ aa laa sɩya yɩrɩ hʋ, ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nyʋwa paalɩ bɩ sɩ dige kɩdiiliye no.” Yesu hal tɩŋɩɩ memii Matiwu

english_verse: Large crowds were walking along with Jesus, when he turned and said:
translation_verse: Yesu bɩl aa lɩɩ kpa ŋmanɩɩ kɩ mʋ, nɩgyamaa sii paa tɩŋa ʋ hal. Nyɛ rɛ ʋ mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ba a baa,

english_verse: You cannot be my disciple, unless you love me more than you love your father and mother, your wife and children, and your brothers and sisters. You cannot follow me unless you love me more than you love your own life.
translation_verse: “Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ sɩ ko ŋ lee, see dɩ ʋ tɩɩna kyo ŋ a te gɛɛ ʋ aa kyo ʋ kuwo abee ʋ naa, abee ʋ haaŋ bee ʋ balɩya, abee ʋ naabalɩya abee ʋ tɩɩ. Dɩ gɛɛ daa, ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa ŋ hatɩnnɩ.

english_verse: You cannot be my disciple unless you carry your own cross and follow me.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ kpaa ʋ tɩɩ daagarɩɩ baasɩ a kɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal, ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ʋ yaa ŋ hatɩnnɩ.

english_verse: Suppose one of you wants to build a tower. What is the first thing you will do? Won't you sit down and figure out how much it will cost and if you have enough money to pay for it?
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ saa dɩya, ʋ aa laa sɩya hɔŋ nɛ, a bɩɩnɩ na dɩ molbiye hʋ ʋ aa kana sɩ wuwo saa dɩya hʋ teŋ koo ba bɩ sɩ wuwo.

english_verse: Otherwise, you will start building the tower, but not be able to finish. Then everyone who sees what is happening will laugh at you.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ rɛ bɩ yaa gɛɛ, aŋ piili dɩya hʋ sayɩ, dɩ molbiye hʋ ko buwo dɩ ʋ bɩ saa dɩya hʋ teŋ, nala sɩ na wɩboriye hʋ ʋ aa yaa, a mʋma ʋ.

english_verse: They will say, “You started building, but could not finish the job.”
translation_verse: Ba sɩ baa, ‘Baal no piile dɩ ʋ saa dɩya rɛ aŋ bɩ wuwo saa teŋ.’

english_verse: If he thinks he won't be able to defend himself, he will send messengers and ask for peace while the other king is still a long way off.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko bɩɩnɩ na anɩɩ ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo yuwo di ʋ kuwori dɔŋtɩɩna hʋ, see dɩ ʋ ta tɩŋdaala dɩ ba mʋ kyeŋ ʋ kuwori dɔŋtɩɩna hʋ libolii tɩyaŋ, a sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ba marɩ dɔmɔŋ.’

english_verse: Salt is good, but if it no longer tastes like salt, how can it be made to taste salty again?
translation_verse: “Yɩsɩ sʋma, amɛ dɩ ʋ sʋmɩŋ nɛ ko lɩɩ, ɩ bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa dɩ ʋ sʋma.

english_verse: It is no longer good for the soil or even for the manure pile. People simply throw it out. If you have ears, pay attention!
translation_verse: Ɩ bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo kpa ʋ we baga tɩyaŋ mɛ gba dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ kɩna marɩ. See ɩ aa kpaa yuwo ta, beewɩya ʋ bɩl bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ. Nala hʋ aa kaŋ dɩgɩna, ma gyegili nɩɩ wɩya no weliŋ.”

english_verse: I will go to my father and say to him, ‘Father, I have sinned against God in heaven and against you.
translation_verse: Ŋ sɩ sii a mɩɩgɩ mʋ ŋ kuwo lee. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko mʋ, ŋ sɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, Ŋ kuwo, wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa yaa, ŋ yaa kyogi Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, a yaa kyogi ɩ mɛ.

english_verse: The younger son said to his father, “Give me my share of the property.” So the father divided his property between his two sons.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ haŋbiye hʋ tɩɩna sii basɩ tɩya ʋ kuwo a baa, ‘Ŋ kuwo, kyaŋ hʋ ɩ aa sɩ sʋba aŋ ka tɩya ma, kpa ŋ tol tɩya ŋ.’ Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kaŋ kɩna hʋ kpaa ba.

english_verse: He had spent everything, when a bad famine spread through that whole land. Soon he had nothing to eat.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ʋ kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ aa tene tɩyaŋ nɛ losi sii gyʋʋ doŋ paalʋʋ kɩŋkaŋ, ʋ kyɛ kɩdiilii buloŋ lɔlɔ dɩ ʋ di.

english_verse: Tax collectors and sinners were all crowding around to listen to Jesus.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ lampolaala abee wɩbɔŋyaala yʋga sii ko Yesu lee rɛ, dɩ ba gyegili nɩɩ ʋ wɩbasɩɩ.

english_verse: So the Pharisees and the teachers of the Law of Moses started grumbling, “This man is friendly with sinners. He even eats with them.”
