translation_verse: “Ba bɩl saba rɛ dɩ nala sɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya, nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya feŋ tɩyaŋ, dʋnɩya logiŋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ba sɩ piili Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ a basɩ tɩya nala dɩ ba bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpa ba wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ba.

english_verse: you must tell everything that has happened.
translation_verse: Mamaa rɛ yaa wɩya no buloŋ aa yaa daŋsɩya diile.

english_verse: As he was doing this, he left and was taken up to heaven.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ba hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ leŋ ba ta, ka Wɩɩsɩ kpa ʋ kaŋ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩbee.

english_verse: After his disciples had worshiped him, they returned to Jerusalem and were very happy.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba kyʋwalɩ ʋ doŋ aŋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ Gyerusalɛm abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ yʋga.

english_verse: From the very beginning the Word was with God.
translation_verse: Haŋ saŋa hʋ buloŋ dɩ ʋ bee Wɩɩsɩ we doŋ nɛ.

english_verse: received its life from him, and his life gave light to everyone.
translation_verse: Wɩbii no rɛ aa tɩya mɩɩbol. Mɩɩbol no rɛ kaŋ pʋlʋŋ ko kɩ tɩya nala, a leŋ ba gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ.

english_verse: The light keeps shining in the dark, and darkness has never put it out.
translation_verse: Pʋlʋŋ hʋ aa kyaanɩ bilhuu tɩyaŋ nɛ, amɛ bilhuu hʋ mɛ bɩ maakyiye wuwo tɔ pʋlʋŋ hʋ.

english_verse: God sent a man named John,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaal kɩdɩgɩ ba kɩ yɩrɩ Gyɔɔŋ.

english_verse: who came to tell about the light and to lead all people to have faith.
translation_verse: Ʋ ko a basɩ pʋlʋŋ hʋ wɩya tɩya dʋnɩya nala dɩ ba nɩɩ a laa di.

english_verse: The true light that shines on everyone was coming into the world.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa yaa pʋlʋŋ hʋ tɩɩ sɩ ko tuu dʋnɩya a kyaanɩ we nal nal buloŋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ba na ʋ.

english_verse: The Word was in the world, but no one knew him, though God had made the world with his Word.
translation_verse: Nal no gyɩ we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ. Abee Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ tɩyaŋ a marɩ dʋnɩya mɛ, ka dʋnɩya nala gyɩ bɩ gyɩma ʋ.

english_verse: He came into his own world, but his own nation did not welcome him.
translation_verse: Ʋ ko ʋ tɩɩ nala lee rɛ, ka ba bɩ laa ʋ we.

english_verse: They were not God's children by nature or because of any human desires. God himself was the one who made them his children.
translation_verse: Nala no bɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi anɩɩ haaŋ bee baal aa lʋl ba gɛɛ, ba kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ lɩɩ ba, ba yaa ʋ balɩya.

english_verse: The Word became a human being and lived here with us. We saw his true glory, the glory of the only Son of the Father. From him the complete gifts of undeserved grace and truth have come down to us.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ wɩbii hʋ bɩrɩmɩ nihuwobiŋ a ko we á tɩyaŋ, á na ʋ gaŋdarɩ, a na ʋ bɔnyɛ abee ʋ kyori aa maga gɛɛ, a na ʋ wɩtɩɩ mɛ mɔgɩsɩ. Gaŋdaa-feŋ hʋ ʋ aa kana, ʋ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ rɛ kpaa tɩya ʋ, a daga anɩɩ ʋ rɛ yaa ʋ Biidɩgɩ dʋŋ.

english_verse: Because of all that the Son is, we have been given one blessing after another.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɔnyɛ aa yʋga beel-ma rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kɩ kyiyeli á buloŋ kyɛɛ bee ʋ nyʋwa buloŋ.

english_verse: The religious authorities in Jerusalem sent priests and temple helpers to ask John who he was. He told them plainly, “I am not the Messiah.”
translation_verse: Gyɔɔŋ gyɩ bɩ yaa nɩɩ we ʋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ, ʋ gyɩ basɩ wɩtɩɩ tɩya ba rɛ anɩɩ ʋ daa yaa Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya.

english_verse: Then when they asked him if he were Elijah, he said, “No, I am not!” And when they asked if he were the Prophet, he also said “No!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Aŋnɛ rɛ yaŋ yaa ɩ? Ɩ rɛ yaa Ɛlaagya koo?” Ʋ baa dɩ ʋ daa. Ɛɛ rɛ ba bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal hʋ á aa gyegili hʋ?” Ʋ bɩl baa dɩ ʋ daa.

english_verse: Finally, they said, “Who are you then? We have to give an answer to the ones who sent us. Tell us who you are!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ kɛ, yaŋ daga ma nal hʋ ɩ aa yaa? Beewɩya, ʋ maga dɩ ɩ daga nal hʋ ɩ aa yaa tɩya ma rɛ, dɩ á mʋ basɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa tɩŋ ma. Aŋnɛ yaŋ paalɩ yaa ɩ?”

english_verse: John answered in the words of the prophet Isaiah, “I am only someone shouting in the desert, ‘Get the road ready for the Lord!’ ”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ basɩ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Azaaya aa saba a baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa taal hʋ aa we pogo tɩyaŋ a heeli kɩ basɩ a baa, ‘Ma marɩ ŋmaŋ-deginii biŋ dɩ á Tɩɩna ko tɩŋa.”’

english_verse: John told them, “I use water to baptize people. But here with you is someone you don't know.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ baa, “Nɩɩ dʋŋ nɛ ŋ kɛ kaŋ kɩ fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ, amɛ nal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ we ma tɩyaŋ daha, ka ma bɩ gyɩma ʋ.

english_verse: Even though I came first, I am not good enough to untie his sandals.”
translation_verse: Ʋ rɛ sɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal ko. Ŋ paalɩ bɩ maga dɩ ŋ kaŋ ʋ naatɔbɔ ŋmasɩ mɛ kaŋ puri.”

english_verse: John said this as he was baptizing east of the Jordan River in Bethany. The Lamb of God
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ gyɩ yaa Bɛɛtani tɩyaŋ nɛ, Gyɔɔdaŋ fuwo hʋ kyolo, lee hʋ Gyɔɔŋ gyɩ aa fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ hʋ. Nal hʋ aa laa dʋnɩya nala kɩ ta ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ

english_verse: The next day, John saw Jesus coming toward him and said: Here is the Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world!
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩya, Gyɔɔŋ naa Yesu dɩ ʋ aa ko ʋ lee. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ baa, “Ma deŋ na, Wɩɩsɩ Pebiye hʋ rɛ nyɛ. Ʋ rɛ laa dʋnɩya nala kɩ ta ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: He is the one I told you about when I said, “Someone else will come, who is greater than I am, because he was alive before I was born.”
translation_verse: Baal no wɩya rɛ ŋ gyɩ basɩ tɩya ma a baa, ‘Nal hʋ aa sɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal ko, ʋ rɛ tee ŋ beewɩya ʋ we doŋ nɛ faafaa buloŋ ka ba na lʋla ŋ.

english_verse: I didn't know who he was. But I came to baptize you with water, so that everyone in Israel would see him.
translation_verse: Ŋ tɩɩ fa paalɩ bɩ gyɩŋ nal hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa yaa. Amɛ ŋ kɛ ta ko rɛ a kpa nɩɩ dʋŋ kɩ fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ, dɩ Iziral tɩmma ko gyɩŋ nal hʋ iriŋ ʋ aa yaa.”’

english_verse: I was there and saw the Spirit come down on him like a dove from heaven. And the Spirit stayed on him.
translation_verse: Gyɔɔŋ tɩɩ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa basa tɩya nala rɛ nyɛ: Ʋ baa, “Ŋ naa Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ dɩ ʋ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu anɩɩ kokomo, a ko tuu saga ʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Before this I didn't know who he was. But the one who sent me to baptize with water had told me, “You will see the Spirit come down and stay on someone. Then you will know that he is the one who will baptize with the Holy Spirit.”
translation_verse: Ŋ mɛ tɩɩ ha fa bɩ gyɩma ʋ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩma ŋ dɩ ŋ fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ abee nɩɩ dʋŋ, ʋ rɛ basɩ tɩya ŋ a baa, ‘Ɩ sɩ na Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dɩ ʋ ko tuu a we nal tɩyaŋ. Nal no tɩɩna rɛ sɩ kpa Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ a fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ!’

english_verse: I saw this happen, and I tell you that he is the Son of God. The First Disciples of Jesus
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ bɩl baa, ‘Ŋ kɔnɩ naa wɩya no yayɩ rɛ, a yaŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ ʋ rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya.”’ Yesu buŋbuŋ hatɩnna ʋ aa lɩya

english_verse: The next day, John was there again, and two of his followers were with him.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩya, Gyɔɔŋ bee ʋ hatɩnna balɩya bɩl sɩŋ doŋ.

english_verse: When he saw Jesus walking by, he said, “Here is the Lamb of God!”
translation_verse: Gyɔɔŋ aa naa Yesu dɩ ʋ aa baŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ baa, “Ma na, Wɩɩsɩ Pebiye hʋ rɛ nyɛ.”

english_verse: John's two followers heard him, and they went with Jesus.
translation_verse: Ʋ hatɩnna hʋ balɩya aa nɩɩ ʋ aa basɩ wɩɩ no, ba sii tɩŋ Yesu hal mʋ.

english_verse: When Jesus turned and saw them, he asked, “What do you want?” They answered, “Rabbi, where do you live?” The Hebrew word “Rabbi” means “Teacher.”
translation_verse: Yesu mɩɩgɩ galdaasɩ, dɩ ʋ naa ba aa tɩŋa ʋ hal. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bekiŋ nɛ ma kɩ kyɛ?” Ɛɛ rɛ ba mɛ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, lee rɛ ɩ kɩ gyʋʋ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Come and see!” It was already about four o'clock in the afternoon when they went with him and saw where he lived. So they stayed on for the rest of the day.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma ko na.” Ɛɛ rɛ ba tɩŋa ʋ hal mʋ a na lee hʋ ʋ aa gyʋʋ. Saŋa no, dɩ ʋ gyɩ yaa dɩdaana rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba we ʋ lee sɩya gballɩ.

english_verse: One of the two men who had heard John and had gone with Jesus was Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter.
translation_verse: Nala no balɩya kɩdɩgɩ feŋ nɛ Aŋduru, a fa yaa Siimɔŋ Piita nɩɩnabiye.

english_verse: The first thing Andrew did was to find his brother and tell him, “We have found the Messiah!” The Hebrew word “Messiah” means the same as the Greek word “Christ.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Aŋduru mɛ kyɛ ʋ maana Siimɔŋ lee haŋ lagɩlagɩbiye hʋ, a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Á naa Krisita, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya hʋ rɛ.”

english_verse: Andrew brought his brother to Jesus. And when Jesus saw him, he said, “Simon son of John, you will be called Cephas.” This name can be translated as “Peter.” Jesus Chooses Philip and Nathanael
translation_verse: Ʋ kaŋ Siimɔŋ ko Yesu lee. Nyɛ rɛ Yesu deŋ ʋ, aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ Gyɔɔŋ biibaal Siimɔŋ, ba sɩ kana ɩ kɩ yɩrɩ Siifaasi.” Siifaasi bee Piita yaa feŋdɩgɩ rɛ. Ʋ memii rɛ yaa bʋtaal. Yesu yɩrɩ Fɩlɩpɩ abee Nataniyɛl

english_verse: Philip then found Nathanael and said, “We have found the one that Moses and the Prophets wrote about. He is Jesus, the son of Joseph from Nazareth.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Fɩlɩpɩ na Nataniyɛl a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Á naa nal hʋ wɩya Moosi fa aa saba biŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ, ka Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ mɛ fa basɩ ʋ wɩya hʋ rɛ. Ʋ rɛ yaa Gyosɛfʋ biibaal Yesu aa lɩɩ Nazarɛti.”

english_verse: Nathanael asked, “Can anything good come from Nazareth?” Philip answered, “Come and see.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Nataniyɛl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ ha maakyiye na wɩwelii lɩɩ Nazarɛti?” Ɛɛ rɛ Fɩlɩpɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ko na.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw Nathanael coming toward him, he said, “Here is a true descendant of our ancestor Israel. And he isn't deceitful.”
translation_verse: Yesu aa naa Nataniyɛl dɩ ʋ aa ko ʋ lee, ʋ basɩ ʋ wɩya a baa, “Nal no yaa Iziral tɩɩna tɩɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ʋ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ weliŋ.”

english_verse: “How do you know me?” Nathanael asked. Jesus answered, “Before Philip called you, I saw you under the fig tree.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Nataniyɛl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ yaa gyɩma ŋ?” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ naa ɩ rɛ dɩ ɩ ha hɔŋ tutogo hʋ memii, ka Fɩlɩpɩ na yɩrɩ ɩ.”

english_verse: Nathanael said, “Rabbi, you are the Son of God and the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Nataniyɛl basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, ɩ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ. Ɩ rɛ yaa Iziral tɩmma kuwori hʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Did you believe me just because I said that I saw you under the fig tree? You will see something even greater.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ŋ aa baa dɩ ŋ naa ɩ dɩ ɩ hɔŋ tutogo hʋ memii rɛ tɩŋ, ɩ laa ŋ wɩya di nyɛ koo? Ɩ sɩ na wɩkperiye a te nyɛ.”

english_verse: I tell you for certain you will see heaven open and God's angels going up and coming down on the Son of Man.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ma sɩ na wɩɩsɩnyuu dɩ ʋ suro, dɩ malɩkasɩ lɩɩ doŋ a ko tuu mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye lee, aŋ mɩɩgɩ kɩ gyɩŋ.”

english_verse: Three days later Mary, the mother of Jesus, was at a wedding feast in the village of Cana in Galilee.
translation_verse: Ʋ kyɛtoo kyɛɛ, dɩ ba gyɩ aa gbɩyalɩ hafalɩɩ gbɩyala Galili paalʋʋ tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Keena tɩyaŋ. Yesu nɩɩna gyɩ we doŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples had also been invited and were there.
translation_verse: Ba gyɩ yɩrɩ Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ mɛ rɛ, ba mɛ mʋ hafalɩɩ gbɩyala hʋ.

english_verse: When the wine was all gone, Mary said to Jesus, “They don't have any more wine.”
translation_verse: Ba ha fa we gbɩyala hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ka ba sɩŋ hʋ buloŋ teŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu nɩɩna basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nala hʋ sɩŋ hʋ tene rɛ”.

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Mother, my time hasn't yet come! You must not tell me what to do.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ta leŋ dɩ wɩɩ no lɔl ma. Beewɩya, saŋa hʋ ha bɩ pele dɩ ŋ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ.”

english_verse: Mary then said to the servants, “Do whatever Jesus tells you to do.”
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Yesu nɩɩna mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya dɩya hʋ tʋŋtʋnna a baa, “Ma yaa wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa sɩ baa dɩ ma yaa.”

english_verse: At the feast there were six stone water jars that were used by the people for washing themselves in the way that their religion said they must. Each jar held about
translation_verse: Gyuuma fa aa kɩ sɔŋ nɩɩ rɛ anɩɩ ba wɩɩkyʋwal lesiri aa daga gɛɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, viigyenni badʋ ba aa kaŋ bʋwa marɩ rɛ fa sɩŋ doŋ abee nɩɩ. Viini no kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ sɩ kɩ gyʋʋ anɩɩ nɩɩ-galaŋ mɔlɩya koo galaŋ mɔlɩya bee fi.

english_verse: Jesus told the servants to fill them to the top with water. Then after the jars had been filled,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya dɩya tʋŋtʋnna hʋ a baa, “Ma yaa nɩɩ su viini hʋ.” Nyɛ rɛ ba yaa nɩɩ su viini hʋ buloŋ pɩlpɩl.

english_verse: he said, “Now take some water and give it to the man in charge of the feast.” The servants did as Jesus told them,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma yaa nɩɩ hʋ vii hʋ tɩyaŋ a kaŋ mʋ tɩya nal hʋ aa deŋ gbɩyala hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba yaa mʋ tɩya ʋ.”

english_verse: and the man in charge drank some of the water that had now turned into wine. He did not know where the wine had come from, but the servants did. He called the bridegroom over
translation_verse: Ʋ laa nɩɩ hʋ nyʋwa a na dɩ ʋ bɩrɩmɩ sɩŋ. Ʋ kɛ fa bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ba aa naa sɩŋ hʋ. Amɛ dɩya hʋ tʋŋtʋnna hʋ kɛ fa gyɩma rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ yɩrɩ hafalɩɩ hʋ bala,

english_verse: and said, “The best wine is always served first. Then after the guests have had plenty, the other wine is served. But you have kept the best until last!”
translation_verse: a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Gbɩyala buloŋ tɩyaŋ, ba aa laasɩya kaŋ sɩwelii rɛ ko lɩɩ ba nyʋwa. Dɩ nal buloŋ yaŋ ko nyʋwa vɔgɔ, ɩ yaŋ na kaŋ sɩŋ hʋ aa bɩ sʋma, a tɩŋ hal ko. Ka ɩ kɛ mɩɩgɩ kpa sɩwelii hʋ biŋ hal, a ko pele saŋa no buloŋ.”

english_verse: But Jesus was talking about his body as a temple.
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu aa basɩ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ wɩya gɛɛ, ʋ tɩɩ teŋbii rɛ ʋ kɩ daga gɛɛ.

english_verse: Not long before the Jewish festival of Passover, Jesus went to Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ ko ka mʋhʋ rɛ ka dɩ Gyuuma Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ pele. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii mʋ Gyerusalɛm.

english_verse: So he took some rope and made a whip. Then he chased everyone out of the temple, together with their sheep and cattle. He turned over the tables of the moneychangers and scattered their coins.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kaŋ ŋmasɩ mɩna a marɩ kyapɩya, a kile piyese hʋ bee nʋsɩ hʋ buloŋ ta, ba lɩɩ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ gyaŋwuwo tɩyaŋ, aŋ kaŋ nala hʋ aa lenni molbiye teebʋlsɩ mɛ bɩrɩmɩ kyige kyige, ba molbinʋʋ hʋ buloŋ gyaasɩ taŋha.

english_verse: The disciples then remembered that the Scriptures say, “My love for your house burns in me like a fire.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna liisi wɩɩ hʋ ba aa saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ, ɛɛ hʋ ɩ dɩya no wɩya aa kyɩla ŋ sɩ bori ŋ bembii.”

english_verse: “Destroy this temple,” Jesus answered, “and in three days I will build it again!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ mamaa rɛ ŋmaa Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya no lo, ŋ sɩ wuwo kpa kyɛyɛ boto a bɩl saa ʋ”.

english_verse: There he found people selling cattle, sheep, and doves in the temple. He also saw moneychangers sitting at their tables.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ ʋ mʋ gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ gyaŋwuwo, a na dɩ nala aa yallɩ nʋsɩ, abee piyese abee kokosi, ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ hɔŋ teebʋlsɩ hal a kɩ lenni molbinʋʋ.

english_verse: Jesus said to the people who had been selling doves, “Get those doves out of here! Don't make my Father's house a marketplace.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ nɔsɩ basɩ tɩya nala hʋ mɛ aa yallɩ kokosi hʋ a baa, “Ma kasɩ ma kokosi hʋ lɩɩ daha. Ma ta kaŋ ŋ kuwo dɩya bɩrɩmɩ yɔbɔ.”

english_verse: And when he was raised from death, his disciples remembered what he had told them. Then they believed the Scriptures and the words of Jesus. Jesus Knows What People Are Like
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ʋ aa ko sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ liisi mʋ parɩ anɩɩ ʋ gyɩ basɩ wɩɩ no rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba marɩ laa wɩya hʋ ba aa saba we Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ abee wɩya hʋ Yesu aa basa a di. Yesu gyɩŋ nihuwobiŋ tɩya rɛ

english_verse: In Jerusalem during Passover many people put their faith in Jesus, because they saw him work miracles.
translation_verse: Yesu ha fa aa we Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ, Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ saŋa, nɩgyamaa gyɩ laa ʋ wɩya di rɛ, akuu ba aa naa wɩmagɩla hʋ ʋ aa yaa wɩya.

english_verse: But Jesus knew what was in their hearts, and he would not let them have power over him.
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu ka gyɩ bɩ laa ba wɩya di, beewɩya ʋ gyɩŋ nihuwobiŋ buloŋ tɩya aa kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ.

english_verse: No one had to tell him what people were like. He already knew.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ nal buloŋ bɩl basɩ nihuwobisi wɩya tɩya ʋ, beewɩya ʋ kɛ gyɩŋ nihuwobisi tɩsɩ wɩkanɩya buloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: There was a man named Nicodemus who was a Pharisee and a Jewish leader.
translation_verse: Gyuuma nɩhɩyawʋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ gyɩ we doŋ ba kɩ yɩrɩ Nikodemu, a fa yaa Farasiima wɩɩkyʋwal noŋ nal.

english_verse: One night he went to Jesus and said, “Rabbi, we know that God has sent you to teach us. You could not work these miracles, unless God were with you.”
translation_verse: Tebine kɩdɩgɩ, ʋ sii ko Yesu lee a baa, “Dɩdagɩl, á gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ yaa nal Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩma dɩ ɩ ko kɩ daga nala rɛ. Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa wɩmagɩla hʋ ɩ aa yaa, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɩ pɛɛ tɩɩna tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “I tell you for certain that you must be born from above before you can see God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ɩ, nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, see dɩ ba bɩl mɩɩgɩ lʋl tɩɩna.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I tell you for certain that before you can get into God's kingdom, you must be born not only by water, but by the Spirit.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ɩ, nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, see dɩ ba fo ʋ tɩɩna wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ, ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we tɩɩna tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Humans give life to their children. Yet only God's Spirit can change you into a child of God.
translation_verse: Nihuwobiŋ aa lʋl nihuwobiŋ ʋ kaŋ mɩɩbol lɛ taŋha no tɩyaŋ. Aŋka Wɩɩsɩ mɛ rɛ aa kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ a we ʋ tɩɩna tɩyaŋ, ʋ kaŋ mɩɩbol Wɩɩsɩ lee.

english_verse: Don't be surprised when I say that you must be born from above.
translation_verse: Ta leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa ɩ wɩkperii abee ŋ aa basɩ tɩya ɩ anɩɩ ʋ maga dɩ ba bɩl mɩɩgɩ lʋl nal buloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Only God's Spirit gives new life. The Spirit is like the wind that blows wherever it wants to. You can hear the wind, but you don't know where it comes from or where it is going.
translation_verse: Puwo aa dɔŋ kɩ mʋ lee hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa kyo rɛ. Ɩ kɩ nɩɩ ʋ dɔmɔ, amɛ ɩ bɩ sɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ʋ aa lɩɩ kɩ ko, a bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ mɛ ʋ aa mʋʋ. Nyɛ rɛ yaŋ nal buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ kaŋ mɩɩbofalɩɩ mɛ kɩɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: How can you be a teacher of Israel and not know these things?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ sɩ yaa kerikyibal Iziral paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ, aŋ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ no memii?

english_verse: I tell you for certain we know what we are talking about because we have seen it ourselves. But none of you will accept what we say.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ɩ, wɩɩ hʋ á aa gyɩma rɛ á kɩ basɩ, a kɩ di wɩɩ hʋ mɛ á aa naa daŋsɩya. Amɛ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ʋ laa wɩɩ hʋ á aa basɩ di.

english_verse: If you don't believe when I talk to you about things on earth, how can you possibly believe if I talk to you about things in heaven?
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ dʋnɩya wɩya rɛ kɩ tɩya ma, ka ma bɩ laa di. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaŋ basɩ wɩɩsɩbee wɩya tɩya ma, ɛɛ rɛ ma sɩ yaa laa di?

english_verse: No one has gone up to heaven except the Son of Man, who came down from there.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ ha bɩ maakyiye mʋ wɩɩsɩbee, see mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye aa lɩɩ doŋ ko tuu dʋŋ.

english_verse: Then everyone who has faith in the Son of Man will have eternal life.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ mɛ aa laa ŋ wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: God loved the people of this world so much that he gave his only Son, so that everyone who has faith in him will have eternal life and never really die.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kyo dʋnɩya nala rɛ a mʋ parɩ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kpa ʋ Biidɩgɩ hʋ ʋ aa kana a tɩya ma, dɩ nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ sɩ nyʋgɩsɩ, amɛ ʋ sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: God did not send his Son into the world to condemn its people. He sent him to save them!
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ bɩ taa ʋ Biye dɩ ʋ ko tuu di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ba, amɛ ʋ taa ʋ rɛ dɩ ʋ ko tuu laa dʋnɩya nala ta.

english_verse: No one who has faith in God's Son will be condemned. But everyone who doesn't have faith in him has already been condemned for not having faith in God's only Son.
translation_verse: Nal kɛ buloŋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di, Wɩɩsɩ bɩ sɩ di ʋ tɩɩna sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ʋ, amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ laa ʋ wɩya di, Wɩɩsɩ teŋ dii ʋ tɩɩna sarɩya rɛ a kpa kyogisi tɩya ʋ, beewɩya ʋ tɩɩna bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ Biidɩgɩ hʋ wɩya di.

english_verse: The light has come into the world, and people who do evil things are judged guilty because they love the dark more than the light.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ba rɛ nyɛ: Ʋ taa pʋlʋŋ hʋ aa dagɩ ʋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ ʋ ko tuu dʋnɩya, amɛ dʋnɩya nala kyo bilhuu rɛ a te pʋlʋŋ, beewɩya ba wɩyaalɩya lɔrɔ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: People who do evil hate the light and won't come to the light, because it clearly shows what they have done.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ, ʋ bɩ kyo pʋlʋŋ, ʋ bee lɩɩ pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ʋ bee kyɛ dɩ ʋ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ lɩɩ pʋlʋŋ.

english_verse: But everyone who lives by the truth will come to the light, because they want others to know that God is really the one doing what they do. Jesus and John the Baptist
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa yaa wɩweliye, ʋ tɩɩna aa kyo pʋlʋŋ nɛ, a kɩ lɩɩ pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ mɛ, dɩ nala na anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa rɛ ʋ tɩŋa, a kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ ʋ aa yaa.” Gyɔɔŋ basɩ Yesu wɩya

english_verse: Later, Jesus and his disciples went to Judea, where he stayed with them for a while and was baptizing people.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ lɩɩ Gyerusalɛm, a kpa mʋ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ. Ba yaa kyɛyɛ baŋmana rɛ doŋ tɩyaŋ, aŋ fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ.

english_verse: John's followers got into an argument with a Jewish man about a ceremony of washing.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ hatɩnna badɔmɔŋ abee Gyuuma kɩdɩgɩ sii kaŋ ba lesiri nɩɩ sɔmɩɩ wɩya kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: They went to John and said, “Rabbi, you spoke about a man when you were with him east of the Jordan. He is now baptizing people, and everyone is going to him.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba mʋ pɩyɛsɩ Gyɔɔŋ a baa, “Á nɩhɩyawʋ, ɩ liisi ɩ bee baal hʋ gyɩ aa we Gyɔɔdaŋ fuwo hʋ kyolo wɩya ɩ gyɩ aa basɩ hʋ rɛ? Lagɩlagɩ no, ʋ mɛ aa fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ rɛ, nal nal buloŋ kɩ mʋ ʋ lee.”

english_verse: John replied: No one can do anything unless God in heaven allows it.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyɔɔŋ baa, “Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa nyɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ daa tɩya ʋ tɩɩna ŋmanɩɩ.”

english_verse: You surely remember how I told you that I am not the Messiah. I am only the one sent ahead of him.
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ yaa ŋ daŋsɩya rɛ, ka ŋ basɩ anɩɩ ŋ daa yaa Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ ta tɩma ŋ nɛ, dɩ ŋ laa sɩya ko ʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: At a wedding the groom is the one who gets married. The best man is glad just to be there and to hear the groom's voice. That's why I am so glad.
translation_verse: Hafalɩɩ bala rɛ tɩŋ haaŋ, amɛ dɩ hafalɩɩ hʋ bala kyana rɛ ko sɩŋ doŋ a kɩ gyegili wɩya hʋ ba aa basɩ, ʋ teŋ aa fɩyɛlɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ rɛ nɩɩ hafalɩɩ hʋ bala taal. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ŋ teŋ mɛ fɩyɛlɩ weliŋ Yesu wɩya.

english_verse: Jesus must become more important, while I become less important. The One Who Comes from Heaven
translation_verse: Ʋ rɛ maga dɩ ʋ yaa nɩbal, ka dɩ ŋ yaa nɩbiye.

english_verse: God's Son comes from heaven and is above all others. Everyone who comes from the earth belongs to the earth and speaks about earthly things. The one who comes from heaven is above all others.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko, ʋ rɛ tee nal buloŋ. Nal hʋ aa lɩɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna yaa dʋnɩya no nyuu nal lɛ, a kɩ basɩ dʋnɩya wɩkanɩya mɛ. Amɛ nal hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko, ʋ rɛ tee nal buloŋ.

english_verse: He speaks about what he has seen and heard, and yet no one believes him.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ wɩya ʋ aa naa aŋ nɩɩ mɛ rɛ, amɛ nal buloŋ bɩ laa ʋ di.

english_verse: But everyone who does believe him has shown that God is truthful.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di aa daga rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: The Son was sent to speak God's message, and he has been given the full power of God's Spirit.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩma, ʋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa wɩya rɛ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ kpaa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee buloŋ nɛ tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: The Father loves the Son and has given him everything.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kyo ʋ Biye rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kpa kɩŋ buloŋ dee we ʋ nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Everyone who has faith in the Son has eternal life. But no one who rejects him will ever share in that life, and God will be angry with them forever.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ nyʋwa, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii, amɛ nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ nyʋwa, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ sɩ maakyiye na mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ na baaŋ ʋ tɩɩna nyuu tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: This time he had to go through Samaria,
translation_verse: Ʋ aa mʋ Galili hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ʋ tɩŋ Samaarɩya paalʋʋ,

english_verse: “You are a Jew,” she replied, “and I am a Samaritan woman. How can you ask me for a drink of water when Jews and Samaritans won't have anything to do with each other?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Samaarɩya tɩmma haaŋ hʋ pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ Gyuu kɩ sʋla nɩɩ mɩyaŋ Samaarɩya tɩɩna lee?”

english_verse: “Sir,” the woman said, “you don't even have a bucket, and the well is deep. Where are you going to get this life-giving water?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ haaŋ hʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, ɩ bɩ kaŋ gʋʋga ɩ aa sɩ kaŋ yaa nɩɩ hʋ, ka kɔlʋŋ hʋ mɛ luŋiye. Lee tɩyaŋ nɛ ɩ sɩ na nɩɩ hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol?

english_verse: Our ancestor Jacob dug this well for us, and his family and animals got water from it. Are you greater than Jacob?”
translation_verse: Á naabaa Gyeekɔbɩ rɛ kpaa kɔlʋŋ no tɩya ma. Ʋ bee ʋ biisi abee ʋ pʋsɩ buloŋ nyʋwa kɔlʋŋ no nɩɩ rɛ. Ɩ aa kyɛ ɩ baa ɩ tee Gyeekɔbɩ rɛ koo?”

english_verse: But no one who drinks the water I give will ever be thirsty again. The water I give will become in that person a flowing fountain that gives eternal life.”
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ nyʋwa nɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa sɩ tɩya ʋ, nɩɩnyʋwasɩ bɩl bɩ sɩ maakyiye kana ʋ tɩɩna. Nɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa sɩ tɩya ʋ sɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bulo ʋ tɩɩna tɩyaŋ, a bulo nɩɩ hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii a kɩ tɩya ʋ tɩɩna.”

english_verse: The woman replied, “Sir, please give me a drink of that water! Then I won't get thirsty and have to come to this well again.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ haaŋ hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, tɩya ŋ nɩɩ no, dɩ nɩɩnyʋwasɩ ta bɩl maakyiye kana ŋ, dɩ ŋ ta bɩl ko kɩ yaa nɩɩ daha mɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Go and bring your husband.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Mʋ yɩrɩ ɩ bala dɩ ma ko”

english_verse: The woman answered, “I don't have a husband.” “That's right,” Jesus replied, “you're telling the truth. You don't have a husband. You have already been married five times, and the man you are now living with isn't your husband.”
translation_verse: beewɩya ɩ laa sɩya yal balama bɔnɔŋ nɛ, ɩ bee baal hʋ aa we doŋ lagɩlagɩ no, ʋ kɔnɩ bɩ yaa ɩ bala.”

english_verse: The woman said, “Sir, I can see that you are a prophet.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ haaŋ hʋ basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, ŋ naa nɩɩ ɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to her: Believe me, the time is coming when you won't worship the Father either on this mountain or in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Haŋtolibiye, laa ŋ di anɩɩ saŋa kɩdɩgɩ sɩ pele dɩ nala bɩl bɩ sɩ kɩ kyʋwalɩ á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ dogimo no nyuu koo Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You Samaritans don't really know the one you worship. But we Jews do know the God we worship, and by using us, God will save the world.
translation_verse: Ma Samaarɩya tɩmma paalɩ bɩ gyɩŋ nal hʋ ma aa kyʋwalɩ, amɛ á Gyuuma kɛ gyɩŋ nal hʋ á aa kyʋwalɩ rɛ. Beewɩya Gyuuma rɛ sɩ daga ma gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ laa dʋnɩya nala ta.

english_verse: But a time is coming, and it is already here! Even now the true worshipers are being led by the Spirit to worship the Father according to the truth. These are the ones the Father is seeking to worship him.
translation_verse: Saŋa kɩdɩgɩ sɩ pele, ʋ paalɩ pele rɛ gba, dɩ nala hʋ kɔnɩ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, kyʋwalɩ ʋ abee wɩtɩɩ, Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩkyʋwalla no iriŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ.

english_verse: God is Spirit, and those who worship God must be led by the Spirit to worship him according to the truth.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ wiyese, ɛɛ wɩya nala hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ba kyʋwalɩ ʋ, ʋ maga dɩ ba kyʋwalɩ ʋ abee wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: The disciples returned about this time and were surprised to find Jesus talking with a woman. But none of them asked him what he wanted or why he was talking with her.
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ mɛ mɩɩgɩ ko. Ba nyʋʋsɩ gyɩ fɩyɛla rɛ kɩŋkaŋ ba aa ko na dɩ ʋ bee haaŋ hʋ aa basɩ wɩya. Amɛ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ gyɩ bɩ suri nyʋwa a pɩyɛsɩ haaŋ hʋ anɩɩ bee rɛ ʋ kɩ kyɛ Yesu lee, koo a pɩyɛsɩ Yesu baa bee rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kɩ basɩ wɩya haaŋ no lee.

english_verse: The woman left her water jar and ran back into town, where she said to the people,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ haaŋ hʋ leŋ ʋ vii hʋ doŋ, aŋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ bee hʋ tɩya, a basɩ tɩya nala a baa,

english_verse: “Come and see a man who told me everything I have ever done! Could he be the Messiah?”
translation_verse: “Ma ko na baal kɩdɩgɩ aa wuwo daga wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa yaa ŋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ. Kapuwo ʋ rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ.”

english_verse: Everyone in town went out to see Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba lɩɩ bee hʋ tɩyaŋ a kpa kɩ mʋ Yesu lee.

english_verse: While this was happening, Jesus' disciples were saying to him, “Teacher, please eat something.”
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ aa sʋla ʋ rɛ a baa, “Á nɩhɩyawʋ, di kɩŋ mʋhʋ.”

english_verse: But Jesus told them, “I have food you don't know anything about.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ kaŋ kɩdiiliye rɛ ma aa bɩ gyɩŋ ba wɩya.”

english_verse: His disciples started asking each other, “Has someone brought him something to eat?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ mɩɩgɩ sɩŋ kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ “Nal lɛ yaŋ kaŋ kɩdiiliye ko tɩya ʋ ka á bɩ gyɩma koo?”

english_verse: Jesus said: My food is to do what God wants! He is the one who sent me, and I must finish the work that he gave me to do.
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ kɩdiiliye rɛ yaa dɩ ŋ yaa nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ kyɛrɩ, a teŋ tʋma hʋ ʋ aa tɩya ŋ dɩ ŋ tʋma.

english_verse: You may say there are still four months until harvest time. But I tell you to look, and you will see that the fields are ripe and ready to harvest.
translation_verse: Ma aa baa dɩ ʋ kaa peŋsi banaa rɛ, ka dɩ ma na kʋŋ ma bagɩsɩ kɩna pɛ dɔmɔŋ. Amɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, ma deŋ bagɩsɩ hʋ na, kɩna hʋ buloŋ yaa kʋmɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Even now the harvest workers are receiving their reward by gathering a harvest that brings eternal life. Then everyone who planted the seed and everyone who harvests the crop will celebrate together.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kʋŋ baga hʋ kɩna kɩ pɛ dɔmɔŋ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ ʋ tuno rɛ. Ʋ kʋŋ kɩna no kɩ pɛ dɔmɔŋ nɛ dɩ ba na mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Ɛɛwɩya, nal hʋ aa doho abee nal hʋ aa kʋma, ba buloŋ tenni sɩ fɩyɛlɩ.

english_verse: So the saying proves true, “Some plant the seed, and others harvest the crop.”
translation_verse: Namaga no ba aa basɩ kɔnɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, nal aa doho rɛ, nal mɛ kʋma.

english_verse: A lot of Samaritans in that town put their faith in Jesus because the woman had said, “This man told me everything I have ever done.”
translation_verse: Samaarɩya tɩmma gyɩ yʋga haŋ tɔɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ a ko laa Yesu wɩya di, akuu haaŋ hʋ aa baa dɩ Yesu basɩ ʋ mɩɩbol wɩkanɩya buloŋ wɩya tɩya ʋ wɩya.

english_verse: They came and asked him to stay in their town, and he stayed on for two days.
translation_verse: Samaarɩya tɩmma hʋ aa ko Yesu lee, ba gyɩ sʋla ʋ rɛ dɩ ʋ we ba lee. Yesu laa nyʋwa, a we doŋ kyɛyɛ balɩya.

english_verse: Many more Samaritans put their faith in Jesus because of what they heard him say.
translation_verse: Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ nɩgyamaa bɩl marɩ laa ʋ wɩya di, akuu wɩya hʋ ʋ aa basɩ wɩya.

english_verse: They told the woman, “We no longer have faith in Jesus just because of what you told us. We have heard him ourselves, and we are certain that he is the Savior of the world!” Jesus Heals an Official's Son (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ basɩ tɩya haaŋ hʋ a baa, “Lagɩlagɩ no kɛ, á laa ʋ wɩya di rɛ akuu á tɩɩ aa nɩɩ ʋ nyʋwa wɩya, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ ɩ aa basɩ tɩya ma rɛ tɩŋ. Nyɛ kɛ á tɩɩ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ ʋ rɛ kɔnɩ yaa dʋnɩya nala Laataal.” Yesu tɩɩbɩ nɩbal kɩdɩgɩ biibaal

english_verse: Jesus had said, “Prophets are honored everywhere, except in their own country.” Then two days later he left
translation_verse: Yesu tɩɩ fa basɩ tɩya nala rɛ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal buloŋ, ba aa bee tɩya ʋ gyɩrɩma ʋ tɩɩ bee tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: and went to Galilee. The people there welcomed him, because they had gone to the festival in Jerusalem and had seen everything he had done.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ aa ko pele Galili paalʋʋ, doŋ nala gyɩ kana ʋ weliŋ nɛ, beewɩya ba tɩɩ gyɩ naa wɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa yaa rɛ saŋa hʋ ba gyɩ aa mʋʋ Gyerusalɛm dɩ ba di Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ.

english_verse: While Jesus was in Galilee, he returned to the village of Cana, where he had turned the water into wine. There was an official in Capernaum whose son was sick.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl mɩɩgɩ mʋ Keena aa we Galili paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ, lee hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa leŋ nɩɩ bɩrɩmɩ sɩŋ hʋ. Dɩ kerikyibal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ gyɩ we doŋ, ʋ biye gyɩ pɩŋ kɩ wɩɩlɩ tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Kapɛɛnam tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And when the man heard that Jesus had come from Judea, he went and begged him to keep his son from dying.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa nɩya anɩɩ Yesu lɩɩ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ a ko Galili paalʋʋ, ʋ mʋ sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ mʋ Kapɛɛnam a tɩɩbɩ ʋ biye hʋ tɩya ʋ, dɩ biye hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ sʋba rɛ.

english_verse: Jesus told the official, “You won't have faith unless you see miracles and wonders!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ sɩ maakyiye laa ŋ di, see ma na dɩ ŋ yaa wɩmagɩla abee wɩkperiye.”

english_verse: The man replied, “Lord, please come before my son dies!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ kerikyi hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, ko lagɩ dɩ gɛɛ daa, ŋ biye hʋ sɩ sʋba”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “Your son will live. Go on home to him.” The man believed Jesus and started back home.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Kɩ mʋ dɩya, ɩ biye hʋ deye rɛ.” Baal hʋ laa wɩɩ hʋ Yesu aa basɩ tɩya ʋ di, aŋ kpa kɩ mʋ.

english_verse: Some of the official's servants met him along the road and told him, “Your son is better!”
translation_verse: Ʋ aa mʋʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ dɩya tʋŋtʋnnɩ ko kyeme ʋ, a basɩ tɩya ʋ anɩɩ biye hʋ deye rɛ.

english_verse: He asked them when the boy got better, and they answered, “The fever left him yesterday at one o'clock.”
translation_verse: Ʋ pɩyɛsɩ dɩ ʋ na saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ biye hʋ aa deye. Ba basɩ tɩya ʋ anɩɩ dɩya wɩɩhaa, anɩɩ kerifi dɩgɩ saŋa rɛ wɩɩla hʋ leme ʋ.

english_verse: The boy's father realized that at one o'clock the day before, Jesus had told him, “Your son will live!” So the man and everyone in his family put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ biye hʋ kuwo liisi anɩɩ saŋa no tɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu dɩya basɩ tɩya ʋ anɩɩ ʋ biye sɩ deye. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bee ʋ dɩya nala buloŋ laa ʋ wɩya di.

english_verse: This was the second miracle that Jesus worked after he left Judea and went to Galilee.
translation_verse: Yesu aa lɩɩ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ ko Galili paalʋʋ, ʋ wɩmagɩl-lɩya tɩɩna rɛ nyɛ ʋ aa yaa.

english_verse: Later, Jesus went to Jerusalem for another Jewish festival.
translation_verse: Nyɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu bɩl sii mʋ Gyerusalɛm dɩ ʋ gbɩyalɩ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal gbɩyala kɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: In the city near the sheep gate was a pool with five porches, and its name in Hebrew was Bethzatha.
translation_verse: Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ, nɩɩbɩŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ fa we doŋ, a kpaga paga hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Piyesi Paga. Hiiburu taal tɩyaŋ, ba fa kaŋ nɩɩbɩŋ no kɩ yɩrɩ Betizata rɛ. Ba gyɩ wee gyama bɔnɔŋ nɛ doŋ.

english_verse: Beside the pool was a man who had been sick for
translation_verse: Baal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ rɛ fa we wɩɩla tɩmma hʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ bɩsɩ mɔlɩya abee fi abee kyori rɛ nyɛ ʋ aa gbarɩga.

english_verse: You have not believed his message, because you refused to have faith in the one he sent.
translation_verse: Ʋ wɩya tuwo ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ma bɩ laa mɩyaŋ nal hʋ ʋ aa tɩma wɩya di.

english_verse: When Jesus saw the man and realized that he had been crippled for a long time, he asked him, “Do you want to be healed?”
translation_verse: Yesu aa naa baal no dɩ ʋ pɩŋ doŋ, ʋ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ wɩɩla hʋ pɩɩsa ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ deye rɛ?”

english_verse: The man answered, “Sir, I don't have anyone to put me in the pool when the water is stirred up. I try to get in, but someone else always gets there first.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, ŋ bɩ kaŋ nal daha ʋ aa sɩ kpa ŋ tuu nɩɩ hʋ saŋa hʋ malɩka hʋ aa ko kaŋ nɩɩ hʋ kɩ vuugi. Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ aa kɩ lʋga dɩ ŋ tuu rɛ, dɩ nal teŋ laa sɩya tuu ŋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus told him, “Pick up your mat and walk!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya baal hʋ a baa, “Sii, a kpa ɩ wasa kɩ mʋ.”

english_verse: Right then the man was healed. He picked up his mat and started walking around. The day on which this happened was a Sabbath.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ baal hʋ pirigi deye, a sii kpa ʋ wasa a kɩ mʋ. Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ rɛ wɩɩ no gyɩ yaa.

english_verse: When the Jewish leaders saw the man carrying his mat, they said to him, “This is the Sabbath! No one is allowed to carry a mat on the Sabbath.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ basɩ tɩya baal hʋ Yesu aa tɩɩba a baa, “Gyɩnaŋ yaa Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ rɛ. Ʋ yaa sɩna rɛ dɩ ɩ kyʋŋ ɩ wasa gyɩnaŋ kyɛɛ.”

english_verse: But he replied, “The man who healed me told me to pick up my mat and walk.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ mɛ baa, “Nal hʋ aa tɩɩbɩ ŋ nɛ basɩ tɩya ŋ dɩ ŋ sii kpa ŋ wasa a kɩ mʋ.”

english_verse: They asked him, “Who is this man that told you to pick up your mat and walk?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ abaa, “Aŋnɛ rɛ yaa baal no aa basɩ wɩɩ no tɩya ɩ?”

english_verse: But he did not know who Jesus was, and Jesus had left because of the crowd.
translation_verse: Amɛ baal hʋ gyɩ bɩ gyɩŋ nal hʋ aa tɩɩbɩ ʋ, beewɩya gyamaa hʋ gyɩ yʋga doŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu luuri tɩŋ nala hʋ tɩyaŋ mʋ.

english_verse: Later, Jesus met the man in the temple and told him, “You are now well. But don't sin anymore or something worse might happen to you.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ, Yesu na baal hʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nɩɩ daha, lagɩlagɩ no ɩ deye rɛ, ɛɛ wɩya, leŋ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ. Dɩ gɛɛ daa, wɩɩ aa lɔrɔ te nyɛ sɩ puu ɩ.”

english_verse: The man left and told the leaders that Jesus was the one who had healed him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ sii mʋ basɩ tɩya Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ anɩɩ Yesu rɛ fa tɩɩbɩ ʋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: They started making a lot of trouble for Jesus because he did things like this on the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Yesu aa tɩɩbɩ gbarɩgɩ hʋ Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ kana ʋ yaa ba dɔŋ a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba dɔgɩsɩ ʋ.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “My Father has never stopped working, and this is why I keep on working.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Saŋa buloŋ nɛ ŋ kuwo aa kɩ tʋŋ tʋma. Ɛɛwɩya ʋ maga dɩ ŋ mɛ kɩ tʋŋ tʋma rɛ.”

english_verse: Now the leaders wanted to kill Jesus for two reasons. First, he had broken the law of the Sabbath. But even worse, he had said God was his Father, which made him equal with God. The Son's Authority
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ hʋ rɛ marɩ leŋ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ sɩɩ fɩyɛsɩ, ba kɩ kyɛ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ ba aa sɩ tɩŋa a kpʋ ʋ. Wɩya balɩya rɛ ba baa dɩ ʋ yaa kyogi: Ba baa dɩ ʋ kyogi ba Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ sɩna rɛ, aŋ ha bɩl baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa ʋ Kuwo. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ bee Wɩɩsɩ maga dɔmɔŋ nɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Jesus told the people: I tell you for certain the Son cannot do anything on his own. He can do only what he sees the Father doing, and he does exactly what he sees the Father do.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, mɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ Biye bɩ wuwo kɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ ŋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa naa ŋ kuwo aa yaa, ʋ rɛ ŋ mɛ kɩ yaa. Wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ ʋ aa yaa, ʋ rɛ mɩyaŋ Biye hʋ mɛ kɩ yaa,

english_verse: The Father loves the Son and has shown him everything he does. The Father will show him even greater things, and you will be amazed.
translation_verse: beewɩya ŋ Kuwo kyo ŋ nɛ, a daga ŋ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ tɩɩ aa yaa. Ʋ ha sɩ daga ŋ wɩya a te nyɛ dɩ ŋ yaa, dɩ ma buloŋ nyʋʋsɩ fɩyɛlɩ.

english_verse: Just as the Father raises the dead and gives life, so the Son gives life to anyone he wants to.
translation_verse: Ŋ Kuwo aa kyisi nala hʋ aa sʋba ba bɩl kaŋ mɩɩbol gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ mɩyaŋ, ʋ Biye hʋ mɛ sɩ tɩya nala hʋ ŋ aa kyɛ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: The Father doesn't judge anyone, but he has made his Son the judge of everyone.
translation_verse: Ŋ Kuwo kɛ bee di nal buloŋ sarɩya, amɛ ʋ tɩya ŋ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ dɩ ŋ di nal buloŋ sarɩya.

english_verse: The Father wants all people to honor the Son as much as they honor him. When anyone refuses to honor the Son, this is the same as refusing to honor the Father who sent him.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ nal buloŋ kɩ kpa mɩyaŋ ʋ Biye hʋ yohuŋ, anɩɩ ba aa kpa ŋ Kuwo yohuŋ gɛɛ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bee kpa mɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ yohuŋ, ʋ tɩɩna mɛ bee kpa ŋ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩma ŋ mɛ yohuŋ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who hears my message and has faith in the one who sent me has eternal life and will never be condemned. They have already gone from death to life.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nal hʋ buloŋ aa gyegile nɩɩ ŋ nyʋwa, a laa nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ mɛ wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii rɛ. Ba bɩl bɩ sɩ di ʋ tɩɩna sarɩya, beewɩya ʋ tɩɩna foŋ lɩɩ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: I tell you for certain the time will come, and it is already here, when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of God. And those who listen to it will live!
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, saŋa hʋ sɩ pele, ʋ gba pele mɛ rɛ, dɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ aŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ sʋʋnɩ nɩɩ mɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ Biye taal. Nala hʋ aa nɩɩ ŋ taal, a tɩŋ ŋ nyʋwa sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: The Father has the power to give life, and he has given that same power to the Son.
translation_verse: Ŋ Kuwo aa kaŋ dee a kɩ tɩya nala mɩɩbol gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ leŋ mɩyaŋ ʋ Biye mɛ kaŋ dee a kɩ tɩya nala mɩɩbol.

english_verse: And he has given his Son the right to judge everyone, because he is the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaŋ tɩya mɩyaŋ ʋ Biye dee rɛ dɩ ŋ di nala sarɩya, beewɩya mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa Nihuwobiŋ Biye hʋ.

english_verse: Don't be surprised! The time will come when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of Man,
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ wɩɩ no yaa ma wɩkperii. Beewɩya saŋa hʋ sɩ ko dɩ nala hʋ buloŋ aa sʋba nɩɩ ŋ taal.

english_verse: and they will come out of their graves. Everyone who has done good things will rise to life, but everyone who has done evil things will rise and be condemned.
translation_verse: Ba yaŋ sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Nala hʋ aa yaa wɩweliye sɩ sii a kaŋ mɩɩbol, dɩ nala hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ mɛ sii dɩ Wɩɩsɩ di ba sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ba.” Yesu daŋsɩya tɩmma

english_verse: I cannot do anything on my own. The Father sent me, and he is the one who told me how to judge. I judge with fairness, because I obey him, and I don't just try to please myself. Witnesses to Jesus
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Ŋ bɩ wuwo kɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ ŋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ. Ŋ aa di nala sarɩya gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa baa ŋ di rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ aa di sarɩya hʋ rɛ abee wɩtɩɩ, beewɩya ŋ bee yaa ŋ tɩɩ wɩkyɛɛlɩɩ, amɛ nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ, ʋ kyɛrɩ rɛ ŋ kɩ yaa.

english_verse: If I speak for myself, there is no way to prove I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: Dɩ ŋ dʋŋ nɛ basɩ ŋ tɩɩ wɩya, ʋ bɩ sɩ kaŋ yohuŋ.

english_verse: But there is someone else who speaks for me, and I know what he says is true.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal mɛ rɛ we doŋ a yaa ŋ daŋsɩya. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa basɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: You sent messengers to John, and he told them the truth.
translation_verse: Ma tɩŋ ma tɩŋdaala rɛ ba mʋ Gyɔɔŋ lee a pɩyɛsɩ ŋ wɩya, ʋ basɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ tɩya ma.

english_verse: I don't depend on what people say about me, but I tell you these things so that you may be saved.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ nal lɛ ŋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ ko basɩ wɩya a daga nal hʋ ŋ aa yaa, amɛ ŋ basɩ wɩɩ no rɛ, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa ma ta.

english_verse: John was a lamp that gave a lot of light, and you were glad to enjoy his light for a while.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ Gyɔɔŋ gyɩ aa basa kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ kyaanʋʋ a tɩya ma, ma fa kyo dɩ ma nɩɩ ʋ wɩbasɩɩ hʋ sʋma mʋ sɩya mʋhʋ, beewɩya wɩbasɩɩ no gyɩ fɩyɛlɩ ma teŋ nɛ.

english_verse: But something more important than John speaks for me. I mean the things that the Father has given me to do! All of these speak for me and prove that the Father sent me.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ kaŋ daŋsɩya tɩɩna kɩdɩgɩ rɛ ʋ gba tee Gyɔɔŋ. Ʋ rɛ yaa wɩya hʋ ŋ aa yaa. Tʋma hʋ ŋ kuwo aa kpaa tɩya ŋ dɩ ŋ tʋma, ba aa rɛ daga anɩɩ ŋ kuwo rɛ tɩma ŋ.

english_verse: The Father who sent me also speaks for me, but you have never heard his voice or seen him face to face.
translation_verse: Ŋ Kuwo hʋ aa tɩma ŋ, ʋ mɛ basɩ ŋ wɩya rɛ. Ma ha bɩ maakyiye nɩɩ ʋ taal, a ha bɩ maakyiye na ʋ abee ma sɩɩ mɛ.

english_verse: but you refuse to come to me for eternal life.
translation_verse: ka ma vɩya ma aa sɩ ko ŋ lee a kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa kaŋ tɔnɔ.

english_verse: I don't care about human praise,
translation_verse: Nihuwobisi bigisii bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ ŋ lee.

english_verse: but I do know that none of you love God.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩŋ nala hʋ iriŋ ma aa yaa rɛ. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ ma bɩ kyo Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: I have come with my Father's authority, and you have not welcomed me. But you will welcome people who come on their own.
translation_verse: Ŋ Kuwo dee tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ ko, ka ma vɩya ŋ. Amɛ dɩ nal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ ko ʋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ ma sɩ laa we.

english_verse: How could you possibly believe? You like to have your friends praise you, and you don't care about praise that the only God can give!
translation_verse: Ma kyo dɔmɔŋ bigisii rɛ, amɛ ma bee kyɛ dɩ ma yaa wɩya hʋ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ bigisi ma. Ɛɛ rɛ ma yaŋ sɩ wuwo yaa a laa ŋ wɩya di?

english_verse: Don't think that I will be the one to accuse you to the Father. You have put your hope in Moses, yet he is the very one who will accuse you.
translation_verse: Ma yaŋ ta liise nɩɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ sɩ mʋ basɩ wɩya hʋ ma aa yaa kyogi a tɩya ŋ kuwo. Ma bayɩyɛla buloŋ we Moosi tɩyaŋ nɛ, amɛ ʋ rɛ yaŋ yaa nal hʋ aa sɩ mʋ basɩ wɩya hʋ ma aa kyogi tɩya ŋ kuwo.

english_verse: Moses wrote about me, and if you had believed Moses, you would have believed me.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ kɔnɩ fa laa Moosi wɩya di, ma fa sɩ laa ŋ wɩya mɛ di, beewɩya ŋ wɩya rɛ Moosi gyɩ sabɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: But if you don't believe what Moses wrote, how can you believe what I say?
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ bɩ laa wɩya hʋ ʋ aa saba biŋ a di, ɛɛ rɛ ma sɩ yaa a laa wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basɩ kɛ di?”

english_verse: The disciples gathered them up and filled twelve large baskets with what was left over from the five barley loaves.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba paa kɩkaalɩya hʋ a su simbiisi fi abee balɩya.

english_verse: The disciples wanted to take him into the boat, but suddenly the boat reached the shore where they were headed. The Bread That Gives Life
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba leŋ ʋ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ. Haŋ lagɩlagɩbiye hʋ dɩ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ teŋ pele lee hʋ ba fa aa mʋʋ nɩɩnyʋwa. Yesu rɛ yaa kɩdiiliye hʋ aa tɩya nala mɩɩbol

english_verse: They replied, “What miracle will you work, so that we can have faith in you? What will you do?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Wɩmagɩl bee rɛ ɩ sɩ yaa dɩ á na a laa ɩ di? Bee rɛ ɩ sɩ yaa?

english_verse: No one can come to me, unless the Father who sent me makes them want to come. But if they do come, I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo ko tɩŋa ŋ see dɩ ŋ Kuwo hʋ aa tɩma ŋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ ko ŋ lee, ka dɩ ŋ kyisi ʋ tɩɩna sʋʋ tɩyaŋ dʋnɩya kyɛtenii dɩ ʋ kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: “There is a boy here who has five small loaves of barley bread and two fish. But what good is that with all these people?”
translation_verse: “Boyoŋbiye kɩdɩgɩ rɛ we daha, a kaŋ paanʋʋ gama bɔnɔŋ abee fuwonaŋhɩlɩya balɩya. Amɛ kɩna no ka ta bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa nala no wɩɩ buloŋ.”

english_verse: The ground was covered with grass, and Jesus told his disciples to tell everyone to sit down. About
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ma leŋ dɩ nala hʋ tuu hɔŋ”. Ɛɛ rɛ ba leŋ nala hʋ buloŋ tuu hɔŋ ɔfɩyɛl hʋ tɩyaŋ. Nala hʋ tɩyaŋ baala dʋŋ gyɩ yaa anɩɩ tusibɔnɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: They got into a boat and started across for Capernaum. Later that evening Jesus had still not come to them,
translation_verse: a gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboro, a bɩl duwori kɩ mʋ Kapɛɛnam aa we fuwo hʋ kyolo tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ lee mʋ bɩl, ka Yesu ha bɩ ko ba lee.

english_verse: Jesus crossed Lake Galilee, which was also known as Lake Tiberias.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ, Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ gyɩ bɩl mɩɩgɩ kyol Galili fuwobal hʋ kyolo.

english_verse: A large crowd had seen him work miracles to heal the sick, and those people went with him.
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa gyɩ aa tɩŋa ʋ hal lɛ, beewɩya ba gyɩ naa gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa yaa wɩmagɩla wɩɩla tɩmma tɩyaŋ nɛ ba deye.

english_verse: Philip answered, “Don't you know that it would take almost a year's wages just to buy only a little bread for each of these people?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Fɩlɩpɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Dɩ nal lɛ paalɩ kpa ʋ peŋsi kyori tuno yɔbɔ kɩdiiliye tɩya nala no mɛ, ka ba bee pel ba.”

english_verse: Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter, was one of the disciples. He spoke up and said,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Aŋduru, a yaa Siimɔŋ Piita nɩɩnabiye mɛ basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa,

english_verse: Jesus took the bread in his hands and gave thanks to God. Then he passed the bread to the people, and he did the same with the fish, until everyone had plenty to eat.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu laa paanʋʋ hʋ, a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ, aŋ leŋ ba kaŋ kpaa nala hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ bɩl laa fuwonaŋhɩlɩya hʋ balɩya mɛ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ aŋ leŋ ba kaŋ kpaa ba, ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ di a vɔgɔ.

english_verse: The people ate all they wanted, and Jesus told his disciples to gather up the leftovers, so that nothing would be wasted.
translation_verse: Ba aa dii a vɔgɔ gɛɛ, ʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ma mʋ paa kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa kaa, dɩ ba mʋhʋ mɛ ta taa.”

english_verse: Jesus realized that they would try to force him to be their king. So he went up on a mountain, where he could be alone. Jesus Walks on the Water (Matthew
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩma anɩɩ ba aa kyɛ dɩ ba ko fɩla ʋ rɛ dɩ ʋ yaa ba kuwori, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ dʋŋ bɩl sii dogimo hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ a fasɩ mʋ sɩya mʋhʋ. Yesu vala nɩɩ nyuu tɩyaŋ Matiwu

english_verse: The people who had stayed on the east side of the lake knew that only one boat had been there. They also knew that Jesus had not left in it with his disciples. But the next day
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩya, gyamaa hʋ ha fa we fuwo hʋ kyolo, lee hʋ Yesu aa yaa wɩmagɩl hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ba gyɩ gyɩma anɩɩ nɩɩduworiboridɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ fa we doŋ. Ba gyɩma anɩɩ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ dʋŋ nɛ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboridɩgɩ hʋ mʋ. Yesu gyɩ tuwo ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't work for food that spoils. Work for food that gives eternal life. The Son of Man will give you this food, because God the Father has given him the right to do so.”
translation_verse: Ma ta kɩ kyɛɛ kɩdiiliye hʋ aa sɩ kyogi dʋŋ, amɛ ma lʋga kɩ kyɛ kɩdiiliye hʋ aa sɩ tɩya ma mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Kɩdiiliye no rɛ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye sɩ tɩya ma, beewɩya ŋ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ kpaa ɛɛ dee tɩya ŋ nɛ. Ŋ kuwo Wɩɩsɩ we ŋ lee rɛ.”

english_verse: One of the prophets wrote, “God will teach all of them.” And so everyone who listens to the Father and learns from him will come to me.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ kɩdɩgɩ sabɩ nyɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ, a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ sɩ daga nala buloŋ”. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa gyegile nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa daga ʋ, a gʋnnɩ wɩya ʋ lee, ʋ rɛ sɩ ko kɩ tɩŋa ŋ.

english_verse: They started arguing with each other and asked, “How can he give us his flesh to eat?”
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, Gyuuma hʋ piili kaŋ wɩɩ hʋ kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ abee baaŋ a baa, “Ɛɛ rɛ baal no sɩ yaa kpa ʋ teŋ namɩya tɩya ma dɩ á kyaŋ?”

english_verse: That evening, Jesus' disciples went down to the lake.
translation_verse: Ʋ dɩdaana aa ko pele, Yesu hatɩnna hʋ tuu fuwo hʋ nyʋwa,

english_verse: and a strong wind was making the water rough.
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ puwoduwo kɩdɩgɩ mɛ luro, a kaŋ nɩɩ hʋ buloŋ kɩ yeŋŋi.

english_verse: When the disciples had rowed for five or six kilometers, they saw Jesus walking on the water. He kept coming closer to the boat, and they were terrified.
translation_verse: Ʋ hatɩnna hʋ gyɩ duwori mʋ anɩɩ meeldaasɩ boto koo banaa rɛ, dɩ ba naa Yesu dɩ ʋ mʋʋ vala nɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ a kɩ ko nɩɩduworiboro hʋ lee. Ba aa naa gɛɛ, kambɩŋ kaŋ ba.

english_verse: But he said, “I am Jesus! Don't be afraid!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma ta leŋ dɩ kambɩŋ kaŋ ma. Mɩyaŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: some boats from Tiberias sailed near the place where the crowd had eaten the bread for which the Lord had given thanks.
translation_verse: Nɩɩduworiborisi badɔmɔŋ mɛ rɛ gyɩ lɩɩ Tibeeriya ko sɩŋ fuwo hʋ kyolo a kpaga lee hʋ Yesu gyɩ aa kpaa paanʋʋ hʋ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋ kpa tɩya ba ba di hʋ.

english_verse: They saw that Jesus and his disciples had left. Then they got into the boats and went to Capernaum to look for Jesus.
translation_verse: Gyamaa no aa kyɛɛ Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ buloŋ lɔlɔ doŋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ɛɛ rɛ ba gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiborisi hʋ a mʋ Kapɛɛnam, a kɩ kyɛ Yesu doŋ.

english_verse: They found him on the west side of the lake and asked, “Rabbi, when did you get here?”
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa naa Yesu Kapɛɛnam tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, saŋa bee rɛ ɩ teŋ pel daha.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that you are not looking for me because you saw the miracles, but because you ate all the food you wanted.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, paanʋʋ hʋ ma aa kyaŋ vɔgɔ wɩya rɛ ma gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ ŋ, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ma aa gyɩŋ wɩmagɩla hʋ ŋ aa yaa memii wɩya rɛ tɩŋ, ma kɩ kyɛ ŋ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “God wants you to have faith in the one he sent.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ baa, “Wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ma kɩ yaa rɛ nyɛ: Ma laa nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩma di.”

english_verse: For example, when our ancestors were in the desert, they were given manna to eat. It happened just as the Scriptures say, ‘God gave them bread from heaven to eat.’ ”
translation_verse: Na á naabaala dii kɩdiiliye hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Mana rɛ pogo tɩyaŋ, anɩɩ ba aa saba gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa, ‘Ʋ kpaa kɩdiiliye hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee rɛ a tɩya ba, ba di.”’

english_verse: Jesus then told them, “I tell you for certain that Moses wasn't the one who gave you bread from heaven. My Father is the one who gives you the true bread from heaven.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, Moosi daa gyɩ tɩya ma kɩdiiliye hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu. Amɛ ŋ kuwo Wɩɩsɩ rɛ aa tɩya ma kɩditɩɩma hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee.

english_verse: And the bread that God gives is the one who came down from heaven to give life to the world.”
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ nal hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu a kɩ tɩya dʋnɩya nala mɩɩbol, mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa haŋ kɩdiiliye hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩya.”

english_verse: The people said, “Sir, give us this bread and don't ever stop!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, ɛɛ kɛ, kɩ tɩya ma kɩdiiliye no saŋa buloŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am the bread that gives life! No one who comes to me will ever be hungry. No one who has faith in me will ever be thirsty.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa kɩdiiliye hʋ aa tɩya nala mɩɩbol. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa ko ŋ lee, losi bɩl bɩ sɩ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩna. Nal hʋ mɛ aa laa ŋ wɩya di, nɩɩnyʋwasɩ mɛ bɩl bɩ sɩ maakyiye kana ʋ.

english_verse: I have told you already that you have seen me and still do not have faith in me.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ ma naa ŋ nɛ, amɛ ma bɩ laa ŋ di.

english_verse: Everything and everyone that the Father has given me will come to me, and I won't turn any of them away.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ ŋ Kuwo aa kpaa we ŋ nosi tɩyaŋ, ʋ sɩ ko tɩŋa ŋ. Nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa ko ŋ lee, ŋ bɩ sɩ maakyiye kile ʋ ta,

english_verse: I didn't come from heaven to do what I want! I came to do what the Father wants me to do. He sent me,
translation_verse: beewɩya ŋ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu dɩ ŋ tɩŋ nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ kyɛrɩ rɛ, ŋ tɩɩ kyɛrɩ daa ŋ ko dɩ ŋ tɩŋa.

english_verse: and he wants to make certain that none of the ones he has given me will be lost. Instead, he wants me to raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ kyɛrɩ rɛ yaa dɩ ŋ ta leŋ dɩ nala hʋ ʋ aa kpaa we ŋ nosi tɩyaŋ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ko nyʋgɩsɩ, amɛ dɩ ŋ kyisi ba buloŋ dʋnɩya kyɛtenii, dɩ ba kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: My Father wants everyone who sees the Son to have faith in him and to have eternal life. Then I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ŋ Kuwo aa kyɛɛ rɛ nyɛ: Dɩ nal hʋ buloŋ aa gyɩma ŋ anɩɩ ŋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biye rɛ, a laa ŋ wɩya di, dɩ ʋ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii, ka dɩ dʋnɩya kyɛtenii mɛ, dɩ ŋ kyisi ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ kaŋ mɩɩbol.”

english_verse: The people started grumbling because Jesus had said he was the bread that had come down from heaven.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma hʋ piili kɩ gʋrɩmɩ wɩya akuu ʋ aa baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa kɩdiiliye hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu.”

english_verse: They were asking each other, “Isn't he Jesus, the son of Joseph? Don't we know his father and mother? How can he say that he has come down from heaven?”
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ ba baa, “Baal no daa yaa Gyosɛfʋ biye Yesu? Á gyɩŋ ʋ kuwo abee ʋ naa buloŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ yaŋ lagɩlagɩ no, ʋ baa dɩ ʋ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee rɛ a ko tuu?”

english_verse: The only one who has seen the Father is the one who has come from him. No one else has ever seen the Father.
translation_verse: Nyɛ bɩ daga anɩɩ nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ naa ŋ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, dɩ mɩyaŋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee dʋŋ daa.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who has faith in me has eternal life.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa ŋ wɩya di, ʋ sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: I am the bread that gives life!
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa kɩdiiliye hʋ aa tɩya nala mɩɩbol.

english_verse: Your ancestors ate manna in the desert, and later they died.
translation_verse: Ma naabaala gyɩ dii kɩdiiliye hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Mana rɛ pogo hʋ tɩyaŋ. Abee gɛɛ buloŋ, ba ha gyɩ sʋba rɛ.

english_verse: But the bread from heaven has come down, so that no one who eats it will ever die.
translation_verse: Amɛ kɩdiiliye hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu, dɩ nal lɛ dii ba, ʋ bɩ sɩ sʋba.

english_verse: I am that bread from heaven! Everyone who eats it will live forever. My flesh is the life-giving bread I give to the people of this world.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa kɩdiiliye hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol, a lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu. Dɩ nal lɛ dii kɩdiiliye no, ʋ sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Ŋ teŋbii rɛ yaa kɩdiiliye hʋ ŋ aa sɩ kpa tɩya dʋnɩya nala dɩ ba kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: Jesus answered: I tell you for certain that you won't live unless you eat the flesh and drink the blood of the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, dɩ mamaa rɛ bɩ kyaŋ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye teŋ namɩya, a nyʋwa ŋ kyal mɛ, ma bɩ sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa kaŋ tɔnɔ.

english_verse: But if you do eat my flesh and drink my blood, you will have eternal life, and I will raise you to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyaŋ ŋ teŋ namɩya, a nyʋwa ŋ kyal mɛ, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Dʋnɩya kyɛtenii hʋ mɛ, ŋ sɩ kyisi ʋ tɩɩna sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ kaŋ mɩɩbol,

english_verse: My flesh is the true food, and my blood is the true drink.
translation_verse: beewɩya ŋ teŋ namɩya yaa kɩditɩɩma rɛ, ŋ kyal mɛ yaa kɩnyʋwatɩɩma.

english_verse: If you eat my flesh and drink my blood, you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyaŋ ŋ teŋ namɩya, a nyʋwa ŋ kyal mɛ, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ we ŋ lee a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ, dɩ ŋ mɛ we ʋ tɩɩna lee a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: The living Father sent me, and I have life because of him. Now everyone who eats my flesh will live because of me.
translation_verse: Ŋ Kuwo aa yaa mɩɩbol buloŋ tɩɩna rɛ tɩma ŋ, ʋ nyubaanɩŋ nɛ ŋ kaŋ mɩɩbol. Ɛɛ wɩya dɩ nal buloŋ mɛ rɛ kyaŋ ŋ teŋ namɩya, ŋ mɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: The bread that comes down from heaven isn't like what your ancestors ate. They died, but whoever eats this bread will live forever.
translation_verse: Kɩdiiliye hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu rɛ nyɛ, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ kɩdiiliye hʋ ma naabaala gyɩ aa dii aŋ ha sʋba hʋ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa dii kɩdiiliye no, ʋ sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.”

english_verse: Jesus was teaching in a synagogue in Capernaum when he said these things. The Words of Eternal Life
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ aa basɩ wɩya no dɩ ʋ we Kapɛɛnam tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ daga nala Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya tɩyaŋ. Wɩya hʋ aa tɩya nala mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii

english_verse: Many of Jesus' disciples heard him and said, “This is too hard for anyone to understand.”
translation_verse: Nala hʋ gyɩ aa tɩŋ Yesu hal aa nɩɩ wɩya no ʋ aa basa, ba gyeniŋ buloŋ baa, “Wɩya no ʋ aa dagɩ deye rɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Kɩbee rɛ sɩ wuwo tɩŋ ba?”

english_verse: What if you should see the Son of Man go up to heaven where he came from?
translation_verse: Ka dɩ mamaa rɛ yaŋ fa naa mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye dɩ ŋ mɩɩgɩ gyɩŋ kɩ mʋ lee hʋ ŋ aa lɩya, ɛɛ rɛ ma sɩ yaa?

english_verse: The Spirit is the one who gives life! Human strength can do nothing. The words that I have spoken to you are from that life-giving Spirit.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ aa tɩya ma mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Nihuwobiŋ dee bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ, beewɩya ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo tɩya mɩɩbol. Wɩya no ŋ aa basɩ tɩya ma, ba aa rɛ aa leŋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol ko gyʋʋ ma tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But some of you refuse to have faith in me.” Jesus said this, because from the beginning he knew who would have faith in him. He also knew which one would betray him.
translation_verse: Abee gɛɛ buloŋ ma badɔmɔŋ ha bɩ laa ŋ wɩya di.” A lɩɩ saŋa hʋ Yesu aa piile kɩ daga nala buloŋ ʋ gyɩ gyɩŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ laa ʋ wɩya di rɛ, abee nal hʋ aa sɩ kpa ʋ yallɩ.

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “You cannot come to me, unless the Father makes you want to come. That is why I have told these things to all of you.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩ no wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo ko tɩŋa ŋ, dɩ ŋ Kuwo bɩ tɩya ʋ tɩɩna ŋmanɩɩ.”

english_verse: Because of what Jesus said, many of his disciples turned their backs on him and stopped following him.
translation_verse: Akuu wɩɩ no wɩya, nɩgyamaa hʋ gyɩ aa tɩŋa ʋ tɩyaŋ yʋga gyɩ bɩla hal lɛ.

english_verse: Jesus then asked his twelve disciples if they also were going to leave him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ hatɩnna fi abee balɩya hʋ a baa, “Aŋka ma mɛ, ma mɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ma mɩɩgɩ ŋ hal lɛ koo?”

english_verse: Simon Peter answered, “Lord, there is no one else that we can go to! Your words give eternal life.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Siimɔŋ Piita baa, “Á Tɩɩna, kɩbee lee rɛ á mɛ sɩ mɩɩgɩ mʋ? Ɩ dʋŋ nɛ kaŋ wɩya hʋ aa tɩya nala mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: We have faith in you, and we are sure that you are God's Holy One.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ á gyɩma rɛ, a laa di mɛ anɩɩ ɩ rɛ yaa Tɩpʋlʋŋ Tɩɩna hʋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “I chose all twelve of you, but one of you is a demon!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Na Mɩyaŋ nɛ lɩɩ ma nala no fi abee balɩya, amɛ ma kɩdɩgɩ yaa Sɩtaanɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot. He would later betray Jesus, even though he was one of the twelve disciples.
translation_verse: Gyudasɩ, Siimɔŋ Isɩkarɔtɩ biibaal hʋ wɩya rɛ ʋ gyɩ basɩ gɛɛ. Gyudasɩ gyɩ yaa Yesu hatɩnna fi abee balɩya hʋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, amɛ ʋ rɛ gyɩ sɩ ko kpa Yesu yallɩ.

english_verse: It was almost time for the Festival of Shelters,
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Gyuuma kyɛbal hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Gyama Kyɛbal mɛ kpaga.

english_verse: and Jesus' brothers said to him, “Why don't you go to Judea? Then your disciples can see what you are doing.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu nɩmmabalɩya basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Lɩɩ daha, a mʋ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ, dɩ ɩ hatɩnna na wɩmagɩla hʋ ɩ aa yaa.”

english_verse: No one does anything in secret, if they want others to know about them. So let the world know what you are doing!”
translation_verse: Beewɩya nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ba gyɩma ʋ, ʋ bɩ faŋa kɩ yaa wɩya. Ɛɛwɩya, wɩya no ɩ aa yaa nyɛ, leŋ dɩ dʋnɩya nala buloŋ gyɩma ɩ.

english_verse: Even Jesus' own brothers had not yet become his followers.
translation_verse: Ʋ naabalɩya hʋ tɩɩ mɛ gyɩ bɩ laa ʋ wɩya di, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba basɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: The people of this world cannot hate you. They hate me, because I tell them that they do evil things.
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya nala bɩ haasɩ ma, amɛ ba haasɩ ŋ kɛ rɛ, beewɩya, saŋa buloŋ nɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ba anɩɩ ba wɩyaalɩya lɔrɔ rɛ.

english_verse: Go on to the festival. My time hasn't yet come, and I am not going.”
translation_verse: Ma lɩɩ mʋ gbɩyala hʋ, amɛ ŋ kɛ ha bee mʋ, beewɩya saŋa hʋ aa sɩ pele dɩ ŋ mʋ gbɩyala hʋ ha bɩ pele.”

english_verse: Jesus said this and stayed on in Galilee. Jesus at the Festival of Shelters
translation_verse: Ʋ basɩ gɛɛ rɛ aŋ ha hɔŋ Galili paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ kyɛyɛ baŋmana.

english_verse: After Jesus' brothers had gone to the festival, he went secretly, without telling anyone.
translation_verse: Yesu nɩmmabalɩya hʋ aa mʋʋ gbɩyala hʋ ko teŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ dʋŋ mɛ sii mʋ, dɩ nal buloŋ bɩ gyɩma ʋ wɩya doŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: During the festival the leaders of the people looked for Jesus and asked, “Where is he?”
translation_verse: Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ aa we gbɩyala hʋ tɩyaŋ gyɩ deŋ kɩ kyɛ Yesu rɛ doŋ tɩyaŋ, a kɩ pɩyɛsɩ nala a baa, “Lee rɛ ʋ we?”

english_verse: The crowds even got into an argument about him. Some were saying, “Jesus is a good man,” while others were saying, “He is lying to everyone.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ aa we gbɩyala hʋ lee gyeniŋ piili a miŋsi a kɩ basɩ Yesu wɩya. Badɔmɔŋ baa, “Ʋ yaa niwelii rɛ.” Badɔmɔŋ mɛ baa, “Aayɩ, ʋ aa mʋrɩ nala rɛ.”

english_verse: But the people were afraid of their leaders, and none of them talked in public about him.
translation_verse: Amɛ ba buloŋ fa aa fá Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba faŋa kɩ basɩ ʋ wɩya gɛɛ.

english_verse: When the festival was about half over, Jesus went into the temple and started teaching.
translation_verse: Gbɩyala hʋ aa ko mʋ gyʋʋ tʋtʋʋ, ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mʋ gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ a piili kɩ daga nala.

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am not teaching something I thought up. What I teach comes from the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩya no ŋ aa dagɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ, ŋ lee daa ba lɩɩ.

english_verse: If you really want to obey God, you will know if what I teach comes from God or from me.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa yaa siri dɩ ʋ yaa wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyo, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ gyɩma dɩ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa dagɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ koo ŋ tɩɩ lee rɛ ba lɩɩ.

english_verse: If I wanted to bring honor to myself, I would speak for myself. But I want to honor the one who sent me. This is why I tell the truth and not a lie.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa basɩ wɩya ʋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ, ʋ aa basɩ kɩ kyɛ ʋ tɩɩ feŋ nɛ. Amɛ nal hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ nal hʋ aa tɩma ʋ feŋ gyɩŋ, ʋ yaa nɩtɩɩ rɛ, a bee nyɩya wɩya mɛ.

english_verse: Didn't Moses give you the Law? Yet none of you obey it! So why do you want to kill me?
translation_verse: Na Moosi biŋ mɩrɩsɩ tɩya ma rɛ dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋa. Amɛ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bee tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ no. Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ma kɩ lʋga dɩ ma kpʋ ŋ?”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “You're crazy! What makes you think someone wants to kill you?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ gyamaa hʋ aa we doŋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Na ʋ kɩɩ gyɩŋbɔmɔ rɛ kana ɩ? Kɩbee rɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ kpʋ ɩ?”

english_verse: Moses commanded you to circumcise your sons. But it wasn't really Moses who gave you this command. It was your ancestors, and even on the Sabbath you circumcise your sons
translation_verse: Amɛ akuu Moosi aa basɩ tɩya ma a baa ma kɩ keri ma biisi pene wɩya, ma aa kɩ keri ma biisi pene rɛ kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ. Moosi daa piili wɩɩ no, ma naabaala rɛ piili ʋ.

english_verse: Some of the people from Jerusalem were saying, “Isn't this the man they want to kill?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala badɔmɔŋ mɛ aa lɩɩ Gyerusalɛm pɩyɛsɩ a baa, “Baal no daa á bee nɩhɩyasɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba kpʋ gɛɛ?

english_verse: Yet here he is, speaking for everyone to hear. And no one is arguing with him. Do you suppose the authorities know he is the Messiah?
translation_verse: Na, ʋ rɛ yaŋ sɩŋ nala tɩyaŋ gɛɛ a kɩ basɩ wɩya, ka nal buloŋ bɩ wuwo basɩ wɩɩ buloŋ, koo nyɛ kɛ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ laa di rɛ anɩɩ ʋ rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ?

english_verse: But how could that be? No one knows where the Messiah will come from, but we know where this man comes from.”
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ Krisita hʋ aa lɩya, amɛ á buloŋ nɛ gyɩŋ lee hʋ baal no aa lɩya.”

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching in the temple, he shouted, “Do you really think you know me and where I came from? I didn't come on my own! The one who sent me is truthful, and you don't know him.
translation_verse: Yesu aa daga nala Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ a baa, “Na ma kɔnɩ gyɩma ŋ nɛ, a gyɩŋ lee hʋ ŋ aa lɩya mɛ? Amɛ ŋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ daa ŋ ko. Nal lɛ tɩma ŋ. Nal hʋ mɛ yaŋ aa tɩma ŋ, ʋ yaa Wɩtɩɩ Tɩɩna rɛ. Ma bɩ gyɩma ʋ.

english_verse: But I know the one who sent me, because I came from him.”
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ kɛ gyɩma ʋ rɛ, beewɩya ʋ lee rɛ ŋ lɩɩ, ʋ rɛ tɩma ŋ.”

english_verse: Some of the people wanted to arrest Jesus right then. But no one even laid a hand on him, because his time had not yet come.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba kana ʋ, amɛ saŋa hʋ ba aa sɩ kana ʋ ha gyɩ bɩ pele. Ɛɛwɩya nal buloŋ bɩ wuwo kpa noŋ dige ʋ.

english_verse: A lot of people in the crowd put their faith in him and said, “When the Messiah comes, he surely won't perform more miracles than this man has done!” Officers Sent To Arrest Jesus
translation_verse: Amɛ nɩgyamaa gyɩ laa ʋ wɩya di rɛ nala hʋ tɩyaŋ aŋ baa, “Ma bɩɩna anɩɩ dɩ Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya rɛ ko, ʋ sɩ yaa wɩmagɩla te baal no?” Ba tɩŋ nala dɩ ba mʋ kaŋ Yesu

english_verse: When the Pharisees heard the crowd arguing about Jesus, they got together with the chief priests and sent some temple police to arrest him.
translation_verse: Farasiima hʋ badɔmɔŋ aa nɩya dɩ nala miŋse kɩ basɩ Yesu wɩya gɛɛ, ɛɛ rɛ ba bee Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ tɩŋ ba laalyuwolo hʋ aa sɩŋ kɩ pɔ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ dimbee dɩ ba mʋ kaŋ Yesu.

english_verse: But Jesus told them, “I will be with you a little while longer, and then I will return to the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ baa, “Ŋ sɩ we ma lee kyɛyɛ baŋmana, aŋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ lee.

english_verse: You will look for me, but you won't find me. You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: Ma sɩ kyɛ ŋ, amɛ ma bɩ sɩ na ŋ, beewɩya lee hʋ ŋ aa sɩ we, ma bɩ sɩ wuwo mʋ doŋ.”

english_verse: The people asked each other, “Where can he go to keep us from finding him? Is he going to some foreign country where our people live? Is he going there to teach the Greeks?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ mɩɩgɩ kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Lee rɛ baal no kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ mʋ, dɩ á bɩl bɩ sɩ na ʋ. Kapuwo, ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ mʋ Giriki paalʋʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ Gyuuma aa guwoso rɛ, a kɩ daga nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma. Ba bɩl baa,

english_verse: What did he mean by saying that we will look for him, but won't find him? Why can't we go where he is going?” Streams of Life-Giving Water
translation_verse: ‘Ʋ baa dɩ á sɩ kyɛ ʋ aŋ bɩ sɩ na ʋ, a bɩl baa dɩ á bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo mʋ lee hʋ mɛ ʋ aa sɩ we. Wɩya no buloŋ ʋ aa basɩ, ba memii rɛ yaa bee?”’ Mɩɩbol wɩya

english_verse: On the last and most important day of the festival, Jesus stood up and shouted, “If you are thirsty, come to me and drink!
translation_verse: Gbɩyala hʋ kyɛtenii kyɛɛ rɛ aa yaa gbɩyala hʋ sɩfɩyaŋ kyɛɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii sɩŋ a heeli baa, “Nal hʋ buloŋ nɩɩnyʋwasɩ aa kana, ʋ tɩɩna ko ŋ lee a nyʋwa nɩɩ.”

english_verse: Have faith in me, and you will have life-giving water flowing from deep inside you, just as the Scriptures say.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba basa rɛ a baa, “Nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa ŋ wɩya di, Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol sɩ bulo kɩ lɩɩ ʋ tɩɩna tɩya tɩyaŋ anɩɩ nɩɩ aa lɩɩ bulo tɩyaŋ gɛɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the Holy Spirit, who would be given to everyone that had faith in him. The Spirit had not yet been given to anyone, since Jesus had not yet been given his full glory. The People Take Sides
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ Yesu aa sɩ kpa we nala hʋ aa laa ʋ di tɩyaŋ wɩya rɛ ʋ kɩ basɩ gɛɛ. Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ ha gyɩ bɩ kpaa Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ba tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ba ha gyɩ bɩ kpaasɩ ʋ mal daagarɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ laa feŋ. Nala porigi dɔmɔŋ Yesu wɩya

english_verse: When the crowd heard Jesus say this, some of them said, “He must be the Prophet!”
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa hʋ aa nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Yesu aa basa, ba badɔmɔŋ baa, “Baal no rɛ kɔnɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Tɩŋdaal hʋ a aa gyegili dɩ ʋ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee ko.”

english_verse: Others said, “He is the Messiah!” Others even said, “Can the Messiah come from Galilee?
translation_verse: Badɔmɔŋ mɛ baa dɩ ʋ rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya. Amɛ badɔmɔŋ mɛ baa dɩ Krisita hʋ bɩ sɩ lɩɩ Galili paalʋʋ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say that the Messiah will come from the family of King David. Doesn't this mean that he will be born in David's hometown of Bethlehem?”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba basa anɩɩ Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, sɩ yaa Deviti doho nal lɛ, a lɩɩ Bɛtɩlɛhɛm, lee hʋ Deviti aa lɩya.

english_verse: The people started taking sides against each other because of Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ kaŋ wɩɩ no kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ, akuu Yesu wɩya porigi dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Some of them wanted to arrest him, but no one laid a hand on him. The Leaders Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus
translation_verse: Ba badɔmɔŋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba kaŋ Yesu, amɛ nal buloŋ bɩ wuwo kpa noŋ dige ʋ.

english_verse: When the temple police returned to the chief priests and Pharisees, they were asked, “Why didn't you bring Jesus here?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ laalyuwolo hʋ ba aa tʋma dɩ ba mʋ kaŋ Yesu hʋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ Farasiima abee wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ lee abee nohɩllɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma bɩ kana ʋ ko?”

english_verse: They answered, “No one has ever spoken like this man!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba baa, “Nal buloŋ ha bɩ maakyiye basɩ wɩya anɩɩ baal no aa basɩ gɛɛ.”

english_verse: The Pharisees said to them, “Have you also been fooled?
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Farasiima nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Na ʋ kɩɩ ʋ mʋrɩ ma mɛ rɛ?

english_verse: Not one of the chief priests or the Pharisees has faith in him.
translation_verse: Ma ha maakyiye nɩɩ dɩ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ koo Farasiima kɩdɩgɩ mɛ ha laa ʋ wɩya di?

english_verse: And these people who don't know the Law are under God's curse anyway.”
translation_verse: Amɛ nɩgyamaa no buloŋ aa laŋŋa, kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ. Ɛɛwɩya Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kʋsɩ ba nyuni.”

english_verse: Nicodemus was there at the time. He was a member of the council, and was the same one who had earlier come to see Jesus. He said,
translation_verse: Baal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ rɛ gyɩ we ba tɩyaŋ, ba kɩ yɩrɩ Nikodemu. Ʋ mɛ fa yaa Farasiima kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Ʋ kɛ fa laa sɩya mʋ Yesu lee rɛ aŋ ka.

english_verse: “Our Law doesn't let us condemn people before we hear what they have to say. We cannot judge them before we know what they have done.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Á mɩra bɩ daga dɩ á kpa kyogisi tɩya nal dɩ ʋ rɛ yaa wɩɩ, see dɩ á laa sɩya nɩɩ tɩɩna nyʋwa, a gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa yaa.”

english_verse: Then they said, “Nicodemus, you must be from Galilee! Read the Scriptures, and you will find that no prophet is to come from Galilee.” A Woman Caught in Sin
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima hʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ mɛ yaa Galili tɩɩna rɛ koo? Dɩ ɩ rɛ deŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ, ɩ sɩ na anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ maakyiye lɩɩ Galili.”

english_verse: but Jesus walked out to the Mount of Olives.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa mʋʋ ko teŋ, Yesu mɛ kpa mʋ gyɩŋ Olivi dogimo hʋ.

english_verse: Then early the next morning he went to the temple. The people came to him, and he sat down and started teaching them.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩya kyɩkyʋwala, ʋ bɩl mɩɩgɩ mʋ a gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ. Nyɛ rɛ nala hʋ buloŋ aa we doŋ ko gol-ʋ, ʋ hɔŋ, a bɩl piili kɩ daga ba.

english_verse: The Pharisees and the teachers of the Law of Moses brought in a woman who had been caught in bed with a man who wasn't her husband. They made her stand in the middle of the crowd.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ dɩdagɩla abee Farasiima kaŋ haaŋ kɩdɩgɩ ko gyʋʋ. Ba kaŋ haaŋ no sɔŋsɔŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Nyɛ rɛ ba leŋ haaŋ hʋ sii sɩŋ ba buloŋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Then they said, “Teacher, this woman was caught sleeping with a man who isn't her husband.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, haaŋ no kaŋ bala rɛ, ka á kana ʋ dɩ ʋ bee badɩma pɩna.

english_verse: The Law of Moses teaches that a woman like this should be stoned to death! What do you say?”
translation_verse: Moosi mɩrɩsɩ hʋ daga anɩɩ dɩ haaŋ buloŋ nɛ ko yaa gɛɛ, dɩ á yaga ʋ tɩɩna kpʋ abee bʋwa. Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ mɛ na?”

english_verse: They asked Jesus this question, because they wanted to test him and bring some charge against him. But Jesus simply bent over and started writing on the ground with his finger.
translation_verse: Ba basɩ gɛɛ dɩ ba ŋmaa Yesu fuu na rɛ, a wuwo na ŋmanɩɩ a kana ʋ anɩɩ ʋ kyogo rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kaŋ nyuu kyugili, aŋ kaŋ ʋ nonii kɩ sabɩ kɩna taŋha tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: They kept on asking Jesus about the woman. Finally, he stood up and said, “If any of you have never sinned, then go ahead and throw the first stone at her!”
