translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ka ba ha sɩŋ, a kɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ wɩya. Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu kaŋ ʋ nyuu gye, a basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ nal lɛ we ma tɩyaŋ daha a ha bɩ maakyiye yaa wɩbɔŋ, ma leŋ dɩ ʋ tɩɩna laa sɩya kpa bʋyɩ a yaga haaŋ no.”

english_verse: Once again he bent over and began writing on the ground.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl kaŋ ʋ nyuu kyugili a bɩl kaŋ ʋ nonii a kɩ sabɩ kɩna taŋha tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The people left one by one, beginning with the oldest. Finally, Jesus and the woman were there alone.
translation_verse: Ba aa nɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa basa, ba buloŋ mɩɩgɩ fá kɩŋ kɩŋ. Ba tɩyaŋ nɩhɩyasɩ rɛ gyɩ laa sɩya fá aŋ leŋ Yesu bee haaŋ hʋ dʋŋ gyamaa hʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: “No sir,” the woman answered. Then Jesus told her, “I am not going to accuse you either. You may go now, but don't sin anymore.” Jesus Is the Light for the World
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ haaŋ hʋ baa dɩ nal buloŋ bɩl bɩ kaa. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Tɔɔ, ŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ kpa kyogisi aa maga ba kpʋ ɩ a tɩya ɩ. Amɛ kɩ mʋ aŋ ta bɩl kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ.” Yesu rɛ yaa dʋnɩya pʋlʋŋ

english_verse: Once again Jesus spoke to the people. This time he said, “I am the light for the world! Follow me, and you won't be walking in the dark. You will have the light that gives life.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya Farasiima hʋ a baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa dʋnɩya nala pʋlʋŋ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa tɩŋa ŋ, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ sɩ maakyiye vala bilhuu tɩyaŋ. Ʋ tɩɩna sɩ kaŋ pʋlʋŋ hʋ aa tɩya nala mɩɩbol.”

english_verse: The Pharisees objected, “You are the only one speaking for yourself, and what you say isn't true!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ tɩɩ rɛ yaa ɩ tɩɩ daŋsɩya tɩɩna gɛɛ. Wɩya hʋ ɩ aa basɩ bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Even if I do speak for myself, what I say is true! I know where I came from and where I am going. But you don't know where I am from or where I am going.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa ŋ tɩɩ daŋsɩya tɩɩna mɛ, wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa basɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, beewɩya ŋ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ŋ aa lɩya rɛ, a gyɩŋ lee hʋ mɛ ŋ aa mʋʋ. Amɛ ma kɛ bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ŋ aa lɩya, a bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ mɛ ŋ aa mʋʋ.

english_verse: You judge in the same way that everyone else does, but I don't judge anyone.
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya nala hakɩla rɛ ma aa kpa kɩ di nala sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ba. Amɛ ŋ kɛ bɩ kpaa kyogisi kɩ tɩya nal buloŋ.

english_verse: If I did judge, I would judge fairly, because I would not be doing it alone. The Father who sent me is here with me.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ kpaa kyogisi tɩya nal mɛ, ʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, beewɩya ŋ dʋŋ daa kpaa kyogisi kɩ tɩya ʋ tɩɩna, amɛ nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ pɛɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ wɩɩ no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I am one of my witnesses, and the Father who sent me is the other one.
translation_verse: Ŋ yaa ŋ tɩɩ daŋsɩya tɩɩna rɛ, ŋ Kuwo hʋ aa tɩma ŋ mɛ yaa ŋ daŋsɩya tɩɩna.”

english_verse: “Where is your Father?” they asked. “You don't know me or my Father!” Jesus answered. “If you knew me, you would know my Father.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Lee rɛ ɩ Kuwo hʋ we?” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ma kɔnɩ bɩ gyɩma ŋ, a bɩ gyɩŋ ŋ Kuwo mɛ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ fa gyɩma ŋ, ma fa sɩ gyɩŋ ŋ Kuwo mɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this while he was still teaching in the place where the temple treasures were stored. But no one arrested him, because his time had not yet come. You Cannot Go Where I Am Going
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ Yesu aa basɩ wɩya no buloŋ kɩ tɩya nala Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ dɩ ʋ gyɩ yaŋ kpaga lee hʋ ba aa kpa wɩɩsʋlɩɩ gbaŋsɩ hʋ kɩ biŋ nɛ. Amɛ nal buloŋ gyɩ bɩ kana ʋ, beewɩya saŋa hʋ ba aa sɩ kana ʋ ha gyɩ bɩ pele. Yesu basa ʋ Wɩɩsɩbee mɩɩgɩ mʋyɩ wɩya

english_verse: Jesus also told them, “I am going away, and you will look for me. But you cannot go where I am going, and you will die with your sins unforgiven.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya nala hʋ a baa, “Ŋ sɩ mʋ. Ma sɩ pɩya sɩya kyɛ ŋ, amɛ ma sɩ sʋba ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ. Lee hʋ ŋ aa mʋʋ, ma bɩ sɩ wuwo mʋ doŋ.”

english_verse: The people asked, “Does he intend to kill himself? Is that what he means by saying we cannot go where he is going?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Ʋ baa dɩ á bɩ sɩ wuwo mʋ lee hʋ ʋ aa mʋʋ. Ʋ yaŋ basa magɩsɩ anɩɩ ʋ sɩ kpʋ ʋ tɩɩ rɛ koo ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ nyɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You are from below, but I am from above. You belong to this world, but I don't.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Taŋhanyuu daha rɛ ma lɩɩ, amɛ ŋ kɛ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee rɛ. Ma yaa dʋnɩya no nala rɛ, amɛ ŋ kɛ bɩ lɩɩ dʋnɩya no.

english_verse: This is why I said you will die with your sins unforgiven. If you don't have faith in me for who I am, you will die, and your sins will not be forgiven.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ gyɩ laa sɩya basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ ma sɩ sʋba ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ. Ma kɔnɩ yaŋ sɩ sʋba ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ma ko bɩ laa di anɩɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa nal hʋ ŋ aa baa ŋ yaa.”

english_verse: “Who are you?” they asked Jesus. Jesus answered, “I am exactly who I told you at the beginning.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Aŋnɛ nɛ rɛ yaa ɩ?” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Piili hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ nɛ ŋ daga ma nal hʋ ŋ aa yaa.

english_verse: There is a lot more I could say to condemn you. But the one who sent me is truthful, and I tell the people of this world only what I have heard from him.”
translation_verse: Ŋ kaŋ wɩya yʋga rɛ ŋ aa sɩ wuwo tɩŋ ba tɩyaŋ a kpa kyogisi tɩya ma. Amɛ nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ, ʋ kɔnɩ yaa Wɩtɩɩ Tɩɩna rɛ. Wɩya hʋ ŋ aa nɩya ʋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ, ba dʋŋ nɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya dʋnɩya nala.”

english_verse: No one understood that Jesus was talking to them about the Father.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ, nala hʋ ha fa bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ wɩya rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ba gɛɛ.

english_verse: Jesus went on to say, “When you have lifted up the Son of Man, you will know who I am. You will also know that I don't do anything on my own. I say only what my Father taught me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ mamaa rɛ kaŋ mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye kpaasɩ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ma sɩ gyɩma anɩɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa nal hʋ ŋ aa baa ŋ yaa. Ɛɛ mɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ma sɩ tɩŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ bee yaa wɩɩ buloŋ ŋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ, amɛ wɩya hʋ ŋ Kuwo aa daga ŋ nɛ ŋ kɩ basɩ.

english_verse: The one who sent me is with me. I always do what pleases him, and he will never leave me.”
translation_verse: Nal hʋ mɛ aa tɩma ŋ ʋ bɩ vɩya ŋ ta, ʋ we ŋ lee rɛ, beewɩya saŋa buloŋ ŋ aa kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa fɩyɛlɩ ʋ teŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, many of the people put their faith in him. The Truth Will Set You Free
translation_verse: Ʋ wɩbasɩɩ no gyɩ leŋ nala yʋga laa ʋ wɩya di rɛ. Wɩtɩɩ hʋ rɛ sɩ laa ma ta

english_verse: Jesus told the people who had faith in him, “If you keep on obeying what I have said, you truly are my disciples.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di a baa, “Dɩ mamaa rɛ gyegile kɩ nɩɩ ŋ nyʋwa, ma kɔnɩ yaa ŋ hatɩnna rɛ.

english_verse: You will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.”
translation_verse: Ma sɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ, dɩ wɩtɩɩ no leŋ dɩ ma tɩŋ ma tɩɩ.”

english_verse: They answered, “We are Abraham's children! We have never been anyone's slaves. How can you say we will be set free?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ mɛ baa, “Á yaa Abɩraham doho nala rɛ. Á ha bɩ maakyiye yaa nal buloŋ yosi. Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ɩ baa dɩ á sɩ tɩŋ á tɩɩ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I tell you for certain that anyone who sins is a slave of sin!
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nal hʋ kɛ buloŋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ, ʋ tɩɩna yaa wɩbɔmɔ yoŋ nɛ.

english_verse: I know that you are from Abraham's family. Yet you want to kill me, because my message isn't really in your hearts.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma yaa Abɩraham doho nala rɛ, aŋka ma kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma kpʋ ŋ, beewɩya wɩya hʋ ŋ aa daga ma bɩ gyʋʋ ma dɩgɩna.

english_verse: I am telling you what my Father has shown me, just as you are doing what your father has taught you. Your Father Is the Devil
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ ŋ kuwo aa daga ŋ nɛ ŋ kɩ basɩ, ka ma mɛ kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ ma kuwo aa daga ma dɩ ma kɩ yaa.”

english_verse: The people said to Jesus, “Abraham is our father!” Jesus replied, “If you were Abraham's children, you would do what Abraham did.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Abɩraham nɛ yaa á kuwo.” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɛ baa, “Dɩ mamaa rɛ kɔnɩ fa yaa Abɩraham biisi, ɛɛ kɛ ma fa sɩ kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ Abɩraham fa aa yaa.

english_verse: Instead, you want to kill me for telling you the truth that God gave me. Abraham never did anything like that.
translation_verse: Ŋ kɛ sɩfɩyaŋ buloŋ nɛ yaa dɩ ŋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma, ka ma ha kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma kpʋ ŋ. Amɛ Abɩraham kɛ bɩ yaa nyɛ.

english_verse: But you are doing exactly what your father does.” “Don't accuse us of having someone else as our father!” they said. “We just have one father, and he is God.”
translation_verse: Ma aa yaa wɩya hʋ ma kuwo aa yaa rɛ.” Ɛɛ rɛ ba baa, “Á yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi tɩɩ rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ nɛ yaa á kuwo á aa kana.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: If God were your Father, you would love me, because I came from God and now I am here. He sent me. I did not come on my own.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ kɔnɩ fa yaa ma Kuwo, ma fa sɩ kyo ŋ wɩya, beewɩya, Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ ŋ lɩɩ ko we daha. Ŋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ daa ŋ ko. Ʋ rɛ tɩma ŋ.

english_verse: Why can't you understand what I am talking about? Can't you stand to hear what I am saying?
translation_verse: Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ma bɩ gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basa memii? Ma bee kyɛ dɩ ma gyegile nɩɩ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ma bɩ gyɩŋ ba memii gɛɛ.

english_verse: Your father is the devil, and you do exactly what he wants. He has always been a murderer and a liar. There is nothing truthful about him. He speaks on his own, and everything he says is a lie. Not only is he a liar himself, but he is also the father of all lies.
translation_verse: Ma kuwo rɛ yaa Sɩtaanɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ma aa kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma kɩ yaa ʋ teŋfɩyɛl wɩya. A lɩɩ dʋnɩya lipiilii buloŋ, ʋ yaa nɩkpʋʋl lɛ. Ʋ tɩɩ paalɩ bɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ, beewɩya wɩtɩɩ buloŋ tuwo ʋ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ aa nyɩya wɩya, ʋ kɩyɩ rɛ paalɩ gɛɛ. Beewɩya ʋ yaa wɩnyɩyɛl lɛ, a yaa wɩnyɩyɛla buloŋ kuwo mɛ.

english_verse: Everything I have told you is true, and you still refuse to have faith in me.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ aa basɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ma bɩ laa ŋ wɩya di.

english_verse: Can any of you accuse me of sin? If you cannot, why won't you have faith in me? After all, I am telling you the truth.
translation_verse: Ma kɩbee rɛ sɩ wuwo daga wɩbɔŋ hʋ ŋ ha aa maakyiye yaa? Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ aa basɩ wɩtɩɩ, bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ma bɩ laa ŋ wɩya di?

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to God will listen to his message. But you refuse to listen, because you don't belong to God. Jesus and Abraham
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee aa gyegile kɩ nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa basɩ rɛ. Ma kɛ bɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ma bɩ gyegile kɩ nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya.” Gyuuma badɔmɔŋ vɩya Yesu wɩya

english_verse: The people told Jesus, “We were right to say that you are a Samaritan and that you have a demon in you!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma hʋ basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Á kɔnɩ aa baa dɩ ɩ yaa Samaarɩya tɩɩna, ka gyɩŋbɔŋ mɛ kana ɩ hʋ, ʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I don't have a demon in me. I honor my Father, and you refuse to honor me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Gyɩŋbɔŋ tuwo ŋ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ŋ aa tɩya ŋ Kuwo gyɩrɩma rɛ, aŋka ma kɛ bee tɩya ŋ gyɩrɩma.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you obey my words, you will never die.”
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nal hʋ buloŋ aa tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa, ʋ bɩ sɩ maakyiye sʋba.”

english_verse: Then the people said, “Now we are sure that you have a demon. Abraham is dead, and so are the prophets. How can you say that no one who obeys your words will ever die?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nyɛ kɛ, á yaŋ paalɩ gyɩma anɩɩ gyɩŋbɔŋ nɛ kɔnɩ kana ɩ. Abɩraham sʋba rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ mɛ sʋba. Aŋka ɩ baa dɩ nal hʋ buloŋ aa tɩŋa ɩ nyʋwa bɩ sɩ maakyiye sʋba.

english_verse: Are you greater than our father Abraham? He died, and so did the prophets. Who do you think you are?”
translation_verse: Á kuwo Abɩraham tɩɩ gba sʋba rɛ. Ɩ yaŋ bɩɩna nɩɩ ɩ rɛ tee ʋ koo? Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ mɛ sʋba. Aŋnɛ rɛ yaŋ yaa ɩ kɛ?”

english_verse: even though you don't really know him. If I said I didn't know him, I would be a liar, just like all of you. But I know him, and I do what he says.
translation_verse: Ma ha bɩ maakyiye gyɩma ʋ amɛ ŋ kɛ gyɩma ʋ rɛ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ baa ŋ bɩ gyɩma ʋ, ŋ yaa wɩnyɩyɛl lɛ anɩɩ ma mɛ aa yaa wɩnyɩyɛla gɛɛ. Ŋ gyɩma ʋ rɛ a kɩ tɩŋa ʋ nyʋwa mɛ.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that even before Abraham was, I was, and I am.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ka dɩ ba na lʋl Abɩraham, dɩ ŋ kɛ foŋ we doŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: The people picked up stones to kill Jesus, but he hid and left the temple.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba paa bʋwa dɩ ba yaga ʋ, ʋ faŋa a lʋwɔlɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: As Jesus walked along, he saw a man who had been blind since birth.
translation_verse: Yesu aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ vala kɩ mʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ na baal kɩdɩgɩ ba aa lʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ nyʋlɩma.

english_verse: Jesus' disciples asked, “Teacher, why was this man born blind? Was it because he or his parents sinned?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnna pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, bee rɛ tɩŋ ba lʋl baal no dɩ ʋ nyʋlɩma? Baal hʋ tɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ rɛ tɩŋ koo ʋ kuwo bee ʋ naa wɩbɔmɔ rɛ tɩŋ?”

english_verse: As long as it is day, we must do what the one who sent me wants me to do. When night comes, no one can work.
translation_verse: Á aa we pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ nyɛ, ma leŋ dɩ á kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ aa baa dɩ á kɩ yaa. Bilhuu sɩ ko dɩ nal buloŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa wɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: While I am in the world, I am the light for the world.”
translation_verse: Ŋ ha aa we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ nyɛ, mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa dʋnɩya nala pʋlʋŋ.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, he spit on the ground. He made some mud and smeared it on the man's eyes.
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ ko teŋ, ʋ tʋ naŋtʋwɔl biŋ taŋha, a kaŋ buu buu, a paa taa baal hʋ sɩya, aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa,

english_verse: Then he said, “Go wash off the mud in Siloam Pool.” The man went and washed in Siloam, which means “One Who Is Sent.” When he had washed off the mud, he could see.
translation_verse: “Sii tuu Silom fuwo hʋ a sɔmɔ ɩ sɩya.” . Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ sii tuu fuwo hʋ, a yaa nɩɩ sɔmɔ ʋ sɩya. Ʋ sɩya suri doŋ, ʋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ dɩya.

english_verse: Some of them said he was the same beggar, while others said he only looked like him. But he told them, “I am that man.”
translation_verse: Badɔmɔŋ baa dɩ ʋ rɛ, badɔmɔŋ mɛ baa dɩ ʋ daa, dɩ ba ta kɩɩ dɔmɔŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ tɩɩ baa “Mɩyaŋ nɛ gɛɛ.”

english_verse: He answered, “Someone named Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. He told me to go and wash it off in Siloam Pool. When I did, I could see.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ baa, “Baal hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Yesu, ʋ rɛ buu taŋha a paa taa ŋ sɩya, aŋ baa dɩ ŋ tuu Silom fuwo hʋ a yaa nɩɩ sɔmɔ. Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ tuu sɔmɔ, ŋ sɩya pirigi suri.”

english_verse: “Where is he now?” they asked. “I don't know,” he answered. The Pharisees Try To Find Out What Happened
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Lee tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ we?” Baal hʋ baa, “Ŋ bɩ gyɩma”. Farasiima tɩŋ nyʋlʋŋ hʋ tɩɩbɩɩ naasɩ

english_verse: The day when Jesus made the mud and healed the man was a Sabbath. So the people took the man to the Pharisees.
translation_verse: Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ rɛ Yesu gyɩ buu taŋha a paa taa baal hʋ sɩya ba suri gɛɛ.

english_verse: They asked him how he was able to see, and he answered, “Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. Then after I washed it off, I could see.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima hʋ mɛ bɩl pɩyɛsɩ baal hʋ gɛɛ ʋ aa yaa ʋ sɩya suri. Baal hʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Taŋha rɛ ʋ buu a paa taa ŋ sɩya, ŋ mʋ sɔmɔ ta ŋ sɩya suri.”

english_verse: Some of the Pharisees said, “This man Jesus doesn't come from God. If he did, he would not break the law of the Sabbath.” Others asked, “How could someone who is a sinner work such a miracle?” Since the Pharisees could not agree among themselves,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima hʋ badɔmɔŋ baa, “Baal hʋ aa yaa wɩɩ no, Wɩɩsɩ daa tɩma ʋ, beewɩya ʋ bee tɩŋ á Kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ sɩŋsɩ.” Ɛɛ rɛ badɔmɔŋ mɛ baa, “Ɛɛ rɛ nal hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔŋyaal sɩ wuwo kɩ yaa wɩmagɩla no?” Doŋ nɛ nyʋʋtaaduwo gyʋʋ ba, ba porigi dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: they asked the man, “What do you say about this one who healed your eyes?” “He is a prophet!” the man told them.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima hʋ bɩl pɩyɛsɩ baal hʋ a baa, “Ka ɩ baa ʋ suri ɩ sɩya rɛ, aŋnɛ rɛ ɩ bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ ʋ yaa?” Nyɛ rɛ baal hʋ baa “Ʋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala lɛ.”

english_verse: But the Jewish leaders would not believe that the man had once been blind. They sent for his parents
translation_verse: Amɛ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ fa bee kyɛ dɩ ba laa di anɩɩ baal hʋ fa kɔnɩ nyʋlɩma rɛ, aŋ mɩɩgɩ ko kɩ na gɛɛ, see dɩ ba na ʋ kuwo bee ʋ naa.

english_verse: The man's parents answered, “We are certain that he is our son, and we know that he was born blind.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba baa, “Á gyɩma anɩɩ á biye rɛ nyɛ. Á gyɩma anɩɩ á lʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ nyʋlɩma rɛ.

english_verse: But we don't know how he got his sight or who gave it to him. Ask him! He is old enough to speak for himself.”
translation_verse: Amɛ ɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa yaa ʋ sɩya suri kɛ, á bɩ gyɩma. Á bɩ gyɩŋ nal hʋ mɛ aa leŋ ʋ sɩya suri. Ma kɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ, ʋ hɩyasa rɛ. Ʋ aa wuwo ʋ basɩ wɩya rɛ ʋ tɩɩ.”

english_verse: The man's parents said this because they were afraid of their leaders. The leaders had already agreed that no one was to have anything to do with anyone who said Jesus was the Messiah.
translation_verse: Biye hʋ nɩɩna bee ʋ kuwo gyɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba baa dɩ ʋ hɩyasa rɛ, dɩ ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: The leaders called the man back and said, “Swear by God to tell the truth! We know that Jesus is a sinner.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima hʋ bɩl yɩrɩ baal hʋ fa aa nyʋlɩma hʋ a baa, “Á gyɩma anɩɩ baal no yaa wɩbɔŋyaal lɛ. Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, basɩ wɩtɩɩ tɩya ma.”

english_verse: The man replied, “I don't know if he is a sinner or not. All I know is that I used to be blind, but now I can see!”
translation_verse: Baal hʋ baa, “Ŋ kɛ bɩ gyɩma dɩ baal no yaa wɩbɔŋyaal koo ʋ bɩ yaa wɩbɔŋyaal. Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ ŋ kɛ aa gyɩma rɛ nyɛ: Ŋ fa nyʋlɩma rɛ, amɛ lagɩlagɩ no ŋ aa naa rɛ.”

english_verse: “What did he do to you?” they asked. “How did he heal your eyes?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ yaa ɩ, ɩ sɩya suri?”

english_verse: The man answered, “I have already told you once, and you refused to listen. Why do you want me to tell you again? Do you also want to become his disciples?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ laa sɩya basɩ tɩya ma rɛ, ka ma bɩ gyegile nɩɩ. Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma bɩl kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma nɩɩ? Ma mɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ma yaa ʋ hatɩnna rɛ koo?”

english_verse: The leaders insulted the man and said, “You are his follower! We are followers of Moses.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba tʋʋsɩ ʋ weliŋ aŋ baa, “Ɩ rɛ yaa baal no hatɩnnɩ, amɛ á kɛ yaa Moosi hatɩnna rɛ.

english_verse: We are sure God spoke to Moses, but we don't even know where Jesus comes from.”
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ fa basɩ wɩya tɩya Moosi rɛ, amɛ baal no kɛ, á gba bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ʋ aa lɩya.”

english_verse: “How strange!” the man replied. “He healed my eyes, and yet you don't know where he comes from.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ baa, “Ma na wɩkperii ga! Ma bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ʋ aa lɩya, amɛ ʋ rɛ suri ŋ sɩya.

english_verse: We know that God listens only to people who love and obey him. God doesn't listen to sinners.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɩ gyegile kɩ nɩɩ wɩbɔŋyaala nyʋwa. Ʋ aa gyegili kɩ nɩɩ nala hʋ aa fá ʋ rɛ, aŋ pɛ kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ ʋ aa kyo.

english_verse: And this is the first time in history anyone has ever given sight to someone born blind.
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya aa piile buloŋ, ma ha nɩya ba baa dɩ nal suri nal ba aa lʋla dɩ ʋ nyʋlɩma sɩya?

english_verse: Jesus could not do anything unless he came from God.”
translation_verse: Dɩ baal no fa bɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee, ʋ fa bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa wɩɩ buloŋ.”

english_verse: The leaders told the man, “You have been a sinner since the day you were born! Do you think you can teach us anything?” Then they said, “You can never come back into any of our synagogues!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ tɩya baal hʋ a baa, “Ba paalɩ kɩ lʋla ɩ dɩ ɩ yaa wɩbɔŋyaal lɛ, ka ɩ mɛ yaŋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ɩ daga ma koo?” Ɛɛ rɛ ba kile ʋ ta ʋ lɩɩ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ. Hakɩl-nyʋlɩma tɩmma

english_verse: When Jesus heard what had happened, he went and found the man. Then Jesus asked, “Do you have faith in the Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Yesu aa nɩya dɩ ba kile baal hʋ ta Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ mʋ kyɛ na ʋ a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ laa Nihuwobiŋ Biye hʋ wɩya di rɛ?”

english_verse: He replied, “Sir, if you will tell me who he is, I will put my faith in him.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Aŋnɛ rɛ gɛɛ? Daga ŋ tɩɩna, ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, dɩ ŋ laa ʋ wɩya di.”

english_verse: “You have already seen him,” Jesus answered, “and right now he is talking with you.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ foŋ na ʋ rɛ. Ʋ rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa basɩ wɩya ɩ lee nyɛ.”

english_verse: The man said, “Lord, I put my faith in you!” Then he worshiped Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ baal hʋ tuu gbinni Yesu sɩya tɩyaŋ, a kyʋwalɩ ʋ aŋ baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, ŋ laa ɩ di rɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus told him, “I came to judge the people of this world. I am here to give sight to the blind and to make blind everyone who can see.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ŋ ko dʋnɩya rɛ dɩ dʋnɩya nala na ba wɩbɔmɔ, ka dɩ ŋ leŋ nala hʋ aa nyʋlɩma sɩyasɩ suri, ka nala hʋ mɛ aa baa dɩ ba sɩya suro dɩ ba mɛ nyʋlɩmɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “If you were blind, you would not be guilty. But now that you claim to see, you will keep on being guilty.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Dɩ mamaa rɛ fa nyʋlɩma, ma fa bɩ sɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ. Amɛ ma foŋ aa baa dɩ ma aa naa nyɛ, a gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ma ha we ma kyogisi tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain only thieves and robbers climb over the fence instead of going in through the gate to the sheep pen.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu maga namaga a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ tɩŋ dimbeenyʋwa hʋ a gyʋʋ pedɩya hʋ, aŋ wile tɩŋ gyekariya gyʋʋ, ʋ tɩɩna yaa gaal lɛ, a kɩ fasɩ nala kɩna mɛ.

english_verse: But the gatekeeper opens the gate for the shepherd, and he goes in through it. The sheep know their shepherd's voice. He calls each of them by name and leads them out.
translation_verse: Pedɩya didenni hʋ aa suri pedɩya hʋ dimbeenyʋwa rɛ a tɩya ʋ. Piyese hʋ mɛ gyɩŋ ʋ taal. Piyesi hʋ tɩɩna aa yɩrɩ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ feŋ nɛ, a laa ba sɩya a kaŋ ba lɩɩ.

english_verse: When he has led out all of his sheep, he walks in front of them, and they follow, because they know his voice.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko kaŋ ba buloŋ lɩɩ teŋ, ʋ aa laa ba sɩya rɛ, ka piyese hʋ kɩ tɩŋa ʋ hal, beewɩya ba gyɩŋ ʋ taal lɛ.

english_verse: The sheep will not follow strangers. They don't recognize a stranger's voice, and they run away.
translation_verse: Ba bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa tɩŋ nɩdʋma hal, see dɩ ba mɩɩgɩ fá tɩɩna hal tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ba bɩ gyɩŋ ʋ taal.”

english_verse: Jesus told the people this story. But they did not understand what he was talking about. Jesus Is the Good Shepherd
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ maga namaga no tɩya ba rɛ, amɛ ba gyɩ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa basɩ tɩya ba memii.

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain that I am the gate for the sheep.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa pedɩya hʋ dimbeenyʋwa.

english_verse: Everyone who came before me was a thief or a robber, and the sheep did not listen to any of them.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa sɩya ko ŋ tɩyaŋ a nyɩya wɩya baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ tɩŋ ba, ba buloŋ yaa gaala rɛ, a kɩ fasɩ nala kɩna mɛ, piyese hʋ mɛ bee tɩŋ ba nyʋwa.

english_verse: I am the gate. All who come in through me will be saved. Through me they will come and go and find pasture.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa dimbeenyʋwa hʋ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa tɩŋa ŋ tɩyaŋ a kɩ gyʋʋ, ŋ sɩ pɔ ʋ weliŋ. Ʋ sɩ lɩɩ aŋ mɩɩgɩ ko kɩ gyʋʋ abee laaŋfɩya, a na kɩdiweliye mɛ kɩ di.

english_verse: A thief comes only to rob, kill, and destroy. I came so everyone would have life, and have it fully.
translation_verse: Gaal hʋ kɛ ko dɩ ʋ gaa rɛ, a kpʋ, aŋ kyogi kyogisi, amɛ ŋ kɛ ko rɛ dɩ nala hʋ aa tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa kaŋ mɩɩbol aa kaŋ tɔnɔ.”

english_verse: I am the good shepherd, and the good shepherd gives up his life for his sheep.
translation_verse: Yesu bɩl baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa pedaalwelii hʋ. Pedaalwelii aa kpa ʋ mɩɩbol lenni sʋʋ rɛ ʋ piyese wɩya.

english_verse: Hired workers are not like the shepherd. They don't own the sheep, and when they see a wolf coming, they run off and leave the sheep. Then the wolf attacks and scatters the flock.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ ba aa kpaa ʋ kɩ daa piyese hʋ a kɩ laa tuno, ʋ tɩɩna daa tɩŋ piyese hʋ. Ɛɛwɩya dɩ ʋ rɛ ko na gboo dɩ ʋ aa ko, ʋ aa vɩya piyese hʋ ta rɛ aŋ fá. Gboo hʋ aa ko kaŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ aŋ ŋmaa kɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ pɩsa.

english_verse: Hired workers run away because they don't care about the sheep.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa fá rɛ, beewɩya ʋ tuno wɩya rɛ ʋ kɩ daa piyese hʋ. Ʋ sɩya tuwo piyese hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd. I know my sheep, and they know me.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa pedaalwelii hʋ. Ŋ gyɩma ŋ piyese rɛ, ŋ piyese mɛ gyɩma ŋ.

english_verse: Just as the Father knows me, I know the Father, and I give up my life for my sheep.
translation_verse: Anɩɩ ɛɛ hʋ ŋ Kuwo aa gyɩma ŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ŋ mɛ gyɩma ʋ. Ŋ yaa siri rɛ dɩ ŋ kpa ŋ mɩɩbol lenni sʋʋ ŋ piyese wɩya.

english_verse: I have other sheep that are not in this sheep pen. I must also bring them together, when they hear my voice. Then there will be one flock of sheep and one shepherd.
translation_verse: Ŋ kaŋ piyese badɔmɔŋ mɛ rɛ, aŋka ba tuwo pedɩya no tɩyaŋ. Ʋ maga dɩ ŋ kasɩ ba mɛ ko pɛ piyese no tɩyaŋ nɛ, dɩ ba buloŋ yaa nɩdɩgɩ piyese a gyɩŋ ŋ taal, ka dɩ ba pedaal mɛ yaa nɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: The Father loves me, because I give up my life, so I may receive it back again.
translation_verse: Ŋ kuwo kyo ŋ wɩya rɛ, beewɩya ŋ yaa siri rɛ dɩ ŋ sʋba ŋ tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ. Ka dɩ ŋ ha bɩl sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ.

english_verse: No one takes my life from me. I give it up willingly! I have the power to give it up and the power to receive it back again, just as my Father commanded me to do.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo kpʋ ŋ dɩ ŋ bɩ tɩya ʋ tɩɩna ŋmanɩɩ. Ŋ tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ sɩ kpa ŋ mɩɩbol tɩya sʋʋ. Ŋ kaŋ dee rɛ ŋ aa sɩ kpa ŋ mɩɩbol tɩya sʋʋ, a bɩl kaŋ dee mɛ ŋ aa sɩ laa ʋ sʋʋ lee. Ŋ kuwo aa baa ŋ yaa wɩɩ rɛ gɛɛ.”

english_verse: The people took sides because of what Jesus had told them.
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ wɩya no, Gyuuma hʋ kuu ɛɛ wɩya a porigi dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Many of them said, “He has a demon in him! He is crazy! Why listen to him?”
translation_verse: Ba gyeniŋ buloŋ baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma gyegili kɩ nɩɩ baal no wɩbasɩɩ? Gyɩŋbɔŋ nɛ kana ʋ! Ʋ aa yaarɩ rɛ!”

english_verse: But others said, “How could anyone with a demon in him say these things? No one like this could give sight to a blind person!” Jesus Is Rejected
translation_verse: Ba badɔmɔŋ mɛ baa, “Nal hʋ gyɩŋbɔŋ aa kana bɩ sɩ wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩya no. Gyɩŋbɔŋ wuwo kɩ suri nyʋlʋŋ sɩya rɛ?” Ba vɩya Yesu

english_verse: One day he was walking in the part of the temple known as Solomon's Porch,
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Yesu gyɩ we Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ gyambarɩŋ hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Solomɔn Gyambarɩŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ vala.

english_verse: and the people gathered all around him. They said, “How long are you going to keep us guessing? If you are the Messiah, tell us plainly!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala ko gol-ʋ, a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Mɔɔgɛɛ rɛ ɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ á gyegili maga ka dɩ ɩ na daga nal hʋ ɩ aa yaa tɩya ma? Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, basɩ polli tɩya ma dɩ á gyɩma.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I have told you, and you refused to believe me. The things I do by my Father's authority show who I am.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ laa sɩya basɩ tɩya ma rɛ, ka ma bɩ laa di. Tʋma hʋ ŋ aa tʋŋ ŋ Kuwo dee tɩyaŋ, ba aa rɛ aa di ŋ daŋsɩya.

english_verse: But since you are not my sheep, you don't believe me.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma bɩ yaa ŋ piyese, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ma bɩ laa ŋ wɩya di.

english_verse: My sheep know my voice, and I know them. They follow me,
translation_verse: Ŋ piyese gyɩma ŋ taal lɛ, ŋ mɛ gyɩŋ ba, ba kɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal.

english_verse: and I give them eternal life, so that they will never be lost. No one can snatch them out of my hand.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa tɩya ba mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii rɛ, ba bɩ sɩ maakyiye sʋba. Nal buloŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo kaŋ ba laa ŋ nosi tɩyaŋ maakyiye kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: My Father gave them to me, and he is greater than all others. No one can snatch them from his hands,
translation_verse: Ŋ Kuwo aa kpaa ba tɩya ŋ, ʋ rɛ tee kɩŋ buloŋ. Nal buloŋ mɛ yaŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo kaŋ ba laa ʋ nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Ŋ bee ŋ Kuwo buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: Once again the people picked up stones in order to kill Jesus.
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, Gyuuma hʋ bɩl paa bʋwa dɩ ba yaga ʋ.

english_verse: But he said, “I have shown you many good things my Father sent me to do. Which one are you going to stone me for?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ Kuwo tɩya ŋ dee rɛ ŋ yaa wɩweliye yʋga ma sɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Ba kɩbee wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ma kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma yaga ŋ nyɛ?”

english_verse: They answered, “We are not stoning you because of any good thing you did. We are stoning you because you did a terrible thing. You are just a man, and here you are claiming to be God!”
translation_verse: Gyuuma hʋ mɛ mɩɩgɩ baa, “Á bee kyɛ dɩ á yaga ɩ akuu ɩ aa yaa wɩweliye no kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ wɩya, amɛ ɩ yaa nihuwobiŋ nɛ aŋ kpa ɩ tɩɩ anɩɩ ɩ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: In your Scriptures doesn't God say, “You are gods”?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma tɩɩ mɩrɩsɩ tɩyaŋ ba basa rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa, ‘Ma yaa wɩɩbiisi rɛ.”’

english_verse: So why do you accuse me of a terrible sin for saying that I am the Son of God? After all, it is the Father who prepared me for this work. He is also the one who sent me into the world.
translation_verse: bee rɛ yaŋ sɩ tɩŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ ŋ, a tɩma ŋ ŋ ko tuu dʋnɩya, dɩ ma baa ŋ kpaa ŋ tɩɩ kɩ magɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ akuu ŋ aa baa dɩ ŋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye wɩya?

english_verse: If I don't do as my Father does, you should not believe me.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko bee yaa wɩya hʋ ŋ Kuwo aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ yaa, ɛɛ kɛ ma ta laa ŋ wɩya di.

english_verse: But if I do what my Father does, you should believe because of that, even if you don't have faith in me. Then you will know for certain that the Father is one with me, and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ aa yaa wɩya hʋ ŋ Kuwo aa baa ŋ kɩ yaa, abee ma aa bɩ laa ŋ di nyɛ buloŋ mɛ, ka ʋ maga dɩ ma laa wɩya no di rɛ a kɔnɩ wuwo gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ bee ŋ kuwo buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Again they wanted to arrest Jesus. But he escaped
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ, ba bɩl kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba kana ʋ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ lʋwɔlɩ lɩɩ doŋ.

english_verse: and crossed the Jordan to the place where John had earlier been baptizing. While Jesus was there,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl mɩɩgɩ mʋ kyol Gyɔɔdaŋ fuwo hʋ, a mʋ we lee hʋ tɩyaŋ Gyɔɔŋ fa aa fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ hʋ.

english_verse: many people came to him. They were saying, “John didn't work any miracles, but everything he said about Jesus is true.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ nɩgyamaa kɩ ko ʋ lee. Ba basɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Gyɔɔŋ fa bɩ yaa wɩmagɩl buloŋ, amɛ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ fa aa basa a mʋ kɩ tile baal no tɩyaŋ kɔnɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: A lot of those people also put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nɩgyamaa hʋ gyɩ aa we doŋ laa Yesu wɩya di.

english_verse: The sisters sent a message to the Lord and told him that his good friend Lazarus was sick.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ʋ naatoliye hʋ tɩma ba mʋ basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Á Tɩɩna, ɩ kyaŋkyoolii hʋ aa wɩɩlɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he said, “His sickness won't end in death. It will bring glory to God and his Son.”
translation_verse: Yesu aa nɩɩ wɩɩ no, ʋ baa, “Wɩɩla no litenii daa sɩ yaa Laazʋrɔsɩ sʋʋ, amɛ ʋ pɩŋ wɩɩla no rɛ dɩ nala na Wɩɩsɩ gaŋdarɩ, ka dɩ mɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ Biye mɛ tɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ a laa ŋ gaŋdarɩ.”

english_verse: Then he said to his disciples, “Now we will go back to Judea.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ma leŋ dɩ á mɩɩgɩ mʋ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ.”

english_verse: “Teacher,” they said, “the people there want to stone you to death! Why do you want to go back?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Á nɩhɩyawʋ, dɩyaraŋ biisi no ɩ daa Gyuuma paa bʋwa kɩ kyɛ ba yaga gɛɛ. Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ɩ bɩl kɩ kyɛ dɩ ɩ mʋ doŋ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Aren't there twelve hours in each day? If you walk during the day, you will have light from the sun, and you won't stumble.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Sɩgballɩya buloŋ kaŋ ʋ tebine bee ʋ wɩɩhaa rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, nal hʋ aa vala wɩɩhaa, ʋ bee garɩ kɩna, beewɩya lee buloŋ aa kyaanɩ rɛ.

english_verse: But if you walk during the night, you will stumble, because you don't have any light.”
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ aa vala tebine, ʋ aa kɩ garɩ kɩna rɛ, beewɩya pʋlʋŋ tuwo.”

english_verse: Then he told them, “Our friend Lazarus is asleep, and I am going there to wake him up.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Á kyana Laazʋrɔsɩ pɩŋ doo rɛ, amɛ ŋ sɩ mʋ kyisi ʋ doo hʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: They replied, “Lord, if he is asleep, he will get better.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Dɩ ʋ rɛ pɩŋ doo, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ sɩ deye.”

english_verse: Jesus really meant that Lazarus was dead, but they thought he was talking only about sleep.
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ, ʋ daga anɩɩ Laazʋrɔsɩ sʋba rɛ gɛɛ, amɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ kɛ fa bɩɩna anɩɩ doo tɩɩ rɛ ʋ kɔnɩ pɩŋ.

english_verse: I am glad I wasn't there, because now you will have a chance to put your faith in me. Let's go to him.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ma wɩya, ŋ teŋ fɩyɛla abee Laazʋrɔsɩ aa sʋba dɩ ŋ tuwo doŋ. Ma sɩ tɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ, a laa ŋ wɩya di. Ma leŋ dɩ á mʋ ʋ lee.”

english_verse: Thomas, whose nickname was “Twin,” said to the other disciples, “Come on. Let's go, so we can die with him.” Jesus Brings Lazarus to Life
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Tɔmaasɩ, Yesu hatɩnna hʋ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ daalɩyanɩ, basɩ tɩya ʋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ hʋ a baa, “Ma leŋ dɩ á buloŋ tɩŋ Yesu hal mʋ, dɩ ʋ rɛ sɩ sʋba mɛ, dɩ á buloŋ sʋba.”

english_verse: When Jesus got to Bethany, he found that Lazarus had already been in the tomb four days.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ kpa mʋ Bɛɛtani. Ba aa mʋʋ pele doŋ, ɛɛ rɛ Yesu nɩɩ anɩɩ Laazʋrɔsɩ kyɛyɛ banaa rɛ gɛɛ ba aa hogo ʋ.

english_verse: Bethany was less than three kilometers from Jerusalem,
translation_verse: Bɛɛtani abee Gyerusalɛm gyɩ bɩ pele meeldaasɩ balɩya.

english_verse: and many people had come from the city to comfort Martha and Mary because their brother had died.
translation_verse: Gyuuma fa yʋga a lɩɩ Gyerusalɛm ko Bɛɛtani dɩ ba lɔllɩ Maata abee Mɛɛrɩ, ba nɩɩnabiibaal hʋ aa sʋba wɩya.

english_verse: When Martha heard that Jesus had arrived, she went out to meet him, but Mary stayed in the house.
translation_verse: Maata aa nɩya anɩɩ Yesu we ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sii lɩɩ mʋ dɩ ʋ kyeme ʋ, aŋka Mɛɛrɩ kɛ fa we dɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Martha said to Jesus, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Maata basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, dɩ ɩ rɛ fa we daha, ŋ naabiibaal hʋ fa bɩ sɩ sʋba.

english_verse: Martha answered, “I know he will be raised to life on the last day, when all the dead are raised.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Maata basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ dʋnɩya kyɛtenii, ʋ sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “I am the one who raises the dead to life! Everyone who has faith in me will live, even if they die.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa nal hʋ aa kyisi nala sʋʋ tɩyaŋ a tɩya ba mɩɩbol. Nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa ŋ wɩya di, dɩ ba aa rɛ sʋba mɛ, ba sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: “Yes, Lord!” she replied. “I believe you are the Christ, the Son of God. You are the one we hoped would come into the world.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Maata baa, “Waa, ŋ Tɩɩna. Ŋ laa di anɩɩ ɩ rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, a yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye mɛ, nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa baa ʋ sɩ ko tuu dʋnɩya no.” Yesu wiye

english_verse: After Martha said this, she went and privately said to her sister Mary, “The Teacher is here, and he wants to see you.”
translation_verse: Maata aa basɩ wɩya no teŋ, ʋ mɩɩgɩ gyʋʋ dɩya a lʋwɔlɩ yɩrɩ ʋ naatoluu Mɛɛrɩ, a miŋsi basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Mɛɛrɩ, á nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ ko rɛ, a pɩyɛsɩ kɩ kyɛ ɩ.”

english_verse: As soon as Mary heard this, she got up and went out to Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɛɛrɩ aa nɩɩ gɛɛ, ʋ sii lagɩ lagɩ, a lɩɩ dɩ ʋ kyeme ʋ.

english_verse: He was still outside the village where Martha had gone to meet him.
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Yesu ha bɩ gyʋʋ bee hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ ha gyɩ we lee hʋ Maata aa kyeme ʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Many people had come to comfort Mary, and when they saw her quickly leave the house, they thought she was going out to the tomb to cry. So they followed her.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ fa aa we dɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ a kɩ fɩyɛlɩ Mɛɛrɩ bembii, aa naa dɩ ʋ sii tarɩsɩ kɩ lɩɩ gɛɛ, ba mɛ sii tɩŋa ʋ hal, beewɩya ba kɛ fa bɩɩna anɩɩ ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ mʋ wii Laazʋrɔsɩ bil hʋ lee rɛ.

english_verse: Mary went to where Jesus was. Then as soon as she saw him, she knelt at his feet and said, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.”
translation_verse: Mɛɛrɩ aa mʋʋ pele lee hʋ Yesu fa aa wee a na ʋ, ʋ tuu tele ʋ naasɩ tɩyaŋ aŋ baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, dɩ ɩ rɛ fa we daha, ŋ naabiibaal no fa bɩ sɩ sʋba.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw that Mary and the people with her were crying, he was terribly upset
translation_verse: Yesu aa naa Mɛɛrɩ abee nala hʋ aa tɩŋa ʋ hal aa wii gɛɛ, ʋ tɩya kyogi kɩŋkaŋ. Ʋ nyuu buloŋ nyiiri.

english_verse: and asked, “Where have you put his body?” They replied, “Lord, come and you will see.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Lee tɩyaŋ nɛ ma hogo ʋ?” Ba basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Á Tɩɩna, ko na doŋ.”

english_verse: and the people said, “See how much he loved Lazarus.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ basɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Ma na ʋ aa kyo ʋ gɛɛ.”

english_verse: Some of them said, “He gives sight to the blind. Why couldn't he have kept Lazarus from dying?”
translation_verse: Badɔmɔŋ mɛ pɩyɛsɩ a baa, “Ka ʋ rɛ gyɩ suri nyʋlʋŋ hʋ sɩya gɛɛ, ʋ fa bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ Laazʋrɔsɩ ta sʋba?”

english_verse: Jesus was still terribly upset. So he went to the tomb, which was a cave with a stone rolled against the entrance.
translation_verse: Ba aa basɩ gɛɛ, Yesu nyuu bɩl nyiiri. Ɛɛ rɛ ba mʋ pele bʋwa hʋ lee. Bʋwa hʋ fa yaa bʋbʋwa rɛ, ka ba kpa bʋyɩ tɔ ʋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: Then he told the people to roll the stone away. But Martha said, “Lord, you know that Lazarus has been dead four days, and there will be a bad smell.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa dɩ ba kaŋ bʋyɩ hʋ suri bʋwa hʋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Maata, Laazʋrɔsɩ nɩɩnatoliye hʋ kɩdɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, ʋ aa sʋba ʋ kyɛyɛ banaa rɛ yaa gyɩnaŋ. Mɔɔnyɛ ʋ aa sʋwalɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Didn't I tell you that if you had faith, you would see the glory of God?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ bɩ basɩ tɩya ɩ anɩɩ dɩ ɩ rɛ laa ŋ wɩya di, ɩ sɩ na Wɩɩsɩ dee aa maga gɛɛ?”

english_verse: After the stone had been rolled aside, Jesus looked up toward heaven and prayed, “Father, I thank you for answering my prayer.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba kaŋ bʋyɩ hʋ suri. Yesu wil deŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu aŋ baa, “Ŋ Kuwo, ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ ɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ abee ɩ aa gyegile kɩ nɩɩ ŋ wulo.

english_verse: I know that you always answer my prayers. But I said this, so the people here would believe you sent me.”
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ gyegili kɩ nɩɩ ŋ wulo rɛ saŋa buloŋ. Amɛ nala no aa we daha wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ŋ basɩ wɩɩ no, dɩ ba wuwo laa di anɩɩ ɩ rɛ tɩma ŋ.”

english_verse: When Jesus had finished praying, he shouted, “Lazarus, come out!”
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ ko teŋ, ʋ nɔsɩ yɩrɩ a baa, “Laazʋrɔsɩ, ko lɩɩ!”

english_verse: The man who had been dead came out. His hands and feet were wrapped with strips of burial cloth, and a cloth covered his face. Jesus then told the people, “Untie him and let him go.” The Plot To Kill Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ baal hʋ aa sʋba hʋ sii ko lɩɩ. Ʋ aa ko lɩɩ dɩ liŋe hʋ ha fa vʋwa ʋ naasɩ abee ʋ nosi buloŋ, ka kɩdɩgɩ mɛ tɔ ʋ sɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya nala hʋ a baa, “Ma kaŋ kɩna hʋ puri ta ʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ mʋ.” Ba vʋʋla dɩ ba kpʋ Yesu Matiwu

english_verse: Many of the people who had come to visit Mary saw the things Jesus did, and they put their faith in him.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ gyɩ aa ko dɩ ba kyʋwalɩ Mɛɛrɩ, a na wɩɩ hʋ Yesu aa yaa, ba tɩyaŋ nala yʋga gyɩ laa ʋ wɩya di rɛ.

english_verse: Others went to the Pharisees and told what Jesus had done.
translation_verse: Ka ba badɔmɔŋ mɛ mɩɩgɩ mʋ basɩ tɩya Farasiima badɔmɔŋ wɩɩ hʋ Yesu aa yaa.

english_verse: Then the chief priests and the Pharisees called the council together and said, “What should we do? This man is working a lot of miracles.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima hʋ abee wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ abee bee hʋ nɩhɩyasɩ na dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Wɩbee rɛ á sɩ yaa? Ma na wɩmagɩla no buloŋ baal no aa yaa.

english_verse: If we don't stop him now, everyone will put their faith in him. Then the Romans will come and destroy our temple and our nation.”
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa wɩya no kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ, nal nal buloŋ sɩ ko laa ʋ wɩya di. Dɩ gɛɛ rɛ ko yaa, Roma paalʋʋ nala sɩ ko kaŋ á taŋha abee á Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ buloŋ laa.”

english_verse: One of the council members was Caiaphas, who was also high priest that year. He spoke up and said, “You people don't have any sense at all!
translation_verse: Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ ba fa kɩ yɩrɩ Kayifasɩ. Haŋ bɩna hʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ gyɩ yaa Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ baa, “Ma yaa bambugo kɩŋkaŋ!

english_verse: Don't you know it is better for one person to die for the people than for the whole nation to be destroyed?”
translation_verse: Ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ dɩ nɩdɩgɩ rɛ laa paalʋʋ no nala buloŋ nyuu sʋba, ʋ rɛ kpɩya á paalʋʋ no nala buloŋ aa sʋba, koo ma bɩ gyɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ?”

english_verse: Yet Jesus would not die just for the Jewish nation. He would die to bring together all of God's scattered people.
translation_verse: Ba paalʋʋ hʋ nala mɛ dʋŋ wɩya daa ʋ sɩ sʋba, amɛ dɩ ʋ wuwo pɛ kasɩ Wɩɩsɩ biisi hʋ aa pɩsa we lee buloŋ tɩyaŋ mɛ, a pɛ dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: From that day on, the council started making plans to put Jesus to death.
translation_verse: A yaŋ lɩɩ haŋ kyɛɛ hʋ kɩ mʋ, ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ piili kɩ kyɛ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ ba aa sɩ tɩŋa a kpʋ Yesu.

english_verse: Because of this plot against him, Jesus stopped going around in public. He went to the town of Ephraim, which was near the desert, and he stayed there with his disciples.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, Yesu gyɩ bɩl bɩ gɔllɔ kɩ mʋ leye hʋ Gyuuma aa sɩ kɩ na ʋ. Ʋ gyɩ lɩɩ Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ mʋ we tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Efirem aa kpaga pogibal hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: It was almost time for Passover. Many of the Jewish people who lived out in the country had come to Jerusalem to get themselves ready for the festival.
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Gyuuma Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ gyɩ kpaga. Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma yʋga lɩɩ ba beye, a mʋ Gyerusalɛm, dɩ ba pɩɩsɩ ba bisiŋ ta, aŋka dɩ kyɛbal hʋ na pele.

english_verse: They looked around for Jesus. Then when they were in the temple, they asked each other, “You don't think he will come here for Passover, do you?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba deŋ kɩ kyɛ Yesu. Ba aa we Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ba kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Ma bɩɩna ʋ sɩ ko gbɩyala hʋ koo, ʋ bɩ sɩ ko?”

english_verse: The chief priests and the Pharisees told the people to let them know if any of them saw Jesus. This is how they hoped to arrest him.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Farasiima hʋ tɩya nyʋwa anɩɩ dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ gyɩŋ lee hʋ Yesu aa wee, dɩ ʋ tɩɩna ko tɩya ba duwoso dɩ ba wuwo kana ʋ.

english_verse: If you serve me, you must go with me. My servants will be with me wherever I am. If you serve me, my Father will honor you.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ tʋma kɩ tɩya ŋ, see tɩɩna tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa. Lee hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa wee, ʋ tɩɩna mɛ sɩ we doŋ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa tʋma kɩ tɩya ŋ, ŋ Kuwo sɩ kpa ʋ tɩɩna yohuŋ.” Yesu basɩ ʋ sʋʋ wɩya

english_verse: Judas did not really care about the poor. He asked this because he carried the moneybag and sometimes would steal from it.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ʋ aa kyo nyaaba rɛ tɩŋ, amɛ ʋ fa yaa gaal lɛ. Ʋ rɛ fa aa biŋ ba molbiye, aa gaa lɩɩ kɩ yaa ʋ tɩɩ wɩkanɩya.

english_verse: they took palm branches and went out to greet him. They shouted, “Hooray! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord! God bless the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba buloŋ gyaa wɩɩwɩɩsɩ paaponni, a kaŋ mʋ dɩ ba kyeme ʋ, a kɩ yaa kyagɩŋsɩ yʋga a baa, “Ma dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ. Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyiyeli nal hʋ aa ko á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ feŋ tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyiyeli Iziral tɩmma kuwori hʋ.

english_verse: Jesus found a donkey and rode on it, just as the Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu na kokubiye a kaŋ gyɩŋ. Ba fa sabɩ gɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa,

english_verse: Mary took a very expensive bottle of perfume and poured it on Jesus' feet. She wiped them with her hair, and the sweet smell of the perfume filled the house.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Mɛɛrɩ kpa tʋranɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ sʋwala aa sʋma weliŋ ka ʋ yalɩɩ mɛ hayɛ, ʋ kpa bɩsɩ mɩsɩ Yesu naasɩ, a kaŋ ʋ nyupʋna tɩɩgɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ tʋranɩɩ hʋ sʋwala sii tɔ dɩya hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: A lot of people came when they heard that Jesus was there. They also wanted to see Lazarus, because Jesus had raised him from death.
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa gyɩ nɩya anɩɩ Yesu we Bɛɛtani tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba sii mʋ doŋ. Amɛ Yesu dʋŋ wɩya daa ba gyɩ mʋ doŋ. Ba gyɩ mʋwa ka dɩ ba pɛ na Laazʋrɔsɩ mɛ rɛ, nal hʋ Yesu aa kyise sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: A disciple named Judas Iscariot was there. He was the one who was going to betray Jesus, and he asked,
translation_verse: Dɩ Yesu hatɩnna hʋ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Gyudasɩ Isɩkarɔtɩ, nal hʋ fa aa ko kpa Yesu yallɩ hʋ, baa,

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Leave her alone! She has kept this perfume for the day of my burial.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma leŋ haaŋ no bee laaŋfɩya, ʋ fa kpaa tʋranɩɩ no biŋ kɩ pɔ kyɛɛ hʋ ba aa sɩ hogo ŋ nɛ.

english_verse: You will always have the poor with you, but you won't always have me.” A Plot To Kill Lazarus
translation_verse: Ma bee nyaaba sɩ we doŋ saŋa buloŋ, amɛ ŋ beel-ma kɛ bɩ sɩ we doŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.” Ba vʋʋla dɩ ba kpʋ Laazʋrɔsɩ

english_verse: So the chief priests made plans to kill Lazarus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ vʋʋlɩ anɩɩ see dɩ ba kpʋ Laazʋrɔsɩ mɛ.

english_verse: Philip from Bethsaida in Galilee was there too. So they went to him and said, “Sir, we would like to meet Jesus.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala no sii mʋ Fɩlɩpɩ lee, a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, á aa kyɛ á na Yesu rɛ.”

english_verse: But the Pharisees said to each other, “There is nothing we can do! Everyone in the world is following Jesus.” Some Greeks Want To Meet Jesus
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Farasiima hʋ basɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Á lʋga á wɩɩ hʋ kɩ lɔlɔ rɛ. Ma deŋ na, dʋnɩya nala buloŋ nɛ aa tɩŋa ʋ hal gɛɛ.” Giriisi tɩmma badɔmɔŋ ko kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba na Yesu

english_verse: “The Lord has blinded the eyes of the people, and he has made the people stubborn. He did this so that they could not see or understand, and so that they would not turn to the Lord and be healed.”
translation_verse: “Wɩɩsɩ tɔɔ ba sɩya rɛ, dɩ ba ta wuwo na kɩŋ buloŋ. a kaŋ ba hakɩllɩ mɛ tɔ, dɩ ba ta wuwo gyɩŋ wɩya memiye. Dɩ gɛɛ fa daa, ba fa sɩ ko Wɩɩsɩ lee dɩ ʋ tɩɩbɩ ba.”

english_verse: The next day a large crowd was in Jerusalem for Passover. When they heard that Jesus was coming for the festival,
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩya, gyamaa hʋ aa ko Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ nɩya anɩɩ Yesu aa ko Gyerusalɛm nɛ.

english_verse: “People of Jerusalem, don't be afraid! Your King is now coming, and he is riding on a donkey.”
translation_verse: “Zaayɔŋ nala, ma ta kɩ fáá kambɩŋ. Ma na, ma kuwori rɛ gyɩŋ kokubiye a kɩ ko.”

english_verse: At first, Jesus' disciples did not understand. But after he had been given his glory, they remembered all this. Everything had happened exactly as the Scriptures said it would.
translation_verse: Yesu hatɩnna hʋ gyɩ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩya no buloŋ aa yaa, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyisi Yesu ʋ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ a laa feŋ hʋ gɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ ba liisi anɩɩ wɩya hʋ ba aa saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a mʋ kɩ tile Yesu tɩyaŋ, ba aa rɛ kɔnɩ ko yaa ʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: A crowd had come to meet Jesus because they had seen him call Lazarus out of the tomb. They kept talking about him and this miracle.
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa hʋ gyɩ aa nɩya anɩɩ Yesu rɛ yaa wɩmagɩl no, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba buloŋ gyɩ ko lɩɩ dɩ ba kyeme ʋ.

english_verse: Philip told Andrew. Then the two of them went to Jesus and told him. The Son of Man Must Be Lifted Up
translation_verse: Fɩlɩpɩ mɛ sii mʋ basɩ tɩya Aŋduru. Ɛɛ rɛ ba buloŋ balɩya mʋ basɩ tɩya Yesu.

english_verse: Jesus said: The time has come for the Son of Man to be given his glory.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Nyɛ kɛ, saŋa hʋ pele rɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ daga mɩyaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye gaŋdarɩ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that a grain of wheat that falls on the ground will never be more than one grain unless it dies. But if it dies, it will produce lots of wheat.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, dɩ ɩ rɛ bɩ kpaa miŋbii doho, dɩ ʋ sʋba, ʋ aa yaa miŋbidɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ. Amɛ dɩ ɩ rɛ ko kpa ʋ doho dɩ ʋ sʋba ʋ aa we miŋbigyamaa rɛ.

english_verse: When the crowd heard the voice, some of them thought it was thunder. Others thought an angel had spoken to Jesus.
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa hʋ aa sɩŋ doŋ a nɩɩ taal hʋ, ba badɔmɔŋ baa dɩ duwoŋ nɛ nɔsɔ. Badɔmɔŋ mɛ baa dɩ malɩka rɛ basɩ wɩya tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: Then Jesus told the crowd, “That voice spoke to help you, not me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma wɩya rɛ tɩŋ taal no basɩ gɛɛ, ŋ wɩya daa.

english_verse: This world's people are now being judged, and the ruler of this world is already being thrown out!
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya pele rɛ. Saŋa no tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ sɩ kile Sɩtaanɩ, nal hʋ aa yaa dʋnɩya nala kuwori a ta ʋ kuwori kpasa tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If I am lifted up above the earth, I will make everyone want to come to me.”
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ba aa rɛ ko kpaasɩ ŋ mal daagarɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, ŋ sɩ kaŋ nala buloŋ ko ŋ lee.”

english_verse: The crowd said to Jesus, “The Scriptures teach that the Messiah will live forever. How can you say that the Son of Man must be lifted up? Who is this Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ baa, “Ba daga ma á mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ a baa, ‘Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, ʋ bɩ sɩ sʋba, ʋ sɩ we doŋ deŋdeŋ kɩ mʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ yaŋ sɩ yaa baa dɩ ba sɩ kaŋ Nihuwobiŋ Biye a kpaasɩ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ? Aŋnɛ rɛ yaa Nihuwobiŋ Biye no wɩya ɩ aa basɩ?’

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The light will be with you for only a little longer. Walk in the light while you can. Then you won't be caught walking blindly in the dark.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba aa baa, “Pʋlʋŋ hʋ bɩ sɩ we ma lee pɩɩsɩ. Pʋlʋŋ hʋ ha aa we doŋ nyɛ, ma kɩ vala pʋlʋŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ bilhuu ta pirigi gyʋʋ ma, beewɩya nal hʋ aa vala bilhuu tɩyaŋ, ʋ bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ʋ aa mʋʋ.

english_verse: Have faith in the light while it is with you, and you will be children of the light.” The People Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus After Jesus had said these things, he left and went into hiding.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa tɩya pʋlʋŋ hʋ ha aa we ma lee nyɛ, ma laa ʋ wɩya di. Ɛɛ rɛ ma sɩ yaa nala hʋ aa we pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ.” Yesu aa basɩ wɩya no ko teŋ, ʋ sii lɩɩ a kana ʋ tɩɩ faŋa dɩ ba ta na ʋ. Gyuuma gyeniŋ buloŋ vɩya Yesu wɩya

english_verse: He had worked a lot of miracles among the people, but they were still not willing to have faith in him.
translation_verse: Abee wɩmagɩla hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa yaa ba sɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ka ba ha bɩ laa ʋ wɩya di.

english_verse: This happened so that what the prophet Isaiah had said would come true, “Lord, who has believed our message? And who has seen your mighty strength?”
translation_verse: Ba aa bɩ laa ʋ wɩya di gɛɛ, ɛɛ leŋ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Azaaya fa aa basa ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ʋ gyɩ baa, “Tɩɩna, aŋnɛ rɛ laa wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basɩ di, aŋnɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ daga ʋ dee hʋ tɩya.”

english_verse: The people could not have faith in Jesus, because Isaiah had also said,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba kɔnɩ gyɩ bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di gɛɛ. Beewɩya Azaaya gyɩ bɩl basɩ ba wɩya rɛ abaa,

english_verse: Isaiah said this, because he saw the glory of Jesus and spoke about him.
translation_verse: Azaaya kɛ gyɩ laa sɩya na Yesu gaŋdarɩ aa sɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ basɩ ʋ wɩya gɛɛ.

english_verse: Even then, many of the leaders put their faith in Jesus, but they did not tell anyone about it. The Pharisees had already given orders for the people not to have anything to do with anyone who had faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Abee gɛɛ buloŋ, Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ yʋga gyɩ laa Yesu wɩya di rɛ, ka kambɩŋ gyɩ kaŋ ba Farasiima hʋ wɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba bɩ wuwo kyaasɩ basɩ anɩɩ ba laa ʋ wɩya di rɛ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ basɩ gɛɛ, ba fa sɩ kile ba ta ba wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And besides, the leaders liked praise from others more than they liked praise from God. Jesus Came To Save the World
translation_verse: Ba fa kyo dɩ nala kɩ bigisi ba rɛ a te Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ kɩ bigisi ba. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba fa kaŋ ba laadii faŋa.

english_verse: In a loud voice Jesus said: Everyone who has faith in me also has faith in the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu heeli basɩ a baa, “Nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa ŋ wɩya di, nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ wɩya mɛ rɛ ʋ tɩɩna laa di gɛɛ, ŋ dʋŋ wɩya daa.

english_verse: And everyone who has seen me has seen the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa naa ŋ, ʋ tɩɩna naa nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ mɛ rɛ.

english_verse: I am the light that has come into the world. No one who has faith in me will stay in the dark.
translation_verse: Ŋ ko tuu dʋnɩya rɛ dɩ ŋ yaa dʋnɩya nala pʋlʋŋ a kyaanɩ tɩya ba. Ɛɛwɩya, nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa ŋ wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna bɩl bɩ sɩ we bilhuu tɩyaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: I am not the one who will judge those who refuse to obey my teachings. I came to save the people of this world, not to be their judge.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa nɩɩ ŋ wɩbasɩya aŋ bee tɩŋ ba, ŋ bɩ sɩ di ʋ tɩɩna sarɩya, beewɩya ŋ bɩ ko dɩ ŋ di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ba. Amɛ ŋ ko dɩ ŋ laa dʋnɩya nala ta rɛ.

english_verse: But everyone who rejects me and my teachings will be judged on the last day by what I have said.
translation_verse: Sarɩdiil lɛ we doŋ ʋ aa sɩ di nal hʋ buloŋ aa vɩya ŋ wɩya sarɩya. Dʋnɩya kyɛtenii ŋ wɩbasɩya rɛ ba sɩ kpa di nal buloŋ aa bɩ laa ŋ wɩya di sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: I know that his commands will bring eternal life. This is why I tell you exactly what the Father has told me.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa daga ŋ dɩ ŋ basɩ aa tɩya nala mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa basɩ, ŋ Kuwo rɛ daga ŋ.”

english_verse: It was before Passover, and Jesus knew that the time had come for him to leave this world and to return to the Father. He had always loved his followers in this world, and he loved them to the very end.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ ko ka kyɛdɩgɩ rɛ ka dɩ Gyuuma Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ pele. Yesu gyɩ gyɩma anɩɩ saŋa hʋ ʋ aa sɩ lɩɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ a mʋ ʋ Kuwo lee pele rɛ. Ʋ gyɩ kyo nala hʋ aa tɩŋa ʋ hal lɛ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ weliŋ, ʋ ha sɩ kyo ba a kaŋ kɩ mʋ dʋnɩya tenii.

english_verse: Even before the evening meal started, the devil had made Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot, decide to betray Jesus.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ no dɩdaana, Yesu bee ʋ hatɩnna hʋ hɔŋ kɩ di kɩdiiliye. Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Sɩtaanɩ kɛ foŋ gyʋʋ Siimɔŋ biibaal Gyudasɩ Isɩkarɔtɩ hakɩla tɩyaŋ nɛ dɩ ʋ kpa Yesu yallɩ.

english_verse: Jesus knew he had come from God and would go back to God. He also knew that the Father had given him complete power.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ Kuwo kpaa kɩŋ buloŋ dee rɛ tɩya ʋ. Ʋ tɩɩ fa gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ ʋ lɩɩ ko, ɛɛwɩya ʋ fa gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ bɩl aa mɩɩgɩ ʋ mʋ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ.

english_verse: So during the meal Jesus got up, removed his outer garment, and wrapped a towel around his waist.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu sii kɩdiiliye hʋ nyuu, a wuri ʋ gabal biŋ, aŋ kpa bɔridʋba vʋwa ʋ tɩŋa,

english_verse: He put some water into a large bowl. Then he began washing his disciples' feet and drying them with the towel he was wearing.
translation_verse: aŋ yaa nɩɩ we kɩŋ tɩyaŋ, a piili kɩ sɔmɔ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ naasɩ aŋ kaŋ bɔrɩdʋba hʋ ʋ aa kpaa vʋwa ʋ tɩŋa a kɩ bɩllɩ ba naasɩ.

english_verse: But when he came to Simon Peter, this disciple asked, “Lord, are you going to wash my feet?”
translation_verse: Ʋ aa ko pele Siimɔŋ Piita, ɛɛ rɛ Piita pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, ɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ sɔmɔ ŋ naasɩ rɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You don't really know what I am doing, but later you will understand.”
translation_verse: Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Gyɩnaŋ kɛ ɩ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ no ŋ aa yaa memii, amɛ ʋ hal tɩyaŋ ɩ sɩ gyɩma ʋ memii.”

english_verse: “You will never wash my feet!” Peter replied. “If I don't wash you,” Jesus told him, “you don't really belong to me.”
translation_verse: Piita bɩl basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa dɩ ɩ sɔmɔ ŋ naasɩ maakyiye kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ.” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ bɩ sɔmɔ ɩ naasɩ, ŋ beel-ɩ bɩl bɩ sɩ pɛ wɩɩ buloŋ.”

english_verse: Peter said, “Lord, don't wash just my feet. Wash my hands and my head.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita bɩl baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, dɩ ɛɛ kɛ rɛ haa, ta sɔmɔ ŋ naasɩ dʋŋ, sɔmɔ ŋ nyuu abee ŋ nosi buloŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “People who have bathed and are clean all over need to wash just their feet. And you, my disciples, are clean, except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Nal hʋ buloŋ aa foo nɩɩ, ʋ teŋ lee buloŋ aa weliye rɛ, ʋ bɩl bɩ maga dɩ ʋ tɩɩna fo nɩɩ, see dɩ ʋ sɔmɔ ʋ naasɩ dʋŋ. Ma buloŋ yaŋ bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ, amɛ nɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ kaŋ bisiŋ ma tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus knew who would betray him. That is why he said, “except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ gyɩŋ nal hʋ aa sɩ kpa ʋ yallɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ baa dɩ ba buloŋ daa kaŋ bisiŋ, dɩ see nɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: After Jesus had washed his disciples' feet and had put his outer garment back on, he sat down again. Then he said: Do you understand what I have done?
translation_verse: Yesu aa sɔmɔ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ naasɩ ko teŋ, ʋ bɩl kpa ʋ gabal hʋ laalɩ, a bɩl mʋ hɔŋ ʋ lɩhɔnɩɩ, aŋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ma gyɩŋ wɩɩ no ŋ aa yaa memii rɛ?

english_verse: You call me your teacher and Lord, and you should, because that is who I am.
translation_verse: Ma kana ŋ kɩ yɩrɩ ma dɩdagɩl lɛ abee ma Tɩɩna. Ʋ yaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ dɩ ma kɩ yɩrɩ ŋ gɛɛ, beewɩya ŋ kɔnɩ maga gɛɛ rɛ.

english_verse: I have set the example, and you should do for each other exactly what I have done for you.
translation_verse: Ŋ laa sɩya yaa rɛ dɩ ma na, a mɛ wuwo yaa gɛɛ tɩɩ kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that servants are not greater than their master, and messengers are not greater than the one who sent them.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, yoŋ buloŋ bɩ tee ʋ tɩɩna. Nal ba aa tɩma mɛ bɩ tee nal hʋ aa tɩma ʋ.

english_verse: I am not talking about all of you. I know the ones I have chosen. But what the Scriptures say must come true. And they say, “The man who ate with me has turned against me!”
translation_verse: Ma buloŋ daa ŋ kɩ daga. Ŋ gyɩŋ nala hʋ ŋ aa lɩya rɛ. Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ ba aa saba biŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ maga dɩ ʋ yaa rɛ. Ba basa anɩɩ ŋ bee nal hʋ aa pɛɛ dɔmɔŋ di kɩdiiliye rɛ sɩ mɩɩgɩ bɩrɩmɩ ŋ dɔŋ.

english_verse: I am telling you this before it all happens. Then when it does happen, you will believe who I am.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ wɩɩ no kɩ tɩya ma rɛ ka dɩ ʋ na yaa, dɩ gɛɛ rɛ kɔnɩ ko yaa, ma sɩ gyɩma anɩɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa nal hʋ ŋ aa baa ŋ yaa.

english_verse: So the disciple leaned toward Jesus and asked, “Lord, which one of us are you talking about?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ hatɩnnɩ hʋ fa aa hɔŋ Yesu logiŋ hʋ marɩ fasɩ mʋ kpaga Yesu a pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, aŋnɛ rɛ?”

english_verse: After Jesus had said these things, he was deeply troubled and told his disciples, “I tell you for certain that one of you will betray me.”
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ wɩya no ko teŋ, ʋ tɩya buloŋ kyogi kɩŋkaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ polli tɩya ba a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ma kɩdɩgɩ rɛ sɩ kpa ŋ yallɩ.”

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple was sitting next to him at the meal,
translation_verse: Yesu hatɩnna hʋ tɩyaŋ nal hʋ wɩya ʋ fa aa kyo kɩŋkaŋ nɛ fa hɔŋ ʋ logiŋ.

english_verse: and Simon motioned for this disciple to find out which one Jesus meant.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Siimɔŋ Piita lɔgɩ ʋ anɩɩ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ Yesu na dɩ aŋnɛ rɛ ʋ kɩ daga gɛɛ?

english_verse: But because Judas was in charge of the money, some of them thought that Jesus had told him to buy something they needed for the festival. Others thought that Jesus had told him to give some money to the poor.
translation_verse: Gyudasɩ rɛ fa aa biŋ ba molbiye. Ɛɛ wɩya Yesu hatɩnna hʋ badɔmɔŋ kɛ fa bɩɩna anɩɩ Yesu fa aa kyɛ dɩ Gyudasɩ mʋ yɔbɔ kɩna hʋ ba aa sɩ di rɛ gbɩyala hʋ tɩyaŋ, koo ʋ baa ʋ kaŋ kɩŋ nɛ a lɩɩ tɩya nyaaba.

english_verse: Judas took the piece of bread and went out. It was already night. The New Command
translation_verse: Gyudasɩ aa laa paanʋʋ hʋ teŋ, ʋ nyagɩ sii lɩɩ lagɩ lagɩ. Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ lee gyɩ bile rɛ. Yesu wee nyʋʋfalɩɩ tɩya nala

english_verse: My children, I will be with you for only a little while longer. Then you will look for me, but you won't find me. I tell you just as I told the people, “You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: Ŋ nikyooliye, ŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ we ma lee pɩɩsɩ. Ma sɩ deŋ kyɛ ŋ. Amɛ, wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa basɩ tɩya Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma mɛ. Lee hʋ ŋ aa sɩ mʋ, ma bɩ sɩ wuwo mʋ doŋ.

english_verse: “Would you really die for me?” Jesus asked. “I tell you for certain before a rooster crows, you will say three times that you don't even know me.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ kɔnɩ yaa siri dɩ ɩ kpa ɩ mɩɩbol lenni sʋʋ ŋ wɩya rɛ? Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ɩ, ka dɩ gyibal na wii gyɩnaŋ, ɩ sɩ tʋwa naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa bʋto anɩɩ ɩ bɩ gyɩma ŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Don't be worried! Have faith in God and have faith in me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ma ta leŋ dɩ ma tɩsɩ kyogi. Ma laa Wɩɩsɩ di, a laa ŋ mɛ di.

english_verse: There are many rooms in my Father's house. I wouldn't tell you this, unless it was true. I am going there to prepare a place for each of you.
translation_verse: Ŋ Kuwo bee tɩyaŋ dɩɩgyamaa rɛ we doŋ. Dɩ gɛɛ fa daa, ŋ fa bɩ sɩ basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ ŋ sɩ mʋ marɩ lee a biŋ ma.

english_verse: After I have done this, I will come back and take you with me. Then we will be together.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ mʋwa a marɩ lee hʋ biŋ ma ko teŋ, ŋ sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko a kaŋ ma mʋ ŋ lee dɩ á buloŋ we lɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: You know the way to where I am going.”
translation_verse: Lee hʋ mɛ ŋ aa sɩ mʋ, ma gyɩŋ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ rɛ.”

english_verse: Thomas said, “Lord, we don't even know where you are going! How can we know the way?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Tɔmaasɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Á Tɩɩna, á bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ɩ aa mʋʋ, ɛɛ rɛ á sɩ wuwo yaa gyɩŋ ʋ ŋmanɩɩ?”

english_verse: “I am the way, the truth, and the life!” Jesus answered. “Without me, no one can go to the Father.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa ŋmanɩɩ hʋ, abee Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ, a kɩ tɩya mɩɩbol mɛ. Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo mʋ ŋ Kuwo lee, dɩ ʋ tɩɩna bɩ tɩŋa ŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If you had really known me, you would have known the Father. But from now on, you do know him, and you have seen him.”
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ kɔnɩ gyɩma ŋ, ma sɩ gyɩŋ ŋ Kuwo mɛ. A lɩɩ gyɩnaŋ kaŋ kɩ mʋ, ma paalɩ gyɩma ʋ rɛ, a na ʋ mɛ.”

english_verse: Philip said, “Lord, show us the Father. That is all we need.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Fɩlɩpɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, daga ma Kuwo hʋ, wɩɩ hʋ á aa kyɛɛ buloŋ nɛ gɛɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Philip, I have been with you for a long time. Don't you know who I am? If you have seen me, you have seen the Father. How can you ask me to show you the Father?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Fɩlɩpɩ, ŋ beel-ma buloŋ sɩ we doŋ a pɩɩsɩ maga nyɛ, ka ɩ ha bɩ gyɩma ŋ? Nal hʋ buloŋ aa naa ŋ, ʋ tɩɩna naa ŋ Kuwo mɛ rɛ. Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ɩ baa dɩ ŋ daga ma ŋ Kuwo?

english_verse: Don't you believe that I am one with the Father and that the Father is one with me? What I say isn't said on my own. The Father who lives in me does these things.
translation_verse: Ɩ bɩ laa di anɩɩ ŋ bee ŋ Kuwo buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ koo? Wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa basɩ tɩya ma, ŋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ daa ŋ basɩ ba. Wɩya hʋ mɛ ŋ aa yaa, ŋ Kuwo tɩɩ rɛ tɩŋa ŋ ŋ kɩ yaa ba gɛɛ.

english_verse: Have faith in me when I say that the Father is one with me and that I am one with the Father. Or else have faith in me simply because of the things I do.
translation_verse: Ma laa di anɩɩ ŋ aa baa ŋ bee ŋ kuwo buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Dɩ mamaa bɩ sɩ laa ŋ di akuu ŋ aa baa ŋ bee ŋ kuwo yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya, amɛ ma laa ŋ di akuu wɩya hʋ ŋ aa yaa nyubaanɩŋ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you have faith in me, you will do the same things I am doing. You will do even greater things, now that I am going back to the Father.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa ŋ wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ wuwo kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ ŋ aa yaa. Ʋ tɩɩna gba sɩ paalɩ wuwo yaa wɩya a te wɩya hʋ ŋ aa yaa, beewɩya ŋ aa mʋʋ ŋ Kuwo lee rɛ.

english_verse: Ask me, and I will do whatever you ask. This way the Son will bring honor to the Father.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ ma aa sʋla kɩ kyɛ ŋ feŋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ sɩ yaa tɩya ma. Ŋ sɩ yaa gɛɛ dɩ nala tɩŋa ŋ tɩyaŋ a na ŋ Kuwo gaŋdarɩ aa maga gɛɛ.

english_verse: I will do whatever you ask me to do. The Holy Spirit Is Promised
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ sʋla kɩ kyɛ wɩɩ buloŋ ŋ feŋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ sɩ yaa tɩya ma.” Yesu wee nyʋwa baa ʋ sɩ leŋ dɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ ko

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: If you love me, you will do as I command.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Dɩ mamaa rɛ kyo ŋ, ma sɩ kɩ tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: Then I will ask the Father to send you the Holy Spirit who will help you and always be with you.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, ŋ sɩ sʋla ŋ Kuwo dɩ ʋ kpa kyɩkyagɩl kɩdɩgɩ mɛ tɩya ma. Ʋ sɩ we ma lee a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: The Spirit will show you what is true. The people of this world cannot accept the Spirit, because they don't see or know him. But you know the Spirit, who is with you and will keep on living in you.
translation_verse: Ʋ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa daga ma Wɩɩsɩ aa kɩɩ gɛɛ. Dʋnɩya nala bɩ sɩ wuwo laa ʋ we ba tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ba bee na ʋ, ba bɩ gyɩma ʋ mɛ. Amɛ ma kɛ gyɩma ʋ rɛ. Beewɩya ʋ we ma lee rɛ, a we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ a kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: I won't leave you like orphans. I will come back to you.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko mʋ, ŋ bɩ sɩ vɩya ma ta dɩ ma kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ busuluŋbiisi. Ŋ sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko ma lee.

english_verse: In a little while the people of this world won't be able to see me, but you will see me. And because I live, you will live.
translation_verse: Ʋ kaa mʋhʋ ka dʋnɩya nala bɩl bɩ sɩ na ŋ, amɛ ma kɛ sɩ na ŋ. Ŋ aa sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol wɩya, ma mɛ sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: Then you will know I am one with the Father. You will know you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ hʋ ŋ aa sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ a bɩl kaŋ mɩɩbol, haŋ kyɛɛ hʋ rɛ ma sɩ gyɩma nɩɩ ŋ beel-ma yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ anɩɩ ŋ bee ŋ kuwo aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: If you love me, you will do what I have said, and my Father will love you. I will also love you and show you what I am like.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa nɩɩ ŋ nyʋwa, a kɩ tɩŋa ŋ, ʋ tɩɩna rɛ kyo ŋ. Ŋ Kuwo mɛ yaŋ sɩ kyo nal hʋ aa kyo ŋ. Ŋ mɛ sɩ kyo tɩɩna a kaŋ ŋ tɩɩ daga ʋ.”

english_verse: The other Judas, not Judas Iscariot, then spoke up and asked, “Lord, what do you mean by saying that you will show us what you are like, but you will not show the people of this world?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyudasɩ baa “Ŋ Tɩɩna, ɛɛ rɛ ɩ sɩ yaa a kaŋ ɩ tɩɩ daga ma, aŋ bɩ sɩ kaŋ ɩ tɩɩ daga dʋnɩya nala.” .

english_verse: Jesus replied: If anyone loves me, they will obey me. Then my Father will love them, and we will come to them and live in them.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyo ŋ, ʋ sɩ kɩ tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa. Ŋ Kuwo mɛ sɩ kyo ʋ. Ŋ bee ŋ Kuwo buloŋ sɩ ko we ʋ tɩɩna lee.

english_verse: But anyone who doesn't love me, won't obey me. What they have heard me say doesn't really come from me, but from the Father who sent me.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ kyo ŋ, ʋ bee tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa. Wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa daga ma bɩ yaa ŋ tɩɩ wɩdagɩya. Amɛ ba lɩɩ ŋ kuwo aa tɩma ŋ lee rɛ.

english_verse: I have told you these things while I am still with you.
translation_verse: Ŋ ha aa we ma lee rɛ tɩŋ ŋ basɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma nyɛ.

english_verse: But the Holy Spirit will come and help you, because the Father will send the Spirit to take my place. The Spirit will teach you everything and will remind you of what I said while I was with you.
translation_verse: Amɛ kyɩkyagɩl hʋ ŋ Kuwo aa sɩ tɩma ŋ feŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ yaa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ. Ʋ sɩ kɩ pɛ ma tɩyaŋ a daga ma wɩɩ buloŋ, a leŋ dɩ ma kɩ liisi wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa basɩ tɩya ma.

english_verse: You have already heard me say I am going and I will also come back to you. If you really love me, you should be glad I am going back to the Father, because he is greater than I am.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ tɩya ma rɛ a baa, ‘Ŋ aa mʋʋ rɛ ka dɩ ŋ bɩl mɩɩgɩ ko ma lee.’ Dɩ mamaa rɛ fa kyo ŋ, ma tenni fa sɩ fɩyɛlɩ, ŋ aa mʋʋ ŋ kuwo lee nyɛ wɩya, beewɩya ʋ rɛ tee ŋ.

english_verse: I am telling you this before I leave, so when it does happen, you will have faith in me.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ wɩya no buloŋ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, ka dɩ ba na yaa. Dɩ ba aa rɛ ko kɩ yaa, ma sɩ laa di anɩɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa basɩ kɔnɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: I cannot speak with you much longer, because the ruler of this world is coming. But he has no power over me.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo basɩ wɩya ma lee pɩɩsɩ, beewɩya dʋnɩya kuwori hʋ aa ko rɛ. Amɛ ʋ bɩ kaŋ ŋ dee wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I obey my Father, so everyone in the world might know that I love him. It is time for us to go now.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ dʋnɩya nala gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ ŋ kyo ŋ Kuwo rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa baa dɩ ŋ yaa. Ma sii dɩ á lɩɩ daha tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: I am the true vine, and my Father is the gardener.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa tɩya hʋ tɩɩ. Ŋ Kuwo mɛ rɛ aa deŋ tɩya hʋ.

english_verse: He cuts away every branch of mine that doesn't produce fruit. But he trims clean every branch that does produce fruit, so that it will produce even more fruit.
translation_verse: Tɩya hʋ naaŋ buloŋ aa bee nɔnɔ, ʋ aa keri keri ta rɛ, a marɩ marɩ tɩya hʋ we, dɩ ʋ wuwo kɩ nɔnɔ yʋga.

english_verse: You are already clean because of what I have said to you.
translation_verse: Ma tɩsɩ kɛ bɩl bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ, akuu wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basɩ tɩya ma nyuniŋ.

english_verse: Stay joined to me, and I will stay joined to you. Just as a branch cannot produce fruit unless it stays joined to the vine, you cannot produce fruit unless you stay joined to me.
translation_verse: Ma mal ŋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ŋ mɛ mal ma tɩyaŋ. Tɩya naasɩ dʋŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔnɔ, see dɩ ba mal tɩya hʋ maŋkpaŋ tɩyaŋ. Ma mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa wɩɩ buloŋ, dɩ ma bɩ mal ŋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: I am the vine, and you are the branches. If you stay joined to me, and I stay joined to you, then you will produce lots of fruit. But you cannot do anything without me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa tɩya hʋ, mamaa mɛ rɛ yaa tɩya hʋ naasɩ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa mal ŋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ mɛ mal tɩɩna tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa wɩweliye weliŋ, beewɩya dɩ mamaa rɛ bɩ mal ŋ, ma bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa wɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: If you don't stay joined to me, you will be thrown away. You will be like dry branches that are gathered up and burned in a fire.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ bɩ mal ŋ tɩyaŋ, ba sɩ kpa tɩɩna yuwo ta anɩɩ ba aa keri tɩya naasɩ ta, ba hɩla, ba paa yuwo we diŋ tɩyaŋ ba di gɛɛ.

english_verse: Stay joined to me and let my teachings become part of you. Then you can pray for whatever you want, and your prayer will be answered.
translation_verse: Dɩ ma mal ŋ tɩyaŋ, a leŋ dɩ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basɩ tɩya ma we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ ma aa sʋla ŋ kɩ kyɛ, ŋ sɩ yaa tɩya ma.

english_verse: I have loved you, just as my Father has loved me. So remain faithful to my love for you.
translation_verse: Ŋ kyo ma rɛ anɩɩ ŋ Kuwo aa kyo ŋ gɛɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma mal ŋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ŋ kyo ma a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: If you obey me, I will keep loving you, just as my Father keeps loving me, because I have obeyed him.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa, ŋ sɩ kyo ma a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ, anɩɩ ŋ aa tɩŋ ŋ Kuwo nyʋwa, a mal ʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ kyo ŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Now I tell you to love each other, as I have loved you.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kpaa kɩ tɩya ma rɛ nyɛ: Ma kyo dɔmɔŋ anɩɩ ŋ aa kyo ma gɛɛ.

english_verse: The greatest way to show love for friends is to die for them.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ yaa siri dɩ ʋ kpa ʋ mɩɩbol yɔbɔ sʋʋ ʋ kyana wɩya, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ kyo ʋ rɛ a te wɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: Servants don't know what their master is doing, and so I don't speak to you as my servants. I speak to you as my friends, and I have told you everything my Father has told me.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩl bɩ kaŋ ma kɩ yɩrɩ ŋ tʋŋtʋnna, beewɩya tʋŋtʋnnɩ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ nɩhɩyawʋ aa yaa. Amɛ ŋ kaŋ ma kɩ yɩrɩ ŋ kyaŋsɩ rɛ, beewɩya wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ kuwo aa basɩ tɩya ŋ, ŋ mɛ basɩ ba tɩya ma rɛ.

english_verse: You did not choose me. I chose you and sent you out to produce fruit, the kind of fruit that will last. Then my Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Ma daa lɩɩ ŋ, mɩyaŋ nɛ lɩɩ ma. Ŋ lɩɩ ma rɛ dɩ ma mʋ a marɩ kɩ yaa wɩweliye, wɩweliye hʋ aa bɩ sɩ maakyiye nyʋgɩsɩ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, ŋ Kuwo sɩ tɩya ma kɩŋ buloŋ ma aa sʋla kɩ kyɛ ŋ feŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If the people of this world hate you, just remember that they hated me first.
translation_verse: Dɩ dʋnɩya nala rɛ haasɩ ma, ma gyɩma anɩɩ ba laa sɩya haasɩ ŋ nɛ.

english_verse: If you belonged to the world, its people would love you. But you don't belong to the world. I have chosen you to leave the world behind, and this is why its people hate you.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ fa yaa dʋnɩya nala, dʋnɩya nala fa sɩ kyo ma rɛ weliŋ anɩɩ ba aa kyo dɔmɔŋ gɛɛ. Amɛ ma bee dʋnɩya nala bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ. Ŋ lɩɩ ma dʋnɩya nala tɩyaŋ nɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba haasɩ ma.

english_verse: Remember how I told you that servants are not greater than their master. So if people mistreat me, they will mistreat you. If they do what I say, they will do what you say.
translation_verse: Ŋ laa sɩya basɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ yoŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo te ʋ tɩɩna. Ma liisi wɩɩ no na. Ba aa dɔgɩsɩ ŋ gɛɛ, gɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ma mɛ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ fa laa ŋ nyʋwa, ba fa sɩ laa ma mɛ nyʋwa.

english_verse: People will do to you exactly what they did to me. They will do it because you belong to me, and they don't know the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Ba sɩ yaa wɩya no buloŋ akuu ma aa tɩŋa ŋ hal wɩya. Ba bɩ gyɩŋ nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba kɩ yaa gɛɛ.

english_verse: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not be guilty of sin. But now they have no excuse for their sin.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ fa bɩ ko basɩ wɩya tɩya ba, ba aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ hʋ buloŋ, ŋ fa bɩ sɩ wuwo baa dɩ ba kyogi wɩɩ buloŋ. Amɛ ŋ foŋ aa ko basɩ wɩya tɩya ba wɩya, ba bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo baa dɩ ba fa bɩ gyɩma.

english_verse: Everyone who hates me also hates my Father.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa haasɩ ŋ, tɩɩna haasɩ ŋ Kuwo mɛ rɛ.

english_verse: I have done things no one else has ever done. If they had not seen me do these things, they would not be guilty. But they did see me do these things, and they still hate me and my Father too.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa yaa, nal buloŋ bɩ yaa ba. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ fa bɩ yaa ba dɩ ba na, ba fa bɩ sɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ. Amɛ ba naa ba buloŋ nɛ aŋ ha haasɩ ŋ bee ŋ Kuwo buloŋ.

english_verse: This is why the Scriptures are true when they say, “People hated me for no reason.”
translation_verse: Ba aa haasɩ ŋ gɛɛ, wɩya hʋ buloŋ ba aa saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ kɔnɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Nyɛ rɛ ba sabɩ, ‘Ŋ bɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ kyogi, ka ba haasɩ ŋ.’

english_verse: I will send you the Spirit who comes from the Father and shows what is true. The Spirit will help you and will tell you about me.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ lɩɩ ŋ Kuwo lee a ko tuu we ma tɩyaŋ. Ʋ sɩ pɛ ma tɩyaŋ a daga ma wɩtɩɩ hʋ. Ʋ rɛ sɩ marɩ basɩ ŋ wɩya tɩya ma.

english_verse: Then you will also tell others about me, because you have been with me from the beginning.
translation_verse: Ma mɛ sɩ basɩ ŋ wɩya tɩya nala, beewɩya ma we ŋ lee rɛ a lɩɩ saŋa hʋ ŋ aa piile kɩ daga nala buloŋ.

english_verse: I am telling you these things, so that you will not turn away.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ wɩya no buloŋ tɩya ma rɛ dɩ ma ta ko mɩɩgɩ hal ma laadii tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You will be chased out of the synagogues. And the time will come when people will kill you and think they are doing God a favor.
translation_verse: Ba sɩ kile ma ta Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Saŋa kɩdɩgɩ sɩ pele, dɩ nal lɛ ko kpʋ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ, ʋ tɩɩna aa bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ ʋ kɩ tɩŋa gɛɛ.

english_verse: They will do these things because they don't know either the Father or me.
translation_verse: Ba sɩ yaa ma wɩya no buloŋ, beewɩya ba bɩ gyɩma ŋ Kuwo, a bɩ gyɩma ŋ mɛ.

english_verse: I am saying this to you now, so that when the time comes, you will remember what I have said. The Work of the Holy Spirit I was with you at the first, and so I didn't tell you these things.
translation_verse: Ŋ laa sɩya basɩ wɩya no buloŋ nɛ a tɩya ma, dɩ saŋa hʋ rɛ ko pele dɩ wɩya no kɩ yaa, ma sɩ liisi anɩɩ ŋ gyɩ basɩ ba tɩya ma rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tʋma Ŋ gyɩ aa we ma lee rɛ tɩŋ ŋ bɩ basɩ wɩya no tɩya ma piili hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ ma aa ko yaa ŋ hatɩnna.

english_verse: But now I am going back to the Father who sent me, and none of you asks me where I am going.
translation_verse: Amɛ nyɛ kɛ, ŋ aa mʋ nal hʋ aa tɩma ŋ lee rɛ, aŋka ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ha bɩ pɩyɛsɩ ŋ anɩɩ lee rɛ ŋ kɩ mʋ?

english_verse: You are very sad from hearing all of this.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa basɩ wɩya no tɩya ma nyɛ, lagɩlagɩ no ma tɩsɩ kyogo rɛ kɩŋkaŋ.
