english_verse: But I tell you I am going to do what is best for you. This is why I am going away. The Holy Spirit cannot come to help you until I leave. But after I am gone, I will send the Spirit to you.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma. Akuu ma wɩya, ŋ aa mʋwa rɛ kpɩya. Beewɩya dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ bɩ mʋwa, kyɩkyagɩl hʋ bɩ sɩ ko ma lee. Amɛ dɩ ŋ ko mʋ ŋ sɩ ta ʋ dɩ ʋ ko ma lee.

english_verse: The Spirit will show them that they are wrong about sin, because they didn't have faith in me.
translation_verse: Ba bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔŋ, beewɩya ba bɩ laa ŋ wɩya di.

english_verse: They are wrong about God's justice, because I am going to the Father, and you won't see me again.
translation_verse: Ba bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ mɛ beewɩya ŋ mɩɩgɩ kɩ mʋ ŋ Kuwo lee rɛ, ma bɩl bɩ sɩ maakyiye na ŋ.

english_verse: And they are wrong about the judgment, because God has already judged the ruler of this world.
translation_verse: Ba bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ sarɩya hʋ kyɛdiilii mɛ wɩya beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ foŋ di dʋnɩya kuwori sarɩya rɛ ʋ tele.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but right now it would be more than you could understand.
translation_verse: Ŋ ha kaŋ wɩya yʋga rɛ ŋ aa sɩ basɩ tɩya ma, amɛ ma bɩ kaŋ bembii ma aa sɩ nɩɩ ba buloŋ.

english_verse: The Spirit shows what is true and will come and guide you into the full truth. The Spirit doesn't speak on his own. He will tell you only what he has heard from me, and he will let you know what is going to happen.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa daga ma gɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kɩya rɛ ko ko, ʋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ buloŋ aa we Wɩɩsɩ lee. Ʋ bɩ sɩ kɩ basɩ wɩya ʋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ, amɛ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa sɩ nɩɩ, ba aa rɛ ʋ sɩ basɩ. Ʋ mɛ sɩ daga ma wɩya hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ maakyiye yaa.

english_verse: The Spirit will bring glory to me by taking my message and telling it to you.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa kana dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma, ʋ sɩ kaŋ ko basɩ tɩya ma dɩ gɛɛ wuwo leŋ dɩ nala na ŋ gaŋdarɩ.

english_verse: Everything the Father has is mine. This is why I have said that the Spirit takes my message and tells it to you. Sorrow Will Turn into Joy
translation_verse: Kɩŋ hʋ buloŋ ŋ Kuwo a kana yaa ŋ kɩŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa kana dɩ ŋ basɩ, ŋ sɩ kpa tɩya Wiyesi Welii hʋ dɩ ʋ ko basɩ tɩya ma gɛɛ.” Tikyogi sɩ bɩrɩmɩ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “For a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Mʋhʋ sʋwaa, ma bɩl bɩ sɩ na ŋ, amɛ ʋ kyɛyɛ baŋmana hal, ma bɩl sɩ na ŋ.”

english_verse: They said to each other, “What does Jesus mean by saying that for a little while we won't see him, but after a while we will see him? What does he mean by saying he is going to the Father?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ badɔmɔŋ kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Wɩɩ no memii rɛ yaa bee? Ʋ basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ mʋhʋ sʋwaa á bɩ sɩ na ʋ amɛ dɩ ʋ kyɛyɛ baŋmana hal dɩ á bɩl sɩ na ʋ. Ʋ bɩl baa ʋ aa sɩ mʋ ʋ kuwo lee rɛ tɩŋ á bɩl bɩ sɩ na ʋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: What is this ‘little while’ that he is talking about? We don't know what he means.”
translation_verse: Ʋ aa baa kyɛyɛ baŋmana no, ʋ memii rɛ yaa bee? Á bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ no ʋ aa basɩ memii.”

english_verse: Jesus knew they had some questions, so he said: You are wondering what I meant when I said that for a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩma anɩɩ ba aa kyɛ dɩ ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ gyɩŋ wɩɩ no memii rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ aa baa dɩ mʋhʋ sʋwaa ma bɩ sɩ na ŋ, ka dɩ kyɛyɛ baŋmana hal dɩ ma bɩl na ŋ hʋ wɩya rɛ ma kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ nyɛ koo?

english_verse: I tell you for certain that you will cry and be sad, but the world will be happy. You will be sad, but later you will be happy.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ma sɩ wii gʋwagɩ sɩnɩɩl, amɛ dʋnɩya nala tenni kɛ sɩ fɩyɛlɩ. Ma tɩsɩ sɩ kyogi, amɛ ma tɩkyogi hʋ sɩ mɩɩgɩ bɩrɩmɩ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ.

english_verse: When a woman is about to give birth, she is in great pain. But after it is all over, she forgets the pain and is happy, because she has brought a child into the world.
translation_verse: Dɩ haaŋ halʋllɩ-luwol lɛ ko kɩ wɩɩ, ʋ tɩya aa kyogi rɛ, beewɩya ʋ gyɩma tʋwara puu ʋ rɛ. Amɛ dɩ ʋ rɛ ko lʋl biye hʋ teŋ, ʋ aa yeŋŋi ʋ tʋwara hʋ buloŋ nɛ, a kuu ʋ aa lʋla biifalɩɩ wɩya.

english_verse: You are now very sad. But later I will see you, and you will be so happy that no one will be able to change the way you feel.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ yaŋ kɩɩ ma tɩyaŋ mɛ. Nyɛ kɛ, ma tɩsɩ kyogo rɛ, amɛ ŋ bɩl sɩ na ma, a leŋ dɩ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ fɩyɛlɩɩ hʋ iriŋ nal buloŋ aa bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ lɩɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When that time comes, you won't have to ask me about anything. I tell you for certain the Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Dɩ kyɛɛ hʋ rɛ ko pele, ma bɩ sɩ pɩyɛsɩ ŋ kɩ kyɛ wɩɩ buloŋ. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ŋ Kuwo sɩ tɩya ma kɩŋ hʋ buloŋ ma aa sʋla ʋ kɩ kyɛ ŋ feŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You have not asked for anything in this way before, but now you must ask in my name. Then it will be given to you, so you will be completely happy.
translation_verse: Abee gyɩnaŋ, ma ha bɩ sʋla ʋ a kyɛ kɩŋ buloŋ ŋ feŋ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma yaŋ sʋla ʋ, ʋ sɩ kpa kɩŋ hʋ ma aa sʋla ʋ kɩ kyɛ tɩya ma dɩ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ a mʋ teŋ.

english_verse: I have used examples to explain to you what I have been talking about. But the time will come when I will speak to you plainly about the Father and will no longer use examples like these.
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ ŋ aa basɩ tɩya ma, namagɩsɩ rɛ ŋ kɩ maga. Amɛ saŋa kɩdɩgɩ sɩ pele, ŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ maga namagɩsɩ, ŋ sɩ basɩ ŋ kuwo wɩya polli tɩya ma.

english_verse: You will ask the Father in my name, and I won't have to ask him for you.
translation_verse: Dɩ haŋ kyɛɛ hʋ rɛ ko pele, ma sɩ sʋla ʋ kɩ kyɛ kɩna ŋ feŋ tɩyaŋ. Ŋ bɩ baa mɩyaŋ nɛ sɩ sʋla ʋ tɩya ma,

english_verse: God the Father loves you because you love me, and you believe I have come from him.
translation_verse: beewɩya ŋ Kuwo tɩɩ mɛ kyo ma rɛ. Ma kyo ŋ nɛ, a laa ŋ wɩya di anɩɩ ŋ lɩɩ ʋ lee rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ mɛ kyo ma gɛɛ.

english_verse: I came from the Father into the world, but I am leaving the world and returning to the Father.
translation_verse: Ŋ lɩɩ ŋ Kuwo lee rɛ a ko tuu dʋnɩya. Nyɛ kɛ, ŋ yaŋ sɩ lɩɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ a mɩɩgɩ mʋ ŋ Kuwo lee.”

english_verse: The disciples said, “Now you are speaking plainly to us! You are not using examples.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Nyɛ kɛ, ɩ kyaasɩ basɩ wɩya kɩ polli rɛ. Ɩ bɩl bee maga namagɩsɩ.

english_verse: At last we know that you understand everything, and we don't have any more questions. Now we believe you truly have come from God.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ, á gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ buloŋ aa we nihuwobiŋ hakɩla tɩyaŋ nɛ, ɛɛwɩya ɩ bɩl bɩ maga dɩ ɩ pɩyɛsɩ nal wɩɩ buloŋ. Nyɛ leŋ á gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ.”

english_verse: The time will come and is already here when all of you will be scattered. Each of you will go back home and leave me by myself. But the Father will be with me, and I won't be alone.
translation_verse: Saŋa kɩdɩgɩ sɩ pele, ʋ gba pele mɛ rɛ, dɩ ma buloŋ fá pɩsa mʋ ma dɩɩsɩ, aŋ ka ŋ dʋŋ. Amɛ ŋ bɩ sɩ yaa ŋ dʋŋ beewɩya ŋ Kuwo we ŋ lee rɛ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: I have told you this, so that you might have peace in your hearts because of me. While you are in the world, you will have to suffer. But cheer up! I have defeated the world.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, dɩ ŋ beel-ma yaa kɩdɩgɩ dɩ ma wuwo tɩŋ ŋ tɩyaŋ a na fɩyɛlʋʋ. Dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ ma sɩ na tʋwara. Amɛ ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ, beewɩya ŋ yuwo di dʋnɩya rɛ.”

english_verse: After Jesus had finished speaking to his disciples, he looked up toward heaven and prayed: Father, the time has come for you to bring glory to your Son, in order that he may bring glory to you.
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ wɩya no ko teŋ, ʋ wil deŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu aŋ baa, “Ŋ Kuwo, saŋa hʋ pele rɛ. Leŋ dɩ dʋnɩya nala na mɩyaŋ ɩ biye hʋ gaŋdarɩ dɩ ŋ mɛ leŋ dɩ ba na ɩ gaŋdarɩ.

english_verse: And you gave him power over all people, so he would give eternal life to everyone you give him.
translation_verse: Ɩ rɛ kpaa dʋnɩya nala wɩɩ buloŋ dee a we ŋ nosi tɩyaŋ, dɩ ŋ kpa mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii a tɩya nala hʋ ɩ aa leŋ ba yaa ŋ hatɩnna.

english_verse: Eternal life is to know you, the only true God, and to know Jesus Christ, the one you sent.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ dʋŋ nɛ kɔnɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ, aŋ pɛ gyɩŋ mɩyaŋ Yesu Krisita, laataal hʋ mɛ ɩ aa tɩma, ba aa rɛ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: I have brought glory to you here on earth by doing everything you gave me to do.
translation_verse: Ŋ daga ɩ gaŋdarɩ rɛ dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ daha, beewɩya tʋma hʋ ɩ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ, ŋ tʋŋ ba buloŋ teŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Now, Father, give me back the glory I had with you before the world was created.
translation_verse: Ŋ kuwo tɩya ŋ gaŋdarɩ ɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ lagɩlagɩ no. Gaŋdarɩ hʋ ŋ fa aa kana ɩ lee ka ɩ na marɩ dʋnɩya hʋ.

english_verse: You have given me some followers from this world, and I have shown them what you are like. They were yours, but you gave them to me, and they have obeyed you.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ ɩ aa lɩɩ tɩya ŋ dʋnɩya nala tɩyaŋ, ŋ leŋ ba gyɩma ɩ rɛ. Ba fa yaa ɩ nala rɛ, ka ɩ kpa ba tɩya ŋ. Ba laa ɩ wɩya di rɛ.

english_verse: They know that you gave me everything I have.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, lagɩlagɩ no, ba gyɩma anɩɩ kɩna hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa kana lɩɩ ɩ lee rɛ.

english_verse: I told my followers what you told me, and they accepted it. They know I came from you, and they believe you are the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Duwoso hʋ ɩ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ, ŋ basɩ tɩya ba rɛ. Ba laa di rɛ a gyɩma anɩɩ wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ŋ kɔnɩ lɩɩ ɩ lee rɛ. Ba laa di mɛ rɛ anɩɩ ɩ rɛ tɩma ŋ.

english_verse: I am praying for them, but not for those who belong to this world. My followers belong to you, and I am praying for them.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ ɩ aa lɩɩ tɩya ŋ dʋŋ wɩya rɛ ŋ kɩ sʋla ɩ, beewɩya ba aa rɛ yaa ɩ nala. Dʋnɩya nala buloŋ wɩya daa ŋ kɩ sʋla ɩ:

english_verse: All I have is yours, and all you have is mine, and they will bring glory to me.
translation_verse: Ɩ nala yaa ŋ nala rɛ, ŋ nala mɛ yaa ɩ nala. Ba tɩyaŋ nɛ ɩ tɩŋa a daga ŋ gaŋdarɩ.

english_verse: Holy Father, I am no longer in the world. I am coming to you, but my followers are still in the world. So keep them safe by the power of the name you have given me. Then they will be one with each other, just as you and I are one.
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no, ŋ aa ko ɩ lee rɛ, ŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ we dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, amɛ ba kɛ sɩ we dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Ŋ Kuwo, ɩ rɛ maga dɩ á kyʋwalɩ ɩ abee gyɩrɩma. Kɩ deŋ nala hʋ ɩ aa lɩɩ tɩya ŋ nyuu weliŋ abee ɩ dee hʋ ɩ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ a leŋ dɩ ba yaa kɩdɩgɩ, anɩɩ ŋ beel-ɩ aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: While I was with them, I kept them safe by the power you have given me. I guarded them, and not one of them was lost, except the one who had to be lost. This happened so that what the Scriptures say would come true.
translation_verse: Ŋ fa aa we ba lee, ŋ deŋ ba nyuu rɛ weliŋ abee dee hʋ ɩ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ. Ŋ fa sɩŋ pɔ ba rɛ a deŋ ba nyuu weliŋ. Ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ nyʋgɩsa ɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ, see nal hʋ aa maga dɩ ʋ nyʋgɩsɩ dʋŋ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ wɩya hʋ ba fa aa saba ɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ kɔnɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ.

english_verse: I am on my way to you. But I say these things while I am still in the world, so my followers will have the same complete joy that I do.
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no, ŋ aa ko ɩ lee rɛ. Amɛ ŋ ha aa we dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ nyɛ, ŋ basɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ba rɛ dɩ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa kana mɛ we ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I have told them your message. But the people of this world hate them, because they don't belong to this world, just as I don't.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ ɩ nyʋwa wɩya tɩya ba rɛ. Amɛ dʋnɩya nala ha haasɩ ba rɛ beewɩya ba bee dʋnɩya nala bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ anɩɩ ŋ bee dʋnɩya nala mɛ aa bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Father, I don't ask you to take my followers out of the world, but keep them safe from the evil one.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ baa dɩ ɩ lɩɩ ba dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, amɛ ŋ aa sʋla ɩ rɛ dɩ ɩ pɔ ba a lɩɩ ba Sɩtaanɩ nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: They don't belong to this world, and neither do I.
translation_verse: Ŋ bee dʋnɩya no nala bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba mɛ bee dʋnɩya no nala bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: I am sending them into the world, just as you sent me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hʋ ɩ aa yaŋ tɩma ŋ, ŋ ko dʋnɩya no, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ŋ mɛ tɩŋ ba dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I am not praying just for these followers. I am also praying for everyone else who will have faith because of what my followers will say about me.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ sʋla ɩ kɩ tɩya ba dʋŋ, amɛ ŋ sʋla ɩ kɩ tɩya nala hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ laa ŋ wɩya hʋ ba aa sɩ basɩ di mɛ rɛ.

english_verse: I want all of them to be one with each other, just as I am one with you and you are one with me. I also want them to be one with us. Then the people of this world will believe that you sent me.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩl aa sʋla ɩ rɛ dɩ ɩ leŋ ba buloŋ ko yaa kɩdɩgɩ. Ŋ kuwo, leŋ dɩ á beel-ba buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ anɩɩ ŋ beel-ɩ aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ gɛɛ. Leŋ dɩ ba yaa kɩdɩgɩ dɩ dʋnɩya nala laa di anɩɩ ɩ rɛ kɔnɩ tɩma ŋ.

english_verse: I have honored my followers in the same way you honored me, in order that they may be one with each other, just as we are one.
translation_verse: Gaŋdarɩ hʋ ɩ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ ŋ mɛ kpa tɩya ba. Ŋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ ba buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ anɩɩ ŋ beel-ɩ buloŋ aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: I am one with them, and you are one with me, so they may become completely one. Then this world's people will know that you sent me. They will know that you love my followers as much as you love me.
translation_verse: Ŋ we ba lee rɛ, ɩ mɛ we ŋ lee. Leŋ dɩ ba kɔnɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ dʋnɩya nala gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ rɛ kɔnɩ tɩma ŋ. Leŋ dɩ ba gyɩma anɩɩ ɛɛ hʋ ɩ aa kyo ŋ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ɩ kyo ba mɛ.

english_verse: Father, I want everyone you have given me to be with me, wherever I am. Then they will see the glory you have given me, because you loved me before the world was created.
translation_verse: Ŋ Kuwo, nala hʋ ɩ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ba mɛ we lee hʋ tɩyaŋ ŋ aa sɩ we rɛ, dɩ ba wuwo na ŋ gaŋdarɩ hʋ ɩ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ. Ɩ kpaa gaŋdarɩ no tɩya ŋ nɛ beewɩya ɩ kyo ŋ nɛ aŋ na marɩ dʋnɩya no.

english_verse: Good Father, the people of this world don't know you. But I know you, and my followers know that you sent me.
translation_verse: Ŋ kuwo, tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna, dʋnɩya nala bɩ gyɩma ɩ, amɛ ŋ kɛ gyɩma ɩ rɛ. Nala no mɛ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ ɩ rɛ tɩma ŋ.

english_verse: I told them what you are like, and I will tell them even more. Then the love you have for me will become part of them, and I will be one with them.
translation_verse: Ŋ leŋ ba gyɩma ɩ rɛ. Ŋ ha sɩ leŋ dɩ ba marɩ gyɩma ɩ dɩ gɛɛ leŋ ba kyo ba dɔŋtɩŋsɩ anɩɩ ɛɛ hʋ ɩ aa kyo ŋ, ka dɩ ŋ mɛ we ba lee.”

english_verse: One of the high priest's servants was there. He was a relative of the servant whose ear Peter had cut off, and he asked, “Didn't I see you in the garden with that man?”
translation_verse: Dɩ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ yoŋ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ gyɩ we doŋ. Ʋ gyɩ yaa nal hʋ dɩgɩŋ Piita gyɩ aa ŋmaŋ kyɔl hʋ lʋllɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ Piita a baa, “Na ŋ gyɩ naa ɩ bee Yesu no rɛ olivi tɩɩsɩ baga hʋ tɩyaŋ?”

english_verse: Jesus again asked, “Who are you looking for?” “We are looking for Jesus from Nazareth,” they answered.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Aŋnɛ rɛ ma kɩ kyɛ?” Ba baa, “Yesu aa lɩɩ Nazarɛti.”

english_verse: This time Jesus replied, “I have already told you that I am Jesus. If I am the one you are looking for, let these others go.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ŋ foŋ basɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ nyɛ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ kɛ rɛ ma kɩ kyɛ, ma leŋ dɩ ŋ hatɩnna no kɛ kɩ mʋ.”

english_verse: Simon Peter had brought along a sword. He pulled it out and struck at Malchus, the servant of the high priest, cutting off his right ear.
translation_verse: Dɩ Siimɔŋ Piita fa kol takoobii doŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ tʋʋrɩ, a ŋmaŋ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ kɩdɩgɩ yoŋ ba aa yɩrɩ Malku noduu dɩgɩŋ a kyɔl.

english_verse: The Roman officer and his men, together with the temple police, arrested Jesus and tied him up.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Roma laalyuwolo hʋ abee ba nɩhɩyawʋ abee Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ pʋpɔɔlɔ kaŋ Yesu, a vʋwa ʋ,

english_verse: Peter stayed outside near the gate. But the other disciple came back out and spoke to the girl at the gate. She let Peter go in,
translation_verse: Ka Piita kɛ sɩŋ paga hʋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnnɩ no mɩɩgɩ lɩɩ, a basɩ wɩya tɩya haŋtolibiye hʋ aa pɔɔ paga hʋ nyʋwa, aŋ kaŋ Piita ko gyʋʋ.

english_verse: but asked him, “Aren't you one of that man's followers?” “No, I am not!” Peter answered.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ haŋtolibiye hʋ aa sɩŋ pɔ paganyʋwa hʋ pɩyɛsɩ Piita a baa, “Ka ɩ yaa baal no hatɩnna hʋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ?” Ɛɛ rɛ Piita baa, “Aayɩ, ŋ bɩ yaa ba kɩdɩgɩ.”

english_verse: It was cold, and the servants and temple police had made a charcoal fire. They were warming themselves around it, when Peter went over and stood near the fire to warm himself. Jesus Is Questioned by the High Priest (Matthew
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ waal gyɩ we doŋ nɛ weliŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ dɩya hʋ tʋŋtʋnna abee Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ pʋpɔɔlɔ we diŋ a sɩŋ gol a kɩ wiyeni. Nyɛ rɛ Piita mɛ mʋ sɩŋ ba lee a kɩ wiyeni diŋ hʋ. Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ pɩyɛsɩ Yesu wɩya Matiwu

english_verse: The high priest questioned Jesus about his followers and his teaching.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ pɩyɛsɩ Yesu ʋ hatɩnna hʋ wɩya abee wɩya hʋ ʋ fa aa dagɩ.

english_verse: Why are you questioning me? Why don't you ask the people who heard me? They know what I have said.”
translation_verse: Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ɩ kɩ pɩyɛsɩ ŋ nyɛ? Pɩyɛsɩ nala hʋ aa nɩɩ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basa, dɩ ba daga ɩ. Beewɩya ba gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basa rɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus was still tied up, and Annas sent him to Caiaphas the high priest. Peter Again Denies that He Knows Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Anaasɩ ha leŋ Yesu vʋwa gɛɛ, ka ʋ leŋ ba kana ʋ mʋ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ Kayifasɩ lee. Piita bɩl tʋwa anɩɩ ʋ bɩ gyɩŋ Yesu Matiwu

english_verse: It was early in the morning when Jesus was taken from Caiaphas to the building where the Roman governor stayed. But the crowd waited outside. Any of them who had gone inside would have become unclean and would not be allowed to eat the Passover meal.
translation_verse: Ʋ kyɩkyʋwala pipi, ba sii kaŋ Yesu lɩɩ Kayifasɩ dɩya tɩyaŋ, a mʋ Pilato dɩya. Pilato rɛ fa laa Roma kuworibal hʋ naasɩ sɩŋ doŋ paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Gyuuma hʋ gyɩ bɩ gyʋʋ gyaŋwuwo hʋ. Beewɩya ba gyɩ bee kyɛ dɩ ba ko kyogi ba sɩna, ka dɩ ba wuwo di Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal kɩdiiliye hʋ.

english_verse: Pilate came out and asked, “What charges are you bringing against this man?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato ko lɩɩ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Wɩbee rɛ ma baa baal no yaa kyogi?”

english_verse: They answered, “He is a criminal! That's why we brought him to you.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Dɩ ʋ rɛ fa bɩ yaa wɩɩ kyogi, á fa bɩ sɩ kana ʋ ko ɩ lee.”

english_verse: Pilate then went back inside. He called Jesus over and asked, “Are you the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato mɩɩgɩ gyʋʋ dɩya, aŋ leŋ ba kaŋ Yesu ko ʋ sɩya ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ rɛ yaa Gyuuma kuwori hʋ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Are you asking this on your own or did someone tell you about me?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ tɩɩ rɛ basɩ wɩɩ no koo nal lɛ basɩ ŋ wɩya tɩya ɩ?”

english_verse: “You know I'm not a Jew!” Pilate said. “Your own people and the chief priests brought you to me. What have you done?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato bɩl baa, “Ŋ bɩ yaa Gyuu. Ɩ tɩɩ nala abee ma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ rɛ kana ɩ ko we ŋ nosi tɩyaŋ. Wɩbee rɛ ɩ yaa kyogi?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My kingdom doesn't belong to this world. If it did, my followers would have fought to keep me from being handed over to our leaders. No, my kingdom doesn't belong to this world.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ŋ koro tuwo dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ŋ koro rɛ fa we dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, ŋ nala fa sɩ yuwo laa ŋ, dɩ Gyuuma ta wuwo kana ŋ. Amɛ ŋ koro tuwo daha.”

english_verse: “So you are a king,” Pilate replied. “You are saying that I am a king,” Jesus told him. “I was born into this world to tell about the truth. And everyone who belongs to the truth knows my voice.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ yaŋ yaa kuwori rɛ koo?” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Ɩ tɩɩ rɛ basa. Wɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ wɩya rɛ ŋ kuu ko, ba lʋla ŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ rɛ ŋ ko dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya nala. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyɛ wɩtɩɩ no, ʋ tɩɩna aa gyegile nɩɩ ŋ nyʋwa rɛ.”

english_verse: Pilate asked Jesus, “What is truth?” Jesus Is Sentenced to Death (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ yaa bee?” Nala hʋ baa dɩ ba kpʋ Yesu Matiwu

english_verse: And since I usually set a prisoner free for you at Passover, would you like for me to set free the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Amɛ bɩna kɛ buloŋ, dɩ Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ rɛ ko pele, ŋ aa kuu ma wɩya rɛ aa lɩɩ nala hʋ ba aa kaŋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ nɩdɩgɩ a ta, anɩɩ ma lesiri aa daga gɛɛ. Ma aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ kpa Gyuuma kuwori hʋ rɛ ta koo?”

english_verse: They shouted, “No, not him! We want Barabbas.” Now Barabbas was a terrorist.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba nɔsɩ a baa, “Aayɩ, baal no kɛ daa! Lɩɩ Barabaasɩ ta tɩya ma. ”

english_verse: Pilate gave orders for Jesus to be beaten with a whip.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato leŋ ba kaŋ Yesu a vɩɩrɩ ʋ,

english_verse: The soldiers made a crown out of thorn branches and put it on Jesus. Then they put a purple robe on him.
translation_verse: ka laalyuwolo hʋ kpa sɔsɩ sʋwa nyupugi aa kɩɩ kuwori nyupugi, a kpa kyige ʋ, aŋ kpa gafɩyaŋdolii kɩdɩgɩ laalɩ ʋ,

english_verse: They came up to him and said, “Hey, you king of the Jews!” They also hit him with their fists.
translation_verse: aŋ aa villi mʋ kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ a baa, “Gyuuma kuwori, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tɩya ɩ mɩɩbodolii!” Aŋ aa ŋmaa ʋ kyaŋkpaŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Once again Pilate went out. This time he said, “I will have Jesus brought out to you again. Then you can see for yourselves that I have not found him guilty.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato bɩl mɩɩgɩ lɩɩ gyamaa hʋ lee a basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma deŋ na, ŋ sɩ kana ʋ ko lɩɩ ma lee dɩ ma gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ kɛ bɩ naa wɩɩ buloŋ baal no aa yaa a maga dɩ ŋ kpa kyogisi tɩya ʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus came out, wearing the crown of thorns and the purple robe. Pilate said, “Here is the man!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba kaŋ Yesu ko lɩɩ dɩ ʋ ha kyige sɔsɩ nyupugi hʋ abee gafɩyaŋdolii hʋ ba aa kpaa laalɩ ʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Baal hʋ rɛ nyɛ.”

english_verse: When the chief priests and the temple police saw him, they yelled, “Nail him to a cross! Nail him to a cross!” Pilate told them, “You take him and nail him to a cross! I don't find him guilty of anything.”
translation_verse: Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ pʋpɔɔlɔ aa naa ʋ, ba kyɩɩrɩ yʋga a baa, “Ma kpaasɩ ʋ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ.” Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma tɩɩ kana ʋ mʋ kpaasɩ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Ŋ kɛ bɩ naa wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa yaa a maga dɩ ŋ kpa kyogisi tɩya ʋ.”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “He claimed to be the Son of God! Our law says that he must be put to death.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma hʋ bɩl baa, “Ʋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ kɩ yɩrɩ Wɩɩsɩ Biye rɛ. Á mɩrɩsɩ daga anɩɩ nal hʋ buloŋ ko yaa gɛɛ, ʋ tɩɩna maga dɩ ba kpʋ ʋ rɛ.”

english_verse: He went back inside and asked Jesus, “Where are you from?” But Jesus did not answer.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl mɩɩgɩ gyʋʋ dɩya hʋ a pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Lee rɛ ɩ lɩɩ?” Amɛ Yesu bɩ laa wɩɩ buloŋ basɩ.

english_verse: “Why won't you answer my question?” Pilate asked. “Don't you know I have the power to let you go free or to nail you to a cross?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ɩ bee tɔgɩmɩ ŋ? Ɩ bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ kaŋ dee rɛ ŋ aa sɩ wuwo kpa ɩ ta, a bɩl kaŋ dee mɛ ŋ aa sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ba kpaasɩ ɩ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ koo?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If God had not given you the power, you couldn't do anything at all to me. But the one who handed me over to you did something even worse.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ɩ fa bɩ sɩ kana ŋ dee dɩ Wɩɩsɩ fa bɩ tɩya ɩ gɛɛ dee. Amɛ nala hʋ aa kana ŋ ko we ɩ nosi tɩyaŋ wɩbɔŋ nɛ yʋga a te wɩbɔŋ buloŋ.”

english_verse: Then Pilate wanted to set Jesus free. But the crowd again yelled, “If you set this man free, you are no friend of the Emperor! Anyone who claims to be a king is an enemy of the Emperor.”
translation_verse: Pilato aa nɩɩ gɛɛ, ʋ fa kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ kpa Yesu ta. Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma hʋ bɩl kyɩɩrɩ yʋga a baa, “Dɩ ɩ rɛ ko kpa ʋ ta, ɩ bɩl bɩ yaa á paalʋʋ kuworibal Siiza kyana. Beewɩya nal hʋ buloŋ aa kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ kɩ yɩrɩ kuwori, ʋ tɩɩna yaa kuworibal hʋ dɔŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he brought Jesus out. Then he sat down on the judge's bench at the place known as “The Stone Pavement.” In Aramaic this pavement is called “Gabbatha.”
translation_verse: Pilato aa nɩɩ gɛɛ, ʋ kaŋ Yesu ko lɩɩ, aŋ mʋ hɔŋ ʋ sarɩdi-kpasa nyuu tɩyaŋ. Bʋwa rɛ ba fa kpa marɩ kuwori kpasa hʋ lɩsɩnɩɩ a kaŋ doŋ kɩ yɩrɩ Gabata Hiiburu taal tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: It was about noon on the day before Passover, and Pilate said to the crowd, “Look at your king!”
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ wɩɩsɩ gyɩ maga nyutʋtʋʋ rɛ. Kyɛɛ no rɛ Gyuuma aa yaa siri, a sii ʋ sɩgballɩya, ba di Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma kuwori hʋ rɛ nyɛ.”

english_verse: Then Pilate handed Jesus over to be nailed to a cross. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato kpa Yesu tɩya ba dɩ ba kaŋ mʋ kpaasɩ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Ba kpaasɩ Yesu mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ Matiwu

english_verse: The soldiers first broke the legs of the other two men who were nailed there.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ laalyuwol hʋ mʋ ŋmaa baala hʋ ba aa kpaasa a pɛ Yesu tɩyaŋ naasɩ bori.

english_verse: So the chief priests went to Pilate and said, “Why did you write that he is King of the Jews? You should have written, ‘He claimed to be King of the Jews.’ ”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ basɩ tɩya Pilato anɩɩ ʋ ta saba a baa dɩ Gyuuma kuwori rɛ nyɛ, amɛ dɩ ʋ sabɩ a baa dɩ baal no rɛ baa dɩ ʋ rɛ yaa Gyuuma kuwori.

english_verse: When Jesus saw his mother and his favorite disciple with her, he said to his mother, “This man is now your son.”
translation_verse: Yesu aa naa ʋ naa abee ʋ hatɩnnɩ hʋ wɩya ʋ fa aa kyo kɩŋkaŋ dɩ ba sɩna, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ naa a baa, “Ŋ naa, ɩ biibaal lɛ nyɛ.”

english_verse: There Jesus was nailed to the cross, and on each side of him a man was also nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba kpaasɩ Yesu mal daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ba fa kpaasɩ nala balɩya mɛ rɛ daagarɩya balɩya nyuni tɩyaŋ a pɛ Yesu tɩyaŋ. Kɩdɩgɩ we ʋ noduu dɩɩlaŋ, kɩdɩgɩ mɛ we ʋ nogɔbɔ dɩɩlaŋ.

english_verse: Pilate ordered the charge against Jesus to be written on a board and put above the cross. It read, “Jesus of Nazareth, King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato leŋ ba sabɩ mal Yesu daagarɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ a baa, “Yesu aa lɩɩ Nazarɛti, Gyuuma kuwori hʋ.”

english_verse: The words were written in Hebrew, Latin, and Greek. The place where Jesus was taken wasn't far from the city, and many of the people read the charge against him.
translation_verse: Gyuuma gyɩ yʋga a karɩmɩ wɩɩ no beewɩya lee hʋ ba gyɩ aa kpaasɩ Yesu mal daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ gyɩ kpaga Gyerusalɛm nɛ. Pilato gyɩ leŋ ba sabɩ wɩɩ no Hiiburu abee Laatɩn abee Giriki taanɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: But Pilate told them, “What is written will not be changed!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pilato baa, “Wɩɩ hʋ ŋ foŋ aa saba, ŋ bɩl bɩ kaŋ kɩ bɩrɩmɩ.”

english_verse: The soldiers said to each other, “Let's not rip it apart. We will gamble to see who gets it.” This happened so the Scriptures would come true, which say, “They divided up my clothes and gambled for my garments.” The soldiers then did what they had decided.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ laalyuwolo hʋ basɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Ma ta leŋ dɩ á kaŋ gal hʋ kɩyɛsɩ, ma leŋ dɩ á yuwo gbaŋŋa, a na nal hʋ aa sɩ di ʋ.” Ba yaa wɩɩ no dɩ wɩya hʋ ba fa aa saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ba fa saba abaa, “Ba paa ŋ gannɩ kpaa dɔmɔŋ nɛ aŋ kuu ŋ gadolii hʋ wɩya a yuwo gbaŋŋa.” Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ laalyuwolo hʋ mɛ kɔnɩ yaa.

english_verse: Jesus' mother stood beside his cross with her sister and Mary the wife of Clopas. Mary Magdalene was standing there too.
translation_verse: Yesu nɩɩna, abee Yesu ʋ naa nɩɩna toluu abee Kulopasi haaŋ Mɛɛrɩ, abee Mɛɛrɩ Magidalina fa sɩŋ kpaga Yesu daagarɩɩ hʋ rɛ.

english_verse: But when they came to Jesus, they saw he was already dead, and they did not break his legs.
translation_verse: Ba aa ko Yesu lee dɩ ʋ sʋba. Ɛɛ wɩya ba gyɩ bɩ bori ʋ naasɩ kɛ.

english_verse: In the place where Jesus had been nailed to a cross, there was a garden with a tomb that had never been used.
translation_verse: Dipolo kɩdɩgɩ rɛ fa we lee hʋ tɩyaŋ ba gyɩ aa kpaasɩ Yesu mal daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Dipolo hʋ tɩyaŋ, bʋbʋwa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ fa we doŋ, ba ha bɩ maakyiye hogo nal buloŋ doŋ.

english_verse: Jesus knew that he had now finished his work. And in order to make the Scriptures come true, he said, “I am thirsty!”
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ gyɩma anɩɩ nyɛ kɛ ʋ tʋŋ tʋma hʋ ʋ kuwo aa kpaa tɩya ʋ teŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ baa “Nɩɩnyʋwasɩ kana ŋ nɛ.” Nyɛ leŋ wɩya hʋ ba aa sabɩ biŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: A jar of cheap wine was there. Someone then soaked a sponge with the wine and held it up to Jesus' mouth on the stem of a hyssop plant.
translation_verse: Dɩ sɩkyaakyaa mɛ gyɩ suu gbaha a sɩŋ doŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba kpa gbara a sɩna sɩŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ, a kpa kaakelii lɩɩ gbara hʋ a kaŋ gyɩŋ dige ʋ nyʋʋpine.

english_verse: kilograms of spices made from myrrh and aloes. This was the same Nicodemus who had visited Jesus one night.
translation_verse: Yesu aa lamɩsɩ sɩŋ hʋ ko teŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ baa, “Wɩɩ buloŋ tene rɛ!” Aŋ kaŋ ʋ nyuu kyugili a sʋba.

english_verse: The next day would be both a Sabbath and the Passover. It was a special day for the Jewish people, and they did not want the bodies to stay on the crosses during this day. So they asked Pilate to break the men's legs and take their bodies down.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ no dɩ Gyuuma hʋ mɛ aa yaa ba siri, beewɩya ʋ sɩgballɩya rɛ sɩ yaa Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ. Kyɛwiyesii hʋ mɛ kyɛɛ rɛ gɛɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba gyɩ bee kyɛ dɩ nala hʋ saga daagarɩya hʋ nyuu haŋ kyɛbal hʋ. Nyɛ rɛ ba mʋ sʋla Pilato dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ laalyuwolo hʋ mʋ bori ba naasɩ aŋ lallɩ ba tuu daagarɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: One of the soldiers stuck his spear into Jesus' side, and blood and water came out.
translation_verse: Amɛ laalyuwol hʋ kɩdɩgɩ kpa ʋ tiŋ a kyɔgɔ Yesu logiŋ luri. Ɛɛ rɛ kyal abee nɩɩ gyaa lɩɩ gyaasɩ.

english_verse: All this happened so that the Scriptures would come true, which say, “No bone of his body will be broken”
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ yaa rɛ dɩ wɩya hʋ ba aa saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ. Ba saba a baa, “Ba bɩ sɩ bori ʋ hogidɩgɩ mɛ.”

english_verse: and “They will see the one in whose side they stuck a spear.” Jesus Is Buried (Matthew
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ, ba bɩl basa rɛ anɩɩ nala sɩ deŋ nal hʋ logiŋ ba aa kyɔgɔ. Ba hogo Yesu Matiwu

english_verse: The tomb was nearby, and since it was the time to prepare for the Sabbath, they were in a hurry to put Jesus' body there.
translation_verse: Akuu ʋ sɩgballɩya aa sɩ yaa Gyuuma kyɛwiyesii hʋ kyɛɛ wɩya, ka bʋbʋwa no mɛ gyɩ aa kpaga doŋ wɩya, ba gyɩ kpa Yesu hogo ʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Joseph from Arimathea was one of Jesus' disciples. He had kept it secret though, because he was afraid of the Jewish leaders. But now he asked Pilate to let him have Jesus' body. Pilate gave him permission, and Joseph took it down from the cross.
translation_verse: Baal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ gyɩ we doŋ ba kɩ yɩrɩ Gyosɛfʋ, a lɩɩ Arimatiya. Ʋ fa yaa Yesu hatɩnna kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Amɛ ʋ fa kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ faŋa rɛ Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ wɩya. Yesu aa ko sʋba, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ mʋ sʋla Pilato dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ʋ mʋ kpa Yesu. Nyɛ rɛ Pilato tɩya ʋ ŋmanɩɩ ʋ mʋ kpa ʋ.

english_verse: The two men wrapped the body in a linen cloth, together with the spices, which was how the Jewish people buried their dead.
translation_verse: Ba balɩya rɛ gyɩ mʋʋ kpa Yesu teŋbii, a kpa kɩna hʋ ʋ aa mara tɩsɩ ʋ aŋ kpa gapʋlʋŋ, a bɔ tɔ ʋ, anɩɩ Gyuuma sʋʋnɩ hogii lesiri aa daga gɛɛ.

english_verse: Thomas replied, “You are my Lord and my God!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Tɔmaasɩ baa, “Ɩ rɛ yaa ŋ tɩɩna abee ŋ Wɩɩsɩ.”

english_verse: On Sunday morning while it was still dark, Mary Magdalene went to the tomb and saw that the stone had been rolled away from the entrance.
translation_verse: Alahadi kyɛɛ sɩgballɩnyʋwa pipi, Mɛɛrɩ Magidalina sii foŋ mʋ bʋwa hʋ lee. Ʋ mʋwa dɩ dabʋyɩ hʋ ba aa kpaa tɔ bʋwa hʋ suro.

english_verse: The disciple who got there first then went into the tomb, and when he saw it, he believed.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nal hʋ aa laa sɩya mʋ bʋwa hʋ lee mɛ mʋ gyʋʋ bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ a na wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa, a laa di anɩɩ Yesu kɔnɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Although Thomas the Twin was one of the twelve disciples, he wasn't with the others when Jesus appeared to them.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Yesu aa kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ ko daga ʋ hatɩnna hʋ, dɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Tɔmaasɩ kɛ fa tuwo. Ʋ feŋ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ rɛ fa yaa Daalɩyanɩ.

english_verse: and saw two angels inside. They were dressed in white and were sitting where Jesus' body had been. One was at the head and the other was at the foot.
translation_verse: dɩ ʋ naa malɩkasɩ balɩya bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ba laalɩ gapʋllɩ a hɔŋ lee hʋ Yesu fa aa pɩna. Kɩdɩgɩ hɔŋ Yesu nyuu fa aa mʋʋ lee hʋ rɛ, ka kɩdɩgɩ mɛ hɔŋ ʋ naasɩ fa aa mʋʋ lee hʋ.

english_verse: She ran to Simon Peter and to Jesus' favorite disciple and said, “They have taken the Lord from the tomb! We don't know where they have put him.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ʋ mɩɩgɩ fá mʋ Siimɔŋ Piita abee Yesu hatɩnnɩ hʋ Yesu fa aa kyo kɩŋkaŋ hʋ lee, a basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ba lɩɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ka á bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ba aa kpaa ʋ biŋ.”

english_verse: Peter and the other disciple started for the tomb.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita bee Yesu hatɩnnɩ-kyoolii hʋ gyɩ sii fá kɩ mʋ bʋwa hʋ lee.

english_verse: They ran side by side, until the other disciple ran faster than Peter and got there first.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ kɩdɩgɩ hʋ tɩɩna fá kaŋ Piita ta, aŋ laa sɩya fá mʋ pele bʋwa hʋ lee.

english_verse: He bent over and saw the strips of linen cloth lying inside the tomb, but he did not go in.
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ gyɩ bɩ gyʋʋ bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ gyɩ tuu luŋ nɛ a deŋ na dɩ Yesu liŋe hʋ dʋŋ pɩŋ bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When Simon Peter got there, he went into the tomb and saw the strips of cloth.
translation_verse: Amɛ Piita kɛ aa tɩŋ hal ko, ʋ bɩl bɩ gyegile aŋ mʋ gyʋʋ bʋwa hʋ a na dɩ Yesu liŋe hʋ dʋŋ pɩna.

english_verse: He also saw the piece of cloth that had been used to cover Jesus' face. It was rolled up and in a place by itself.
translation_verse: Ka gal hʋ ba fa aa kpaa vʋwa Yesu nyuu mɛ kulo pɩŋ ʋ dʋŋ.

english_verse: Mary Magdalene stood crying outside the tomb. She was still weeping, when she stooped down
translation_verse: Ka Mɛɛrɩ Magidalina ha sɩŋ bʋwa hʋ logiŋ a kɩ wii. Ʋ aa wii gɛɛ rɛ aŋ tuu luŋ dɩ ʋ deŋ bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: The angels asked Mary, “Why are you crying?” She answered, “They have taken away my Lord's body! I don't know where they have put him.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Haŋtolibiye, bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ kɩ wii?” Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ baa, “Ba kpaa ŋ Tɩɩna bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ka ŋ bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ba aa kpaa ʋ mʋ biŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus asked her, “Why are you crying? Who are you looking for?” She thought he was the gardener and said, “Sir, if you have taken his body away, please tell me, so I can go and get him.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu mɛ pɩyɛsɩ Mɛɛrɩ a baa, “Haŋtolibiye, bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ kɩ wii? Kɩbee rɛ ɩ kɩ kyɛ?” Mɛɛrɩ fa bɩɩna anɩɩ baal hʋ aa deŋ dipolo hʋ rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Nɩhɩyawʋ, dɩ ɩ rɛ kpa ʋ, daga ŋ lee hʋ ɩ aa kana ʋ mʋ biŋ, dɩ ŋ mʋ kpa ʋ.”

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Don't hold on to me! I have not yet gone to the Father. But tell my disciples I am going to the one who is my Father and my God, as well as your Father and your God.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ta dige ŋ, beewɩya ŋ ha bɩ mʋʋ ŋ Kuwo lee. Amɛ mʋ basɩ tɩya ŋ hatɩnna hʋ anɩɩ ŋ mɩɩgɩ kɩ gyɩŋ ŋ Kuwo lee rɛ. Ʋ rɛ yaa ŋ beel-ma buloŋ Kuwo a yaa ŋ beel-ma buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ.”

english_verse: and showed them his hands and his side. When the disciples saw the Lord, they became very happy.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ ko teŋ, ʋ kaŋ ʋ nosi abee ʋ logiŋ daga ba dɩ ba na fʋfʋʋnɩ hʋ. Ʋ hatɩnna hʋ buloŋ tenni gyɩ fɩyɛla rɛ weliŋ ba aa naa Tɩɩna hʋ nyuniŋ.

english_verse: The disciples were afraid of the Jewish leaders, and on the evening of that same Sunday they locked themselves in a room. Suddenly, Jesus appeared in the middle of the group. He greeted them
translation_verse: Haŋ Alahadi hʋ kyɛɛ dɩdaana, ʋ hatɩnna hʋ gyɩ laŋŋa dɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ aŋ kaŋ dimbee hʋ lara, beewɩya ba gyɩ aa fá Gyuuma nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu ko sɩŋ ba tʋtʋʋ aŋ baa, “Fɩyɛlʋʋ we ma lee.”

english_verse: After Jesus had greeted them again, he said, “I am sending you, just as the Father has sent me.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Fɩyɛlʋʋ we ma lee.” Ŋ Kuwo aa tɩma ŋ gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ŋ mɛ kɩ tɩŋ ma.

english_verse: If you forgive anyone's sins, they will be forgiven. But if you don't forgive their sins, they will not be forgiven.” Jesus and Thomas
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko kpa nal wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ʋ, Wɩɩsɩ mɛ sɩ kpa ʋ tɩɩna wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ʋ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko bɩ kpaa nal wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ʋ, Wɩɩsɩ mɛ bɩ sɩ kpa ʋ tɩɩna wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ʋ.” Yesu kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ ko daga Tɔmaasɩ

english_verse: So they told him, “We have seen the Lord!” But Thomas said, “First, I must see the nail scars in his hands and touch them with my finger. I must put my hand where the spear went into his side. I won't believe unless I do this!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ hatɩnnɩ-kaalɩya hʋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Á naa á Tɩɩna rɛ.” Ɛɛ rɛ Tɔmaasɩ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “See dɩ ŋ na habibʋʋsɩ hʋ ʋ nosi tɩyaŋ, a kpa ŋ nonii dige doŋ fʋfʋʋnɩ, a kpa ŋ nonii tʋʋ ʋ logiŋ bʋwa hʋ mɛ tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ ŋ na laa ma wɩɩ hʋ di.”

english_verse: A week later the disciples were together again. This time, Thomas was with them. Jesus came in while the doors were still locked and stood in the middle of the group. He greeted his disciples
translation_verse: Ʋ kyɛyɛ kyori hal tɩyaŋ, Yesu hatɩnna hʋ bɩl gyʋʋ dɩya a kaŋ dimbee hʋ lara. Saŋa no tɩyaŋ kɛ dɩ Tɔmaasɩ mɛ we ba tɩyaŋ. Ba ko yaa dɩ ba deŋ dɩ Yesu sɩŋ ba tʋtʋʋ aŋ baa, “Fɩyɛlʋʋ we ma lee.”

english_verse: and said to Thomas, “Put your finger here and look at my hands! Put your hand into my side. Stop doubting and have faith!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ basɩ tɩya Tɔmaasɩ a baa, “Kpa ɩ nonii a tʋʋ ŋ noŋ bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ aŋ deŋ ŋ nosi na, aŋ kpa ɩ nonii tʋʋ ŋ logiŋ bʋwa hʋ mɛ tɩyaŋ a na. Laa di, ta kɩ yaa sige.”

english_verse: Jesus said, “Thomas, do you have faith because you have seen me? The people who have faith in me without seeing me are the ones who are really blessed!” Why John Wrote His Book
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ʋ baa, “Ɩ aa naa ŋ nɛ tɩŋ ɩ laa di nyɛ koo? Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa bɩ naa ŋ, aŋ laa ŋ wɩya di.”

english_verse: Jesus worked many other miracles for his disciples, and not all of them are written in this book.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ yaa wɩmagɩla yʋga rɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ wɩya no buloŋ daa ŋ sabɩ we teŋ no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But these are written so that you will put your faith in Jesus as the Messiah and the Son of God. If you have faith in him, you will have true life.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ sabɩ wɩya no rɛ dɩ ma wuwo laa di anɩɩ Yesu rɛ yaa Krisita hʋ, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, a yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye mɛ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ laa ʋ wɩya di, ma sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: Jesus later appeared to his disciples along the shore of Lake Tiberias.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu gyɩ bɩl kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ ko daga ʋ hatɩnna badɔmɔŋ fuwo kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Tibeeriya nyʋwa tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Simon Peter, Thomas the Twin, Nathanael from Cana in Galilee, and the brothers James and John, were there, together with two other disciples.
translation_verse: Siimɔŋ Piita abee Tɔmaasɩ, nal hʋ ba fa aa yɩrɩ Daalɩyanɩ, abee Nataniyɛl fa aa lɩɩ Keena aa we Galili paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ, abee Zebedi biisi hʋ, abee Yesu hatɩnna hʋ balɩya buloŋ nɛ gyɩ laŋŋa ka wɩɩ no yaa.

english_verse: Early the next morning Jesus stood on the shore, but the disciples did not realize who he was.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩnyʋwa, Yesu ko sɩŋ nɩɩ hʋ nyʋwa, amɛ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ gyɩ bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ rɛ.

english_verse: Jesus shouted, “Friends, have you caught anything?” “No!” they answered.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ŋ kyaŋsɩ, ma ha bɩ kaŋ fuwonamɩya buloŋ?” Ba baa dɩ aayɩ.

english_verse: So he told them, “Let your net down on the right side of your boat, and you will catch some fish.” They did, and the net was so full of fish that they could not drag it up into the boat.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma yuwo ma gyoŋ hʋ we nɩɩduworiboro hʋ noduu logiŋ dɩɩlaŋ, ma sɩ kasɩ fuwonamɩɩsɩ.” Ɛɛ rɛ ba yuwo gyoŋ hʋ a kasɩ fuwonamɩɩsɩ su. Ʋ aa suwo gɛɛ, ba bɩ wuwo dɩ ba gba tarɩ gyoŋ hʋ gyɩŋ.

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple told Peter, “It's the Lord!” When Simon heard it was the Lord, he put on the clothes he had taken off while he was working. Then he jumped into the water.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu hatɩnnɩ hʋ ʋ fa aa kyo kɩŋkaŋ hʋ basɩ tɩya Piita a baa, “Á Tɩɩna rɛ basɩ wɩya kɩ ma gɛɛ.” Saŋa no tɩyaŋ dɩ Piita fa wuri ʋ gal lɛ. Ʋ aa nɩɩ gɛɛ, ʋ kpa ʋ gal hʋ laalɩ, aŋ lɩɩ nɩɩduworiboro hʋ tɩyaŋ, a gyaa tuu nɩɩ hʋ dɩ ʋ duwori mʋ Yesu lee.

english_verse: When the disciples got out of the boat, they saw some bread and a charcoal fire with fish on it.
translation_verse: Ba aa ko lɩɩ nɩɩ hʋ nyʋwa, ba na diŋ dɩ fuwonamɩɩsɩ kyɛbɛ ka ba na paanʋʋ mɛ.

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “Bring some of the fish you just caught.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma lɩɩ fuwonamɩɩsɩ hʋ badɔmɔŋ ma aa kasa lagɩlagɩ no hʋ a kaŋ ko.”

english_verse: Jesus said, “Come and eat!” But none of the disciples dared ask who he was. They knew he was the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Ma ko bɩllɩ nyʋwa.” Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ, ʋ hatɩnna hʋ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ gyɩ bɩ wuwo dɩ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ baa “Aŋnɛ rɛ yaa ɩ.” Beewɩya ba buloŋ gyɩma anɩɩ Tɩɩna hʋ rɛ.

english_verse: Jesus took the bread in his hands and gave some of it to his disciples. He did the same with the fish.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu kaŋ paanʋʋ hʋ kpaa tɩya ba, a kpaa fuwonamɩɩsɩ hʋ mɛ tɩya ba.

english_verse: This was the third time Jesus appeared to his disciples after he was raised from death. Jesus and Peter
translation_verse: Ʋ aa sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ bʋto rɛ yaŋ nyɛ ʋ aa kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ ko daga ʋ hatɩnna. Yesu basɩ wɩya tɩya Piita

english_verse: When Jesus and his disciples had finished eating, he asked, “Simon son of John, do you love me more than the others do?” Simon Peter answered, “Yes, Lord, you know I do!” “Then feed my lambs,” Jesus said.
translation_verse: Ba aa dii kɩna hʋ ko teŋ, ɛɛ rɛ Yesu pɩyɛsɩ Siimɔŋ Piita a baa, “Gyɔɔŋ biibaal Siimɔŋ, ɩ kyo ŋ a te gɛɛ ɩ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ no aa kyo ŋ nɛ?” Ɛɛ rɛ Piita baa, “Waa, ŋ Tɩɩna, ɩ tɩɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ kyo ɩ rɛ.” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Kɩ deŋ ŋ hatɩnna nyuu anɩɩ pedaal aa kɩ deŋ ʋ piyese nyuu gɛɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus asked a second time, “Simon son of John, do you love me?” Peter answered, “Yes, Lord, you know I love you!” “Then take care of my sheep,” Jesus told him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Gyɔɔŋ biibaal Siimɔŋ, ɩ kɔnɩ kyo ŋ nɛ?” Ɛɛ rɛ Piita bɩl baa, “Waa, ŋ Tɩɩna, ɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ kyo ɩ rɛ.” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Kɩ deŋ ŋ hatɩnna nyuu anɩɩ pedaal aa kɩ deŋ ʋ piyese nyuu gɛɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus asked a third time, “Simon son of John, do you love me?” Peter was hurt because Jesus had asked him three times if he loved him. So he told Jesus, “Lord, you know everything. You know I love you.” Jesus replied, “Feed my sheep.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl pɩyɛsɩ Piita bʋto tɩɩna a baa, “Gyɔɔŋ biibaal Siimɔŋ, ɩ kyo ŋ nɛ?” Yesu aa pɩyɛsɩ ʋ bʋto gɛɛ, Piita tɩya buloŋ kyogi, ʋ basɩ tɩya Yesu a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, ɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ buloŋ nɛ. Ɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ kyo ɩ rɛ.” Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Kɩ deŋ ŋ hatɩnna nyuu anɩɩ pedaal aa kɩ deŋ ʋ piyese nyuu gɛɛ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that when you were a young man, you dressed yourself and went wherever you wanted to go. But when you are old, you will hold out your hands. Then others will wrap your belt around you and lead you where you don't want to go.”
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ɩ, ɩ fa aa yaa bapʋwasɩɩ, ɩ aa sii nyʋgɩlɩ ɩ tɩɩ rɛ, a kɩ mʋ lee hʋ buloŋ ɩ aa kyɛ. Amɛ dɩ ɩ rɛ ko hɩyasɩ, ɩ sɩ kaŋ ɩ nosi gye, aŋka dɩ ba vʋwa ɩ, a kana ɩ mʋ lee hʋ ɩ aa bee kyɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this to tell how Peter would die and bring honor to God. Then he said to Peter, “Follow me!” Jesus and His Favorite Disciple
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ wɩɩ no daga gɛɛ hʋ Piita aa sɩ sʋba rɛ, a leŋ dɩ nala tɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ a na Wɩɩsɩ gaŋdarɩ aa maga gɛɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ka Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Kɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal.”

english_verse: Peter turned and saw Jesus' favorite disciple following them. He was the same one who had sat next to Jesus at the meal and had asked, “Lord, who is going to betray you?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita galdaasɩ hal, a na dɩ Yesu hatɩnnɩ hʋ Yesu fa aa kyo kɩŋkaŋ hʋ dɩ ʋ aa tɩŋ ba hal. Ʋ rɛ yaa nal no tɩɩna gyɩ aa hɔŋ kpala Yesu saŋa hʋ ba gyɩ aa di kɩdiiliye hʋ, a gyɩ pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, aŋnɛ rɛ sɩ kpa ɩ yallɩ?”

english_verse: When Peter saw this disciple, he asked Jesus, “Lord, what about him?”
translation_verse: Piita aa naa ʋ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ pɩyɛsɩ Yesu a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna, ka baal no mɛ, bee rɛ sɩ yaa ʋ mɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “What is it to you, if I want him to live until I return? You must follow me.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ we doŋ a mʋ pele saŋa hʋ ŋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko dʋnɩya mɛ, ɩ wɩbee rɛ we doŋ? Ɩ kɛ kɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal.”

english_verse: So the rumor spread among the other disciples that this disciple would not die. But Jesus did not say he would not die. He simply said, “What is it to you, if I want him to live until I return?”
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ nyɛ wɩya, ʋ hatɩnna buloŋ gyɩ aa basɩ rɛ anɩɩ ʋ hatɩnnɩ no kɛ bɩ sɩ sʋba. Amɛ Yesu gyɩ bɩ baa dɩ ʋ bɩ sɩ sʋba. Wɩɩ hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa basa rɛ nyɛ: “Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ aa kyɛ dɩ baal no we doŋ a mʋ pele saŋa hʋ ŋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko dʋnɩya mɛ, Piita, ɩ wɩɩ tuwo.”

english_verse: This disciple is the one who told all of this. He wrote it, and we know he is telling the truth.
translation_verse: Hatɩnnɩ no rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa basɩ wɩya no, a bɩl sabɩ ba biŋ teŋ tɩyaŋ mɛ. Á gyɩma anɩɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa basa yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Jesus did many other things. If they were all written in books, I don't suppose there would be room enough in the whole world for all the books.
translation_verse: Yesu yaa wɩya badɔmɔŋ mɛ rɛ yʋga a pɛ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa saba we teŋ no tɩyaŋ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ fa sabɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ kɩŋ kɩŋ a biŋ tenni tɩyaŋ, ŋ bɩ tama tenni hʋ fa sɩ na lee a pɩŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: until he was taken up to heaven. But before he was taken up, he gave orders to the apostles he had chosen with the help of the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: a mʋ pele kyɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa ʋ gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩbee. Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, ʋ gyɩ daga ʋ kpambɩsɩ hʋ ʋ aa lɩya tʋma hʋ ba aa sɩ kɩ tʋma rɛ, aŋ na mʋ wɩɩsɩbee.

english_verse: While he was still with them, he said: Don't leave Jerusalem yet. Wait here for the Father to give you the Holy Spirit, just as I told you he has promised to do.
translation_verse: Yesu ha gyɩ aa we ʋ hatɩnna hʋ lee, ʋ gyɩ basɩ tɩya ba rɛ abee sɩfɩyasɩ a baa, “Ma ta ko kɩ lɩɩ Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ. Ma gyegili bɔnyɛ kɩŋ hʋ ŋ Kuwo aa wee nyʋwa a baa dɩ ʋ sɩ tɩya ma. Ŋ laa sɩya basɩ ʋ wɩya tɩya ma rɛ.

english_verse: John baptized with water, but in a few days you will be baptized with the Holy Spirit. Jesus Is Taken to Heaven
translation_verse: Gyɔɔŋ, Wɩɩsɩnɩɩfool hʋ kɛ, nɩɩ rɛ ʋ gyɩ kaŋ kɩ fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ. Amɛ ʋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ, ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ fo ma wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ.” Yesu gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩbee Maakɩ

english_verse: While the apostles were still with Jesus, they asked him, “Lord, are you now going to give Israel its own king again?”
translation_verse: Yesu bee ʋ kpambɩsɩ hʋ aa laŋŋa gɛɛ rɛ, ba pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Á Tɩɩna, lagɩlagɩ no kɛ, ɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ Iziral tɩmma bɩl di ba paalʋʋ koro koo?”

english_verse: But the Holy Spirit will come upon you and give you power. Then you will tell everyone about me in Jerusalem, in all Judea, in Samaria, and everywhere in the world.”
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ ko kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ma tɩyaŋ, ma sɩ kaŋ dee a yaa ŋ daŋsɩya diile a basɩ ŋ wɩya Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ, abee Gyudɩya paalʋʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ abee Samaarɩya paalʋʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ kɩ mʋ dʋnɩya logiŋ kɛ buloŋ.”

english_verse: After Jesus had said this and while they were watching, he was taken up into a cloud. They could not see him,
translation_verse: Yesu aa basɩ gɛɛ ko teŋ, Wɩɩsɩ kpa ʋ kaŋ gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩbee, ka ʋ kpambɩsɩ hʋ sɩŋ wil nyuni kɩ deŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu. Nyɛ rɛ taal ko tɔ ʋ, ba bɩl bɩ na ʋ.

english_verse: They said, “Why are you men from Galilee standing here and looking up into the sky? Jesus has been taken to heaven. But he will come back in the same way you have seen him go.” Someone To Take the Place of Judas
translation_verse: a pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Galili tɩmma, bee rɛ tɩŋ ma sɩŋ kɩ deŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu nyɛ? Ɛɛ hʋ ma aa yaŋ na Wɩɩsɩ kpaa Yesu a kaŋ kɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩbee ma sɩɩ tɩyaŋ nyɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ sɩ bɩl mɩɩgɩ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu.” Ba lɩɩ nal dɩ ʋ laa Gyudasɩ nyuu Matiwu

english_verse: The Mount of Olives was about a kilometer from Jerusalem. The apostles who had gone there were Peter, John, James, Andrew, Philip, Thomas, Bartholomew, Matthew, James the son of Alphaeus, Simon, known as the Eager One, and Judas the son of James. After the apostles returned to the city, they went upstairs to the room where they had been staying.
translation_verse: Ba ko pele Gyerusalɛm, a kpa mʋ ba dɩɩgyʋʋlɩɩ gyirambisa nyuu dɩya kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ. Ba nala hʋ gyɩ aa laŋŋa kɩ gyʋʋ doŋ nɛ nyɛ: Piita, Gyɔɔŋ, Gyemsi, Aŋduru, Fɩlɩpɩ, Tɔmaasɩ, Batolomi, Matiwu, Alfiyasɩ biibaal Gyemsi, Siimɔŋ, nal hʋ aa kyɩl ʋ nala wɩya, abee Gyemsi biibaal Gyudasɩ.

english_verse: The apostles often met together and prayed with a single purpose in mind. The women and Mary the mother of Jesus would meet with them, and so would his brothers.
translation_verse: Ba bee haana badɔmɔŋ abee Yesu nɩɩna Mɛɛrɩ abee Yesu nɩmmabalɩya buloŋ nɛ gyɩ yaa nyʋʋdɩgɩ aa kɩ laŋŋɩ doŋ saŋa buloŋ, a kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ abee sɩfɩyasɩ.

english_verse: Then Judas bought some land with the money he was given for doing that evil thing. He fell headfirst into the field. His body burst open, and all his insides came out.
translation_verse: (Gyudasɩ gyɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ nɛ, a na molbiye doŋ a kpa yɔbɔ taŋha kɩdɩgɩ. Haŋ taŋha hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tele pɔsɔ, ʋ nabolimo buloŋ lɩɩ gyaasɩ.

english_verse: When the people of Jerusalem found out about this, they called the place Akeldama, which in the local language means “Field of Blood.”
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa we Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ buloŋ nɛ gyɩ nɩɩ ʋ wɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba kaŋ lee hʋ kɩ yɩrɩ Akɛldama, ba taal tɩyaŋ. Ʋ memii rɛ yaa taŋha hʋ tɩyaŋ kyal aa gyaasa.)

english_verse: In the book of Psalms it says, “Leave his house empty, and don't let anyone live there.” It also says, “Let someone else have his job.”
translation_verse: “Deviti saba we Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Yɩɩla tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, ‘Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ dɩya pɩŋ gyikpiye, dɩ nal buloŋ ta kɩ gyʋʋ.’ Aŋ bɩl sabɩ abaa, ‘Amɛ ʋ tʋma kɛ, see dɩ nal laa ʋ nyuu a kɩ tʋma.’

english_verse: Two men were suggested: One of them was Joseph Barsabbas, known as Justus, and the other was Matthias.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba daga nala balɩya. Ba kɩdɩgɩ feŋ nɛ yaa Gyosɛfʋ Basabaasɩ. Kɩdɩgɩ hʋ mɛ feŋ nɛ fa yaa Matɩyasɩ.

english_verse: They drew names, and Matthias was chosen to join the group of the eleven apostles.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba yuwo gbaŋŋa, Matɩyasɩ di, ba lɩɩ ʋ pɛ Yesu kpambɩsɩ fi abee kɩdɩgɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Suddenly there was a noise from heaven like the sound of a mighty wind! It filled the house where they were meeting.
translation_verse: Ba ko baa dɩ ba deŋ, dɩ dɔmɔ kɩdɩgɩ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu, a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ puwobal lɛ aa dɔŋ. Dɔmɔ hʋ ko gyʋʋ tɔ dɩya hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit took control of everyone, and they began speaking whatever languages the Spirit let them speak.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ diŋtʋlnɩ hʋ gyɩ aa saga, Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ kpaa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ba tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ gyɩ leŋ ba piili kɩ basɩ wɩya abee taanɩ ba aa bɩ gyɩma.

english_verse: Many religious Jews from every country in the world were living in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Gyuuma badɔmɔŋ mɛ fa we Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ, a yaa wɩɩkyʋwalla aa lɩɩ dʋnɩya logiŋ kɛ buloŋ.

english_verse: And when they heard this noise, a crowd gathered. But they were surprised, because they were hearing everything in their own languages.
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa no buloŋ gyɩ aa nɩɩ kyagɩŋsɩ hʋ, ba buloŋ ko kyige doŋ. Ba aa kyige gɛɛ, ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ gyɩ nɩɩ Yesu Krisita hatɩnna wɩbasɩɩ hʋ rɛ ʋ tɩɩ taal tɩyaŋ. Ʋ gyɩ yaa ba wɩkperii.

english_verse: Crete, and Arabia. Some of us were born Jews, and others of us have chosen to be Jews. Yet we all hear them using our own languages to tell the wonderful things God has done.
translation_verse: Á badɔmɔŋ lɩɩ Kiriti rɛ, á badɔmɔŋ mɛ lɩɩ Areebɩya. Á kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ mɛ yaŋ bee ʋ taal lɛ, ka á nɩɩ dɩ ba aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩduwoni hʋ ʋ aa yaa á tɩɩ taanɩ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Everyone was excited and confused. Some of them even kept asking each other, “What does all this mean?”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ wɩɩ hʋ ha kperi ba, ba hakɩllɩ buloŋ vʋgɩmɩ, ba kɩ pɩyɛsɩ dɔmɔŋ a baa, “Wɩya no buloŋ memii rɛ yaa bee?”

english_verse: Others made fun of the Lord's followers and said, “They are drunk.” Peter Speaks to the Crowd
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka nala hʋ badɔmɔŋ mɛ kɩ yaa Yesu hatɩnna hʋ sɩya a baa dɩ ba nyʋwa sɩŋ bugo rɛ. Piita basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya tɩya gyamaa hʋ

english_verse: Peter stood with the eleven apostles and spoke in a loud and clear voice to the crowd: Friends and everyone else living in Jerusalem, listen carefully to what I have to say!
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Yesu kpambɩsɩ hʋ sii sɩŋ, ka Piita heeli basɩ tɩya gyamaa hʋ a baa, “Ŋ kuwobalɩya Gyuuma abee nala hʋ buloŋ aa we Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ, ma wuwoli ma dɩgɩna, dɩ ŋ basɩ wɩya no aa yaa memii tɩya ma.

english_verse: You are wrong to think that these people are drunk. After all, it is only nine o'clock in the morning.
translation_verse: Ma aa bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ nala no bugo rɛ? Amɛ, ma yaŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ba bɩ bugo. Beewɩya, ʋ ha yaa kyɩkyʋwala kerifi nibi rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ nal sɩ yaa bugo?

english_verse: But this is what God told the prophet Joel to say,
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Gyowɛl gyɩ basa wɩya no aa yaa wɩya rɛ anɩɩ nyɛ sɩ maakyiye yaa. Ʋ basa anɩɩ,

english_verse: “When the last days come, I will give my Spirit to everyone. Your sons and daughters will prophesy. Your young men will see visions, and your old men will have dreams.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ baa, ‘Dɩ dʋnɩya rɛ ko kpaga tenii, nyɛ rɛ ŋ sɩ yaa. Ŋ sɩ kpa ŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we nala iriŋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ma biibaala abee ma toliye sɩ basɩ wɩya ŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ. Ma bapʋwasɩya abee ma banɩhɩyasɩ buloŋ mɛ sɩ kɩ na Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ ba duwoso tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: In those days I will give my Spirit to my servants, both men and women, and they will prophesy.
translation_verse: Haŋ saŋa hʋ, ŋ sɩ kpa ŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩya baala abee haana hʋ aa tɩŋa ŋ kyɛrɩ, dɩ ba buloŋ kɩ basɩ wɩya ŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: “I will work miracles in the sky above and wonders on the earth below. There will be blood and fire and clouds of smoke.
translation_verse: Ŋ sɩ kɩ yaa wɩkperiye Wɩɩsɩnyuu tɩyaŋ, aŋ kɩ yaa wɩmagɩla mɛ dʋnɩya abee taŋhanyuu tɩyaŋ daha. Kyal, diŋ, abee nyʋwɔsɩ sɩ we doŋ.

english_verse: The sun will turn dark, and the moon will be as red as blood before the great and wonderful day of the Lord appears.
translation_verse: Sɩgballɩya sɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ tebine. Ka dɩ pene mɛ fɩyɛsɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kyal. Wɩya no buloŋ sɩ yaa rɛ, ka dɩ á Tɩɩna Kyɛbal hʋ yaŋ na pele.

english_verse: Then the Lord will save everyone who asks for his help.”
translation_verse: Haŋ kyɛɛ hʋ, nal hʋ buloŋ aa yɩrɩ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ sɩ laa ʋ ta.’

english_verse: God had already planned and decided that Jesus would be handed over to you. So you took him and had evil men put him to death on a cross.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ gyɩmaa mɛ we doŋ, ka ba kaŋ Yesu Krisita we ma nosi tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ma kpa ʋ tɩya wɩbɔŋyaala, ba kpaasɩ ʋ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ʋ sʋba.

english_verse: But God set him free from death and raised him to life. Death could not hold him in its power.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ kyisi ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a lɩɩ tʋwara hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa naa ʋ sʋʋ saŋa ta. Beewɩya sʋʋ bɩ kaŋ dee ʋ aa sɩ wuwo kana ʋ biŋ dɩ ʋ ta siye.’

english_verse: What David said are really the words of Jesus, “I always see the Lord near me, and I will not be afraid with him at my right side.
translation_verse: Deviti fa basɩ ʋ wɩya rɛ a baa, ‘Ŋ gyɩ naa ŋ Tɩɩna rɛ dɩ ʋ laa ŋ sɩya, aŋ we ŋ lee saŋa buloŋ, dɩ nal buloŋ ta wuwo yaa ŋ wɩbɔŋ.

english_verse: The Lord won't leave me in the grave. I am his holy one, and he won't let my body decay.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko sʋba, ɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa vɩya ŋ ta lalɩyabee tɩyaŋ. Ɩ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa leŋ dɩ ɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ pɩŋ bʋwa tɩyaŋ a pʋwa.

english_verse: He has shown me the path to life, and he makes me glad by being near me.”
translation_verse: Ɩ daga ŋ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa sɩ tɩŋa a kaŋ mɩɩbol lɛ. Ɩ aa we ŋ lee mɛ rɛ yaŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ŋ kaŋ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ.’

english_verse: My friends, it is right for me to speak to you about our ancestor David. He died and was buried, and his tomb is still here.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Piita bɩl basɩ baa, Ŋ kuwobalɩya, ŋ sɩ basɩ á naabaa Deviti wɩya a kaŋ polli tɩya ma. Deviti sʋba rɛ, ba kpa ʋ hogo, ʋ bil ha pɩŋ á bee tɩyaŋ daha a kaŋ kɩ ko gyɩnaŋ.

english_verse: But David was a prophet, and he knew that God had made a promise he would not break. He had told David someone from his own family would someday be king.
translation_verse: Ʋ fa yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ, a gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa dɩ ʋ sɩ yaa tɩya ʋ. Wɩɩsɩ wee nyʋwa rɛ anɩɩ ʋ sɩ leŋ dɩ Deviti doho nal dɩ koro a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ Deviti fa aa kɩya.

english_verse: David knew this would happen, and so he told us Christ would be raised to life. He said God would not leave him in the grave or let his body decay.
translation_verse: Deviti fa aa naa wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ fa aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ yaa, ʋ wuwo basɩ Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ mɩɩgɩ siiyi wɩya rɛ a baa, ‘Wɩɩsɩ bɩ laa nyʋwa vɩya ʋ ta lalɩyabee tɩyaŋ. Ʋ bɩ laa nyʋwa leŋ ʋ teŋbii pɩŋ bʋwa tɩyaŋ a pʋwa.’

english_verse: All of us can tell you that God has raised Jesus to life!
translation_verse: Yesu no tɩɩ rɛ yaŋ Wɩɩsɩ kyisi sʋʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Á buloŋ nɛ yaa wɩɩ no daŋsɩya beewɩya á naa wɩya no buloŋ aa yaa rɛ.

english_verse: Jesus was taken up to sit at the right side of God, and he was given the Holy Spirit, just as the Father had promised. Jesus is also the one who has given the Spirit to us, and this is what you are now seeing and hearing.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kyisi ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ sii gyɩŋ hɔŋ ʋ kuwo Wɩɩsɩ noduu logiŋ tɩyaŋ, ka ʋ kpa Wiyesi Welii hʋ wɩya ʋ fa aa wee nyʋwa a tɩya ʋ. Wiyesi Welii no rɛ Yesu kpa we á tɩyaŋ gyɩnaŋ, ʋ rɛ yaa wɩya hʋ ma aa na abee wɩya hʋ ma aa nɩɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: David didn't go up to heaven. So he wasn't talking about himself when he said, “The Lord told my Lord to sit at his right side,
translation_verse: Deviti tɩɩ fa bɩ gyɩŋ mʋ Wɩɩsɩbee anɩɩ Yesu aa mʋwa gɛɛ, amɛ Yesu wɩya rɛ ʋ fa basɩ a baa, ‘Á Tɩɩna basɩ tɩya ŋ Tɩɩna rɛ, a baa Ko hɔŋ ŋ noduu logiŋ tɩyaŋ,’

english_verse: until he made my Lord's enemies into a footstool for him.”
translation_verse: Ka dɩ ŋ yuwo di ɩ dɔmɔ buloŋ teŋ.

english_verse: Everyone in Israel should then know for certain that God has made Jesus both Lord and Christ, even though you put him to death on a cross.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, Iziral tɩmma, ma buloŋ yaŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ anɩɩ Yesu no ma aa kaŋ kpaasɩ mal daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ʋ yaa á Tɩɩna. Ʋ rɛ bɩl yaa nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya dɩ ʋ laa dʋnɩya nala ta.”

english_verse: Peter said to them, “Turn to God and be baptized, every one of you, in the name of Jesus Christ for the forgiveness of your sins, and you will receive the gift of the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Piita basɩ tɩya ba a baa, ‘Ma bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ, aŋ leŋ dɩ ba fo ma wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ Yesu Krisita feŋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpa ma wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ma, aŋ kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ma tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Peter told them many other things as well. Then he said, “I beg you to save yourselves from what will happen to all these evil people.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, Piita bɩl basɩ wɩya rɛ kɩŋkaŋ a kpaanɩ ba abee sɩfɩyasɩ, aŋ ha sʋl ba a baa, “Ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩma nɩbɔmɔ no tɩyaŋ, dɩ tʋwara hʋ aa sɩ ko ba nyuu tɩyaŋ ta ko daagɩ ma.”

english_verse: Everyone was amazed by the many miracles and wonders that the apostles worked.
translation_verse: Yesu kpambɩsɩ hʋ gyɩ aa yaa wɩmagɩla abee wɩkperiye rɛ yʋga, ʋ gyɩ yaa nal buloŋ nyʋʋfɩyɛlɩ.

english_verse: They would sell their property and possessions and give the money to whoever was in need.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba ko yallɩ ba kɩna mɛ, ba aa kaŋ molbiye hʋ kpaa dɔmɔŋ nɛ, a maga gɛɛ hʋ nal buloŋ aa kyɛɛ.

english_verse: The time of prayer was about three o'clock in the afternoon, and Peter and John were going into the temple.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ, Piita bee Gyɔɔŋ gyɩ sii mʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ kyʋwalɩɩ saŋa. Saŋa no gyɩ yaa nɩɩ wɩɩhaa kerifi boto rɛ.

english_verse: A man who had been born lame was being carried to the temple door. Each day he was placed beside this door, known as the Beautiful Gate. He sat there and begged from the people who were going in.
translation_verse: Ba aa mʋ dɩ baal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ we doŋ. Ʋ naa paalɩ kɩ lʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ gbarɩga rɛ. Kyɛɛ kɛ buloŋ ʋ nala aa kpa ʋ mʋ holli Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ paganyʋwa hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Pagɩwelii hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ gyɩ aa hɔŋ, a kɩ sʋla kɩna nala hʋ aa gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ lee.

english_verse: The man saw Peter and John entering the temple, and he asked them for money.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ aa naa Piita bee Gyɔɔŋ dɩ ba aa ko dɩ ba gyʋʋ wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ, ʋ sʋla kɩna ba lee.

english_verse: But they looked straight at him and said, “Look up at us!”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba kɩ deŋ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, aŋka Piita basɩ tɩya ʋ dɩ ʋ mɛ kɩ deŋ ba.

english_verse: The man stared at them and thought he was going to get something.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kɩ deŋ ba aŋ kɩ yɩyɛlɩ anɩɩ ba sɩ tɩya ʋ kɩŋ.

english_verse: But Peter said, “I don't have any silver or gold! But I will give you what I do have. In the name of Jesus Christ from Nazareth, get up and start walking.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Piita mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ, “Ŋ bɩ kaŋ molbii buloŋ ŋ aa sɩ tɩya ɩ, amɛ kɩŋ hʋ ŋ aa kana, ʋ rɛ ŋ sɩ kpa tɩya ɩ. Yesu Krisita aa lɩɩ Nazarɛti feŋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ baa ‘Sii kɩ vala.”’

english_verse: Peter then took him by the right hand and helped him up. At once the man's feet and ankles became strong,
translation_verse: Ʋ aa basɩ gɛɛ rɛ, ʋ kana ʋ noduu noŋ tɩyaŋ, a kana ʋ tarɩ sii sɩŋ. Ʋ naasɩ buloŋ pirigi tannɩ, a deye deye.

english_verse: and he jumped up and started walking. He went with Peter and John into the temple, walking and jumping and praising God.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ʋ sii gyaa kyigisi ʋ naasɩ tɩyaŋ, a kɩ vala. Ɛɛ rɛ ba buloŋ kpa gyʋʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ. Ka baal hʋ vala aŋ sii kɩ gyaa, a kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Everyone saw him walking around and praising God.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ na ʋ, dɩ ʋ aa val aŋ kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: They knew he was the beggar who had been lying beside the Beautiful Gate, and they were completely surprised. They could not imagine what had happened to the man. Peter Speaks in the Temple
translation_verse: Ba aa na ʋ, ba wuwo gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ ʋ rɛ fa aa hɔŋ Pagɩwelii hʋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ kɩ sʋla kɩna gɛɛ. Nyɛ rɛ ba buloŋ hirigi, beewɩya ba kɛ lee, wɩkperii rɛ ba na gɛɛ. Piita basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ

english_verse: While the man kept holding on to Peter and John, the whole crowd ran to them in amazement at the place known as Solomon's Porch.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Piita bee Gyɔɔŋ abee baal hʋ buloŋ sii mʋ gyʋʋ gyambarɩŋ kɩdɩgɩ ba kɩ yɩrɩ Solomɔn Gyambarɩŋ. Nala hʋ aa naa baal hʋ dɩ ʋ aa tɩŋ Piita bee Gyɔɔŋ hal gɛɛ, ba sii giri fá mʋ dɩ ba na ʋ, beewɩya wɩkperii rɛ ba kɛ na gɛɛ.

english_verse: Peter saw that a crowd had gathered, and he said: Friends, why are you surprised at what has happened? Why are you staring at us? Do you think we have some power of our own? Do you think we were able to make this man walk because we are so religious?
translation_verse: Piita aa naa nala hʋ aa yaa gɛɛ rɛ, ʋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Ŋ kuwobalɩya Iziral tɩmma, bee rɛ tɩŋ wɩɩ no yaa wɩkperii ma lee, haalɩ, ma paalɩ kuwoni ma sɩyasɩ we á tɩyaŋ nyɛ? Ma ta ko liisi anɩɩ á tɩɩ dee koo á wɩweliye yayɩ rɛ tɩŋ baal no sii kɩ vala nyɛ.

english_verse: The God that Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, and our other ancestors worshiped has brought honor to his Servant Jesus. He is the one you betrayed. You turned against him when he was being tried by Pilate, even though Pilate wanted to set him free.
translation_verse: Abɩraham abee Azɩkɩ abee Gyeekɔbɩ abee á naabaala Wɩɩsɩ hʋ rɛ kpaa feŋbal a tɩya ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ Yesu. Nal hʋ ma aa kaŋ tɩya ba di ʋ sarɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ ka ma bɩl tʋwa Pilato, sarɩdiil hʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, anɩɩ ma bɩ gyɩma ʋ. Haalɩ, Pilato fa kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ kpa ʋ ta, ka ma bɩ laa nyʋwa dɩ ʋ ta ʋ.

english_verse: You rejected Jesus, who was holy and good. You asked for a murderer to be set free,
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Tɩpʋlʋŋ Tɩɩna, nal hʋ aa yaa wɩweliye hʋ, ʋ rɛ ma vɩya, aŋ sʋla dɩ ba kpa Barabaasɩ, nal hʋ aa kpʋ nala, a ta.

english_verse: and you killed the one who leads people to life. But God raised him from death, and all of us can tell you what he has done.
translation_verse: Aŋ leŋ ba kpʋ nal hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Amɛ á dii daŋsɩya rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kyisi baal no rɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You see this man, and you know him. He put his faith in the name of Jesus and was made strong. Faith in Jesus made this man completely well while everyone was watching.
translation_verse: Baal no ma aa naa dɩ ʋ deye nyɛ, haŋ Yesu hʋ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ. Á laa ʋ dee hʋ wɩya di rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ wɩɩ no wuwo yaa nyɛ. Á aa laa ʋ wɩya di hʋ rɛ tɩŋ baal no wuwo na laaŋfɩya ma buloŋ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ nyɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I am sure you and your leaders didn't know what you were doing.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma bee ma nɩhɩyasɩ gyɩ aa bɩ gyɩma rɛ tɩŋ ma kpʋ Yesu Krisita gɛɛ.

english_verse: But God had his prophets tell that his Messiah would suffer, and now he has kept this promise.
translation_verse: Faafaa buloŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ʋ tɩŋdaala basɩ anɩɩ nal hʋ ʋ aa lɩya dɩ ʋ ko laa dʋnɩya nala ta sɩ na tʋwara. Ɛɛ mɛ kɔnɩ yaŋ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: So turn to God! Give up your sins, and you will be forgiven.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ aŋ kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ, dɩ ʋ kpa ma wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ma, a leŋ dɩ ma bembiye fɩyɛlɩ.

english_verse: Then the time will come when the Lord will give you fresh strength. He will send you Jesus, his chosen Messiah.
translation_verse: Ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɩl tɩŋ Krisita hʋ, nal hʋ ʋ aa lɩya dɩ ʋ ko ma lee. Ʋ rɛ yaa Yesu.

english_verse: Moses said, “The Lord your God will choose one of your own people to be a prophet, just as he chose me. Listen to everything he tells you.
translation_verse: Moosi mɛ fa yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala no kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Ʋ gyɩ basɩ baa, ‘Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tɩŋ ʋ tɩŋdaal kɩdɩgɩ dɩ ʋ ko ma lee anɩɩ ʋ aa tɩma ŋ gɛɛ. Ʋ sɩ yaa ma nɩɩnabiye tɩɩ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko ko, ma laa ʋ nyʋwa wɩbasɩya buloŋ di, aŋ tɩŋa ʋ.

english_verse: No one who disobeys this prophet will be one of God's people any longer.”
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ ko bɩ tɩŋ ʋ nyʋwa, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ lɩɩ ʋ tɩɩna ta ʋ nala tɩyaŋ.’

english_verse: You are really the ones God told his prophets to speak to. And you were given the promise God made to your ancestors. He said to Abraham, “All nations on earth will be blessed because of someone from your family.”
translation_verse: Nyʋʋsɩ hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa bine ʋ tɩŋdaala hʋ ko basɩ gɛɛ, mamaa rɛ ʋ biŋ ba buloŋ tɩya. Ʋ biŋ tɩya á naabaala rɛ ka ba ha pɩŋ gbal ma mɛ gyɩnaŋ. Beewɩya ʋ gyɩ basɩ tɩya Abɩraham nɛ a baa, ‘I doho nala tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ sɩ tɩŋa a leŋ dɩ dʋnɩya nala buloŋ na marɩsɩ.’

english_verse: God sent his chosen Son to you first, because God wanted to bless you and make each one of you turn away from your sins.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ Yesu á Tɩɩna, dɩ ʋ laa sɩya ko ma lee, a pɛ ma tɩyaŋ dɩ ma buloŋ bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: These men were angry because the apostles were teaching the people that the dead would be raised from death, just as Jesus had been raised from death.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba ko na baaŋ Piita bee Gyɔɔŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ kɩŋkaŋ, beewɩya, ba fa aa daga nala hʋ rɛ anɩɩ Yesu sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ dɩ nal lɛ sʋba, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ mɩɩgɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: It was already late in the afternoon, and they arrested Peter and John and put them in jail for the night.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba kaŋ Piita bee Gyɔɔŋ mʋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ sɩya gballɩ. .

english_verse: The next morning the leaders, the elders, and the teachers of the Law of Moses met in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩgballɩya, Gyuuma sɩlaala abee ba nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ Tenni dɩdagɩla buloŋ nɛ gyɩ ko laŋŋɩ Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The high priest Annas was there, as well as Caiaphas, John, Alexander, and other members of the high priest's family.
translation_verse: Ba bee Anaasɩ, Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ, abee Kayifasɩ, abee Gyɔɔŋ abee Alizaŋda, abee nala hʋ kɛ buloŋ aa lɩɩ ba wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ doho nala tɩyaŋ nɛ gyɩ ko laŋŋɩ.

english_verse: They brought in Peter and John and made them stand in the middle while they questioned them. They asked, “By what power and in whose name have you done this?”
translation_verse: Ba aa ko laŋŋɩ teŋ, ba yɩrɩ Yesu kpambɩsɩ hʋ balɩya ba lɩɩ sɩŋ ba tʋtʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Degɛɛ rɛ ma kana, a wuwo leŋ baal no deye nyɛ, koo aŋnɛ feŋ nɛ ma yɩrɩ a leŋ baal no deye nyɛ?”

english_verse: Peter was filled with the Holy Spirit and told the nation's leaders and the elders:
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ Piita basɩ tɩya ba a baa, “Mamaa aa yaa sɩlaala abee nɩhɩyasɩ,

english_verse: You are questioning us today about a kind deed in which a man who could not walk was healed.
translation_verse: ma kaŋ ma ko kɩ di á sarɩya rɛ gyɩnaŋ akuu á aa yaa wɩwelii a tɩɩbɩ gbarɩgɩ no wɩya.

english_verse: But there is something we must tell you and everyone else in Israel. This man is standing here completely well because of the power of Jesus Christ from Nazareth. You put Jesus to death on a cross, but God raised him to life.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaŋ maga dɩ ma nala no abee Iziral tɩmma buloŋ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ Yesu Krisita aa lɩɩ Nazarɛti, ʋ feŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ baal no wuwo deye a sɩŋ ma sɩya tɩyaŋ nyɛ. Ʋ rɛ ma leŋ ba kaŋ kpaasɩ mal daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ sʋba gɛɛ, ka Wɩɩsɩ kyisi ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: He is the stone you builders thought was worthless, and now he is the most important stone of all.
translation_verse: Yesu wɩya rɛ ba basɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa, ‘Bʋyɩ hʋ dɩɩsaala hʋ aa vɩya ta, ʋ rɛ ko yaa wara hʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ sɩfɩyaŋ bʋyɩ.’

english_verse: Only Jesus has the power to save! His name is the only one in all the world that can save anyone.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ tuwo dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ aa sɩ wuwo laa ma ta dɩ Yesu dʋŋ daa. Ʋ dʋŋ feŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ baa dɩ á yɩrɩ, dɩ ʋ laa ma ta.”

english_verse: The officials were amazed to see how brave Peter and John were, and they knew that these two apostles were only ordinary men and not well educated. The officials were certain these men had been with Jesus.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa laŋŋa aa ko na anɩɩ Gyɔɔŋ bee Piita aa basɩ wɩya hʋ abee nyuduwo gɛɛ, ba nyʋʋsɩ gyɩ mɩɩgɩ fɩyɛlɩ rɛ, beewɩya ba gyɩma anɩɩ ba tuwo bol buloŋ tɩyaŋ, a yaa nyuguliŋ tɩmma mɛ, a bɩ mʋʋ sakuuri. Doŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba hakɩllɩ yaŋ ko anɩɩ ba gyɩ aa tɩŋ Yesu hal lɛ.

english_verse: But they could not deny what had happened. The man who had been healed was standing there with the apostles.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba kyɛ wɩɩ lɔlɔ ba aa sɩ basɩ, beewɩya ba naa Piita bee Gyɔɔŋ abee gbarɩgɩ hʋ ba aa tɩɩba, dɩ ba buloŋ sɩŋ doŋ.

english_verse: “What can we do with these men? Everyone in Jerusalem knows about this miracle, and we cannot say it didn't happen.
translation_verse: Á bɩ sɩ wuwo baa dɩ wɩɩ no yaa wɩnyɩyɛl lɛ, beewɩya nal buloŋ aa we Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ ba aa rɛ yaa wɩmagɩl no.

english_verse: But to keep this thing from spreading, we will warn them never again to speak to anyone about the name of Jesus.”
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ámaa rɛ aa kyɛ dɩ wɩɩ no ta marɩ taalɩ yʋga, ma leŋ dɩ á basɩ tɩya ba abee sɩfɩyasɩ anɩɩ ba ta bɩl ko maakyiye basɩ Yesu Krisita wɩya a tɩya nal buloŋ.”

english_verse: So they called the two apostles back in and told them they must never, for any reason, teach anything about the name of Jesus.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba bɩl yɩrɩ ba ko gyʋʋ, a basɩ tɩya ba abee sɩfɩyasɩ anɩɩ ba ta bɩl ko maakyiye basɩ Yesu wɩya koo a daga nala ʋ feŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Peter and John answered, “Do you think God wants us to obey you or to obey him?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Piita bee Gyɔɔŋ pɩyɛsɩ ba a baa, “Á aa tɩŋ ma nyʋwa, abee á aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa, kɩbee rɛ yaa ŋmanɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ? Ma basɩ wɩtɩɩ.

english_verse: The officials could not find any reason to punish Peter and John. So they threatened them and let them go. The man who was healed by this miracle was more than
translation_verse: Gbarɩgɩ no ba gyɩ aa tɩɩba, ʋ gyɩ tee bɩsɩ mɔllɩbalɩya rɛ. Nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di sʋla Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ʋ tɩya ba nyuduwo

english_verse: As soon as Peter and John had been set free, they went back and told the others everything the chief priests and the leaders had said to them.
translation_verse: Ba aa yaŋ kpa Piita bee Gyɔɔŋ ta, ba mɩɩgɩ mʋ nɩkaalɩya hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di lee rɛ, ba beel-ba laŋŋɩ. Doŋ nɛ ba kpa wɩya hʋ buloŋ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ abee bee nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ aa basa, a basɩ tɩya ba.

english_verse: When the rest of the Lord's followers heard this, they prayed together and said: Master, you created heaven and earth, the sea, and everything in them.
translation_verse: Ba aa basɩ wɩya no ko teŋ, ba buloŋ piili kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ abee tɩdɩgɩ a baa, “Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, ɩ rɛ taa wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha buloŋ, abee fuwoni abee kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa we ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And by the Holy Spirit you spoke to our ancestor David. He was your servant, and you told him to say: “Why are all the Gentiles so furious? Why do people make foolish plans?
translation_verse: Ɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ ɩ leŋ á naabaa Deviti, Ɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ basɩ a baa, ‘Bee rɛ tɩŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma kɩ na baaŋ kɩŋkaŋ nyɛ? Bee rɛ tɩŋ nala no aa vʋʋlɩ dɩ ba sɩ kyogi Wɩɩsɩ tʋma aŋ lɔlɔ?

english_verse: Here in Jerusalem, Herod and Pontius Pilate got together with the Gentiles and the people of Israel. Then they turned against your holy Servant Jesus, your chosen Messiah.
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ yaŋ kɔnɩ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, Beewɩya Hɛrɔtɩ bee Pɔŋtiyo Pilato abee nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma abee Iziral tɩmma, ba buloŋ gyɩ ko laŋŋɩ rɛ bee no tɩyaŋ dɩ ba yuwo Yesu, Ɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ welii hʋ Ɩ aa lɩya dɩ ʋ yaa Krisita hʋ.

english_verse: They did what you in your power and wisdom had already decided would happen.
translation_verse: Ba gyɩ laŋŋa yaa wɩya hʋ ɩ aa paalɩ gyɩma ɩ dee tɩyaŋ abee ɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ ba sɩ kɔnɩ yaa rɛ.

english_verse: Show your mighty power, as we heal people and work miracles and wonders in the name of your holy Servant Jesus.
translation_verse: Daga ɩ dee, a leŋ dɩ wɩɩla tɩmma abee taaga buloŋ na laaŋfɩya. Ka dɩ á mɛ wuwo kɩ yaa wɩkperiye abee wɩmagɩla, Ɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ welii Yesu feŋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: After they had prayed, the meeting place shook. They were all filled with the Holy Spirit and bravely spoke God's message. Sharing Possessions
translation_verse: Ba aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ ko teŋ, dɩ lee hʋ ba aa laŋŋa buloŋ gyigise rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ ko gyʋʋ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ba piili kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya abee nyuduwo. Nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di aa kyiyeli dɔmɔŋ

english_verse: The group of followers all felt the same way about everything. None of them claimed that their possessions were their own, and they shared everything they had with each other.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di fa kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ rɛ, a kaŋ tɩdɩgɩ mɛ. Dɩ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ kaŋ kɩŋ mɛ, ʋ aa bɩ kaŋ kɩ yɩrɩ ʋ dʋŋ kɩŋ. Ʋ aa kpa ʋ nɩɩ ʋ bɩrɩmɩ ba buloŋ kɩŋ nɛ.

english_verse: and no one went in need of anything. Everyone who owned land or houses would sell them and bring the money
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ fa aa kaŋ dɩɩsɩ abee bagɩsɩ, ba aa kpa ba buloŋ yallɩ rɛ, a kaŋ molbiye hʋ ba aa naa, a mʋ Yesu kpambɩsɩ hʋ lee.

english_verse: Joseph was one of the followers who had sold a piece of property and brought the money to the apostles. He was a Levite from Cyprus, and the apostles called him Barnabas, which means “one who encourages others.”
translation_verse: Ʋ fa kaŋ baga kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Nyɛ rɛ ʋ kpa yallɩ, a kaŋ molbiye hʋ mʋ Yesu kpambɩsɩ hʋ sɩya.

english_verse: But they agreed to cheat and keep some of the money for themselves. So when Ananias took the rest of the money to the apostles,
translation_verse: a lɩɩ molbiye hʋ badɔmɔŋ faŋa, ka Ananiyasɩ sii kaŋ molbikaalɩya hʋ mʋ Yesu kpambɩsɩ hʋ lee.

english_verse: Peter said, “Why has Satan made you keep back some of the money from the sale of the property? Why have you lied to the Holy Spirit?
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Piita pɩyɛsɩ ʋ a baa, “Ananiyasɩ, bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ leŋ Sɩtaanɩ mʋrɩ ɩ, ɩ lɩɩ kɩna hʋ ɩ aa yalla molbiye badɔmɔŋ faŋa, aŋ nyɩya wɩya Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ nyɛ?

english_verse: The property was yours before you sold it, and even after you sold it, the money was still yours. What made you do such a thing? You didn't lie to people. You lied to God!”
translation_verse: Na kɩna hʋ yaa ɩ kɩna rɛ ka ɩ na kpa yallɩ? Ɩ bɩl aa yalla mɛ, molbiye hʋ yaa ɩ molbiye rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ yaŋ liisi ɩ tɩya tɩyaŋ, aŋ yaa wɩɩ no nyɛ? Nihuwobisi sɩya tɩyaŋ daa ɩ nyɩya wɩya no, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ ɩ nyɩya wɩya no gɛɛ.”

english_verse: As soon as Ananias heard this, he dropped dead, and everyone who heard about it was frightened.
translation_verse: Ananiyasɩ aa nɩɩ wɩɩ no, ʋ lɩɩ tele doŋ nɛ, a sʋba haŋ lagɩlagɩbiye hʋ. Nyɛ rɛ kambɩŋ gyɩ gyʋʋ nala hʋ buloŋ aa nɩɩ wɩɩ no.

english_verse: Some young men came in and wrapped up his body. Then they took it out and buried it.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ bapʋwasɩya ko gyʋʋ, a we ʋ liŋe, a kpa ʋ lɩɩ mʋ hogo.

english_verse: Three hours later Sapphira came in, but she did not know what had happened to her husband.
translation_verse: Mʋhʋ sʋwaa, dɩ ʋ haaŋ hʋ mɛ ko gyʋʋ. Ʋ kɛ fa bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa tɩyaŋ.
