english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that I have often planned to come for a visit. But something has always kept me from doing it. I want to win followers to Christ in Rome, as I have done in many other places.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ ŋ aa lʋgɩ rɛ weliŋ dɩ ŋ ko na ma, amɛ ŋ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ aa bee lɩɩ sɩɩ. Ŋ kyo dɩ ŋ naa nala a lɩɩ ma doŋ tɩyaŋ mɛ rɛ dɩ ba ko tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ, anɩɩ ŋ aa yaa gɛɛ ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma leye badɔmɔŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if people are civilized and educated, or if they are uncivilized and uneducated. I must tell the good news to everyone. That's why I am eager to visit all of you in Rome. The Power of the Good News
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ yaa ŋ sɩfɩyasɩ, dɩ ŋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya ma nala hʋ aa we Roma tɩyaŋ mɛ.

english_verse: I am proud of the good news! It is God's powerful way of saving all people who have faith, whether they are Jews or Gentiles.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ basɩɩ bɩ yaa ŋ hɩɩsɩ, beewɩya ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ba aa rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ dee ʋ aa kpaa kɩ laa nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa ba di. Gyuuma rɛ sɩ laa sɩya dɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma mɛ kɩ tɩŋa.

english_verse: From heaven God shows how angry he is with all the wicked and evil things that sinful people do to crush the truth.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ daga anɩɩ ʋ naa baaŋ nɩbɔmɔ abee nala hʋ aa bee tɩŋ ʋ nyʋwa nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya ba wɩyaabɔmɔ nyagɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ biŋ nɛ.

english_verse: They know everything that can be known about God, because God has shown it all to them.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ naa baaŋ ba nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya wɩya hʋ buloŋ aa maga dɩ ba gyɩma a mʋ kɩ tile Wɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, ba bɩ yaa wɩfaŋɩya. Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ kaŋ ba polli tɩya ba rɛ.

english_verse: They claim to be wise, but they are fools.
translation_verse: Ba aa baa dɩ ba yaa wɩgyʋnna rɛ, aŋ yaa bambugo.

english_verse: They don't worship the glorious and eternal God. Instead, they worship idols that are made to look like humans who cannot live forever, and like birds, animals, and reptiles.
translation_verse: Ba fa maga dɩ ba kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa bee sʋba rɛ, ka ba vɩya aŋ mɩɩgɩ marɩ kɩna aa kɩɩ nihuwobisi aa sʋbɩ, koo kɩna aa kɩɩ digibiisi koo pʋsɩ koo kɩna aa tuuri taŋha, a kɩ kpaarɩ ba.

english_verse: So God let these people go their own way. They did what they wanted to do, and their filthy thoughts made them do shameful things with their bodies.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ba wɩya tɩya ba rɛ, ba kɩ yaa bisiŋ wɩya hʋ ba tɩɩ hakɩllɩ aa kyo, a kɩ yaa hɩɩsɩ wɩya bee dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: God let them follow their own evil desires. Women no longer wanted to have sex in a natural way, and they did things with each other that were not natural.
translation_verse: Ba aa yaa wɩya no wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ba ta rɛ ba kɩ yaa wɩlaama abee hɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ ba aa kyo. Haana aa vɩya ba bee baala aa sɩ pɩŋ nɛ, aŋ kɩ pɩŋ ba hadɔŋtɩŋsɩ.

english_verse: Men behaved in the same way. They stopped wanting to have sex with women and had strong desires for sex with other men. They did shameful things with each other, and what has happened to them is punishment for their foolish deeds.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ baala mɛ aa vɩya haana kyɛyɩ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa daga gɛɛ, aŋ mɩɩgɩ hiini kɩ kyɛ ba badɔŋtɩŋsɩ, a kɩ yaa hɩɩsɩ wɩya bee dɔmɔŋ. Ba aa yaa bisiŋ wɩya no, dɔgɩsɩɩ hʋ aa maga, ʋ rɛ ba yɩrɩ kɩ we ba tɩɩ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Since these people refused even to think about God, he let their useless minds rule over them. That's why they do all sorts of indecent things.
translation_verse: Nala no aa bɩ laa nyʋwa dɩ ba kpa Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ ba aa gyɩma a we ba hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ mɛ leŋ ba ta rɛ dɩ ba kɩ tɩŋ ba tɩbɩɩŋbɔmɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ, a kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa bɩ maga.

english_verse: They are evil, wicked, and greedy, as well as mean in every possible way. They want what others have, and they murder, argue, cheat, and are hard to get along with. They gossip,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ kɛ iriŋ buloŋ. Ba bɔŋsɩ bɩ kyalla, ba aa kaŋ tɩbala, a kaŋ gyogibɔŋlɔrɩnɩ mɛ. Ba tɩsɩ aa kɩ hɔllɩ nala rɛ, ba kɩ kpʋ nala, a kɩ kaa kaasɩ. Ba aa kɩ mʋrɩ nala rɛ, a kɩ yaa nala teŋbeeli wɩya. Ba aa kɩ basɩ nala wɩya rɛ,

english_verse: say cruel things about others, and hate God. They are proud, conceited, and boastful, always thinking up new ways to do evil. These people don't respect their parents.
translation_verse: a kɩ kyogi dɔmɔŋ fene mɛ. Ba haasɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, a yaa nyuduwo tɩmma mɛ. Ba aa kɩ daga ba tɩɩ rɛ, a kɩ bigisi ba tɩɩ. Ba aa kyɛ ŋmaŋsɩ rɛ ba aa sɩ tɩŋa a marɩ kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ, a bee tɩŋ ba kuwoma abee ba nɩmma nyʋʋsɩ.

english_verse: They are stupid, unreliable, and don't have any love or pity for others.
translation_verse: Ba wuwo hɩɩsɩ rɛ weliŋ, a bɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ mɛ. Ba bɩ kyo nala, a bee fá nala sikii mɛ.

english_verse: They know God has said that anyone who acts this way deserves to die. But they keep on doing evil things, and they even encourage others to do them.
translation_verse: Ba gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa dɩ nala hʋ aa yaa wɩya no bɩ sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol, aŋ ka ba ha vɩya aŋ kɩ yaa. Aŋ ha aa pɛ kɩ we nala hʋ aa yaa wɩya no iriŋ mɛ nyuni, dɩ ba marɩ kɩ yaa.

english_verse: Some of you accuse others of doing wrong. But there is no excuse for what you do. When you judge others, you condemn yourselves, because you are guilty of doing the very same things.
translation_verse: Ɩ nal hʋ aa kpa kyogisi kɩ tɩya ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna, ɩ tɩɩ mɛ bɩ lɩɩ wɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaŋ ko kpa kyogisi kɩ tɩya ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna, gyɩma weliŋ anɩɩ ɩ tɩɩ rɛ ɩ kpa kyogisi kɩ tɩya gɛɛ, beewɩya wɩya hʋ ɩ aa baa dɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna hʋ yaa ɩ kpa kyogisi kɩ tɩya ʋ gɛɛ, ba tɩɩ bee ba nyuu rɛ ɩ mɛ kɩ yaa.

english_verse: We know that God is right to judge everyone who behaves in this way.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ ko dɩ nala hʋ aa yaa wɩya no iriŋ sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ba, ʋ yaa maga rɛ.

english_verse: You surely don't think much of God's wonderful goodness or of his patience and willingness to put up with you. Don't you know that the reason God is good to you is because he wants you to turn to him?
translation_verse: Koo ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ɩ aa deŋ bɔnyɛ hʋ abee kenyiri hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kana beel-ɩ waasʋ? Ʋ maga dɩ ɩ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ bɔnyɛ beel-ɩ rɛ yaa dɩ ɛɛ wuwo leŋ dɩ ɩ bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ?

english_verse: But you are stubborn and refuse to turn to God. So you are making things even worse for yourselves on that day when he will show how angry he is and will judge the world with fairness.
translation_verse: Amɛ ɩ bembii deye rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, ɩ bɩ vʋwa dɩ ɩ bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ɩ wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, dɔgɩsɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ɩ kɩŋkaŋ kyɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ kpa baaŋ abee wɩtɩɩ a di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya ba wɩbɔmɔ wɩya, Ɩ leŋ ʋ marɩ yʋga kɩ pɛ rɛ.

english_verse: God will reward each of us for what we have done.
translation_verse: Beewɩya nal buloŋ wɩyaalɩya tuno aa maga gɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: He will give eternal life to everyone who has patiently done what is good in the hope of receiving glory, honor, and life that lasts forever.
translation_verse: Nala badɔmɔŋ we doŋ a kaŋ mala bee wɩweliye yayɩ, beewɩya ba aa kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba kaŋ yohuŋ abee feŋ abee mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Nala no rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii tɩya.

english_verse: But he will show how angry and furious he can be with every selfish person who rejects the truth and wants to do evil.
translation_verse: Amɛ nala badɔmɔŋ mɛ we doŋ, a kyɩla ba dʋŋ wɩya, a vɩya wɩtɩɩ hʋ ŋmanɩɩ tɩŋɩɩ, aŋ kɩ tɩŋ wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ. Nala no nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ baaŋ sɩ sii kɩŋkaŋ, dɩ ba na tʋwara bee tɩkyogi kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: All who are wicked will be punished with trouble and suffering. It doesn't matter if they are Jews or Gentiles.
translation_verse: Nal kɛ buloŋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ na tʋwara kɩŋkaŋ. Gyuuma rɛ sɩ laasɩya dɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma mɛ kɩ tɩŋa.

english_verse: But all who do right will be rewarded with glory, honor, and peace, whether they are Jews or Gentiles.
translation_verse: Amɛ nala hʋ buloŋ aa yaa wɩweliye, ba sɩ na yohuŋ abee feŋ abee laaŋfɩya Wɩɩsɩ lee. Gyuuma rɛ sɩ laasɩya dɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma mɛ kɩ tɩŋa.

english_verse: God doesn't have any favorites!
translation_verse: Beewɩya, Wɩɩsɩ bee lugisi nala ʋ sarɩya dii tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: This proves that the conscience is like a law written in the human heart. And it will show whether we are forgiven or condemned,
translation_verse: Ba wɩyaalɩya daga anɩɩ wɩya hʋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ aa daga we ba tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ba hakɩllɩ mɛ daga anɩɩ mɩrɩsɩ no we ba tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya, dɩ ba aa rɛ ko yaa wɩbɔŋ koo wɩwelii, ba aa gyɩma rɛ ba hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: when God appoints Jesus Christ to judge everyone's secret thoughts, just as my message says. The Jews and the Law
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, Wɩɩsɩ Wɩweliye hʋ ŋ aa basɩ daga anɩɩ nyɛ rɛ ba sɩ kɩɩ kyɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ kaŋ nala wɩfaŋɩya buloŋ ko lɩɩ pʋlʋŋ a tɩŋ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a di ba sarɩya.

english_verse: By reading the Scriptures you learn how God wants you to behave, and you discover what is right.
translation_verse: Ɩ baa dɩ ɩ gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ kɩ yaa rɛ, beewɩya mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ daga ɩ wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: You are sure that you are a guide for the blind and a light for all who are in the dark.
translation_verse: Ɩ baa dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa nyʋlɩma daatɩgɩɩ, a yaa nala hʋ aa we bilhuu tɩyaŋ mɛ kyaanʋʋ.

english_verse: But how can you teach others when you refuse to learn? You preach it is wrong to steal. But do you steal?
translation_verse: Ɩ nal hʋ aa daga nala, bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ bee daga ɩ tɩɩ kɛ? Ɩ aa daga nala rɛ dɩ ba ta kɩ gaa, aŋka ɩ tɩɩ kɛ kɩ gaa.

english_verse: You take pride in the Law, but you disobey the Law and bring shame to God.
translation_verse: Ɩ aa daga ɩ tɩɩ rɛ anɩɩ ɩ kɛ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ nɛ, aŋ gʋla kɩ kyogi mɩrɩsɩ no, a kɩ we Wɩɩsɩ hɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures tell us, “You have made foreigners say insulting things about God.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba saba rɛ a baa, “Mamaa Gyuuma rɛ leŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma kɩ kyogi Wɩɩsɩ feŋ.”

english_verse: Being circumcised is worthwhile, if you obey the Law. But if you don't obey the Law, you are no better off than people who are not circumcised.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ kyurrr, ɛɛ kɛ ma pene hʋ kerii kaŋ memii rɛ. Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ ko bee tɩŋ ba, ma fa aa bɩ keri ma pene rɛ kpɩya.

english_verse: In fact, if they obey the Law, they are as good as anyone who is circumcised.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal hʋ aa bɩ keri ʋ peŋ nɛ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ kyurrr, Wɩɩsɩ aa kpa ʋ anɩɩ ʋ keri ʋ peŋ nɛ.

english_verse: So everyone who obeys the Law, but has never been circumcised, will condemn you. Even though you are circumcised and have the Law, you still don't obey its teachings.
translation_verse: Mamaa Gyuuma, ma gyɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ no rɛ beewɩya mamaa rɛ ba sabɩ ba tɩya, ka ma keri ma pene mɛ, amɛ abee gɛɛ buloŋ ma bee tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ. Ɛɛwɩya, nala hʋ aa bɩ keri ba pene aŋ kɩ tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ ba sɩ maakyiye di ma sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ma.

english_verse: To be a real Jew you must obey the Law. True circumcision is something that happens deep in your heart, not something done to your body. And besides, you should want praise from God and not from humans.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ nal yaa Gyuu tɩɩ, ʋ yaa ʋ tɩya tɩyaŋ wɩɩ rɛ, ʋ bɩ yaa wɩɩ ba aa yaa ʋ teŋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ rɛ bɩl yaa nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa kaŋ ʋ hakɩla bɩrɩmɩ, ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ʋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ nɛ tɩŋ. Nal no iriŋ bigisii lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ, nihuwobiŋ lee daa ʋ lɩɩ.

english_verse: It is good in a lot of ways! First of all, God's messages were spoken to the Jews.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ Gyuu yayɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ rɛ ŋmanɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Tɔnɔ hʋ aa laasɩya rɛ nyɛ: Gyuuma nosi tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ kpa ʋ wɩya we.

english_verse: It is true that some of them did not believe the message. But does this mean that God cannot be trusted, just because they did not have faith?
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ba badɔmɔŋ gyɩ bɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ nyɛ yaŋ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ ta yaa wɩya hʋ ʋ aa baa ʋ sɩ yaa?

english_verse: No, indeed! God tells the truth, even if everyone else is a liar. The Scriptures say about God, “Your words will be proven true, and in court you will win your case.”
translation_verse: Aayɩ, ba mʋra rɛ! Abee nihuwobisi buloŋ aa yaa wɩnyɩyɛla mɛ, Wɩɩsɩ kɛ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ba saba Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ wɩya rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Dɩ ɩ ko kɩ basɩ wɩya, nal buloŋ aa na ba yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, dɩ ɩ rɛ dii nal buloŋ sarɩya mɛ, ba aa na nɩɩ ɩ kɩna sʋma rɛ.”

english_verse: If our evil deeds show how right God is, then what can we say? Is it wrong for God to become angry and punish us? What a foolish thing to ask.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ á wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ rɛ leŋ nala na weliŋ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɛ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ, á sɩ wuwo baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ bee yaa weliŋ ʋ aa dɔgɩsɩ ma á wɩbɔmɔ wɩya?

english_verse: But the answer is, “No.” Otherwise, how could God judge the world?
translation_verse: Aayɩ, ba mʋra rɛ! Beewɩya dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ fa bɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sɩ yaa a di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya?

english_verse: Since your lies bring great honor to God by showing how truthful he is, you may ask why God still says you are a sinner.
translation_verse: Ka dɩ ŋ wɩnyɩyɛl lɛ leŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ kyaasɩ lɩɩ sɩŋ, a daga ʋ gaŋdarɩ, bee rɛ sɩ tɩŋ dɩ ʋ ha di ŋ sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ŋ a baa dɩ ŋ yaa wɩbɔŋyaal lɛ.

english_verse: You might as well say, “Let's do something evil, so that something good will come of it!” Some people even claim that we are saying this. But God is fair and will judge them as well. No One Is Good
translation_verse: Dɩ gɛɛ rɛ fa, bee rɛ tɩŋ á fa bɩ sɩ baa dɩ ma leŋ dɩ á kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ, dɩ wɩweliye ko. Nala badɔmɔŋ paalɩ kyogi ŋ feŋ nɛ anɩɩ ŋ tɩɩ gba basɩ nyɛ rɛ. Kyogisi hʋ aa maga bee nala no, ʋ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa tɩya ba. Nal buloŋ bɩ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ

english_verse: What does all this mean? Does it mean that we Jews are better off than the Gentiles? No, it doesn't! Jews, as well as Gentiles, are ruled by sin, just as I have said.
translation_verse: Dɩ nyɛ rɛ yaŋ, ma bɩɩna anɩɩ á nala hʋ aa yaa Gyuuma kɛ kpɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma rɛ? Aayɩ, á mɛ bɩ kpɩya ba. Ŋ laa sɩya leŋ ma gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ Gyuuma abee nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma buloŋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ yosi rɛ.

english_verse: Not one of them understands or even searches for God.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ tuwo a kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ, nal buloŋ mɛ tuwo a kyo dɩ ʋ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: They have all turned away and are worthless. There isn't one person who does right.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ kpaa hal yɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ. Ba buloŋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ nyʋgɩsɩ gyʋʋ mʋ rɛ. Nal buloŋ tuwo a kɩ yaa wɩweliye, haalɩ nɩdɩgɩ mɛ.

english_verse: Their words are like an open pit, and their tongues are good only for telling lies. Each word is as deadly as the fangs of a snake,
translation_verse: Ba nyʋʋsɩ wɩbasɩya mʋrɩ nala kɩ kpʋ rɛ. Wɩnyɩyɛ-bɔŋlɔrɩnɩ dʋŋ nɛ we ba nyʋʋsɩ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩ buloŋ ba aa basɩ kaŋ hʋwoŋ nɛ anɩɩ dʋŋ hʋwoŋ.

english_verse: and they say nothing but bitter curses.
translation_verse: Ba aa ŋmɩyɛsɩ ŋmɩyɛsɩ-bɔŋlɔrɩnɩ rɛ kɩ tɩya nala.

english_verse: These people quickly become violent.
translation_verse: Ba bee yaa gyegye nala kpʋyɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: They don't know how to live in peace.
translation_verse: Ba bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa yaa wɩɩ buloŋ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ba bee nala sʋma.

english_verse: They don't even fear God.”
translation_verse: Ba bee fá Wɩɩsɩ mɛ.”

english_verse: We know that everything in the Law was written for those who are under its power. The Law says these things to stop anyone from making excuses and to let God show that the whole world is guilty.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ nɛ aa daga wɩɩ buloŋ mɛ, nala hʋ aa tɩŋ ba rɛ ba daga kɩ tɩya. Ɛɛ wɩya nal buloŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo baa dɩ ʋ kɛ bɩ yaa wɩɩ maga dɩ Wɩɩsɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ dʋnɩya nal buloŋ sarɩya rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ di.

english_verse: God doesn't accept people simply because they obey the Law. No, indeed! All the Law does is to point out our sin. God's Way of Accepting People
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ, dɩ ba leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ hʋ mɩrɩsɩ no aa yaa buloŋ nɛ dɩ ba leŋ nal buloŋ gyɩma nɩɩ ʋ yaa wɩbɔŋyaal lɛ. Ɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa leŋ á yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ

english_verse: Now we see how God does make us acceptable to him. The Law and the Prophets tell how we become acceptable, and it isn't by obeying the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, Wɩɩsɩ daga ŋmanɩɩ hʋ nala aa sɩ tɩŋa a wuwo yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ʋ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ bɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ abee Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala buloŋ gyɩ dii ŋmanɩɩ no wɩya daŋsɩya rɛ.

english_verse: All of us have sinned and fallen short of God's glory.
translation_verse: Nal nal buloŋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ á bɩ kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ gaŋdarɩ hʋ fa aa maga dɩ á kana.

english_verse: But God treats us much better than we deserve, and because of Christ Jesus, he freely accepts us and sets us free from our sins.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩŋ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a laa ma ta a leŋ á yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Á bɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ a maga dɩ ʋ yaa nyɛ tɩya ma.

english_verse: God sent Christ to be our sacrifice. Christ offered his life's blood, so by faith in him we could come to God. And God did this to show that in the past he was right to be patient and forgive sinners. This also shows that God is right when he accepts people who have faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no kɛ, Wɩɩsɩ bɩrɩmɩ ʋ sɩya kyaasɩ á wɩbɔmɔ rɛ. Nyɛ tɩyaŋ ʋ daga anɩɩ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna rɛ, aŋ bɩl daga anɩɩ dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko laa Yesu wɩya di, ʋ aa leŋ ʋ tɩɩna yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna rɛ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: What is left for us to brag about? Not a thing! Is it because we obeyed some law? No! It is because of faith.
translation_verse: Wɩbee rɛ á yaŋ kana, a kɩ daga á tɩɩ? Á bɩ kaŋ wɩɩ buloŋ, beewɩya mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ daa sɩ leŋ dɩ nal yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, see ʋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ laadii.

english_verse: We see that people are acceptable to God because they have faith, and not because they obey the Law.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, wɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ á aa sɩna rɛ yaa nal Wɩɩsɩ laadii rɛ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ tɩɩna yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ kɛ daa.

english_verse: Does God belong only to the Jews? Isn't he also the God of the Gentiles? Yes, he is!
translation_verse: Koo ma bɩɩna anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ yaa Gyuuma dʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ? Aayɩ. Ʋ yaa nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma mɛ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and he accepts Gentiles as well as Jews, simply because of their faith.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ yaa Wɩɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ. Gyuuma abee nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma buloŋ, ba laadii tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ aa tɩŋa, a leŋ dɩ ba yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If he became acceptable to God because of what he did, then he would have something to brag about. But he would never be able to brag about it to God.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ wɩyaalɩya rɛ fa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ ʋ fa kaŋ wɩɩ ʋ aa sɩ wuwo kpa kɩ daga ʋ tɩɩ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ kɛ sɩya tɩyaŋ fa ta daa.

english_verse: Money paid to workers isn't a gift. It is something they earn by working.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ tʋŋ tʋma dɩ ba tun-ʋ, tuno hʋ ʋ aa laa bɩ yaa kyɔgɩta. Ʋ tʋma rɛ a laa.

english_verse: But you cannot make God accept you because of something you do. God accepts sinners only because they have faith in him.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ nal lɛ bee deŋ ʋ wɩyaalɩya tɩyaŋ aŋ laa Wɩɩsɩ di anɩɩ ʋ rɛ aa leŋ wɩbɔŋyaal yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna laadii no tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tɩŋa a leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: In the Scriptures David talks about the blessings that come to people who are acceptable to God, even though they don't do anything to deserve these blessings. David says,
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no rɛ Kuwori Deviti gyɩ basɩ, a daga anɩɩ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ leŋ dɩ nal yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, aŋ bɩ yaa gɛɛ akuu tɩɩna wɩyaalɩya wɩya, dɩ ʋ tɩɩna yaa nyusʋŋtɩɩna rɛ. Nyɛ rɛ Kuwori Deviti basɩ:

english_verse: “What a blessing when God forgives our sins and our evil deeds. What a blessing when the Lord erases our sins from his book.”
translation_verse: Nyusʋŋtɩɩna rɛ yaa nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa bɩ magɩlɩ ʋ wɩbɔmɔ kɩ biŋ.”

english_verse: Are these blessings meant for circumcised people or for those who are not circumcised? Well, the Scriptures say that God accepted Abraham because Abraham had faith in him.
translation_verse: Nyusʋŋ no wɩya Kuwori Deviti aa basa, ʋ yaa nala hʋ aa keri ba pene dʋŋ kɩŋ nɛ? Aayɩ, nala hʋ aa bɩ keri ba pene mɛ pɛɛ rɛ. Á aa kɩ basɩ saŋa buloŋ nɛ anɩɩ Abɩraham Wɩɩsɩ laadii rɛ gyɩ leŋ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Abraham let himself be circumcised to show he had been accepted because of his faith even before he was circumcised. This makes Abraham the father of all who are acceptable to God because of their faith, even though they are not circumcised.
translation_verse: Abɩraham peŋ hʋ kerii gyɩ yaa magɩl lɛ, a daga anɩɩ ʋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ tɩŋ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ ha bɩ keri ʋ peŋ. Ɛɛ wɩya nala hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ keri ba pene aŋ laa Wɩɩsɩ di, ʋ leŋ ba mɛ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, Abɩraham nɛ yaa ba naabaa.

english_verse: This also makes Abraham the father of everyone who is circumcised and has faith in God, as Abraham did before he was circumcised. The Promise Is for All Who Have Faith
translation_verse: Ʋ rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa keri ba pene mɛ naabaa. Amɛ ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ba aa keri ba pene dʋŋ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ yaa ba naabaa. Ba mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ, ba laa Wɩɩsɩ di a pɛ ba pene hʋ kerii tɩyaŋ nɛ, anɩɩ á naabaa Abɩraham mɛ gyɩ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di aŋ na keri ʋ peŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: If Abraham and his descendants were given this promise because they had obeyed a law, then faith would mean nothing, and the promise would be worthless.
translation_verse: Dɩ nala hʋ aa tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi gyɩ aa saba biŋ dʋŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ fa we nyʋwa no tɩya, ɛɛ kɛ Wɩɩsɩ laadii fa yaa waasʋ rɛ, ka nyʋwa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa we mɛ fa bee kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ.

english_verse: God becomes angry when his Law is broken. But where there isn't a law, it cannot be broken.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi gyɩ aa saba biŋ leŋ Wɩɩsɩ baaŋ kɩ sii nala nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ. Dɩ mɩrɩsɩ rɛ fa tuwo, wɩkyogiye mɛ fa bee we doŋ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say that Abraham would become the ancestor of many nations. This promise was made to Abraham because he had faith in God, who raises the dead to life and creates new things.
translation_verse: “Ŋ leŋ ɩ yaa paalʋʋ gyamaa nala kuwo rɛ.” Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ Abɩraham nɛ yaa á buloŋ kuwo. Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa wuwo leŋ sʋʋnɩ mɩɩgɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, aŋ bɩl wuwo leŋ kɩna gyɩ aa tuwo mɛ we doŋ, Wɩɩsɩ no rɛ Abɩraham gyɩ laa di gɛɛ.

english_verse: But Abraham never doubted or questioned God's promise. His faith made him strong, and he gave all the credit to God.
translation_verse: Abɩraham gyɩ bɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ sige nyʋwa hʋ ʋ aa wee tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ʋ gyɩ marɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ weliŋ, a kɩ dannɩ ʋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ yaa tɩya ʋ wɩya.

english_verse: just as we read in the Scriptures. But these words were not written only for Abraham.
translation_verse: Ba aa saba a baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, Abɩraham dʋŋ wɩya daa ba sabɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: They were written for us, since we will also be accepted because of our faith in God, who raised our Lord Jesus to life.
translation_verse: Ba saba gɛɛ á nala hʋ mɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ á yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma akuu á aa laa ʋ di wɩya rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa kyisi á Tɩɩna Yesu sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God gave Jesus to die for our sins, and he raised him to life, so that we would be made acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Ʋ leŋ Yesu sʋba á wɩbɔmɔ wɩya rɛ, a bɩl leŋ ʋ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ dɩ á wuwo yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: By faith we have been made acceptable to God. And now, thanks to our Lord Jesus Christ, we have peace with God.
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ á aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di, ʋ leŋ á yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ nyɛ, Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ a leŋ á beel-ʋ mɩɩgɩ sʋma.

english_verse: Christ has also introduced us to God's gift of undeserved grace on which we now take our stand. So we are happy, as we look forward to sharing in the glory of God.
translation_verse: Akuu á aa laa Krisita di wɩya, ʋ leŋ á gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Lagɩlagɩ no á aa gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ nyɛ, á aa gyʋwɔsɩ rɛ beewɩya á kaŋ bayɩyɛla rɛ anɩɩ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ á mɛ kaŋ ʋ gaŋdarɩ hʋ.

english_verse: But that's not all! We gladly suffer, because we know that suffering helps us to endure.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ mɛ dʋŋ daa, á aa gyʋwɔsɩ rɛ akuu tʋwara hʋ á aa naa wɩya, beewɩya á gyɩma anɩɩ tʋwara no sɩ leŋ dɩ á kaŋ mala.

english_verse: that will never disappoint us. All of this happens because God has given us the Holy Spirit, who fills our hearts with his love.
translation_verse: Bayɩyɛla hʋ á aa kana, á bɩ sɩ maakyiye dɩ hɩɩsɩ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ ʋ aa kpaa tɩya ma tɩyaŋ nɛ a kpa ʋ kyori we á tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: No one is really willing to die for an honest person, though someone might be willing to die for a truly good person.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa wɩduwo rɛ abee nal aa sɩ laa nyʋwa sʋba nɩtɩɩ wɩya. Amɛ kapuwo nal kɛ sɩ laa nyʋwa sʋba nal aa yaa wɩweliye wɩya.

english_verse: But God showed how much he loved us by having Christ die for us, even though we were sinful.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ daga ma anɩɩ ʋ kyo ma rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, beewɩya saŋa hʋ á ha gyɩ aa yaa wɩbɔŋyaala tɩyaŋ nɛ Krisita sʋba á wɩya.

english_verse: But there is more! Now that God has accepted us because Christ sacrificed his life's blood, we will also be kept safe from God's anger.
translation_verse: Krisita aa sʋba a kpa ʋ kyal sasɩ á wɩbɔmɔ a leŋ á mɩɩgɩ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ nyɛ, nyɛ kɛ rɛ gba Wɩɩsɩ sɩ marɩ kuu Krisita wɩya a laa ma ta kyɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ na baaŋ dʋnɩya nala buloŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ dʋnɩya kyɛtenii.

english_verse: Even when we were God's enemies, he made peace with us, because his Son died for us. Yet something even greater than friendship is ours. Now that we are at peace with God, we will be saved by the life of his Son.
translation_verse: Á bee Wɩɩsɩ fa kyogi dɔmɔŋ nɛ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɩɩgɩ leŋ á beel-ʋ yaa sʋma rɛ, akuu ʋ Biye hʋ aa sʋba á wɩya nyubaanɩŋ. Krisita sʋʋ aa leŋ á mɩɩgɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ kyaŋsɩ nyɛ, ʋ aa weye nyɛ kɛ rɛ ʋ sɩ marɩ laa ma ta dɩ Wɩɩsɩ ta dɔgɩsɩ ma.

english_verse: And in addition to everything else, we are happy because God sent our Lord Jesus Christ to make peace with us. Adam and Christ
translation_verse: Amɛ ɛɛ mɛ dʋŋ daa, Krisita nyubaanɩŋ, á tenni fɩyɛla Wɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya ʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋa a leŋ á beel-ʋ mɩɩgɩ sʋma. Ba kpaa Adama abee Krisita magɩsɩ dɔmɔŋ

english_verse: Adam sinned, and that sin brought death into the world. Now everyone has sinned, and so everyone must die.
translation_verse: Nɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩŋa a ko gyʋʋ dʋnɩya. Wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ mɛ rɛ tɩŋ sʋʋ we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ, beewɩya dʋnɩya nala buloŋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ rɛ tɩŋ sʋʋ we dʋnɩya buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Sin was in the world before the Law came. But no record of sin was kept, because there was no Law.
translation_verse: Wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ gyɩ we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ, ka Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ na kpa ʋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩya Moosi, amɛ dɩ mɩrɩsɩ rɛ tuwo, ba bɩ magɩlɩ wɩbɔmɔ mɛ kɩ biŋ.

english_verse: Yet death still had power over all who lived from the time of Adam to the time of Moses. This happened, though not everyone disobeyed a direct command from God, as Adam did. In some ways Adam is like Christ who came later.
translation_verse: A lɩɩ á naabaa Adama saŋa hʋ a kaŋ kɩ ko á naabaa Moosi saŋa hʋ, sʋʋ rɛ gyɩ laa dʋnɩya buloŋ tɩŋa, haalɩ abee nala hʋ gyɩ aa we doŋ a bɩ vɩya Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa anɩɩ Adama gyɩ aa vɩya Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa gɛɛ. Adama rɛ gyɩ yaa nal hʋ aa sɩ ko daaliiŋ, nal no rɛ yaa Krisita.

english_verse: But the gift of God's undeserved grace was very different from Adam's sin. That one sin brought death to many others. Yet in an even greater way, Jesus Christ alone brought God's gift of undeserved grace to many people.
translation_verse: Amɛ nala no balɩya bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa kpaa yaa ma ʋ bee wɩɩ hʋ Adama wɩbɔŋ hʋ yayɩ aa kaŋ ko bɩ kɩɩ dɔmɔŋ. Ʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ anɩɩ Adama wɩbɔŋ hʋ ʋ aa yaa leŋ nala yʋga sʋba rɛ, amɛ Krisita lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ daga ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩya nala yʋga rɛ a te gɛɛ.

english_verse: There is a lot of difference between Adam's sin and God's gift. That one sin led to punishment. But God's gift made it possible for us to be acceptable to him, even though we have sinned many times.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa kpaa yaa ma ʋ bee wɩɩ hʋ Adama wɩbɔŋ hʋ aa kaŋ ko dʋnɩya kʋla rɛ. Akuu nɩdɩgɩ no wɩbɔŋ hʋ ʋ aa yaa wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ kpaa kyogisi tɩya á buloŋ nɛ. Amɛ nala aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ yʋga hal tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ bɔnyɛ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a kpa á wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ma, aŋ leŋ á yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Everyone was going to be punished because Adam sinned. But because of the good thing that Christ has done, God accepts us and gives us the gift of life.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nɩdɩgɩ wɩbɔŋ aa yaŋ wuwo leŋ Wɩɩsɩ kpa kyogisi tɩya nal buloŋ gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nɩdɩgɩ tɩpʋlʋŋ wɩyaaweliye mɛ wuwo leŋ nal buloŋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: Adam disobeyed God and caused many others to be sinners. But Jesus obeyed him and will make many people acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Nɩdɩgɩ aa vɩya Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa aa leŋ nala yʋga yaa wɩbɔŋyaala gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nɩdɩgɩ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa mɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ nala yʋga yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The Law came, so that the full power of sin could be seen. Yet where sin was powerful, God's gift of undeserved grace was even more powerful.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ kpa ʋ Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩya Moosi rɛ yaa dɩ ba leŋ nala gyɩŋ ba wɩbɔmɔ aa yʋga maga gɛɛ. Amɛ saŋa hʋ nala aa ko marɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ yʋga, haŋ saŋa hʋ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ marɩ daga ʋ bɔnyɛ yʋga á lee.

english_verse: Sin ruled by means of death. But God's gift of grace now rules, and God has accepted us because of Jesus Christ our Lord. This means that we will have eternal life.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, wɩbɔmɔ gyɩ aa yaŋ tɩŋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ a laa dʋnɩya tɩŋa gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ mɛ mɩɩgɩ tɩŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ hʋ ʋ aa leŋ á kana tɩyaŋ a laa dʋnɩya tɩŋa, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ á tɩŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: What should we say? Should we keep on sinning, so that God's gift of undeserved grace will show up even better?
translation_verse: Ba aa kɩɩ nyɛ, wɩbee rɛ á yaŋ sɩ basɩ? Á marɩ kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ marɩ kɩ daga ma ʋ bɔnyɛ koo?

english_verse: No, we should not! If we are dead to sin, how can we go on sinning?
translation_verse: Aayɩ, ba mʋra rɛ! Á kpʋʋ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ ta á tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ á yaŋ sɩ yaa a ha we wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ kɩ yaa?

english_verse: Don't you know that all who share in Christ Jesus by being baptized also share in his death?
translation_verse: Ma buloŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ba aa foo ma wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ á bee Yesu Krisita yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ á beel-ʋ buloŋ nɛ sʋba gɛɛ.

english_verse: When we were baptized, we died and were buried with Christ. We were baptized, so we would live a new life, as Christ was raised to life by the glory of God the Father.
translation_verse: Á wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ hʋ foyi kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ á beel-ʋ buloŋ nɛ sʋba, ba kpa ma hogo gɛɛ. Dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ á mɛ kaŋ mɩɩbofalɩɩ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa kpaa ʋ gaŋdaa dee hʋ a kyisi Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ mɩɩgɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol gɛɛ.

english_verse: If we shared in Jesus' death by being baptized, we will be raised to life with him.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, dɩ á beel-ʋ rɛ sʋba sʋʋdɩgɩ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyisi ma mɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ anɩɩ ʋ gyɩ aa kyisi ʋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: We know that the persons we used to be were nailed to the cross with Jesus. This was done, so our sinful bodies would no longer be the slaves of sin.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ ba gyɩ aa kaŋ Krisita kpaasɩ mal daagarɩɩ hʋ nyuu ʋ sʋba gɛɛ, ʋ bee á mɩɩbobɩnɩɩ hʋ wɩkanɩya buloŋ nɛ ba gyɩ kpʋ gɛɛ. Ɛɛ yaa rɛ dɩ á wɩyaabɔmɔ ta bɩl kaŋ dee á nyuu tɩyaŋ a leŋ dɩ á bɩl yaa wɩbɔmɔ yosi.

english_verse: We know sin doesn't have power over dead people.
translation_verse: Beewɩya dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko sʋba, ʋ foro rɛ, wɩbɔmɔ bɩl bɩ kaŋ dee ʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: As surely as we died with Christ, we believe we will also live with him.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ á bee Krisita buloŋ aa sʋba wɩya, á laa di rɛ anɩɩ á mɛ sɩ mɩɩgɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ a we ʋ lee.

english_verse: We know that death no longer has any power over Christ. He died and was raised to life, never again to die.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa yaŋ kyisi Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ʋ bɩl bɩ sɩ sʋba, ɛɛ wɩya sʋʋ bɩl bɩ kaŋ dee ʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When Christ died, he died for sin once and for all. But now he is alive, and he lives only for God.
translation_verse: Sʋʋ hʋ ʋ aa sʋba daga anɩɩ ʋ kpʋʋ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ ta rɛ, a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, mɩɩbol hʋ ʋ aa kana gyɩnaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ wɩya rɛ ʋ kana ʋ.

english_verse: In the same way, you must think of yourselves as dead to the power of sin. But Christ Jesus has given life to you, and you live for God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ maga dɩ ma mɛ kpa ma tɩɩ anɩɩ ma kpʋʋ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ ta rɛ, aŋ kaŋ mɩɩbofalɩya Wɩɩsɩ wɩya, akuu ma bee Yesu Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya.

english_verse: Don't let sin rule your body. After all, your body is bound to die, so don't obey its desires
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya ma ta bɩl leŋ dɩ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ laa ma teŋbiye no aa yaa kɩsʋbɩya tɩŋa, dɩ ma kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ hʋ ma teŋbiye aa kyɛ.

english_verse: or let any part of it become a slave of evil. Give yourselves to God, as people who have been raised from death to life. Make every part of your body a slave that pleases God.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ma kpa ma teŋbiye lee kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ we wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ma kpa ma tɩɩma tɩya Wɩɩsɩ anɩɩ nala ba aa kyise sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, ba kaŋ mɩɩbol, a kpa ma teŋbiye leye buloŋ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ma kɩ yaa wɩya aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ.

english_verse: Don't let sin keep ruling your lives. You are ruled by God's undeserved grace and not by the Law. Slaves Who Do What Pleases God
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ wɩbɔmɔ bɩl kaŋ dee ma nyuu tɩyaŋ, beewɩya mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa bine daa ma bɩl kɩ tɩŋa, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ aa deŋ ma ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ dɩ ma ta kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ.

english_verse: What does all this mean? Does it mean we are free to sin, because we are ruled by God's gift of undeserved grace and not by the Law? Certainly not!
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ á yaŋ sɩ basɩ? Lagɩlagɩ no mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa bine bɩl aa bɩ kaŋ dee á nyuu tɩyaŋ, ka Wɩɩsɩ kɩ deŋ ma abee ʋ bɔnyɛ nyɛ, á sɩ wuwo kuu gɛɛ wɩya kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ koo? Aayɩ, ba mʋra rɛ!

english_verse: You used to be slaves of sin. But I thank God that with all your heart you followed the example set forth in the teaching you received.
translation_verse: Amɛ á aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ, beewɩya ma fa yaa wɩbɔmɔ yosi rɛ, ka lagɩlagɩ no ma mɩɩgɩ kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ ba aa daga ma abee ma tɩsɩ buloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Now you are set free from sin and are slaves who please God.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ laa ma ta wɩbɔmɔ nosi tɩyaŋ nɛ, ma mɩɩgɩ ko yaa Wɩɩsɩ yosi, dɩ ma wuwo kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ.

english_verse: I am using these everyday examples, because in some ways you are still weak. You used to let the different parts of your body be slaves of your evil thoughts. But now you must make every part of your body serve God, so that you will belong completely to him.
translation_verse: . Ma fa kaŋ ma tɩɩma bɩrɩmɩ wɩbɔmɔ yosi rɛ, a fa yaa bisiŋ wɩya abee tahaa wɩya gyʋʋ kɩ mʋ. Lagɩlagɩ no, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ maga dɩ ma kaŋ ma tɩɩma bɩrɩmɩ Wɩɩsɩ yosi, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ ma wuwo kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ a ko yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When you were slaves of sin, you didn't have to please God.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ma fa aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ yosi hʋ, ma sɩya fa tuwo wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ yayɩ.

english_verse: But what good did you receive from the things you did? All you have to show for them is your shame, and they lead to death.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ ma fa aa yaa, bekiŋ tɔnɔ rɛ ma na ba tɩyaŋ? Lagɩlagɩ no, haŋ wɩya hʋ mɩɩgɩ yaa hɩɩsɩ rɛ ma lee. Wɩya no litenii buloŋ nɛ yaa sʋʋ.

english_verse: Now you have been set free from sin, and you are God's slaves. This will make you holy and will lead you to eternal life.
translation_verse: Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, Wɩɩsɩ laa ma ta rɛ wɩbɔmɔ nosi tɩyaŋ ma yaa ʋ yosi. Wɩɩ no tɔnɔ rɛ yaa ma aa sɩ yaa nɩtɩɩma Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ma kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: Sin pays off with death. But God's gift is eternal life given by Jesus Christ our Lord.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tuno rɛ yaa sʋʋ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ kɩŋ hʋ ʋ aa tɩŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a kpa tɩya ma rɛ yaa mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: That is how it is with you, my friends. You are now part of the body of Christ and are dead to the power of the Law. You are free to belong to Christ, who was raised to life so we could serve God.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, nyɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ kɩɩ ma mɛ lee, beewɩya Krisita aa sʋba gɛɛ daga anɩɩ ma mɛ kpʋʋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa bine tɩŋɩɩ ta rɛ gɛɛ. Lagɩlagɩ no, Krisita, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyise sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ tɩŋ ma, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ á wuwo kɩ yaa wɩya aa kaŋ tɔnɔ a tɩya Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: When we thought only of ourselves, the Law made us have sinful desires. It made every part of our bodies into slaves who are doomed to die.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ á teŋbii wɩyaabɔmɔ fa aa kaŋ dee á nyuu tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi fa aa saba biŋ fa leŋ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ yʋwaŋ kaŋ ma rɛ, a kaŋ á buloŋ mʋ we sʋʋ bʋwa tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But the Law no longer rules over us. We are like dead people, and it cannot have any power over us. Now we can serve God in a new way by obeying his Spirit, and not in the old way by obeying the written Law. The Battle with Sin
translation_verse: Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, Wɩɩsɩ laa ma ta wɩya hʋ fa aa kaŋ ma yaa yosi tɩyaŋ nɛ akuu á aa kpʋʋ mɩrɩsɩ no tɩŋɩɩ ta wɩya, dɩ á wuwo kɩ tɩŋ ŋmaŋfalɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa daga ma aŋ ta kɩ tɩŋ ŋmaŋbɩnɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi fa aa saba biŋ aa daga ma. Wɩɩsɩ Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ rɛ aa daga wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔŋ

english_verse: Does this mean that the Law is sinful? Certainly not! But if it had not been for the Law, I would not have known what sin is really like. For example, I would not have known what it means to want something that belongs to someone else, unless the Law had told me not to do this.
translation_verse: Wɩbee rɛ á yaŋ sɩ basɩ? Á sɩ wuwo baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ rɛ koo? Aayɩ, ba mʋra rɛ! Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ rɛ leŋ ŋ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔŋ. Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ rɛ fa bɩ baa dɩ á ta kpaa á hakɩllɩ we nala kɩna tɩyaŋ, ŋ fa bɩ sɩ gyɩma anɩɩ gɛɛ yaa wɩbɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: It was sin that used this command as a way of making me have all kinds of desires. But without the Law, sin is dead.
translation_verse: Amɛ mɩra no aa we doŋ wɩya, wɩbɔmɔ tɩŋ ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a mʋrɩ ŋ we, ŋ kpa ŋ hakɩla we kɩna iriŋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ mɩrɩsɩ rɛ fa tuwo, wɩbɔmɔ fa yaa wɩsʋʋnɩ rɛ.

english_verse: and I died. The very command that was supposed to bring life to me, instead brought death.
translation_verse: Ŋ naa anɩɩ mɩra hʋ fa aa maga dɩ ʋ tɩya ŋ mɩɩbol, ʋ rɛ mɩɩgɩ ko kana ŋ we sʋʋ bʋwaŋ.

english_verse: Sin used this command to trick me, and because of it I died.
translation_verse: Mɩra no aa we doŋ wɩya, wɩbɔmɔ tɩŋ ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a mʋrɩ kpʋ ŋ.

english_verse: We know that the Law is spiritual. But I am merely a human, and I have been sold as a slave to sin.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ. Amɛ ŋ kɛ yaa nihuwobiŋ aa sɩ maakyiye sʋba rɛ, a yaa wɩbɔmɔ yoŋ.

english_verse: In fact, I don't understand why I act the way I do. I don't do what I know is right. I do the things I hate.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ aa kana ŋ kɩ yaa, beewɩya ŋ bee yaa wɩya hʋ ŋ aa kyo dɩ ŋ kɩ yaa, amɛ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa bɩ kyo, ba aa rɛ ŋ kɩ yaa.

english_verse: Although I don't do what I know is right, I agree that the Law is good.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa yaa wɩya hʋ ŋ aa bɩ kyo nyɛ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ŋ laa di anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ kpaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: So I am not the one doing these evil things. The sin that lives in me is what does them.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ba aa kɩɩ nyɛ, ŋ tɩɩ daa aa yaa wɩya no, amɛ bɔŋlɩŋ hʋ aa we ŋ tɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ leŋ ŋ kɩ yaa gɛɛ.

english_verse: I know that my selfish desires won't let me do anything that is good. Even when I want to do right, I cannot.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ wɩwelii buloŋ tuwo ŋ nihuwobiŋlɩŋ tɩyaŋ. Beewɩya ŋ fa kyo dɩ ŋ kɩ yaa wɩweliye rɛ, aŋ bɩ wuwo kɩ yaa ba.

english_verse: And so, if I don't do what I know is right, I am no longer the one doing these evil things. The sin that lives in me is what does them.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaŋ aa yaa wɩya hʋ ŋ aa bɩ kyo, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ŋ daa aa yaa, amɛ bɔŋlɩŋ hʋ aa we ŋ tɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ leŋ ŋ kɩ yaa ba.

english_verse: The Law has shown me that something in me keeps me from doing what I know is right.
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ, ŋ naa anɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa ŋ nɛ nyɛ: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ yaa wɩwelii, wɩbɔŋ nɛ ŋ aa mɩɩgɩ kpa yaa.

english_verse: With my whole heart I agree with the Law of God.
translation_verse: Ŋ tɩya tɩyaŋ, ŋ kyo Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ rɛ, a kyo dɩ ŋ kɩ tɩŋ ba mɛ.

english_verse: But in every part of me I discover something fighting against my mind, and it makes me a prisoner of sin that controls everything I do.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ naa anɩɩ wɩdʋma rɛ mɩɩgɩ we ŋ tɩyaŋ, a kana ŋ kɩ tʋma, a kaŋ wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kyo ŋ hakɩla tɩyaŋ kɩ lʋga. Wɩɩ no leŋ ŋ yaa wɩɩ hʋ aa leŋ ŋ kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ yoŋ nɛ.

english_verse: What a miserable person I am. Who will rescue me from this body that is doomed to die?
translation_verse: Ŋ wɩya kaŋ sikii rɛ. Ŋ teŋbii wɩyaalɩya kana ŋ kɩ mʋ dɩ ba we sʋʋ bʋwaŋ nɛ. Aŋnɛ rɛ sɩ laa ŋ ta?

english_verse: Thank God! Jesus Christ will rescue me. So with my mind I serve the Law of God, although my selfish desires make me serve the law of sin.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ, beewɩya ʋ rɛ sɩ wuwo laa ŋ ta wɩɩ no tɩyaŋ, á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita nyubaanɩŋ. Wɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ ŋ aa wee rɛ nyɛ: Ŋ hakɩla tɩyaŋ ŋ kyo dɩ ŋ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ rɛ amɛ ŋ nihuwobiŋlɩŋ tɩyaŋ ŋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ yoŋ nɛ.

english_verse: If you belong to Christ Jesus, you won't be punished.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, Wɩɩsɩ bɩl bɩ sɩ kpa kyogisi tɩya nala hʋ bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit will give you life that comes from Christ Jesus and will set you free from sin and death.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, Yesu Krisita nyubaanɩŋ, Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ laa ma ta rɛ wɩbɔmɔ abee sʋʋ nosi tɩyaŋ, a tɩya ma mɩɩbol.

english_verse: The Law of Moses cannot do this, because our selfish desires make the Law weak. But God set you free when he sent his own Son to be like us sinners and to be a sacrifice for our sin. God used Christ's body to condemn sin.
translation_verse: Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ fa bɩ wuwo lɩɩ ma lɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya á nihuwobiŋlɩŋ bɩ leŋ á wuwo tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɩɩgɩ tɩŋ ŋmaŋdɩma rɛ a laa ma ta. Ŋmaŋdɩma no rɛ yaa ʋ aa taa ʋ tɩɩ biye ʋ kɩɩ á nihuwobisi aa yaa wɩbɔŋyaala, a ko tuu dʋnɩya a kpa ʋ tɩɩ mɩɩbol lɩɩ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ á wɩbɔmɔ wɩya, a tɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ a kpʋ dee hʋ wɩbɔmɔ fa aa kana á nyʋʋ tɩyaŋ a ta.

english_verse: He did this, so that we would do what the Law commands by obeying the Spirit instead of our own desires.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ yaa wɩɩ no rɛ dɩ á nala hʋ aa tɩŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ kyɛrɩ á mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ, aŋ bee tɩŋ á teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ wuwo tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ ba bʋwaŋ, beewɩya ba yaa wɩya aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: If our minds are ruled by our desires, we will die. But if our minds are ruled by the Spirit, we will have life and peace.
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ kpaa á nyuu we á teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ, wɩɩ hʋ á aa sɩ na lɩɩ doŋ nɛ yaa sʋʋ. Amɛ dɩ á maa rɛ kpaa á nyuu we Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ á kaŋ mɩɩbol a hɔŋ abee laaŋfɩya.

english_verse: If we follow our desires, we cannot please God.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa tɩŋ ba teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ, ba bɩ sɩ wuwo fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ.

english_verse: You are no longer ruled by your desires, but by God's Spirit, who lives in you. People who don't have the Spirit of Christ in them don't belong to him.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ Krisita Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ ko we ma tɩyaŋ, ma kɛ bee tɩŋ ma teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ. Ma aa tɩŋ wɩya hʋ Krisita Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa daga ma rɛ. Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ tuwo nal buloŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ yaa Krisita nal.

english_verse: But Christ lives in you. So you are alive because God has accepted you, even though your bodies must die because of your sins.
translation_verse: Dɩ Krisita rɛ we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, abee ma teŋbiye kɛ ha aa sɩ sʋba akuu ma wɩbɔmɔ wɩya buloŋ mɛ, ka Wiyesi Welii hʋ leŋ ma kaŋ mɩɩbol lɛ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ma yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma rɛ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Yet God raised Jesus to life! God's Spirit now lives in you, and he will raise you to life by his Spirit.
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ, nal hʋ aa kyisi Yesu sʋʋ tɩyaŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ we ma tɩyaŋ, ʋ sɩ tɩŋa haŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩyaŋ, a kyisi ma teŋbiye hʋ aa sɩ sʋba mɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a leŋ dɩ ma kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: If you do, you will die. But you will live, if by the help of God's Spirit you say “No” to your desires.
translation_verse: Beewɩya dɩ mamaa rɛ aa tɩŋ ma teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ, ma sɩ sʋba. Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ leŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ kpʋ ma teŋbii wɩyaabɔmɔ ta, ka dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋa ʋ nyʋwa ma sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: Only those people who are led by God's Spirit are his children.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, nala hʋ buloŋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ nyʋwa, ba aa rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi tɩɩ.

english_verse: God's Spirit makes us sure that we are his children.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ leŋ á gyɩma á hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ á kɔnɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi rɛ.

english_verse: His Spirit lets us know that together with Christ we will be given what God has promised. We will also share in the glory of Christ, because we have suffered with him. A Wonderful Future for God's People
translation_verse: Á aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi nyɛ, á bee Krisita buloŋ nɛ sɩ tɩŋ kɩna hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa biŋ gbala ʋ nala. Dɩ ámaa rɛ na tʋwara anɩɩ Krisita aa naa tʋwara gɛɛ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ á mɛ yaa gaŋdaala anɩɩ ʋ aa leŋ Krisita yaa gaŋdaal gɛɛ. Gaŋdarɩ hʋ á aa sɩ maakyiye kana

english_verse: I am sure what we are suffering now cannot compare with the glory that will be shown to us.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ tʋwara hʋ á aa na gyɩnaŋ bɩ yaa kɩŋ, dɩ ámaa rɛ kpa ʋ mʋ magɩsɩ gaŋdarɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ á aa sɩ maakyiye leŋ dɩ á na.

english_verse: In fact, all creation is eagerly waiting for God to show who his children are.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kɩtaalɩya buloŋ aa gyegili Wɩɩsɩ rɛ abee teŋkyel dɩ ʋ daga nala hʋ aa yaa ʋ biisi.

english_verse: that creation would be set free from decay and would share in the glorious freedom of his children.
translation_verse: anɩɩ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa dʋnɩya kɩna buloŋ ta sʋʋ bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ ba aa we, a leŋ dɩ ba tɩŋ ba tɩɩ, a yaa gaŋdaala anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ biisi.

english_verse: We know that all creation is still groaning and is in pain, like a woman about to give birth.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ dʋnɩya kɩna buloŋ aa na tʋwara rɛ, a kɩ kyama a kaŋ kɩ ko gyɩnaŋ, anɩɩ haaŋ aa kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ lʋla a kɩ kyama gɛɛ.

english_verse: The Spirit makes us sure about what we will be in the future. But now we groan silently, while we wait for God to show that we are his children. This means that our bodies will also be set free.
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya kɩna dʋŋ daa, amɛ á nala hʋ aa kaŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ buŋbuŋ bɔnyɛ kɩŋ ʋ aa kpaa tɩya ma, á mɛ aa kyama rɛ á tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, aŋ kɩ gyegili abee teŋkyel saŋa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ laa ma ta á teŋbii tʋwara tɩyaŋ a leŋ á yaa ʋ biisi.

english_verse: And this hope is what saves us. But if we already have what we hope for, there is no need to keep on hoping.
translation_verse: Á aa kaŋ bayɩyɛla no Wɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ tɩŋ ʋ laa ma ta. Amɛ dɩ ámaa rɛ ko na wɩɩ hʋ wɩya á aa yɩyɛlɩ, ʋ wɩya bɩl bɩ yaa bayɩyɛla. Beewɩya, nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ kaŋ kɩŋ, aŋ ha bɩl kɩ yɩyɛlɩ ʋ wɩya.

english_verse: However, we hope for something we have not yet seen, and we patiently wait for it.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ á aa yɩyɛlɩ kɩna hʋ á ha aa bɩ naa wɩya, á aa kaŋ kenyiri rɛ, a kɩ gyegili.

english_verse: In certain ways we are weak, but the Spirit is here to help us. For example, when we don't know what to pray for, the Spirit prays for us in ways that cannot be put into words.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ mɛ aa kɩ pɛ á tɩyaŋ, beewɩya á bɩ kaŋ dee á aa sɩ wuwo pɛ á tɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Á bɩ gyɩŋ gɛɛ aa maga dɩ á kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ. Amɛ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩɩ aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ abee wɩhuŋsiye ba aa bɩ sɩ wuwo kaŋ nyʋwa basɩ.

english_verse: All of our thoughts are known to God. He can understand what is in the mind of the Spirit, as the Spirit prays for God's people.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa na nihuwobiŋ tɩya buloŋ nɛ, a gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩbɩɩna mɛ aa kana. Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ʋ nala gɛɛ.

english_verse: We know that God is always at work for the good of everyone who loves him. They are the ones God has chosen for his purpose,
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ aa leŋ wɩya buloŋ aa yaa mʋ pɛ dɔmɔŋ nɛ, a yaa wɩwelii a tɩya nala hʋ aa kyo ʋ. Ba aa rɛ yaa nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa yɩra ʋ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: and he has always known who his chosen ones would be. He had decided to let them become like his own Son, so his Son would be the first of many children.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ foŋ aa laa sɩya lɩɩ, ʋ leŋ ba lɩɩ ba dʋŋ nɛ, dɩ ʋ ko kaŋ ba bɩrɩmɩ dɩ ba kɩɩ ʋ tɩɩ Biye, aŋ leŋ dɩ ʋ Biye hʋ yaa ʋ biihɩyawʋ ba buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: What can we say about all this? If God is on our side, can anyone be against us?
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ tɩyaŋ, wɩbee rɛ á yaŋ sɩ basɩ? Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ sɩŋ á hal, kɩbee rɛ sɩ wuwo di dee á nyuu tɩyaŋ?

english_verse: God did not keep back his own Son, but he gave him for us. If God did this, won't he freely give us everything else?
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ tuwo, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ bɩ vɔŋ ma ʋ tɩɩ Biye, aŋ kpa ʋ tɩya nala, ba kpʋ ʋ á buloŋ wɩya. Ʋ aa wuwo kpa ʋ tɩɩ biye tɩya ma nyɛ, bekiŋ nɛ yaŋ bɩl we doŋ ʋ aa bɩ sɩ wuwo kpa pɛ tɩya ma ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ?

english_verse: If God says his chosen ones are acceptable to him, can anyone bring charges against them?
translation_verse: Kɩbee rɛ yaŋ bɩl sɩ kpa kyogisi tɩya nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya? Nal buloŋ tuwo, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ leŋ ba yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Or can anyone condemn them? No indeed! Christ died and was raised to life, and now he is at God's right side, speaking to him for us.
translation_verse: Kɩbee rɛ sɩ kpa kyogisi tɩya Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ ʋ aa lɩya? Nal buloŋ tuwo. Yesu Krisita mɛ daa, beewɩya ʋ tɩɩ sʋba rɛ á wɩya. Ɛɛ dʋŋ mɛ daa. Wɩɩsɩ gba kyisi rɛ ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ kaŋ mɩɩbol a hɔŋ Wɩɩsɩ noduu logiŋ, a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma.

english_verse: Can anything separate us from the love of Christ? Can trouble, suffering, and hard times, or hunger and nakedness, or danger and death?
translation_verse: Bekiŋ nɛ yaŋ sɩ kaŋ ma tɔrɩ Krisita kyori tɩyaŋ? Wahala koo wɩgyʋʋlɩya, koo dɔgɩsɩɩ, koo losi, koo nyaa, koo wɩsɩŋgbalɩya, koo sʋʋ? Wɩɩ buloŋ tuwo.

english_verse: It is exactly as the Scriptures say, “For you we face death all day long. We are like sheep on their way to be butchered.”
translation_verse: Ba sabɩ wɩɩ no wɩya Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa: “Akuu ɩ wɩya, á aa we sʋʋ bʋwaŋ nɛ saŋa buloŋ. Ba kpa ma á kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ piyese ba aa kyɛ dɩ ba kpʋ.”

english_verse: In everything we have won more than a victory because of Christ who loves us.
translation_verse: Abee gɛɛ buloŋ, dɩ wɩya no kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ ko gyʋʋ ma, á aa wuwo yuwo lɩɩ rɛ, nal hʋ aa kyo ma nyubaanɩŋ.

english_verse: I am a follower of Christ, and the Holy Spirit is a witness to my conscience. So I tell the truth and I am not lying when I say
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ kɩ basɩ. Ŋ bee nyɩya wɩya, beewɩya ŋ yaa Krisita nal lɛ. Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa laa ŋ hakɩla tɩŋa yaa ŋ daŋsɩya rɛ anɩɩ ŋ bee nyɩya wɩya ŋ aa baa dɩ

english_verse: my heart is broken and I am in great sorrow.
translation_verse: ŋ tɩya kyogo rɛ kɩŋkaŋ ŋ tɩɩ nala Gyuuma wɩya. Ba wɩya aa dɔmɩ-ŋ nɛ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: I would gladly be placed under God's curse and be separated from Christ for the good of my own people.
translation_verse: Ŋ fa sɩ kyo, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ fa kaabɩ tɩya ŋ, a kana ŋ bee Krisita porigi dɔmɔŋ, ŋ nala tɩɩ wɩya.

english_verse: They are the descendants of Israel, and they are also God's chosen people. God showed them his glory. He made agreements with them and gave them his Law. The temple is theirs and so are the promises that God made to them.
translation_verse: Nala no rɛ yaa Iziral tɩmma, nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, a kaŋ ba yaa ʋ biisi, aŋ leŋ ba na ʋ gaŋdarɩ. Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ wee nyʋʋsɩ tɩya ba rɛ, a leŋ Moosi sabɩ ʋ mɩrɩsɩ biŋ tɩya ba dɩ ba kɩ tɩŋa, a daga ba Wɩɩsɩ kyʋwalɩɩ tɩɩ aŋ ha we nyʋwa dɩ ʋ sɩ yaa wɩya yʋga tɩya ba.

english_verse: They have those famous ancestors, who were also the ancestors of the Christ. I pray that God, who rules over all, will be praised forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Ba aa rɛ yaa á naabaala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya doho nala. Krisita nihuwobiŋlɩŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ yaa ba doho nal lɛ. Ma leŋ dɩ á kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ beewɩya ʋ rɛ aa deŋ kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: It cannot be said that God broke his promise. After all, not all of the people of Israel are the true people of God.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa a baa dɩ ʋ sɩ yaa tɩya Iziral tɩmma, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ʋ yaa lɔlɔ rɛ, beewɩya Iziral doho nala buloŋ daa yaa Wɩɩsɩ nala tɩɩ.

english_verse: In fact, when God made the promise to Abraham, he meant only Abraham's descendants by his son Isaac. God was talking only about Isaac when he promised
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no daga anɩɩ biisi hʋ Abɩraham aa lʋla buloŋ daa yaa Wɩɩsɩ nala, see biisi hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa anɩɩ Abɩraham sɩ lʋla, ba dʋŋ nɛ ʋ leŋ ba yaa Abɩraham doho nala tɩɩ.

english_verse: Don't forget what happened to the twin sons of Isaac and Rebekah.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no mɛ dʋŋ daa. Boyoŋbiisi hʋ balɩya Ribeeka gyɩ aa lʋla, ba buloŋ balɩya kuwo rɛ gyɩ yaa á naabaa Azɩkɩ.

english_verse: Even before they were born or had done anything good or bad, the Lord told Rebekah that her older son would serve the younger one. The Lord said this to show he makes his own choices and it wasn't because of anything either of them had done.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ daga anɩɩ ʋ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ sɩ lɩɩ ʋ nala. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ gyɩ basɩ tɩya Ribeeka a baa “Boyoŋbiisi hʋ ɩ aa sɩ lʋla, kɩhɩyawʋ hʋ sɩ tʋma kɩ tɩya haŋbiye hʋ.” Ʋ gyɩ basɩ wɩɩ no rɛ ka ba gyɩ na lʋl biisi hʋ, dɩ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ha bɩ yaa wɩwelii koo wɩbɔŋ. Ɛɛ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ aa lɩɩ ʋ nala, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ba wɩyaaweliye wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ aa lɩɩ ba.

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say that the Lord liked Jacob more than Esau.
translation_verse: Ba bɩl sabɩ wɩɩ no tɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa: “Ŋ lɩɩ Gyeekɔbɩ rɛ, aŋ vɩya Isawʋ ta.”

english_verse: Everything then depends on God's mercy and not on what people want or do.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ lɩɩ nal, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ʋ tɩɩna wɩkyɛɛlɩya koo ʋ wɩyaalɩya rɛ tɩŋ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa fá ʋ sikii rɛ tɩŋ,

english_verse: In the Scriptures the Lord says to the king of Egypt, “I let you become king, so that I could show you my power and be praised by all people on earth.”
translation_verse: beewɩya ba sabɩ Igyipiti tɩmma kuwori wɩya Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ ŋ leŋ ɩ dɩ koro rɛ nyɛ: Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ tɩŋa ɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ a daga ŋ dee, dɩ ba yɩrɩ ŋ feŋ dʋnɩya buloŋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Everything depends on what God decides to do, and he can either have pity on people or make them stubborn. God's Anger and Mercy
translation_verse: Nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ yaŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ fá ba sikii, ʋ aa fá ba sikii rɛ. Nala hʋ mɛ ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ leŋ ba bembiye deye, ʋ aa leŋ ba bembiye deye rɛ.

english_verse: Someone may ask, “How can God blame us, if he makes us behave in the way he wants us to?”
translation_verse: Ma kɩdɩgɩ sɩ wuwo pɩyɛsɩ a baa, “Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ aa yaa nyɛ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sɩ yaa a bɩl kpa kyogisi kɩ tɩya nala? Dɩ kɩbee rɛ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ ta yaa?”

english_verse: But, my friend, I ask, “Who do you think you are to question God? Does the clay have the right to ask the potter why he shaped it the way he did?
translation_verse: Kɩbee rɛ yaa nihuwobiŋ, ɩ aa sɩ wuwo laa wɩya basɩ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ? Vii bɩ sɩ wuwo pɩyɛsɩ nal hʋ aa mɔ ʋ a baa, “Bee rɛ tɩŋ ɩ mɔ ŋ, ŋ kɩɩ nyɛ?”

english_verse: Doesn't a potter have the right to make a fancy bowl and a plain bowl out of the same lump of clay?”
translation_verse: Viimɔɔl kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ ʋ aa sɩ lɔgɔ kyʋl a mɔ viiweliye, a kpa biŋ pɔ kyɛbala, aŋ bɩl lɔgɔ haŋ kyʋl hʋ tɩɩ a mɔ viini mɛ a kaŋ kɩ we kɩna kyɛɛ buloŋ. Beewɩya viimɔɔl aa kyo gɛɛ rɛ ʋ kɩɩ yaa.

english_verse: He did this by showing how glorious he is when he has pity on the people he has chosen to share in his glory.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ fáá á nala hʋ sikii ʋ aa kyɛ ʋ fá rɛ, beewɩya ámaa rɛ ʋ aa leŋ á yaa siri pɔ dɩ á na ʋ gaŋdarɩ.

english_verse: just as the Lord says in the book of Hosea, “Although they are not my people, I will make them my people. I will treat with love those nations that have never been loved.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba basɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Hoziya aa saba tɩyaŋ, “Nala hʋ fa aa bɩ yaa ŋ nala, ŋ sɩ kaŋ ba kɩ yɩrɩ ŋ nala. Nala hʋ mɛ ŋ fa aa bɩ kyo, ŋ sɩ kaŋ ba yɩrɩ ŋ nɩkyooliye.

english_verse: “Once they were told, ‘You are not my people.’ But in that very place they will be called children of the living God.”
translation_verse: Lee hʋ tɩɩ tɩyaŋ ba fa aa basɩ tɩya nala anɩɩ ba bɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ nala, doŋ tɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba sɩ yɩrɩ ba Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa weye biisi.”

english_verse: And this is what the prophet Isaiah said about the people of Israel, “The people of Israel are as many as the grains of sand along the beach. But only a few who are left will be saved.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Azaaya mɛ gyɩ heeli Iziral tɩmma wɩya rɛ a baa, “Dɩ Iziral tɩmma kyo ba yʋga kɩŋkaŋ anɩɩ mpʋwɔnʋʋ nyʋwa bumbugulo mɛ, ba tɩyaŋ nala baŋmana dʋŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa ta,

english_verse: The Lord will be quick and sure to do on earth what he has warned he will do.”
translation_verse: beewɩya á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ ka dɩ ʋ di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya dɩgɩ dʋŋ.

english_verse: Isaiah also said, “If the Lord All-Powerful had not spared some of our descendants, we would have been destroyed like the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah.” Israel and the Good News
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Azaaya gyɩ laa sɩya basɩ nyɛ wɩya rɛ a baa, “Dɩ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, dee buloŋ tɩɩna rɛ fa bɩ leŋ á naabaa doho nala baŋmana, á buloŋ nɛ fa sɩ sʋba, anɩɩ Sodɔm abee Gomora nala buloŋ gyɩ aa sʋba gɛɛ.”

english_verse: What does all of this mean? It means that the Gentiles were not trying to be acceptable to God, but they found that he would accept them if they had faith.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, á sɩ baa dɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma fa bee lʋga dɩ ba yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ba aa rɛ mɩɩgɩ ko yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ akuu ba aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di wɩya.

english_verse: It also means that the people of Israel were not acceptable to God. And why not? It was because they were trying to be acceptable by obeying the Law instead of by having faith in God. The people of Israel fell over the stone that makes people stumble,
translation_verse: Bee rɛ tɩŋ ba bɩ wuwo yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma? Ba bɩ wuwo yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma, beewɩya ba bɩ bɩɩna anɩɩ ba Wɩɩsɩ laadii rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ba yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma, aŋ kɩ lʋga dɩ ba tɩŋ ba tɩɩ wɩyaalɩya tɩyaŋ a yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ba ŋmaa naaŋ bʋyɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ nala aa ŋmaa naasɩ kɩ tele rɛ.

english_verse: just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a stone to make people stumble and fall. But those who have faith in that one will never be disappointed.”
translation_verse: Ba sabɩ bʋyɩ no wɩya Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Deŋ na, ŋ kpaa bʋyɩ biŋ Zaayɔŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, bʋyɩ no rɛ nala sɩ ŋmaa, a garɩgɩ, bʋyɩ no rɛ nala sɩ ŋmaa, a tele. Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa nal hʋ aa yaa bʋyɩ no wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ sɩ maakyiye dɩ hɩɩsɩ.”

english_verse: Dear friends, my greatest wish and my prayer to God is for the people of Israel to be saved.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ bembii wɩkyɛɛlɩɩ abee ŋ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ rɛ yaa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa ŋ tɩɩ nala Gyuuma ta.

english_verse: But Christ makes the Law no longer necessary for those who become acceptable to God by faith. Anyone Can Be Saved
translation_verse: Krisita koyi leŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ buloŋ su ba bʋʋsɩ rɛ, a daga anɩɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ bɩl bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ. Ɛɛ wɩya, nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna rɛ aa kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Moses said a person could become acceptable to God by obeying the Law. He did this when he wrote, “If you want to live, you must do all the Law commands.”
translation_verse: Moosi fa sabɩ ɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa leŋ nala yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, akuu ba aa tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ ʋ aa bine wɩya rɛ a baa, “Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ wuwo tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ no buloŋ kyurrr, ʋ tɩɩna sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol.”

english_verse: But people whose faith makes them acceptable to God will never ask, “Who will go up to heaven to bring Christ down?”
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ laa di anɩɩ ɩ Krisita laadii rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ɩ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ ɩ bɩl bɩ sɩ pɩyɛsɩ a baa, “Kɩbee rɛ sɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩbee a kaŋ Krisita ko tuu”?

english_verse: Neither will they ask, “Who will go down into the world of the dead to raise him to life?”
translation_verse: “Koo dɩ kɩbee rɛ sɩ tuu taŋha memii a kyisi Krisita ko gyɩŋ?”

english_verse: All who are acceptable because of their faith simply say, “The message is as near as your mouth or your heart.” And this is the same message we preach about faith.
translation_verse: Amɛ nyɛ rɛ ba basɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a mʋ kɩ tile nala hʋ aa yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ akuu ba aa laa Krisita di wɩya. Ba baa, “Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ kpaga ma rɛ. Ba we ma nyʋʋsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ mɛ. Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ laadii wɩya hʋ á aa basɩ.

english_verse: So you will be saved, if you honestly say, “Jesus is Lord,” and if you believe with all your heart that God raised him from death.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ suri ɩ nyʋwa nala sɩya tɩyaŋ a basɩ anɩɩ Yesu rɛ yaa ɩ Tɩɩna, a laa di ɩ tɩya tɩyaŋ mɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kyisi ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa ɩ ta.

english_verse: The Scriptures say no one who has faith will be disappointed,
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ, nyɛ rɛ ba basɩ: ‘Nal kɛ buloŋ aa laa Krisita wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ sɩ maakyiye dɩ hɩɩsɩ.’

english_verse: no matter if that person is a Jew or a Gentile. There is only one Lord, and he is generous to everyone who asks for his help.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ tɩɩna yaa Gyuu koo dɩ ʋ bɩ yaa Gyuu, ba buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ lee. Wɩɩsɩ yaa nal buloŋ Tɩɩna rɛ. Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ŋmaa wulo tɩya ʋ, ʋ sɩ pɛ ʋ tɩɩna tɩyaŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: And how can anyone tell them without being sent by the Lord? The Scriptures say it is a beautiful sight to see even the feet of someone coming to preach the good news.
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ bɩ tɩŋ nala dɩ ba mʋ basɩ ʋ wɩya, ɛɛ rɛ ba sɩ yaa a basɩ ʋ wɩya? Ba saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Nala hʋ aa ko dɩ ba basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ, ba koyi yaa wɩwelii rɛ.”

english_verse: Yet not everyone has believed the message. For example, the prophet Isaiah asked, “Lord, has anyone believed what we said?”
translation_verse: Amɛ nala hʋ aa nɩɩ wɩweliye hʋ, ba buloŋ daa laa ba di. Azaaya fa bɩl basɩ wɩɩ no wɩya rɛ a baa, “Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, kɩbee rɛ we doŋ a laa wɩya hʋ á aa basɩ tɩya ba di?”

english_verse: But am I saying that the people of Israel did not hear? No, I am not! The Scriptures say, “The message was told everywhere on earth. It was announced all over the world.”
translation_verse: Amɛ ma yaŋ leŋ dɩ ŋ pɩyɛsɩ wɩɩ no: Ʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ anɩɩ nala no bɩ nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ? Ba nɩɩ ba rɛ. Ba sabɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Wɩya no pele dʋnɩya logiŋ buloŋ nɛ. Dʋnɩya nal buloŋ nɛ nɩɩ wɩya no.”

english_verse: Did the people of Israel understand or not? Moses answered this question when he told that the Lord had said, “I will make Israel jealous of people who are a nation of nobodies. I will make them angry with people who don't understand a thing.”
translation_verse: Ma yaŋ leŋ dɩ ŋ bɩl pɩyɛsɩ wɩɩ no: “Iziral tɩmma aa nɩɩ wɩya hʋ, ba bɩ gyɩŋ ba memii?” Moosi rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa laa sɩya lɩɩ wɩɩ no sɩɩ tɩya ma. Ʋ baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa, “Ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma tɩsɩ kɩ hɔllɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma. Ŋ bɩl sɩ leŋ dɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ wɩya leŋ dɩ ma baaŋ kɩ sii.

english_verse: Isaiah was fearless enough to tell that the Lord had said, “I was found by people who were not looking for me. I appeared to the ones who were not asking about me.”
translation_verse: Azaaya kɛ gyɩ bɩ fáá kambɩŋ wɩɩ no basɩɩ tɩyaŋ ʋ aa baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa, “Nala hʋ aa bɩ deŋ kɩ kyɛ ŋ, ba aa rɛ naa ŋ. Nala hʋ mɛ aa bee pɩyɛsɩ ŋ wɩya, ba aa rɛ ŋ kpa ŋ tɩɩ daga.”

english_verse: And Isaiah said about the people of Israel, “All day long the Lord has reached out to people who are stubborn and refuse to obey.”
translation_verse: Amɛ nyɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ Iziral tɩmma wɩya, a baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa, “Ŋ kyaga ŋ nosi rɛ saŋa buloŋ dɩ ŋ laa ba we, amɛ ba yaa kelɩŋbaaŋtɩmma rɛ, a bɩ yaa siri dɩ ba nɩɩ ŋ nyʋwa.”

english_verse: Am I saying that God has turned his back on his people? Certainly not! I am one of the people of Israel, and I myself am a descendant of Abraham from the tribe of Benjamin.
translation_verse: Ba yaŋ aa maga nyɛ, ma leŋ dɩ ŋ pɩyɛsɩ wɩɩ no: Wɩɩsɩ vɩya ʋ tɩɩ nala hʋ ta rɛ koo? Aayɩ ʋ bɩ vɩya ba ta, beewɩya ŋ mɛ tɩɩ yaa Iziral tɩɩna rɛ, a yaa Abɩraham doho nal, a lɩɩ Bɛngyamin bekyigi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God did not turn his back on his chosen people. Don't you remember reading in the Scriptures how Elijah complained to God about the people of Israel?
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ bɩ vɩya ʋ nala hʋ ʋ aa lɩya a lɩɩ dʋnɩya piili tɩyaŋ buloŋ ta. Ma bee liisi Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Ɛlaagya wɩya hʋ ba aa sabɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ? Ba saba anɩɩ Ɛlaagya gyɩ basɩ Iziral tɩmma wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ wɩya tɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ,

english_verse: He said, “Lord, they killed your prophets and destroyed your altars. I am the only one left, and now they want to kill me.”
translation_verse: a baa, “Ŋ Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, deŋ na, ba kpʋʋ ɩ tɩŋdaala buloŋ nɛ, a ŋmaa kogini hʋ mɛ buloŋ ba aa saa tɩya ɩ, a lo. Ŋ dʋŋ nɛ kaa, ba kɩ lʋga dɩ ba kpʋ ŋ mɛ.”

english_verse: This means that only a chosen few of the people of Israel found what all of them were searching for. And the rest of them were stubborn,
translation_verse: Wɩbee rɛ á yaŋ sɩ basɩ? Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, wɩɩ hʋ Iziral tɩmma fa aa hiine kɩ kyɛ, ba bɩ na ʋ. Amɛ nala baŋmana hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya rɛ na ʋ. Nikaalɩya hʋ kɛ tɔɔ ba dɩgɩna rɛ, a vɩya Wɩɩsɩ yɩra hʋ.

english_verse: It is the same way now. God treated the people of Israel with undeserved grace, and so a few of them are still his followers.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ kɩɩ gyɩnaŋ mɛ. Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ nala baŋmana rɛ ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ, ba yaa ʋ nala.

english_verse: This happened because of God's undeserved kindness and not because of anything they have done. It could not have happened except for God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa lɩɩ ba gɛɛ, ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ lɩɩ ba, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ba wɩyaalɩya rɛ tɩŋ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ fa kuu nala wɩyaalɩya ba aa yaa wɩya a kɩ lɩɩ ba, ɛɛ kɛ, Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ hʋ fa bɩ yaa bɔnyɛ tɩɩ.

english_verse: just as the Scriptures say, “God made them so stupid that their eyes are blind, and their ears are still deaf.”
translation_verse: Ba basɩ wɩɩ no rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ba hakɩllɩ sʋba rɛ, ba bɩ wuwo kɩ nɩɩ wɩya memiye. Ɛɛwɩya, abee gyɩnaŋ, ba hakɩllɩ bee na, ba dɩgɩna mɛ bee nɩɩ wɩya.”

english_verse: Then David said, “Turn their meals into bait for a trap, so that they will stumble and be given what they deserve.
translation_verse: Kuwori Deviti mɛ gyɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ rɛ a baa, “Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ ba tenni aa ko fɩyɛlɩ ba ko laŋŋɩ a kɩ di kɩna gɛɛ, leŋ dɩ ba teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ bɩrɩgɩ tɩkyogi ba tɩyaŋ, Leŋ dɩ ba na tʋwara tuŋ ba wɩbɔmɔ hʋ kyɩŋ.

english_verse: Blindfold their eyes! Don't let them see. Bend their backs beneath a burden that will never be lifted.” Gentiles Will Be Saved
translation_verse: Leŋ dɩ ba sɩya tɔ dɩ ba ŋmaa naaŋ, leŋ dɩ wɩya nyagɩ ba, dɩ ba na tʋwara kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.”

english_verse: Do I mean that the people of Israel fell, never to get up again? Certainly not! Their failure made it possible for the Gentiles to be saved, and this will make the people of Israel jealous.
translation_verse: Ma yaŋ leŋ dɩ ŋ pɩyɛsɩ wɩɩ no: Iziral tɩmma gyɩ ŋmaa naaŋ tele dɩ ta bɩl wuwo sii rɛ koo? Aayɩ ba gyɩ bɩl siye rɛ. Amɛ Gyuuma wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ rɛ suri ŋmanɩɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma dɩ ba mɛ na Wɩɩsɩ laatayɩ. Wɩɩsɩ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ Gyuuma tɩsɩ kɩ hɔllɩ ba.

english_verse: I am now speaking to you Gentiles, and as long as I am an apostle to you, I will take pride in my work.
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ, ma nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma rɛ ŋ basɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya. Ŋ aa yaa Krisita kpambɩya hʋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma wɩya, ŋ kpaa tʋma no ba yaa sɩfɩyaŋ tʋma rɛ a tɩya ŋ.

english_verse: I hope in this way to make some of my own people jealous enough to be saved.
translation_verse: Kapuwo, ŋ tʋma no tʋmɩɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ŋ naabalɩya Gyuuma tɩsɩ kɩ hɔllɩ ma, dɩ gɛɛ wuwo leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa ba badɔmɔŋ ta.

english_verse: When Israel rejected God, the rest of the people in the world were able to turn to him. So when God makes friends with Israel, it will be like bringing the dead back to life.
translation_verse: Gyuuma aa vɩya Wɩɩsɩ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ dʋnɩya nala nɩkaalɩya buloŋ bee Wɩɩsɩ mɩɩgɩ sʋma. Dɩ Gyuuma rɛ yaŋ bɩl ko laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di, ɛɛ rɛ yaŋ ʋ sɩ kɩɩ? Ʋ sɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nala aa sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If part of a batch of dough is made holy by being offered to God, then all of the dough is holy. If the roots of a tree are holy, the rest of the tree is holy too.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ kaŋ kɩŋ, a laa sɩya kpa ʋ mʋhʋ a tɩya Wɩɩsɩ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ kɩŋ hʋ buloŋ bɩrɩmɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ dɩ tɩya naaliliye rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ kɩŋ, tɩya hʋ buloŋ aa yaa ʋ kɩŋ nɛ.

english_verse: You Gentiles are like branches of a wild olive tree made to be part of a cultivated olive tree. You have taken the place of some branches that were cut away from it. And because of this, you enjoy the blessings that come from being part of that cultivated tree.
translation_verse: Gyuuma kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ Olivi tɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa pɔɔ. Nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ɔhɔ Olivi tɩya. Lagɩlagɩ no ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa kere Olivi tɩya no ʋ aa pɔɔ naasɩ badɔmɔŋ ta, aŋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ kere ɔhɔ Olivi tɩya hʋ naasɩ a kaŋ ko kyosi ʋ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, lagɩlagɩ no, ma nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma mɛ pɛɛ kaŋ dee hʋ tɩya hʋ aa kana rɛ, a pɛ kɩ nyʋwa nɩɩ hʋ mɛ aa lɩɩ tɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But don't think you are better than the branches that were cut away. Just remember you are not supporting the roots of this tree. Its roots are supporting you.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta kɩ daga ma tɩɩ anɩɩ ma kpɩya tɩɩnaasɩ hʋ ba aa kere ta hʋ rɛ. Ʋ maga dɩ ma gyɩma anɩɩ tɩya hʋ naasɩ daa kaŋ tɩya hʋ naaliliye sɩgɩ, amɛ tɩya hʋ naaliliye rɛ kaŋ tɩya hʋ naasɩ sɩgɩ.

english_verse: Maybe you think those branches were cut away, so you could be put in their place.
translation_verse: Ma sɩ wuwo baa dɩ ba keri tɩya hʋ naasɩ ta rɛ, aŋ kpa ma mal ba lee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: That's true enough. But they were cut away because they did not have faith, and you are where you are because you do have faith. So don't be proud, but be afraid.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, Wɩɩsɩ keri Gyuuma ta akuu ba aa bɩ laa ʋ di wɩya rɛ. Amɛ ma nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma kɛ, ma aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di dʋŋ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ma sɩŋ lee hʋ ma aa sɩna. Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta kɩ daga ma tɩɩ, ka dɩ ma gyɩŋ tɩya ma tɩɩ weliŋ, beewɩya dɩ

english_verse: Now you see both how kind and how hard God can be. He was hard on those who fell, but he was kind to you. And he will keep on being kind to you, if you keep on trusting in his kindness. Otherwise, you will be cut away too.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no tɩyaŋ, á naa gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa kaŋ bɔnyɛ rɛ, aŋ bɩl na gɛɛ ʋ sarɩya mɛ aa deye. Ʋ sarɩya deye tɩya nala hʋ aa bee tɩŋa ʋ nyʋwa rɛ. Amɛ, dɩ mamaa rɛ laa nyʋwa a kɩ tɩŋa ʋ bɔnyɛ hʋ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ ma aa piile gɛɛ, ʋ sɩ daga ma ʋ bɔnyɛ. Dɩ gɛɛ daa, ʋ sɩ keri ma mɛ ta.

english_verse: If those other branches will start having faith, they will be made a part of that tree again. God has the power to put them back.
translation_verse: Dɩ Gyuuma rɛ paalɩ mɩɩgɩ ko kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ bɩl kaŋ ba mal Olivi tɩya hʋ ʋ aa pɔɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ dee ʋ aa sɩ wuwo yaa gɛɛ rɛ.

english_verse: After all, it wasn't natural for branches to be cut from a wild olive tree and to be made part of a cultivated olive tree. So it is much more likely that God will join the natural branches back to the cultivated olive tree. The People of Israel Will Be Brought Back
translation_verse: Ma nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa tɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa pɔɔ naasɩ aŋ yaa ɔhɔ Olivi tɩya hʋ naasɩ, Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ ma rɛ ko kyosi tɩya hʋ ʋ aa pɔɔ tɩyaŋ, abee ba aa bee yaa gɛɛ buloŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, ʋ bɩ sɩ yaa wɩduwo tɩya Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ʋ bɩl mɩɩgɩ paa naasɩ hʋ ʋ aa kere ta, a ko mal ba lee. Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa Iziral tɩmma buloŋ mɛ ta

english_verse: My friends, I don't want you Gentiles to be too proud of yourselves. So I will explain the mystery of what has happened to the people of Israel. Some of them have become stubborn, and they will stay like that until the complete number of you Gentiles has come in.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, wɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ we doŋ a yaa wɩfaŋɩɩ, ŋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩma ʋ. Wɩɩ no sɩ leŋ dɩ ma ta kɩ daga ma tɩɩ. Wɩɩ hʋ rɛ nyɛ: Iziral tɩmma aa vɩya Wɩɩsɩ laadii gɛɛ, ba bɩ sɩ kaŋ gɛɛ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ. Amɛ dɩ saŋa hʋ rɛ ko pele, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa yɩrɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma ko pele ba nyʋwa a laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di, Iziral tɩmma mɛ bɩl bɩ sɩ vɩya Wɩɩsɩ laadii.

english_verse: In this way all of Israel will be saved, as the Scriptures say, “From Zion someone will come to rescue us. Then Jacob's descendants will stop being evil.
translation_verse: Nyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tɩŋa a laa Iziral tɩmma buloŋ ta. Ba sabɩ gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Laataal hʋ sɩ lɩɩ Zaayɔŋ. A lɩɩ Iziral tɩmma ba wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: This is what the Lord has promised to do when he forgives their sins.”
translation_verse: Haŋ saŋa hʋ rɛ ŋ sɩ laa ba ta ba wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ tɩyaŋ a daga anɩɩ nyʋwa hʋ ŋ aa wee tɩya ba suwo rɛ.

english_verse: The people of Israel are treated as God's enemies, so the good news can come to you Gentiles. But they are still the chosen ones, and God loves them because of their famous ancestors.
translation_verse: Iziral tɩmma aa vɩya Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ wɩya, ba bɩrɩmɩ Wɩɩsɩ dɔmɔ rɛ ma nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma wɩya. Amɛ ʋ aa lɩɩ ba wɩya ba yaa ʋ nikyooliye rɛ ba naabaala nyubaanɩŋ,

english_verse: God doesn't take back the gifts he has given or disown the people he has chosen.
translation_verse: beewɩya dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ lɩɩ ɩ koo dɩ ʋ rɛ kpaa kɩŋ tɩya ɩ abee bɔnyɛ, ʋ bɩl bee bɩla hal.

english_verse: At one time you Gentiles rejected God. But now Israel has rejected God, and you have been shown mercy.
translation_verse: Amɛ, mamaa nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma, ma fa vɩya Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa rɛ, amɛ lagɩlagɩ no Wɩɩsɩ fáá ma sikii rɛ, akuu Iziral tɩmma aa vɩya ʋ nyʋwa wɩya.

english_verse: And because of the mercy shown to you, they will also be shown mercy.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ Iziral tɩmma mɛ aa bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa lagɩlagɩ no, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ maakyiye fá ba sikii mɛ, anɩɩ ʋ aa fáá ma sikii gɛɛ.

english_verse: All people have disobeyed God, and that's why he treats them as prisoners. But he does this, so that he can have mercy on all of them.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ leŋ dʋnɩya nala buloŋ hakɩllɩ tɔ rɛ ba vɩya ʋ nyʋwa dɩ gɛɛ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ fá ba buloŋ sikii.

english_verse: Who can measure the wealth and wisdom and knowledge of God? Who can understand his decisions or explain what he does?
translation_verse: Ma yaŋ bɩ naa! Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ abee ʋ wɩgyʋŋ abee ʋ gyɩmaa bɩ kaŋ magɩsɩɩ. Kɩbee rɛ sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ hakɩla wɩɩ? Kɩbee rɛ sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩyaalɩya memii?

english_verse: “Has anyone known the thoughts of the Lord or given him advice?
translation_verse: Kɩbee rɛ sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩbɩɩna? Kɩbee rɛ sɩ wuwo basɩ wɩya kyagɩlɩ Wɩɩsɩ?

english_verse: Has anyone loaned something to the Lord that must be repaid?”
translation_verse: Kɩbee rɛ ha maakyiye kpa kɩŋ kyɩma Wɩɩsɩ, aŋ kɩ gyegili dɩ ʋ mɩɩgɩ tuŋ tɩya ʋ?

english_verse: Everything comes from the Lord. All things were made because of him and will return to him. Praise the Lord forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ marɩ kɩŋ buloŋ. Ʋ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ kɩŋ buloŋ we doŋ. Ʋ rɛ tɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ. Ʋ rɛ maga dɩ á kɩ bigisi ʋ deŋdeŋ. Amɩ.

english_verse: Dear friends, God is good. So I beg you to offer your bodies to him as a living sacrifice, pure and pleasing. That's the most sensible way to serve God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ naabalɩya, Wɩɩsɩ aa fáá á sikii yʋga wɩya, ŋ aa sʋla ma dɩ ma kpa ma tɩɩma lɩɩ wɩɩsʋl-welii tɩya Wɩɩsɩ ma mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ, aŋ kɩ tɩŋa ʋ, a kɩ yaa ʋ teŋfɩyɛl wɩya. Wɩɩkyʋwal ŋmanɩɩ tɩɩ hʋ aa maga dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋa rɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Don't be like the people of this world, but let God change the way you think. Then you will know how to do everything that is good and pleasing to him.
translation_verse: Ma ta bɩl kɩ yaa dʋnɩya nala wɩyaalɩya. Amɛ ma leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ ma hakɩllɩ abee ma tɩbɩɩna buloŋ kɩ bɩrɩmɩ dɩ ma yaa nɩfalɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ ma sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩɩ, a degini, a weliye mʋ teŋ, a kɩ fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ mɛ.

english_verse: I realize God has treated me with undeserved grace, and so I tell each of you not to think you are better than you really are. Use good sense and measure yourself by the amount of faith that God has given you.
translation_verse: Akuu Wɩɩsɩ aa yaa ŋ bɔnyɛ a kpa ʋ kyɔgɩta tɩya ŋ wɩya, ŋ aa sʋla ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ dɩ ʋ ta kpaa ʋ tɩɩ anɩɩ ʋ tee gɛɛ ʋ aa maga rɛ. Amɛ ma leŋ dɩ ma sɩya fɩyɛlɩ, ka dɩ nal buloŋ kpa laadii hʋ maga gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ʋ, a sʋnnɩ ʋ tɩɩ a gyɩŋ nal ʋ aa yaa.

english_verse: A body is made up of many parts, and each of them has its own use.
translation_verse: Nihuwobiŋ teŋbii yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, aŋ kaŋ lɩgyamaa, ka ʋ lee buloŋ mɛ kaŋ ʋ tʋma.

english_verse: That's how it is with us. There are many of us, but we each are part of the body of Christ, as well as part of one another.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ á mɛ kɩɩ. Á yaa nɩgyamaa rɛ, amɛ Krisita tɩyaŋ, á buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ anɩɩ nihuwobiŋ teŋbii. Á yaa nɩ-iriŋ iriŋma rɛ, a mal dɔmɔŋ a yaa teŋbidɩgɩ.

english_verse: If we can serve others, we should serve. If we can teach, we should teach.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ rɛ leŋ ɩ wuwo kɩ kyiyeli nala, kɩ kyiyeli ba. Dɩ ʋ rɛ leŋ ɩ wuwo kɩ daga nala, kɩ daga ba.

english_verse: If we can encourage others, we should encourage them. If we can give, we should be generous. If we are leaders, we should do our best. If we are good to others, we should do it cheerfully. Rules for Christian Living
