translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ rɛ leŋ ɩ wuwo basɩ wɩya kɩ fɩyɛlɩ nala bembiye, kɩ yaa gɛɛ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ leŋ ɩ kaŋ bɔnyɛ a kɩ pɛ nala tɩyaŋ, kɩ pɛ ba tɩyaŋ abee ɩ tɩya buloŋ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ leŋ ɩ yaa sɩlaal, ʋ maga dɩ ɩ kaŋ sɩfɩyaŋ nɛ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ leŋ ɩ kaŋ bɔnyɛ abee nala, kɩ daga ba bɔnyɛ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Ma kyo dɔmɔŋ

english_verse: Be sincere in your love for others. Hate everything that is evil and hold tight to everything that is good.
translation_verse: Ma kyo dɔmɔŋ abee wɩtɩɩ. Ma haasɩ wɩbɔmɔ, aŋ kpa ma tɩɩ we wɩweliye yayɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Love each other as brothers and sisters and honor others more than you do yourself.
translation_verse: Ma kyo dɔmɔŋ anɩɩ nɩmmabalɩya aa maga dɩ ba kyo dɔmɔŋ gɛɛ, akuu ma aa yaa Krisitabiisi wɩya, aŋ kɩ tɩya ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ gyɩrɩma a te ma tɩɩma.

english_verse: Never give up. Eagerly follow the Holy Spirit and serve the Lord.
translation_verse: Ma ta kaŋ teŋwɩɩ, amɛ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, ma kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ abee ma hakɩllɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: Let your hope make you glad. Be patient in time of trouble and never stop praying.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ bayɩyɛla hʋ ma aa kana leŋ dɩ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko kɩ na tʋwara, ma kaŋ kenyiri aŋ kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: Take care of God's needy people and welcome strangers into your home.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ pɛ ma nɩmmabalɩya hʋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di tɩyaŋ abee ba kɩkyɛɛlɩya aŋ kɩ kaŋ nɩhʋwala mɛ weliŋ.

english_verse: Ask God to bless everyone who mistreats you. Ask him to bless them and not to curse them.
translation_verse: Ma sʋla Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ʋ kyiyeli nala hʋ aa dɔgɩsɩ ma, aŋ ta kaabɩ kɩ tɩya ba.

english_verse: When others are happy, be happy with them, and when they are sad, be sad.
translation_verse: Dɩ nala tenni rɛ fɩyɛla, ma leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa ma mɛ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ. Dɩ nala tɩsɩ rɛ kyogo, ma leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa ma mɛ tɩkyogi.

english_verse: Don't mistreat someone who has mistreated you. But try to earn the respect of others,
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ kpaa wɩbɔŋ yaa ma, ma kɛ ta kpaa wɩbɔŋ yaa ʋ tuŋ. Amɛ ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ nal buloŋ aa naa dɩ ba yaa wɩweliye.

english_verse: and do your best to live at peace with everyone.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ kaa maga ɩ dʋŋ, leŋ dɩ ɩ bee nal buloŋ sʋma.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't try to get even. Let God take revenge. In the Scriptures the Lord says, “I am the one to take revenge and pay them back.”
translation_verse: Ŋ kyaŋsɩ, dɩ nal lɛ kpa wɩbɔŋ yaa ma, ma ta kɩ lʋga dɩ ma yaa tuŋ. Ma leŋ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ. Beewɩya ba saba rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa dɩ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ aa tuŋ wɩbɔŋ kyɩŋ.” Ɛɛwɩya, “Dɩ nal lɛ yaa wɩbɔŋ, mɩyaŋ nɛ sɩ tuŋ tɩɩna.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “If your enemies are hungry, give them something to eat. And if they are thirsty, give them something to drink. This will be the same as piling burning coals on their heads.”
translation_verse: “Amɛ dɩ losi rɛ kana ɩ dɔŋ, yaa kɩdiiliye tɩya ʋ. Dɩ nɩɩnyʋwasɩ mɛ rɛ kana ʋ, yaa nɩɩ tɩya ʋ dɩ ʋ nyʋwa. Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa gɛɛ, hɩɩsɩ sɩ kana ʋ kɩŋkaŋ.”

english_verse: Don't let evil defeat you, but defeat evil with good.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ wɩbɔmɔ wuwo ma. Amɛ ma kpa wɩweliye a wuwo wɩbɔmɔ.

english_verse: Obey the rulers who have authority over you. Only God can give authority to anyone, and he puts these rulers in their places of power.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ maga dɩ ʋ kɩ tɩŋ nala hʋ aa deŋ ʋ paalʋʋ nyʋwa rɛ. Beewɩya, nal buloŋ bɩ wuwo kɩ deŋ lee dɩ Wɩɩsɩ daa lɩɩ ʋ tɩɩna a tɩya ʋ gɛɛ dee. Ma sɩlaala hʋ aa we doŋ gyɩnaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ rɛ lɩɩ ba.

english_verse: Rulers are a threat to evil people, not to good people. There is no need to be afraid of the authorities. Just do right, and they will praise you for it.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa yaa wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ bee fá ba paalʋʋ sɩlaala kambɩŋ, see nala hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ bee kyɛ dɩ ɩ kɩ fá ɩ paalʋʋ sɩlaala kambɩŋ, ɛɛ kɛ kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ, ɛɛ rɛ ba sɩ bigisi ɩ.

english_verse: After all, they are God's servants, and it is their duty to help you. If you do something wrong, you ought to be afraid, because these rulers have the right to punish you. They are God's servants who punish criminals to show how angry God is.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ba yaa Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnna rɛ, a kɩ tʋma ma marɩsɩ wɩya. Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ, ma sɩ kɩ fá ba kambɩŋ, beewɩya ba kɔnɩ kaŋ dee rɛ ba aa sɩ wuwo dɔgɩsɩ ma. Ba yaa Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnna rɛ, a laa Wɩɩsɩ naasɩ a kɩ dɔgɩsɩ nala hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ.

english_verse: But you should obey the rulers because you know it is the right thing to do, and not just because of God's anger.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma kɩ tɩŋ ma paalʋʋ sɩlaala nyʋwa. Ma ta kɩ tɩŋ ba nyʋwa akuu ba aa sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ma dʋŋ wɩya. Amɛ ma kɩ tɩŋ ba nyʋwa, beewɩya ma hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ, ma gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ maga dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋ ba nyʋwa rɛ.

english_verse: You must also pay your taxes. The authorities are God's servants, and it is their duty to take care of these matters.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ ma kɩ tuŋ lampoo mɛ rɛ nyɛ: Paalʋʋ sɩlaala hʋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnna rɛ, a kpa ba wɩɩ buloŋ we paalʋʋ hʋ deŋii tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: In the Law there are many commands, such as, “Be faithful in marriage. Do not murder. Do not steal. Do not want what belongs to others.” But all of these are summed up in the command that says, “Love others as much as you love yourself.”
translation_verse: Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ badɔmɔŋ nɛ nyɛ: “Ta kyɛɛ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna haaŋ, ta kpʋʋ nal, ta gaa, ta leŋ ɩ haahii we nal kɩŋ tɩyaŋ.” Mɩrɩsɩ no abee mɩrɩ-kaalɩya hʋ buloŋ aa we doŋ, ba buloŋ ko pɛ dɔmɔŋ a yaa wɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Ʋ rɛ nyɛ: “Kyo ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna anɩɩ ɩ aa kyo ɩ tɩɩ gɛɛ.”

english_verse: No one who loves others will harm them. So love is all that the Law demands. The Day When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ kyo ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna, ɩ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa yaa ʋ wɩbɔŋ buloŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ ɩ rɛ kyo ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna, ɩ aa tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ buloŋ nɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: You know what sort of times we live in, and so you should live properly. It is time to wake up. You know that the day when we will be saved is nearer now than when we first put our faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Ʋ maga dɩ ma kɩ yaa wɩya no rɛ, beewɩya ma paalɩ gyɩŋ gɛɛ hʋ saŋa no tɩyaŋ á aa wee aa kɩya rɛ. Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ ma aa sɩ sii doo tɩyaŋ pele rɛ. Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ laa ma ta dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ marɩ kpaga rɛ. Gyɩnaŋ, ʋ kpaga te saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ á aa buŋ laa Yesu wɩya di rɛ.

english_verse: Night is almost over, and day will soon appear. We must stop behaving as people do in the dark and be ready to live in the light.
translation_verse: Sɩya kpaga gballɩɩ rɛ. Ʋ kaa mʋhʋ, ka dɩ wɩɩsɩ pɔsɔ. Ma yaŋ leŋ dɩ á leŋ bilhuu tɩyaŋ wɩyaalɩya, aŋ paa pʋlʋŋ-bayuwo kɩna laalɩ.

english_verse: So behave properly, as people do in the day. Don't go to wild parties or get drunk or be vulgar or indecent. Don't quarrel or be jealous.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á kaŋ á tɩɩma weliŋ anɩɩ nala aa we pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ. Ma ta leŋ dɩ á kɩ gbɩyalɩ gbɩyalɩtɔɔnɩ, a kɩ bugo, a kɩ yaa bisiŋ wɩya, koo a kɩ yaa wɩlaama. Ma ta leŋ dɩ á kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ. Ma ta leŋ dɩ á tɩsɩ mɛ kɩ hɔllɩ dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Let the Lord Jesus Christ be as near to you as the clothes you wear. Then you won't try to satisfy your selfish desires.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma leŋ dɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita laa ma wɩkanɩya buloŋ tɩŋa, ka dɩ ma kpa hal yɩya ma teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya buloŋ.

english_verse: Welcome all the Lord's followers, even those whose faith is weak. Don't criticize them for having beliefs that are different from yours.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di aŋ ha bɩ gyige ba laadii tɩyaŋ, ma kaŋ ba weliŋ. Amɛ ma ta leŋ dɩ wɩɩ hʋ ma hakɩllɩ aa kana kaŋ ma we nyʋʋtaaduwo-tɔɔnɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: What right do you have to criticize someone else's servants? Only their Lord can decide if they are doing right, and the Lord will make sure that they do right.
translation_verse: Kɩbee rɛ yaa ɩ, ɩ aa sɩ kpa kyogisi tɩya nal kɩdɩgɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ? Tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ nɩhɩyawʋ dʋŋ nɛ sɩ wuwo gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ aa yaa weliŋ nɛ koo ʋ bee yaa weliŋ. Ʋ mɛ yaŋ aa wuwo ʋ kɩ yaa weliŋ nɛ beewɩya á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ gɛɛ dee rɛ.

english_verse: Some of the Lord's followers think one day is more important than another. Others think all days are the same. But each of you should make up your own mind.
translation_verse: Nal kɩdɩgɩ we doŋ a kɩ lugisi kyɛyɛ, ka nal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ we doŋ a na anɩɩ kyɛɛ buloŋ yaa kyɛwelii rɛ. Wɩɩ hʋ nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ hakɩla aa daga ʋ, ʋ sɩŋ ʋ tɩyaŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: Whether we live or die, it must be for God, rather than for ourselves.
translation_verse: Á kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ tɩŋa ʋ tɩɩ ʋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ, koo ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: This is because Christ died and rose to life, so that he would be the Lord of the dead and of the living.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ tɩŋ Krisita sʋba aŋ bɩl sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ yaa niweye abee sʋʋnɩ buloŋ tɩɩna.

english_verse: Why do you criticize other followers of the Lord? Why do you look down on them? The day is coming when God will judge all of us.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya ma ta kɩ dii dɔmɔŋ sarɩya, a ta kɩ kʋwasɩ dɔmɔŋ mɛ beewɩya á buloŋ nɛ sɩ maakyiye sɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya dɩ ʋ di á sarɩya.

english_verse: And so, each of us must give an account to God for what we do. Don't Cause Problems for Others
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, á kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ sɩ daga wɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa yaa a tɩya Wɩɩsɩ. Ta yaa wɩɩ hʋ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna yaa wɩbɔŋ

english_verse: The Lord Jesus has made it clear to me that God considers all foods fit to eat. But if you think some foods are unfit to eat, then for you they are not fit.
translation_verse: Akuu ŋ aa yaa Krisitabiye wɩya, ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ kɩdiilii buloŋ tuwo a yaa sɩna. Amɛ dɩ nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ ko kpa kɩdiilii ʋ yaa sɩna, ɛɛ kɛ ʋ tɩɩna lee rɛ ʋ yaa sɩna gɛɛ.

english_verse: If you are hurting others by the foods you eat, you are not guided by love. Don't let your appetite destroy someone Christ died for.
translation_verse: Dɩ kɩna hʋ ɩ aa sɩ di rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna tɩya kyogi, ɛɛ daga nɩɩ ɩ bɩl bɩ kyo ʋ rɛ gɛɛ. Ta leŋ dɩ kɩdiiliye hʋ ɩ aa dii leŋ dɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna ŋmaa naaŋ beewɩya ʋ wɩya rɛ Krisita sʋba.

english_verse: Don't let your right to eat bring shame to Christ.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ɩ aa gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ yaa wɩwelii, ta leŋ dɩ ʋ ko bɩrɩmɩ wɩbɔŋ nala sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God's kingdom isn't about eating and drinking. It is about pleasing God, about living in peace, and about true happiness. All this comes from the Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩkoro hʋ wɩya bɩ yaa kɩdiiliye abee kɩnyʋwalɩya dʋŋ wɩya. Wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ Wɩɩsɩkoro hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ yaa dɩ á kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ, abee fɩyɛlʋʋ abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa tɩya.

english_verse: If you serve Christ in this way, you will please God and be respected by people.
translation_verse: Dɩ nala rɛ kaŋ nyɛ a kɩ tɩŋ Krisita, Wɩɩsɩ teŋ sɩ fɩyɛlɩ ba tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ nala mɛ kɩ tɩya ba gyɩrɩma.

english_verse: Don't let your appetite destroy what God has done. All foods are fit to eat, but it is wrong to cause problems for others by what you eat.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ kɩdiiliye wɩya leŋ dɩ ma kyogi wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa yaa. Kɩdiilii buloŋ weliye rɛ, ʋ bɩ kaŋ sɩna. Amɛ dɩ kɩdiilii ɩ aa sɩ di rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna yaa wɩbɔŋ, ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ɩ di ʋ.

english_verse: It is best not to eat meat or drink wine or do anything else that causes problems for other followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɩ aa vɩya namɩya kyaŋɩɩ koo sɩŋ nyʋwayɩ koo wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna ŋmaa naaŋ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ kpɩya.

english_verse: But if you do have doubts about what you eat, you are going against your beliefs. And you know that is wrong, because anything you do against your beliefs is sin.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ nal lɛ aa di kɩna aŋ kɩ yaa sige, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa kyogisi tɩya ʋ, beewɩya ʋ aa yaa sige hʋ daga anɩɩ ʋ bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa yaa tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ aa yaa wɩɩ buloŋ aŋ bɩ laa di anɩɩ ʋ maga dɩ ɩ yaa ʋ, ʋ yaa wɩbɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: If our faith is strong, we should be patient with the Lord's followers whose faith is weak. We should try to please them instead of ourselves.
translation_verse: Á nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ laadii aa deye, ʋ maga dɩ á kɩ pɛ nala hʋ laadii ha aa bɩ deye tɩyaŋ nɛ, dɩ ba mɛ marɩ sɩŋ weliŋ. Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ á kyɩla á tɩɩma dʋŋ wɩya á wɩyaalɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We should think of their good and try to help them by doing what pleases them.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á kyɩla á dɔŋtɩŋsɩ wɩya, a kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ba tenni fɩyɛlɩ, aŋ pɛ ba tɩyaŋ dɩ ba laadii marɩ deye Krisita tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God is the one who makes us patient and cheerful. I pray that he will help you live at peace with each other, as you follow Christ.
translation_verse: Ma aa tɩŋ Yesu Krisita nyɛ, ŋ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ rɛ yaa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa tɩya nala kenyiri, a kɩ fɩyɛlɩ nala bembiye mɛ kyiyeli ma dɩ ma kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ,

english_verse: Then all of you together will praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. The Good News Is for Jews and Gentiles
translation_verse: dɩ ma buloŋ wuwo kpa nyʋʋdɩgɩ abee hakɩldɩgɩ a dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ rɛ yaa á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita Kuwo abee ʋ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Honor God by accepting each other, as Christ has accepted you.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma kaŋ dɔmɔŋ weliŋ, anɩɩ Krisita mɛ aa kaŋ ma weliŋ gɛɛ, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ feŋ yɩrɩ.

english_verse: I tell you that Christ came as a servant of the Jews to show that God has kept the promises he made to their famous ancestors. Christ also came,
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ tʋma hʋ Krisita aa ko tʋma ʋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ, Gyuuma rɛ ʋ tʋma tɩya, dɩ ʋ daga gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ a yaa wɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa wee nyʋwa tɩya ba naabaala anɩɩ ʋ kɔnɩ sɩ yaa,

english_verse: so that the Gentiles would praise God for being kind to them. It is just as the Scriptures say, “I will tell the nations about you, and I will sing praises to your name.”
translation_verse: aŋ wuwo leŋ dɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma mɛ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ akuu ʋ aa fá ba sikii wɩya. Ba sabɩ nyɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Wɩɩ no wɩya ŋ sɩ dannɩ ɩ, nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma tɩyaŋ. Ŋ sɩ yɩɩ yɩɩla mɛ a dannɩ ɩ feŋ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say to the Gentiles, “Come and celebrate with God's people.”
translation_verse: Ba bɩl saba nyɛ rɛ a baa: “Ma nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma, abee nala hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, ma kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ.”

english_verse: Again the Scriptures say, “Praise the Lord, all you Gentiles. All you nations, come and worship him.”
translation_verse: Ba bɩl basɩ nyɛ rɛ: “Ma nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma buloŋ, ma dannɩ ma Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, nal nal buloŋ yɩɩ yɩɩla a dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ”.

english_verse: Isaiah says, “Someone from David's family will come to power. He will rule the nations, and they will put their hope in him.”
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal Azaaya mɛ bɩl basɩ: “Gyeesi doho nal kɩdɩgɩ sɩ ko. Ʋ rɛ sɩ sii a kɩ deŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma nyuu. Ba sɩ kpa ba bayɩyɛla buloŋ we ʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives hope, will bless you with complete happiness and peace because of your faith. And may the power of the Holy Spirit fill you with hope. Paul's Work as a Missionary
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa leŋ á kaŋ bayɩyɛla, ʋ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ, a leŋ dɩ ma hɔŋ abee laaŋfɩya, akuu ma aa laa ʋ di wɩya, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ma bayɩyɛla hʋ marɩ yʋga kɩ pɛ ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ Pɔɔl kɩ basɩ wɩya abee nyuduwo

english_verse: My friends, I am sure that you are very good and that you have all the knowledge you need to teach each other.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya Krisitabiisi, ŋ paalɩ laa di rɛ anɩɩ ma yaa niweliye rɛ weliŋ, a gyɩŋ wɩya mɛ weliŋ, a wuwo kɩ daga dɔmɔŋ mɛ.

english_verse: But I have spoken to you plainly and have tried to remind you of some things. God treated me with undeserved grace!
translation_verse: Amɛ teŋ no tɩyaŋ, ŋ bɩ fáá ma sii abee wɩya badɔmɔŋ ŋ aa liisi ma. Ŋ bɩ fáá ma sii wɩya no basɩɩ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ lɩɩ ŋ ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: He chose me to be a servant of Christ Jesus for the Gentiles and to do the work of a priest in the service of his good news. God did this so that the Holy Spirit could make the Gentiles into a holy offering, pleasing to him.
translation_verse: dɩ ŋ yaa Yesu Krisita tʋŋtʋnnɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma tɩyaŋ. Ŋ aa tʋŋ ŋ tʋma ma nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma tɩyaŋ anɩɩ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal lɛ, a basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ kɩ tɩya ma. Ŋ aa yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ ma nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ wɩɩsʋllɩ-kɩna Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa leŋ ba weliye, ŋ kpa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Because of Christ Jesus, I can take pride in my service for God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ aa wuwo ŋ kɩ genni akuu tʋma hʋ Yesu Krisita aa leŋ ŋ tʋŋ kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ wɩya rɛ.

english_verse: In fact, all I will talk about is how Christ let me speak and work, so that the Gentiles would obey him.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ sɩ basɩ wɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ wɩya, see wɩya hʋ Krisita aa leŋ ŋ wuwo yaa, a leŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma ko tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa. Wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basa abee wɩya hʋ ŋ aa yaa,

english_verse: Indeed, I will tell how Christ worked miracles and wonders by the power of the Holy Spirit. I have preached the good news about him all the way from Jerusalem to Illyricum.
translation_verse: wɩkperiye hʋ abee wɩmagɩla hʋ ŋ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, ba aa rɛ kyiyeli nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma, ba ko tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa. Ŋ basɩ Krisita wɩweliye hʋ buloŋ nɛ, a piili Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ a gɔllɩ gɛɛ a mʋ pele Iliirikum paalʋʋ.

english_verse: But I have always tried to preach where people have never heard about Christ. I am like a builder who doesn't build on someone else's foundation.
translation_verse: Saŋa buloŋ, ŋ lʋgʋ buloŋ nɛ yaa dɩ ŋ mʋ leye ba ha aa bɩ basɩ Krisita wɩweliye hʋ, a basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya doŋma. Beewɩya, ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ mʋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya lee hʋ nala aa laa sɩya mʋ a basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “All who haven't been told about him will see him, and those who haven't heard about him will understand.” Paul's Plan To Visit Rome
translation_verse: Ba sabɩ wɩɩ no Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Nala hʋ ba ha aa bɩ basɩ ʋ wɩya tɩya, ba sɩ na ʋ, ka nala hʋ mɛ ha aa bɩ maakyiye nɩɩ ʋ wɩya, ba sɩ nɩɩ ʋ wɩya, a gyɩŋ ba memii mɛ.” Pɔɔl aa yaa siri dɩ ʋ mʋ Roma

english_verse: Now there is nothing left for me to do in this part of the world, and for years I have wanted to visit you.
translation_verse: Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, ŋ tʋma aa tene leye no tɩyaŋ nyɛ, ka ŋ mɛ fa paalɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ ko na ma taŋbolii buloŋ wɩya, ŋ sɩ ko na ma,

english_verse: So I plan to stop off on my way to Spain. Then after a short, but refreshing, visit with you, I hope you will quickly send me on.
translation_verse: aŋ parɩ mʋ Sipeeŋ paalʋʋ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko hɔŋ ma lee kyɛyɛ baŋmana a kpʋ yʋwaŋ, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma kyiyeli ŋ nɛ dɩ ŋ wuwo pele doŋ.

english_verse: I am now on my way to Jerusalem to deliver the money that the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia collected for God's needy people.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Masidooniya abee Akaaya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ, ba kɩyɛsa molbiye rɛ ba kyɛrɩ abee ba teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ba kpa kyiyeli nyaaba hʋ aa we Wɩɩsɩ nala tɩyaŋ Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: This is something they really wanted to do. But sharing their money with the Jews was also like paying back a debt, because the Jews had already shared their spiritual blessings with the Gentiles.
translation_verse: Ba tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba yaa gɛɛ. Amɛ ʋ yaa fɩlɩɩ rɛ dɩ ba pɛ ba tɩyaŋ, beewɩya wɩweliye hʋ buloŋ Gyuuma aa naa a lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee, ba leŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma mɛ na ba rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ʋ yaa fɩlɩɩ rɛ dɩ ba mɛ kpa dʋnɩya kɩna hʋ ba aa kana badɔmɔŋ a kyiyeli ba.

english_verse: And when I do arrive in Rome, I know it will be with the full blessings of Christ.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko, ma sɩ na kyiyelii hʋ buloŋ aa lɩɩ Krisita lee.

english_verse: My friends, by the power of the Lord Jesus Christ and by the love that comes from the Holy Spirit, I beg you to pray sincerely with me and for me.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita feŋ tɩyaŋ, abee kyori hʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa leŋ á kana wɩya, ŋ aa sʋl ma rɛ dɩ ma sɩŋ gbala ŋ weliŋ a pɛ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ŋ sɩfɩyasɩ,

english_verse: Pray that God will protect me from the unbelievers in Judea, and that his people in Jerusalem will be pleased with what I am doing.
translation_verse: dɩ Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ ŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ laa Yesu wɩya di Gyudɩya paalʋʋ nosi tɩyaŋ. Ma bɩl sʋla Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ʋ nala hʋ aa we Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ tenni mɛ fɩyɛlɩ abee wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa mʋ dɩ ŋ yaa tɩya ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Ask God to let me come to you and have a pleasant and refreshing visit.
translation_verse: Ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ ko laa nyʋwa, ŋ sɩ ko ma lee abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ á buloŋ tenni bɩl polli.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will be with all of you. Amen.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa tɩya nihuwobiŋ buloŋ fɩyɛlʋʋ sɩ we ma buloŋ lee. Amɩ.

english_verse: I have good things to say about Phoebe, who is a leader in the church at Cenchreae.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩma anɩɩ á nɩɩnatoluu Foobe aa yaa sɩlaal Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Keŋkiriya tɩyaŋ yaa nɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Welcome her in a way that is proper for someone who has faith in the Lord and is one of God's own people. Help her in any way you can. After all, she has proved to be a respected leader for many others, including me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya dɩ ʋ rɛ ko ko ma lee ma kana ʋ weliŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu feŋ tɩyaŋ, anɩɩ ʋ aa maga dɩ Wɩɩsɩ nala kaŋ dɔmɔŋ gɛɛ, a pɛ ʋ tɩyaŋ abee kɩŋ buloŋ ʋ aa kyɛ ma lee. Beewɩya ʋ kyiyeli nɩgyamaa rɛ yʋga, a kyiyeli ŋ mɛ weliŋ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila. They have not only served Christ Jesus together with me,
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ Pirisila abee Akula mɛ tɩya ŋ. Ŋ beel-ba yaa tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔsɩ rɛ Yesu Krisita tʋma no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: but they have even risked their lives for me. I am grateful for them and so are all the Gentile churches.
translation_verse: Ba kpaa ba mɩɩbolo yɔbɔ sʋʋ rɛ ŋ wɩya. Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ dʋŋ daa aa kyʋwalɩ ba amɛ ŋ bee Krisitabiisi hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma buloŋ nɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ba aŋgyʋwasʋ.

english_verse: Greet the church that meets in their home. Greet my dear friend Epaenetus, who was the first person in Asia to have faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ Krisitabiisi hʋ buloŋ aa laŋŋɩ ba dɩya tɩyaŋ mɛ. Ma kyʋwalɩ ŋ kyaŋkyoolii Ɛpanitusi mɛ tɩya ŋ. Ʋ rɛ laa sɩya laa Krisita wɩya di Esɩya paalʋʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Greet Mary, who has worked so hard for you.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ Mɛɛrɩ mɛ tɩya ŋ. Ʋ tʋŋ tʋma rɛ weliŋ a tɩya ma.

english_verse: Greet my relatives Andronicus and Junia, who were in jail with me. They are highly respected by the apostles and were followers of Christ before I was.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ Aŋduronika abee Gyuniya mɛ tɩya ŋ. Ba aa rɛ yaa ŋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Gyuuma ba aa kaŋ ŋ beel-ba tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ. Yesu Krisita kpambɩsɩ hʋ gyɩŋ ba rɛ weliŋ. Ba aa rɛ laa sɩya laa Krisita wɩya di ŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Greet Ampliatus, my dear friend whose faith is in the Lord.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ Ampiliyatusi mɛ tɩya ŋ. Ʋ yaa ŋ kyaŋkyoolii rɛ á Tɩɩna Yesu wɩya.

english_verse: Greet Urbanus, who serves Christ along with us. Greet my dear friend Stachys.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ Ɛbanusi mɛ tɩya ŋ. Ʋ mɛ yaa á tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋ nɛ Krisita tʋma hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ma kyʋwalɩ ŋ kyaŋkyoolii Sitaakisi mɛ tɩya ŋ.

english_verse: Greet Herodion, who is a relative of mine. Greet Narcissus and the others in his family, who have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ Hɛrodiyɔŋ mɛ tɩya ŋ. Ʋ mɛ yaa ŋ dɔŋtɩɩna Gyuu rɛ. Ma kyʋwalɩ Naasisu dɩya nala mɛ aa laa á Tɩɩna Yesu wɩya di tɩya ŋ.

english_verse: Greet Rufus, that special servant of the Lord, and greet his mother, who has been like a mother to me.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ Rufusi mɛ tɩya ŋ. Ʋ sɩŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu wɩya tɩyaŋ weliŋ nɛ. Ma kyʋwalɩ ʋ naa mɛ tɩya ŋ. Ʋ kpaa ŋ nɛ anɩɩ ʋ biilʋlɩɩ tɩɩ.

english_verse: Greet Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, and Hermas, as well as our friends who are with them.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ Asiŋkiritu, abee Filegɔŋ, abee Hɛɛmɩsɩ, abee Paturoba, abee Hɛɛmɩsɩ abee á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ buloŋ aa we ba lee.

english_verse: Greet Philologus, Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all of God's people who are with them.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ Filologu, abee Gyulɩya, Neeru abee ʋ naatoluu. Ma kyʋwalɩ Olimpa mɛ abee Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ buloŋ aa we ba lee.

english_verse: Be sure to give each other a warm greeting. All of Christ's churches greet you.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ kyʋwalɩ dɔmɔŋ abee kyori. Krisitabiisi aa we lee buloŋ tɩyaŋ aa kyʋwalɩ ma.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to watch out for anyone who causes trouble and divides the church by refusing to do what all of you were taught. Stay away from them!
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ aa sʋla ma rɛ dɩ ma pɔ ma tɩɩ weliŋ abee nala hʋ aa leŋ nala kɩ porigi dɔmɔŋ tɩyaŋ. Ba bee tɩŋ wɩya hʋ á aa daga ma, aŋ aa kpa wɩdʋŋsɩ a kaŋ nala hakɩllɩ kɩ vʋgɩmɩ laadii hʋ ba a kana Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ. Ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩ nala no iriŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: They want to serve themselves and not Christ the Lord. Their flattery and fancy talk fool people who don't know any better.
translation_verse: Beewɩya nala no bee tʋŋ á Tɩɩna Krisita tʋma, amɛ ba tɩɩ wɩkyooliye rɛ ba kɩ yaa. Ba kaŋ nyʋʋpiŋsʋma rɛ a kɩ mʋrɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ gyɩŋ wɩya sɩya.

english_verse: I am glad that everyone knows how well you obey the Lord. But still, I want you to understand what is good and not have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ nɛ nɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ ma aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa. Ʋ gɛɛ yaa ŋ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ rɛ, ŋ kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ ma wɩya. Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ nɛ, a gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ aa weliye, aŋ lɩɩ ma tɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Then God, who gives peace, will soon crush Satan under your feet. I pray that our Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩya nala fɩyɛlʋʋ, gbarɩgɩ Sɩtaanɩ biŋ ma naasɩ memii dɩ ma kɩ nʋwɔsɩ. Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ sɩ we ma lee.

english_verse: Timothy, who works with me, sends his greetings, and so do my relatives, Lucius, Jason, and Sosipater.
translation_verse: Timoti aa yaa ŋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋ mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma. Lusɩya abee Gyeesiŋ abee Sosipata mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma. Ba mɛ yaa ŋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Gyuuma rɛ.

english_verse: I, Tertius, also send my greetings. I am a follower of the Lord, and I wrote this letter.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Tɛɛtiyo, nal hʋ Pɔɔl aa leŋ ŋ sabɩ teŋ no, ŋ mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma á Tɩɩna Yesu feŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Praise God! He can make you strong by means of my good news, which is the message about Jesus Christ. For ages and ages this message was kept secret,
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ. Ʋ rɛ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ma sɩŋ weliŋ ma laadii tɩyaŋ akuu Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ ŋ aa basɩ tɩya ma a mʋ kɩ tile Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ wɩya. Wɩtɩɩ no fa yaa wɩfaŋɩɩ rɛ faafaa buloŋ, amɛ nyɛ kɛ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ á gyɩma ʋ rɛ.

english_verse: but now at last it has been told. The eternal God commanded his prophets to write about the good news, so that all nations would obey and have faith.
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ, wɩtɩɩ no yaa lɩgyalɩɩ wɩɩ rɛ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala sabɩ ʋ wɩya rɛ, ka Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa we doŋ maakyiye buloŋ mɛ bɩl leŋ ba basɩ ʋ wɩya tɩya dʋnɩya nala buloŋ ba gyɩma, dɩ ba wuwo laa wɩtɩɩ no di, a kɩ tɩŋa ʋ.

english_verse: And now, because of Jesus Christ, we can praise the only wise God forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á tɩŋ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ deŋdeŋ, beewɩya ʋ dʋŋ nɛ yaa wɩgyʋŋ buloŋ tɩɩna. Amɩ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Sosthenes, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl, abee á nɩɩnabiye Sɔsɩtɩnɛɛsɩ rɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ma. Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ lɩɩ ŋ dɩ ŋ yaa Yesu Krisita kpambɩya.

english_verse: My prayer is that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ, ma hɔŋ abee laaŋfɩya.

english_verse: I never stop thanking my God for treating you with undeserved grace by giving you Christ Jesus,
translation_verse: Saŋa buloŋ, ŋ aa kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ weliŋ ma wɩya, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ a yaa wɩweliye yʋga tɩya ma.

english_verse: Now you are certain that everything we told you about our Lord Christ Jesus is true.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, Krisita wɩya hʋ á aa basɩ tɩya ma, ma kaŋ ba weliŋ nɛ.

english_verse: You are not missing out on any blessings, as you wait for him to return.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, saŋa no tɩyaŋ ma aa gyegili á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita mɩɩgɩ koyi abee teŋkyel nyɛ, Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ma na wɩweliye hʋ buloŋ aa lɩɩ ʋ lee rɛ.

english_verse: God can be trusted, and he chose you to be partners with his Son, our Lord Jesus Christ. Taking Sides
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ʋ bee bɩrɩgɩ ʋ nyʋwa. Ʋ rɛ lɩɩ ma dɩ ma bee ʋ Biye, á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita, yaa kɩdɩgɩ. Krisitabiisi gʋla kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ

english_verse: My dear friends, as a follower of our Lord Jesus Christ, I beg you to get along with each other. Don't take sides. Always try to agree in what you think.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita nyubaanɩŋ, ŋ aa sʋl ma, ŋ naabalɩya, ma buloŋ kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ, a ta kɩ porigi dɔmɔŋ. Ma kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ abee tɩdɩgɩ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Several people from Chloe's family have already reported to me that you keep arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, á nɩɩnabiye Kuloye dɩya nala basɩ tɩya ŋ anɩɩ ma gʋla kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: I thank God that I didn't baptize any of you except Crispus and Gaius.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ abee ŋ aa bɩ foo ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ, see á nɩɩnabiye Kirisipu abee Geyosi dʋŋ.

english_verse: Not one of you can say that you were baptized in my name.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nal buloŋ yaŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo baa dɩ mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl feŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba fo ʋ wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ, ʋ yaa ŋ hatɩnnɩ.

english_verse: Christ did not send me to baptize. He sent me to tell the good news without using words that sound wise and would make the cross of Christ lose its power. Christ Is God's Power and Wisdom
translation_verse: Beewɩya Krisita bɩ tɩma ŋ dɩ ŋ ko fo nala wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ. Ʋ tɩma ŋ nɛ dɩ ŋ ko basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ a kɩ tɩya nala. Nihuwobiŋ wɩgyʋŋ daa ʋ kpa tɩya ŋ, ŋ kaŋ kɩ basɩ wɩya hʋ. Ʋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ ʋ sʋʋ daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ ta yaa waasʋ. Krisita rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ dee abee Wɩɩsɩ wɩgyʋŋ

english_verse: The message about the cross doesn't make any sense to lost people. But for those of us who are being saved, it is God's power at work.
translation_verse: Krisita sʋʋ daagarɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ yaa wɩtɔɔ rɛ nala hʋ aa nyʋgɩsa lee. Amɛ á nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa laa kɩ ta kɛ lee, wɩɩ no yaa Wɩɩsɩ dee rɛ.

english_verse: As God says in the Scriptures, “I will destroy the wisdom of all who claim to be wise. I will confuse those who think they know so much.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ basa rɛ a baa, “Ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ wɩgyʋnna wɩgyʋŋ yaa waasʋ, dɩ wɩgyʋŋ-kɩŋkaŋ tɩmma gyɩmaa mɛ yaa waasʋ.”

english_verse: What happened to those wise people? What happened to those experts in the Scriptures? What happened to the ones who think they have all the answers? Didn't God show that the wisdom of this world is foolish?
translation_verse: Dɩ nyɛ rɛ ba kɩɩ, lee rɛ gyɩnaŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ wɩgyʋnna bee dɩdagɩla abee wɩgyʋŋ-kɩŋkaŋ tɩmma sɩ we? Wɩɩsɩ daga anɩɩ dʋnɩya no wɩgyʋŋ yaa bambugi wɩgyʋŋ nɛ.

english_verse: God was wise and decided not to let the people of this world use their wisdom to learn about him. Instead, God chose to save only those who believe the foolish message we preach.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ wɩgyʋŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ leŋ nihuwobisi bɩ wuwo tɩŋ ba tɩɩ wɩgyʋŋ tɩyaŋ a gyɩma ʋ. Nala baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ á aa basɩ yaa wɩtɔɔnɩ rɛ. Amɛ nala hʋ aa laa wɩya no di, ʋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ tɩŋ wɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ a laa ba ta.

english_verse: Jews ask for miracles, and Greeks want something that sounds wise.
translation_verse: Gyuuma aa kyɛ dɩ ba na wɩmagɩla rɛ. Nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma mɛ kɩ kyɛ wɩgyʋŋ.

english_verse: But we preach that Christ was nailed to a cross. Most Jews have problems with this, and most Gentiles think it is foolish.
translation_verse: Amɛ á kɛ, Krisita ba aa kpaasa mal daagarɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ wɩya rɛ á kɩ basɩ. Wɩɩ no wɩya leŋ Gyuuma baaŋ kɩ sii rɛ ba nyʋgɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ aŋka nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma lee mɛ, ʋ yaa wɩtɔɔ.

english_verse: Our message is God's power and wisdom for the Jews and the Greeks that he has chosen.
translation_verse: Amɛ nala hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya kɛ lee, Gyuuma abee nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma buloŋ, Krisita rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ dee abee Wɩɩsɩ wɩgyʋŋ.

english_verse: Even when God is foolish, he is wiser than everyone else, and even when God is weak, he is stronger than everyone else.
translation_verse: Wɩgyʋŋ hʋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee, ka nihuwobisi lee ʋ yaa bambugi wɩɩ, ʋ rɛ baŋ nihuwobiŋ wɩgyʋŋ. Dee hʋ mɛ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee, ka nihuwobisi lee ʋ yaa yaarɩsɩ, ʋ rɛ baŋ nihuwobiŋ dee.

english_verse: My dear friends, remember what you were when God chose you. The people of this world didn't think that many of you were wise. Only a few of you were in places of power, and not many of you came from important families.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ma liisi mʋ na gɛɛ hʋ ma fa aa kɩya saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩɩ ma. Nihuwobisi sɩya tɩyaŋ, ma tɩyaŋ nala baŋmɛ rɛ fa kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ, koo ma tɩyaŋ nala baŋmɛ rɛ nala fa kɩ kpa yohuŋ? Ma nala baŋmɛ mɛ rɛ fa yaa nɩbala nihuwobisi sɩya tɩyaŋ?

english_verse: But God chose the foolish things of this world to put the wise to shame. He chose the weak things of this world to put the powerful to shame.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ paala rɛ a lɩɩ nala hʋ dʋnɩya nala aa baa dɩ ba yaa bambugo rɛ, dɩ ʋ we dʋnɩya wɩgyʋnna hɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ bɩl lɩɩ nala hʋ mɛ dʋnɩya nala aa baa dɩ ba yaa nɩtaaga rɛ, dɩ ʋ we gaduwogo hɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: What the world thinks is worthless, useless, and nothing at all is what God has used to destroy what the world considers important.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ nala hʋ dʋnɩya nala aa deŋ waasʋ rɛ abee nala hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ lee dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ yalmɩ nala hʋ dʋnɩya nala a bɩɩna anɩɩ ba yaa nala rɛ.

english_verse: God did all this to keep anyone from bragging to him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo daga ʋ tɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Friends, when I came and told you the mystery that God had shared with us, I didn't use big words or try to sound wise.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ gyɩ aa ko ma lee dɩ ŋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya ma, ŋ gyɩ bɩ basɩ wɩya daga anɩɩ ŋ gyɩŋ wɩbasɩɩ koo ŋ kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ baŋ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: In fact, while I was with you, I made up my mind to speak only about Jesus Christ, who had been nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa we ma lee, ŋ gyɩ lɩɩ ŋ hakɩla wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, see Yesu Krisita, a bee ba aa kpaasɩ ʋ mal daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya dʋŋ.

english_verse: When I talked with you or preached, I didn't try to prove anything by sounding wise. I simply let God's Spirit show his power.
translation_verse: Nihuwobiŋ nyʋʋpɩŋsʋŋ bee wɩgyʋŋ daa ŋ gyɩ kpa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya ma. Amɛ wɩya hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa basɩ daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ kaŋ dee rɛ.

english_verse: That way you would have faith because of God's power and not because of human wisdom.
translation_verse: Nyɛ daga anɩɩ ma laadii bɩ dɔbɔ nihuwobiŋ wɩgyʋŋ tɩyaŋ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ dɔbɔ. Wɩɩsɩ wɩgyʋŋ

english_verse: We do use wisdom when speaking to people who are mature in their faith. But it isn't the wisdom of this world or of its rulers, who will soon disappear.
translation_verse: Amɛ abee gɛɛ buloŋ, nala hʋ aa waa Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ, wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basɩ yaa wɩgyʋŋ nɛ ba lee. Wɩgyʋŋ no ŋ aa dagɩ, ʋ bɩ yaa dʋnɩya no nala wɩgyʋŋ, dʋnɩya no gaduwogo wɩgyʋŋ mɛ daa. Gaduwogo no dee aa mʋ tenii rɛ.

english_verse: We speak of God's hidden and mysterious wisdom that God decided to use for our glory long before the world began.
translation_verse: Wɩgyʋŋ hʋ wɩya ŋ aa basɩ, ʋ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ, a yaa wɩfaŋɩɩ dʋnɩya nala lee. Ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ na marɩ dʋnɩya, ʋ yaa ʋ hakɩla rɛ anɩɩ wɩgyʋŋ no aa lɩɩ ʋ lee sɩ leŋ dɩ ba kpa ma yohuŋ.

english_verse: The rulers of this world didn't know anything about this wisdom. If they had known about it, they would not have nailed the glorious Lord to a cross.
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya no gaduwogo bɩ gyɩŋ wɩgyʋŋ no memii. Dɩ ba aa rɛ fa gyɩma ʋ memii, ba fa bɩ sɩ kaŋ á Tɩɩna gaŋdarɩ buloŋ tɩɩna hʋ kpaasɩ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But it is just as the Scriptures say, “What God has planned for people who love him is more than eyes have seen or ears have heard. It has never even entered our minds!”
translation_verse: Ba saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ anɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ nihuwobiŋ ha aa bɩ maakyiye na, abee wɩɩ hʋ nihuwobiŋ ha aa bɩ maakyiye nɩɩ, abee wɩɩ hʋ nihuwobiŋ ha aa bɩ maakyiye bɩɩnɩ, wɩya no tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ marɩ biŋ nala hʋ aa kyo ʋ.

english_verse: God's Spirit has shown you everything. His Spirit finds out everything, even what is deep in the mind of God.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a leŋ á kɛ gyɩŋ wɩgyʋŋ no aa yaa wɩfaŋɩɩ. Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa gbilli wɩɩ buloŋ nɛ, a paalɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩfaŋɩya buloŋ memii.

english_verse: You are the only one who knows what is in your own mind, and God's Spirit is the only one who knows what is in God's mind.
translation_verse: Nihuwobiŋ bee rɛ sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna aa bɩɩnɩ? Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo gyɩma, see nal hʋ tɩɩ aa bɩɩnɩ wɩɩ hʋ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nal buloŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa bɩɩnɩ, see Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dʋŋ.

english_verse: But God has given us his Spirit. This is why we don't think the same way that the people of this world think. This is also why we can recognize the blessings God has given us.
translation_verse: Amɛ á kɛ, dʋnɩya no wɩgyʋŋ daa Wɩɩsɩ kpa tɩya ma. Ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ ʋ kpa tɩya ma dɩ á wuwo gyɩŋ kɩna hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa kpaa tɩya abee bɔnyɛ memii.

english_verse: Every word we speak was taught to us by God's Spirit, not by human wisdom. And this same Spirit helps us teach spiritual things to spiritual people.
translation_verse: Wɩya no á aa daga ma nyɛ, nihuwobiŋ wɩgyʋŋ daa á kaŋ kɩ daga ma. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ leŋ á wuwo kɩ daga ma wɩya no. Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ aa daga ma ʋ wɩya no memii, á kaŋ kɩ daga nala hʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ aa wee.

english_verse: People who are guided by the Spirit can make all kinds of judgments, but they cannot be judged by others.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ tɩyaŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa wee, ʋ rɛ sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ wɩkanɩya buloŋ sii, amɛ nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo gyɩŋ nal hʋ tɩyaŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa wee wɩkanɩya sɩɩ.

english_verse: The Scriptures ask, “Has anyone ever known the thoughts of the Lord or given him advice?” But we understand what Christ is thinking.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ, ba saba rɛ a baa, “Kɩbee rɛ gyɩŋ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ tɩbɩɩna? Kɩbee rɛ sɩ wuwo basɩ wɩya a kyagɩlɩ ʋ?” Amɛ á kɛ gyɩŋ wɩya no memii rɛ, beewɩya á bee Krisita hakɩla yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you are acting like the people of this world. That's why I could not speak to you as spiritual people. You are like babies as far as your faith in Christ is concerned.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ ŋ gyɩ aa we ma lee ŋ gyɩ bɩ wuwo basɩ wɩya tɩya ma anɩɩ nala hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii aa wee. Amɛ ŋ gyɩ basɩ wɩya tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ nala aa tɩŋ ba teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ, koo anɩɩ ma ha aa yaa biifɩllɩ Krisita ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: So I had to treat you like babies and feed you milk. You could not take solid food, and you still cannot,
translation_verse: Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ɩl lɛ ŋ gyɩ tɩya ma, kɩdiyoho daa. Beewɩya, ma ha gyɩ bɩ maga kɩdiyoho dii. Abee gyɩnaŋ mɛ gba, ma ha bɩ maga kɩdiyoho dii.

english_verse: because you are not yet spiritual. You are jealous and argue with each other. This proves you are not spiritual and you are acting like the people of this world.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ma ha aa tɩŋ ma teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ: Ma tɩsɩ aa hɔllɩ dɔmɔŋ nɛ, ma gʋla kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ. Nyɛ daga anɩɩ ma ha aa tɩŋ ma teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa nyɛ, dʋnɩya nala wɩyaalɩya daa ma kɩ yaa gɛɛ?

english_verse: Some of you say you follow me, and others claim to follow Apollos. Isn't this how ordinary people behave?
translation_verse: Ma kɩdɩgɩ aa baa dɩ ʋ aa tɩŋ Pɔɔl hal lɛ, kɩdɩgɩ mɛ baa dɩ ʋ aa tɩŋ Apolo hal lɛ. Ma aa yaa nyɛ, dʋnɩya nala wɩyaalɩya daa ma kɩ yaa gɛɛ?

english_verse: The one who plants is just as important as the one who waters. And each one will be paid for what they do.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa pɔɔ tɩya hʋ abee nal hʋ aa yaa nɩɩ we tɩya hʋ, wɩdɩgɩ wɩya rɛ ba buloŋ kɩ tʋma. Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tuŋ nal buloŋ a maga gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa tʋma.

english_verse: Apollos and I work together for God, and you are God's garden and God's building. Only One Foundation
translation_verse: Á buloŋ yaa tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔsɩ rɛ, a tʋma kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ. Ma kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ baga Wɩɩsɩ aa pal, a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ dɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa saa.

english_verse: God treated me with undeserved grace and let me become an expert builder. I laid a foundation on which others have built. But we must each be careful how we build,
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩya ŋ gɛɛ dee nyuniŋ, ŋ biŋ dɩya hʋ memii rɛ anɩɩ dɩɩsaal hʋ aa gyɩŋ tʋma weliŋ, ka nal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ yaŋ saa kɩ gyɩŋ. Amɛ see dɩ nal buloŋ yaŋ fɩyɛlɩ ʋ sɩya weliŋ abee gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa saa kɩ dɔbɔ gyememii no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Whatever we build on this foundation will be tested by fire on the day of judgment. Then everyone will find out if we have used gold, silver, and precious stones, or wood, hay, and straw.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ hʋ Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko, kɩna hʋ nal buloŋ aa kpaa saa dɩya hʋ, ba sɩ na ba. Beewɩya diŋ nɛ sɩ daga kɩŋ hʋ iriŋ ba aa kpaa saa dɩya hʋ. Ba sɩ tɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ a gyɩŋ tʋma hʋ nal buloŋ aa tʋma.

english_verse: But if it is destroyed by the fire, we will lose everything. Yet we ourselves will be saved, like someone escaping from flames.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ diŋ hʋ rɛ wuwo di kɩna hʋ nal buloŋ aa kpaa saa dɩya hʋ, ʋ tɩɩna lɔl sɩ yaa waasʋ. Amɛ ʋ tɩɩ kɛ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa ʋ ta. Ʋ ta sɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa korigi lɩɩ ʋ diŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: All of you surely know you are God's temple and his Spirit lives in you.
translation_verse: Ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ mamaa rɛ yaa Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa gyʋʋ koo?

english_verse: Don't fool yourselves! If any of you think you are wise in the things of this world, you will have to become foolish before you can be truly wise.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ ta mʋrɩ ʋ tɩɩ. Dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ bɩɩna anɩɩ ʋ kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ nɛ gyɩnaŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, ʋ maga dɩ ʋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ bɩrɩmɩ bambugi rɛ, a wuwo na wɩgyʋŋ hʋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee.

english_verse: This is because God considers the wisdom of this world to be foolish. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God catches the wise when they try to outsmart him.”
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya nala wɩgyʋŋ yaa waasʋ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ lee. Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba basa rɛ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ dʋnɩya wɩgyʋnna dawarɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ a bara kasɩ ba.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “The Lord knows that the plans made by wise people are useless.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ mɛ, ba saba rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩma anɩɩ wɩgyʋnna tɩbɩɩna buloŋ yaa waasʋ rɛ.

english_verse: So stop bragging about what anyone has done. Paul and Apollos and Peter all belong to you. In fact, everything is yours, including the world, life, death, the present, and the future. Everything belongs to you,
translation_verse: Mamaa rɛ tɩŋ Pɔɔl, a tɩŋ Apolo, a tɩŋ Piita, a tɩŋ dʋnɩya, a tɩŋ mɩɩbol, a tɩŋ sʋʋ mɛ, a tɩŋ gyɩnaŋ abee maakyiye buloŋ. Mamaa rɛ tɩŋ ba buloŋ.

english_verse: and you belong to Christ, and Christ belongs to God.
translation_verse: Amɛ Krisita mɛ rɛ tɩŋ ma, ka Wɩɩsɩ mɛ tɩŋ Krisita.

english_verse: Think of us as servants of Christ who have been given the work of explaining God's mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Ma maga ma kpa ma anɩɩ á yaa Krisita tʋŋtʋnna rɛ, Wɩɩsɩ kpa ʋ wɩya hʋ aa yaa wɩfaŋɩya a we á nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And since our first duty is to be faithful to the one we work for,
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ ba aa kpaa kɩna we ʋ nosi tɩyaŋ, ʋ maga dɩ ʋ kɩ deŋ ba nyuu abee wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: it doesn't matter to me if I am judged by you or even by a court of law. In fact, I don't judge myself.
translation_verse: Ŋ sɩya tuwo dɩ mamaa koo nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ kana ŋ kɩ di sarɩya. Ŋ tɩɩ mɛ gba bɩ kana ŋ tɩɩ kɩ di sarɩya wɩɩ no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I don't know of anything against me, but this doesn't prove I am right. The Lord is my judge.
translation_verse: Ŋ tɩbɩɩna buloŋ kyaana rɛ. Amɛ ŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo baa ŋ bɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii. Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita dʋŋ nɛ aa di ŋ sarɩya a na dɩ ŋ kaŋ wɩkyogii koo dɩ ŋ bɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii.

english_verse: What is so special about you? What do you have that you were not given? And if it was given to you, how can you brag?
translation_verse: Kɩbee rɛ basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ ma kyo kpɩya ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ rɛ? Bekiŋ nɛ ma kana dɩ Wɩɩsɩ daa kpaa tɩya ma? Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ma kɩ daga ma tɩɩ abee kɩna hʋ ma aa kana anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ daa kpaa ba tɩya ma?

english_verse: Are you already satisfied? Are you now rich? Have you become kings while we are still nobodies? I wish you were kings. Then we could have a share in your kingdom.
translation_verse: Ma kɛ lee, ma teŋ kaŋ ma kɩkyɛɛlɩya buloŋ nɛ? Ma teŋ bɩrɩmɩ kɩna tɩmma rɛ, a teŋ bɩrɩmɩ kuworo, ka á kɛ ha yaa nɩwaasɩma? Wɩtɩɩ, á fa kyo dɩ ma kɔnɩ dɩ koro rɛ, dɩ á beel-ma buloŋ fa yaa kuworo.

english_verse: It seems to me that God has put us apostles in the worst possible place. We are like prisoners on their way to death. Angels and the people of this world just laugh at us.
translation_verse: Ŋ kɛ lee, ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa dɩ á nala hʋ aa yaa Krisita kpambɩsɩ yaa nɩfʋŋɩsɩya rɛ. Á kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ á aa yaa wɩɩ kyogi, a maga dɩ ba kpʋ ma gyamaa tɩyaŋ dɩ dʋnɩya nala abee malɩkasɩ buloŋ na ma.

english_verse: Because of Christ we are thought of as fools, but Christ has made you wise. We are weak and hated, but you are powerful and respected.
translation_verse: Krisita wɩya, á yaa bambugo rɛ, ka ma kɛ baa ma kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ nɛ akuu ma bee Krisita a yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya. Á yaa nɩtaaga rɛ, aŋka ma kɛ yaa gaduwogo. Nala kɩ deŋ ma waasʋ, aŋ kɩ tɩya ma kɛ gyɩrɩma.

english_verse: Even today we go hungry and thirsty and don't have anything to wear except rags. We are mistreated and don't have a place to live.
translation_verse: A kaŋ kɩ ko gyɩnaŋ no sii bʋwaŋ, losi abee nɩɩnyʋwasɩ aa kaŋ ma rɛ, á kɩ laalɩ gakɔsʋŋsɩ, ba kɩ ŋmaa ma kɩŋkaŋ, á gɔllɩ baarɩ kɩ baŋ.

english_verse: We work hard with our own hands, and when people abuse us, we wish them well. When we suffer, we are patient.
translation_verse: Á aa tʋŋ nɛ abee sɩfɩyasɩ dɩ á pɛ á tɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ nala rɛ basɩ wɩbɔmɔ tɩya ma, á kɛ aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ tɩya ba rɛ, dɩ ba aa rɛ aa dɔgɩsɩ ma mɛ, á aa kaŋ kenyiri rɛ.

english_verse: When someone curses us, we answer with kind words. Until now we are thought of as nothing more than the trash and garbage of this world.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ aa kyogi á feŋ mɛ, á kɛ aa kɩ basɩ wɩweliye rɛ ba lee. Abee gyɩnaŋ, ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ámaa rɛ yaa dʋnɩya no buloŋ nɩtɔɔnɩ.

english_verse: I am not writing to embarrass you. I want to help you, just as parents help their own dear children.
translation_verse: Ma yaa ŋ biikyooliye rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ bɩ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma dɩ ŋ we ma hɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, amɛ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ kyagɩlɩ ma rɛ.

english_verse: Ten thousand people may teach you about Christ, but I am your only father. You became my children when I told you about Christ Jesus,
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ kaŋ sɩlaala tusi fi mɛ dɩ ba kɩ daga ma Krisita wɩya, amɛ kuwo dɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ ma kana. Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa ma kuwo Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ, akuu ŋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya ma wɩya.

english_verse: and I want you to be like me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ aa sʋl ma rɛ gyaaŋgyaaŋ buloŋ dɩ ma kɩ kyesi ŋ wɩyaalɩya.

english_verse: This is why I sent Timothy to you. I love him like a son, and he is a faithful servant of the Lord. Timothy will tell you what I do to follow Christ and how it agrees with what I always teach about Christ in every church.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ, ŋ kɩ tɩŋ Timoti dɩ ʋ ko ma lee. Ʋ yaa ŋ biikyoolii rɛ, a kaŋ wɩtɩɩ mɛ á Tɩɩna Krisita ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ sɩ kɩ liisi ma gɛɛ ŋ aa kɩya Yesu Krisita ŋmanɩɩ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ, abee gɛɛ ŋ aa kpaa wɩya no tɩɩ a kɩ daga Krisitabiisi lee kɛ buloŋ ŋ aa mʋwa tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Some of you think I am not coming for a visit, and so you are bragging.
translation_verse: Ma badɔmɔŋ mɩɩgɩ kaŋ dagɩŋtɩɩ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, aŋ yeŋŋi anɩɩ ŋ sɩ ko na ma.

english_verse: But if the Lord lets me come, I will soon be there. Then I will find out if the ones who are doing all this bragging really have any power.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ laa nyʋwa, ŋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ ka dɩ ŋ ko na ma. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko, ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ nɩɩ dagɩŋtɩɩ tɩmma no wɩbasɩya dʋŋ, amɛ ŋ sɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ gyɩŋ dee hʋ ba aa kana.

english_verse: God's kingdom isn't just a lot of words. It is power.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ bɩ sɩŋ nihuwobiŋ wɩbasɩya tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ sɩŋ.

english_verse: What do you want me to do when I arrive? Do you want me to be hard on you or to be kind and gentle?
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kpaa kyapɩya ko vɩɩrɩ ma abee ŋ aa kaŋ kyori abee sɩfɩyala ko ma lee, ba tɩyaŋ kɩbee rɛ ma kɩ kyɛ?

english_verse: I have heard terrible things about some of you. In fact, you are behaving worse than Gentiles. A man is even sleeping with his own stepmother.
translation_verse: Ba basɩ tɩya ŋ nɛ anɩɩ nala we ma tɩyaŋ a kɩ yaa sɔŋsɔŋ wɩya. Wɩɩ hʋ lɔrɔ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, beewɩya nala hʋ aa bee kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ gba paalɩ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa yaa gɛɛ. Ba baa dɩ nal kɩdɩgɩ we ma tɩyaŋ a kaŋ ʋ kuwo haaŋ kɩ pɩŋ.

english_verse: You are proud, when you ought to feel bad enough to chase away anyone who acts like this.
translation_verse: Ka ma ha kɩ daga ma tɩɩ! Ʋ fa maga ma leŋ ma tɩsɩ kyogi rɛ, ka dɩ ma lɩɩ nal hʋ aa yaa gɛɛ a ta ma tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I am with you only in my thoughts. But in the name of our Lord Jesus I have already judged this man, as though I were with you in person. So when you meet together and the power of the Lord Jesus is with you, I will be there too.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko laŋŋɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu feŋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ hakɩla tɩyaŋ, ŋ mɛ aa we ma tɩyaŋ nɛ, á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita dee mɛ we ma tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ wɩya

english_verse: You must then hand that man over to Satan. His body will be destroyed, but his spirit will be saved when the Lord Jesus returns.
translation_verse: ma kpa baal no we Sɩtaanɩ nosi tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ teŋbii, ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa ʋ dʋma kɛ ta kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko.

english_verse: Stop being proud! Don't you know how a little yeast can spread through the whole batch of dough?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hʋ ma aa daga ma tɩɩ hʋ bɩ weliye. Ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ sɩbʋl mʋhʋ rɛ ba aa kpa we paanʋʋ muŋ tɩyaŋ, ka ʋ sii pʋwarɩ a yʋga gɛɛ?

english_verse: Get rid of the old yeast! Then you will be like fresh bread made without yeast, and this is what you are. Our Passover lamb is Christ, who has already been sacrificed.
translation_verse: Ma lɩɩ sɩbʋlbɩnɩɩ hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔŋ a ta ma tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma, a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ paanʋʋ muŋfalɩɩ ba aa bɩ wee sɩbʋl. Nyɛ rɛ ma maga dɩ ma kɩɩ, beewɩya, Krisita, á Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal Pebiye hʋ rɛ ba kaŋ kpʋ a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ á wɩya.

english_verse: So don't celebrate the festival by being evil and sinful, which is like serving bread made with yeast. Be pure and truthful and celebrate by using bread made without yeast.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ á di á Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ abee paanʋʋ hʋ aa kaŋ sɩbʋlbɩnɩɩ. Sɩbʋlbɩnɩɩ no rɛ yaa wɩbɔmɔ abee tahaa. Amɛ ma leŋ dɩ á gbɩyalɩ abee paanʋʋ hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ sɩbʋl. Paanʋʋ no rɛ yaa wɩtɩɩ abee tɩpʋlʋŋ.

english_verse: In my other letter I told you not to have anything to do with immoral people.
translation_verse: Teŋ hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa saba tɩya ma tɩyaŋ, ŋ gyɩ basɩ tɩya ma a baa dɩ ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩ nala hʋ aa yaa sɔŋsɔŋ wɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: But I wasn't talking about the people of this world. You would have to leave this world to get away from everyone who is immoral or greedy or who cheats or worships idols.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ baa ma ta kɩ laŋŋɩ dʋnɩya nala aa yaa bisiŋ wɩya tɩyaŋ, koo nala hʋ aa kaŋ tɩbal, koo gaala, koo vʋgɩmarɩla tɩyaŋ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ baa ma ta kɩ laŋŋɩ nala no tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ ma bɩ sɩ we dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God judges everyone else. The Scriptures say, “Chase away any of your own people who are evil.”
translation_verse: Beewɩya, Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba baa, “Ma lɩɩ nɩbɔŋ buloŋ ta ma tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: When one of you has a complaint against another, do you take your complaint to a court of sinners? Or do you take it to God's people?
translation_verse: Dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ rɛ kaŋ wɩɩ abee ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna Krisitabiye, ʋ paalɩ bɩ maga dɩ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ wɩɩ hʋ mʋ nala hʋ aa bee kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee dɩ ba basɩ. Amɛ ʋ maga dɩ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ wɩɩ hʋ mʋ Krisitabiisi lee rɛ dɩ ba basɩ marɩ ba dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Don't you know that God's people will judge the world? And if you are going to judge the world, can't you settle small problems?
translation_verse: Ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ nala rɛ sɩ di dʋnɩya nala buloŋ sarɩya? Dɩ mamaa rɛ yaŋ sɩ di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya, bee rɛ sɩ tɩŋ dɩ ma bɩ wuwo basɩ wɩbiibiisi no kɩ marɩ dɔmɔŋ?

english_verse: Don't you know we will judge angels? And if this is so, we can surely judge everyday matters.
translation_verse: Ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ámaa Wɩɩsɩ nala rɛ sɩ di malɩkasɩ mɛ sarɩya, aŋ yaŋ ko kɩ deŋ dʋnɩya wɩbiibiisi no nyɛ?

english_verse: I say this to your shame. Aren't any of you wise enough to act as a judge between one follower and another?
translation_verse: Ma wɩɩ no yaa hɩɩsɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ kɛ nɩdɩgɩ mɛ tuwo ma tɩyaŋ a kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ, dɩ wɩɩ rɛ ko we Krisitabiisi balɩya paga tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ wuwo basɩ a marɩ ba dɔmɔŋ koo?

english_verse: Don't you know that evil people won't have a share in the blessings of God's kingdom? Don't fool yourselves! No one who is immoral or worships idols or is unfaithful in marriage or is a pervert or behaves like a homosexual
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma. Ma ta kɩ mʋrɩ ma tɩɩ. Beewɩya, ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ nɩbɔŋ buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ? Nala hʋ aa yaa sɔŋsɔŋ wɩya, koo nala hʋ aa marɩ vʋga, koo nala hʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ nala haana, koo baala koo haana balɩya aa gʋl kɩ kyɛ dɔmɔŋ,

english_verse: will share in God's kingdom. Neither will any thief or greedy person or drunkard or anyone who curses and cheats others.
translation_verse: abee gaala abee tɩbal tɩmma, abee sɩnyʋwala, abee nala hʋ aa kyogi nala fene, abee nala hʋ aa firimi kɩ laa nala kɩna, nala no kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Some of you used to be like that. But now the name of our Lord Jesus Christ and the power of God's Spirit have washed you and made you holy and acceptable to God. Honor God with Your Body
translation_verse: Ma badɔmɔŋ fa aa yaa wɩya no rɛ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ sasɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ ta rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ rɛ tɩŋ ma. Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita nyubaanɩŋ, abee á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, ma bɩrɩmɩ tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma rɛ, a bɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ á kɩ sɔnnɩ

english_verse: Some of you say, “We can do anything we want to.” But I tell you not everything is good for us. So I refuse to let anything have power over me.
translation_verse: Ŋ kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ ŋ aa sɩ wuwo yaa wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ ŋ aa kyɛ. Amɛ ŋ wɩyaalɩya buloŋ daa rɛ aa kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya ŋ. Ŋ kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ ŋ aa sɩ wuwo yaa wɩɩ buloŋ ŋ aa kyɛ, amɛ ŋ bɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ wɩɩ buloŋ kana ŋ bɩrɩmɩ ʋ yoŋ.

english_verse: You also say, “Food is meant for our bodies, and our bodies are meant for food.” But I tell you that God will destroy them both. We are not supposed to do indecent things with our bodies. We are to use them for the Lord who is in charge of our bodies.
translation_verse: Kɩdiiliye wɩya rɛ tɩŋ luwol we doŋ, luwol wɩya mɛ rɛ tɩŋ kɩdiiliye we doŋ. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, amɛ ba buloŋ kaŋ kyɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ leŋ ba yaa waasʋ. Wɩɩsɩ bɩ kpaa teŋ tɩya nihuwobiŋ dɩ ʋ kaŋ kɩ sɔnnɩ, amɛ ʋ baa dɩ ʋ kaŋ ʋ teŋ a tʋma kɩ tɩya ʋ rɛ. Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ teŋ hʋ mɛ.

english_verse: God will raise us from death by the same power he used when he raised our Lord to life.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ kyisi á Tɩɩna Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ sɩ kyisi ma mɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't you know that your bodies are part of the body of Christ? Is it right for me to join part of the body of Christ to a prostitute? No, it isn't!
translation_verse: Ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ma tenni yaa Krisita teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ? Ma bɩɩna anɩɩ ma yaŋ sɩ wuwo kpa Krisita teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ a mʋ mal gyaŋtɩra teŋ tɩyaŋ koo? Ba mʋra rɛ!

english_verse: Don't you know that a man who does that becomes part of her body? The Scriptures say, “The two of them will be like one person.”
translation_verse: Koo ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ dɩ baal lɛ kaŋ gyaŋtɩra pɩŋ, ba buloŋ bɩrɩmɩ nɩdɩgɩ rɛ? Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba basɩ polli rɛ a baa, “Baal bee ʋ haaŋ sɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ.”

english_verse: But anyone who is joined to the Lord is one in spirit with him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nal hʋ aa kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ mʋ mal á Tɩɩna Krisita tɩyaŋ, ʋ bee Krisita yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ ʋ hakɩla tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't be immoral in matters of sex. That is a sin against your own body in a way no other sin is.
translation_verse: Ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩ sɔŋsɔŋ tɩyaŋ. Wɩbɔŋ kɛ buloŋ nihuwobiŋ aa yaa, ʋ bee kyogi ʋ teŋ, amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɔnnɩ, ʋ tɩɩna yaa wɩbɔŋ kɩ kyogi ʋ tɩɩ teŋbii rɛ.

english_verse: You surely know that your body is a temple where the Holy Spirit lives. The Spirit is in you and is a gift from God. You are no longer your own.
translation_verse: Ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ma tenni yaa Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ ʋ aa kpaa we ma tɩyaŋ dɩya rɛ? Ma bɩ tɩŋ ma tɩɩ. Wɩɩsɩ rɛ tɩŋ ma.

english_verse: God paid a great price for you. So use your body to honor God.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kpaa ʋ kyal lɛ a yɔbɔ ma. Ɛɛwɩya, ma kaŋ ma teŋbiye kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ.

english_verse: Now I will answer the questions you asked in your letter. You asked, “Is it best for people not to marry?”
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ ma aa saba a pɩyɛsɩ hʋ, nyɛ kɛ, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ gyʋʋ ba tɩyaŋ nɛ a kyɛ ba sii. Ʋ yaa wɩwelii rɛ dɩ baal buloŋ fa ta kpaa haaŋ.

english_verse: Well, having your own husband or wife should keep you from doing something immoral.
translation_verse: Amɛ akuu sɔŋsɔŋ aa yʋga wɩya, ʋ maga dɩ baal buloŋ kpa haaŋ nɛ, dɩ haaŋ buloŋ mɛ yal bala.

english_verse: Husbands and wives should be fair with each other about having sex.
translation_verse: Ʋ maga dɩ baal bee ʋ haaŋ kpa ba tɩɩ kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ nɛ, a kɩ yaa dɔmɔŋ teŋfɩyɛl wɩya.

english_verse: A wife belongs to her husband instead of to herself, and a husband belongs to his wife instead of to himself.
translation_verse: Haaŋ bɩ tɩŋa ʋ tɩɩ, ʋ bala hal tɩyaŋ, baal mɛ bɩ tɩŋa ʋ tɩɩ, ʋ haaŋ hal tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: In my opinion that is what should be done, though I don't know of anything the Lord said about this matter.
translation_verse: Wɩya no ŋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ mɩra rɛ ŋ biŋ kɩ tɩya ma. Ŋ ta kɩ kyagɩlɩ ma rɛ.

english_verse: My advice for the unmarried and for widows is that it is acceptable for them to remain single, just as I am.
translation_verse: Ŋ yaŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma boŋgyomo abee haboŋgyomo abee ma lohaana rɛ anɩɩ dɩ mamaa rɛ fa kɩɩ ŋ, a ta paa haana koo a yal balama, ʋ fa sɩ weliye.

english_verse: I instruct married couples to stay together, and this is exactly what the Lord himself taught. A wife who leaves her husband
translation_verse: Ma nala hʋ aa kaŋ haana abee balama, wɩɩ no ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ nyɛ, ŋ tɩɩ daa rɛ aa basɩ. Ʋ lɩɩ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ: Haaŋ bɩ maga dɩ ʋ vɩya ʋ bala,

english_verse: I don't know of anything else the Lord said about marriage. All I can do is to give you my own advice. If your wife isn't a follower of the Lord, but is willing to stay with you, don't divorce her.
translation_verse: Ma nɩkaalɩya hʋ mɛ, mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl tɩɩ mɛ aa kaŋ wɩɩ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma rɛ nyɛ. Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ lee daa ʋ lɩɩ. Dɩ Krisitabiye rɛ kaŋ haaŋ aa bɩ laa Yesu wɩya di, ka dɩ haaŋ hʋ laa nyʋwa anɩɩ ʋ bee ʋ bala hʋ hɔŋ, baal hʋ bɩ maga dɩ ʋ vɩya ʋ.

english_verse: If your husband or wife isn't a follower of the Lord and decides to divorce you, then you should agree to it. You are no longer bound to that person. After all, God chose you and wants you to live at peace.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ baal koo haaŋ aa bɩ yaa Krisitabiye rɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ vɩya ʋ haaŋ koo ʋ bala aa yaa Krisitabiye, ŋmanɩɩ we doŋ. Wɩya no iriŋ tɩyaŋ, wɩɩ buloŋ bɩ tɔɔ Krisitabiye hʋ ŋmanɩɩ. Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ dɩ á hɔŋ abee laaŋfɩya rɛ.

english_verse: In every church I tell the people to stay as they were when the Lord Jesus chose them and God called them to be his own. Now I say the same thing to you.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no tɩyaŋ, lee hʋ ɩ fa aa sɩna ka Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ɩ ko laa Yesu wɩya di, abee wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ɩ, ʋ maga dɩ ɩ ha sɩŋ ba tɩyaŋ nɛ. Wɩya no tɩɩ rɛ ŋ aa kpa kɩ daga Krisitabiisi aa we lee kɛ buloŋ ŋ aa mʋwa tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: So don't try to change what you were when God chose you.
translation_verse: Lee hʋ nal buloŋ fa aa sɩna aŋ na ko laa Yesu wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna ha sɩŋ doŋ.

english_verse: When the Lord chooses slaves, they become his free people. And when he chooses free people, they become slaves of Christ.
translation_verse: Yoŋ hʋ buloŋ aa laa á Tɩɩna Krisita wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna tɩŋa ʋ tɩɩ rɛ Krisita lee. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nal hʋ fa aa tɩŋa ʋ tɩɩ aŋ na ko laa Krisita wɩya di, ʋ bɩrɩmɩ Krisita yoŋ nɛ.

english_verse: God paid a great price for you. So don't become slaves of anyone else.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ leŋ Krisita kpaa ʋ kyal lɛ a yɔbɔ ma. Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta yaa nihuwobisi yosi.

english_verse: We are now going through hard times, and I think it is best for you to stay as you are.
translation_verse: Akuu lagɩlagɩ no taŋha hʋ aa deye wɩya, dɩ baal lɛ bɩ kpa haaŋ, ʋ rɛ kpɩya.

english_verse: If you are married, stay married. If you are not married, don't try to get married.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ ko kaŋ haaŋ, ta ko kɩ vɩya ʋ. Dɩ ɩ rɛ ko bɩ kaŋ haaŋ mɛ, ta bɩl ko kɩ kpa haaŋ.

english_verse: It isn't wrong to marry, even if you have never been married before. But those who marry will have a lot of trouble, and I want to protect you from this.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ɩ rɛ kpaa haaŋ, ɩ bɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ. Dɩ hatoluu mɛ ha aa bɩ yala bala rɛ yal bala, ʋ bɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ. Amɛ baala hʋ aa paa haana abee haana hʋ aa yala balama, ba sɩ na tʋwara dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ma gyʋʋ tʋwara no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: My friends, what I mean is that the Lord will soon come, and it won't matter if you are married or not.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa basɩ rɛ nyɛ: Á bɩl bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, nala hʋ aa kaŋ haana, ʋ maga dɩ ba kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ba bɩ kaŋ haana.

english_verse: It won't make any difference how much good you are getting from this world or how much you like it. This world as we know it is now passing away.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa we dʋnɩya wɩkanɩya tɩyaŋ a kɩ yaa, ʋ maga dɩ ba kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ba tuwo ba tɩyaŋ. Dʋnɩya no aa kɩɩ nyɛ gyɩnaŋ, ʋ aa mʋ tenii rɛ.

english_verse: I want all of you to be free from worry. An unmarried man worries about how to please the Lord.
translation_verse: Ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ wɩya kɩ dɔŋ ma. Baal hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ haaŋ, ʋ aa kpa ʋ nyuu buloŋ we á Tɩɩna tʋma tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kɩ yaa gɛɛ buloŋ ʋ aa wuwo, dɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu teŋ fɩyɛlɩ.

english_verse: But a married man has more worries. He must worry about the things of this world, because he wants to please his wife.
translation_verse: Amɛ baal hʋ aa kaŋ haaŋ, ʋ aa kpa ʋ nyuu buloŋ we dʋnɩya wɩkanɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya ɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ yaa dɩ haaŋ hʋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ wɩya dʋŋ nɛ aa kyɩla ʋ.

english_verse: So he is pulled in two directions. Unmarried women and women who have never been married worry only about pleasing the Lord, and they keep their bodies and minds pure. But a married woman worries about the things of this world, because she wants to please her husband.
translation_verse: Ka ʋ hakɩla mɛ aa bɩ sɩŋ wɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ. Haaŋ hʋ ha aa bɩ yal bala, koo hatoluu hʋ ha aa bɩ gyɩŋ baal, ʋ aa kpa ʋ teŋbii bee ʋ hakɩla buloŋ nɛ a we á Tɩɩna Krisita tʋma tɩyaŋ, a kɩ lʋga dɩ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Amɛ haaŋ hʋ aa kaŋ bala, dʋnɩya no wɩkanɩya rɛ aa we ʋ hakɩla tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ yaa dɩ ʋ bala teŋ fɩyɛlɩ dʋŋ wɩya rɛ aa kyɩla ʋ.

english_verse: What I am saying is for your own good—it isn't to limit your freedom. I want to help you to live right and to love the Lord above all else.
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ pɛyi wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ŋ kɩ basɩ wɩya no buloŋ. Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ŋ aa fɩl ma rɛ dɩ ma ta kɩ yaa ma wɩkyɛɛlɩya. Amɛ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ, a kpa ma tɩɩ abee ma wɩɩ buloŋ a tɩya á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita.

english_verse: But suppose you are engaged to someone old enough to be married, and you want her so much that all you can think about is getting married. Then go ahead and marry. There is nothing wrong with that.
translation_verse: Dɩ baal bee haaŋ nɛ wee nyʋwa anɩɩ ba sɩ yala dɔmɔŋ, aŋ ha ta kpa biŋ maakyiye, ka dɩ baal hʋ na anɩɩ ʋ bɩ wuwo kɩ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ haana lugo tɩyaŋ, koo ʋ na anɩɩ dɩ haaŋ hʋ aa hɩyasɩ, dɩ ʋ rɛ aa kyɛ, ʋ aa wuwo ʋ kpa ʋ rɛ. Ʋ gɛɛ bɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ.

english_verse: It is perfectly all right to marry, but it is better not to get married at all.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ baal lɛ kpaa haaŋ, ʋ yaa weliŋ nɛ, amɛ baal hʋ aa bɩ kpa haaŋ, ʋ rɛ yaŋ marɩ yaa weliŋ.

english_verse: A wife should stay married to her husband until he dies. Then she is free to marry again, but only to a man who is a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Haaŋ aa kaŋ bala bɩ tɩŋa ʋ tɩɩ, dɩ ʋ bala rɛ ha we ʋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ. Amɛ dɩ ʋ bala hʋ rɛ ko sʋba, ʋ kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ bɩl yala baal hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa kyɛ. Amɛ ʋ maga dɩ ʋ yala nal hʋ aa yaa Krisitabiye rɛ.

english_verse: However, I think I am obeying God's Spirit when I say she would be happier to stay single.
translation_verse: Dɩ ŋ kɛ dʋŋ nɛ, ʋ fa ta bɩl yal bala. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sɩ hɔŋ abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ŋ mɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: In your letter you asked me about food offered to idols. All of us know something about this subject. But knowledge makes us proud of ourselves, while love makes us helpful to others.
translation_verse: Ma pɩyɛsɩ ŋ vʋga kɩdiiliye mɛ wɩya rɛ. Lagɩlagɩ no, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ ba mɛ wɩya rɛ. Ʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ anɩɩ á buloŋ kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ nɛ. Wɩgyʋŋ no iriŋ aa leŋ nihuwobiŋ ŋmaa ʋ bembii a kɩ daga ʋ tɩɩ rɛ, amɛ kyori dʋŋ nɛ aa wuwo leŋ Krisitabiisi kyiyeli dɔmɔŋ a sɩŋ weliŋ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: In fact, people who think they know so much don't know anything at all.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa bɩɩna anɩɩ ʋ kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ nɛ, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ buloŋ, beewɩya, wɩgyʋŋ hʋ fa aa maga dɩ ʋ kana daa ʋ kana gɛɛ.

english_verse: But God has no doubts about who loves him.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ aa kyo Wɩɩsɩ, Wɩɩsɩ gyɩŋ ʋ tɩɩna rɛ.

english_verse: Even though food is offered to idols, we know that none of the idols in this world are alive. After all, there is only one God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á na dɩ ʋ maga dɩ á kɩ di vʋga kɩdiiliye rɛ koo ʋ bɩ maga. Á tɩɩ gyɩma rɛ weliŋ anɩɩ vʋga bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Á gyɩma mɛ rɛ anɩɩ wɩɩsɩ buloŋ bɩl tuwo a lɩɩ Naabidiye Wɩɩsɩ hal.

english_verse: Many things in heaven and on earth are called gods and lords, but none of them really are gods or lords.
translation_verse: Nala badɔmɔŋ baa dɩ vʋga we taŋha nyuu tɩyaŋ daha rɛ, wɩɩsɩnɩ mɛ we wɩɩsɩnyuu tɩyaŋ. Ba kɛ laa di rɛ anɩɩ wɩɩgyamaa abee tɩɩŋgyamaa rɛ we doŋ.

english_verse: We have only one God, and he is the Father. He created everything, and we live for him. Jesus Christ is our only Lord. Everything was made by him, and by him life was given to us.
translation_verse: Amɛ ámaa Krisitabiisi kɛ lee, Wɩɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ we doŋ. Ʋ rɛ yaa á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa ta kɩŋ buloŋ aa we doŋ. Ʋ rɛ tɩŋ ma. Tɩɩna buloŋ mɛ tuwo dɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita dʋŋ daa. Ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋa a taa kɩŋ buloŋ. Ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ á tɩŋa a kaŋ mɩɩbol mɛ.

english_verse: Not everyone knows these things. In fact, many people have grown up with the belief that idols have life in them. So when they eat meat offered to idols, they are bothered by a weak conscience.
translation_verse: Amɛ nala buloŋ daa gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ no. Nala badɔmɔŋ ha kpaa ba nyuni buloŋ we vʋga tɩyaŋ nɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ abee gyɩnaŋ buloŋ, dɩ ba aa rɛ ko di haŋ kɩdiiliye hʋ iriŋ, ba ha aa kɩ bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ vʋga kɩdiiliye rɛ. Ba hakɩllɩ ha bɩ deye Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ ba aa rɛ ko di vʋga kɩna, ba aa kɩ bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ ba dii bisiŋ kɩna rɛ.

english_verse: But food doesn't bring us any closer to God. We are no worse off if we don't eat, and we are no better off if we do.
translation_verse: Kɩdiiliye bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ bee nihuwobisi paga wɩya marɩ weliye. Dɩ ámaa rɛ aa di kɩdiilii ka buloŋ koo dɩ ámaa rɛ aa sɩŋ badɔmɔŋ aŋ kɩ di badɔmɔŋ, ɛɛ tuwo wɩɩ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ lee.

english_verse: You know all this, and so it doesn't bother you to eat in the temple of an idol. But suppose a person with a weak conscience sees you and decides to eat food that has been offered to idols.
translation_verse: Dɩ Krisitabiisi hʋ aa bɩ waa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya tɩyaŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ naa ma nala hʋ aa waa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya tɩyaŋ kɩdɩgɩ dɩ ʋ hɔŋ vʋga lɩmarɩɩ, a kɩ di vʋga kɩdiiliye hʋ, ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ mɛ sɩ kyesi a kɩ di kɩna no koo?

english_verse: So if I hurt one of the Lord's followers by what I eat, I will never eat meat as long as I live.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ kɩdiiliye hʋ ŋ aa sɩ di rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ŋ naabiye yaa wɩbɔŋ, ɛɛ kɛ ŋ bɩ sɩ maakyiye di haŋ kɩdiiliye hʋ, beewɩya ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ naabiye yaa wɩbɔŋ.

english_verse: I am free. I am an apostle. I have seen the Lord Jesus and have led you to have faith in him.
translation_verse: Ma aa naa ŋ nyɛ, ŋ bɩ tɩŋa ŋ tɩɩ? Ŋ bɩ yaa Yesu Krisita kpambɩya? Ŋ ha bɩ naa á Tɩɩna Yesu? Ma daa yaa tɔnɔ hʋ aa lɩɩ ŋ Wɩɩsɩ tʋma tʋmɩɩ tɩyaŋ?

english_verse: that Barnabas and I have the right to our food and drink.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa gɔllɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya nala nyɛ, ɛɛ kɛ ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ba kɩ tɩya ŋ nyʋwa kɩdiiliye koo?

english_verse: We each have the right to marry one of the Lord's followers and to take her along with us, just as the other apostles and the Lord's brothers and Peter do.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ kɛ, ŋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya nyɛ, ŋ kɛ bɩ kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ŋ kpa haaŋ aa yaa Krisitabiye dɩ ʋ kɩ tɩŋ ŋ hal anɩɩ ŋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Yesu Krisita kpambɩsɩ hʋ badɔmɔŋ abee Yesu nɩmmabalɩya abee Piita aa yaa gɛɛ koo?

english_verse: Are we the only ones who have to support ourselves by working at another job?
translation_verse: Koo ŋ bee Banabaasɩ dʋŋ nɛ maga dɩ á kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya, aŋ ha tʋma kɩ kyɛ á nyʋwa kɩdiiliye?

english_verse: Do soldiers pay their own salaries? Don't people who raise grapes eat some of what they grow? Don't shepherds get milk from their own goats?
translation_verse: Laalyuwol bee rɛ we doŋ a tʋŋ kɩ tuŋ ʋ tɩɩ? Pɩparɩ bee rɛ bee di ʋ tɩɩ panyʋwa kɩna? Nɔdaal bee rɛ bɩ faa ʋ tɩɩ nʋsɩ ɩl kɩ nyʋwa?

english_verse: I am not saying this on my own authority. The Law of Moses tells us not to muzzle an ox when it is grinding grain. But was God concerned only about an ox?
translation_verse: Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ tɩyaŋ, ba basa a baa “Ba bee vʋwa nɔpalɩɩ hʋ aa ŋmaa mɩya nyʋwa.” Nɔpalɩɩ hʋ wɩya daa kyɩla Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: No, he wasn't! He was talking about us. This was written in the Scriptures so that all who plow and all who grind the grain will look forward to sharing in the harvest.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa basɩ wɩɩ no, ámaa rɛ ʋ kɩ daga gɛɛ. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ámaa rɛ ʋ kɩ daga. Pɩpara abee kʋkʋnna buloŋ kaŋ bayɩyɛla rɛ anɩɩ ba kaŋ ba tol lɛ kɩkʋmɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When we told the message to you, it was like planting spiritual seed. So we have the right to accept material things as our harvest from you.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ, Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ á aa basa tɩya ma, ba kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kɩdoho rɛ á kpa doho ma tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ mamaa rɛ aa kyiyeli ma abee dʋnɩya kɩna, ma ta bɩɩna anɩɩ mɛ yaa kɩ parɩ rɛ.

english_verse: If others have the right to do this, we have an even greater right. But we haven't used this right of ours. We are willing to put up with anything to keep from causing trouble for the message about Christ.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa kɩ kyiyeli nala badɔmɔŋ, á kɛ gba paalɩ maga dɩ ma kɩ kyiyeli ma a baŋ ba rɛ. Amɛ á kɛ bɩ kpaa ʋ anɩɩ ʋ yaa kparaama rɛ dɩ ma kyiyeli ma. Á kaŋ kenyiri hʋ aa maga rɛ á wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ gɛɛ wuwo suri ŋmanɩɩ dɩ Krisita wɩweliye pele lee hʋ buloŋ aa maga lagɩ.

english_verse: Don't you know that people who work in the temple make their living from what is brought to the temple? Don't you know that a person who serves at the altar is given part of what is offered?
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ aa di ʋ tʋma lee rɛ. Ma gyɩma anɩɩ nal hʋ aa tʋŋ tʋma Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ, doŋ nɛ ʋ kɩ di, ka nala hʋ mɛ aa kpʋʋ pʋsɩ kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ kogu hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, ba mɛ kaŋ tol lɛ pʋsɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: In the same way, the Lord wants everyone who preaches the good news to make a living from preaching this message.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ á Tɩɩna Krisita mɛ baa dɩ nala hʋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya, dɩ ba mɛ tɩŋ doŋ a kɩ na ba kɩdiiliye.

english_verse: But I have never used these privileges of mine, and I am not writing this because I want to start now. I would rather die than have someone rob me of the right to take pride in this.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ ha bɩ tɩŋ ŋmanɩɩ no a kɩ kyɛ ŋ kɩkyɛɛlɩya. Ŋ aa sabɩ teŋ no kɩ tɩya ma nyɛ, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ŋ aa yɩyɛlɩ nɩɩ ma yaa wɩya no tɩya ŋ nɛ. Ŋ aa sʋba rɛ kpɩya nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ aa kpaa kɩŋ tɩya ŋ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo daga ŋ tɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ no ŋ aa tɩŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I don't have any reason to brag about preaching the good news. Preaching is something God told me to do, and if I don't do it, I am doomed.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ bɩ kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ŋ kɩ daga ŋ tɩɩ akuu ŋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ wɩya. Beewɩya, ʋ yaa fɩlɩɩ rɛ dɩ ŋ kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya. Ba sɩ lɔrɩ ŋ tɩyaŋ dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ vɩya Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ basɩɩ.

english_verse: If I preach because I want to, I will be paid. But even if I don't want to, it is still something God has sent me to do.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ fa kɩɩ nɩɩ ŋ tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya, ɛɛ rɛ ŋ fa sɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ laa tuno. Amɛ ŋ tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ daa, Wɩɩsɩ rɛ lɩɩ ŋ a kpa tʋma no we ŋ nosi tɩyaŋ ŋ kɩ tʋma.

english_verse: What pay am I given? It is the chance to preach the good news free of charge and not to use the privileges that are mine because I am a preacher.
translation_verse: Ŋ tuno rɛ yaŋ yaa bee? Ŋ tuno rɛ yaa dɩ ŋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya ma aŋ ta laa kɩŋ buloŋ. Nyɛ daga anɩɩ ŋ bee laa tuno hʋ aa maga dɩ ŋ laa akuu ŋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ wɩya.

english_verse: I am not anyone's slave. But I have become a slave to everyone, so I can win as many people as possible.
translation_verse: Ŋ tɩŋa ŋ tɩɩ rɛ. Ŋ bɩ yaa nal buloŋ yoŋ. Amɛ ŋ kaŋ ŋ tɩɩ bɩrɩmɩ nal buloŋ yoŋ nɛ dɩ ŋ wuwo na nala yʋga dɩ ba ko tɩŋ Yesu Krisita.

english_verse: And when I am with people who are not ruled by the Law, I forget about the Law to win them. Of course, I never really forget about the law of God. In fact, I am ruled by the law of Christ.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko mʋ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma lee, ŋ aa kaŋ ŋ tɩɩ bɩrɩmɩ ba kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, aŋ ta bee tɩŋ Gyuuma mɩrɩsɩ hʋ dɩ ŋ wuwo leŋ dɩ ba badɔmɔŋ ko tɩŋ Yesu Krisita. Wɩɩ no bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ŋ bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ. Amɛ ŋ kɔnɩ aa tɩŋ wɩya hʋ Krisita aa basa rɛ.

english_verse: I don't run without a goal. And I don't box by beating my fists in the air.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ fá kɩ mʋ sɩdeŋ, a kɩ deŋ lɩmʋtenii hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nal aa ŋmaa kyɔrɩya, ŋ bɩ viri ŋ noŋ kɩ ta waasʋ waasʋ.

english_verse: I keep my body under control and make it my slave, so I won't lose out after telling the good news to others.
translation_verse: Ŋ fɩla ŋ tɩɩ rɛ, a kana ŋ teŋbii bɩrɩmɩ ŋ yoŋ. Ŋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ ŋ ta ko basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya nala teŋ, ka dɩ ŋ tɩɩ bɩ kaŋ tol Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: All of them also ate the same spiritual food
translation_verse: Ba buloŋ nɛ gyɩ dii kɩdiiliye hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩya ba.

english_verse: and drank the same spiritual drink, which flowed from the spiritual rock that followed them. That rock was Christ.
translation_verse: Ba buloŋ mɛ rɛ gyɩ nyʋwa nɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa leŋ ʋ lɩɩ bʋyɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Krisita tɩɩ rɛ yaa bʋyɩ no, a gyɩ kɩ tɩŋ ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But most of them did not please God. So they died, and their bodies were scattered all over the desert.
translation_verse: Abee gɛɛ buloŋ, ka Wɩɩsɩ teŋ gyɩ bɩ fɩyɛla ba gyeniŋ buloŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba gyɩ sʋba sʋba gyaasɩ pogo hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: What happened to them is a warning to keep us from wanting to do the same evil things.
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ yaa wɩyaabiniye rɛ, dɩ ba kʋrɩsɩ á dɩgɩna dɩ á ta kpaa á hakɩllɩ we wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ nala no fa aa yaa gɛɛ.

english_verse: They worshiped idols, just as the Scriptures say, “The people sat down to eat and drink. Then they got up to dance around.” So don't worship idols.
translation_verse: Ma ta kɩ marɩ vʋga anɩɩ á naabaala hʋ badɔmɔŋ gyɩ aa yaa gɛɛ. Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba baa, “Nala hʋ gyɩ hɔŋ di kɩdiiliye rɛ, a nyʋwa sɩŋ, aŋ sii gʋwa, a yaa wɩlaama.”

english_verse: Some of you say, “We can do whatever we want to!” But I tell you not everything may be good or helpful.
translation_verse: Á kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ á aa sɩ wuwo yaa wɩɩ buloŋ, amɛ wɩɩ buloŋ daa kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya ma. Wɩɩ buloŋ mɛ daa kaŋ kyiyelii tɩya ma, á Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And don't try to test Christ, as some of them did and were later bitten by poisonous snakes.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ á kɩ magɩsɩ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ anɩɩ ba badɔmɔŋ gyɩ aa magɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ gɛɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ leŋ dʋma dʋŋ ba kpʋ.

english_verse: Don't even grumble, as some of them did and were killed by the destroying angel.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ á kɩ gʋrɩmɩ wɩya anɩɩ ba badɔmɔŋ gyɩ aa yaa gɛɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ leŋ ʋ malɩka hʋ aa kpʋ nala ko kpʋ ba.

english_verse: These things happened to them as a warning to us. All this was written in the Scriptures to teach us who live in these last days.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ yaa ba wɩya no rɛ, ʋ yaa kyagɩlɩ a tɩya nal buloŋ. Amɛ ba sabɩ wɩya no biŋ dɩ ba kʋrɩsɩ á Krisitabiisi dɩgɩna rɛ. Beewɩya, á we saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ dʋnɩya hʋ aa kpaga tenii rɛ.

english_verse: Even if you think you can stand up to temptation, be careful not to fall.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nal buloŋ aa bɩɩna anɩɩ ʋ kɛ sɩŋ weliŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna fɩyɛlɩ ʋ sɩya weliŋ, dɩ ʋ ta ko tele.

english_verse: My friends, you must keep away from idols.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ kyaŋweliye, ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩ vʋga marɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I am speaking to you as people who have enough sense to know what I am talking about.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ nɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ basɩ wɩɩ no kɩ tɩya ma. Ma tɩɩ bɩɩnɩ wɩɩ no na weliŋ.

english_verse: By sharing in the same loaf of bread, we become one body, even though there are many of us.
translation_verse: Á yʋga rɛ, amɛ akuu á buloŋ aa kpa paanʋʋ dɩgɩ a kpaa dɔmɔŋ wɩya, á buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Aren't the people of Israel sharing in the worship when they gather around the altar and eat the sacrifices offered there?
translation_verse: Ma liisi Iziral tɩmma nala hʋ gyɩ aa kpʋ pʋsɩ a fisi kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ wɩya. Dɩ ba aa rɛ gyɩ ko kpʋ pʋna buloŋ, ba mɛ aa kyaŋ ba tol lɛ. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ba bee Wɩɩsɩ buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.
