english_verse: Am I saying that either the idols or the food sacrificed to them is anything at all?
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no ŋ aa basa, ʋ memii rɛ yaa bee? Ma bɩɩna ŋ baa dɩ vʋga abee vʋga kɩdiiliye yaa kɩna rɛ koo?

english_verse: No, I am not! This food is really sacrificed to demons and not to God. I don't want you to have anything to do with demons.
translation_verse: Aayɩ, wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa basɩ rɛ nyɛ: Dɩ vʋgɩmarɩla rɛ marɩ ba vʋga, kɩŋ kɛ buloŋ ba aa kpʋwa, ba aa kpʋ tɩya gyɩŋbɔmɔ rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ daa ba aa kpʋ tɩya. Ŋ yaŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ma bee gyɩŋbɔmɔ pɛ wɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: You cannot drink from the cup of demons and still drink from the Lord's cup. You cannot eat at the table of demons and still eat at the Lord's table.
translation_verse: Ma bee Wɩɩsɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo pɛ nɩɩnyʋwagbaŋbiye, aŋka dɩ ma bee gyɩŋbɔmɔ mɛ bɩl pɛ nɩɩnyʋwagbaŋbiye. Ma bee Wɩɩsɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo pɛ kɩdigbaha, ka dɩ ma bee gyɩŋbɔmɔ mɛ bɩl kɩdigbaha.

english_verse: We would make the Lord jealous if we did this. And we are not stronger than the Lord. Always Honor God
translation_verse: Koo á aa kyɛ dɩ á yaa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ baaŋ sii rɛ? Koo á bɩɩna anɩɩ ámaa rɛ kaŋ dee te Wɩɩsɩ?

english_verse: However, when you buy meat in the market, go ahead and eat it. Keep your conscience clear by not asking where the meat came from.
translation_verse: Ma sɩ wuwo kyaŋ namɩya kɛ buloŋ ba aa yallɩ yɔbɔ tɩyaŋ. Ma ta leŋ dɩ ʋ kyaŋɩɩ wɩya kɩ dɔŋ ma hakɩllɩ nɩɩ vʋgɩmarɩ namɩya rɛ koo vʋgɩmarɩ namɩya daa.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “The earth and everything in it belong to the Lord.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba basa rɛ a baa, “Dʋnɩya abee kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa we ʋ tɩyaŋ, á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ rɛ tɩŋ ba.”

english_verse: If an unbeliever invites you to dinner, and you want to go, then go. Eat whatever you are served. Don't cause a problem for someone's conscience by asking where the food came from.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal hʋ aa bee kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yɩrɩ ɩ dɩ ɩ ko di kɩna, dɩ ɩ rɛ ko kɩ kyɛ, mʋ di. Ta leŋ dɩ ɩ hakɩla kɩ dɔmɔ ɩ kɩdiiliye hʋ wɩya, anɩɩ ʋ maga dɩ ɩ di koo ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ɩ di.

english_verse: But if you are told it has been sacrificed to idols, don't cause a problem by eating it. I don't mean a problem for yourself, but for the one who told you. Why should my freedom be limited by someone else's conscience?
translation_verse: Ta tɩŋa ɩ hakɩla tɩyaŋ a di, tɩŋ nal hʋ aa basɩ tɩya ɩ hakɩla tɩyaŋ, a ta diye. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ dɩ ŋ yaa wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kyɛ, bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ nal kɩdɩgɩ hakɩla sɩ wuwo tɔ ŋ ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ŋ ta yaa haŋ wɩɩ hʋ?

english_verse: If I give thanks for what I eat, why should anyone accuse me of doing wrong?
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ aŋ na di kɩdiilii, ɛɛ rɛ nal kɩdɩgɩ sɩ yaa basɩ tɩya ŋ anɩɩ ŋ kyogo rɛ ŋ aa dii kɩdiilii hʋ wɩya?

english_verse: I always try to please others instead of myself, in the hope that many of them will be saved.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ kyesi ŋ wɩyaalɩya. Wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ ŋ aa yaa, ŋ aa bee kyɩla ŋ tɩɩ wɩya. Amɛ ŋ aa kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ pɛ nɩgyamaa tɩyaŋ nɛ, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa ba ta.

english_verse: You must follow my example, as I follow the example of Christ. Rules for Worship
translation_verse: Ma kɩ kyesi ŋ wɩyaalɩya anɩɩ ŋ mɛ aa kyesi Krisita gɛɛ.

english_verse: I am proud of you, because you always remember me and obey the teachings I gave you.
translation_verse: Ma aa yaa kuwokeri rɛ, abee ma aa kɩ liisi ŋ wɩya saŋa buloŋ, a kɩ tɩŋ wɩya hʋ mɛ ŋ aa kpaa daga ma.

english_verse: Now I want you to know that Christ is the head of all men, and a man is the head of a woman. But God is the head of Christ.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ Krisita rɛ aa deŋ baal buloŋ nyuu. Haaŋ bala mɛ rɛ aa deŋ ʋ haaŋ nyuu. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ rɛ aa deŋ Krisita nyuu.

english_verse: This means that any man who prays or prophesies with something on his head brings shame to his head.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ baal lɛ kpaa kɩŋ tɔ ʋ nyuu aŋ kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, koo a kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya gyamaa tɩyaŋ, ʋ aa we nal hʋ aa deŋ ʋ nyuu hɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: But any woman who prays or prophesies without something on her head brings shame to her head. In fact, she may as well shave her head.
translation_verse: Dɩ haaŋ mɛ buloŋ nɛ bɩ kpaa kɩŋ vʋwa tɔ ʋ nyuu, aŋ kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, koo a kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya gyamaa tɩyaŋ, ʋ bala rɛ ʋ kɩ we hɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ʋ aa fʋma ʋ nyuu.

english_verse: A woman should wear something on her head. It is a disgrace for a woman to shave her head or cut her hair. But if she refuses to wear something on her head, let her cut off her hair.
translation_verse: Dɩ haaŋ nɛ ko bee kyɛ dɩ ʋ kpa kɩŋ vʋwa tɔ ʋ nyuu, ɛɛ kɛ ma leŋ dɩ ʋ fʋma ʋ nyuu ta. Ʋ aa yaa hɩɩsɩ wɩɩ abee haaŋ aa sɩ ko ʋ nyuu, koo a fʋma ʋ nyuu wɩya, ʋ maga dɩ haaŋ buloŋ kpa kɩŋ vʋwa tɔ ʋ nyuu rɛ.

english_verse: Men were created to be like God and to bring honor to God. This means a man should not wear anything on his head. Women were created to bring honor to men.
translation_verse: Baal kɛ bɩ maga dɩ ʋ kpa kɩŋ tɔ ʋ nyuu, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ marɩ baal ʋ kɩɩ ʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ. Ʋ mɛ rɛ aa daga Wɩɩsɩ gaŋdarɩ. Amɛ haaŋ mɛ rɛ aa daga baal gaŋdarɩ,

english_verse: It was the woman who was made from a man, and not the man who was made from a woman.
translation_verse: beewɩya haaŋ tɩyaŋ daa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋa a marɩ baal, amɛ baal tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩŋa a marɩ haaŋ.

english_verse: He wasn't created for her. She was created for him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ mɛ bɩla, haaŋ wɩya daa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ marɩ baal, amɛ baal wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ marɩ haaŋ.

english_verse: And so, because of this, and also because of the angels, a woman ought to wear something on her head, as a sign of her authority.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no wɩya, abee malɩkasɩ wɩya, haaŋ maga dɩ ʋ kpa kɩŋ vʋwa tɔ ʋ nyuu rɛ a daga anɩɩ ʋ bala rɛ aa deŋ ʋ nyuu.

english_verse: As far as the Lord is concerned, men and women need each other.
translation_verse: Amɛ Krisita sɩya tɩyaŋ, baal bɩ tɩŋa ʋ tɩɩ a lɩɩ ʋ haaŋ hal, haaŋ mɛ bɩ tɩŋa ʋ tɩɩ a lɩɩ ʋ bala hal.

english_verse: It is true that the first woman came from a man, but all other men have been given birth by women. Yet God is the one who created everything.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa yaŋ tɩŋ baal tɩyaŋ a marɩ haaŋ gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ haaŋ mɛ kɩ lʋl baal. Amɛ kɩŋ buloŋ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ.

english_verse: Ask yourselves if it is proper for a woman to pray without something on her head.
translation_verse: Ma pɩyɛsɩ ma tɩɩ wɩɩ no na weliŋ, dɩ haaŋ nɛ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ gyamaa tɩyaŋ, aŋ bɩ kpaa kɩŋ vʋwa tɔ ʋ nyuu, ʋ yaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ?

english_verse: But long hair is a beautiful way for a woman to cover her head.
translation_verse: Amɛ nyupʋŋdoliye yaa weliŋ kɩna rɛ haaŋ kɛ lee. Wɩɩsɩ kpaa nyupʋŋdoliye tɩya haaŋ dɩ ʋ kaŋ kɩ tɔ ʋ nyuu rɛ.

english_verse: I am told you can't get along with each other when you worship, and I am sure that some of what I have heard is true.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ aa we doŋ nɛ nyɛ, ba basɩ tɩya ŋ anɩɩ dɩ mamaa rɛ ko laŋŋɩ dɩ ma kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, nyʋʋdɩgɩ aa tuwo ma tɩyaŋ. Ŋ laa di anɩɩ wɩtɩɩ mʋhʋ we wɩɩ no tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: You are bound to argue with each other, but it is easy to see which of you have God's approval.
translation_verse: Sige tuwo, ʋ paalɩ maga dɩ ma porigi dɔmɔŋ nɛ, dɩ ba gyɩŋ nala hʋ kɔnɩ aa sɩŋ wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You even start eating before everyone gets to the meeting, and some of you go hungry, while others get drunk.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, ma aa ko ko, ma aa bɩ gyegili dɔmɔŋ aŋ kɩ di ma kɩdiiliye. Badɔmɔŋ aa di vɔgɔ rɛ, a nyʋwa sɩŋ bugo, ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ kaŋ losi.

english_verse: The Lord meant that when you eat this bread and drink from this cup, you tell about his death until he comes.
translation_verse: A lɩɩ nyɛ kaŋ kɩ mʋ saŋa hʋ á Tɩɩna aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko, dɩ mamaa rɛ ko laŋŋɩ saŋa kɛ buloŋ a kyaŋ paanʋʋ no, aŋ nyʋwa nɩɩnyʋwagbaŋbiye no tɩya kɩna, á Tɩɩna Krisita sʋʋ daŋsɩya rɛ ma kɩ di gɛɛ.

english_verse: If you fail to understand that you are the body of the Lord, you will condemn yourselves by the way you eat and drink.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ bɩ sʋnnɩ ʋ tɩɩ na weliŋ a gyɩma anɩɩ paanʋʋ hʋ ʋ aa kyaŋ yaa Krisita teŋbii rɛ, sɩŋ hʋ mɛ yaa ʋ kyal, ka dɩ ʋ na di aŋ nyʋwa, ʋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ bagɩna we ŋmaŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: After the meal, Jesus took a cup of wine in his hands and said, “This is my blood, and with it God makes his new agreement with you. Drink this and remember me.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ, ba aa dii kɩdiiliye hʋ teŋ, ʋ bɩl kpa nɩɩnyʋwagbaŋbiye abee sɩŋ mɛ aŋ baa, “Nɩɩnyʋwagbaŋbiye no tɩya kɩna rɛ yaa ŋ kyal Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa we nyʋʋfalɩɩ hʋ tɩya ma. Saŋa kɛ buloŋ dɩ mamaa rɛ ko kɩ nyʋwa ʋ tɩya kɩna, ma nyʋwa a kɩ liisi ŋ wɩya.”

english_verse: I have already told you what the Lord Jesus did on the night he was betrayed. And it came from the Lord himself. He took some bread in his hands.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ á Tɩɩna Krisita tɩɩ aa daga ŋ, ba aa rɛ ŋ mɛ kpa kɩ daga ma nyɛ. Haŋ tebine hʋ, ka dɩ ba na kpa á Tɩɩna Yesu yallɩ, ʋ gyɩ kpaa paanʋʋgaŋ nɛ,

english_verse: Then after he had given thanks, he broke it and said, “This is my body, which is given for you. Eat this and remember me.”
translation_verse: a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ, aŋ kaŋ lɔgɔ aŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ a baa, “Ŋ teŋbii rɛ nyɛ ŋ kpa kɩ tɩya ma. Ma yaa nyɛ a kɩ liisi ŋ wɩya.”

english_verse: But if you eat the bread and drink the wine in a way that isn't worthy of the Lord, you sin against his body and blood.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko kyaŋ á Tɩɩna paanʋʋ no koo a nyʋwa ʋ nɩɩnyʋwagbaŋbiye no tɩya kɩna ɛɛ aa bɩ maga, ʋ tɩɩna yaa wɩbɔŋ nɛ, beewɩya ʋ kaŋ á Tɩɩna teŋbii abee ʋ kyal hʋ kʋwasɩ rɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: This is why many of you are sick and weak and why a lot of others have died.
translation_verse: Ma badɔmɔŋ we doŋ aa bɩ sʋnnɩ ba tɩɩ na weliŋ, aŋ kɩ di kɩdiiliye hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ma gyeniŋ buloŋ wɩɩlɩ pʋgɩmɩ pʋgɩmɩ, ka ma badɔmɔŋ mɛ sʋba gɛɛ.

english_verse: But when the Lord judges and punishes us, he does it to keep us from being condemned with the rest of the world.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ naa dɩ á kyogo rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ laa sɩya dɔgɩsɩ ma. Beewɩya, ʋ bee kyɛ dɩ ʋ ko kpa ma pɛ dʋnɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ laa Yesu wɩya di tɩyaŋ a di á sarɩya, a kpa kyogisi tɩya ma.

english_verse: My dear friends, you should wait until everyone gets there before you start eating.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ naabalɩya, dɩ mamaa rɛ ko laŋŋɩ dɩ ma di kɩdiiliye hʋ á Tɩɩna aa baa dɩ á di a kɩ liisi ʋ wɩya, ma gyegili dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: If you really are hungry, you can eat at home. Then you won't condemn yourselves when you meet together. After I arrive, I will instruct you about the other matters.
translation_verse: Dɩ losi rɛ kaŋ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ, ʋ di kɩna ʋ dɩya tɩyaŋ, aŋ na ko laŋŋɩɩ hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma ta yaa wɩɩ kyogi ma laŋŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ ko kpa kyogisi tɩya ma. Wɩkaalɩya hʋ kɛ buloŋ, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko, ŋ sɩ daga ma ba ŋmaŋsɩ.

english_verse: I want you to remember that before you became followers of the Lord, you were led in all the wrong ways by idols that cannot even talk.
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ gyɩma anɩɩ saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ ma fa aa bɩ yaa Krisitabiisi, ma fa nyʋgɩsa rɛ, a fa kɩ marɩ vʋga aa bɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: Now I want you to know that if you are led by God's Spirit, you will say that Jesus is Lord, and you will never curse Jesus.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩma anɩɩ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ we nal tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ sɩ wuwo basɩ wɩbɔŋ a tɩya Yesu. Nal buloŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo baa dɩ Yesu rɛ yaa á Tɩɩna, see dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ʋ tɩɩna tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: There are different kinds of spiritual gifts, but they all come from the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa kpa bɔnyɛ kɩna iriŋ iriŋ nɛ a tɩya ma amɛ ba buloŋ aa lɩɩ haŋ Wiyesi Welidɩgɩ hʋ dʋŋ lee rɛ.

english_verse: and we can each do different things. Yet the same God works in all of us and helps us in everything we do.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ kaŋ ʋ tʋma rɛ ʋ aa sɩ wuwo tʋma a tɩya Wɩɩsɩ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ aa tɩya nal buloŋ dee ʋ kaŋ kɩ tʋŋ tʋma hʋ.

english_verse: The Spirit has given each of us a special way of serving others.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ kaŋ ʋ wɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa kpaa tɩya ʋ, dɩ ʋ kaŋ kɩ pɛ ʋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Krisitabiisi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Some of us can speak with wisdom, while others can speak with knowledge, but these gifts come from the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa wuwo leŋ nal kɩdɩgɩ kɩ basɩ wɩya bee wɩgyʋŋ nɛ ka kɩdɩgɩ mɛ kɩ basɩ bee gyɩmaa.

english_verse: To others the Spirit has given great faith or the power to heal the sick
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii no tɩɩ rɛ aa wuwo leŋ nal kɩdɩgɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di weliŋ, a leŋ nal kɩdɩgɩ mɛ kaŋ dee a kɩ tɩɩbɩ wɩɩla tɩmma,

english_verse: But it is the Spirit who does all this and decides which gifts to give to each of us. One Body with Many Parts
translation_verse: Tʋŋ iriŋ iriŋ noma buloŋ lɩɩ Wiyesi Welidɩgɩ hʋ dʋŋ lee rɛ. Ʋ tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩŋa a kpa wɩ-iriŋ iriŋ no ma a tɩya nal buloŋ.

english_verse: Some of us are Jews, and others are Gentiles. Some of us are slaves, and others are free. But God's Spirit baptized each of us and made us part of the body of Christ. Now we each drink from that same Spirit.
translation_verse: Nyɛ tɩɩ rɛ á Krisitabiisi mɛ kɩɩ. Á yaa nɩgyamaa rɛ, amɛ á yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Wiyesi Welidɩgɩ hʋ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ ba fo á buloŋ wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ, á nala hʋ aa yaa Gyuuma abee nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma, nala hʋ aa yaa yosi abee nala hʋ aa tɩŋ ba tɩɩ buloŋ. Wɩɩsɩ kpaa ʋ Wiyesi Welidɩgɩ hʋ a we á buloŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Our bodies don't have just one part. They have many parts.
translation_verse: Nihuwobiŋ teŋbii buloŋ bɩ yaa logiŋdɩgɩ dʋŋ. Ʋ kaŋ logiŋgyamaa rɛ.

english_verse: Suppose a foot says, “I'm not a hand, and so I'm not part of the body.” Wouldn't the foot still belong to the body?
translation_verse: Dɩ nihuwobiŋ naaŋ nɛ sii baa, “Ŋ bɩ yaa noŋ, ɛɛ wɩya ŋ bɩ pɛɛ nihuwobiŋ teŋ tɩyaŋ”, nyɛ basɩɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ bɩ yaa nihuwobiŋ teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ?

english_verse: Or suppose an ear says, “I'm not an eye, and so I'm not part of the body.” Wouldn't the ear still belong to the body?
translation_verse: Dɩ dɩgɩŋ nɛ sii baa “Ŋ bɩ yaa sii, ɛɛ wɩya ŋ bɩ pɛɛ nihuwobiŋ teŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ nyɛ basɩɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ bɩ yaa nihuwobiŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ?

english_verse: If our bodies were only an eye, we couldn't hear a thing. And if they were only an ear, we couldn't smell a thing.
translation_verse: Dɩ nihuwobiŋ teŋbii buloŋ fa yaa sii dʋŋ, ɛɛ rɛ nihuwobiŋ fa sɩ yaa a kɩ nɩɩ wɩya? Dɩ nihuwobiŋ teŋbii buloŋ mɛ rɛ fa yaa dɩgɩŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ fa sɩ yaa a kɩ nɩɩ sʋwala?

english_verse: But God has put all parts of our body together in the way that he decided is best.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ aa we doŋ nɛ nyɛ, Wɩɩsɩ marɩ nihuwobiŋ logimo buloŋ nɛ a leŋ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ we lee hʋ ʋ aa kyɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: A body isn't really a body, unless there is more than one part.
translation_verse: Dɩ nihuwobiŋ teŋbii buloŋ fa yaa logiŋdɩgɩ dʋŋ, ʋ fa sɩ kpere?

english_verse: It takes many parts to make a single body.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ aa we doŋ nɛ nyɛ: nihuwobiŋ teŋbii yaa kɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ aŋ kaŋ logiŋgyamaa.

english_verse: That's why the eyes cannot say they don't need the hands. That's also why the head cannot say it doesn't need the feet.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, sɩɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo basɩ tɩya noŋ anɩɩ noŋ bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya ʋ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nyuu mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo basɩ tɩya naasɩ anɩɩ naasɩ bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: In fact, we cannot get along without the parts of the body that seem to be the weakest.
translation_verse: Nihuwobiŋ teŋ leye badɔmɔŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ba bɩ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ kɩna, amɛ dɩ ba aa rɛ tuwo ʋ teŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa wɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: but we don't have to be modest about other parts. God put our bodies together in such a way that even the parts that seem the least important are valuable.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ kpaa nihuwobiŋ teŋbii leye buloŋ pɛ dɔmɔŋ, a kpa yohuŋ tɩya leye hʋ á aa bɩɩnɩ ba bɩ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ leye.

english_verse: He did this to make all parts of the body work together smoothly, with each part caring about the others.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ nihuwobiŋ teŋ lɩgyamaa hʋ buloŋ ta gʋl kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ, ka dɩ ba kyɩl dɔmɔŋ wɩya a maga dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: If one part of our body hurts, we hurt all over. If one part of our body is honored, the whole body will be happy.
translation_verse: Dɩ nihuwobiŋ logiŋdɩgɩ rɛ ko kɩ na tʋwara, ʋ teŋ lɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ mɛ aa we haŋ tʋwara hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, dɩ ba aa rɛ bɩl bigisi nihuwobiŋ teŋ logiŋdɩgɩ, ʋ teŋ leye buloŋ tenni mɛ aa fɩyɛlɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Together you are the body of Christ. Each one of you is part of his body.
translation_verse: Ma buloŋ pɛɛ dɔmɔŋ a yaa Yesu teŋbii rɛ. Ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ yaa ʋ teŋbii logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Not everyone is an apostle. Not everyone is a prophet. Not everyone is a teacher. Not everyone can work miracles.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ kɛ, Krisitabiisi buloŋ nɛ yaŋ yaa Yesu kpambɩsɩ? Koo ba buloŋ nɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala, koo nala hʋ aa daga nala Wɩɩsɩ wɩya. Ba buloŋ nɛ kaŋ dee a kɩ yaa wɩmagɩla?

english_verse: Not everyone can heal the sick. Not everyone can speak different kinds of languages. Not everyone can tell what these languages mean.
translation_verse: Koo ba buloŋ nɛ kaŋ dee a kɩ tɩɩbɩ wɩɩla tɩmma. Ba buloŋ nɛ wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩya taakperiye tɩyaŋ? Koo ba buloŋ nɛ wuwo kɩ gyɩŋ taakperiye hʋ memii?

english_verse: I want you to desire the best gifts. So I will show you a much better way.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma yaa sɩfɩyaŋ kɩ kyɛ bɔnyɛ kɩna hʋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa kpaa kɩ tɩya nala. Amɛ ŋ yaŋ sɩ daga ma ŋmanɩɩ hʋ aa baŋ ŋmaŋsɩ buloŋ dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋa.

english_verse: What if I could speak all languages of humans and even of angels? If I did not love others, I would be nothing more than a noisy gong or a clanging cymbal.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ wuwo kɩ basɩ dʋnɩya no taanɩ buloŋ, abee malɩkasɩ taanɩ buloŋ mɛ, aŋka dɩ ŋ bɩ kyo nala, ŋ wɩbasɩɩ hʋ buloŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ tahaŋkpaa rɛ ŋ ŋmaa kɩ yaa kyagɩŋsɩ waasʋ.

english_verse: What if I could prophesy and understand all mysteries and all knowledge? And what if I had faith that moved mountains? I would be nothing, unless I loved others.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩduwoni Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, a wuwo gyɩŋ wɩfaŋɩɩ buloŋ memii, a kaŋ wɩɩ buloŋ gyɩmaa, a kaŋ laadii ŋ aa sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ dogiŋsi kyuri, aŋka dɩ ŋ bɩ kaŋ kyori abee nala, ŋ bɩ dɔbɔ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: What if I gave away all that I owned and let myself be burned alive? I would gain nothing, unless I loved others.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ kpaa ŋ kɩna buloŋ tɩya nyaaba, aŋ ha kpa ŋ tɩɩ mɛ tɩya dɩ ba kpa ŋ nyɔgɔ, aŋka dɩ ŋ bɩ kyo nala, ʋ bɩ sɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ tɩya ŋ.

english_verse: Love never fails! Everyone who prophesies will stop, and unknown languages will no longer be spoken. All that we know will be forgotten.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa leŋ á wuwo kɩ basɩ, abee taakperiye hʋ ʋ aa leŋ á wuwo kɩ basɩ, abee gyɩmaa hʋ buloŋ á aa kana, ba buloŋ sɩ maakyiye teŋ. Amɛ kyori kɛ bɩ sɩ maakyiye teŋ.

english_verse: But what is perfect will someday appear, and what isn't perfect will then disappear.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ wɩpiliŋ hʋ rɛ ko ko, wɩboriye hʋ buloŋ sɩ nyʋgɩsɩ.

english_verse: When we were children, we thought and reasoned as children do. But when we grew up, we quit our childish ways.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ŋ fa aa yaa haŋbiye, ŋ fa aa kɩ basɩ haŋbiiwɩya rɛ, a kaŋ haŋbii-hakɩla, a fa kɩ yaa wɩya abee haŋbiri. Amɛ ŋ aa ko waa teŋ, ŋ kpaa haŋbiiwɩya no buloŋ ta rɛ.

english_verse: Now all we can see of God is like a cloudy picture in a mirror. Later we will see him face to face. We don't know everything, but then we will, just as God completely understands us.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ á aa na lagɩlagɩ no, ba kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ kɩŋ á aa na liine liine nyagɩsa tɩyaŋ. Amɛ á beel-ʋ sɩya sɩ maakyiye pɔ dɔmɔŋ dɩ á na ʋ weliŋ. Wɩya hʋ ŋ aa gyɩma lagɩlagɩ no, ba ha yaa wɩboriye rɛ, amɛ ŋ sɩ maakyiye gyɩŋ ba teŋ, anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa gyɩma ŋ teŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: For now there are faith, hope, and love. But of these three, the greatest is love.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩtɩɩ kɛ, wɩya boto rɛ we doŋ a bɩ sɩ maakyiye teŋ. Ba aa rɛ nyɛ: Laadii, Bayɩyɛla abee Kyori. Amɛ ba buloŋ tɩyaŋ sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ rɛ yaa KYORI.

english_verse: Love should be your guide. Be eager to have the gifts that come from the Holy Spirit, especially the gift of prophecy.
translation_verse: Ma kaŋ kyori bee dɔmɔŋ, aŋ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ kɩ kyɛ Wiyesi Welii bɔnyɛ kɩna hʋ, amarɩkpatɩya kyɔgɩta hʋ aa leŋ ma wuwo kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If you speak languages that others don't know, God will understand what you are saying, though no one else will know what you mean. You will be talking about mysteries that only the Spirit understands.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ aa basɩ taakperiye, Wɩɩsɩ rɛ ʋ tɩɩna basɩ kɩ tɩya, nihuwobisi daa, beewɩya nal buloŋ bee nɩɩ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa basɩ memii. Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa we ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ aa leŋ ʋ wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩkperiye no.

english_verse: By speaking languages that others don't know, you help only yourself. But by prophesying you help everyone in the church.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa basɩ taakperiye, ʋ dʋŋ nɛ ba kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya. Amɛ nal hʋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, ʋ wɩbasɩya aa kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya Krisitabiisi buloŋ hʋ aa laŋŋa doŋ.

english_verse: My friends, what good would it do, if I came and spoke unknown languages to you and didn't explain what I meant? How would I help you, unless I told you what God had shown me or gave you some knowledge or prophecy or teaching?
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ma lee a kɩ basɩ taakperiye, bekiŋ tɔnɔ ʋ rɛ sɩ kana tɩya ma? Ʋ bɩ sɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ tɩya ma. Amɛ dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ basɩ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa daga ŋ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma, dɩ ŋ kpa gyɩmaa kɩdɩgɩ daga ma, koo dɩ ŋ basɩ wɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ tɩya ma Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, koo dɩ ŋ daga ma dagɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ, ŋ liise ʋ rɛ sɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya ma.

english_verse: If all musical instruments sounded alike, how would you know the difference between a flute and a harp?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ, Dɩ ba aa rɛ bɩ mʋʋ loŋbiye koo a ŋmaa tampannɩ weliŋ, ba aa bee gyʋʋ dɩgɩŋ.

english_verse: This is how it is when you speak unknown languages. If no one can understand what you are talking about, you will only be talking to the wind.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ ʋ kɩɩ ma mɛ lee. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa basɩ taal hʋ nala aa bee nɩɩ, ɛɛ rɛ ba sɩ yaa a gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ ma aa basɩ memii? Ma ta kɩ yaa kyagɩŋsɩ waasʋ rɛ.

english_verse: But if I don't understand the language that someone is using, we will be like foreigners to each other.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ aa basɩ wɩya taal hʋ ŋ aa bee nɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ŋ sɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nɩhʋwal tɩɩna lee, ka dɩ tɩɩna mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nɩhʋwal ŋ lee.

english_verse: When we speak languages that others don't know, we should pray for the power to explain what we mean.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nal hʋ aa wuwo kɩ basɩ taakperiye Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna maga dɩ ʋ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ leŋ ʋ wuwo kɩ daga wɩya hʋ ʋ aa basɩ memii.

english_verse: For example, if I use an unknown language in my prayers, my spirit prays but my mind is useless.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ abee taakperiye ŋ aa bee nɩɩ, ŋ dʋma rɛ aa kyʋwalɩ, amɛ ŋ hakɩla kɛ tuwo doŋ.

english_verse: Then what should I do? There are times when I should pray with my spirit, and times when I should pray with my mind. Sometimes I should sing with my spirit, and at other times I should sing with my mind.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ yaŋ sɩ yaa? Ŋ sɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ abee ŋ dʋma, a bɩl kyʋwalɩ ʋ abee ŋ hakɩla mɛ. Ŋ sɩ yɩɩ yɩɩla abee ŋ dʋma, a bɩl yɩɩ yɩɩla abee ŋ hakɩla mɛ.

english_verse: Suppose some strangers are in your worship service, when you are praising God with your spirit. If they don't understand you, how will they know to say, “Amen”?
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ laŋŋa, dɩ nal kɩdɩgɩ kaŋ taakperii a kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ, nɩwaasɩma hʋ aa hɔŋ dɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ a bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa basɩ memii, dɩ ʋ rɛ kyʋwalɩ teŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ba sɩ yaa baa ‘Amɩ’?

english_verse: You may be worshiping God in a wonderful way, but no one else will be helped.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, nal sɩ wuwo kaŋ taakperii a dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ weliŋ, amɛ dɩ ʋ rɛ yaa gɛɛ, ʋ bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ tɩya nala hʋ aa laŋŋa doŋ.

english_verse: I thank God that I speak unknown languages more than any of you.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ abee ŋ aa wuwo kɩ basɩ taakperiye a baŋ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ,

english_verse: But words that make sense can help the church. This is why in church I would rather speak five words that make sense than to speak
translation_verse: amɛ dɩ ámaa rɛ aa ko laŋŋɩ dɩ á kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ŋ aa kaŋ ŋ hakɩla basɩ wɩya baŋmana a daga nala, ka ba gyɩŋ ba memii, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ŋ aa sɩ basɩ wɩgyamaa abee taakperiye.

english_verse: My friends, stop thinking like children. Think like mature people and be as innocent as tiny babies.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ma ta kaŋ haŋbii-hakɩllɩ. Amɛ ma wɩyaalɩya tɩyaŋ kɛ, ma kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ biifɩllɩ aa bɩ gyɩŋ wɩbɔmɔ, ka dɩ ma kɩ bɩɩnɩ wɩya anɩɩ nala aa gyige Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: In the Scriptures the Lord says, “I will use strangers who speak unknown languages to talk to my people. They will speak to them in foreign languages, but still my people won't listen to me.”
translation_verse: Ba sabɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa, “Ŋ sɩ tɩŋ nala aa basɩ taakperiye tɩyaŋ, a basɩ wɩya tɩya ŋ nala, ŋ sɩ tɩŋ nɩhʋwala tɩyaŋ, a basɩ wɩya tɩya ŋ nala, ka abee gɛɛ buloŋ mɛ, ba bɩ sɩ gyegile nɩɩ ŋ nyʋwa.”

english_verse: Suppose everyone in your worship service started speaking unknown languages, and some outsiders or some unbelievers come in. Won't they think you are crazy?
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ Krisitabiisi rɛ ko laŋŋɩ, dɩ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ kɩ basɩ wɩya abee taakperiye, dɩ nɩwaasɩma koo nala aa bɩ laa Krisita wɩya di rɛ ko na ba, ba bɩ sɩ baa dɩ ba nyuni tuwo?

english_verse: But suppose all of you are prophesying when those unbelievers and outsiders come in. They will realize that they are sinners, and they will want to change their ways because of what you are saying.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, dɩ nal hʋ aa bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di, koo dɩ nɩwaasɩ ko na ba, ʋ kɔnɩ sɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ yaa wɩbɔŋyaal lɛ. Beewɩya wɩya hʋ ba aa basɩ sɩ gyʋʋ ʋ hakɩla tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ na anɩɩ ʋ kyogo rɛ.

english_verse: They will tell what is hidden in their hearts. Then they will kneel down and say to God, “We are certain that you are with these people.” Worship Must Be Orderly
translation_verse: Tɩɩna tɩbɩɩna buloŋ sɩ ko lɩɩ pʋlʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ tuu gbinni Wɩɩsɩ sɩya, a kyʋwalɩ ʋ, a basɩ anɩɩ wɩtɩɩ, Wɩɩsɩ we ma tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ŋmanɩɩ hʋ aa maga dɩ Yesu hatɩnna tɩŋa a kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ

english_verse: No more than two or three of you should speak unknown languages during the meeting. You must take turns, and someone should always be there to explain what you mean.
translation_verse: Dɩ nala we ma tɩyaŋ a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba basɩ wɩya abee taakperiye, ʋ maga dɩ ba yaa balɩya koo boto dʋŋ nɛ, a basɩ aŋ kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ, ka dɩ nal mɛ we doŋ ʋ aa sɩ wuwo daga wɩya hʋ ba aa basa memii a tɩya ma.

english_verse: A prophet should be willing to stop and let someone else speak.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, ʋ maga dɩ ʋ gyɩŋ ʋ nyʋwa kanɩɩ rɛ ʋ wɩbasɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God wants everything to be done peacefully and in order. When God's people meet in church,
translation_verse: Beewɩya, Wɩɩsɩ bee kyɛ dɩ ma wɩya vʋgɩmɩ, amɛ ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma wɩkanɩya buloŋ kɩ vala weliŋ nɛ.

english_verse: If there is something they want to know, they can ask their husbands when they get home. It is disgraceful for women to speak in church.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ kaŋ wɩpɩyɛsɩɩ mɛ, ʋ maga dɩ ba mʋ dɩya rɛ a pɩyɛsɩ ba balama. Ʋ yaa hɩɩsɩ wɩɩ rɛ abee haaŋ aa sɩ laa wɩya kɩ basɩ Krisitabiisi laŋŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God's message did not start with you people, and you are not the only ones it has reached.
translation_verse: Ma lee rɛ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ lɩɩ? Koo ma dʋŋ nɛ yaa nala hʋ ba aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ tɩya?

english_verse: If you think of yourself as a prophet or a spiritual person, you will know I am writing only what the Lord has commanded.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ bɩɩna anɩɩ ʋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ koo dɩ ʋ kaŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ bɔnyɛ kɩŋ nɛ, ʋ tɩɩna maga dɩ ʋ gyɩma anɩɩ wɩɩ no ŋ aa saba lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ.

english_verse: So don't pay attention to anyone who ignores what I am writing.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ bee kyɛ dɩ ʋ gyegili nɩɩ wɩɩ no ŋ aa saba tɩya ma, ma mɛ ta tɔgɩmɩ ʋ.

english_verse: My friends, be eager to prophesy and don't stop anyone from speaking languages that others don't know.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya ŋ naabalɩya, ma yaa sɩfɩyaŋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma kɩ basɩ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, a ta leŋ dɩ taakperiye basɩɩ yaa sɩna ma tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But do everything properly and in order.
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ maga dɩ ma yaa wɩɩ buloŋ ʋ bʋwaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to remember the message I preached and that you believed and trusted.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ liisi ma Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ ŋ aa basa tɩya ma rɛ. Ma laa ba di rɛ, ba kaŋ ma Wɩɩsɩ laadii sɩgɩ weliŋ.

english_verse: You will be saved by this message, if you hold firmly to it. But if you don't, your faith was all for nothing.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ kaŋ wɩya no weliŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa ma ta. Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ ko bɩ kaŋ ba weliŋ, ɛɛ kɛ, ma Wɩɩsɩ laadii hʋ yaa waasʋ rɛ.

english_verse: I told you the most important part of the message exactly as it was told to me. This part is: Christ died for our sins, as the Scriptures say.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu aa kpaa daga ŋ, ba tɩɩ rɛ ŋ mɛ kpa kɩ daga ma, beewɩya ba aa rɛ yaa wɩya no buloŋ sɩfɩyaŋ wɩya: Ba aa rɛ nyɛ, dɩ á wɩbɔmɔ wɩya rɛ Krisita sʋba, anɩɩ ba aa saba gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: He was buried, and three days later he was raised to life, as the Scriptures say.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba kpa ʋ hogo, ka ʋ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ kyɛtoo kyɛɛ, anɩɩ ba aa saba gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: After this, he appeared to more than five hundred other followers. Most of them are still alive, but some have died.
translation_verse: Ʋ gɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, saŋa kɩdɩgɩ ʋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ ko daga ʋ hatɩnna kɔɔsɩbɔnɔŋ abee dɔbɔ rɛ. Nala no gyeniŋ buloŋ ha we ba mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ gyɩnaŋ, ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ sʋba.

english_verse: He also appeared to James, then to all of the apostles.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ ʋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ ko daga Gyemsi, a kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ ko daga ʋ kpambɩsɩ hʋ buloŋ mɛ.

english_verse: Finally, he appeared to me, even though I am like someone who was born at the wrong time.
translation_verse: Ba buloŋ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ ko daga ŋ mɛ, nal hʋ nal buloŋ aa bɩ liise anɩɩ ŋ sɩ maakyiye ko laa Yesu wɩya di.

english_verse: I am the least important of all the apostles. In fact, I caused so much trouble for God's church that I don't even deserve to be called an apostle.
translation_verse: Yesu kpambɩsɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, mɩyaŋ nɛ paalɩ yaa ba tɩyaŋ nɩbiye. Ŋ gba paalɩ bɩ maga dɩ ba kana ŋ kɩ yɩrɩ Yesu kpambɩya, beewɩya ŋ gyɩ aa dɔgɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ nala rɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: But God treated me with undeserved grace! He made me what I am, and his grace wasn't wasted. I worked much harder than any of the other apostles, although it was really God's grace at work and not me.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ fáá ŋ sikii rɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Ʋ lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ yaa nal hʋ ŋ aa yaa gyɩnaŋ. Bɔnyɛ hʋ mɛ ʋ aa kpaa daga ŋ bɩ yaa waasʋ. Beewɩya mɩyaŋ nɛ tʋŋ tʋma yʋga a baŋ Yesu kpambɩsɩ hʋ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ. Amɛ ŋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ daa ŋ wuwo kɩ tʋŋ tʋma no, Wɩɩsɩ lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: But it doesn't matter if I preached or if they preached. All of you believed the message just the same. God's People Will Be Raised to Life
translation_verse: Ka ba buloŋ tɩyaŋ, wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa wɩɩ rɛ nyɛ: Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ rɛ á buloŋ kɩ basɩ. Wɩya hʋ ba aa basɩ, ba aa rɛ ŋ mɛ kɩ basɩ. Wɩya no tɩɩ rɛ ma mɛ laa di gɛɛ. Sʋʋnɩ mɩɩgɩ sii

english_verse: If we preach that Christ was raised from death, how can some of you say the dead will not be raised to life?
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ baa Wɩɩsɩ kyisi Krisita sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, bee rɛ tɩŋ ma badɔmɔŋ baa dɩ sʋʋnɩ mɩɩgɩ sii tuwo?

english_verse: If they won't be raised to life, Christ himself wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Dɩ sʋʋnɩ mɩɩgɩ sii rɛ ko tuwo, ɛɛ kɛ Wɩɩsɩ bɩ kyisi Krisita mɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And if Christ wasn't raised to life, our message is worthless, and so is your faith.
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ bɩ kyisi Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ á aa basɩ abee wɩya hʋ ma aa laa di hʋ buloŋ yaa waasʋ rɛ.

english_verse: If the dead won't be raised to life, we have told lies about God by saying he raised Christ to life, when he really did not.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ mɛ yaŋ daga anɩɩ á gba nyɩya wɩya kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, beewɩya á baa ʋ kyisi Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Dɩ sʋʋnɩ mɩɩgɩ sii kɔnɩ ko tuwo, ɛɛ kɛ Wɩɩsɩ bɩ kyisi Krisita mɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: So if the dead won't be raised to life, Christ wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ ko bɩ sɩ kyisi sʋʋnɩ, ɛɛ kɛ ʋ bɩ kyisi Krisita mɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Unless Christ was raised to life, your faith is useless, and you are still living in your sins.
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ yaŋ bɩ kyisi Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ wɩɩ hʋ ma aa laa di mɛ yaa waasʋ rɛ, ka ma ha we ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And those people who died after putting their faith in him are completely lost.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ yaŋ daga anɩɩ nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di aŋ sʋba, ba sʋba ta rɛ.

english_verse: If our hope in Christ is good only for this life, we are worse off than anyone else.
translation_verse: Dɩ á mɩɩbol no tɩyaŋ dʋŋ nɛ á kaŋ bayɩyɛla Krisita tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ á wɩya rɛ maga dɩ ʋ kaŋ sikii a baŋ nal buloŋ.

english_verse: But Christ has been raised to life! And he makes us certain that others will also be raised to life.
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɔnɩ kyisi Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ yaŋ daga anɩɩ nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ kyisi sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, Krisita rɛ yaa nal hʋ ʋ aa laa sɩya kyisi.

english_verse: Just as we will die because of Adam, we will be raised to life because of Christ.
translation_verse: Nɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ sʋʋ tɩŋa a gyʋʋ dʋnɩya. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ mɛ rɛ nala buloŋ sɩ tɩŋa a sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Adam brought death to all of us, and Christ will bring life to all of us.
translation_verse: Adama rɛ tɩŋ nala kɩ sʋba. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ, Krisita mɛ rɛ sɩ tɩŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kyisi nala sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a leŋ dɩ ba kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: But we must each wait our turn. Christ was the first to be raised to life, and his people will be raised to life when he returns.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal buloŋ bee saŋa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ kyisi ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Krisita rɛ laa sɩya sii, ka saŋa hʋ ʋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko dʋnɩya, dɩ nala hʋ aa yaa ʋ nala buloŋ mɛ yaŋ sii.

english_verse: Then after Christ has destroyed all powers and forces, the end will come, and he will give the kingdom to God the Father.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, dʋnɩya tenii aa sɩ pele, haŋ saŋa hʋ rɛ Krisita sɩ yuwo di gyɩŋbɔmɔ abee kaŋtɔmɔ abee dʋnɩya kuworo hʋ buloŋ aa laa dʋnɩya no tɩŋa, ka dɩ ʋ yaŋ kpa dʋnɩya koro a we ʋ kuwo Wɩɩsɩ nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: and the last enemy he destroys will be death.
translation_verse: Sʋʋ rɛ yaa ʋ dɔmɔ tɩyaŋ kateŋsi ʋ aa sɩ kpʋ ta.

english_verse: When the Scriptures say he will put everything under his power, they don't include God. It was God who put everything under the power of Christ.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba basa anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpaa kɩna buloŋ we Krisita nosi tɩyaŋ nɛ. Amɛ ɛɛ bɩ daga anɩɩ á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ mɛ we ʋ nosi tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya ʋ kɛ rɛ kpaa kɩna hʋ buloŋ we Krisita nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: After everything is under the power of God's Son, he will put himself under the power of God, who put everything under his Son's power. Then God will mean everything to everyone.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ ko kpa kɩŋ buloŋ we ʋ Biye hʋ nosi tɩyaŋ, gɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, Biye hʋ tɩɩ mɛ sɩ kpa ʋ tɩɩ a we Wɩɩsɩ nosi tɩyaŋ, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ yaŋ kaŋ kɩŋ buloŋ dee, beewɩya ʋ rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa kpaa kɩŋ buloŋ we ʋ biye hʋ nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: and face death every day? The pride that I have in you because of Christ Jesus our Lord is what makes me say this.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, kyɛɛ buloŋ, ŋ bee sʋʋ kɛ aa kɩ lʋga rɛ. Akuu á bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ á mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ wɩya, ŋ wuwo basɩ wɩya kɩ genni rɛ ma wɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ wuwo basɩ wɩɩ no nyɛ.

english_verse: Be sensible and stop sinning. You should be embarrassed that some people still don't know about God. What Our Bodies Will Be Like
translation_verse: Ma leŋ wɩvɩyagyɩmɩya yayɩ, a leŋ wɩbɔmɔ ŋmaŋsɩ mɛ tɩŋɩɩ. Ʋ maga dɩ ma leŋ hɩɩsɩ kaŋ ma rɛ, beewɩya ma badɔmɔŋ bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ. Teŋbiye hʋ nala hʋ aa sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ aa sɩ kana

english_verse: Some of you have asked, “How will the dead be raised to life? What kind of bodies will they have?”
translation_verse: Nal kɩdɩgɩ sɩ pɩyɛsɩ anɩɩ ɛɛ rɛ nala hʋ aa sʋba sɩ wuwo yaa a sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ? Dɩ dɩ ba aa rɛ siye, teŋbii gɛɛ ma iriŋ nɛ ba sɩ kana?

english_verse: Don't be foolish. A seed must die before it can sprout from the ground.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ dɔŋ bambugi! Dɩ ɩ rɛ ko kpa kɩŋ doho, dɩ ʋ bɩ pʋw, kɩfalɩɩ bee lɩɩ.

english_verse: This is because God gives everything the kind of body he wants it to have.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ aa leŋ kɩdoho hʋ nyʋ, a kɩɩ gɛɛ ʋ aa kyɛ. Ʋ rɛ aa leŋ kɩdoho iriŋ kɛ buloŋ nyʋ, a waa kɩɩ ʋ kɩyɩ.

english_verse: People, animals, birds, and fish are each made of flesh, but none of them are alike.
translation_verse: Kɩna buloŋ aa we dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ a kaŋ mɩɩbol, ba teŋ bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ. Nihuwobisi abee pʋsɩ abee digibiisi abee fuwonamɩɩsɩ teŋ bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: Everything in the heavens has a body, and so does everything on earth. But each one is very different from all the others.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩnyuu kɩna we doŋ, taŋha nyuu kɩna mɛ we doŋ, ba weliŋ mɛ bɩ kɩɩ dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: The sun isn't like the moon, the moon isn't like the stars, and each star is different.
translation_verse: Wɩɩpɔsɩɩ kaŋ ʋ pʋlʋŋ nɛ, pene mɛ kaŋ ʋ pʋlʋŋ, kyɩŋwʋlɩya mɛ kaŋ ba pʋlʋŋ. Kyɩŋwʋlɩya tɩyaŋ mɛ gba, badɔmɔŋ mɛ pʋrɩsa rɛ a baŋ badɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: That's how it will be when our bodies are raised to life. These bodies will die, but the bodies that are raised will live forever.
translation_verse: Dɩ nala rɛ ko sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ sɩ kɩɩ. Teŋ hʋ ba aa kpaa hogo sɩ pʋw, amɛ teŋ hʋ aa sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ kɛ bɩ sɩ maakyiye sʋba.

english_verse: The first man was named Adam, and the Scriptures tell us that he was a living person. But Jesus, who may be called the last Adam, is a life-giving spirit.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba saba rɛ a baa, “Nihuwobiŋ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa laa sɩya marɩ, ba kɩ yɩrɩ Adama, Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ wiyese we ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ kaŋ mɩɩbol.” Amɛ Adama hʋ aa tɩŋ hal ko kɛ, ʋ rɛ yaa wiyese hʋ aa tɩya nala mɩɩbol.

english_verse: We see that the one with a spiritual body did not come first. He came after the one who had a physical body.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee teŋbii hʋ rɛ á laa sɩya kana. Dʋnɩya no teŋbii hʋ rɛ á laa sɩya kana, aŋ na kaŋ wɩɩsɩbee teŋbii hʋ.

english_verse: The first man was made from the dust of the earth, but the second man came from heaven.
translation_verse: Adama hʋ aa laa sɩya ko dʋnɩya, taŋha rɛ Wɩɩsɩ kpa mɔ ʋ. Amɛ Adama hʋ aa tɩŋ hal ko kɛ, Wɩɩsɩbee rɛ ʋ lɩɩ ko.

english_verse: Everyone on earth has a body like the body of the one who was made from the dust of the earth. And everyone in heaven has a body like the body of the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hʋ ba aa yaŋ kpa taŋha mɔ Adama ʋ kɩɩ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ dʋnɩya no nala buloŋ mɛ kɩɩ. Nala hʋ aa yaa wɩɩsɩbee nala, ba mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ nal hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko.

english_verse: Just as we are like the one who was made out of earth, we will be like the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Á aa kɩɩ nal hʋ ba aa kpaa taŋha mɔ gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ á sɩ kɩɩ nal hʋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩbee mɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that our bodies of flesh and blood will decay. This means they cannot share in God's kingdom, which lasts forever.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa basɩ rɛ nyɛ: kyal bee naŋpʋŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo we Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya kɩna hʋ aa pʋw bɩ sɩ wuwo we lee hʋ aa we doŋ deŋdeŋ kɩ mʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: It will happen suddenly, quicker than the blink of an eye. At the sound of the last trumpet the dead will be raised. We will all be changed, so we will never die again.
translation_verse: Dɩ kabɩl no rɛ ko mʋʋ, sʋʋnɩ buloŋ sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a bɩl bɩ sɩ maakyiye sʋba. Nala hʋ ha aa we ba mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ mɛ, ba teŋbiye sɩ bɩrɩmɩ yaa kɩna bɩl aa bɩ sɩ maakyiye pʋw.

english_verse: The bodies we now have are weak and can die. But they will be changed into bodies that are eternal. Then the Scriptures will come true, “Death has lost the battle!
translation_verse: Dɩ wɩya no buloŋ nɛ ko yaa, dɩ nihuwobisi kaŋ tenni hʋ bɩl aa bee sʋba koo a kɩ pʋw, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ ba aa basa Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ gɛɛ, beewɩya ba saba a baa, “Á yuwo di rɛ. Sʋʋ bɩl bɩ kaŋ dee á nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Sin is what gives death its sting, and the Law is the power behind sin.
translation_verse: Sʋʋ hʋwoŋ lɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, wɩbɔmɔ dee mɛ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: That is, each Sunday each of you must put aside part of what you have earned. If you do this, you won't have to take up a collection when I come.
translation_verse: Alahadi kyɛɛ kɛ buloŋ, molbiye hʋ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ aa tʋma a na yɔbɔ hʋ paga tɩyaŋ, nal buloŋ lɩɩ maga gɛɛ ɩ aa wuwo dɩ ba kpa kɩ biŋ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko, ma bɩl bɩ sɩ kɩ kɩyɛsɩ molbiye.

english_verse: Choose some followers to take the money to Jerusalem. I will send them on with the money and with letters which show that you approve of them.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko, ŋ sɩ sabɩ teŋ tɩya nala hʋ ma aa sɩ lɩɩ, a daga nala hʋ iriŋ ba aa yaa dɩ ba kaŋ molbiye hʋ ma aa kɩyɛsa a yaŋ bee teŋ hʋ a mʋ tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Gyerusalɛm tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If you think I should go along, they can go with me. Paul's Travel Plans
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko maga dɩ ŋ tɩɩ mɛ mʋ, ŋ beel-ba buloŋ sɩ tɩŋ dɔmɔŋ mʋ. Wɩya Pɔɔl aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ yaa

english_verse: and visit with you for a while. I may even stay all winter, so that you can help me on my way to wherever I will be going next.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko, ŋ sɩ we ma lee a pɩɩsɩ mʋhʋ, kapuwo ŋ sɩ we doŋ dɩ puwo saŋa hʋ mʋ teŋ. Ŋ sɩ we ma lee a mʋ pele saŋa hʋ ŋ bɩl aa sɩ kpa ŋmanɩɩ, dɩ ma kyiyeli ŋ, dɩ ŋ bɩl wuwo mʋ lee hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa sɩ mʋ.

english_verse: If the Lord lets me, I would rather come later for a longer visit than to stop off now for only a short visit.
translation_verse: Ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ ko na ma nɩma nɩma aŋ parɩ mʋ. Amɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ laa nyʋwa, ŋ fa kyo dɩ ŋ yaa kyɛɛ balɩya rɛ ma lee.

english_verse: because there is a wonderful opportunity for me to do some work here. But there are also many people who are against me.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, abee nala aa yʋga a kɩ tɔ ŋ ŋmanɩɩ buloŋ mɛ, ŋ naa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ suri ŋmanɩɩ tɩya ŋ nɛ dɩ ŋ tʋŋ tʋma aa sɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ yʋga daha.

english_verse: When Timothy arrives, give him a friendly welcome. He is doing the Lord's work, just as I am.
translation_verse: Dɩ Timoti rɛ ko ko ma lee, ma kana ʋ weliŋ, beewɩya, á beel-ʋ buloŋ nɛ aa tʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ tʋma hʋ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone mistreat him. I am looking for him to return to me together with the other followers. So when he leaves, send him off with your blessings.
translation_verse: Ma ta ko kɩ yaa ʋ sɩgyʋʋ-wɩya. Ma pɛ ʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ vala ŋmanɩɩ hʋ abee laaŋfɩya, aŋ mɩɩgɩ ko ŋ lee. Beewɩya, ŋ aa gyegili ʋ bee á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ badɔmɔŋ nɛ daha.

english_verse: I have tried hard to get our friend Apollos to visit you with the other followers. He doesn't want to come just now, but he will come when he can. Personal Concerns and Greetings
translation_verse: Ka á nɩɩnabiye Apolo mɛ, ŋ sʋla ʋ rɛ weliŋ dɩ ʋ bee á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ badɔmɔŋ ko na ma. Amɛ ʋ bɩ bɩɩna anɩɩ ʋ sɩ wuwo na ŋmanɩɩ ko lagɩlagɩ no. Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ ʋ rɛ ko na ŋmanɩɩ saŋa hʋ buloŋ, ʋ sɩ ko na ma. Wɩkateŋse

english_verse: You know that Stephanas and his family were the first in Achaia to have faith in the Lord. They have done all they can for God's people. My friends, I ask you
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ka ma gyɩma anɩɩ Sɩtɩfanasɩ bee ʋ dɩya nala rɛ laa sɩya laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di Akaaya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Ba kpaa ba tɩɩ we Wɩɩsɩ tʋma tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kɩ kyiyeli Wɩɩsɩ nala mɛ weliŋ.

english_verse: to obey leaders like them and to do the same for all others who work hard with you.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa sʋla ma, ŋ naabalɩya, ma kɩ tɩŋ nitesi no abee ba tʋŋtʋnnɩ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ buloŋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: I was glad to see Stephanas and Fortunatus and Achaicus. Having them here was like having you.
translation_verse: Ŋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ rɛ weliŋ abee Sɩtɩfanasɩ, Fɔɔtunaatusɩ abee Akayikusɩ aa ko ŋ lee. Ba aa rɛ laa ma nyuu daha.

english_verse: They made me feel much better, just as they made you feel better. You should appreciate people like them.
translation_verse: Ba leŋ ŋ teŋ polli rɛ anɩɩ ba aa leŋ ma tenni mɛ polli gɛɛ. Ʋ maga dɩ ma kɩ tɩya nala no iriŋ gyɩrɩma rɛ.

english_verse: Greetings from the churches in Asia. Aquila and Priscilla, together with the church that meets in their house, send greetings in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Esɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ aa kyʋwalɩ ma. Akula abee Pirisila, abee Krisitabiisi hʋ aa laŋŋɩ ba dɩya tɩyaŋ baa dɩ ŋ kyʋwalɩ ma weliŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu feŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: All the Lord's followers send their greetings. Give each other a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ buloŋ aa we daha mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma. Ma kɩ kyʋwalɩ dɔmɔŋ abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ akuu ma aa yaa nɩmmabalɩya wɩya.

english_verse: I pray that God will put a curse on everyone who doesn't love the Lord. And may the Lord come soon.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ bɩ kyo á Tɩɩna Krisita, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ tɩɩna. Maranaata!

english_verse: I pray the Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ ma hɔŋ abee laaŋfɩya.

english_verse: I love everyone who belongs to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Ŋ kyo ma buloŋ nɛ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita feŋ tɩyaŋ. Amɩ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Jesus Christ, and from Timothy, who is also a follower. To God's church in Corinth and to all of God's people in Achaia.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl, abee á nɩɩnabiye Timoti rɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ma. Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ lɩɩ ŋ, dɩ ŋ yaa Yesu Krisita kpambɩya. Á sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ma Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Koriŋti tɩyaŋ nɛ, abee Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ buloŋ aa we Akaaya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul Gives Thanks
translation_verse: Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ, ma hɔŋ bee laaŋfɩya. Pɔɔl Kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! The Father is a merciful God, who always gives us comfort.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita kuwo hʋ, aŋgyʋwasʋ. Ʋ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ, a kɩ fá nala sikii, aŋ kɩ fɩyɛlɩ nala bembiye mɛ.

english_verse: He comforts us when we are in trouble, so that we can share this same comfort with others in trouble.
translation_verse: Ʋ rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa fɩyɛlɩ á bembiye á tʋwara nayɩ tɩyaŋ dɩ ɛɛ leŋ dɩ á mɛ wuwo fɩyɛlɩ nala hʋ buloŋ mɛ aa na tʋwara bembiye abee bembifɩyɛlɩ hʋ ʋ aa kpaa tɩya ma.

english_verse: We suffer in the hope that you will be comforted and saved. And because we are comforted, you will also be comforted, as you patiently endure suffering like ours.
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ ko kɩ na tʋwara, ma kyiyelii abee ma laa tayi wɩya rɛ. Dɩ ámaa rɛ ko na kyiyelii buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ lee, haŋ kyiyelii hʋ tɩɩ rɛ ma mɛ aa na, dɩ ma wuwo kaŋ kenyiri abee mala, a na tʋwara hʋ iriŋ á mɛ aa naa.

english_verse: You never disappoint us. You suffered as much as we did, and we know that you will be comforted as we were.
translation_verse: Á laa ma di rɛ weliŋ. Á bee yaa ma sige. Á gyɩma anɩɩ tʋwara hʋ á aa naa, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ ma mɛ kɩ na. Kyiyelii hʋ buloŋ mɛ á aa sɩ na Wɩɩsɩ lee, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ ma mɛ sɩ na.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know what a hard time we had in Asia. Our sufferings were so horrible and so unbearable that death seemed certain.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩŋ tʋwara mɔɔ gɛɛ á aa naa Esɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Tʋwara hʋ iriŋ á gyɩ aa naa bɩ kyalla, haalɩ á gyɩ bɩl bɩ liise anɩɩ á sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: In fact, we felt sure we were going to die. But this made us stop trusting in ourselves and start trusting God, who raises the dead to life.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ, á gyɩ bɩɩna anɩɩ á sʋba teŋ nɛ. Amɛ gɛɛ kyiyeli ma rɛ dɩ á ta kɩ deŋ á tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ, amɛ dɩ á kpa á bayɩyɛla buloŋ we Wɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ aa kyisi nala sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God saved us from the threat of death, and we are sure that he will do it again and again.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ rɛ lɩɩ ma sʋʋ bʋwa no tɩyaŋ. Maakyiye dɩ wɩɩ rɛ bɩl ko gyʋʋ ma, ʋ sɩ bɩl lɩɩ ma ʋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ á bayɩyɛla buloŋ we anɩɩ ʋ rɛ sɩ kɩ lɩɩ ma tʋwara buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Please help us by praying for us. Then many people will give thanks for the blessings we receive in answer to all these prayers. Paul's Change of Plans
translation_verse: Beewɩya ma sʋl Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ. Nyɛ rɛ yaŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ nɩgyamaa dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ akuu ɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa laa ba sʋlɩɩ a lɩɩ ma á tʋwara no nayɩ tɩyaŋ. Pɔɔl bɩrɩmɩ ʋ hakɩla wɩya hʋ ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ yaa tɩyaŋ

english_verse: We can be proud of our clear conscience. We have always lived honestly and sincerely, especially when we were with you. And we were guided by God's gift of undeserved grace instead of by the wisdom of this world.
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no kɛ, á sɩ wuwo bigisi á tɩɩ rɛ, beewɩya á hakɩla daga anɩɩ á wɩyaalɩya buloŋ weliye rɛ nal buloŋ lee dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, amarɩkpatɩya wɩɩ buloŋ á aa yaa ma lee, á yaa wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ, aŋ pɛ tɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ. Nihuwobiŋ wɩgyʋŋ tɩyaŋ daa á tɩŋa a kɩ yaa á wɩya, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ á wuwo kɩ yaa ba.

english_verse: just as you already partly understand us. Then when our Lord Jesus returns, you can be as proud of us as we are of you.
translation_verse: ka maakyiye ma sɩ gyɩŋ ba memii mʋ teŋ. Ka kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko, ɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ma sɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ma aa wuwo ma kɩ genni á wɩya rɛ, dɩ á mɛ wuwo kɩ genni ma wɩya.

english_verse: I was so sure of your pride in us that I had planned to visit you first of all. In this way you would have the blessing of two visits from me—
translation_verse: Ŋ aa gyɩŋ nyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ tɩŋ, ŋ fa kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ laa sɩya ko ma lee, dɩ ma nɩɩ sʋŋbʋlɩya.

english_verse: Do you think I couldn't make up my mind about what to do? Or do I seem like someone who says “Yes” or “No” simply to please others?
translation_verse: Ma bɩɩna anɩɩ wɩya no ŋ aa basɩ nyɛ daga anɩɩ ŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo sɩŋ wɩdɩgɩ naaŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ koo? Ma bɩl bɩɩna anɩɩ ŋ aa yaa ŋ wɩya anɩɩ dʋnɩya nala aa yaa gɛɛ rɛ, dɩ ŋ laa wɩɩ aŋ bɩl sɩŋ doŋ baa dɩ ŋ bɩ laa koo?

english_verse: God can be trusted, and so can I, when I say our answer to you has always been “Yes” and never “No.”
translation_verse: Ma gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ wɩya hʋ buloŋ á aa basɩ tɩya ma mɛ yaa wɩtɩɩ. Á bee basɩ naŋdeliŋkpara.

english_verse: This is because Jesus Christ the Son of God is always “Yes” and never “No.” And he is the one Silas, Timothy, and I told you about.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Biye Yesu Krisita wɩya hʋ mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl abee Silaasi bee Timoti aa basɩ tɩya ma, wɩya hʋ bɩ daga anɩɩ Yesu yaa nal hʋ aa basɩ naŋdeliŋkpara rɛ. Ʋ rɛ aa daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɩ kaŋ naŋdeliŋkpara.

english_verse: Christ says “Yes” to all God's promises. This is why we have Christ to say “Amen” for us to the glory of God.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa baa ʋ sɩ yaa, Yesu tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩŋa a yaa ba. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ, dɩ ámaa rɛ ko kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ buloŋ, á aa baa dɩ “Yesu Krisita feŋ tɩyaŋ, amɩ” dɩ Wɩɩsɩ feŋ na bigisii

english_verse: And so God makes it possible for you and us to stand firmly together with Christ. God is also the one who chose us
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ leŋ á beel-ma buloŋ sɩŋ weliŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ lɩɩ ma á kɩ tʋŋ tʋma no.

english_verse: God is my witness that I stayed away from Corinth, just to keep from being hard on you.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ yaa ŋ daŋsɩya, ʋ gyɩma ŋ hakɩla rɛ. Ŋ fa bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ ko dɔŋ ma, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ gyɩ bɩ ko ma lee Koriŋti tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We are not bosses who tell you what to believe. We are working with you to make you glad, because your faith is strong.
translation_verse: Á bee kyɛ dɩ á fɩl ma dɩ ma laa wɩya hʋ á aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ma di. Á gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ ma sɩŋ ma laadii tɩyaŋ weliŋ nɛ. Amɛ á aa kyɛ dɩ á beel-ma buloŋ kɩ tʋma rɛ dɩ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ.

english_verse: I have decided not to make my next visit with you so painful.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ yaa ŋ hakɩla rɛ anɩɩ ŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ ko ma lee, dɩ ŋ ko leŋ dɩ ma tɩsɩ kyogi.

english_verse: If I make you feel bad, who would be left to cheer me up, except the people I had made to feel bad?
translation_verse: Beewɩya, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ leŋ ma tɩsɩ kyogi, nal buloŋ bɩl tuwo ʋ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ŋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ dɩ ma nala hʋ tɩsɩ aa kyogo hʋ daa.

english_verse: The reason I want to be happy is to make you happy. I wrote as I did because I didn't want to visit you and be made to feel bad, when you should make me feel happy.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ fa ko ma lee, mamaa rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ŋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ. Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaŋ leŋ ma tɩsɩ kyogi, ma bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ŋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ gyɩ laa sɩya sabɩ teŋ tɩya ma. Ŋ laa ma buloŋ di rɛ. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ dɩ ŋ teŋ nɛ ko fɩyɛlɩ, ma buloŋ tenni mɛ aa fɩyɛlɩ rɛ.

english_verse: At the time I wrote, I was suffering terribly. My eyes were full of tears, and my heart was broken. But I didn't want to make you feel bad. I only wanted to let you know how much I cared for you. Forgiveness
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ ŋ aa sabɩ teŋ hʋ kɩ tɩya ma, ŋ tɩya fa kyogo rɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Ŋ paalɩ wɩɩ rɛ ma wɩya. Ŋ bee sabɩ teŋ no dɩ ŋ leŋ dɩ ma tɩsɩ kyogi, amɛ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ kyo ma buloŋ nɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Dɩ nal lɛ yaa wɩɩ kyogi ɩ, kpa kyɛ ʋ

english_verse: I don't want to be hard on you. But if one of you has made someone feel bad, I am not really the one who has been made to feel bad. Some of you are the ones.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa leŋ ma tɩsɩ kyogi, ŋ dʋŋ tɩyaŋ daa ʋ gyʋʋ, amɛ ma tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ gba gyʋʋ te ŋ. Koo dɩ ʋ bɩ gyʋʋ ma buloŋ tɩyaŋ mɛ, amɛ ʋ gyʋʋ ma badɔmɔŋ tɩyaŋ kɛ rɛ. Ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ wɩɩ no bee beere.

english_verse: Most of you have already pointed out the wrong that person did, and this is punishment enough for what was done.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa yaa gɛɛ, ma gyeniŋ buloŋ aa dɔgɩsɩ ʋ maga gɛɛ, ʋ maga rɛ.

english_verse: When people sin, you should forgive and comfort them, so they won't give up in despair.
translation_verse: Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no kɛ ʋ maga dɩ ma kpa wɩɩ buloŋ kyɛ ʋ rɛ, aŋ fɩyɛlɩ ʋ bembii. Dɩ gɛɛ daa, ʋ tɩya sɩ marɩ kyogi mʋ gallɩ, dɩ ʋ yalmɩ.

english_verse: I also wrote because I wanted to test you and find out if you would follow my instructions.
translation_verse: Ŋ sabɩ haŋ teŋ hʋ tɩya ma, dɩ ŋ na dɩ ma yaa siri dɩ ma tɩŋ ŋ nyʋwa saŋa buloŋ koo ma bɩ yaa siri rɛ.

english_verse: I will forgive anyone you forgive. Yes, for your sake and with Christ as my witness, I have forgiven whatever needed to be forgiven.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ kpaa wɩɩ kyɛ nal, ŋ mɛ kpaa kyɛ ʋ rɛ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ fa maga dɩ ŋ kpa wɩɩ kyɛ tɩɩna, ŋ kpaa kyɛ ʋ tɩɩna rɛ, akuu ma wɩya. Krisita rɛ yaa ŋ daŋsɩya tɩɩna wɩɩ no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I have done this to keep Satan from getting the better of us. We all know what goes on in his mind.
translation_verse: Ŋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ Sɩtaanɩ ta wuwo ma, beewɩya, á gyɩŋ ʋ dawarɩ buloŋ nɛ. Pɔɔl mʋʋ Turowasɩ

english_verse: When I went to Troas to preach the good news about Christ, I found that the Lord had already prepared the way.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa ko Turowasɩ dɩ ŋ basɩ Krisita wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya ba, ŋ naa anɩɩ á Tɩɩna suri ŋmanɩɩ tɩya ŋ nɛ,

english_verse: But I was worried when I didn't find my friend Titus there. So I left the other followers and went on to Macedonia.
translation_verse: dɩ ŋ tʋŋ tʋma doŋ, amɛ ŋ hakɩla fa bɩ pɩŋ lɩdɩgɩ, beewɩya ŋ fa bɩ naa á nɩɩnabiye Titusi doŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ sii doŋ, a ta ba aŋ kpa mʋ Masidooniya paalʋʋ. Krisita dee tɩyaŋ á yuwo di Sɩtaanɩ rɛ

english_verse: I am grateful that God always makes it possible for Christ to lead us to victory. God also helps us spread the knowledge about Christ everywhere, and this knowledge is like the smell of perfume.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ. Ʋ tɩya Krisita dee rɛ ʋ yuwo di Sɩtaanɩ, á bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya, á mɛ aa yuwo di Sɩtaanɩ rɛ saŋa buloŋ aŋ kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ anɩɩ bayuwolo aa yuwo di ba dɔmɔ. Wɩɩsɩ pɛɛ á tɩyaŋ nɛ á wuwo kɩ basɩ Krisita wɩya lee buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Krisita wɩweliye no laa lee buloŋ nɛ anɩɩ tʋranɩɩ aa kpaa sʋwala tɔ lee buloŋ.

english_verse: In fact, God thinks of us as a perfume that brings Christ to everyone. For people who are being saved, this perfume has a sweet smell and leads them to a better life. But for people who are lost, it has a bad smell and leads them to a horrible death. No one really has what it takes to do this work.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa nyʋgɩsa lee, tʋranɩɩ no sʋwala aa kɩ kpʋ ba rɛ. Amɛ nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa laa kɩ ta kɛ lee, tʋranɩɩ no sʋwala aa tɩya ba mɩɩbol lɛ. Kɩbee rɛ yaŋ maga dɩ ʋ tʋŋ tʋma no?

english_verse: A lot of people try to get rich from preaching God's message. But we are God's sincere messengers, and by the power of Christ we speak our message with God as our witness.
translation_verse: Nala gyeniŋ buloŋ kpaa Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ basɩɩ wɩya yaa molbi-kyɛ wɩɩ rɛ. Amɛ á kɛ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ rɛ abee wɩtɩɩ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Á yaa Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ tɩɩma rɛ. Ʋ rɛ tɩŋ ma á kɩ basɩ wɩweliye no Krisita dee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But you are our letter, and you are in our hearts for everyone to read and understand.
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ bee ma nyuu rɛ yaa tenni hʋ aa daga gɛɛ á aa kɩya, á sabɩ we á tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Nal buloŋ aa karɩmɩ rɛ a gyɩŋ gɛɛ á aa kɩya.

english_verse: You are like a letter written by Christ and delivered by us. But you are not written with pen and ink or on tablets made of stone. You are written in our hearts by the Spirit of the living God.
translation_verse: Ma kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ teŋ Krisita aa saba a kpa tɩmma dɩ á kaŋ ko. Teŋ no wɩya bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ wɩya nal kɩdɩgɩ aa kpaa kɩŋ a sabɩ mal bʋtala tɩyaŋ. Amɛ Krisita tɩɩ rɛ kpaa Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ a sabɩ teŋ no we nihuwobisi tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We are sure about all this. Christ makes us sure in the very presence of God.
translation_verse: Krisita lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ, á laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ á wuwo kɩ basɩ wɩya no buloŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: We don't have the right to claim that we have done anything on our own. God gives us what it takes to do all we do.
translation_verse: Ʋ gɛɛ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ tʋma hʋ á aa tʋŋ, dɩ á tɩɩ dee rɛ á kaŋ kɩ tʋma. Dee hʋ á aa kaŋ kɩ tʋŋ tʋma no lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ.

english_verse: He makes us worthy to be the servants of his new agreement that comes from the Holy Spirit and not from a written Law. After all, the Law brings death, but the Spirit brings life.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ tɩya ma ŋmanɩɩ abee dee dɩ á yaa nyʋʋfalɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa kpaa tɩya nihuwobisi tʋŋtʋnna. Nyʋwa no wɩya á aa basɩ bɩ yaa mɩra ba aa saba biŋ. Nyʋʋfalɩɩ no dee lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa saba biŋ dɩ nala kɩ tɩŋa litenii rɛ yaa sʋʋ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ kɛ aa tɩya mɩɩbol lɛ.

english_verse: In fact, the new agreement is so wonderful that the Law is no longer glorious at all.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ gaŋdarɩ hʋ aa we doŋ gyɩnaŋ aa yʋga kɩŋkaŋ wɩya, buŋbuŋ gaŋdarɩ hʋ kɛ bɩl tuwo.

english_verse: The Law was given with a glory that faded away. But the glory of the new agreement is much greater, because it will never fade away.
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ daga ʋ gaŋdarɩ wɩya aa yaa wɩparɩbanɩya tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ marɩ daga ʋ gaŋdarɩ wɩya hʋ a we doŋ deŋdeŋ kɩ mʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: This wonderful hope makes us feel like speaking freely.
translation_verse: Á aa kaŋ bayɩyɛla no wɩya rɛ tɩŋ á kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya abee nyuduwo.

english_verse: with a covering that is removed only for those who turn to the Lord.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ nal lɛ ko bɩrɩmɩ a kɩ tɩŋ á Tɩɩna Krisita, gal hʋ aa polli rɛ.

english_verse: The Lord and the Spirit are one and the same, and the Lord's Spirit sets us free.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Krisita bee Wiyesi Welii hʋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Nal hʋ aa kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ, ʋ tɩɩna laa ʋ tɩɩ rɛ Moosi mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God has been kind enough to trust us with this work. This is why we never give up.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ kpa tʋma no tɩya ma dɩ á kɩ tʋma, ɛɛ wɩya á tenni bee yʋwɔrɩ ba tʋmɩɩ.

english_verse: We don't do shameful things that must be kept secret. And we don't try to fool anyone or twist God's message around. God is our witness that we speak only the truth, so others will be sure we can be trusted.
translation_verse: Hɩɩsɩ wɩya abee wɩya hʋ nala aa lʋwɔlɩ kɩ yaa, á kɛ vɩya ba yayɩ rɛ. Á bɩ gɔllɩ kɩ mʋrɩ nala. Á bɩ kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ kɩ bɩrɩmɩ wɩnyɩyɛl. Á bɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ kɩ faŋa nal buloŋ. Lɩgyalɩɩ rɛ á aa sɩŋ a kɩ basɩ wɩya no buloŋ dɩ nal buloŋ gyɩma nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa á daŋsɩya tɩɩna anɩɩ wɩtɩɩ rɛ á kɩ basɩ.

english_verse: If there is anything hidden about our message, it is hidden only to someone who is lost.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wɩweliye hʋ á aa basɩ rɛ ko yaa wɩfaŋɩya, nala hʋ aa nyʋgɩsɩ lee rɛ ba yaa wɩfaŋɩya.

english_verse: The god who rules this world has blinded the minds of unbelievers. They cannot see the light, which is the good news about our glorious Christ, who shows what God is like.
translation_verse: Nala no bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ Wɩweliye hʋ di beewɩya Sɩtaanɩ aa yaa dʋnɩya no kuwori leŋ ba hakɩllɩ we bilhuu tɩyaŋ nɛ, a pɔ dɩ ba ta naa pʋlʋŋ hʋ aa kyaana we ba tɩyaŋ. Pʋlʋŋ no rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Wɩweliye hʋ aa daga á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita gaŋdarɩ, nal hʋ aa kɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God commanded light to shine in the dark.” Now God is shining in our hearts to let you know that his glory is seen in Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Buŋbuŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa marɩ dʋnɩya, ʋ basɩ rɛ a baa, “Pʋlʋŋ kyaanɩ bilhuu tɩyaŋ.” Haŋ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ tɩɩ rɛ bɩl leŋ pʋlʋŋ ko gyʋʋ á tɩyaŋ. Pʋlʋŋ no rɛ leŋ á gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ gaŋdarɩ hʋ aa we Krisita tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We are like clay jars in which this treasure is stored. The real power comes from God and not from us.
translation_verse: Amɛ á kɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ viini, Wɩɩsɩ kpa wɩweliye no a we á tɩyaŋ. Nyɛ yaŋ daga anɩɩ debal hʋ aa we á tɩyaŋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ kɩŋ nɛ; á tɩɩ dee daa.

english_verse: We often suffer, but we are never crushed. Even when we don't know what to do, we never give up.
translation_verse: Á aa na tʋwara rɛ weliŋ lee kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, amɛ tʋwara hʋ bɩ wuwo ma. Saŋa kɩdɩgɩ á aa paalɩ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ á aa wee, amɛ á bee bɩla hal.

english_verse: In times of trouble, God is with us, and when we are knocked down, we get up again.
translation_verse: Ba aa kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ma rɛ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa bɩ vɩya ma ta. Ba aa ŋmaa ma tɩya sʋʋ rɛ, amɛ á bee sʋba.

english_verse: We face death every day because of Jesus. Our bodies show what his death was like, so his life can also be seen in us.
translation_verse: Á aa we á mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ nyɛ, saŋa buloŋ á aa kpa á mɩɩbol yuwo daasɩɩga rɛ Yesu Krisita wɩya, dɩ ɛɛ leŋ nala na anɩɩ á teŋbiye no aa sɩ sʋba mɛ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa kana rɛ.

english_verse: This means that death is working in us, but life is working in you.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, á kɛ aa kpa á mɩɩbol yuwo daasɩɩga rɛ saŋa buloŋ, amɛ ɛɛ leŋ ma kɛ kaŋ mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenni rɛ.

english_verse: In the Scriptures it says, “I spoke because I had faith.” We have this same kind of faith. So we speak
translation_verse: Ba saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Ŋ laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ basɩ ʋ wɩya.” Á mɛ laa Wɩɩsɩ di nyɛ tɩɩ rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ á mɛ kɩ basɩ ʋ wɩya.

english_verse: because we know that God raised the Lord Jesus to life. And just as God raised Jesus, he will also raise us to life. Then he will bring us into his presence together with you.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa yaŋ kyisi á Tɩɩna Yesu sʋʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ sɩ kyisi ma mɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ á bee Yesu buloŋ kaŋ mɩɩbol, ka dɩ ʋ kaŋ á beel-ma buloŋ mʋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya.

english_verse: All of this has been done for you, so more and more people will know how kind God is and will praise and honor him. Faith in the Lord
translation_verse: Ma wɩya rɛ tɩŋ wɩya no buloŋ yaa, ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ a laa nɩgyamaa gyamaa kɩ ta nyɛ, dɩ ɛɛ leŋ dɩ nɩgyamaa dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ weliŋ, a leŋ dɩ ʋ feŋ yɩrɩ.

english_verse: We never give up. Our bodies are gradually dying, but we ourselves are being made stronger each day.
translation_verse: Akuu wɩɩ no wɩya á tenni bee yʋwɔrɩ. Teŋbii hʋ á aa kana á mɩɩbol no tɩyaŋ, ʋ aa hɩyasɩ rɛ, amɛ á hakɩllɩ kɛ aa kɩ bɩrɩmɩ kɩfalɩya rɛ kyɛɛ bee ʋ nyʋwa buloŋ.

english_verse: Things that are seen don't last forever, but things that are not seen are eternal. This is why we keep our minds on the things that cannot be seen.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, á kɛ bɩ kpaa á hakɩllɩ we dʋnɩya no kɩna á aa naa tɩyaŋ, amɛ á kpaa á hakɩllɩ we wɩɩsɩbee kɩna á aa bee na tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya kɩna hʋ á aa naa bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ aŋ nyʋgɩsɩ, amɛ kɩna hʋ á aa bee na kɛ sɩ we doŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ.

english_verse: Our bodies are like tents that we live in here on earth. But when these tents are destroyed, we know that God will give each of us a place to live. These homes will not be buildings someone has made, but they are in heaven and will last forever.
translation_verse: Á tɩɩ gyɩma nɩɩ teŋbiye no á aa kana dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ bɩ sɩ piisi aŋ sʋba. Amɛ dɩ ba aa rɛ ko sʋba, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tɩya ma teŋbifalɩya hʋ aa bɩ yaa dʋnɩya no kɩna. Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ marɩ ba a leŋ ba yaa kɩna aa sɩ we doŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: While we are here on earth, we sigh because we want to live in that heavenly home.
translation_verse: Á aa we á mɩɩbol no tɩyaŋ, á hiini kɩ kyɛ teŋbifalɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ kpa tɩya ma rɛ.

english_verse: We want to put it on like clothes and not be naked.
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ ko kpa teŋbiye no tɩya ma, á bɩl bɩ sɩ kaŋ teŋbil.

english_verse: These tents we now live in are like a heavy burden, and we groan. But we don't do this just because we want to leave these bodies that will die. It is because we want to change them for bodies that will never die.
translation_verse: Teŋbiye hʋ á aa kana á mɩɩbol no tɩyaŋ, ba leŋ tʋwara gyʋʋ ma rɛ á kɩ hiini. Amɛ ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ sʋʋ rɛ á sʋla kɩ kyɛ. Á aa kyɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ á teŋbiye no bɩrɩmɩ rɛ, a kpa teŋbifalɩya hʋ aa sɩ we doŋ kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ a tɩya ma.

english_verse: God is the one who makes all this possible. He has given us his Spirit to make us certain he will do it.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ marɩ ma wɩɩ no wɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we á tɩyaŋ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ á gyɩma anɩɩ maakyiye ʋ sɩ kpa kɩŋ hʋ aa sɩ tɩŋa mɛ a tɩya ma.

english_verse: So always be cheerful! As long as we are in these bodies, we are away from the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, saŋa kɛ buloŋ, á tenni aa polli rɛ. Beewɩya á gyɩma anɩɩ á ha aa kaŋ teŋbiye no á mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ nyɛ, á ha bɩ gyʋʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu sɔŋ.

english_verse: We should be cheerful, because we would rather leave these bodies and be at home with the Lord.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, á tenni paalɩ pollo rɛ, á kyo dɩ á fa lɩɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ a mʋ we á Tɩɩna Yesu lee.

english_verse: But whether we are at home with the Lord or away from him, we still try our best to please him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, á wɩkyɛɛlɩɩ buloŋ nɛ yaa dɩ á kɩ tɩŋa ʋ kyɛrɩ lee kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ á aa wee. Dɩ ámaa rɛ we dʋnɩya no koo dɩ á lɩɩ ʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ,

english_verse: After all, Christ will judge each of us for the good or the bad that we do while living in these bodies. Bringing People to God
translation_verse: beewɩya á buloŋ sɩ maakyiye mʋ sɩŋ Krisita sɩya tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ di ma sarɩya, aŋ tuŋ nal buloŋ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa yaa ʋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ tuno. Amɛ wɩbɔmɔ kaŋ ba tuno rɛ, wɩweliye mɛ kaŋ ba tuno. Krisita nyubaanɩŋ, á bee Wɩɩsɩ bɩrɩmɩ kyaŋsɩ rɛ

english_verse: We know what it means to respect the Lord, and we encourage everyone to turn to him. God himself knows what we are like, and I hope you also know what kind of people we are.
translation_verse: Á yaa nala aa fá Wɩɩsɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ á kɩ lʋga dɩ á leŋ dɩ nala ko laa Krisita wɩya di. Wɩɩsɩ gyɩŋ gɛɛ á aa kɩya rɛ. Ŋ yaŋ liise anɩɩ ma hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ, ma mɛ gyɩŋ gɛɛ á aa kɩya rɛ.

english_verse: We are not trying once more to brag about ourselves. But we want you to be proud of us, when you are with those who are not sincere and brag about what others think of them.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩl bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ á tɩɩ rɛ á kɩ kyɛ dɩ á daga ma lee. Amɛ á aa kyɛ dɩ ma kaŋ wɩɩ rɛ ma aa sɩ wuwo kpa kɩ genni á wɩya, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ma wuwo na wɩɩ basɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa daga ba tɩɩ nala sii wɩnaalɩya wɩya, aŋ bee kyɩla gɛɛ ba hakɩllɩ aa kɩya Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If we seem out of our minds, it is between God and us. But if we are in our right minds, it is for your good.
translation_verse: Wɩya no á aa basɩ nyɛ, ma kɛ sɩ bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ á nyuni tuwo. Dɩ á nyuni rɛ ko tuwo, Wɩɩsɩ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ. Amɛ dɩ á nyuni ko kɩ tʋma, ma wɩya rɛ tɩŋ.

english_verse: We are ruled by Christ's love for us. We are certain that if one person died for everyone else, then all of us have died.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ buloŋ á aa yaa, Krisita aa kyo ma rɛ tɩŋ á kɩ yaa, beewɩya á gyɩma rɛ weliŋ anɩɩ ʋ rɛ laa nal buloŋ nyuu a sʋba. Ɛɛ mɛ daga anɩɩ nal buloŋ mɛ sʋba rɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: And Christ did die for all of us. He died so we would no longer live for ourselves, but for the one who died and was raised to life for us.
translation_verse: Nal nal buloŋ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ Krisita sʋba, ɛɛwɩya nala hʋ buloŋ aa we ba mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ maga dɩ ba kɩ tɩŋ ʋ kyɛrɩ rɛ, aŋ ta bɩl kɩ tɩŋ ba tɩɩ kyɛrɩ. Beewɩya, ba wɩya rɛ Krisita kuu sʋba, aŋka Wɩɩsɩ bɩl kyisi ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to Christ is a new person. The past is forgotten, and everything is new.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko laa Krisita wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna bɩrɩmɩ nɩfalɩɩ rɛ. Wɩbɩnɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ fa aa yaa tene rɛ, ka wɩfalɩya piili ʋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God has done it all! He sent Christ to make peace between himself and us, and he has given us the work of making peace between himself and others.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa wɩya no buloŋ tɩya ma. Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ a leŋ ʋ bee nihuwobisi mɩɩgɩ sʋma. Lagɩlagɩ no, ʋ tɩya ma tʋma rɛ dɩ á mʋ basɩ tɩya nala dɩ ba ko, dɩ ba bee Wɩɩsɩ mɩɩgɩ marɩ dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: What we mean is that God was in Christ, offering peace and forgiveness to the people of this world. And he has given us the work of sharing his message about peace.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa basɩ rɛ nyɛ; Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ a leŋ ʋ bee dʋnɩya nala buloŋ mɩɩgɩ sʋma, aŋ kpa ba wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ kyɛ ba. Wɩɩsɩ kpaa ʋ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya ámaa ʋ tʋŋtʋnna rɛ dɩ á basɩ tɩya nala anɩɩ ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ bee dʋnɩya nala mɩɩgɩ sʋma rɛ nyɛ kɛ.

english_verse: We were sent to speak for Christ, and God is begging you to listen to our message. We speak for Christ and sincerely ask you to make peace with God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, Krisita naasɩ rɛ á laa sɩŋ a basɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya nala. Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ á tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ sʋla ma dɩ ma ko ʋ lee. Krisita nyubaanɩŋ, á aa sʋla ma dɩ ma leŋ dɩ ma bee Wɩɩsɩ marɩ dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Christ never sinned! But God treated him as a sinner, so Christ could make us acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Krisita gyɩ bɩ kaŋ wɩbɔŋ buloŋ, amɛ á wɩya rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ʋ sʋba anɩɩ wɩbɔŋyaal. Wɩɩsɩ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ á wuwo tɩŋ Krisita tɩyaŋ a kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We work together with God, and we beg you to make good use of God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Tʋma no á aa tʋŋ, á bee Wɩɩsɩ buloŋ nɛ aa tʋŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, á aa sʋla ma gyaaŋgyaaŋ, dɩ ma ta leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ hʋ ʋ aa kana beel-ma ko yaa waasʋ.

english_verse: In the Scriptures God says, “When the time came, I listened to you, and when you needed help, I came to save you.” That time has come. This is the day for you to be saved.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ basɩ wɩɩ no ʋ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a baa, “Saŋa hʋ aa maga dɩ ŋ daga ŋ bɔnyɛ ma lee, ŋ fáá ma wulo rɛ. Kyɛɛ hʋ aa maga dɩ ŋ laa ma ta, ŋ kyiyeli ma rɛ.” Ma gyegili nɩɩ daha, saŋa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ kyiyeli ma rɛ nyɛ, gyɩnaŋ nɛ yaa kyɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ laa ma ta. Tʋwara hʋ Pɔɔl aa naa

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with our work, and so we try hard not to cause problems.
translation_verse: Á bee kyɛ dɩ nal buloŋ ko kyogi á feŋ á tʋma no lugo tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, á aa lʋgɩ rɛ dɩ á ta ko kpa kɩŋ buloŋ gara nal buloŋ ŋmanɩɩ.

english_verse: But in everything and in every way we show we truly are God's servants. We have always been patient, though we have had a lot of trouble, suffering, and hard times.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, á wɩkanɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, á aa daga anɩɩ á kɔnɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnna rɛ. Beewɩya, á paalɩ na tʋwara rɛ, a na sikii, wɩgyʋʋlɩya yʋga mɛ gyʋʋ ma, amɛ ba buloŋ tɩyaŋ mɛ, á wuwo kaŋ kenyiri rɛ abee mala.

english_verse: We have been beaten, put in jail, and hurt in riots. We have worked hard and have gone without sleep or food.
translation_verse: Ba ŋmaa ma rɛ, a kaŋ ma tɔ dɩyaŋ, nala gol ŋmaa ma, ka bee hʋ buloŋ laa taawɛɛ. Á tʋŋ tʋma te á faŋŋa rɛ, a bara doo, a pɩŋ losi.

english_verse: But we have kept ourselves pure and have been understanding, patient, and kind. The Holy Spirit has been with us, and our love has been real.
translation_verse: Á daga anɩɩ á yaa Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnna rɛ a bɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ. Á gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ rɛ, a kaŋ kenyiri, a kaŋ bɔnyɛ. Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we á tɩyaŋ nɛ, á kyo nala abee á wɩtɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: We have spoken the truth, and God's power has worked in us. In all our struggles we have said and done only what is right.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ dʋŋ nɛ á kɩ basɩ, Wɩɩsɩ dee mɛ we á tɩyaŋ. Á tɩpʋlʋŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ bakɩna á kaŋ kɩ pɔ á tɩɩ.

english_verse: Whether we were honored or dishonored or praised or cursed, we always told the truth about ourselves. But some people said we did not.
translation_verse: Nala badɔmɔŋ aa tɩya ma gyɩrɩma rɛ, ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ kɩ we ma hɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Á hal nala badɔmɔŋ aa bigisi ma rɛ, ka badɔmɔŋ mɛ kɩ tʋʋsɩ ma. Ba kpaa ma anɩɩ á yaa wɩnyɩyɛla rɛ, amɛ wɩtɩɩ rɛ á kɩ basɩ.

english_verse: We are unknown to others, but well known to you. We seem to be dying, and yet we are still alive. We have been punished, but never killed,
translation_verse: Ba kpaa ma anɩɩ á bɩ yaa nala, amɛ lee kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ tuwo dɩ ba bɩ gyɩŋ ma. Tʋwara hʋ á aa naa, ʋ fa maga á sʋba rɛ, amɛ á ha we doŋ. Ba aa ŋmaa tɩya sʋʋ rɛ, ka á bee sʋba.

english_verse: and we are always happy, even in times of suffering. Although we are poor, we have made many people rich. And though we own nothing, everything is ours.
translation_verse: Á tɩsɩ aa kyogi rɛ, aŋka á kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ saŋa buloŋ. Á yaa nyaaba rɛ, amɛ á aa pɛ nala tɩyaŋ nɛ ba yaa dʋwana Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye tɩyaŋ. Á bɩ kaŋ kɩŋ buloŋ, amɛ ámaa rɛ kɔnɩ tɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ Krisita tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Friends in Corinth, we are telling the truth when we say there is room in our hearts for you.
translation_verse: Abaa! Koriŋti tɩmma! Á basɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ buloŋ polli tɩya ma rɛ. Á bɩ kpaa á wɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ faŋ ma.

english_verse: We are not holding back on our love for you, but you are holding back on your love for us.
translation_verse: Á kɛ kpaa á tɩsɩ buloŋ tɩya ma rɛ abee kyori, amɛ ma kɛ kaŋ ma tɩsɩ faŋ ma rɛ.

english_verse: I speak to you as I would speak to my own children. Please make room in your hearts for us. The Temple of the Living God
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no, ŋ basɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ ŋ balɩya. Ma ta kpaa wɩɩ buloŋ faŋ ma. Ɛɛ hʋ á aa kɩya beel-ma, ma mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ beel-ma. Ma ta leŋ dɩ ma bee nala hʋ aa bɩ laa Yesu wɩya di kɩ pɛ wɩya

english_verse: Stay away from people who are not followers of the Lord! Can someone who is good get along with someone who is evil? Are light and darkness the same?
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ ma bee nala hʋ aa bɩ laa Yesu wɩya di kɩ mal dɔmɔŋ. Tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna bee nɩbɔŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo kɩ mal dɔmɔŋ. Pʋlʋŋ bee bilhuu mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo laŋŋɩ lɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: Is Christ a friend of Satan? Can people who follow the Lord have anything in common with those who don't?
translation_verse: Krisita bee Sɩtaanɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa nyʋʋdɩgɩ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nal hʋ mɛ aa laa Yesu wɩya di abee nal hʋ aa bɩ laa ʋ wɩya di bɩ sɩ wuwo pɛ wɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: Do idols belong in the temple of God? We are the temple of the living God, as God himself says, “I will live with these people and walk among them. I will be their God, and they will be my people.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ dɩya bee vʋga bɩ sɩ wuwo pɛ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya, ámaa rɛ yaa Wɩɩweyi hʋ dɩya. Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ basɩ ʋ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Ŋ sɩ we ŋ nala lee a kɩ gyʋʋ ba lee. Mɩyaŋ nɛ sɩ yaa ba Wɩɩsɩ, dɩ ba mɛ yaa ŋ nala.

english_verse: and be your Father. You will be my sons and my daughters, as surely as I am God, the All-Powerful.”
translation_verse: Ŋ sɩ yaa ma Kuwo dɩ ma mɛ yaa ŋ balɩya. Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, dee buloŋ tɩɩna rɛ basɩ nyɛ.”

english_verse: My friends, God has made us these promises. So we should stay away from everything that keeps our bodies and spirits from being clean. We should honor God and try to be completely like him. The Church Makes Paul Happy
translation_verse: Ŋ naabiikpɩyanama, Wɩɩsɩ foŋ aa baa dɩ ʋ sɩ yaa wɩya no buloŋ tɩya ma nyɛ, ma leŋ dɩ á lɩɩ á tɩɩ bisiŋ wɩya hʋ aa sɩ kyogi á teŋbiye abee á dʋŋsɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ma leŋ dɩ á kɩ fá Wɩɩsɩ, aŋ leŋ dɩ á wɩkanɩɩ buloŋ tʋʋlɩ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Pɔɔl teŋ fɩyɛla

english_verse: Make a place for us in your hearts! We haven't mistreated or hurt anyone. We haven't cheated anyone.
translation_verse: Ma suri ma tɩsɩ tɩya ma. Á bɩ yaa wɩɩ kyogi nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ, á bɩ kyogi nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nyuu mɛ, á bɩl bɩ firimi nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ mɛ.

english_verse: I am not saying this to be hard on you. But, as I have said before, you will always be in our thoughts, whether we live or die.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa basɩ wɩya no, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ kpa kyogisi tɩya ma rɛ, beewɩya ŋ laa sɩya basɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ á kyo ma rɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ mɩɩbol lɛ, á buloŋ nɛ sɩ kana ʋ, dɩ sʋʋ mɛ rɛ, á buloŋ nɛ sɩ sʋba.

english_verse: I trust you completely. I am always proud of you, and I am greatly encouraged. In all my trouble I am still very happy.
translation_verse: Ŋ laa ma di rɛ weliŋ, ŋ bee yaa ma sige. Ŋ wuwo kɩ genni ma wɩya rɛ. Abee tʋwara no á aa naa buloŋ, ka ma wɩya, ŋ teŋ bee yʋwɔrɩ. Ŋ teŋ paalɩ fɩyɛlɩ rɛ a mʋ gallɩ.

english_verse: After we came to Macedonia, we didn't have any chance to rest. We were faced with all kinds of problems. We were troubled by enemies and troubled by fears.
translation_verse: Haalɩ, á aa ko Masidooniya paalʋʋ mɛ, ka á ha bɩ naa wiyese. Wɩya gyɩ gyʋʋ ma rɛ weliŋ. Nala gyɩ kpaa kaasɩ gyɩŋ ma rɛ, á hakɩllɩ buloŋ gyɩ gyarɩ.

english_verse: I don't feel bad anymore, even though my letter hurt your feelings. I did feel bad at first, but I don't now. I know that the letter hurt you for a while.
