translation_verse: Dɩ haŋ teŋ hʋ ŋ aa saba tɩya ma leŋ ma tɩsɩ kyogi mɛ, amɛ ŋ bɩ yaa hara ŋ aa sabɩ teŋ hʋ. Ŋ na anɩɩ teŋ hʋ kɔnɩ gyɩ leŋ ma tɩsɩ kyogi rɛ, ɛɛ gyɩ leŋ ŋ tɩya mɛ kyogi, amɛ ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma tɩsɩ bɩ sɩ kyogi kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: Now I am happy, but not because I hurt your feelings. It is because God used your hurt feelings to make you turn back to him, and none of you were harmed by us.
translation_verse: Ba nyɛ tɩyaŋ, ŋ teŋ fɩyɛla rɛ ŋ aa sabɩ teŋ hʋ. Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ŋ aa leŋ ma tɩsɩ kyogi wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ŋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ, amɛ tɩkyogi hʋ aa leŋ ma bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ, a kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ tɩŋ. Ʋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ rɛ dɩ ma tɩsɩ kyogi, ɛɛ wɩya ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ á bɩ yaa ma wɩbɔŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: When God makes you feel sorry enough to turn to him and be saved, you don't have anything to feel bad about. But when this world makes you feel sorry, it can cause your death.
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ leŋ nal tɩya kyogi akuu ʋ tɩɩna wɩbɔmɔ wɩya, tɩɩna aa kpa ʋ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ ta rɛ, ka Wɩɩsɩ laa ʋ ta. Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ yaa hara wɩɩ no wɩya. Amɛ dɩ nihuwobisi wɩkanɩya dʋŋ nɛ leŋ nal tɩya kyogi, tɩkyogi no iriŋ aa wuwo kpʋ tɩɩna rɛ.

english_verse: When I wrote you, it wasn't to accuse the one who was wrong or to take up for the one who was hurt. I wrote, so God would show you how much you do care for us.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ aa sabɩ teŋ hʋ, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ nal hʋ aa yaa wɩɩ kyogi, koo nal hʋ ba aa yaa wɩɩ hʋ kyogi wɩya rɛ kyɩla ŋ. Amɛ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ma gyɩŋ ɛɛ hʋ ma aa kyɩla á wɩya rɛ.

english_verse: And we were greatly encouraged. Although we were encouraged, we felt even better when we saw how happy Titus was, because you had shown he had nothing to worry about.
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ leŋ á hakɩllɩ pɩŋ lɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Titusi aa ko ma lee, ma buloŋ leŋ ʋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, ʋ hakɩla mɛ pɩŋ lɩdɩgɩ. Nyɛ paalɩ leŋ á tenni marɩ fɩyɛlɩ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: We had told him how much we thought of you, and you did not disappoint us. Just as we have always told you the truth, so everything we told him about you has also proved to be true.
translation_verse: Ŋ bigisi ma tɩya ʋ rɛ, ma mɛ bɩ leŋ hɩɩsɩ di ŋ. Anɩɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ á aa basɩ tɩya ma aa yaa wɩtɩɩ gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ bigisii hʋ á aa bigisi ma tɩya Titusi mɛ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ.

english_verse: It makes me really glad to know I can depend on you.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa ŋ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ rɛ abee ŋ aa sɩ wuwo yelli ma wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: My friends, we want you to know that the churches in Macedonia have shown others God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Á nɩmmabalɩya, á aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩma bɔnyɛ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa yaa tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Masidooniya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: They even asked and begged us to let them have the joy of giving their money for God's people.
translation_verse: Ba ha sʋl ma rɛ weliŋ dɩ á leŋ dɩ ba mɛ wuwo kpa kɩna kɩ kyiyeli ba dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And they did more than we had hoped. They gave themselves first to the Lord and then to us, just as God wanted them to do.
translation_verse: Á fa bɩ yɩyɛla anɩɩ ba sɩ wuwo tɩya ma kɩna maga gɛɛ. Amɛ ba laa sɩya kpa ba tɩɩ tɩya á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita rɛ, ka Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ mɛ, ba kpaa ba tɩɩ tɩya ma mɛ rɛ.

english_verse: Titus was the one who got you started doing this good thing, so we begged him to help you finish what you had begun.
translation_verse: Titusi rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa leŋ ma piili kɩna no kɩyɛsɩɩ. Ɛɛ wɩya á sʋla ʋ rɛ, dɩ ʋ kyiyeli ma dɩ ma wuwo tʋŋ tʋŋweliye hʋ mʋ teŋ.

english_verse: You do everything better than anyone else. You have stronger faith. You speak better and know more. You are eager to give, and you love us better. Now you must give more generously than anyone else.
translation_verse: Ma wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ ma aa yaa kuwokeri rɛ weliŋ, ma laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ weliŋ, ma gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ basɩɩ rɛ weliŋ, ma kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ nɛ weliŋ, aŋ kaŋ sɩfɩyaŋ mɛ weliŋ ma wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ma kyo ma rɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Ɛɛ hʋ ma aa yaa kuwokeri wɩya no buloŋ tɩyaŋ ma kaŋ gɛɛ tɩɩ ma wɩɩsʋllɩ kɩna no kɩyɛsɩɩ ma tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I think you should finish what you started. If you give according to what you have, you will prove you are as eager to give as you were to think about giving.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ma aa piile, ʋ maga dɩ ma kaŋ mʋ teŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ hʋ ma tenni aa pollo wɩɩ hʋ piilii tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ma leŋ dɩ ma tenni polli gɛɛ tɩɩ dɩ ma kaŋ mʋ teŋ. Ma tɩya maga gɛɛ hʋ ma faŋŋa aa maga.

english_verse: It doesn't matter how much you have. What matters is how much you are willing to give from what you have.
translation_verse: Kɩna hʋ ɩ aa kana daa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ. Wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ rɛ yaa ɛɛ hʋ ɩ aa yaa siri dɩ ɩ tɩya abee ɩ tɩya buloŋ a lɩɩ kɩna hʋ ɩ aa kana tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: for you to share with them when you have so much, and they have so little. Later, when they have more than enough, and you are in need, they can share with you. Then everyone will have a fair share,
translation_verse: Ŋ aa basɩ nyɛ, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ nala badɔmɔŋ kyʋgɩsɩ rɛ ŋ baa dɩ ma laa kyʋŋ, ka ba kɛ we wiyese tɩyaŋ. Amɛ gyɩnaŋ, ma kana rɛ ka ba kɛ bɩ kana. Ɛɛwɩya, ʋ weliŋ nɛ yaa dɩ ma kyiyeli ba. Dɩ ba mɛ ko maakyiye kana, ka dɩ ma mɛ bɩ kana, ba mɛ sɩ kyiyeli ma. Dɩ nyɛ rɛ ko yaa, ma buloŋ kaŋ maga dɔmɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: I am grateful that God made Titus care as much about you as we do.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ abee ʋ aa leŋ Titusi kyɩl ma wɩya weliŋ anɩɩ ŋ mɛ aa kyɩl ma wɩya gɛɛ.

english_verse: When we begged Titus to visit you, he said he would. He wanted to because he cared so much for you.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ á aa sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ ko laa kɩna ma lee dʋŋ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ ko ko. Amɛ ʋ tɩɩ sii mɛ fa fɩyɛsa rɛ ʋ paalɩ kyo dɩ ʋ ko ma lee.

english_verse: With Titus we are also sending one of the Lord's followers who is well known in every church for spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Ʋ bee á nɩɩnabiye kɩdɩgɩ rɛ aa ko. Krisitabiisi hʋ buloŋ aa bigisi ʋ rɛ, akuu ʋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ wɩya.

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with the way we handle your generous gift.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, á aa kyɛ dɩ á gyɩŋ kaŋ bɔnyɛ kɩna no weliŋ nɛ, dɩ nal buloŋ ta ko kyogi á feŋ ba kpaayɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We are also sending someone else with Titus and the other follower. We approve of this man. In fact, he has already shown us many times that he wants to help. And now he wants to help even more than ever, because he trusts you so much.
translation_verse: Á nɩɩnabiye kɩdɩgɩ mɛ rɛ á leŋ ʋ tɩŋ ba hal kɩ ko. Ʋ daga ŋmaŋgyamaa tɩyaŋ anɩɩ ʋ kaŋ sɩfɩyaŋ nɛ. Ʋ marɩ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ nɛ dɩ ʋ kyiyeli ma, akuu ʋ aa laa ma di wɩya.

english_verse: Titus is my partner, who works with me to serve you. The other two followers are sent by the churches, and they bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Titusi kɛ yaa ŋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋ nɛ, á buloŋ tʋma kɩ tɩya ma. Amɛ ʋ bee á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ kɛ aa ko, ba aa rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa laa Krisitabiisi buloŋ nyuu sɩŋ tʋma no tɩyaŋ. Ba leŋ nala kɩ kpa Krisita yohuŋ nɛ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the money you plan to give for God's people.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ yaa kparaama dɩ ŋ bɩl sabɩ teŋ kɩ tɩya ma kɩyɛsʋʋ hʋ á aa laa dɩ á kyiyeli Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya.

english_verse: This is why I am sending Titus and the two others to you. I want you to be ready, just as I promised. This will prove we were not wrong to brag about you.
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no, ŋ aa tɩŋ á nɩmmabalɩya no rɛ dɩ ba ko ma lee, dɩ bigisii hʋ ŋ aa bigisi ma wɩɩ no tɩyaŋ ta ko yaa wɩnyɩyɛl. Beewɩya saŋa buloŋ nɛ ŋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya Masidooniya tɩmma hʋ anɩɩ ma kɛ yaa siri pɔ rɛ.

english_verse: Some followers from Macedonia may come with me, and I want them to find that you have the money ready. If you don't, I would be embarrassed for trusting you to do this. But you would be embarrassed even more.
translation_verse: Dɩ ŋ bee Masidooniya paalʋʋ Krisitabiisi hʋ badɔmɔŋ nɛ ko ko, dɩ ba ko na dɩ ma kɩna ha bɩ yaa siri, ʋ sɩ yaa ŋ hɩɩsɩ, akuu ŋ aa laa ma di waasʋ wɩya. Ŋ bee basɩ hɩɩsɩ hʋ ma tɩɩ kɛ aa sɩ di wɩya.

english_verse: So I have decided to ask Titus and the others to spend some time with you before I arrive. This way they can arrange to collect the money you have promised. Then you will have the chance to give because you want to, and not because you feel forced to.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ na dɩ ʋ maga dɩ ŋ tɩŋ ŋ naabalɩya no dɩ ba laa sɩya ko ŋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ bɔnyɛ kɩna hʋ ma aa baa dɩ ma sɩ kɩyɛsɩ kyiyeli Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ, dɩ ma kpa laŋŋɩ lɩdɩgɩ, ka dɩ ŋ tɩɩ na ko. Ɛɛ sɩ daga anɩɩ ma tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ma kɩyɛsɩ bɔnyɛ kɩna no, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ ba fɩl ma rɛ ma yaa.

english_verse: Remember this saying, “A few seeds make a small harvest, but a lot of seeds make a big harvest.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩma rɛ nyɛ: Dɩ ɩ rɛ doho kɩna mʋhʋ, ɩ mɛ aa kʋŋ kɩna mʋhʋ rɛ, amɛ dɩ ɩ doho kɩna yʋga, ɩ aa kʋŋ kɩna yʋga rɛ.

english_verse: Each of you must make up your own mind about how much to give. But don't feel sorry that you must give and don't feel you are forced to give. God loves people who love to give.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ tɩya maga gɛɛ ɩ hakɩla aa daga ɩ dɩ ɩ tɩya. Nal buloŋ lɩɩ kɩna hʋ abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ, aŋ ta leŋ dɩ ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ʋ yaa fɩlɩɩ rɛ. Nal buloŋ maga dɩ ʋ tɩya ʋ tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya nal hʋ aa tɩya abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ, ʋ tɩɩna rɛ Wɩɩsɩ kyo.

english_verse: God can bless you with everything you need, and you will always have more than enough to do all kinds of good things for others.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ dee rɛ ʋ aa sɩ wuwo tɩya ma kɩŋ buloŋ ma aa kyɛ. Ʋ sɩ paalɩ tɩya ma kɩŋ buloŋ a baŋ gɛɛ ma aa kyɛ saŋa buloŋ, dɩ ma kpa marɩ ma tɩɩ aŋ ha ka, a kpa kyiyelii ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God freely gives his gifts to the poor, and always does right.”
translation_verse: Ba saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ aa kpa kɩna kɩ tɩya nyaaba rɛ ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ bɔnyɛ bee teŋ.”

english_verse: God gives seed to farmers and provides everyone with food. He will increase what you have, so you can give even more to those in need.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ rɛ aa tɩya nihuwobiŋ kɩdoho ʋ doho, a tɩya ʋ kɩdiiliye mɛ, ʋ di. Ɛɛwɩya, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tɩya ma kɩŋ hʋ buloŋ ma aa kyɛɛ a leŋ dɩ kɩna hʋ ma aa kana marɩ yʋga, dɩ ma wuwo marɩ kɩ kyiyeli nala hʋ aa bɩ kana weliŋ.

english_verse: You will be blessed in every way, and you will be able to keep on being generous. Then many people will thank God when we deliver your gift.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma noŋ kɩ gyʋʋ ma wɩyaalɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ma wuwo kpa kɩna kɩ tɩya nala abee bɔnyɛ saŋa buloŋ. Ɛɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ nala yʋga kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ akuu ma bɔnyɛ kɩna hʋ á aa sɩ kaŋ mʋ tɩya ba wɩya.

english_verse: What you are doing is much more than a service that supplies God's people with what they need. It is something that will make many others thank God.
translation_verse: Kɩna no ma aa tɩya nyɛ, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Krisitabiisi hʋ kɩkyɛɛlɩya dʋŋ nɛ ba sɩ na, amɛ ɛɛ mɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ba kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ weliŋ.

english_verse: The way in which you have proved yourselves by this service will bring honor and praise to God. You believed the message about Christ, and you obeyed it by sharing generously with God's people and with everyone else.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hʋ ma aa tɩya kɩna hʋ daga Krisitabiisi hʋ iriŋ ma aa yaa rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, nala hʋ aa laa kɩna hʋ sɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ abee gɛɛ hʋ ma aa tɩŋ Krisita wɩweliye hʋ ma aa laa di abee ma wɩtɩɩ buloŋ. Ba sɩ bɩl dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ abee bɔnyɛ hʋ ma aa kana a leŋ ma beel-ba, abee ma Krisitabii-dɔŋtɩŋsɩ hʋ buloŋ kaŋ kɩna hʋ ma aa kana a kpaa dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Now they are praying for you and want to see you, because God used you to bless them so very much.
translation_verse: Ba sɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma abee ba tɩsɩ buloŋ, akuu bɔnyɛ hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ magɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa kaŋ daga ma wɩya.

english_verse: Thank God for his gift that is too wonderful for words!
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ abee kyɔgɩtabal no ʋ aa kpaa tɩya ma waasʋ wɩya.

english_verse: Some people have said we act like the people of this world. So when I arrive, I expect I will have to be firm and forceful in what I say to them. Please don't make me treat you that way.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa sʋl ma, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko ma lee, ma ta fɩla ŋ dɩ ŋ hayɛ ma nyuu tɩyaŋ. Beewɩya ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ aa wuwo ŋ bɩrɩmɩ kɩhaa rɛ nala hʋ aa baa dɩ dʋnɩya hakɩla rɛ ŋ kaŋ kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ ŋ aa yaa nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We live in this world, but we don't act like its people
translation_verse: Á we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ, amɛ dʋnɩya hakɩla daa á kaŋ kɩ lʋga á lʋgʋ Krisita tɩŋɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: or fight our battles with the weapons of this world. Instead, we use God's power that can destroy fortresses. We destroy arguments
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya bayuwo kɩna daa á kaŋ kɩ lʋga á lʋgʋ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ dee rɛ ʋ kpa tɩya ma, a wuwo kpa yuwo kɩ di Sɩtaanɩ leye hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa kaŋ dee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: and every bit of pride that keeps anyone from knowing God. We capture people's thoughts and make them obey Christ.
translation_verse: Á kpaa Wɩɩsɩ dee no rɛ a yuwo di dagɩŋtɩɩ tɩmma abee nyʋʋtaaduwo waasɩma hʋ buloŋ ba aa kaŋ tɔ dɩ nala ta gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ, aŋ kaŋ nala hakɩllɩ bɩrɩmɩ ba kɩ tɩŋ Krisita kyɛrɩ.

english_verse: And when you completely obey him, we will punish anyone who refuses to obey.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ kɔnɩ aa tɩŋ Krisita nyʋwa weliŋ, ɛɛ kɛ á mɛ sɩ yaa siri, a dɔgɩsɩ nala hʋ aa bee tɩŋ ʋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: You judge by appearances. If any of you think you are the only ones who belong to Christ, then think again. We belong to Christ as much as you do.
translation_verse: Ma aa kpa wɩya gyambaa rɛ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kpaa ʋ tɩɩ anɩɩ ʋ yaa Krisita nal lɛ, dɩ ʋ tɩɩna rɛ marɩ sʋnnɩ weliŋ na, ʋ sɩ gyɩma anɩɩ á mɛ yaa Krisita nala rɛ.

english_verse: Maybe I brag a little too much about the authority that the Lord gave me to help you and not to hurt you. Yet I am not embarrassed to brag.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ aa bigisi ŋ tɩɩ kɩŋkaŋ dee hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ma wɩya mɛ, ʋ bɩ yaa ŋ hɩɩsɩ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ kpaa dee hʋ tɩya ma dɩ á kaŋ kɩ marɩ ma rɛ. Ʋ bɩ baa dɩ á kaŋ kɩ kyogi ma.

english_verse: And I am not trying to scare you with my letters.
translation_verse: Ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ma kɩ bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ ŋ sabɩ tenni kɩ tɩya ma dɩ ŋ kpa kambɩŋ we ma rɛ.

english_verse: Some of you are saying, “Paul's letters are harsh and powerful. But in person, he is a weakling and has nothing worth saying.”
translation_verse: Beewɩya, nala badɔmɔŋ baa dɩ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa sabɩ tɩya ma aa deye rɛ, a hayɛ mɛ, dɩ amɛ dɩ ŋ tɩɩ ko we ma lee kɛ, dɩ ŋ aa kɩɩ sɔlɛɛ rɛ, ka ŋ wɩbasɩɩ mɛ bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ.

english_verse: Those people had better understand that when I am with you, I will do exactly what I say in my letters.
translation_verse: Ʋ maga dɩ nala no tesi gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ wɩya hʋ á aa yaŋ we gama aŋ sabɩ tɩya ma, ba tɩɩ rɛ á sɩ yaa dɩ ámaa rɛ ko we ma lee mɛ.

english_verse: We won't dare compare ourselves with those who think so much of themselves. But they are foolish to compare themselves with themselves.
translation_verse: Á bɩ sɩ maakyiye yeŋŋi aŋ kpa á tɩɩ mʋ magɩsɩ nala hʋ aa bigisi ba tɩɩ. Nala no tɩɩ hakɩllɩ rɛ ba aa kpa a kɩ magɩsɩ ba wɩyaalɩya, a kpa ba tɩɩ kɩ magɩsɩ dɔmɔŋ. Ba yaa bambugo kɩŋkaŋ!

english_verse: We won't brag about something we don't have a right to brag about. We will only brag about the work God has sent us to do, and you are part of that work.
translation_verse: Amɛ á kɛ, á bɩ sɩ bigisi á tɩɩ a baŋ gɛɛ hʋ aa maga. Á tɩɩ bigisii buloŋ kɛ we tʋma hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ma mɔgɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ á aa ko basɩ tɩya ma mɛ pɛɛ tʋma no tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: We don't brag about what others have done, as if we had done those things ourselves. But I hope as you become stronger in your faith, we will be able to reach many more of the people around you. That has always been our goal.
translation_verse: Á bee bigisi á tɩɩ tʋma hʋ nala badɔmɔŋ aa tuŋ gallɩ mɔgɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa daga ma wɩya. Amɛ á bayɩyɛla rɛ yaa dɩ ma laadii marɩ sɩŋ weliŋ, dɩ tʋma hʋ á aa tʋŋ ma lee wuwo mʋ sɩya. Amɛ á kɛ sɩ tʋma a kɩ maga gɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa daga ma.

english_verse: Then we will be able to preach the good news in other lands where we cannot take credit for work someone else has already done.
translation_verse: Dɩ nyɛ rɛ ko yaa, á sɩ wuwo gallɩ mʋ leye badɔmɔŋ mɛ a basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ. Á bee kyɛ dɩ á laa nal kɩdɩgɩ gyaaŋbiye, akuu ʋ aa tʋŋ tʋma lee hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ʋ wɩya.

english_verse: You may brag about yourself, but the only approval that counts is the Lord's approval.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, nal hʋ aa bigisi ʋ tɩɩ daa ba kɩ kpa yohuŋ, amɛ nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa bigisi rɛ ba kɩ kpa yohuŋ.

english_verse: But now I fear that you will be tricked, just as Eve was tricked by that lying snake. I am afraid that you might stop thinking about Christ in an honest and sincere way.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ kyɩla rɛ anɩɩ ba sɩ mʋrɩ ma dɩ ma ta tɩŋ Krisita bee tɩdɩgɩ abee wɩtɩɩ, anɩɩ dʋŋ hʋ gyɩ aa kpaa dawarɩ a mʋrɩ Hawa gɛɛ.

english_verse: I may not speak as well as they do, but I know as much. And this has already been made perfectly clear to you.
translation_verse: Kapuwo dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩya basɩɩ mɛ, ka ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ŋ bɩ gyɩ wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa basɩ. Á kyaasɩ basɩ wɩya no buloŋ polli tɩya ma rɛ wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ abee lee kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Even when I was in need, I still didn't bother you. In fact, some of the Lord's followers from Macedonia brought me what I needed. I have not been a burden to you in the past, and I will never be a burden.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa we ma lee, ŋ gyɩ aa kyɛ kyiyelii abee molbii mʋhʋ rɛ, amɛ ŋ gyɩ bɩ kpaa gɛɛ nyaŋ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ. Á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ gyɩ aa lɩɩ Masidooniya paalʋʋ ko rɛ gyɩ tɩya ŋ kɩna hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa kyɛ. Ŋ gyɩ bɩ kpaa ŋ kɩkyɛɛlɩya wɩya nɩɩ ma. Ɛɛ mɛ rɛ ŋ bɩ sɩ maakyiye kpa ŋ wɩɩ buloŋ nɩɩ ma.

english_verse: As surely as I speak the truth about Christ, no one in Achaia can stop me from bragging about this.
translation_verse: Krisita nyuniŋ, wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ kɩ basɩ ŋ aa baa dɩ nal buloŋ tuwo Akaaya paalʋʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ ʋ aa sɩ wuwo baa dɩ ŋ ta bigisi ŋ tɩɩ wɩɩ no wɩya.

english_verse: Anyway, they are no more than false apostles and dishonest workers. They only pretend to be apostles of Christ.
translation_verse: Nala no aa mʋrɩ nala rɛ anɩɩ ba yaa Krisita kpambɩsɩ rɛ. Ba aa mʋrɩ nala rɛ ba tʋma tɩyaŋ, aŋ aa fugo kaŋ ba tɩɩ yaa gɛɛ anɩɩ ba yaa Krisita kpambɩsɩ rɛ.

english_verse: And it is no wonder. Even Satan tries to make himself look like an angel of light.
translation_verse: Ʋ gɛɛ yaŋ bɩ yaa wɩkperii, beewɩya Sɩtaanɩ mɛ gba aa wuwo fugo kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ yaa gɛɛ anɩɩ ʋ aa yaa malɩka rɛ.

english_verse: So why does it seem strange for Satan's servants to pretend to do what is right? Someday they will get exactly what they deserve. Paul's Sufferings for Christ
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ Sɩtaanɩ tʋŋtʋnna mɛ rɛ fugo kaŋ ba tɩɩ yaa gɛɛ anɩɩ nala aa kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ, ʋ mɛ bɩ yaa wɩkperii. Ba tenii buloŋ, ba tɩɩ pɩwasɩya rɛ sɩ bil ba nyʋʋsɩ. Pɔɔl bigisi ʋ tɩɩ tʋwara hʋ ʋ aa na wɩya

english_verse: I don't want any of you to think I am a fool. But if you do, then let me be a fool and brag a little.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ ŋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ nal buloŋ ta bɩɩna anɩɩ ŋ yaa bambugi rɛ. Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ma kpa ŋ anɩɩ ŋ yaa bambugi mɛ, ʋ maga rɛ. Doŋ nɛ ŋ sɩ wuwo bigisi ŋ tɩɩ mʋhʋ tʋlɩɩ.

english_verse: When I do all this bragging, I do it as a fool and not for the Lord.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa bigisi ŋ tɩɩ nyɛ, Yesu Krisita nyʋwa daa ŋ kɩ tɩŋa gɛɛ. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ bambugi-wɩya rɛ ŋ kɩ basɩ.

english_verse: Yet if others want to brag about what they have done, so will I.
translation_verse: Amɛ nala yʋga aa kuu dʋnɩya no wɩkanɩya wɩya rɛ a kɩ bigisi ba tɩɩ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma leŋ dɩ ŋ mɛ bigisi ŋ tɩɩ.

english_verse: And since you are so smart, you will gladly put up with a fool.
translation_verse: Ma baa ma yaa wɩgyʋnna rɛ, kɛ ma aa kaŋ kenyiri a gyegili kɩ nɩɩ bambugo wɩbasɩya.

english_verse: In fact, you let people make slaves of you and cheat you and steal from you. Why, you even let them strut around and slap you in the face.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ kaŋ ma bɩrɩmɩ yosi, koo dɩ ʋ kaŋ ma kɩna kɩ fasɩ, koo dɩ ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ ma kɩ gʋra, koo dɩ ʋ fɩl ma ma kɩ yaa ʋ wɩkyɛɛlɩya, koo dɩ ʋ kaŋ ma kɩ yaa sɩgyʋʋ wɩya, ka ma aa tallɩ ma nyʋwa rɛ.

english_verse: Are they Hebrews? So am I. Are they Jews? So am I. Are they from the family of Abraham? Well, so am I.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba ko baa ba yaa Hiiburu nala, ŋ mɛ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Dɩ ba ko baa ba yaa Iziral tɩmma mɛ, ŋ mɛ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Dɩ ba ko baa ba yaa Abɩraham doho nala mɛ rɛ, ŋ mɛ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Are they servants of Christ? I am a fool to talk this way, but I serve him better than they do. I have worked harder and have been put in jail more times. I have been beaten with whips more and have been in danger of death more often.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba ko baa ba yaa Krisita tʋŋtʋnna rɛ, ŋ mɛ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Mɩyaŋ nɛ gba paalɩ yaa Yesu Krisita tʋŋtʋnnɩ a baŋ ba, beewɩya mɩyaŋ nɛ tʋŋ tʋma yʋga a baŋ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ. Ba villi kana ŋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ, a villi ŋmaa ŋ, ŋ bɩ gyɩŋ ba nyʋwa. Ba aa ŋmaa ŋ ŋmaa ŋ tɩya sʋʋ rɛ ka ŋ sii, ŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo dɩɩsɩ ba. Ŋ aa basɩ wɩya no, ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ŋ nyuu tuwo, amɛ ba wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ kɩ basɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Three times the Romans beat me with a big stick, and once my enemies stoned me. I have been shipwrecked three times, and I even had to spend a night and a day in the sea.
translation_verse: Roma tɩmma vɩɩrɩ ŋ naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa bʋto mɛ rɛ abee hɔgɩ-kpaasa. Saŋa kɩdɩgɩ mɛ ba paa bʋwa yaga ŋ nɛ dɩ ba kpʋ. Nɩɩduworiborisi mɛ ŋ aa gyʋwa ba kyogi nɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ʋ yaa naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa bʋto rɛ. Kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ, ŋ paalɩ we nɩɩ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ rɛ a lɩɩ kyɩkyʋwala a kaŋ kɩ mʋ ʋ sɩgballɩya mɛ kyɩkyʋwala, a kɩ lʋga dɩ ŋ lɩɩ.

english_verse: During my many travels, I have been in danger from rivers, robbers, my own people, and foreigners. My life has been in danger in cities, in deserts, at sea, and with people who only pretended to be the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Ŋ ŋmaŋgyamaa no buloŋ valɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ŋ naa tʋwara rɛ weliŋ fuwoni kyolii tɩyaŋ, ka gaala mɛ dɔgɩsɩ ŋ kɩŋkaŋ. Ŋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Gyuuma abee nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma mɛ buloŋ dɔgɩsɩ ŋ nɛ kɩŋkaŋ. A lɩɩ gɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, ŋ naa tʋwara rɛ pogisi abee tɔbala abee fuwobala buloŋ tɩyaŋ mɛ. Nala aa fugo baa ba yaa Krisitabiisi mɛ dɔgɩsɩ ŋ nɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: I have worked and struggled and spent many sleepless nights. I have gone hungry and thirsty and often had nothing to eat. I have been cold from not having enough clothes to keep me warm.
translation_verse: Ŋ tʋma rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, a lɔlɔ weliŋ. Kyɛyɛ badɔmɔŋ ŋ aa bara doo rɛ. Ŋ gyɩŋ kɩŋ hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ losi bee nɩɩnyʋwasɩ rɛ. Saŋa kɩdɩgɩ ŋ aa paalɩ bɩ kaŋ kɩdiilii buloŋ ŋ aa sɩ di. Waal kpʋʋ ŋ nɛ weliŋ, akuu ŋ aa bɩ naa dɩya ŋ aa sɩ gyʋʋ, koo gal ŋ aa sɩ kpa tɔ ŋ teŋ wɩya.

english_verse: When others are weak, I am weak too. When others are tricked into sin, I get angry.
translation_verse: Dɩ ŋ Krisitabii-dɔŋtɩɩna rɛ ko kaŋ gyoŋ, ʋ aa kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ŋ mɛ kaŋ gyoŋ. Dɩ nal ko yaa wɩbɔŋ mɛ, ŋ tɩya aa kyogi rɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: If I have to brag, I will brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ sɩ bigisi ŋ tɩɩ mɛ, wɩya hʋ aa yaa ŋ gyomo rɛ ŋ sɩ kɩ basɩ.

english_verse: God, the Father of our Lord Jesus, knows I am not lying. And God is to be praised forever!
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa yaa á Tɩɩna Yesu Kuwo gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ bee nyɩya wɩya. Ʋ feŋ sɩ na bigisii deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: The governor of Damascus at the time of King Aretas had the city gates guarded, so he could capture me.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa we Damaasiku tɩyaŋ, nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ gyɩ aa laa Kuwori Arita naasɩ sɩŋ doŋ paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ gyɩ sii ta nala rɛ dɩ ba mʋ sɩŋ bee hʋ paganyʋʋbal hʋ tɩyaŋ, a pɔ kana ŋ.

english_verse: But I escaped by being let down in a basket through a window in the city wall.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ Krisitabii-dɔŋtɩŋsɩ hʋ gyɩ kpaa ŋ a we simbiye tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kpa ŋ tɩŋ tokoro ta gyee hʋ hal tɩyaŋ ŋ tuu sɔmmm, a sii fá nyʋgɩsɩ, ba kyɛ ŋ lɔlɔ.

english_verse: I have to brag. There is nothing to be gained by it, but I must brag about the visions and other things that the Lord has shown me.
translation_verse: Ʋ maga dɩ ŋ bigisi ŋ tɩɩ rɛ, amɛ ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ tɩɩ bigisii no bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ. Amɛ ŋ ha sɩ bigisi ŋ tɩɩ a basɩ wɩya hʋ á Tɩɩna Krisita aa leŋ ŋ na anɩɩ duwoso tɩyaŋ, abee wɩya ʋ aa kpaa daga ŋ.

english_verse: I am planning to visit you for the third time. But I still won't make a burden of myself. What I really want is you, and not what you have. Children are not supposed to save up for their parents, but parents are supposed to take care of their children.
translation_verse: Ŋ bʋto rɛ nyɛ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ ko na ma. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko, ŋ bɩ sɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ kpa ŋ wɩkyɛɛlɩya nɩɩ ma. Ma kɩna daa ŋ kɩ kyɛ. Ma tɩɩ rɛ ŋ kɩ kyɛ, beewɩya biisi daa sɩ kyɛ kɩna kɩ biŋ ba kuwoma bee ba nɩmma. Amɛ biisi kuwoma bee ba nɩmma rɛ maga dɩ ba kyɛ kɩna kɩ biŋ ba biisi.

english_verse: As I said, only God really knows if this man was in his body at the time.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ kpaa baal no kaŋ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩbee rɛ. Amɛ ŋ bɩ gyɩma dɩ ʋ kɔnɩ gyɩ mʋʋ wɩɩsɩbee rɛ koo dɩ ʋ gyɩ aa duwosi rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ nɛ gyɩma.

english_verse: But he was taken up into paradise, where he heard things too wonderful to tell.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa nɩɩ doŋ, nihuwobiŋ nyʋwa bɩ sɩ wuwo basɩ ba. Ʋ paalɩ bɩ maga dɩ ba basɩ ba mɛ gba.

english_verse: Yet even if I did brag, I would not be foolish. I would simply be speaking the truth. But I will try not to say too much. That way, none of you will think more highly of me than you should because of what you have seen me do and say.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ fa aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ bigisi ŋ tɩɩ mɛ, ŋ aa wuwo dɩ ŋ bigisi rɛ, beewɩya ŋ bɩ sɩ kɩ yaa bambugi wɩya, wɩtɩɩ hʋ rɛ ŋ sɩ kɩ basɩ. Amɛ ŋ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa bigisi ŋ tɩɩ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa daga ŋ wɩya, beewɩya ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ nala kpa ŋ yohuŋ baŋ gɛɛ aa maga, akuu wɩya hʋ ŋ aa yaa, koo wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basɩ wɩya.

english_verse: Three times I begged the Lord to make this suffering go away.
translation_verse: Ŋ sʋla á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa bʋto rɛ, anɩɩ ʋ lɩɩ tʋwara no ŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But he replied, “My gift of undeserved grace is all you need. My power is strongest when you are weak.” So if Christ keeps giving me his power, I will gladly brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ŋ a baa, “Bɔnyɛ hʋ ŋ aa kana beel-ɩ maga rɛ. Ɩ gyomo tɩyaŋ nɛ ɩ sɩ na ŋ dee mɔgɩ.” Ɛɛ wɩya ŋ teŋ fɩyɛla rɛ kɩŋkaŋ ŋ aa kaŋ gyomo wɩya. Ŋ aa sɩ bigisi ŋ tɩɩ ŋ gyomo wɩya rɛ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ Krisita dee we ŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Yes, I am glad to be weak or insulted or mistreated or to have troubles and sufferings, if it is for Christ. Because when I am weak, I am strong. Paul's Concern for the Lord's Followers at Corinth
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya Krisita nyuniŋ, ŋ teŋ fɩyɛla rɛ ŋ gyomo wɩya. Dɩ ba aa tʋʋsɩ ŋ, koo dɩ ŋ aa na tʋwara, koo dɩ ba aa dɔgɩsɩ ŋ, koo dɩ wɩya rɛ aa gyʋʋ ŋ maga gɛɛ buloŋ mɛ, Krisita wɩya, ka ŋ kɛ sɩya tuwo, beewɩya ŋ gyomo tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ aa na Krisita dee ŋ tɩyaŋ. Koriŋti tɩmma wɩya kyɩl Pɔɔl

english_verse: I have been making a fool of myself. But you forced me to do it, when you should have been speaking up for me. I may be nothing at all, but I am as good as those super apostles.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa yaa wɩya anɩɩ bambugi rɛ, amɛ mamaa rɛ kaŋ ba buloŋ ko. Mamaa rɛ fa maga dɩ ma daga anɩɩ ŋ yaa nal lɛ. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaŋ kyo ŋ bɩ yaa nal mɛ, amɛ nala hʋ aa kaŋ ba tɩɩ kɩ yɩrɩ Yesu kpambɩsɩ hʋ mɛ bɩ kpɩya ŋ.

english_verse: When I was with you, I was patient and worked all the powerful miracles and signs and wonders of a true apostle.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ŋ yaa wɩmagɩla abee wɩkperiye abee wɩgyamaa rɛ ma tɩyaŋ abee kenyiri. Wɩya no buloŋ daga anɩɩ ŋ kɔnɩ yaa Krisita kpambɩya tɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: You missed out on only one blessing the other churches received. That is, you didn't have to support me. Forgive me for doing you wrong.
translation_verse: Wɩbee rɛ daga anɩɩ ŋ yaa wɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ tɩya ma Krisitabii-dɔŋtɩŋsɩ rɛ aŋ bɩ yaa ʋ tɩya ma kɛ? Koo ŋ aa bɩ leŋ ma kyiyeli ŋ bee molbiye hʋ rɛ tɩŋ ma kɩ basɩ nyɛ. Dɩ gɛɛ rɛ ko tɩŋ, ŋ aa sʋl ma, ma kpa kyɛ ŋ.

english_verse: So I will gladly give all I have and all I am. Will you love me less for loving you too much?
translation_verse: Ma wɩya, ŋ paalɩ kyo dɩ ŋ kpa kɩŋ buloŋ ŋ aa kana rɛ abee ŋ dee buloŋ a tʋma tɩya ma. Ŋ yaŋ aa kyo ma kɩŋkaŋ nyɛ, ma mɛ fa maga dɩ ma mɛ kyo ŋ gɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: You agree that I wasn't a burden to you. Maybe that's because I was trying to catch you off guard and trick you.
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ aa ko ma lee, ŋ bee dɔŋ ma kɩna wɩya. Amɛ nala badɔmɔŋ sɩ baa dɩ dawarɩ rɛ ŋ kpa a mʋrɩ laa ma kɩna.

english_verse: Were you cheated by any of those I sent to you?
translation_verse: Nala hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa tɩma ma lee, ŋ gyɩ tɩŋ ba dɩ ba ko mʋrɩ ma laa ma kɩna rɛ?

english_verse: I urged Titus to visit you, and I sent another follower with him. But Titus didn't cheat you, and we felt and behaved the same way he did.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ nɛ gyɩ tɩŋ Titusi bee á nɩɩnabiye kɩdɩgɩ dɩ ba ko ma lee. Titusi gyɩ aa ko ma lee, ʋ fasɩ ma kɩŋ nɛ? Wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ á aa yaa tɩyaŋ, á bee Titusi nyʋwa yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Á buloŋ aa tɩŋ ŋmaŋdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: I am afraid God will make me ashamed when I visit you again. I will feel like crying because many of you have never given up your old sins. You are still doing things that are immoral, indecent, and shameful.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ, ŋ kyɩla rɛ anɩɩ dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ bɩl ko ma lee, Wɩɩsɩ bɩl sɩ leŋ dɩ hɩɩsɩ kana ŋ ma wɩya. Ŋ tɩya sɩ kyogi kɩŋkaŋ dɩ ŋ wɩɩ akuu ma badɔmɔŋ ha aa bɩ bɩrɩma lɩɩ ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ wɩya. Ŋ kyɩla anɩɩ nala yʋga ha we ma tɩyaŋ a kɩ yaa bisiŋ wɩya, a kɩ yaa wɩlaama, a gɔllɩ kɩ sɔnnɩ.

english_verse: I am on my way to visit you for the third time. And as the Scriptures say, “Any charges must be proved true by at least two or three witnesses.”
translation_verse: Ŋ bʋto rɛ nyɛ ŋ aa ko dɩ ŋ na ma. Ma liisi wɩɩ hʋ ba aa saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa “Dɩ nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bee ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna rɛ kaŋ wɩɩ dɩ ma kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma di wɩɩ hʋ sarɩya, ʋ maga dɩ ma kyɛ daŋsɩya tɩmma balɩya koo boto rɛ.”

english_verse: During my second visit I warned you that I would punish you and anyone else who doesn't stop sinning. I am far away from you now, but I give you the same warning.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩ aa ko ma lee lɩya tɩɩna hʋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ gyɩ kʋrɩsɩ nala hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ abee ma nɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ dɩgɩna rɛ. Nyɛ kɛ ŋ tuwo ma lee, amɛ ŋ bɩl sɩ kʋrɩsɩ ma dɩgɩna anɩɩ dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko, ŋ bɩ sɩ leŋ nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ aa yaa wɩbɔŋ ta.

english_verse: This should prove to you that I am speaking for Christ. When he corrects you, he won't be weak. He will be powerful!
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ma aa kyɛ dɩ ma na a gyɩma anɩɩ Krisita tɩŋa ŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ basɩ wɩya, ma sɩ na ʋ. Ma sɩ na mɛ anɩɩ ʋ kaŋ dee rɛ ma lee, a wuwo ma wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Although he was weak when he was nailed to the cross, he now lives by the power of God. We are weak, just as Christ was. But you will see that we will live by the power of God, just as Christ does.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ba kpaasɩ ʋ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ anɩɩ ʋ fa bɩ kaŋ dee. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ dee tɩyaŋ ʋ siye rɛ a kaŋ mɩɩbol. Á mɛ bɩ kaŋ dee anɩɩ ʋ fa aa bɩ kaŋ dee gɛɛ, amɛ á aa we Krisita tɩyaŋ wɩya, a mɛ kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ dee rɛ. Dee no rɛ á kpa a tʋma kɩ tɩya ma gɛɛ.

english_verse: Test yourselves and find out if you really are true to your faith. If you pass the test, you will discover that Christ is living in you. But if Christ isn't living in you, you have failed.
translation_verse: Ma deŋ ma tɩɩma weliŋ na, a pɛ sʋnnɩ ma tɩɩ mɛ, a na dɩ ma sɩŋ weliŋ wɩɩ hʋ ma aa laa di tɩyaŋ koo dɩ ma bɩ sɩŋ weliŋ. Ma bɩ gyɩma nɩɩ Yesu Krisita we ma tɩyaŋ nɛ? Dɩ mamaa rɛ bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ we ma tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ ma tele rɛ.

english_verse: I hope you will discover we have not failed.
translation_verse: Ŋ laa di anɩɩ ma sɩ gyɩma anɩɩ á kɛ bɩ tele.

english_verse: We pray you will stop doing evil things. We don't pray like this to make ourselves look good, but to get you to do right, even if we are failures.
translation_verse: Á sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ dɩ ma ta yaa wɩɩ buloŋ kyogi. Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ anɩɩ á aa kyɛ dɩ á daga anɩɩ á kɛ aa yaa weliŋ nɛ, amɛ á aa kyɛ dɩ ma wuwo kɩ yaa wɩya aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ, haalɩ dɩ ʋ rɛ kɩɩ nɩɩ á tele mɛ,

english_verse: All we can do is to follow the truth and not fight against it.
translation_verse: beewɩya á bɩ sɩ wuwo lɩɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ hal. Á sɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: I am writing these things to you before I arrive. This way I won't have to be hard on you when I use the authority the Lord has given me. I was given this authority, so I could help you and not destroy you.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya rɛ tɩŋ ŋ we gama aŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma. Beewɩya dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko ma lee, ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ hayɛ ma nyuu tɩyaŋ akuu dee hʋ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ ma nyuu tɩyaŋ wɩya. Wɩɩsɩ kpaa dee hʋ tɩya ŋ ma nyuu tɩyaŋ dɩ ŋ kaŋ pɛ ma rɛ dɩ ma laadii marɩ sɩŋ weliŋ. Ʋ bɩ baa dɩ ŋ kaŋ ko turi ma lo.

english_verse: Goodbye, my friends. Do better and pay attention to what I have said. Try to get along and live peacefully with each other. Now I pray that God, who gives love and peace, will be with you.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ teŋ hʋ litenii rɛ nyɛ. Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma hɔŋ weliŋ. Ma kpa ma gyogibɔmɔ hʋ ta, aŋ tʋʋlɩ. Ma gyegili nɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa basa tɩya ma weliŋ. Ma kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ, a sʋma abee dɔmɔŋ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ kaŋ gɛɛ, á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ aa kyo nala wɩya, a kɩ tɩya ba laaŋfɩya sɩ we ma lee.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. All God's people send their greetings.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ kyʋwalɩ dɔmɔŋ abee kyori.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ abee ba fɩyɛlʋʋ sɩ we ma lee.

english_verse: Christ obeyed God our Father and gave himself as a sacrifice for our sins to rescue us from this evil world.
translation_verse: Yesu Krisita sʋba á wɩbɔmɔ wɩya rɛ, dɩ ʋ lɩɩ ma a lɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ aa we gyɩnaŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ rɛ Krisita tɩŋa a yaa wɩɩ no tɩya ma.

english_verse: God will be given glory forever and ever. Amen. The Only True Message
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ. Amɩ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ

english_verse: I am shocked that you have so quickly turned from God, who chose you with his gift of undeserved grace. You have believed another message,
translation_verse: Ŋ nyʋwa fɩyɛla rɛ ma wɩya beewɩya, ma teŋ vɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa yɩrɩ ma Krisita lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ tɩŋɩɩ rɛ, aŋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ kɩ tɩŋ wɩdʋŋsɩ ma aa bɩɩna anɩɩ ba yaa Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ rɛ.

english_verse: when there is really only one true message. But some people are causing you trouble and want to make you turn away from the good news about Christ.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ wɩwelidʋma buloŋ bɩl tuwo, a lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ á aa daga ma hal. Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ ŋ kɩ basɩ wɩɩ no rɛ nyɛ, nala yʋga we doŋ a kaŋ ma kɩ kyɔrɩmɩ, a kɩ lʋga dɩ ba kaŋ Krisita wɩweliye hʋ bɩrɩmɩ kyige.

english_verse: I pray that God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from our message to you! It doesn't matter if that person is one of us or an angel from heaven.
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ koo dɩ malɩka mɛ gba lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko basɩ wɩdʋma buloŋ tɩya ma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wɩweliye hʋ rɛ, ka dɩ ba bee wɩya hʋ á aa laasɩya basɩ tɩya ma bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ tɩɩna diŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I have said it before, and I will say it again. I hope God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from what you have already believed.
translation_verse: Á laa sɩya basɩ wɩɩ no wɩya rɛ, ka ŋ bɩl kɩ basɩ ʋ tɩɩ lagɩlagɩ no. Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko basɩ wɩdʋma tɩya ma a baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ rɛ, dɩ wɩya hʋ ma aa laa di daa, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ tɩɩna diŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I am not trying to please people. I want to please God. Do you think I am trying to please people? If I were doing that, I would not be a servant of Christ. How Paul Became an Apostle
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no ŋ aa basɩ nyɛ, ma bɩɩna anɩɩ nihuwobisi rɛ ŋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba tɩya ŋ gasɩbɩnaa? Wɩɩsɩ ta laa nyʋwa! Nihuwobisi daa ŋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba tɩya ŋ gasɩbɩnaa. Wɩɩsɩ rɛ ŋ kɩ kyɛ di ʋ tɩya ŋ gasɩbɩnaa. Dɩ ŋ ha fa aa kyɛ dɩ nihuwobisi rɛ bigisi ŋ, ɛɛ kɛ ŋ fa bɩ sɩ yaa Krisita tʋŋtʋnnɩ. Pɔɔl daga gɛɛ Yesu Krisita aa lɩɩ ʋ, ʋ yaa ʋ kpambɩya

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that no one made up the message I preach.
translation_verse: Ŋ kyaŋweliye, ma leŋ dɩ ŋ basɩ wɩɩ no tɩya ma. Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ ŋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, nihuwobisi lee daa ba lɩɩ.

english_verse: It wasn't given or taught to me by some mere human. My message came directly from Jesus Christ when he appeared to me.
translation_verse: Nihuwobiŋ mɛ bɩl daa kpaa ba tɩya ŋ, koo a daga ŋ. Amɛ Yesu Krisita tɩɩ rɛ kaŋ wɩya no daga ŋ.

english_verse: I was a much better Jew than anyone else my own age, and I obeyed every law our ancestors had given us.
translation_verse: Á Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ, mɩyaŋ nɛ fa gyɩŋ wɩya te ŋ wiye-dɔsɩ buloŋ. Ŋ fa kpaa ŋ nyuu buloŋ we á naabaala lesiri tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: I didn't say a word, not even to the men in Jerusalem who were apostles before I was. Instead, I went at once to Arabia, and afterwards I returned to Damascus.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩl bɩ mʋʋ Gyerusalɛm mɛ dɩ ŋ na nala hʋ aa laa sɩya yaa Yesu Krisita kpambɩsɩ ŋ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ŋ siye rɛ haŋ lagɩlagɩbiye hʋ a kpa mʋ Areebɩya paalʋʋ, a lɩɩ doŋ a mɩɩgɩ ko Damaasiku.

english_verse: Three years later I went to visit Peter in Jerusalem and stayed with him for
translation_verse: Bɩsɩ boto hal tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ kpa mʋ Gyerusalɛm dɩ ŋ na Piita. Ŋ aa mʋʋ doŋ, ŋ hɔŋ ʋ lee yɔbɔ sɩɩ bʋlɩya rɛ.

english_verse: And in the presence of God I swear I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: Wɩya no ŋ aa sabɩ kɩ tɩya ma nyɛ, Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ba yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ŋ bee nyɩya wɩya.

english_verse: Later, I went to the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ kpa mʋ tɔnɩ aa we Siiriya abee Silisɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But no one who belonged to Christ's churches in Judea had ever seen me in person.
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ buloŋ nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di a we Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ ha fa bɩ gyɩma ŋ.

english_verse: They had only heard that the one who had been cruel to them was now preaching the message that he had once tried to destroy.
translation_verse: Ba ta nɩɩ nala aa basɩ ŋ wɩya rɛ a baa, “Nal hʋ fa aa gɔllɔ kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ma, lagɩlagɩ no ʋ rɛ mɩɩgɩ gɔllɩ kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ ʋ fa aa lʋga dɩ ʋ kyogi rɛ.”

english_verse: And because of me, they praised God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ba dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ weliŋ ŋ wɩya.

english_verse: Fourteen years later I went to Jerusalem with Barnabas. I also took along Titus.
translation_verse: Bɩsɩ fi abee banaa hal tɩyaŋ, ŋ bee Banabaasɩ bɩl mɩɩgɩ mʋ Gyerusalɛm nɛ a kaŋ á nɩɩnabiye Titusi tɩŋ á hal.

english_verse: But I went there because God had told me to go, and I explained the good news I had been preaching to the Gentiles. Then I met privately with the ones who seemed to be the most important leaders. I wanted to make sure my work in the past and my future work would not be for nothing.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ rɛ gyɩ daga ŋ dɩ ŋ mʋ Gyerusalɛm. Á aa mʋwa, á bee Krisitabiisi nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ dʋŋ gyɩ laŋŋa rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ daga tɩya ba gɛɛ hʋ ŋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wɩweliye kɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma. Ŋ fa aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ beel-ba yaa nyʋʋdɩgɩ rɛ dɩ ŋ tʋma hʋ ŋ aa tʋma koo ŋ aa tʋŋ ta ko yaa waasʋ.

english_verse: Titus went to Jerusalem with me. He was a Greek, but still he wasn't forced to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Ŋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋ Titusi gyɩ yaa Giriki tɩɩna rɛ. Ɛɛ wɩya nala badɔmɔŋ gyɩ baa dɩ see dɩ ʋ keri ʋ peŋ. Amɛ abee gɛɛ buloŋ ba gyɩ bɩ fɩla ʋ ʋ keri ʋ peŋ.

english_verse: We went there because of those who pretended to be followers and had sneaked in among us as spies. They had come to take away the freedom Christ Jesus had given us, and they were trying to make us their slaves.
translation_verse: Nala no fa fugo rɛ anɩɩ ba mɛ laa Yesu wɩya di rɛ a yaa á nɩmmabalɩya. Ba fa ko guwosi á tɩyaŋ nɛ dɩ ba na dɩ á tɩŋ á tɩɩ rɛ akuu á bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya rɛ koo. Ba fa aa kyɛ dɩ ba fɩla ma mɩɩgɩ kaŋ we Gyuuma mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: But we wanted you to have the true message. This is why we didn't give in to them, not even for a second.
translation_verse: Amɛ á gyɩ bɩ laa nyʋwa mʋhʋ mɛ, beewɩya á gyɩ bee kyɛ dɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ aa we Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩyaŋ ko nyʋgɩsɩ ma lee.

english_verse: Some of them were supposed to be important leaders, but I didn't care who they were. God doesn't have any favorites! None of these so-called special leaders added anything to my message.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ ma aa kpaa nɩɩ ba yaa sɩlaala koo nɩbala, ba bɩ kpaa wɩdʋma buloŋ pɛ Wɩɩsɩ wɩwelɩye ŋ aa basɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ŋ sɩya kɛ tuwo nala hʋ iriŋ ma aa kpa ba tɩyaŋ beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ bee kpa nala anɩɩ nihuwobisi aa kpa nala gɛɛ.

english_verse: They realized God had sent me with the good news for Gentiles, and he had sent Peter with the same message for Jews.
translation_verse: Amɛ nala no naa anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ lɩɩ ŋ dɩ ŋ basɩ ʋ wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma, anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa lɩɩ Piita dɩ ʋ basɩ wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya Gyuuma gɛɛ.

english_verse: God, who had sent Peter on a mission to the Jews, was now using me to preach to the Gentiles.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa lɩɩ Piita a tɩya ʋ dee dɩ ʋ basɩ ʋ wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya Gyuuma, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ lɩɩ ŋ mɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ haŋ wɩweliye hʋ tɩɩ a tɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma.

english_verse: James, Peter, and John realized that God had given me the message about his gift of undeserved grace. And these men are supposed to be the backbone of the church. They even gave Barnabas and me a friendly handshake. This was to show that we would work with Gentiles and that they would work with Jews.
translation_verse: Gyemsi abee Piita abee Gyɔɔŋ, nala hʋ nal buloŋ aa kpaa anɩɩ ba yaa Wɩɩsɩ nala nɩhɩyasɩ, ba naa anɩɩ wɩtɩɩ rɛ, Wɩɩsɩ rɛ lɩɩ ŋ dɩ ŋ tʋŋ tʋŋfɩyaŋ no. Ɛɛ rɛ ba kasɩ ŋ bee Banabaasɩ nosi a daga anɩɩ á beel-ba buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ tʋma hʋ aa tʋŋ tɩyaŋ. Doŋ nɛ á buloŋ yaa nyʋʋdɩgɩ anɩɩ ŋ bee Banabaasɩ mʋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma, ka dɩ ba mɛ basɩ Wɩweliye hʋ a kɩ tɩya Gyuuma.

english_verse: They only asked us to remember the poor, and this was something I had always been eager to do. Paul Corrects Peter at Antioch
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ba aa basɩ tɩya ma buloŋ nɛ yaa dɩ á ta yeŋŋi nyaaba hʋ aa we ba tɩyaŋ wɩya. Wɩɩ no tɩɩ mɛ rɛ fa foŋ we ŋ hakɩla tɩyaŋ. Pɔɔl leŋ Piita gyɩma anɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa yaa bɩ kpaa ŋmanɩɩ

english_verse: He and the others hid their true feelings so well that even Barnabas was fooled.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Gyuuma nɩkaalɩya hʋ mɛ yaa minaafigi wɩya a tɩŋ Piita naabʋʋsɩ. Haalɩ, Banabaasɩ tɩɩ mɛ tɩŋ ba minaafigi wɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But when I saw they were not really obeying the truth that is in the good news, I corrected Peter in front of everyone and said: Peter, you are a Jew, but you live like a Gentile. So how can you force Gentiles to live like Jews?
translation_verse: Ŋ aa naa anɩɩ ba bee tɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ aa dagɩ, ɛɛ rɛ ŋ basɩ tɩya Piita ba buloŋ sɩya tɩyaŋ a baa, “Piita, Ɩ yaa Gyuu rɛ, amɛ ɩ wɩyaalɩya kɩɩ nal aa bɩ yaa Gyuu rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ yaŋ sɩ yaa fɩla nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma dɩ ba kɩ tɩŋ Gyuuma lesiri?” Á buloŋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ tɩŋ ʋ laa ma ta

english_verse: We are Jews by birth and are not sinners like Gentiles.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ, á yaa Gyuuma tɩɩ rɛ. Á bɩ yaa nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma ba kaŋ ba kɩ yɩrɩ wɩbɔŋyaala.

english_verse: When we Jews started looking for a way to please God, we discovered that we are sinners too. Does this mean that Christ is the one who makes us sinners? No, it doesn't!
translation_verse: Á aa kyɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ á yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma rɛ akuu á aa laa Krisita di wɩya. Amɛ abee gɛɛ buloŋ dɩ ámaa rɛ ha ko na dɩ á mɛ yaa wɩbɔŋyaala anɩɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma, ɛɛ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ á baa Krisita rɛ leŋ á yaa wɩbɔŋyaala koo? Ba mʋra rɛ!

english_verse: But if I tear down something and then build it again, I prove that I was wrong at first.
translation_verse: Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi fa aa bine dɩ á kɩ tɩŋa, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ vɩya ba ta aŋ bɩl mɩɩgɩ mʋ kɩ tɩŋ ba, ʋ gɛɛ daga anɩɩ ŋ yaa wɩbɔŋyaal lɛ.

english_verse: It was the Law itself that killed me and freed me from its power, so I could live for God. I have been nailed to the cross with Christ.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ŋ na mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ kana ŋ tɩɩ lɩɩ ba tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ wɩya ba bɩl bɩ kaŋ dee buloŋ ŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ŋ wuwo kpa ŋ tɩɩ buloŋ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ ŋ mɩɩbol buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I don't turn my back on God's gift of undeserved grace. If we can be acceptable to God by obeying the Law, it was useless for Christ to die.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ kpaa Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ hʋ anɩɩ ʋ yaa waasʋ, beewɩya dɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ rɛ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ nal kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ Krisita sʋʋ hʋ fa yaa waasʋ rɛ.

english_verse: I want to know only one thing. How were you given God's Spirit? Was it by obeying the Law of Moses or by hearing about Christ and having faith in him?
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ ŋ pɩyɛsɩ ma wɩdɩgɩ no: Ma aa tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ma tɩyaŋ koo ma aa nɩɩ ʋ wɩweliye hʋ a laa ba di rɛ tɩŋ?

english_verse: How can you be so stupid? Do you think that by yourself you can complete what God's Spirit started in you?
translation_verse: Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma yaa bambugo kɩŋkaŋ nyɛ? Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ ma piili mɩɩbofalɩɩ no Krisita tɩyaŋ. Lagɩlagɩ no bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ma kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma na ʋ litenii ma tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ?

english_verse: Have you gone through all of this for nothing? Is it all really for nothing?
translation_verse: Wɩgyamaa hʋ buloŋ ma aa na a lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee, ba buloŋ yaa waasʋ ma lee rɛ koo? Aayɩ, ŋ bɩ liise nɩɩ ba yaa waasʋ.

english_verse: God gives you his Spirit and works miracles in you. But does he do this because you obey the Law of Moses or because you have heard about Christ and have faith in him?
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kpaa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ma tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kɩ yaa wɩmagɩla ma tɩyaŋ. Ma liise nɩɩ ma aa tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kɩ yaa wɩya no ma tɩyaŋ koo, ma aa nɩɩ ʋ wɩweliye hʋ a laa ba di rɛ tɩŋ?

english_verse: And so, you should understand that everyone who has faith is a child of Abraham.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma gyɩma weliŋ anɩɩ nala hʋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di, ba aa rɛ yaa Abɩraham doho nala tɩɩ.

english_verse: Long ago the Scriptures said God would accept the Gentiles because of their faith. This is why God told Abraham the good news that all nations would be blessed because of him.
translation_verse: Ba basɩ wɩɩ no rɛ faafaa buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa, nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma sɩ ko yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma akuu ba aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di wɩya. Faafaa tɩyaŋ buloŋ mɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ basɩ wɩweliye no tɩya Abɩraham a baa, “Ɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ sɩ tɩŋa a pɛ dʋnɩya nala buloŋ.”

english_verse: Anyone who tries to please God by obeying the Law is under a curse. The Scriptures say, “Everyone who doesn't obey everything in the Law is under a curse.”
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ba tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ a kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ba, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba basa rɛ abaa, “Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ sɩ tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ no kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ a mʋ su, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ tɩɩna.”

english_verse: And because of what Jesus Christ has done, the blessing promised to Abraham was taken to the Gentiles. This happened so that by faith we would be given the promised Holy Spirit. The Law and the Promise
translation_verse: Yesu Krisita yaa nyɛ rɛ dɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ Gyuuma mɛ tɩŋa ʋ tɩyaŋ a na wɩweliye hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa wee nyʋwa dɩ ʋ sɩ yaa tɩya Abɩraham, ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ á laadii tɩyaŋ, a kpa Wiyesi Welii hʋ wɩya ʋ aa wee nyʋwa a tɩya ma. Moosi mɩrɩsɩ hʋ bɩ kaŋ nyʋwa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee tɩya Abɩraham bɩrɩmɩ

english_verse: That is how it is with the promises God made to Abraham and his descendant. The promises were not made to many descendants, but only to one, and that one is Christ.
translation_verse: Nyɛ tɩɩ rɛ nyʋwa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee tɩya Abɩraham mɛ kɩɩ. Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ wee nyʋwa tɩya Abɩraham bee ʋ doho nal lɛ. Nyʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ bɩ baa Abɩraham doho nala, ʋ baa ʋ doho nal, beewɩya Abɩraham doho nɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ ʋ kɩ daga. Nal no rɛ yaa Krisita.

english_verse: If we have to obey the Law in order to receive God's blessings, those blessings don't really come to us because of God's promise. But God was kind to Abraham and made him a promise.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa anɩɩ ʋ sɩ yaa tɩya Abɩraham, ʋ bɩ lɩɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ wɩɩ hʋ fa lɩɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ ʋ bɩl bɩ lɩɩ ʋ nyʋwa hʋ ʋ aa wee tɩya Abɩraham tɩyaŋ. Amɛ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa yaa tɩya Abɩraham, ʋ yaa ba rɛ ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ akuu ʋ aa wee nyʋwa tɩya ʋ wɩya.

english_verse: In fact, the Law was to be our teacher until Christ came. Then we could have faith and be acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, mɩrɩsɩ hʋ rɛ fa aa pɔ ma, a ko pele saŋa hʋ Krisita aa ko, á laa ʋ di a yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But once a person has learned to have faith, there is no more need to have the Law as a teacher.
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ á aa sɩ wuwo laa Krisita wɩya di nyɛ, mɩrɩsɩ hʋ bɩl bɩ kaŋ dee á nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: All of you are God's children because of your faith in Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nyɛ kɛ ma buloŋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi tɩɩ rɛ akuu ma aa laa Yesu Krisita di wɩya.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was as though you had put on Christ in the same way you put on new clothes.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ma nala hʋ buloŋ ba aa foo ma wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ Krisita feŋ tɩyaŋ, ma bee Krisita yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ daga nɩɩ ma laa Krisita gyogo tɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Faith in Christ Jesus is what makes each of you equal with each other, whether you are a Jew or a Greek, a slave or a free person, a man or a woman.
translation_verse: Akuu á bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya, á buloŋ mɛ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Dɩ ma yaa Gyuuma koo dɩ ma bɩ yaa Gyuuma, dɩ ma yaa yosi koo ma bɩ yaa yosi, dɩ ma yaa haana koo baala, ma buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ Yesu Krisita nyubaanɩŋ.

english_verse: So if you belong to Christ, you are now part of Abraham's family, and you will be given what God has promised.
translation_verse: Dɩ ma bee Krisita rɛ yaa kɩdɩgɩ, ɛɛ daga nɩɩ ma yaa Abɩraham doho nala rɛ. Ɛɛ wɩya ma buloŋ nɛ sɩ na wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa anɩɩ ʋ sɩ yaa a tɩya Abɩraham.

english_verse: Children who are under age are no better off than slaves, even though everything their parents own will someday be theirs.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa basɩ rɛ nyɛ: Dɩ biye rɛ dii ʋ kuwo kyaŋ saŋa hʋ ʋ ha aa yaa biibiye, ʋ ha aa kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ yoŋ abee ʋ aa paalɩ tɩŋ kɩna hʋ buloŋ mɛ.

english_verse: This is because children are placed in the care of guardians and teachers until the time their parents have set.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ʋ ha aa yaa biibiye wɩya, nala rɛ sɩ deŋ ʋ bee kɩna hʋ buloŋ, dɩ ʋ ko waa mʋ pele saŋa hʋ ʋ kuwo aa daga anɩɩ ba kpa kyaŋ hʋ we ʋ nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: This is how it was with us. We were like children ruled by the powers of this world.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ á mɛ fa kɩɩ. Saŋa hʋ á ha fa aa bɩ laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di, dʋnɩya wɩkanɩya fa kaŋ ma bɩrɩmɩ yosi rɛ.

english_verse: But when the time was right, God sent his Son, and a woman gave birth to him. His Son obeyed the Law,
translation_verse: Amɛ saŋa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa bine aa ko pele, Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ tɩɩ Biye rɛ ʋ ko dʋnɩya, haaŋ lʋla ʋ anɩɩ ba aa lʋl nihuwobiŋ buloŋ gɛɛ. Saŋa hʋ ba aa lʋla ʋ dɩ nala aa tɩŋ Gyuuma mɩrɩsɩ hʋ rɛ.

english_verse: so he could set us free from the Law, and we could become God's children.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ ʋ laa á nala hʋ buloŋ fa aa tɩŋ Gyuuma mɩrɩsɩ hʋ ta, dɩ á buloŋ wuwo ko yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi tɩɩ.

english_verse: Now that we are his children, God has sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts. And his Spirit tells us that God is our Father.
translation_verse: Á aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kpa Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa we Biye hʋ tɩyaŋ a we á tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Wiyesi Welii no aa we á tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ leŋ á aa wuwo yɩrɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa “á Kuwo.”

english_verse: You are no longer slaves. You are God's children, and you will be given what he has promised. Paul's Concern for the Galatians
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩl bɩ yaa yoŋ. Ma yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi tɩɩ rɛ. Ma yaŋ aa yaa ʋ biisi tɩɩ wɩya, ma sɩ na kɩna hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa sɩ kpa tɩya ʋ biisi. Pɔɔl kyɩl Galetiya tɩmma wɩya

english_verse: Before you knew God, you were slaves of gods that are not real.
translation_verse: Faafaa hʋ ma fa aa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ, ma fa aa tɩŋ vʋga hal lɛ ba kaŋ ma bɩrɩmɩ yosi. Vʋga mɛ yaŋ bɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to be like me, just as I once tried to be like you. Did you mistreat me
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, abee ŋ aa yaa gyuu buloŋ ka ŋ kpaa ŋ tɩɩ nɩɩ ŋ yaa ma kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Ŋ bɩl bee tɩŋ Gyuuma mɩrɩsɩ. Ɛɛwɩya ŋ aa sʋla ma, ma kɩ kyesi ŋ. Ma gyɩ bɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ kyogi ŋ.

english_verse: when I first preached to you? No you didn't, even though you knew I had come there because I was sick.
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ wɩɩla rɛ gyɩ tɩŋ ŋ gyɩ wuwo na ŋmanɩɩ a basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya ma buŋbuŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: My illness must have caused you some trouble, but you didn't hate me or turn me away because of it. You welcomed me as though I were one of God's angels or even Christ Jesus himself.
translation_verse: Abee ŋ wɩɩla hʋ gyɩ aa leŋ tʋwara gyʋʋ ma kɩŋkaŋ buloŋ mɛ, ka ma gyɩ bɩ vɩya ŋ ta, koo a kana ŋ kʋwasɩ. Amɛ ma gyɩ kana ŋ weliŋ nɛ anɩɩ ŋ aa yaa malɩka aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko, koo anɩɩ ŋ aa yaa Yesu Krisita tɩɩ.

english_verse: Where is that good feeling now? I am sure if it had been possible, you would have taken out your own eyes and given them to me.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ma tenni gyɩ fɩyɛla rɛ weliŋ. Lee rɛ haŋ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ buloŋ mʋ? Ŋ sɩ wuwo baa dɩ mamaa rɛ gyɩ fa wuwo, ma gyɩ fa sɩ yaa wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ ŋ aa kyɛɛ tɩya ŋ nɛ, haalɩ dɩ ʋ rɛ maga dɩ ma kuwoni ma sibinaalɩya mɛ gba tɩya ŋ.

english_verse: Am I now your enemy, just because I told you the truth?
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no, ŋ bɩrɩmɩ ma dɔŋ nɛ akuu ŋ aa basɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ tɩya ma koo?

english_verse: Those people may be paying you a lot of attention, but it isn't for your good. They only want to keep you away from me, so you will pay them a lot of attention.
translation_verse: Amɛ haŋ nala hʋ aa bee daga ma wɩtɩɩ hʋ kɛ, ba aa fugo kɩ yaa gɛɛ nɩɩ ba kyɩla ma wɩya rɛ, amɛ wɩɩ hʋ aa we ba hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ bɩ yaa. Ba hakɩla buloŋ nɛ yaa dɩ ba leŋ ŋ beel-ma kyogi dɔmɔŋ, ka dɩ ma kyɩla ba dʋŋ wɩya.

english_verse: I wish I were with you now. Then I would not have to talk this way. You really have me puzzled. Hagar and Sarah
translation_verse: Ŋ kyɛrɩ rɛ fa yaa dɩ ŋ fa we ma lee lagɩlagɩ no, a fa gyɩŋ gɛɛ ŋ aa sɩ basɩ wɩya tɩya ma, beewɩya ŋ hakɩla buloŋ nɛ vʋgɩma ma wɩya. Nyʋʋsɩ hʋ balɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa wee

english_verse: Some of you would like to be under the rule of the Law of Moses. But do you know what the Law says?
translation_verse: Ma nala hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma ha kɩ tɩŋ Gyuuma mɩrɩsɩ hʋ, ma leŋ dɩ ŋ pɩyɛsɩ ma wɩɩ. Ma kɔnɩ gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ mɩrɩsɩ aa daga memii rɛ?

english_verse: In the Scriptures we learn that Abraham had two sons. The mother of one of them was a slave, while the mother of the other one had always been free.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba basa anɩɩ Abɩraham fa lʋl boyoŋbiisi balɩya rɛ. Kɩdɩgɩ fa yaa ʋ haaŋ tɩɩ biye rɛ, kɩdɩgɩ mɛ fa yaa ʋ yoŋhaaŋ biye.

english_verse: The son of the slave woman was born in the usual way. But the son of the free woman was born because of God's promise.
translation_verse: Abɩraham yoŋhaaŋ hʋ aa lʋl ʋ biye hʋ, ʋ lʋla ʋ anɩɩ ba aa lʋl nihuwobiŋ buloŋ gɛɛ rɛ. Amɛ biye hʋ Abɩraham haaŋ tɩɩ hʋ aa lʋla hʋ kɛ, Wɩɩsɩ rɛ wee nyʋwa ba lʋla ʋ.

english_verse: All of this has another meaning as well. Each of the two women stands for one of the agreements God made with his people. Hagar, the slave woman, stands for the agreement that was made at Mount Sinai. Everyone born into her family is a slave.
translation_verse: Á sɩ wuwo kpa wɩɩ no nɩɩ ʋ yaa namaga rɛ. Haana no balɩya rɛ yaa nyʋʋsɩ balɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa wee. Haga rɛ yaa nyʋwa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa wee dogimo hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Saana tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Ʋ biisi rɛ yaa nala hʋ Moosi mɩrɩsɩ gyɩ aa kaŋ bɩrɩmɩ yosi.

english_verse: Hagar also stands for Mount Sinai in Arabia and for the present city of Jerusalem. She and her children are slaves.
translation_verse: Haga rɛ yaa Saana dogimo hʋ aa wee Areebɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ kɩɩ gyɩnaŋ tɔɔ hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Gyerusalɛm nɛ, ʋ bee tɩyaŋ nala buloŋ yaa mɩrɩsɩ hʋ yosi.

english_verse: But our mother is the city of Jerusalem in heaven above, and she isn't a slave.
translation_verse: Amɛ Gyerusalɛm hʋ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ kɛ tɩŋ ʋ tɩɩ rɛ. Ʋ rɛ yaa á nɩɩna.

english_verse: The Scriptures say about her, “You have never had children, but now you can be glad. You have never given birth, but now you can shout. Once you had no children, but now you will have more children than a woman who has been married for a long time.”
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba saba rɛ a baa, “Hapɩrɩ, leŋ dɩ ɩ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ. Ɩ nal hʋ lʋla ha aa bɩ wɩɩ na, kyiyesi abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ, beewɩya havɩyatalɩɩ bala sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko dɩ ʋ kaŋ balɩya te haaŋ hʋ bala aa bɩ maakyiye vɩya ʋ ta.”

english_verse: My friends, you were born because of this promise, just as Isaac was.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa ba lʋl Azɩkɩ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ we nyʋwa a leŋ á mɛ ko yaa ʋ biisi.

english_verse: But the child who was born in the natural way made trouble for the child who was born because of the Spirit. The same thing is happening today.
translation_verse: Abɩraham biisi hʋ balɩya tɩyaŋ, kɩŋ hʋ ba aa lʋla anɩɩ nihuwobiŋ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ hʋ, ʋ gyɩ dɔgɩsɩ biye hʋ ba aa lʋla Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ma mɛ gyɩnaŋ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Get rid of the slave woman and her son! He won't be given anything. The son of the free woman will receive everything.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba basɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ? Ba baa, “Kile yoŋ hʋ bee ʋ biye ta dɩ ba lɩɩ ɩ dɩya tɩyaŋ, beewɩya yoŋ biye bee haaŋ tɩɩ biye bɩ sɩ wuwo pɛ kyaŋ.”

english_verse: My friends, we are children of the free woman and not of the slave.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ naabalɩya, á bɩ yaa yoŋ hʋ biisi. Á yaa haaŋ tɩɩ hʋ biisi rɛ.

english_verse: Christ has set us free! This means we are really free. Now hold on to your freedom and don't ever become slaves of the Law again.
translation_verse: Krisita laa ma ta rɛ dɩ á tɩŋ á tɩɩ. Ɛɛ wɩya ma sɩŋ wɩya hʋ ma aa laa di tɩyaŋ kpaŋkpaŋ dɩ nal buloŋ ta bɩl kaŋ ma bɩrɩmɩ yosi.

english_verse: And if you try to please God by obeying the Law, you have cut yourself off from Christ and his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Ma nala hʋ aa tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa bine, a kɩ lʋga dɩ ma tɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ a kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, ma tɔrɩ ma tɩɩ lɩɩ Krisita hal lɛ, a tɔrɩ ma tɩɩ mɛ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But the Spirit makes us sure God will accept us because of our faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Amɛ á kɛ, á bayɩyɛla rɛ yaa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ a leŋ dɩ á kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ akuu á aa laa Krisita di wɩya.

english_verse: If you are a follower of Christ Jesus, it makes no difference whether you are circumcised or not. All that matters is your faith that makes you love others.
translation_verse: Dɩ á bee Krisita rɛ yaa kɩdɩgɩ, dɩ á keri á pene koo dɩ á bɩ kere á pene, ʋ bɩ dɔbɔ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ yaa dɩ á kpa gɛɛ á aa kyo dɔmɔŋ a daga anɩɩ á laa ʋ di rɛ.

english_verse: You were doing so well until someone made you turn from the truth.
translation_verse: Ma fa aa yaa weliŋ nɛ. Kɩbee rɛ yaŋ mʋrɩ ma dɩ ma kpa wɩtɩɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ ta? Ŋmaŋbee rɛ ʋ tɩŋa a mʋrɩ ma nyɛ?

english_verse: And that person was certainly not sent by the one who chose you.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ liise anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ mʋrɩ ma, beewɩya ʋ rɛ yɩrɩ ma dɩ ma ko tɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ.

english_verse: A little yeast can change a whole batch of dough,
translation_verse: Ma gyɩma nɩɩ sɩbʋl mʋhʋ tɩɩ rɛ ba aa kpa we paanʋʋ muŋ yʋga tɩyaŋ, aŋka ʋ sii pʋwarɩ.

english_verse: but you belong to the Lord. This makes me certain you will do what I say, instead of what someone else tells you to do. Whoever is causing trouble for you will be punished.
translation_verse: Ŋ laa di rɛ anɩɩ á beel-ma buloŋ aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ Krisita tɩyaŋ wɩya, ma bɩ sɩ tɩŋ ŋmaŋdɩma. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kaŋ ma hakɩllɩ kɩ vʋgɩmɩ nyɛ, ʋ kyo dɩ ʋ yaa haŋ nal hʋ buloŋ mɛ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ.

english_verse: My friends, if I still preach that people need to be circumcised, why am I in so much trouble? The message about the cross would no longer be a problem, if I told people to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ha aa basɩ anɩɩ ʋ maga dɩ ma keri ma pene rɛ ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ na laa ma ta, bee rɛ tɩŋ ba ha kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ŋ? Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ fa baa dɩ nal buloŋ maga dɩ ʋ keri ʋ peŋ nɛ, ɛɛ kɛ ŋ fa bɩ sɩ kɩ na tʋwara akuu ŋ aa basɩ Yesu aa sʋba daagarɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ wɩya.

english_verse: I wish everyone who is upsetting you would not only get circumcised, but would cut off much more!
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa dɔŋ ma baa dɩ ma keri ma pene hʋ, ŋ fa kyo dɩ ba farɩ ba tɩɩ pɛ rɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you were chosen to be free. So don't use your freedom as an excuse to do anything you want. Use it as an opportunity to serve each other with love.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kɛ, ŋ naabalɩya, Wɩɩsɩ yɩrɩ ma rɛ dɩ ma tɩŋ ma tɩɩ. Amɛ ma ta kuu ma aa tɩŋ ma tɩɩ wɩya, a kpa gɛɛ yaa gyo-gye wɩɩ a kɩ yaa ma dʋŋʋ wɩyaabɔmɔ. Amɛ ma kɩ kyiyeli dɔmɔŋ abee kyori.

english_verse: All the Law says can be summed up in the command to love others as much as you love yourself.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ yaa nyɛ, beewɩya dɩ ɩ rɛ aa tɩŋ mɩra hʋ abaa, “Kyo ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna anɩɩ ɩ aa kyo ɩ tɩɩ gɛɛ,” ɩ tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi fa aa bine buloŋ su rɛ.

english_verse: But if you keep attacking each other like wild animals, you had better watch out or you will destroy yourselves. God's Spirit and Our Own Desires
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ma wɩyaalɩya rɛ kɩɩ ɔhɔ kɩna dɩ ma gʋla kaŋ dɔmɔŋ kɩ kyaŋ, ma pɔ ma tɩɩ weliŋ, dɩ gɛɛ daa ma sɩ kpʋ dɔmɔŋ teŋ. Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ wɩkyɛɛlɩya abee á teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya

english_verse: The Spirit and your desires are enemies of each other. They are always fighting each other and keeping you from doing what you feel you should.
translation_verse: beewɩya á tɩɩ teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya bee Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ wɩkyɛɛlɩya bee tɩŋ dɔmɔŋ. Á tɩɩ teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya bee Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ wɩkyɛɛlɩya yaa dɔmɔ rɛ. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ á bɩ sɩ wuwo kɩ yaa á tɩɩ wɩkyɛɛlɩya.

english_verse: But if you obey the Spirit, the Law of Moses has no control over you.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ámaa rɛ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ nyʋwa, Gyuuma fa aa tɩŋ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ bɩl bɩ kaŋ dee á nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: They worship idols, practice witchcraft, hate others, and are hard to get along with. People become jealous, angry, and selfish. They not only argue and cause trouble, but they are
translation_verse: Ba aa kɩ marɩ vʋga rɛ, a kɩ di hɩrɩ, a haasɩ nala, a kɩ kaa kaasɩ. Ba aa kaŋ hadɔrɩ rɛ, a kaŋ baaŋtosini, a kaŋ kyotoro, a bee kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ, a kɩ lɩɩ dɔmɔŋ hala.

english_verse: envious. They get drunk, carry on at wild parties, and do other evil things as well. I told you before, and I am telling you again: No one who does these things will share in the blessings of God's kingdom.
translation_verse: Ba tɩsɩ aa kɩ hɔllɩ nala rɛ, ba nyʋwa sɩŋ kɩ bugo. Dɩ ba ko kaŋ laŋŋʋʋ buloŋ, ba aa nyʋwa sɩŋ bugo kɩ yaa wɩlaama rɛ. Ba aa kɩ yaa wɩya no buloŋ nɛ aha bee wɩbɔmɔ no iriŋ buloŋ. Ŋ laa sɩya kʋrɩsɩ ma dɩgɩna rɛ wɩya no wɩya, aŋ bɩl kɩ kʋrɩsɩ ma dɩgɩna anɩɩ nala hʋ aa yaa wɩya no iriŋ bɩ sɩ gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: gentle, and self-controlled. There is no law against behaving in any of these ways.
translation_verse: a kaŋ sɩfɩyala, a gyɩŋ ba tɩɩ kanɩɩ. Mɩra buloŋ tuwo a daga anɩɩ nala ta kɩ yaa wɩya no iriŋ.

english_verse: And because we belong to Christ Jesus, we have killed our selfish feelings and desires.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nala hʋ aa laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di, ba kpʋʋ ba tɩɩ teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya ta rɛ. Ba bɩl bee yaa wɩya hʋ ba tɩɩ aa kyɛ.

english_verse: God's Spirit has given us life, and so we should follow the Spirit.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa leŋ á kaŋ mɩɩbol wɩya, ʋ maga dɩ á kɩ tɩŋa ʋ nyʋwa rɛ.

english_verse: But don't be conceited or make others jealous by claiming to be better than they are.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ á kɩ daga á tɩɩ, a ta leŋ dɩ á leŋ dɩ á dɔŋtɩŋsɩ baaŋ kɩ sii, a ta leŋ dɩ á tɩsɩ kɩ hɔllɩ dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: You obey the law of Christ when you offer each other a helping hand.
translation_verse: Ma laa dɔmɔŋ kyʋgɩsɩ kɩ kyʋŋ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, Krisita mɩra rɛ ma kɩ tɩŋa gɛɛ.

english_verse: If you think you are better than others, when you really aren't, you are wrong.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ aa kpa ʋ tɩɩ anɩɩ ʋ yaa nal kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, aŋ kɔnɩ bɩ yaa nal buloŋ, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ kɩ mʋrɩ.

english_verse: We each must carry our own load.
translation_verse: beewɩya nal buloŋ maga dɩ ʋ kyʋŋ ʋ tɩɩ kyʋga rɛ.

english_verse: Share every good thing you have with anyone who teaches you what God has said.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ ba aa dagɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya, ʋ leŋ dɩ wɩweliye hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa na kɩ daagɩ nal hʋ aa daga ʋ mɛ.

english_verse: You cannot fool God, so don't make a fool of yourself! You will harvest what you plant.
translation_verse: Ma ta kɩ mʋrɩ ma tɩɩ. Nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo gʋrɩ Wɩɩsɩ. Kɩŋ hʋ ɩ aa doho, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ ɩ sɩ kʋma.

english_verse: Don't get tired of helping others. You will be rewarded when the time is right, if you don't give up.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ á lɔgʋ lɩɩ wɩweliye yayɩ. Dɩ ámaa bɩ leŋ á lɔgʋ lɩɩ wɩweliye yayɩ, dɩ saŋa hʋ aa maga rɛ ko pele, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tuŋ ma.

english_verse: You can see what big letters I make when I write with my own hand.
translation_verse: Ma bɩ naa ŋ kɩsabɩya aa yʋga yʋga gɛɛ. Ŋ tɩɩ rɛ aa sabɩ wɩkateŋse no.

english_verse: Those people who are telling you to get circumcised are only trying to show how important they are. And they don't want to get into trouble for preaching about the cross of Christ.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ nala na ba wɩyaalɩya a kɩ bigisi ba, ba aa rɛ aa fɩl ma dɩ ma keri ma pene gɛɛ. Ba gyɩma anɩɩ dɩ ba aa rɛ aa basɩ Krisita aa sʋba daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya, nala sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ba. Dɔgɩsɩɩ no rɛ ba kɩ fá, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba kɩ fɩl ma dɩ ma keri ma pene gɛɛ.

english_verse: But I will never brag about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of his cross, the world is dead as far as I am concerned, and I am dead as far as the world is concerned.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ kɛ, Wɩɩsɩ ta laa nyʋwa dɩ ŋ daga ŋ tɩɩ wɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ wɩya dɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita aa sʋba daagarɩɩ hʋ nyuu dʋŋ wɩya daa. Krisita aa sʋba daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya, ɛɛ leŋ dʋnɩya wɩkanɩya buloŋ yaa wɩsʋʋnɩ rɛ ŋ lee, ka ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ŋ mɛ aa yaa kɩsʋʋ dʋnɩya wɩkanɩya lee.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are circumcised or not. All that matters is that you are a new person.
translation_verse: Dɩ á keri á pene koo dɩ á bɩ kere, gɛɛ bɩ dɔbɔ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ rɛ yaa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ ma bɩrɩmɩ nɩfalɩya.

english_verse: If you follow this rule, you will belong to God's true people. God will treat you with undeserved kindness and will bless you with peace.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa tɩŋ wɩɩ no, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ fá ba sikii a leŋ dɩ ʋ fɩyɛlʋʋ we ba bee Wɩɩsɩ nala buloŋ lee.

english_verse: On my own body are scars that prove I belong to Christ Jesus. So I don't want anyone to bother me anymore.
translation_verse: A lɩɩ gyɩnaŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ, nal buloŋ ta bɩl dɔmɩ-ŋ. Fʋfʋʋnɩ hʋ ŋ aa kana ŋ teŋ tɩyaŋ daga anɩɩ ŋ yaa Yesu tʋŋtʋnnɩ rɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you! Amen.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ sɩ we ma buloŋ lee. Amɩ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus. To God's people who live in Ephesus and are faithful followers of Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl lɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ma Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ aa we Ɛfiso tɩyaŋ a kaŋ Yesu Krisita wɩya hʋ ma aa laa di abee wɩtɩɩ. Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ lɩɩ ŋ, dɩ ŋ yaa Yesu Krisita kpambɩya.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Christ Brings Spiritual Blessings
translation_verse: Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ abee ba fɩyɛlʋʋ sɩ we ma lee. Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ a pɛ á tɩyaŋ

english_verse: Praise the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ for the spiritual blessings that Christ has brought us from heaven!
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ rɛ yaa á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita Kuwo abee ʋ Wɩɩsɩ. Á bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya, ʋ kyiyeli ma rɛ abee wɩweliye hʋ buloŋ aa lɩɩ ʋ lee.

english_verse: Before the world was created, God had Christ choose us to live with him and to be his holy and innocent and loving people.
translation_verse: Ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ na marɩ dʋnɩya, ʋ tɩŋ Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ a lɩɩ ma dɩ á yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, á ta kaŋ bisiŋ koo wɩkyogii buloŋ.

english_verse: God treated us with undeserved grace because of the Son he dearly loves, and so we should praise God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, akuu ʋ aa tɩŋ ʋ Biikyoolii hʋ tɩyaŋ a fá á sikii aŋ daga ma ʋ bɔnyɛ yʋga wɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á dannɩ ʋ.

english_verse: Christ sacrificed his life's blood to set us free, which means our sins are now forgiven. Christ did this because of God's gift of undeserved grace to us. God has great wisdom and understanding,
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ hʋ ʋ aa kaŋ daga ma bɩ kaŋ magɩsɩɩ, beewɩya Krisita sʋʋ hʋ nyubaanɩŋ, ʋ kpaa ʋ kyal a tuŋ á wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ kyɩŋ nɛ, Wɩɩsɩ kpa á wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ kyɛ ma. Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ wɩgyʋŋ abee ʋ gyɩmaa tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ yaa wɩɩ no.

english_verse: God always does what he plans, and this is why he appointed Christ to choose us.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ aa leŋ wɩɩ buloŋ yaa. Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋa a lɩɩ ma á yaa ʋ nala anɩɩ gɛɛ ʋ aa bine piili hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: He did this so we Jews would bring honor to him and be the first ones to have hope because of him.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ á nala hʋ aa laa sɩya kpa á bayɩyɛla we Krisita tɩyaŋ, leŋ dɩ ʋ feŋ yɩrɩ, a na bigisii.

english_verse: I have heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, a lɩɩ saŋa hʋ ŋ aa nɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ ma aa laa á Tɩɩna Yesu wɩya di abee gɛɛ hʋ ma aa kyo Wɩɩsɩ nala buloŋ,

english_verse: So I never stop being grateful for you, as I mention you in my prayers.
translation_verse: dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɛ buloŋ, ŋ aa bee yeŋŋi ma wɩya. Ŋ aa kɩ liisi ma wɩya rɛ, a kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: I ask the glorious Father and God of our Lord Jesus Christ to give you his Spirit. The Spirit will make you wise and let you understand what it means to know God.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita Kuwo hʋ, nal hʋ aa yaa gaŋdaal, dɩ ʋ kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ma tɩyaŋ a leŋ dɩ ʋ tɩya ma wɩgyʋŋ dɩ ma gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ weliŋ.

english_verse: My prayer is that light will flood your hearts and you will understand the hope given to you when God chose you. Then you will discover the glorious blessings that will be yours together with all God's people.
translation_verse: Ŋ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ rɛ bɩl yaa dɩ ma hakɩllɩ suri dɩ ma gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee a wuwo gyɩŋ kɩna hʋ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa yɩrɩ ma ma kaŋ bayɩyɛla. Kɩna no ma bee Wɩɩsɩ nala aa sɩ na weliye rɛ kɩŋkaŋ a bɩ kaŋ magɩsɩɩ.

english_verse: I want you to know about the great and mighty power that God has for us followers. It is the same wonderful power he used
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩl aa sʋla ʋ rɛ dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ma gyɩŋ ʋ debal hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ magɩsɩɩ aa maga gɛɛ á nala hʋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di lee.

english_verse: when he raised Christ from death and let him sit at his right side in heaven.
translation_verse: Dee no tɩɩ rɛ ʋ kaŋ kyisi Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a leŋ ʋ hɔŋ ʋ noduu logiŋ lɩhɔnɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ ʋ beel-ʋ dɩ koro.

english_verse: There Christ rules over all forces, authorities, powers, and rulers. He rules over all beings in this world and will rule in the future world as well.
translation_verse: Krisita rɛ tee kɩna hʋ buloŋ á aa bee na ka ba kaŋ dee a kɩ deŋ leye. Feŋ hʋ ʋ aa kana ʋ rɛ tee feŋ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ aa we dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ koo dʋnɩya hʋ aa sɩ maakyiye ko tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God has put all things under the power of Christ, and for the good of the church he has made him the head of everything.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kpaa kɩŋ buloŋ dee we Krisita nosi tɩyaŋ nɛ, aŋ lɩɩ ʋ, dɩ ʋ yaa kunyɩna wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di wɩya.

english_verse: Once we were also ruled by the selfish desires of our bodies and minds. We had made God angry, and we were going to be punished like everyone else.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ kɛ, á buloŋ mɛ gyɩ fa kɩɩ ba rɛ a tɩŋ á tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ a fa kɩ yaa wɩbɔŋlɔrɩnɩ, a kɩ bɩɩnɩ wɩbɔmɔ mɛ. Á fa aa yaa wɩya no iriŋ wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ fa sɩ na baaŋ á nyuu tɩyaŋ a dɔgɩsɩ ma, anɩɩ nɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: But God was merciful! We were dead because of our sins, but God loved us so much he made us alive with Christ, and God's gift of undeserved grace is what saves you.
translation_verse: ka ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ʋ aa kyisi ma sʋʋ tɩyaŋ a leŋ á kaŋ mɩɩbol anɩɩ ʋ aa kyisi Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ kaŋ mɩɩbol gɛɛ. Nyɛ daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ laa ma ta.

english_verse: God raised us from death to life with Christ Jesus, and he has given us a place beside Christ in heaven.
translation_verse: Akuu á bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ kyisi ma á wɩbɔmɔ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ anɩɩ ʋ aa kyisi Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ a leŋ á beel-ʋ buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ a hɔŋ wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God did this so in the future world he could show how truly good and kind he is to us because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa nyɛ rɛ dɩ ʋ daga ʋ bɔnyɛ hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ magɩsɩɩ abee ʋ sikii fáyɩ aa maga gɛɛ gyɩnaŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ. Á bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ nyubaanɩŋ nɛ tɩŋ ʋ yaa nyɛ.

english_verse: You were saved by faith in God, who treats us much better than we deserve. This is God's gift to you, and not anything you have done on your own.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa kaŋ bɔnyɛ beel-ma abee ma aa laa ʋ di wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ laa ma ta, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ma wɩyaalɩya rɛ tɩŋ. Laatayɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ kɩŋ nɛ ʋ kpa tɩya ma.

english_verse: It isn't something you have earned, so there is nothing you can brag about.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ma wɩyaaweliye wɩya rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ laa ma ta. Ɛɛwɩya, nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo daga ʋ tɩɩ gɛɛ wɩya.

english_verse: God planned for us to do good things and to live as he has always wanted us to live. This is why he sent Christ to make us what we are. United by Christ
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ rɛ taa ma, a leŋ á bee Yesu Krisita buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ dɩ á kɩ yaa wɩweliye, wɩweliye hʋ ʋ aa magɩlɩ biŋ faafaa buloŋ dɩ á kɩ yaa. Krisitabiisi bee Krisita buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ

english_verse: At that time you did not know about Christ. You were foreigners to the people of Israel, and you had no part in the promises God had made to them. You were living in this world without hope and without God,
translation_verse: Ma ta yeŋŋe anɩɩ haŋ saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ ma bee Krisita fa aa bɩ pɛɛ wɩɩ buloŋ, ma gyɩ bɩ pɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ nala ʋ aa lɩya tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma gyɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nɩhʋwala. Wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa wee nyʋwa anɩɩ ʋ sɩ yaa tɩya ʋ nala, ma kɛ fa bɩ pɛɛ. Ma fa bɩ kaŋ wɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bayɩyɛla, a fa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: and you were far from God. But Christ offered his life's blood as a sacrifice and brought you near God.
translation_verse: Ma bee Wɩɩsɩ fa boliye rɛ kɩŋkaŋ abee dɔmɔŋ, amɛ nyɛ kɛ, ma bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya, ʋ kaŋ ma ko kpaga rɛ, akuu Krisita aa sʋba ma wɩya nyubaanɩŋ.

english_verse: Christ has made peace between Jews and Gentiles, and he has united us by breaking down the wall of hatred that separated us. Christ gave his own body
translation_verse: Krisita tɩɩ rɛ leŋ fɩyɛlʋʋ gyʋʋ ma, beewɩya ʋ leŋ Gyuuma abee nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma buloŋ ko bɩrɩmɩ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Ʋ aa sʋba daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ʋ kpaa ʋ tɩɩ rɛ a tɔrɩ dɔŋdɔŋ hʋ fa aa we nala no paga tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: to destroy the Law of Moses with all its rules and commands. He even brought Jews and Gentiles together as though we were only one person, when he united us in peace.
translation_verse: Ʋ gɛɛ yayɩ leŋ Gyuuma mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ bɩl bɩ yaa fɩlɩɩ rɛ, ka ʋ bɩl leŋ Gyuuma abee nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma buloŋ ko yaa kɩdɩgɩ ʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ leŋ ba yaa sʋma dɔmɔŋ lee.

english_verse: On the cross Christ did away with our hatred for each other. He also made peace between us and God by uniting Jews and Gentiles in one body.
translation_verse: Krisita aa sʋba daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya, ʋ leŋ ba dɔŋdɔŋ hʋ teŋ nɛ. Ʋ aa yaa gɛɛ, ʋ leŋ ba buloŋ balɩya tɩŋa ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a ko yaa kɩdɩgɩ, aŋ kaŋ ba bee Wɩɩsɩ mɛ we dɔmɔŋ ba yaa sʋma.

english_verse: Christ came and preached peace to you Gentiles, who were far from God, and peace to us Jews, who were near God.
translation_verse: Krisita rɛ ko a basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ aa tɩya fɩyɛlʋʋ a tɩya nala fa aa boliye bee Wɩɩsɩ, abee nala hʋ mɛ fa aa kpaga Wɩɩsɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: And because of Christ, all of us can come to the Father by the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Krisita nyubaanɩŋ nɛ á buloŋ sɩ wuwo tɩŋ Wiyesi Welidɩgɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ a ko á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ lee.

english_verse: You Gentiles are no longer strangers and foreigners. You are citizens with everyone else who belongs to the family of God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma, ma bɩl bɩ yaa nɩhʋwala koo gyʋgyʋʋlɩya. Nyɛ kɛ, ma bee Wɩɩsɩ nala buloŋ yaa bedɩgɩ nala rɛ, a yaa Wɩɩsɩ dɩya nala.

english_verse: You are like a building with the apostles and prophets as the foundation and with Christ as the most important stone.
translation_verse: Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ dɩya ba kpa ma kɩ saa. Yesu Krisita kpambɩsɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala rɛ biŋ dɩya no memii. Krisita tɩɩ mɛ rɛ yaa bʋnyuu dɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Christ is the one who holds the building together and makes it grow into a holy temple for the Lord.
translation_verse: Ʋ rɛ kaŋ dɩya hʋ buloŋ sɩgɩ, a leŋ ʋ ko yaa Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩwelii, a we doŋ Wɩɩsɩ kyʋwalɩɩ dʋŋ wɩya.

english_verse: And you are part of that building Christ has built as a place for God's own Spirit to live.
translation_verse: Ma bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya ba kaŋ ma bee Wɩɩsɩ nɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ kɩ saa lee Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa gyʋʋ rɛ.

english_verse: You have surely heard about God's gift of undeserved grace in choosing me to help you.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma mɛ nɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩŋ ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ a lɩɩ ŋ nɛ, a kpa tʋma no tɩyaŋ dɩ ŋ kɩ tʋma ma wɩya.

english_verse: As you read the letter, you will also find out how well I really do understand the mystery about Christ.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kpaa ʋ bampaga wɩya hʋ fa aa yaa wɩfaŋɩya a daga ŋ nɛ, a leŋ ŋ gyɩŋ ba.

english_verse: No one knew about this mystery until God's Spirit told it to his holy apostles and prophets.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ fa bɩ leŋ faafaa nala gyɩŋ wɩya no, amɛ nyɛ kɛ, ʋ tɩŋ ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a kpa ba daga ʋ kpambɩsɩ abee ʋ tɩŋdaala hʋ aa kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ.
