english_verse: And the mystery is this: Because of Christ Jesus, the good news has given the Gentiles a share in the promises God gave to the Jews. God has also let the Gentiles be part of the same body.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ bampaga hʋ fa aa yaa wɩfaŋɩɩ hʋ rɛ nyɛ: Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ wɩweliye hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a leŋ Gyuuma abee nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma buloŋ yaa nɩmmabalɩya a kaŋ tol wɩweliye hʋ ʋ aa mara biŋ ʋ nala tɩyaŋ. Lagɩlagɩ no, ba buloŋ nɛ kaŋ tol wɩweliye hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩŋ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a we nyʋwa baa ʋ sɩ kpa tɩya ma hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God treated me with kindness. His power worked in me, and it became my job to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ, ʋ leŋ ŋ yaa ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ rɛ aŋ tɩya ŋ dee mɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ ʋ wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya nala.

english_verse: I am the least important of all God's people. But God was kind and chose me to tell the Gentiles that because of Christ there are blessings that cannot be measured.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ nala buloŋ tɩyaŋ, mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa ba nɩbiye, ka Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ ŋ ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ dɩ ŋ mʋ basɩ ʋ wɩweliye hʋ aa daga anɩɩ wɩweliye hʋ aa we Krisita gyɩmɩɩ tɩyaŋ bɩ kaŋ magɩsɩɩ a tɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma,

english_verse: Then God would use the church to show the powers and authorities in the spiritual world that he has many different kinds of wisdom.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ gyɩnaŋ sɩgballɩya no dɩ ʋ tɩŋ nala hʋ aa laa Krisita wɩya di tɩyaŋ a leŋ dɩ kɩbɔmɔ hʋ á aa bee na ka ba kaŋ dee aŋ kɩ deŋ leye na Wɩɩsɩ wɩgyʋŋ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God did this according to his eternal plan. And he was able to do what he had planned because of all Christ Jesus our Lord had done.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ vʋʋlɩ wɩɩ no yayɩ biŋ nɛ a lɩɩ piili hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ, aŋ ko tɩŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a leŋ wɩɩ hʋ kɔnɩ yaa.

english_verse: Christ now gives us courage and confidence, so we can come to God by faith.
translation_verse: Á bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya abee á aa laa ʋ di wɩya, á aa wuwo mʋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya rɛ, aŋ bee fa kambɩŋ.

english_verse: This is why you should not be discouraged when I suffer for you. After all, it will bring honor to you. Christ's Love for Us
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya ŋ yaŋ aa sʋla ma rɛ ma ta leŋ dɩ ma tenni ko kɩ yʋwɔrɩ akuu tʋwara hʋ ŋ aa naa ma wɩya wɩya. Beewɩya ma weliŋ wɩya rɛ ŋ kɩ na tʋwara no buloŋ. Pɔɔl sʋla Wɩɩsɩ tɩya Ɛfiso tɩmma

english_verse: All beings in heaven and on earth receive their life from him.
translation_verse: Kɩwiyesii buloŋ doho aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ abee taŋha nyuu tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ yaa ba buloŋ kuwo.

english_verse: and that Christ will live in your hearts because of your faith. Stand firm and be deeply rooted in his love.
translation_verse: dɩ Krisita tɩŋ ma laadii tɩyaŋ a we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Ŋ bɩl aa sʋla ʋ rɛ dɩ ma wɩyaalɩɩ buloŋ lɩɩ kyori tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: I pray that you and all God's people will understand what is called wide or long or high or deep.
translation_verse: dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ma bee ʋ nala buloŋ kaŋ dee a wuwo gyɩŋ kyori hʋ Krisita aa kana beel-ma gyalɩŋ abee ʋ doluŋ abee ʋ gyɩnɩɩ abee ʋ luŋiŋ.

english_verse: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
translation_verse: Ŋ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ rɛ bɩl yaa dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ma gyɩŋ kyori no aa bɩ kaŋ magɩsɩɩ dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ma ko kɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ kɩɩ mʋ teŋ.

english_verse: I pray that Christ Jesus and the church will forever bring praise to God. His power at work in us can do far more than we dare ask or imagine. Amen.
translation_verse: Á nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di, ka á beel-ʋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ, ma leŋ dɩ ʋ feŋ yɩrɩ saŋa buloŋ, a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ. Amɩ.

english_verse: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl, nal hʋ ba aa kaŋ tɔ dɩyaŋ á Tɩɩna tʋma hʋ wɩya, ŋ aa sʋl ma nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa yɩra rɛ dɩ ma leŋ dɩ ma mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ wɩyaalɩya buloŋ kpa ŋmanɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa daga ma saŋa hʋ ʋ aa yɩrɩ ma.

english_verse: Always be humble and gentle. Patiently put up with each other and love each other.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ ma sɩya tuu taŋha, a kaŋ ma tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ. Ma kaŋ kenyiri bee dɔmɔŋ a gyɩŋ kaŋ dɔmɔŋ weliŋ abee kyori.

english_verse: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
translation_verse: Ma yaa ma sɩfɩyaŋ buloŋ a leŋ dɩ fɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ aa kaŋ ma kɩ pɛ dɔmɔŋ leŋ dɩ ma marɩ kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa tɩya ma weliŋ.

english_verse: All of you are part of the same body. There is only one Spirit of God, just as you were given one hope when you were chosen to be God's people.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa we á buloŋ tɩyaŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, á yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ yɩrɩ ma á kaŋ bayɩyɛldɩgɩ dʋŋ mɛ.

english_verse: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Wɩɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ we doŋ. Ʋ rɛ yaa á buloŋ Kuwo. Ʋ rɛ aa deŋ á buloŋ. Ʋ we á tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ a kaŋ ma kɩ tʋma.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “When he went up to the highest place, he led away many prisoners and gave gifts to people.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba sabɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Saŋa hʋ ʋ aa gyɩŋ mʋ wɩɩsɩnyuu, Ʋ gyɩ kasɩ nala hʋ ʋ aa yuwo di tɩŋa ʋ hal lɛ, aŋ kpa ʋ bɔnyɛ kɩna tɩya nala.”

english_verse: When it says, “he went up,” it means that Christ had been deep in the earth.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ baa dɩ ʋ gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ laasɩya lɩɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu ko tuu taŋha rɛ.

english_verse: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa ko tuu taŋha, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ bɩl gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu gɛɛ, a parɩ leye hʋ aa we wɩɩsɩnyuu gyɩŋ mʋ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ʋ we lee buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
translation_verse: a kaŋ mʋ pele saŋa hʋ á buloŋ aa sɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ Krisita laadii tɩyaŋ, á gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ ŋmaŋdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ, a yaa nala aa gyige Krisita tɩyaŋ aŋ kɩɩ ʋ á wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We must stop acting like children. We must not let deceitful people trick us by their false teachings, which are like winds that toss us around from place to place.
translation_verse: Ʋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ, á bɩl bɩ sɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ haŋbiisi Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ nala badɔmɔŋ wɩdagɩya kaŋ á hakɩllɩ gɔllɩ viisi kɩ baŋ anɩɩ puwo aa kaŋ nɩɩduworiboro gɔllɩ kɩ viisi nɩɩ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Nala no aa kpa dawarɩ rɛ a mʋrɩ nala ba laa wɩnyɩyɛl di anɩɩ wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: As a follower of the Lord, I order you to stop living like stupid, godless people.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ feŋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ aa kpaanɩ ma sɩfɩyaŋ, ma ta bɩl leŋ dɩ ma mɩɩbol wɩyaalɩya kɩɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ. Ba tɩbɩɩna buloŋ yaa wɩtɔɔnɩ rɛ,

english_verse: Their minds are in the dark, and they are stubborn and ignorant and have missed out on the life that comes from God. They no longer have any feelings about what is right,
translation_verse: ka ba hakɩllɩ mɛ ha we bilhuu tɩyaŋ. Ba bɩ kaŋ tol mɩɩbofalɩɩ hʋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ba bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ buloŋ akuu ba aa kaŋ faasɩŋ wɩya, aŋ bɩ vʋwa dɩ ba gyɩŋ wɩɩ buloŋ mɛ.

english_verse: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ba basɩ ʋ wɩya tɩya ma rɛ a daga ma wɩtɩɩ hʋ buloŋ aa we ʋ wɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma kpa gyogibɩnɩya hʋ ma fa aa kana buloŋ ta. Gyogo no rɛ fa tɩŋ ma fa kɩ yaa haŋ wɩya hʋ. Gyogibɩnɩya hʋ ma fa aa kana, ba fa leŋ ma hakɩllɩ we wɩya hʋ aa mʋrɩ ma, aŋ kɩ yalmɩ ma dʋŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Let the Spirit change your way of thinking
translation_verse: Ma tɩsɩ bee ma hakɩllɩ buloŋ maga dɩ ba bɩrɩmɩ kɩfalɩya rɛ.

english_verse: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
translation_verse: Ma kpa ma gyogifalɩya hʋ laalɩ anɩɩ ɩ aa wuri gabɩnɩɩ ta aŋ kpa gafalɩɩ laalɩ gɛɛ. Wɩɩsɩ marɩ ma gyogifalɩɩ no ʋ kɩɩ ʋ rɛ a kaŋ wɩtɩɩ bee tɩpʋlʋŋ aŋ bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta bɩl kɩ nyɩya wɩya. Ma leŋ dɩ nal buloŋ basɩ wɩtɩɩ a tɩya ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna, beewɩya á buloŋ yaa Krisita teŋbidɩgɩ hʋ logimo rɛ.

english_verse: Don't get so angry that you sin. Don't go to bed angry
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ ko na baaŋ, ta leŋ dɩ baaŋ hʋ leŋ dɩ ɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ. Ta naa baaŋ gɛɛ dɩ wɩɩsɩ mʋ gyʋʋ.

english_verse: and don't give the devil a chance.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ Sɩtaanɩ na ŋmanɩɩ a mʋrɩ ma.

english_verse: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ fa aa yaa gaal, ʋ maga dɩ ʋ leŋ gaal lɛ, aŋ kyɛ tʋŋweliye kɩ tʋma, a wuwo na ʋ tɩɩ kɩkyɛɛlɩya, aŋ wuwo pɛ nyaaba mɛ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Stop all your dirty talk. Say the right thing at the right time and help others by what you say.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ wɩgyaga buloŋ lɩɩ ma nyʋwa tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ma leŋ dɩ ma wɩbasɩya buloŋ yaa wɩya aa fɩyɛlɩ nala bembiye ba wɩgyʋʋlɩya tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ma wɩbasɩya sɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ a tɩya nala hʋ aa nɩɩ ba.

english_verse: Don't make God's Spirit sad. The Spirit makes you sure that someday you will be free from your sins.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii tɩya kyogi. Beewɩya ʋ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ kpa magɩlɩ ma a daga anɩɩ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ sɩ pele dɩ ʋ laa ma ta.

english_verse: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
translation_verse: Ma ta laa wɩya kɩ we ma funi tɩyaŋ. Ma leŋ baaŋ tɔɔnɩ nayɩ, a ta kɩ nɔsɩ nala waasʋ-waasʋ mɛ. Ma ta kɩ kyogi nala fene, a ta haasɩ nal buloŋ mɛ.

english_verse: Instead, be kind and merciful, and forgive others, just as God forgave you because of Christ.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kaŋ bɔnyɛ bee dɔmɔŋ, a kɩ fá dɔmɔŋ sikii. Ma kpa wɩya kɩ kyɛ dɔmɔŋ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩŋ Krisita tɩyaŋ a kpa ma wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ kyɛ ma gɛɛ.

english_verse: Do as God does. After all, you are his dear children.
translation_verse: Ma aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ biikyooliye wɩya, ʋ maga dɩ ma yaa sɩfɩyaŋ nɛ aŋ kɩɩ ʋ ma wɩyaalɩya buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Let love be your guide. Christ loved us and offered his life for us as a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Ma kyo dɔmɔŋ anɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ Krisita tɩɩ aa kyo ma, a kpa ʋ tɩɩ mɩɩbol lɩɩ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ á wɩya. Wɩɩsʋlɩɩ no kɩɩ kɩŋ sʋwala aa sʋma rɛ a leŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ.

english_verse: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
translation_verse: Ma aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ nala wɩya, ʋ bɩ maga dɩ sɔŋsɔŋ wɩya koo bisiŋ wɩya koo tɩbawɩya iriŋ kɛ buloŋ we ma tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't use dirty or foolish or filthy words. Instead, say how thankful you are.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ma kɩ basɩ nɩlaaŋ-wɩya koo wɩvɩyagyɩmɩya koo dɩ ma kɩ yaa sɩya bɔŋlɔrɩnɩ, amɛ ʋ maga dɩ ma kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ.

english_verse: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
translation_verse: Ma gyɩŋ tɩya ma tɩɩ weliŋ anɩɩ sɔŋsɔnnɔ abee nɩlaama abee nala hʋ aa kaŋ tɩbal bɩ sɩ maakyiye kaŋ lee Krisita bee Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya nal hʋ buloŋ aa kaŋ tɩbal kɩ kyɛ kɩna, kɩna hʋ aa mɩɩgɩ bɩrɩmɩ ʋ tɩɩna vʋga rɛ ʋ kɩ marɩ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ nal buloŋ kpa wɩtɔɔnɩ a mʋrɩ ma. Beewɩya wɩya no tɩɩ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ baaŋ sɩ sii nala hʋ aa bee tɩŋ ʋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ ma bee nɩtesi no kɩ pɛ wɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
translation_verse: Saŋa kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ ma tɩɩ mɛ fa we bilhuu tɩyaŋ nɛ. Amɛ akuu ma bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya, nyɛ kɛ ma we pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma leŋ dɩ ma wɩyaalɩya daga anɩɩ ma kɔnɩ we pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: and make your light shine. Be good and honest and truthful,
translation_verse: Beewɩya pʋlʋŋ no rɛ aa leŋ nal kɩ yaa weliye iriŋ kɛ buloŋ, a kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ abee wɩtɩɩ.

english_verse: Don't take part in doing those worthless things that are done in the dark. Instead, show how wrong they are.
translation_verse: Ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩ bilhuu tɩyaŋ wɩyaalɩya hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩyaŋ aŋ leŋ dɩ nala gyɩma anɩɩ wɩya no yayɩ bɩ weliye.

english_verse: But the light will show what these things are really like.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ pʋlʋŋ nɛ ko kyaanɩ we kɩŋ tɩyaŋ, nal buloŋ aa gyɩŋ kɩŋ hʋ iriŋ ʋ aa yaa rɛ.

english_verse: Light shows up everything, just as the Scriptures say, “Wake up from your sleep and rise from death. Then Christ will shine on you.”
translation_verse: Beewɩya pʋlʋŋ nɛ aa leŋ kɩ buloŋ lɩɩ lɩgyalɩɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba basɩ baa, “Ɩ nal hʋ aa pɩŋ doo, sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, Krisita sɩ kyaanɩ we ɩ.”

english_verse: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
translation_verse: Ma ta yaa bambugo. Ʋ maga dɩ ma yaa sɩfɩyaŋ nɛ dɩ ma gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ma yaa.

english_verse: Don't destroy yourself by getting drunk, but let the Spirit fill your life.
translation_verse: Ma ta nyʋwa sɩŋ kɩ bugo, beewɩya yalmɩɩ dʋŋ nɛ bugii kaŋ kɩ ko. Amɛ ma leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii su ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When you meet together, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, as you praise the Lord with all your heart.
translation_verse: Ma kpa teŋpolli yɩɩla abee Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ a kɩ kyagɩlɩ dɔmɔŋ. Ma yɩɩ yɩɩla kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Always use the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to thank God the Father for everything. Wives and Husbands
translation_verse: Saŋa kɛ buloŋ abee wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, ma kɩ kyʋwalɩ á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita feŋ tɩyaŋ. Baala bee haana

english_verse: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
translation_verse: Haana, ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ hʋwɔlɩ ma balama lee anɩɩ ma aa kaŋ ma tɩɩ hʋwɔlɩ á Tɩɩna Krisita lee gɛɛ,

english_verse: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
translation_verse: beewɩya baal kaŋ dee ʋ haaŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ anɩɩ Krisita mɛ aa kaŋ dee nala hʋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di nyuu tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Krisita rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di a yaa ʋ teŋbii hʋ buloŋ laataal.

english_verse: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
translation_verse: Baala, ma kyo ma haana anɩɩ Krisita aa kyo nala hʋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di gɛɛ, a sʋba ba wɩya.

english_verse: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
translation_verse: Ʋ sʋba ba wɩya gɛɛ dɩ ʋ wuwo kpa ba tɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, a kpa ʋ tɩɩ wɩbii hʋ a sasɩ ba wɩbɔmɔ ta anɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ ba aa kpa nɩɩ a fo nal.

english_verse: Christ did this, so he would have a glorious and holy church, without faults or spots or wrinkles or any other flaws.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ bɩl leŋ dɩ nala hʋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di yaa ʋ tɩɩ nala, a yaa nɩtɩɩma a weliye mʋ teŋ a bɩ kaŋ gyoŋ kɛ iriŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ maga dɩ baal buloŋ mɛ kyo ʋ haaŋ anɩɩ ʋ aa kyo ʋ tɩɩ gɛɛ. Baal hʋ buloŋ aa kyo ʋ haaŋ, ʋ kyo ʋ tɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: None of us hate our own bodies. We provide for them and take good care of them, just as Christ does for the church,
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ tuwo a haasɩ ʋ tɩɩ. Nal buloŋ kyo ʋ tɩɩ rɛ, a kɩ deŋ ʋ tɩɩ nyuu weliŋ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ Krisita kɩ deŋ nala hʋ aa laa ʋ wɩya nyuu tɩyaŋ mɛ,

english_verse: because we are each part of his body.
translation_verse: beewɩya ámaa rɛ yaa ʋ teŋbii logimo.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
translation_verse: Ba basɩ nyɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Wɩɩ no wɩya rɛ tɩŋ baal aa leŋ ʋ naa abee ʋ kuwo, ka ʋ bee ʋ haaŋ mal dɔmɔŋ a bɩrɩmɩ nɩdɩgɩ.”

english_verse: This is a great mystery, but I understand it to mean Christ and his church.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no yaa wɩduwo rɛ a yaa wɩfaŋɩɩ mɛ. Amɛ ŋ kɛ gyɩma anɩɩ Krisita bee nala hʋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di wɩya rɛ ba basɩ doŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya ʋ maga dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ kyo ʋ haaŋ nɛ anɩɩ ʋ aa kyo ʋ tɩɩ gɛɛ, a maga dɩ haaŋ buloŋ mɛ kɩ tɩya ʋ bala gyɩrɩma.

english_verse: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
translation_verse: Biisi, ma kɩ tɩŋ ma kuwoma abee ma nɩmma nyʋwa. Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ yaa wɩɩ aa maga dɩ ma kɩ yaa rɛ.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. Raise them properly. Teach them and instruct them about the Lord. Slaves and Masters
translation_verse: Mamaa kuwoma, ma ta kaŋ ma biisi lɔgɩlɩɩ, dɩ ba baaŋ kɩ sii. Amɛ ma kɩ deŋ ba weliŋ, a kɩ daga ba weliŋ dɩ ba gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ a kɩ tɩŋa. Yosi abee ba tɩmma

english_verse: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
translation_verse: Ma nala hʋ aa yaa yosi, ma kɩ tɩŋ ma tɩmma nyʋwa dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Ma kɩ fa ba a kɩ tɩya ba gyɩrɩma, a kɩ tɩŋ ba abee tɩdɩgɩ anɩɩ gɛɛ ma aa sɩ tɩŋ Krisita.

english_verse: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Ma ta kuu ma tɩmma aa sɩŋ kɩ deŋ ma wɩya, koo ma aa kyɛ dɩ ma yaa laa gyaaŋbiye dʋŋ wɩya a kɩ tɩŋ ba nyʋwa. Amɛ, akuu ma aa yaa Krisita yosi wɩya, ma kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ abee ma tɩsɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
translation_verse: Ma ko kɩ tʋŋ tʋma mɛ, ma kɩ tɩma abee ma hakɩla aŋ kpa ʋ anɩɩ Krisita rɛ ma tʋma kɩ tɩya, nihuwobisi daa.

english_verse: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ma gyɩma nɩɩ dɩ nal lɛ yaa wɩwelii, á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ aa tun-ʋ wɩwelii hʋ tuno rɛ dɩ tɩɩna yaa yoŋ koo ʋ bɩ yaa yoŋ.

english_verse: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
translation_verse: Ma nala hʋ aa kaŋ yosi, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ maga dɩ ma mɛ kaŋ ba weliŋ, a ta kɩ fugisi ba. Beewɩya ma gyɩma anɩɩ ma beel-ba buloŋ tɩɩna yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ a we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ. Á buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ ʋ lee. Ʋ bee lugisi nala. Bayuwo kɩna hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ma

english_verse: Put on all the armor that God gives, so you can defend yourself against the devil's tricks.
translation_verse: Ma paa bayuwo kɩna hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ma buloŋ nyʋgɩlɩ anɩɩ bayuwol. Ɛɛ rɛ ma sɩ wuwo pɔ ma tɩɩ dɩ Sɩtaanɩ ta wuwo kpa ʋ dawarɩ ŋmaŋsɩ a mʋrɩ ma.

english_verse: We are not fighting against humans. We are fighting against forces and authorities and against rulers of darkness and powers in the spiritual world.
translation_verse: Beewɩya á bee nihuwobisi daa aa kaa. Amɛ á bee kɩbɔmɔ hʋ á aa bee na, ka ba kaŋ dee a kɩ deŋ leye, abee vʋgɩduwoni hʋ aa we gyɩnaŋ bilhuu no tɩyaŋ, á beel-ba rɛ aa kaa.

english_verse: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma paa ma bayuwo kɩna hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ma a nyʋgɩlɩ. Dɩ kyɛɛ hʋ buloŋ Sɩtaanɩ aa sɩ kpa kpanɩma kyem-ma rɛ ko puu ma, ma sɩ sɩŋ pɔ, a yuwo lɩɩ, ka dɩ mamaa rɛ yaŋ ko yuwo lɩɩ gɛɛ mʋ teŋ, ma ha sɩ sɩŋ ma lɩsɩnɩɩ.

english_verse: Be ready! Let the truth be like a belt around your waist, and let God's justice protect you like armor.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma sɩŋ kpaŋkpaŋ, a leŋ dɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ ma aa kana bee Wɩɩsɩ vʋwa ma tɩŋsɩ anɩɩ tɛpɩɩŋbii, a leŋ dɩ ma tɩpʋlʋŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ hɔgɩ a tɔ ma bembiye,

english_verse: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
translation_verse: a leŋ dɩ siri hʋ ma aa yaa saŋa buloŋ dɩ ma basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ aa kaŋ fɩyɛlʋʋ wɩya tɩya nala kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ma naatɔbɔ ma aa tʋwa.

english_verse: Let your faith be like a shield, and you will be able to stop all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
translation_verse: Ba buloŋ hal tɩyaŋ, ma ha leŋ dɩ ma Wɩɩsɩ laadii kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ hɔgɩgyalɩɩ ma aa kaŋ geesi tɔ ma sɩya dɩɩlaŋ. Ʋ rɛ ma sɩ wuwo kpa a kyeŋ laa Sɩtaanɩ hama hʋ aa kyol diŋ hʋ buloŋ dɩ ba dɩsɩ.

english_verse: Let God's saving power be like a helmet, and for a sword use God's message that comes from the Spirit.
translation_verse: Ma kpa Wɩɩsɩ laatayɩ hʋ ma aa kana a kyigi tɔ ma nyuni anɩɩ hɔgɩ-nyupugi, ka dɩ ma kolo Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ mɛ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa daga ma anɩɩ takoobii.

english_verse: Never stop praying, especially for others. Always pray by the power of the Spirit. Stay alert and keep praying for God's people.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ saŋa buloŋ, wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ no wɩya, ma ta kaŋ kɩ yaa kyɔɔ. Ma sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ nala buloŋ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ŋ laa Krisita naasɩ sɩŋ, haalɩ ba kana ŋ tɔ dɩyaŋ gɛɛ wɩya. Ma sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ŋ, dɩ ʋ tɩya ŋ nyuduwo dɩ ŋ wuwo basɩ Krisita wɩweliye hʋ anɩɩ gɛɛ ŋ aa maga dɩ ŋ basɩ ba. Wɩkateŋsi

english_verse: I want you to know how I am getting along and what I am doing. This is why I am sending Tychicus to you. He is a dear friend, as well as a faithful servant of the Lord. He will tell you how I am doing, and he will cheer you up.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ kɩ tɩma ʋ ma lee, dɩ ʋ ko leŋ dɩ ma gyɩŋ gɛɛ á buloŋ hɔnɩɩ aa kɩya daha tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ma tenni polli.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
translation_verse: Á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita sɩ leŋ dɩ á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ buloŋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di hɔŋ abee laaŋfɩya, a kyo dɔmɔŋ, a laa Wɩɩsɩ di weliŋ mɛ.

english_verse: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa ʋ bɔnyɛ daga nala hʋ buloŋ aa kyo á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita abee kyori hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl abee Timoti aa yaa Yesu Krisita tʋŋtʋnna rɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ a we Filipi tɩyaŋ, abee ba sɩlaala abee nala hʋ aa kyiyeli sɩlaala hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul's Prayer for the Church in Philippi
translation_verse: Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ abee ba fɩyɛlʋʋ sɩ we ma lee. Pɔɔl kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya Krisitabiisi aa we Filipi tɩyaŋ

english_verse: This is because you have taken part with me in spreading the good news from the first day you heard about it.
translation_verse: beewɩya a lɩɩ kyɛɛ hʋ ma aa nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ a kaŋ kɩ ko gyɩnaŋ, ma aa kyiyeli ŋ nɛ, ŋ wuwo basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ kɩ tɩya nala.

english_verse: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
translation_verse: Ŋ laa di rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa piili tʋŋwelii no ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ sɩ kɩ tʋma ma tɩyaŋ a kaŋ mʋ teŋ kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko.

english_verse: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ yaa ŋ daŋsɩya anɩɩ ŋ aa baa ŋ kyo ma rɛ weliŋ anɩɩ Yesu Krisita tɩɩ aa kyo ma gɛɛ.

english_verse: Jesus Christ will keep you busy doing good deeds that bring glory and praise to God. What Life Means to Paul
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma mɩɩgɩ kaŋ gyogiweliye hʋ Yesu Krisita dʋŋ aa sɩ wuwo tɩya ma, dɩ nala na a dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ a kpa ʋ yohuŋ. Mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ rɛ yaa Yesu Krisita tʋma

english_verse: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ ŋ wɩgyʋʋlɩya no buloŋ marɩ leŋ Yesu Krisita wɩweliye hʋ pɩsa mʋ lee buloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: The Roman guards and all the others know I am here in jail because I serve Christ.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ yaŋ leŋ kuworibee pʋpɔɔlɔ hʋ abee nɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ aa we daha gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ aa yaa Krisita tʋŋtʋnnɩ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ba kana ŋ tɔ nɩtɔdɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, tɩhɔllɩ bee hadɔrɩ rɛ tɩŋ nala badɔmɔŋ kɩ basɩ Krisita wɩya. Amɛ badɔmɔŋ mɛ, tɩbɩɩŋweliye rɛ ba kaŋ kɩ basɩ Krisita wɩya.

english_verse: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
translation_verse: Amɛ nɩkaalɩya hʋ kɛ ba tɩɩ feŋ wɩya rɛ ba kɩ yaa. Ba wɩtɩɩ bɩ suwo abee wɩya hʋ basɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Ba bɩɩna anɩɩ ba sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ wɩya marɩ gyʋʋ ŋ nɛ nɩtɔdɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ kɛ lee ʋ bɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ. Dɩ tɩbɩɩŋweliye rɛ koo dɩ tɩbɩɩŋbɔmɔ rɛ ba kaŋ kɩ basɩ Krisita wɩya, ba kyo ba kɩɩ gɛɛ buloŋ mɛ, wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ rɛ yaa, nala aa nɩɩ Krisita wɩya rɛ. Nyɛ wɩya yaa ŋ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ rɛ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
translation_verse: Ŋ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ no bɩ sɩ teŋ beewɩya ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ŋ nɛ. Ma wɩɩsʋlɩɩ no abee Yesu Krisita Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ, ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ba sɩ lɩɩ ŋ nɩtɔdɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ŋ kɛ lee, Krisita wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ŋ we ŋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ sʋba mɛ, ʋ yaa tɔnɔ rɛ a tɩya ŋ.

english_verse: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
translation_verse: Wɩya no balɩya paga tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ we a kaŋ kɩ lʋga. Ŋ fa kyo dɩ ŋ lɩɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ nɛ a mʋ Krisita lee. Ʋ rɛ kpɩya ŋ aa we dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ fifi.

english_verse: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
translation_verse: Ŋ kɔnɩ laa di rɛ anɩɩ ŋ sɩ we doŋ ma buloŋ wɩya, a pɛ ma tɩyaŋ dɩ ma marɩ gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ ma aa laa di weliŋ, aŋ pɛ kaŋ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ mɛ ba tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ mɩɩgɩ ko ma lee, ma tenni sɩ fɩyɛlɩ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ akuu mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl wɩya.

english_verse: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ, sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ hʋ rɛ yaa dɩ ma leŋ dɩ ma wɩyaalɩya kɩ tɩŋ Yesu Krisita wɩweliye hʋ ŋ aa basɩ tɩya ma. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ we ma lee koo dɩ ŋ tuwo ma lee, ka ŋ sɩ nɩɩ anɩɩ ma kaŋ wɩya hʋ weliŋ nɛ, a kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ, a leŋ ma hakɩllɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ, a kɩ lʋga sɩfɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ ma aa laa di dʋŋ wɩya.

english_verse: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
translation_verse: Ma ta kɩ fáá ma dɔmɔ kambɩŋ. Ma kaŋ nyuduwo saŋa buloŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ sɩ daga ba anɩɩ ba aa lʋga ba lɔlɔ rɛ, ka dɩ ma yuwo di beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ sɩ leŋ ma di.

english_verse: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, Wɩɩsɩ bɩ tɩya ma ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ma laa Krisita wɩya di dʋŋ, amɛ ʋ tɩya ma ŋmanɩɩ rɛ dɩ ma pɛ na tʋwara mɛ rɛ ʋ wɩya.

english_verse: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma nyʋgɩlɩ dɩ á buloŋ kɩ lʋga lʋgʋ hʋ. Haŋ lʋgʋ hʋ ŋ aa lʋgɩ piilii hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ, ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ ha we abee gyɩnaŋ.

english_verse: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ aa sʋla ma abee sɩfɩyaŋ, ma leŋ dɩ ma tɩbɩɩna yaa kɩdɩgɩ, dɩ ma kyo dɔmɔŋ weliŋ, aŋ kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ abee hakɩldɩgɩ ma wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ŋ teŋ marɩ fɩyɛlɩ a mʋ teŋ.

english_verse: and think the same way that Christ Jesus thought:
translation_verse: Ʋ maga dɩ ma kɩɩ Yesu Krisita rɛ ma gyogo tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Christ was humble. He obeyed God and even died on a cross.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ hʋwɔlɩ rɛ, a tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa gɛɛ, haalɩ a mʋ sʋba naŋkʋwa sʋʋ daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
translation_verse: Yesu feŋbal no wɩya, nihuwobisi abee kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa we Wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ abee taŋha nyuu bee taŋha memii, ba buloŋ sɩ tuu gbinni ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ a kyʋwalɩ ʋ,

english_verse: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
translation_verse: ka dɩ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ suri ʋ nyʋwa gyamaa tɩyaŋ a basɩ anɩɩ Yesu Krisita rɛ yaa Tɩɩna, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ feŋ gyɩŋ. Ma kɩ kyaanɩ

english_verse: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ naabiikyooliye, anɩɩ ŋ gyɩ aa we ma lee ma kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa gɛɛ, lagɩlagɩ no ŋ aa tuwo ma lee nyɛ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ gba yaŋ maga dɩ ma yaa sɩfɩyaŋ a kɩ tɩŋ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa daga ma. Ma kɩ fá Wɩɩsɩ a kɩ tɩŋa ʋ nyʋwa abee wɩtɩɩ, aŋ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ a kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ laatayɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ kyurrr a mʋ teŋ.

english_verse: God is working in you to make you willing and able to obey him.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, Wɩɩsɩ we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ saŋa buloŋ, a leŋ ma kyo dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋ ʋ kyɛrɩ, a leŋ ma wuwo kɩ tɩŋ ʋ kyɛrɩ mɛ.

english_verse: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, ma sɩ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma, a bɩ sɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ. Ma sɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi aa bɩ kaŋ gyoŋ buloŋ aŋ we wɩbɔŋyaala abee nɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma kɩ tɩŋ wɩya hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol abee ma wɩtɩɩ buloŋ, a kɩ kyaanɩ nala no tɩyaŋ anɩɩ kyɩŋwʋlɩya aa kɩ kyaanɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu tɩyaŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa nyɛ, kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko ŋ sɩ wuwo bigisi ŋ tɩɩ ma wɩya. Beewɩya nyɛ rɛ sɩ daga anɩɩ tʋma hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa tʋma, ŋ bɩ tʋŋ ta.

english_verse: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
translation_verse: Kapuwo ba sɩ kana ŋ kpʋ. Ʋ nyɛ tɩyaŋ ŋ sɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ pʋna ma aa kaŋ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ akuu ma aa laa ʋ di wɩya. Dɩ wɩɩ no rɛ yaa, ʋ aa yaa ŋ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ dɩ ŋ beel-ma kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ.

english_verse: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ maga dɩ ma leŋ dɩ ma tenni mɛ fɩyɛlɩ dɩ ma beel-ŋ kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ. Pɔɔl tɩŋ Timoti bee Ɛpafuroditu

english_verse: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa nyʋwa, ŋ sɩ tɩŋ Timoti dɩ ʋ ko ma lee kyɛɛ no buloŋ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko na ma, aŋ mɩɩgɩ ko basɩ ma wɩya tɩya ŋ, ŋ teŋ sɩ polli.

english_verse: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ kaŋ nal buloŋ daha ʋ kyɩl ma wɩya abee wɩtɩɩ anɩɩ Timoti aa kyɩl ma wɩya gɛɛ.

english_verse: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Nikaalɩya hʋ kɛ buloŋ, ba dʋŋ wɩya rɛ ba kyɩla, Yesu Krisita wɩya daa ba kyɩla.

english_verse: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma mɛ tɩɩ gyɩŋ ɛɛ Timoti aa kɩya rɛ. Ʋ daga anɩɩ ʋ yaa nal aa kaŋ yellii rɛ beewɩya ma naa ɛɛ ʋ aa kyiyeli ŋ nɛ, a kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ anɩɩ biye bee ʋ kuwo aa kɩ tʋma gɛɛ.

english_verse: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaŋ ko gyɩŋ ɛɛ wɩya aa sɩ kɩɩ ŋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ sɩ tɩma ʋ dɩ ʋ ko ma lee.

english_verse: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
translation_verse: Ŋ laa di rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ŋ tɩɩ mɛ ko ma lee kyɛɛ no buloŋ.

english_verse: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ naa anɩɩ ʋ maga dɩ ŋ tɩŋ á nɩɩnabiye Ɛpafuroditu rɛ dɩ ʋ ko ma lee. Ʋ yaa ŋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋ nɛ, a pɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ á kɩ lʋga dɩ nala gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Mamaa rɛ tɩma ʋ, ʋ ko ŋ lee a pɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ abee wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kyɛ.

english_verse: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
translation_verse: Ma buloŋ wɩya kyɩl ʋ rɛ ʋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ ko na ma, amɛ ʋ tɩya kyogo rɛ akuu ma aa nɩya anɩɩ ʋ fa aa bɩ kaŋ laaŋfɩya wɩya.

english_verse: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ kɛ, ʋ wɩɩla hʋ fa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ nɛ weliŋ. Ʋ fa kaa mʋhʋ ka dɩ ʋ fa sʋba, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ fá ʋ sikii rɛ a leŋ ʋ na laaŋfɩya. Wɩɩsɩ fa ŋ sikii mɛ rɛ ʋ aa bɩ leŋ ʋ sʋba beewɩya dɩ ʋ rɛ fa sʋba ŋ tɩya fa sɩ marɩ kyogi rɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ sɩɩ fɩyɛsa rɛ weliŋ dɩ ŋ ta ʋ dɩ ʋ ko ma lee. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko dɩ ma bɩl na ʋ, ma tenni bɩl sɩ fɩyɛlɩ, ka dɩ ŋ tɩkyogi hʋ mɛ teŋ.

english_verse: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa ma nɩɩnabiye rɛ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ wɩya, ma laa ʋ bee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ a kana ʋ weliŋ. Ma kɩ tɩya nala no iriŋ gyɩrɩma.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, wɩkaalɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kyɛ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma rɛ nyɛ: Ma kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ akuu ma bee Yesu Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya. Ŋ laa sɩya basɩ wɩya no tɩya ma rɛ, aŋ bɩl sabɩ ba tɩɩ kɩ tɩya ma nyɛ. Amɛ gɛɛ bɩ yaa ŋ dɔgɩsɩɩ mʋhʋ buloŋ. Amɛ ma kɛ, wɩya no sɩ marɩ pɔ ma dɩ ma sɩŋ ma laadii tɩyaŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
translation_verse: Ma pɔ ma tɩɩma weliŋ abee haŋ nɩbɔmɔ hʋ, haŋ bisiŋ nala hʋ aa hara pɔ ma dɩ ma keri ma pene hʋ.

english_verse: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ámaa rɛ paalɩ yaa nala hʋ aa keri á pene, beewɩya á kɛ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ nyʋwa rɛ a kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ka á tenni fɩyɛlɩ, á kɩ gyʋwɔsɩ akuu á bee Yesu Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya. Á kɛ bɩ kyɩla nala pene keri wɩya, beewɩya ʋ yaa nihuwobisi teŋbii wɩkanɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ba aa lʋla ŋ, ʋ kyɛyɛ kyori kyɛɛ rɛ ba keri ŋ peŋ. Ŋ yaa Iziral tɩɩna tɩɩtɩɩ rɛ, a lɩɩ Bɛngyamin doho nala tɩyaŋ. Ŋ naa bee ŋ kuwo buloŋ yaa Hiiburu tɩmma rɛ. Dɩ Gyuuma mɩrɩsɩ hʋ tɩŋɩɩ mɛ rɛ, ŋ fa yaa Farasii rɛ, a kɩ tɩŋ ba kyurrr.

english_verse: But Christ has shown me that what I once thought was valuable is worthless.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩya hʋ ŋ fa aa bɩɩna anɩɩ ba kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya ŋ, lagɩlagɩ no Krisita wɩya ŋ kpaa ba nɩɩ ba yaa wɩtɔɔnɩ rɛ.

english_verse: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
translation_verse: dɩ ŋ beel-ʋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Tɩpʋlʋŋ no ŋ aa kana, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ŋ tɩɩ rɛ lʋga a kana ʋ. Ʋ bɩl bɩ kɩɩ Gyuuma mɩrɩsɩ hʋ mɛ rɛ ŋ tɩŋa a kana ʋ. Amɛ ŋ aa laa Krisita wɩya di tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ tɩŋa a kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
translation_verse: Ŋ wɩkyɛɛlɩɩ buloŋ nɛ yaa dɩ ŋ gyɩŋ Yesu Krisita, a na dee hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa kyisi ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a na tʋwara hʋ ʋ aa naa, ka dɩ ŋ mɛ sʋba wɩɩ hʋ wɩya ʋ aa sʋba.

english_verse: so that somehow I also may be raised to life. Running toward the Goal
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ bayɩyɛla rɛ yaa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ maakyiye kyisi ŋ mɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Ma kpa ma sɩya we wɩɩ hʋ aa we ma sɩya tɩyaŋ

english_verse: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
translation_verse: Wɩya no wɩya ŋ aa basɩ nyɛ, ɛɛ bɩ daga anɩɩ ŋ kɛ teŋ naa ba buloŋ nɛ. Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ŋ yaa nal bɩl aa bɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ mɛ. Amɛ ŋ mɛ ha aa lʋgɩ rɛ abee sɩfɩyaŋ dɩ ŋ wuwo na kɩŋ hʋ wɩya Yesu Krisita aa yɩrɩ ŋ a laa ŋ tɩŋa.

english_verse: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa lʋgɩ rɛ dɩ ŋ noŋ gyʋʋ kɩŋ hʋ aa we ŋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, ɛɛwɩya ŋ bɩl bɩ gal kɩ daasɩ hal. Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ mʋ pele doŋ nɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a laa ŋ we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ɛɛ wɩya rɛ ʋ yɩrɩ ŋ.

english_verse: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
translation_verse: Á nala hʋ buloŋ aa gyige Krisita wɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ maga dɩ a kaŋ hakɩla no iriŋ nɛ. Amɛ dɩ ma badɔmɔŋ nɛ kaŋ hakɩldʋma, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ suri ma hakɩllɩ dɩ ma gyɩŋ wɩɩ no memii weliŋ.

english_verse: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ba kyo ba kɩɩ gɛɛ buloŋ mɛ, ma leŋ dɩ á kɩ tɩŋ wɩya hʋ á aa tɩŋ a ko pele gyɩnaŋ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ma buloŋ kɩ kyesi ŋ wɩyaalɩya. Ŋmanɩɩ hʋ aa maga dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋa rɛ á kɩ daga ma gɛɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma kɩ kyesi nala hʋ aa tɩŋ wɩya hʋ á aa daga ma.

english_verse: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
translation_verse: Ba lɩmʋtenii buloŋ nɛ yaa diŋ, beewɩya ba dʋŋʋ wɩyaalɩya rɛ yaa ba wɩɩsɩ. Wɩya hʋ aa maga dɩ ʋ yaa ba hɩɩsɩ, ba wɩya rɛ ba aa kɩ gyɩgɩsɩ ba tɩɩ, ka ba hakɩllɩ buloŋ we dʋnɩya no kɩna dʋŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
translation_verse: Amɛ á kɛ yaa wɩɩsɩbee nala rɛ, a hɔŋ kɩ gyegili á Laataal, á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita abee teŋkyel dɩ ʋ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko.

english_verse: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya ŋ naabiikpɩyanama, nyɛ rɛ ʋ maga dɩ ma sɩŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu wɩya hʋ ma laa di tɩyaŋ a kaŋ kpaŋkpaŋ. Ŋ kyo ma wɩya rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, ma wɩya dɔbɔ ŋ bembii tɩyaŋ nɛ weliŋ. Ma nyubaanɩŋ, ŋ teŋ fɩyɛla rɛ weliŋ beewɩya mamaa rɛ ŋ kaŋ kɩ daga ŋ tɩɩ.

english_verse: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Yuwodɩya abee Siŋtike, ŋ aa sʋla ma, ma yaa kuwokeri aŋ marɩ dɔmɔŋ, beewɩya ma yaa nɩmmabalɩya rɛ á Tɩɩna Yesu nyubaanɩŋ.

english_verse: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
translation_verse: Ka ɩ, ŋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋtɩɩna hʋ aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ pɛ haana no tɩyaŋ nɛ dɩ ba marɩ dɔmɔŋ, beewɩya ba pɛɛ ŋ bee Kɩlɛmɛŋtɩ abee ŋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋtɩŋsɩ nɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ abee sɩfɩyaŋ a tɩya nala. Nala no buloŋ fene rɛ wee Wɩɩsɩ teŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ nala aa kaŋ mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii fene aa we.

english_verse: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ ma sɩya fɩyɛlɩ nal buloŋ lee, beewɩya saŋa hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko kpaga rɛ.

english_verse: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ kɩŋ buloŋ wɩya kɩ dɔŋ ma, amɛ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ ma kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, a sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ tɩya ma kɩŋ hʋ buloŋ ma aa kyɛ, aŋ pɛ kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ aŋgyʋwasʋ.

english_verse: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa nyɛ, Wɩɩsɩ fɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ aa tee nihuwobiŋ gyɩmaa sɩ we ma lee dɩ ma hakɩllɩ bee ma tɩbɩɩna buloŋ pɩŋ lɩdɩgɩ akuu ma bee Yesu Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya.

english_verse: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa basɩ tɩya ma, abee wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa daga ma, abee wɩya hʋ buloŋ ma aa gʋnna ŋ lee, abee wɩya hʋ buloŋ ma aa na dɩ ŋ aa yaa, ma kaŋ ba kɩ tʋŋ tʋma. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, Wɩɩsɩ, nal hʋ aa tɩya nala fɩyɛlʋʋ, sɩ we ma lee. Pɔɔl kyʋwalɩ Filipi tɩmma aŋgyʋwasʋ

english_verse: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ, beewɩya nyɛ kɛ ma bɩl daga anɩɩ ma ha kɔnɩ aa liisi ŋ wɩya rɛ. Faafaa hʋ buloŋ ma fa aa bɩɩnɩ ŋ wɩya rɛ. Amɛ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ ma gyɩ bɩ naa dɩ ma daga kyori hʋ ma aa kana abeel-ŋ.

english_verse: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa basɩ wɩya no, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ kɩŋ nɛ ŋ kyɛ lɔlɔ, beewɩya ŋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ ŋ leŋ ŋ sii su kɩŋ buloŋ ŋ aa kana rɛ.

english_verse: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩŋ gɛɛ ʋ aa kɩɩ rɛ, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ kaŋ kɩŋ koo dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ bɩ kaŋ kɩŋ. Ŋ gʋnnɩ wɩya no buloŋ nɛ ŋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ŋ vɔgɔ koo dɩ losi kana ŋ, dɩ ŋ kaŋ yʋga koo dɩ ŋ kaŋ mʋhʋ, ka ɛɛ aa maga ŋ nɛ.

english_verse: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ yaa wɩwelii rɛ ma aa pɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ ŋ wɩgyʋʋlɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
translation_verse: Mamaa Filipi tɩmma, ma tɩɩ gyɩma anɩɩ buŋbuŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ ŋ aa lɩɩ Masidooniya paalʋʋ a piili kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ weliye hʋ, ma dʋŋ nɛ yaa Krisitabiisi hʋ aa pɛɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ. Krisitabiye buloŋ bɩ pɛɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ see ma dʋŋ.

english_verse: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
translation_verse: Ŋ fa aa we Tesaloniika tɩyaŋ mɛ, ma pɛɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ bʋlɩya bʋlɩya abee kɩna hʋ ŋ aa kyɛɛ.

english_verse: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ kɩna rɛ ŋ kɩ kyɛ ma lee, amɛ tɔnɔ hʋ ma aa sɩ na Wɩɩsɩ lee akuu ma aa tɩya ŋ kɩna no, ʋ rɛ ŋ kɩ deŋ.

english_verse: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Ma aa tɩŋ Ɛpafuroditu, ʋ kaŋ kɩna hʋ ko tɩya ŋ, lagɩlagɩ no ŋ kaŋ kɩŋ buloŋ ŋ aa kyɛ rɛ. Ba gba yʋga parɩ rɛ. Kɩna hʋ ma aa kpaa tɩya ŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kɩna sʋwala aa sʋma ba kpa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ laa abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ.

english_verse: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ hʋ ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ kaŋ kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ nɛ a mʋ parɩ. Ɛɛwɩya ʋ sɩ tɩya ma ma kɩkyɛɛlɩya buloŋ akuu ma bee Yesu Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya.

english_verse: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á kɩ dannɩ á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ. Amɩ Kyʋwala

english_verse: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ ma Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ buloŋ aa we doŋ tɩyaŋ. Á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ aa we daha mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma.

english_verse: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ buloŋ aa we daha mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma, amarɩkpatɩya ba nala hʋ aa we kuworibal hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Siiza dɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless your life!
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ sɩ we ma buloŋ lee.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl aa yaa Yesu Krisita Kpambɩya Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ abee á nɩɩnabiye Timoti rɛ saba teŋ no kɩ tɩya ma.

english_verse: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
translation_verse: Á sabɩ teŋ no kɩ tɩya mamaa á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya Kolosi tɩyaŋ ma laa Krisita wɩya di a kɩ tɩŋa ʋ abee wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ abee ʋ fɩyɛlʋʋ sɩ we ma lee. Pɔɔl kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ

english_verse: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ ko kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma kɛ buloŋ á aa kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita kuwo hʋ rɛ ma wɩya.

english_verse: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
translation_verse: Beewɩya á nɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ ma aa laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di rɛ, abee kyori hʋ ma aa kana abee Wɩɩsɩ nala buloŋ.

english_verse: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
translation_verse: Laadii hʋ bee kyori hʋ ma aa kana, ba lɩɩ bayɩyɛla hʋ ma aa kana kɩŋ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa marɩ biŋ ma wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ba gyɩ laasɩya basɩ bayɩyɛla no wɩya tɩya ma rɛ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ aa yaa wɩtɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ ba aa ko basɩ tɩya ma pɩsa kɩ gyʋʋ dʋnɩya logiŋ buloŋ nɛ, a leŋ nala bɩrɩmɩ kɩ lɩɩ ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ ba aa yaa ma tɩyaŋ a lɩɩ kyɛɛ hʋ ma aa nɩɩ wɩya no, a kɔnɩ ko gyɩŋ bɔnyɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa daga tɩya ma memii mʋ teŋ.

english_verse: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
translation_verse: Ʋ basɩ tɩya ma gɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa leŋ ma kyo Wɩɩsɩ nala buloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, a lɩɩ kyɛɛ hʋ á aa nɩɩ ma wɩya, á aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ saŋa buloŋ. Á sʋla Wɩɩsɩ a kɩ tɩya ma rɛ dɩ ʋ leŋ ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩya ma wɩgyʋŋ dɩ ma wuwo gyɩŋ ʋ kyɛrɩ a wuwo gyɩŋ ʋ wɩya buloŋ memii mɛ.

english_verse: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛɛ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ ma tɩyaŋ ka dɩ ma kɩ yaa wɩweliye iriŋ kɛ buloŋ a marɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ weliŋ.

english_verse: His glorious power will make you patient and strong enough to endure anything, and you will be truly happy.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tɩya ma dee hʋ aa lɩɩ ʋ gaŋdaa-dee hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ma wuwo kaŋ kenyiri abee mala abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ abee ʋ aa leŋ ma mɛ maga abee ma aa sɩ na kɩna hʋ ʋ aa mara biŋ pɔ ʋ nala ʋ koro hʋ aa yaa pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
translation_verse: Beewɩya ʋ laa ma lɩɩ Sɩtaanɩ bilhuu tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kaŋ ma mʋ we ʋ biikyoolii koro hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Christ is exactly like God, who cannot be seen. He is the first-born Son, superior to all creation.
translation_verse: Krisita kɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ á aa bee na rɛ. Ʋ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ aa we doŋ ka ʋ na ta kɩŋ buloŋ. Ʋ rɛ tee Wɩɩsɩ kɩtaalɩya buloŋ.

english_verse: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
translation_verse: Ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋa a marɩ kɩŋ buloŋ aa we wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha tɩyaŋ: Kɩna hʋ á aa na abee kɩna á aa bee na, abee kɩna hʋ á aa bee na ka ba kaŋ dee a kɩ deŋ leye, abee dee iriŋ buloŋ. Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋa a marɩ kɩna buloŋ a leŋ ʋ tɩŋ ba.

english_verse: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
translation_verse: Ʋ we doŋ nɛ ka Wɩɩsɩ na marɩ kɩŋ buloŋ. Ʋ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ kɩtaalɩya buloŋ we doŋ a sɩŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
translation_verse: Krisita rɛ yaa Krisitabiisi buloŋ nyuu, ka ba mɛ yaa ʋ teŋbii, ʋ kɩ deŋ ba. Ʋ rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa tɩya ba mɩɩbol. Ʋ rɛ yaa nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa laasɩya kyisi sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ɛɛ leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa kunyɩna wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ leŋ Krisita kɩɩ ʋ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
translation_verse: Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋa a leŋ ʋ bee ʋ kɩtaalɩya aa we wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha tɩyaŋ buloŋ mɩɩgɩ sʋma. Krisita aa sʋba daagarɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ leŋ fɩyɛlʋʋ mɩɩgɩ we Wɩɩsɩ bee ʋ kɩtaalɩya buloŋ paga.

english_verse: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ ma ha fa aa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ, ma beel-ʋ fa boliye bee dɔmɔŋ nɛ, ma fa haasɩ ʋ beewɩya ma hakɩllɩ bee ma wɩyaalɩya buloŋ fa bɔmɔ rɛ.

english_verse: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
translation_verse: Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, Wɩɩsɩ leŋ Krisita bɩrɩmɩ nihuwobiŋ nɛ a ko sʋba daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ dɩ ɛɛ leŋ dɩ ma beel-ʋ mɩɩgɩ sʋma, ka dɩ ma yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma, a ta kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma sɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ ma aa laa di tɩyaŋ weliŋ, aŋ ta kɩ yaa sige abee bayɩyɛla hʋ ma aa kana ba tɩyaŋ saŋa hʋ ma aa nɩɩ ba. Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye no tɩɩ rɛ ba gɔllɩ basɩ kɩ tɩya nala buloŋ dʋnɩya lee buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ba wɩya rɛ mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl tɩɩ mɛ yaa Yesu Krisita tʋŋtʋnnɩ, a basɩ ba kɩ tɩya nala. Tʋma hʋ Pɔɔl aa tʋma tɩya nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di

english_verse: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no, ŋ teŋ fɩyɛla rɛ abee tʋwara hʋ ŋ aa na ma wɩya, beewɩya ɛɛ daga anɩɩ tʋwara hʋ Krisita fa aa na ʋ teŋbii wɩya aŋka , haŋ tʋwara hʋ rɛ ŋ mɛ kyosi kɩ na ŋ tol gɛɛ dɩ ʋ mʋ teŋ.

english_verse: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ rɛ lɩɩ ŋ dɩ ŋ yaa Krisitabiisi buloŋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ. Tʋma hʋ ʋ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ nɛ yaa dɩ ŋ basɩ ʋ wɩya hʋ buloŋ a tɩya ma.

english_verse: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ fa kpaa wɩya no faŋa faafaa nala rɛ a lɩɩ faafaa buloŋ. Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no Wɩɩsɩ kpa wɩya no daga ʋ nala hʋ ʋ aa lɩya rɛ.

english_verse: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ rɛ yaa dɩ ʋ leŋ ʋ nala buloŋ gyɩŋ wɩfaŋɩɩ no aa yaa gaŋdaa-wɩɩ, aŋ kaŋ tɔnɔ mɛ. Wɩɩ hʋ rɛ nyɛ, Krisita aa we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ tɩŋ ma mɛ kaŋ bayɩyɛla anɩɩ ma sɩ maakyiye yaa gaŋdaala.

english_verse: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, wɩɩ no wɩya ŋ aa yaa ŋ sɩfɩyaŋ buloŋ nɛ, a kɩ tʋma abee ʋ debal hʋ buloŋ aa we ŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩŋ gɛɛ hʋ ŋ aa lʋga ma wɩya rɛ abee Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Lawudisɩya tɩyaŋ buloŋ a gba bee nala hʋ buloŋ ha aa bɩ naa ŋ bee ba sɩɩ.

english_verse: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
translation_verse: Ŋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ ma buloŋ tenni polli, dɩ ma bembiye mɛ pɩŋ lɩdɩgɩ ka dɩ ma kaŋ nyʋʋdɩgɩ abee kyori. Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ ma gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa kpaa faŋa ma memii weliŋ aŋ na wɩweliye hʋ buloŋ aa we ʋ tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ no rɛ yaa Yesu Krisita tɩɩ.

english_verse: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, ŋ basɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma rɛ dɩ nal buloŋ ta wuwo kpa dʋnɩya no nyʋʋpɩŋsʋŋ a mʋrɩ ma dɩ ma nyʋgɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
translation_verse: Abee ŋ aa tuwo ma lee nyɛ mɛ ka ŋ hakɩla we ma tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ŋ teŋ mɛ fɩyɛla rɛ kɩŋkaŋ abee á aa nɩya gɛɛ hʋ ma aa kaŋ ma tɩɩ weliŋ abee gɛɛ hʋ ma aa laa Yesu wɩya di aŋ sɩŋ ba tɩyaŋ kpaŋkpaŋ. Mɩɩbofalɩɩ hʋ á aa kana Krisita tɩyaŋ

english_verse: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Ma kpa ma wɩɩ buloŋ tɩya Yesu Krisita aŋ yelli ʋ ma wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ma sɩŋ ma laadii tɩyaŋ weliŋ anɩɩ ba aa daga ma gɛɛ aŋ pɛ kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ mɛ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
translation_verse: Ma pɔ weliŋ a ta leŋ dɩ nal buloŋ kpa dʋnɩya wɩgyʋŋ abee wɩya hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ a mʋrɩ ma. Beewɩya wɩya no buloŋ yaa nihuwobisi lesiriye abee dʋnɩya wɩkanɩya rɛ, ba bɩ lɩɩ Krisita lee.

english_verse: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
translation_verse: Ka ma bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ ma mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ wɩya, ʋ kɩɩlʋŋ we ma tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ʋ rɛ tee dee buloŋ aa we wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
translation_verse: Ba aa foo ma wɩɩkyʋwalnɩɩ hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ma bee Krisita buloŋ nɛ ba hogo gɛɛ, ka ba bɩl mɩɩgɩ kyisi ma beel-ʋ buloŋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ akuu laadii hʋ ma aa kana Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa kpaa ʋ debal hʋ kyisi Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya.

english_verse: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
translation_verse: Krisita aa sʋba daagarɩɩ hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ dɩsɩ á kyɩma hʋ buloŋ ba aa magɩla biŋ ta rɛ, abee mɩrɩsɩ hʋ buloŋ fa aa kpaa kyogisi kɩ tɩya ma. Krisita kpaa ba buloŋ nɛ a kpaasɩ a mal daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ nal buloŋ biŋ kɩdiiliye koo kɩnyʋwalɩya koo kyɛbala koo peŋsi dii sɩŋsɩ koo Kyɛwiyesii kyɛɛ sɩŋsɩ tɩya ma.

english_verse: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
translation_verse: Wɩya no yaa wɩya fa aa sɩ maakyiye yaa daaliiŋ nɛ. Amɛ Krisita rɛ yaa wɩya no buloŋ wɩtɩɩ.

english_verse: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
translation_verse: Ba bɩl bɩ mal Krisita tɩyaŋ mɛ, nal hʋ aa yaa Krisitabiisi buloŋ nyuu. Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ á nala hʋ buloŋ aa yaa ʋ teŋbii tɩŋa a kɩ na á dee, a mal dɔmɔŋ gɛɛ anɩɩ ɛɛ hʋ nihuwobiŋ teŋbii lɩkyosiye bee ʋ polo aa mal dɔmɔŋ, a kɩ waa ɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛɛ.

english_verse: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
translation_verse: Krisita aa sʋba daagarɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ma beel-ʋ buloŋ nɛ sʋba gɛɛ. Ɛɛ wɩya, dʋnɩya no wɩkanɩya bɩl bɩ kaŋ dee ma nyuu tɩyaŋ. Bee rɛ yaŋ tɩŋ ma kɩ yaa wɩya anɩɩ ma ha aa tɩŋ dʋnɩya ŋmanɩɩ rɛ aŋ kpa ma sɩya we dʋnɩya sɩŋsɩ no tɩyaŋ. Sɩŋsɩ no aa daga anɩɩ:

english_verse: “Don't handle this. Don't taste that. Don't touch this.”?
translation_verse: “Ta kolo kɩŋ no”, “Ta dii kɩŋ no”, “Ta dige kɩŋ no.”

english_verse: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ aa maakyiye ba ko yaa waasʋ rɛ. Beewɩya ba yaa nihuwobisi wɩbiniye abee ba wɩdagɩya rɛ.

english_verse: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ deŋe ɩ aa baa wɩgyʋŋ kɩdɩgɩ we wɩya no tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Amɛ wɩgyʋŋ pɛgɩ mɛ tuwo wɩya no tɩyaŋ. Ba sɩfɩyaŋ buloŋ we kɩna hʋ ba aa kyʋwalɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ aŋ aa fugo kaŋ ba tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ aŋ kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ba tɩɩ teŋbii mɛ. Amɛ wɩya no buloŋ bɩ kaŋ dee ba aa sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ nala vɩya ba teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya yayɩ.

english_verse: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
translation_verse: Akuu Wɩɩsɩ aa kyisi ma, ma kaŋ mɩɩbofalɩɩ no anɩɩ gɛɛ ʋ aa kyisi Krisita mɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ, ma leŋ dɩ ma hakɩllɩ buloŋ we kɩna hʋ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ, lee hʋ Krisita aa hɔŋ ʋ kuworikpasa tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ noduu logiŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
translation_verse: Ma kpa ma hakɩllɩ we kɩna hʋ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ, aŋ ta kpaa ma sɩya we dʋnɩya wɩkanɩya tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
translation_verse: beewɩya ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ma aa sʋba ka ma mɩɩbol faŋa Krisita lee wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
translation_verse: Krisita rɛ yaa ma mɩɩbol, ɛɛwɩya, saŋa hʋ ʋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko, ma mɛ sɩ pɛ ʋ tɩyaŋ a di ʋ gaŋdarɩ hʋ.

english_verse: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
translation_verse: Ma kpʋ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ buloŋ nihuwobisi aa yaa dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ a ta ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Ma leŋ sɔŋsɔŋ, a leŋ bisiŋ wɩya yayɩ. Ma ta kyo haana koo baala kɩŋkaŋ, a ta kɩ bɩɩnɩ wɩbɔmɔ mɛ ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Ma ta kaŋ tɩbal, beewɩya nal hʋ aa kaŋ tɩbal ʋ bee nal hʋ aa marɩ vʋga buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ sɩ na baaŋ nala hʋ aa yaa wɩya no nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ dʋnɩya wɩkanɩya no ha fa aa kaŋ dee ma nyuu tɩyaŋ, wɩya no tɩɩ bee ba nyuu rɛ ma mɛ fa kɩ yaa.

english_verse: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Amɛ nyɛ kɛ, ʋ maga dɩ ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩ wɩya no buloŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ma leŋ baaŋ nayɩ, a leŋ dɔmɔŋ fene kyogii, a ta kaŋ tahaa, aŋ leŋ wɩlaama basɩɩ mɛ.

english_verse: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
translation_verse: Ma ta bɩl nyɩya wɩya kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ, beewɩya nyɛ kɛ ma kpaa ma mɩɩbobɩnɩɩ hʋ bee ʋ wɩkanɩya buloŋ ta rɛ,

english_verse: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
translation_verse: aŋ kaŋ mɩɩbofalɩɩ hʋ Krisita aa kpaa tɩya ma. Ɛɛwɩya, Wɩɩsɩ leŋ mɩɩbofalɩɩ hʋ aa we ma tɩyaŋ kɩ bɩrɩgɩ rɛ saŋa buloŋ dɩ ma ko kɩɩ ʋ a gyɩma ʋ weliŋ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ nal yaa Gyuu koo dɩ ʋ bɩ yaa Gyuu, dɩ nal keri ʋ peŋ koo dɩ ʋ bɩ keri ʋ peŋ, dɩ nal yaa yoŋ koo dɩ ʋ tɩɩna tɩŋa ʋ tɩɩ, dɩ nal yaa nɩhʋwal koo dɩ ʋ yaa beebiye, dɩ nal yaa sɩpolli tɩɩna koo dɩ ʋ yaa nɩgʋra, wɩya no buloŋ bɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ. Amɛ wɩɩ aa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ rɛ yaa nal buloŋ bɩl tuwo a maga Krisita, ʋ mɛ rɛ yaŋ we á buloŋ tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ fɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ Yesu Krisita aa tɩya ma we ma hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ saŋa buloŋ. Fɩyɛlʋʋ no wɩya rɛ Wɩɩsɩ yɩrɩ ma, ma yaa kɩdɩgɩ. Ɛɛwɩya ma kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ Krisita wɩya hʋ buloŋ we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ weliŋ. Ma kɩ kʋrɩsɩ dɔmɔŋ dɩgɩna a kɩ daga dɔmɔŋ abee wɩgyʋŋ. Ma yɩɩ wɩɩkyʋwalyɩɩla a kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Wɩɩ buloŋ ma aa yaa abee wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ ma aa basɩ, ma kɩ yaa ba buloŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu feŋ tɩyaŋ, aŋ tɩŋ ʋ tɩyaŋ a kɩ kyʋwalɩ á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ. Ɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ nala aa maga dɩ ba kɩ yaa dɔmɔŋ

english_verse: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Haana, ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ ma balama lee, beewɩya, ɛɛ rɛ maga dɩ nala hʋ aa tɩŋ Krisita kɩ yaa.

english_verse: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
translation_verse: Baala, ma mɛ kyo ma haana, aŋ ta hoye beel-ba.

english_verse: Children must always obey their parents. This pleases the Lord.
translation_verse: Biisi, ma kɩ tɩŋ ma kuwoma abee ma nɩmma nyʋwa wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ɛɛ rɛ aa fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
translation_verse: Kuwoma, ma ta kɩ dɔŋ ma biisi kɩŋkaŋ dɩ ba lɔgɩ ko lɩɩ.

english_verse: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
translation_verse: Yosi, ma kɩ tɩŋ ma tɩmma nyʋwa wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ aŋ ta kuu ba aa deŋ ma wɩya, koo ma aa kyɛ dɩ ma yaa laa gyaaŋbiye dʋŋ wɩya a kɩ tɩŋ ba nyʋwa. Amɛ ma kɩ yaa gɛɛ abee tɩdɩgɩ akuu ma aa fá Wɩɩsɩ wɩya.

english_verse: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
translation_verse: Tʋma hʋ buloŋ ma aa tʋŋ, ma kɩ tʋma abee tɩdɩgɩ anɩɩ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ rɛ ma tʋma kɩ tɩya, nihuwobiŋ daa ma tʋma kɩ tɩya.

english_verse: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
translation_verse: Ma ta yeŋŋe anɩɩ á Tɩɩna Krisita rɛ ma tʋma kɩ tɩya. Ɛɛwɩya, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa kɩna hʋ ʋ aa mara biŋ ʋ nala wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ a tuŋ ma.

english_verse: But Christ has no favorites! He will punish evil people, just as they deserve.
translation_verse: Wɩbɔŋyaala mɛ sɩ laa ba tuno a maga ba wɩbɔmɔ hʋ ba aa yaa, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ bee lugisi nala.

english_verse: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
translation_verse: Yosi tɩmma, ma kɩ tɩŋ wɩtɩɩ, a gyɩŋ tɩya ma tɩɩ abee wɩya hʋ ma aa kpaa kɩ yaa ma yosi. Ma ta yeŋŋe anɩɩ ma mɛ kaŋ Tɩɩna rɛ wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
translation_verse: Ma pɛ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma mɛ, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ suri ŋmanɩɩ tɩya ma dɩ á wuwo basɩ Krisita wɩya hʋ fa aa yaa wɩfaŋɩya a tɩya nala. Wɩya no wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ba kana ŋ tɔ nitɔdɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ŋ dɩ ŋ wuwo basɩ wɩya no polli weliŋ anɩɩ gɛɛ aa maga dɩ ŋ basɩ.

english_verse: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ ma wɩbasɩɩ buloŋ sʋma aŋ kaŋ tɔnɔ, ka dɩ ma gyɩŋ gɛɛ ma aa sɩ yaa a lɩɩ wɩya sɩya tɩya nal buloŋ. Kyʋwala

english_verse: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
translation_verse: Takikusi sɩ basɩ ŋ wɩkanɩɩ buloŋ tɩya ma. Ʋ yaa á nɩɩnabiikyoolii rɛ, a yaa Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ wɩtɩɩ tɩɩna mɛ, a yaa á tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋtɩɩna mɛ Krisita tʋma hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa tɩma ʋ rɛ ma lee dɩ ʋ leŋ ma gyɩŋ gɛɛ ba aa kɩya á tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ ʋ basɩ wɩya tɩya ma dɩ ma tenni polli.

english_verse: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
translation_verse: Ʋ bee Oniisimu rɛ aa ko. Ʋ mɛ yaa á nɩɩnabiikyoolii aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ, a yaa ma kɩdɩgɩ mɛ. Ba sɩ basɩ wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ aa yaa daha a tɩya ma.

english_verse: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
translation_verse: Arisitaakusi aa kyʋwalɩ ma. Ŋ beel-ʋ buloŋ nɛ ba kaŋ tɔ nɩtɔdɩyaŋ daha. Banabaasɩ nɩɩnabiibaal Maakɩ mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma. Ŋ laasɩya basɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ dɩ ʋ rɛ ko maakyiye ko ma lee, ma kana ʋ weliŋ.

english_verse: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
translation_verse: Gyoosʋwa, nal hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Gyusitu, mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma. Ba nala no boto dʋŋ nɛ yaa Gyuuma, a pɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ á kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ koro hʋ wɩya. Ba leŋ ŋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ rɛ weliŋ.

english_verse: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
translation_verse: Ɛpafirasɩ mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma. Ʋ mɛ yaa Yesu Krisita tʋŋtʋnnɩ rɛ a yaa ma kɩdɩgɩ mɛ. Ʋ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ abee sɩfɩyasɩ saŋa buloŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ma sɩŋ weliŋ a gyige ma Wɩɩsɩ laadii tɩyaŋ a gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya weliŋ a kɩ yaa ʋ kyɛrɩ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
translation_verse: Ŋ tɩɩ gyɩŋ gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa kpaa ʋ dee buloŋ tʋma kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, abee nala hʋ buloŋ aa we Lawudisɩya abee Hiirapolisi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
translation_verse: Á kyaŋkyoolii Luka aa yaa dɔgɩtɔ abee Dimasɩ buloŋ mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma.

english_verse: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ buloŋ aa we Lawudisɩya tɩyaŋ abee a nɩɩnatoluu Nimfa, abee á nɩmmabalɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ buloŋ aa laŋŋɩ ʋ dɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
translation_verse: Dɩ ma ko karɩmɩ teŋ no teŋ, ma leŋ dɩ ba karɩmɩ ʋ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ aa we Lawudisɩya tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ ma mɛ laa teŋ hʋ ŋ aa saba tɩya Lawudisɩya nala a mɛ karɩmɩ.

english_verse: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
translation_verse: Ma basɩ tɩya Akipu dɩ ʋ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ aŋ teŋ tʋma hʋ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ʋ dɩ ʋ tʋma.

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no, mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl tɩɩ kyʋwala rɛ nyɛ ŋ sabɩ kɩ tɩya ma abee ŋ tɩɩ noŋ-kɩsabɩya. Ma ta yeŋŋe anɩɩ ba kana ŋ tɔ dɩyaŋ nɛ. Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ sɩ we ma lee.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl abee Silaasi abee Timoti rɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ma Krisitabiisi hʋ buloŋ aa we Tesaloniika tɩyaŋ, a yaa á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita nala. Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ abee ʋ fɩyɛlʋʋ sɩ we ma lee.

english_verse: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
translation_verse: Saŋa kɛ buloŋ dɩ ámaa rɛ ko kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ á aa liisi ma wɩya rɛ a kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ aŋgyʋwasʋ.

english_verse: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, á gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kyo ma rɛ weliŋ, a lɩɩ ma dɩ ma yaa ʋ nala.

english_verse: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, á gyɩ aa ko basɩ Yesu Krisita wɩweliye hʋ tɩya ma, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ wɩbasɩɩ dʋŋ nɛ á gyɩ ko basɩ, amɛ á gyɩ daga Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee mɛ rɛ. Á gyɩ daga anɩɩ á kɔnɩ laa di rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ma gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ á gyɩ aa yaa rɛ saŋa hʋ á aa we ma lee. Ma wɩya rɛ tɩŋ á gyɩ yaa haŋ wɩya hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
translation_verse: Ma aa tɩŋ á bee á Tɩɩna Krisita naabʋʋsɩ rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya abee tʋwara hʋ buloŋ ma aa naa mɛ gba, ka ma ha laa Yesu Krisita wɩweliye hʋ di rɛ abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ aa lɩɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ lee.

english_verse: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma wɩyaalɩya rɛ nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di a we Masidooniya abee Akaaya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ kɩ kyesi.

english_verse: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
translation_verse: Ma wɩyaalɩya leŋ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ taalɩ Masidooniya abee Akaaya paalʋʋ buloŋ nɛ. Ʋ gɛɛ mɛ dʋŋ daa, lee buloŋ tɩyaŋ, ba aa basɩ gɛɛ hʋ ma aa laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, á kɛ bɩl bɩ kaŋ wɩɩ buloŋ á aa sɩ basɩ.

english_verse: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
translation_verse: Nala no tɩɩ aa basɩ gɛɛ hʋ ma aa kaŋ ma weliŋ nɛ saŋa hʋ á aa ko ma lee, abee ɛɛ hʋ ma aa vɩya ma vʋga marɩɩ, aŋ mɩɩgɩ ko kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa weye.

english_verse: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
translation_verse: Ba bɩl baa dɩ ma aa gyegili ʋ Biye Yesu rɛ nal hʋ ʋ aa kyise sʋʋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ mɩɩgɩ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko. Ʋ rɛ sɩ laa ma ta kyɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya abee baaŋ.

english_verse: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ma tɩɩ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ á doŋ koyi gyɩ bɩ yaa waasʋ.

english_verse: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
translation_verse: Ma gyɩŋ ɛɛ hʋ ba gyɩ aa dɔgɩsɩ ma rɛ, á tʋʋsɩ ma weliŋ Filipi tɩyaŋ aŋka á na wuwo ko ma lee Tesaloniika tɩyaŋ. Abee nala gyɩ aa pɔɔ kpaŋkpaŋ dɩ á ta basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ buloŋ mɛ, ka Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ leŋ á wuwo ko basɩ ʋ wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya ma rɛ aŋ bɩ fáá kambɩŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ nyʋʋpɩŋsʋŋ daa á kpa ko ma lee. Á bɩl bɩ ko dɩ á fugo basɩ wɩya mɛ a laa kɩŋ buloŋ ma lee. Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa á daŋsɩya tɩɩna.

english_verse: We were not trying to get you or anyone else to praise us.
translation_verse: Á bɩ ko ma lee a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma tɩɩ koo nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bigisi ma.

english_verse: But as apostles, we could have demanded help from you. After all, Christ is the one who sent us. We chose to be like children or like a mother nursing her baby.
translation_verse: Akuu á aa yaa Krisita kpambɩsɩ wɩya á fa aa wuwo á hɔŋ nɛ, ka dɩ ma yaa á wɩkyɛɛlɩya buloŋ kɩ tɩya ma, ka á gyɩ bɩ yaa gɛɛ. Amɛ á gyɩ leŋ á sɩya fɩyɛlɩ rɛ ma lee, anɩɩ haaŋ aa kɩ deŋ ʋ biisi nyuu abee sɩfɩyala gɛɛ.

english_verse: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
translation_verse: Á aa kyo ma wɩya, á tenni gyɩ fɩyɛla rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, á paalɩ kpa á tɩɩ tɩya ma, a pɛ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ á aa basɩ tɩya ma tɩyaŋ. Beewɩya, ma wɩya gyɩ kyɩl ma rɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ma tɩɩ gyɩma rɛ weliŋ anɩɩ saŋa hʋ á gyɩ aa ko dɩ á basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya ma, ma tɩɩ naa gɛɛ hʋ á gyɩ aa tʋŋ tʋma suwoli rɛ. Á gyɩ tʋma kyɛɛ bee ʋ nyʋwa buloŋ nɛ, dɩ á ta yaa kyʋga nal buloŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Mamaa Krisitabiisi hʋ abee Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa á daŋsɩya tɩmma anɩɩ saŋa hʋ á gyɩ aa we ma lee á wɩyaalɩya buloŋ gyɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ a kpa Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ mɛ a bɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ.

english_verse: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
translation_verse: Ma gyɩma anɩɩ á gyɩ kaŋ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ weliŋ anɩɩ biisi kuwo aa kaŋ ʋ biisi gɛɛ.

english_verse: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
translation_verse: Á gyɩ kyagɩlɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ dɩ ma wuwo tɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ aŋ pɛ basɩ teŋpolli wɩya mɛ tɩya ma buloŋ. Á kpaanɩ ma rɛ dɩ ma leŋ dɩ ma gyogo weliye Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yɩrɩ ma dɩ ma ko gyʋʋ ʋ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ aŋ pɛ di ʋ gaŋdarɩ mɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ma bee nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di a yaa Wɩɩsɩ nala a we Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Beewɩya tʋwara hʋ ba aa na, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ ma mɛ kɩ na. Ɛɛ hʋ Gyuuma aa yaŋ kɩ dɔgɩsɩ nala hʋ aa laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di a yaa Wɩɩsɩ nala Gyudɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ma mɛ kɩ na tʋwara ma bee nala tɩɩ nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
