translation_verse: Gyuuma no rɛ kpʋʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu abee Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ. Ba tɩɩ rɛ bɩl aa dɔgɩsɩ ma aŋ kil ma kɩ ta mɛ. Ba leŋ Wɩɩsɩ baaŋ kɩ sii rɛ kɩŋkaŋ ka ba bee nal buloŋ mɛ bɩ wuwo kɩ kpaga dɔmɔŋ. Ba bee yaa Wɩɩsɩ wɩkyɛɛlɩya.

english_verse: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
translation_verse: Beewɩya ba paalɩ pɔ rɛ dɩ á ta basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa ba ta. Nyɛ rɛ yaŋ marɩ leŋ ba wɩbɔmɔ yʋga ba tɩyaŋ. Lagɩlagɩ no kɛ Wɩɩsɩ yaŋ naa baaŋ nɛ ba nyuu tɩyaŋ. Pɔɔl kyo dɩ ʋ bɩl mɩɩgɩ mʋ na Tesaloniika tɩmma

english_verse: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ba aa leŋ á porigi dɔmɔŋ ʋ bɩ pɩɩsa. Abee aa bee na ma buloŋ, ka ma wɩya kyɩl ma rɛ kɩŋkaŋ á aa kɩ bɩɩnɩ ma wɩya saŋa buloŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, á aa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ nɛ, dɩ á fa bɩl ko na ma.

english_verse: You alone are our glory and joy!
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ma tɩyaŋ nɛ á teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ abee á bigisii buloŋ kɔnɩ we.

english_verse: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
translation_verse: Á aa lʋga lɔlɔ dɩ á fa ko na ma, ka ma wɩya mɛ kyɩl ma wɩya, ɛɛ rɛ á na anɩɩ á kɛ sɩ hɔŋ Atɛŋsi tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
translation_verse: ka dɩ á tɩŋ á nɩɩnabiye Timoti dɩ ʋ ko na ma. Á beel-ʋ buloŋ nɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnna, a basɩ Krisita wɩweliye hʋ a kɩ tɩya nala. Á tɩma ʋ rɛ dɩ ʋ ko basɩ wɩya tɩya ma dɩ ma marɩ sɩŋ wɩya hʋ ma aa laa di tɩyaŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
translation_verse: Dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ta ko bɩla hal akuu tʋwara hʋ ma aa na wɩya. Ma tɩɩ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ dɔgɩsɩɩ no ba aa dɔgɩsɩ ma nyɛ, buloŋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ wɩbiniye rɛ a tɩya ma.

english_verse: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
translation_verse: Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, Timoti aa lɩɩ ma lee ko, ʋ kaŋ duwosi-welii rɛ ko tɩya ma. Ʋ basɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ ma kaŋ wɩya hʋ ma aa laa di weliŋ nɛ, a kaŋ kyori mɛ. Ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ ma aa kɩ liisi á wɩya rɛ weliŋ saŋa kɛ buloŋ, a kyo dɩ ma na ma, anɩɩ á mɛ aa kyo dɩ á na ma gɛɛ.

english_verse: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya ŋ naabalɩya, abee tʋwara no bee wɩgyʋʋlɩya no buloŋ á aa na nyɛ amɛ á tenni ha pollo rɛ akuu laadii hʋ ma kana wɩya.

english_verse: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
translation_verse: Ma aa sɩŋ weliŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu wɩya hʋ ma aa laa di tɩyaŋ wɩya, nyɛ kɛ á dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ weyi kaŋ tɔnɔ rɛ.

english_verse: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
translation_verse: Á bɩ sɩ wuwo kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ ma wɩya. Á aa kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ weliŋ akuu teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ á aa kana ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ ma wɩya.

english_verse: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
translation_verse: Kyɛɛ bee ʋ nyʋwa buloŋ nɛ á aa kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ abee á tɩya buloŋ dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ á bɩl ko na ma, a kyiyeli ma dɩ ma marɩ sɩŋ wɩya hʋ ma laa di tɩyaŋ weliŋ a mʋ teŋ.

english_verse: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
translation_verse: Á aa sʋla á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu rɛ dɩ ba suri ŋmanɩɩ tɩya ma dɩ á bɩl ko ma lee.

english_verse: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
translation_verse: Á bɩl aa sʋla á Tɩɩna Yesu rɛ dɩ ʋ kyiyeli ma dɩ ma marɩ kyo dɔmɔŋ kɩŋkaŋ buloŋ, a kyo nal buloŋ mɛ weliŋ, anɩɩ á aa kyo ma gɛɛ.

english_verse: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu sɩ leŋ dɩ ma hakɩllɩ pɩŋ weliŋ, dɩ ma kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, a ta kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu bee ʋ nala buloŋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, wɩkaalɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kana dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma rɛ nyɛ; á daga ma wɩya hʋ ma aa sɩ kɩ yaa rɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ ma nyuu tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, á aa sʋla ma abee sɩfɩyasɩ, á Tɩɩna Yesu feŋ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ ɛɛ hʋ ma aa yaa wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ lagɩlagɩ no, ma marɩ kɩ yaa gɛɛ yʋga yʋga.

english_verse: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ma tɩɩ gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ á aa kpaa daga ma rɛ, á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita dee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ma yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma aa bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ aŋ lɩɩ ma tɩɩ sɔŋsɔŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
translation_verse: Ma ta tɩŋ ma tɩɩ teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ, a gɔllɩ kɩ yaa sɔŋsɔŋ wɩya anɩɩ nala aa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya wɩɩ no tɩyaŋ nal buloŋ ta yaa wɩɩ kyogi ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna, koo a firimi ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna. Á basɩ tɩya ma rɛ abee sɩfɩyasɩ faafaa buloŋ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ nala hʋ aa yaa bisiŋ wɩya no iriŋ.

english_verse: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya nal hʋ buloŋ aa vɩya wɩya no ŋ aa basa, nihuwobiŋ nyʋwa daa ʋ tɩɩna vɩya, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ, nal hʋ aa kpaa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ma tɩyaŋ, nyʋwa rɛ ʋ tɩɩna vɩya gɛɛ.

english_verse: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ ʋ bɩl bɩ maga dɩ ŋ sabɩ teŋ a basɩ tɩya ma gɛɛ hʋ ma aa sɩ kyo dɔmɔŋ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ daga ma gɛɛ aa maga dɩ ma kyo dɔmɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ma paalɩ kyo nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di a we Masidooniya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ nɛ. Ŋ naabalɩya, á yaŋ aa sʋl ma abee sɩfɩyasɩ rɛ dɩ ma marɩ kyo ba te gɛɛ.

english_verse: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ lʋga dɩ ma leŋ dɩ ma sɩya fɩyɛlɩ saŋa buloŋ, ka dɩ ma kpa ma nyuni we ma tɩɩ tʋma tɩyaŋ, a wuwo tʋma kɩ na ma kɩkyɛɛlɩya anɩɩ á aa laasɩya basɩ gɛɛ tɩya ma.

english_verse: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ nala hʋ aa bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di kɩ tɩya ma gyɩrɩma, ka ma ta bɩl hɔŋ gbal nal buloŋ mɛ dɩ ʋ tɩya ma ma kɩkyɛɛlɩya. Á Tɩɩna Yesu mɩɩgɩ koyi

english_verse: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, á aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ aa we nala aa sʋba lugo tɩyaŋ nɛ, dɩ ma tɩsɩ ta kyogo kɩŋkaŋ anɩɩ nala aa bɩ kaŋ bayɩyɛla.

english_verse: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
translation_verse: Á aa laa di anɩɩ Yesu sʋba aŋ mɩɩgɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ á laa di mɛ anɩɩ saŋa hʋ Yesu aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyisi nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di aŋ sʋba mɛ dɩ ba tɩŋa ʋ hal ko.

english_verse: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
translation_verse: Beewɩya á Tɩɩna Yesu tɩɩ aa maakyiye ʋ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee rɛ a ko a nɔsɩ basɩ wɩya. Malɩkasɩ nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ mɛ sɩ nɔsɩ basɩ wɩya, ka dɩ á nɩɩ dɩ ba mʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ kabɩl hʋ mɛ. Ɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laasɩya kyisi nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa Krisita wɩya di aŋ sʋba.

english_verse: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
translation_verse: Á nala hʋ mɛ ha aa we á mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ, ʋ sɩ kasɩ ma a pɛ nala hʋ ʋ aa kyise sʋʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ á buloŋ sii gyɩŋ kyeŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu taala tɩyaŋ a we ʋ lee a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: Encourage each other with these words.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma basɩ teŋpolli wɩya no a kɩ fɩyɛlɩ dɔmɔŋ bembiye.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, kyɛɛ hʋ abee saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya no aa sɩ yaa, ʋ bɩ yaa wɩɩ ŋ bɩl aa sɩ sabɩ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma,

english_verse: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
translation_verse: beewɩya ma tɩɩ gyɩma rɛ weliŋ anɩɩ kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko sɩ pirigi ma tɩyaŋ gɛɛ anɩɩ gaal aa pirigi ko tebine gɛɛ.

english_verse: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
translation_verse: Haŋ saŋa hʋ nala aa sɩ kɩ bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ lee fɩyɛla rɛ dɩ wɩɩ buloŋ tuwo, ɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ baloo sɩ pirigi gyʋʋ ba, anɩɩ haaŋ halʋllɩ-luwol aa pirigi kɩ wɩɩ ʋ gɛɛ. Ka nal buloŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo fá lɩɩ baloo no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ naabalɩya, ma kɛ tuwo bilhuu tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya ʋ bɩ maga dɩ kyɛɛ hʋ ko pirigi ma tɩyaŋ anɩɩ gaal.

english_verse: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
translation_verse: Ma buloŋ yaa nala aa we pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a yaa sɩgballɩya nala. Á bɩ yaa tebine koo bilhuu tɩyaŋ nala.

english_verse: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
translation_verse: Tebine rɛ nala kɩ pɩŋ doo. Tebine mɛ rɛ nala nyʋwa sɩŋ kɩ bugo.

english_verse: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ bɩ lɩɩ ma dɩ ʋ dɔgɩsɩ ma, ʋ lɩɩ ma rɛ dɩ ʋ tɩŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a laa ma ta.

english_verse: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
translation_verse: Á wɩya rɛ Yesu sʋba dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ a beel-ʋ we doŋ a kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ, di ámaa rɛ sʋba koo dɩ ámaa rɛ weye saŋa hʋ ʋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko.

english_verse: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya ma basɩ teŋ polli wɩya no kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ, a kɩ kyiyeli dɔmɔŋ mɛ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ ma aa yaŋ kɩ yaa gɛɛ.

english_verse: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
translation_verse: Á nɩmmabalɩya, á aa sʋl ma, nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya ba yaa ma sɩlaala, ka ba kpa ba sɩfɩyaŋ buloŋ we tʋma no tɩyaŋ, a kɩ deŋ ma nyuu tɩyaŋ a kɩ daga ma mɛ, ʋ maga dɩ ma kɩ tɩya ba gyɩrɩma rɛ.

english_verse: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ tɩya ba gyɩrɩma, a kyo ba mɛ weliŋ akuu tʋma hʋ ba aa tʋŋ wɩya. Ma leŋ fɩyɛlʋʋ we ma hɔnɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
translation_verse: Á nɩmmabalɩya, á aa sʋl ma abee sɩfɩyasɩ dɩ ma kɩ kʋrɩsɩ teŋwɩɩ tɩmma dɩgɩna, a basɩ wɩya kɩ nyaasɩ nala hʋ aa fá kambɩŋ nyuni, aŋ kɩ kyiyeli nala hʋ aa bɩ sɩŋ weliŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ma kaŋ kenyiri abee nal buloŋ.

english_verse: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
translation_verse: Ma pɔ dɩ nal buloŋ ta ko yaa wɩbɔŋ tuŋ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna. Amɛ saŋa kɛ buloŋ, ma yaa wɩweliye kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ abee nal buloŋ.

english_verse: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, ma kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ, beewɩya nyɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ma nala hʋ bee Yesu Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ kɩ yaa.

english_verse: Don't turn away God's Spirit
translation_verse: Ma ta kɩ tɔ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tʋma ma tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
translation_verse: Amɛ ma sʋnnɩ wɩya no buloŋ na, a lɩɩ wɩya hʋ aa weliye.

english_verse: and don't have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩma wɩbɔmɔ iriŋ kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Á aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, fɩyɛlʋʋ tɩtɩyal hʋ, dɩ ʋ sasɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ ta aŋ leŋ dɩ ma yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ma wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, a ta kaŋ bisiŋ koo wɩkyogii buloŋ ma mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ haalɩ a mʋ pele kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko.

english_verse: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa yɩrɩ ma kɔnɩ sɩ yaa wɩɩ no tɩya ma rɛ, beewɩya ʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ Tɩɩna rɛ.

english_verse: Friends, please pray for us.
translation_verse: Á nɩmmabalɩya, ma mɛ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma.

english_verse: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ buloŋ weliŋ, weliŋ.

english_verse: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa sʋla ma abee sɩfɩyasɩ rɛ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita feŋ tɩyaŋ dɩ ma karɩmɩ teŋ no a tɩya á nɩmmabalɩya hʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ sɩ we ma lee.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl abee Silaasi abee Timoti rɛ sabɩ teŋ no kɩ tɩya ma Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Tesaloniika tɩyaŋ, a yaa á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita nala.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ abee ba fɩyɛlʋʋ sɩ we ma lee. Sarɩya hʋ Yesu aa sɩ di nala ʋ kyɛkoolii

english_verse: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ʋ yaa kparaama rɛ dɩ á kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ saŋa buloŋ ma wɩya anɩɩ gɛɛ aa maga. Beewɩya laadii hʋ ma aa kana abee kyori hʋ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ aa kana bee dɔmɔŋ marɩ yʋga kɩ pɛ rɛ.

english_verse: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, á aa kɩ bigisi ma rɛ ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Wɩɩsɩ nala lee, beewɩya abee tʋwara hʋ bee dɔgɩsɩɩ hʋ buloŋ ma aa na, ka ma ha kaŋ mala rɛ ma laadii tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ ʋ sarɩya dii tɩyaŋ. Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma maga wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ wɩya ma aa na tʋwara no gyʋʋyɩ.

english_verse: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ tɩɩna rɛ, ɛɛwɩya ʋ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ nala hʋ buloŋ aa dɔgɩsɩ ma.

english_verse: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
translation_verse: Ka dɩ ʋ tɩya á bee ma nala hʋ buloŋ aa na tʋwara wiyese kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu bee ʋ malɩka-gaduwogo diŋgel aa sɩ baarɩ ba, dɩ ba lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko,

english_verse: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
translation_verse: a dɔgɩsɩ nala hʋ aa vɩya ʋ nyʋwa abee nala hʋ aa bee tɩŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu wɩweliye hʋ.

english_verse: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
translation_verse: Nala no rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ba na dɔgɩsɩɩ hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii, ka dɩ ʋ kaŋ ba porigi lɩɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu bee ʋ gaŋdarɩ hʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
translation_verse: Haŋ Kyɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko, nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di a yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ba sɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ a leŋ dɩ ʋ feŋ yɩrɩ. Ma mɛ pɛɛ nala no tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya ma laa wɩya hʋ á basɩ tɩya ma dɩ rɛ.

english_verse: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ á kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma saŋa buloŋ. Á aa sʋl Wɩɩsɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ leŋ ma maga bee wɩya hʋ wɩya ʋ aa yɩrɩ ma yayɩ, aŋ tɩya ma dee dɩ ma kɩ yaa wɩweliye hʋ buloŋ ma aa kyɛ dɩ ma yaa, ka dɩ ma tʋŋ tʋma hʋ mɛ ma aa tʋŋ ma laadii nyubaanɩŋ a mʋ teŋ.

english_verse: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu feŋ tɩŋ ma tɩyaŋ a yɩrɩ, ka dɩ ʋ leŋ ma mɛ feŋ yɩrɩ. Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita lahɔrʋmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ wɩɩ no sɩ yaa.

english_verse: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, nyɛ kɛ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita mɩɩgɩ koyi abee gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ kaŋ á beel-ʋ buloŋ laŋŋɩ dɔmɔŋ haŋ kyɛɛ hʋ wɩya polli weliŋ nɛ a tɩya ma.

english_verse: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
translation_verse: Ma bɩ liise anɩɩ ŋ gyɩ aa we ma lee, ŋ gyɩ basɩ wɩya no buloŋ tɩya ma rɛ?

english_verse: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ aa tɔɔ tahaa tɩɩna no koyi ŋmanɩɩ rɛ? Amɛ dɩ saŋa hʋ rɛ ko pele, ʋ sɩ kana ʋ tɩɩ ko lɩɩ lɩgyalɩɩ dɩ nal buloŋ na ʋ.

english_verse: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
translation_verse: Nala teŋ paalɩ piili lʋwɔlɩ kɩ yaa tahaa wɩya rɛ amɛ wɩɩ hʋ aa sɩ yaa bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa see dɩ ba aa kaŋ nal hʋ aa tɔɔ wɩya no yayɩ ŋmanɩɩ turi ta.

english_verse: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
translation_verse: Tahaa tɩɩna hʋ sɩ ko Sɩtaanɩ dee tɩyaŋ, a yaa wɩnyɩyɛ-wɩmagɩla abee wɩkperiye iriŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩ nyɩya tahaa wɩnyɩyɛ-iriŋ buloŋ a mʋrɩ nala hʋ aa nyʋgɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Ba aa nyʋgɩsɩ rɛ, beewɩya ba vɩya ba aa sɩ kyo wɩtɩɩ hʋ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa ba ta rɛ.

english_verse: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, Wɩɩsɩ leŋ wɩnyɩyɛl kaŋ dee ba hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba kɩ tɩŋ wɩnyɩyɛl dʋŋ.

english_verse: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
translation_verse: Á nɩmmabalɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa kyo, ʋ maga dɩ á kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ saŋa buloŋ ma wɩya beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ foŋ lɩɩ ma rɛ a lɩɩ piilii hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ dɩ ʋ laa ma ta. Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ a laa ma ta a leŋ ma yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ akuu ma aa laa wɩtɩɩ hʋ dɩ wɩya.

english_verse: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ wɩweliye hʋ á aa basɩ tɩya ma tɩyaŋ nɛ a yɩrɩ ma dɩ ma yaa ʋ nala a mɛ kaŋ tol á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita gaŋdarɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, wɩtɩɩ hʋ á aa gʋnna rɛ á mɛ kpa kɩ daga ma. Ɛɛwɩya ma sɩŋ ʋ tɩyaŋ weliŋ, dɩ ʋ yaa á wɩbasɩɩ tɩyaŋ koo dɩ wɩya hʋ á saba tɩya ma tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: God our Father loves us. He treats us with undeserved grace and has given us eternal comfort and a wonderful hope. We pray that our Lord Jesus Christ and God our Father
translation_verse: Á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ kyo ma rɛ. Ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ leŋ á bembiye pɩŋ lɩdɩgɩ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ ka ʋ tɩya ma bayɩyɛla hʋ aa weliye.

english_verse: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
translation_verse: Á nɩmmabalɩya, wɩya hʋ ŋ aa basɩ kateŋsi rɛ nyɛ. Ma kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma dɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita wɩweliye hʋ taalɩ laa lee buloŋ lagɩ lagɩ, ka dɩ nala laa wɩweliye no dɩ abee gyɩrɩma anɩɩ ma mɛ gyɩ aa laa di abee gyɩrɩma gɛɛ.

english_verse: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
translation_verse: Ma bɩl kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ma, dɩ ʋ lɩɩ ma tahaa tɩmma abee nɩbɔmɔ nosi tɩyaŋ, beewɩya nala buloŋ daa laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ di.

english_verse: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
translation_verse: Amɛ á Tɩɩna Yesu kaŋ yellii rɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Ʋ sɩ tɩya ma dee a pɔ ma dɩ nɩbɔmɔ ta wuwo ma.

english_verse: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ nyubaanɩŋ á laa ma di rɛ, anɩɩ wɩya hʋ á aa basɩ tɩya ma, ma aa yaa ba rɛ. Á ha laa di mɛ rɛ anɩɩ ma sɩ kaŋ gɛɛ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
translation_verse: Ŋ aa sʋla á Tɩɩna rɛ dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ma wuwo gyɩŋ gɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyo ma, ka dɩ ma kaŋ mala anɩɩ Krisita tɩɩ aa kaŋ mala gɛɛ. Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ nal buloŋ kaŋ teŋwɩɩ

english_verse: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
translation_verse: Á nɩmmabalɩya, á basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ abee sɩfɩyasɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita feŋ tɩyaŋ, Krisitabiisi hʋ aa kaŋ teŋwɩɩ aŋ bee tɩŋ wɩya hʋ á aa basɩ tɩya ba, ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩ ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ gyɩma rɛ weliŋ anɩɩ ʋ maga dɩ ma kɩ kyesi á wɩyaalɩya rɛ. Á gyɩ bɩ kaŋ teŋwɩɩ saŋa hʋ á aa we ma lee.

english_verse: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
translation_verse: Á gyɩ bɩ dii nal buloŋ kɩdiiliye dɩ á bɩ tuŋ ʋ tɩɩna. Amɛ á tʋma rɛ weliŋ a suwoli kyɛɛ bee ʋ nyʋwa buloŋ dɩ á wuwo na á kɩkyɛɛlɩya, dɩ á ta yaa kyʋga a tɩya ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ á kɩ basɩ nyɛ, á nɩya anɩɩ teŋwɩɩ tɩmma we ma tɩyaŋ nɛ, a bee tʋŋ tʋŋ buloŋ, see dɩ ba gɔllɩ kpa ba nyʋʋsɩ we nala wɩya dʋŋ tɩyaŋ a basɩ kɩ baŋ.

english_verse: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita feŋ tɩyaŋ á aa kpaanɩ nala hʋ aa kaŋ gyogo no iriŋ nɛ abee sɩfɩyasɩ, a kɩ kʋrɩsɩ ba dɩgɩna mɛ, dɩ ba kaŋ ba tɩɩ weliŋ a tʋŋ tʋma a wuwo kɩ na ba kɩkyɛɛlɩya.

english_verse: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
translation_verse: Amɛ á nɩmmabalɩya, ma kɛ ta leŋ dɩ ma lɔgɩ lɩɩ wɩweliye yayɩ.

english_verse: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ we ma tɩyaŋ a bee tɩŋ wɩya hʋ á aa basɩ tɩya ma teŋ no tɩyaŋ, ma gyɩŋ ʋ tɩɩna wɩya weliŋ. Ma ta leŋ dɩ ma beel-ʋ pɛ wɩɩ buloŋ dɩ gɛɛ leŋ hɩɩsɩ kana ʋ.

english_verse: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Amɛ ma ta kpaa ʋ anɩɩ ʋ yaa ma dɔŋ nɛ. Ma basɩ wɩya kʋrɩsɩ ʋ dɩgɩna anɩɩ ma krisitabii-dɔŋtɩɩna. Kyʋwala

english_verse: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
translation_verse: Á aa sʋl á Tɩɩna Krisita tɩɩ rɛ, nal hʋ aa yaa fɩyɛlʋʋ tɩɩna dɩ ʋ tɩya ma fɩyɛlʋʋ saŋa buloŋ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Á Tɩɩna Krisita sɩ we ma buloŋ lee.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ sɩ we ma lee.

english_verse: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl lɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya Ɩ Timoti. Wɩɩsɩ, á laataal abee Yesu Krisita, laataal hʋ tɩyaŋ á bayɩyɛla aa we, ba aa rɛ lɩɩ ŋ ba dee tɩyaŋ, ŋ yaa Yesu Krisita kpambɩya.

english_verse: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
translation_verse: Timoti, akuu á buloŋ aa laa Krisita di wɩya, ɩ bɩrɩmɩ ŋ biye tɩɩ rɛ. Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ, ba sɩ fá ɩ sikii, a leŋ dɩ ɩ hɔŋ abee laaŋfɩya. Ma pɔ ma tɩɩma abee wɩnyɩyɛl-dɩdagɩla

english_verse: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
translation_verse: Basɩ tɩya ba dɩ ba ta kpaa ba nyuni we ba faafaa lesiri wɩya basɩɩ abee ba naabaala fene dɩɩsɩɩ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya nyʋʋtaaduwo dʋŋ nɛ wɩya no iriŋ kaŋ kɩ ko. Ka wɩya no mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ nal buloŋ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ see tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ laadii dʋŋ nɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ wuwo tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ.

english_verse: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
translation_verse: Nala badɔmɔŋ vɩya wɩya no tɩŋɩɩ rɛ aŋ mɩɩgɩ gɔllɩ we wɩvɩyagyɩmɩya basɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
translation_verse: Ba aa kyɛ dɩ ba kɩ daga nala Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ rɛ, amɛ ba tɩɩ mɛ gba bɩ gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ ba aa basɩ memii. Wɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ gba ba aa sɩna kpaŋkpaŋ, ba bɩ gyɩŋ ba memii.

english_verse: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ weliye rɛ dɩ nala rɛ kɔnɩ aa tɩŋ ba anɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ aa maga.

english_verse: We also understand it wasn't given to control people who please God, but to control lawbreakers, criminals, godless people, and sinners. It is for wicked and evil people, and for murderers, who would even kill their own parents.
translation_verse: Á bɩl gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ nɩtɩɩma wɩya daa ba kɩ biŋ mɩrɩsɩ. Amɛ nala aa kyogi mɩrɩsɩ, abee nɩbɔmɔ, abee nala hʋ aa bee fá Wɩɩsɩ abee wɩbɔŋyaala, abee nala hʋ aa bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ, abee nala hʋ aa kpʋ ba kuwoma abee ba nɩmma, abee nɩkpʋʋla kɛ iriŋ buloŋ,

english_verse: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
translation_verse: abee sɔŋsɔnnɔ, abee baala aa gʋla kɩ kyɛ dɔmɔŋ, abee nala hʋ aa gɔllɩ gaa kasɩ nala mʋ kɩ yallɩ, abee wɩnyɩyɛla abee wɩnyɩyɛ-daŋsɩya diile, abee nala hʋ wɩyaalɩya aa bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ, nala no iriŋ wɩya rɛ ba kɩ biŋ mɩrɩsɩ.

english_verse: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ abee dee hʋ ʋ aa tɩya ŋ, ŋ kɩ tʋŋ tʋma no, a bɩl kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ aŋgyʋwasʋ mɛ ʋ aa naa dɩ ŋ maga ʋ lɩɩ ŋ dɩ ŋ yaa ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ.

english_verse: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
translation_verse: Faafaa hʋ tɩyaŋ, ŋ gyɩ paalɩ kyogi ʋ feŋ nɛ weliŋ, a tʋʋsɩ ʋ, aŋ ha bɩl dɔgɩsɩ ʋ hatɩnna hʋ mɛ pɛ. Amɛ abee gɛɛ buloŋ, Krisita ha fáá ŋ sikii rɛ beewɩya, ŋ fa bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa yaa, a fa bɩ laa ʋ wɩya mɛ di.

english_verse: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
translation_verse: Aŋka á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ ha pɛɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ kɩŋkaŋ, a kpa ʋ bɔnyɛ wirisi ŋ, a leŋ ŋ laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di, aŋ pɛ kaŋ kyori hʋ mɛ ʋ aa kana.

english_verse: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, a maga dɩ nal buloŋ laa ʋ di weliŋ. Ʋ rɛ nyɛ: Yesu Krisita ko tuu dʋnɩya dɩ ʋ laa wɩbɔŋyaala rɛ ta. Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl lɛ yaa wɩbɔŋyaala buloŋ kuwori.

english_verse: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
translation_verse: Amɛ ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ fá mɩyaŋ wɩbɔŋyaala kuwori sikii, dɩ Krisita daga gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa kaŋ kenyiri beel-ŋ a mʋ parɩ. Ʋ yaa gɛɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa magɩl a tɩya nala hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ maakyiye ko laa ʋ wɩya di, a kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenni.

english_verse: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
translation_verse: Ŋ biye Timoti, wɩya no ŋ aa kpaa kɩ we ɩ nosi tɩyaŋ nyɛ, ba yaa wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ nala gyɩ aa basa a mʋ kɩ tile ɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, leŋ dɩ wɩya no yaa ɩ bayuwo kɩna dɩ ɩ kpa kyeŋ nala hʋ aa daga wɩnyɩyɛl ŋmaŋsɩ hʋ weliŋ.

english_verse: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
translation_verse: Sɩŋ wɩya hʋ ɩ aa laa di tɩyaŋ weliŋ aŋ kaŋ hakɩlwelii. Nala badɔmɔŋ vɩya wɩya no tɩŋɩɩ rɛ ɛɛ leŋ ba laadii vʋgɩmɩ.

english_verse: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
translation_verse: Hamineyo abee Alizaŋda yaa nala no badɔmɔŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ wɩya, ŋ kpaa ba we Sɩtaanɩ nosi tɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ dɔgɩsɩ ba, dɩ ba gʋnnɩ wɩgyʋŋ, a ta bɩl kɩ kyogi Wɩɩsɩ feŋ.

english_verse: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
translation_verse: Sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma rɛ nyɛ: Ŋ aa kpaanɩ ma, ma kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya nal buloŋ, a kɩ sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ leŋ nal buloŋ na ʋ wɩkyɛɛlɩɩ, aŋ kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ aŋgyʋwasʋ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa yaa tɩya nal buloŋ wɩya.

english_verse: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
translation_verse: Ma sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya kuworo abee sɩlaala, dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ á hɔŋ sɔmmm abee laaŋfɩya, a kaŋ gyogiweliye kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ aŋ kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ buloŋ aa kpa Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ mɛ.

english_verse: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no yaa wɩwelii rɛ a kɩ fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ á laataal teŋ mɛ,

english_verse: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
translation_verse: beewɩya ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ laa nal buloŋ ta rɛ dɩ ba gyɩŋ ʋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
translation_verse: Wɩɩdɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ we doŋ, nɩdɩgɩ mɛ rɛ we Wɩɩsɩ bee nihuwobisi paga tɩyaŋ, a kɩ marɩ ba dɔmɔŋ. Nal no rɛ yaa Yesu Krisita.

english_verse: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no wɩya rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ ŋ, ŋ yaa ʋ kpambɩya, a tɩma ŋ dɩ ŋ kaŋ wɩya mʋ daga nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma dɩ ba wuwo laa wɩya hʋ aa yaa wɩtɩɩ di. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ ŋ kɩ basɩ, ŋ bee nyɩya wɩya.

english_verse: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Dɩ Krisitabiisi rɛ ko laŋŋɩ dɩ ba kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ baala aa kpaa ba tɩɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ abee ba wɩtɩɩ buloŋ nɛ kaŋ ba nosi gye a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ dɩ baaŋ koo nyʋʋtaaduwo tuwo ba tɩya.

english_verse: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ŋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ haana hʋ mɛ fɩyɛlɩ ba sɩya weliŋ abee ba kɩlaalɩya tɩyaŋ. Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ba marɩ ba nyuni marɩ-kperiye, koo dɩ ba kpɩyɛrɩ ba tɩɩ bee salma kɩna koo gannɩ yalɩɩ aa hayɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ maga dɩ ba kɩ yaa wɩweliye hʋ haana aa kpaa ba tɩɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa maga dɩ ba kɩ yaa rɛ.

english_verse: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
translation_verse: Ŋ bɩ tɩya haana ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ba kɩ daga, koo dɩ ba kaŋ dee baala nyuu tɩyaŋ. Ʋ maga dɩ ba tallɩ ba nyʋʋsɩ rɛ.

english_verse: After all, Adam was created before Eve,
translation_verse: Beewɩya Adama rɛ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ laasɩya ta aŋ na ta Hawa.

english_verse: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
translation_verse: Adama mɛ daa Sɩtaanɩ gyɩ mʋrɩ. Hawa rɛ ʋ gyɩ mʋrɩ ʋ yaa wɩbɔŋ a kyogi Wɩɩsɩ mɩra hʋ ʋ aa biŋ tɩya ba.

english_verse: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ʋ yaa sɩnyʋwal, koo ʋ kɩ di dee nala nyuni tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ʋ maga dɩ ʋ leŋ ʋ sɩya fɩyɛlɩ rɛ. Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ʋ yaa kaakyɛɛl koo dɩ ʋ kyo molbiye.

english_verse: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
translation_verse: Ʋ maga dɩ ɩ wuwo kɩ deŋ ʋ dɩya nala nyuu tɩyaŋ weliŋ nɛ, a maga dɩ ʋ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ biisi mɛ kɩ tɩŋ ʋ nyʋwa a kɩ tɩya ʋ gyɩrɩma wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
translation_verse: beewɩya, dɩ nal lɛ bɩ wuwo kɩ deŋ ʋ dɩya nala nyuu weliŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ tɩɩna sɩ wuwo yaa a deŋ Krisitabiisi aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ nala nyuu tɩyaŋ?

english_verse: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ʋ yaa nal ha aa laa Yesu wɩya di falɩŋ, beewɩya dɩ ʋ rɛ teŋ yaa sɩlaal ʋ sɩ kɩ daga ʋ tɩɩ a ko tele Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ a laa kyogisi anɩɩ Sɩtaanɩ aa tele Wɩɩsɩ kpa kyogisi tɩya ʋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
translation_verse: Ʋ maga dɩ ba sɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa daga ba ba laa di tɩyaŋ weliŋ nɛ abee hakɩlwelii

english_verse: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
translation_verse: Ʋ maga dɩ Krisitabiisi hʋ laa sɩya sʋnnɩ ba weliŋ nɛ a na, dɩ ba yaŋ ko bɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ, ba lɩɩ ba dɩ ba kɩ kyiyeli sɩlaala hʋ.

english_verse: Women must also be serious. They must not gossip or be heavy drinkers, and they must be faithful in everything they do.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ maga dɩ ba haana mɛ kaŋ gyɩrɩma nala sɩya tɩyaŋ a ta kɩ gaa nala hala. Ʋ maga dɩ ba kaŋ sʋnna rɛ, ka dɩ ba kaŋ wɩtɩɩ mɛ wɩɩ buloŋ ba aa yaa tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa kyiyeli Krisitabiisi sɩlaala maga dɩ ba mɛ kaŋ hadɩgɩ dɩgɩ rɛ. Ʋ maga dɩ ba wuwo kɩ deŋ ba balɩya abee ba dɩya nala nyuu tɩyaŋ weliŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
translation_verse: Krisitabiisi sɩlaala kyikyiyelle hʋ aa tʋŋ ba tʋma weliŋ sɩ na feŋwelii nala abee Wɩɩsɩ buloŋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ba bɩ sɩ kɩ fá kambɩŋ Yesu Krisita wɩya hʋ ba aa laa di basɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: so if I am delayed, you will know how everyone who belongs to God's family ought to behave. After all, the church of the living God is the strong foundation of truth.
translation_verse: dɩ ma gyɩŋ ɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ nala aa maga dɩ ba kɩɩ ba mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ. Nala no rɛ yaa nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di a yaa Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa weye nala. Ba aa rɛ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa daga ba sɩgɩ anɩɩ dɩya memii aa kaŋ dɩya sɩgɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ buloŋ fa aa yaa wɩfaŋɩya, ka Wɩɩsɩ ko kpa ba daga ma, ba kɔnɩ yaa wɩbala rɛ, á bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa ba sige. Ba aa rɛ nyɛ: Krisita bɩrɩmɩ nihuwobiŋ nɛ a ko tuu dʋnɩya Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ daga anɩɩ ʋ yaa Tɩpʋlʋŋ Tɩɩna rɛ. Malɩkasɩ mɛ na ʋ. Ba basɩ ʋ wɩya rɛ paalʋʋ paalʋʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, ba laa ʋ wɩya di dʋnɩya logiŋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ aŋka Wɩɩsɩ kpa ʋ gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩbee abee gaŋdarɩ.

english_verse: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ paalɩ basɩ polli rɛ anɩɩ dɩ dʋnɩya rɛ ko kpaga tenii nala sɩ kpa ba Wɩɩsɩ laadii ta aŋ kɩ tɩŋ gyɩŋbɔmɔ aa mʋrɩ nala abee Sɩtaanɩ wɩdagɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
translation_verse: Minaafigitɩmma hʋ aa gɔllɩ nyɩya wɩya kɩ baŋ nɛ aa daga wɩya no. Ba hakɩllɩ buloŋ sʋba rɛ, ba bɩl bɩ gyɩŋ dɩ wɩwelii rɛ nyɛ koo wɩbɔŋ nɛ nyɛ.

english_verse: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ abee á kyʋwala hʋ aa leŋ ʋ yaa kɩdiwelii rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ kpaa wɩya no ŋ aa daga ɩ a kɩ daga nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa Krisita wɩya di, aŋ kaŋ Krisita wɩya hʋ ɩ aa laa di abee wɩtɩɩ hʋ á aa daga ɩ hakɩla tɩyaŋ weliŋ, ɩ sɩ yaa Yesu Krisita tʋŋtʋnnɩ aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ. Ɩ foŋ paalɩ kɩ tɩŋ wɩya no abee ɩ wɩtɩɩ buloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩ noŋ nɩlaaŋ lesiri wɩya hʋ basɩɩ aa bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩyaŋ. Gyɩŋ ɩ tɩɩ kanɩɩ a kɩ daŋsɩ ɩ tɩɩ gɛɛ ɩ aa sɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ weliŋ.

english_verse: As the saying goes, “Exercise is good for your body, but religion helps you in every way. It promises life now and forever.” These words are worthwhile and should not be forgotten.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no ŋ aa basɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, a maga dɩ nal buloŋ gyɩma ʋ, a laa ʋ di weliŋ.

english_verse: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya rɛ á kɩ lʋga, a kɩ tʋma abee sɩfɩyasɩ, beewɩya á kpaa á bayɩyɛla buloŋ we Wɩɩsɩ aa weye tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ʋ rɛ yaa nal buloŋ Laataal, amarɩkpatɩya nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di.

english_verse: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
translation_verse: Kpa wɩya no kɩ daga nala, aŋ sɩŋ pɔ dɩ nal buloŋ kɩ tɩŋ ba.

english_verse: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
translation_verse: Ta leŋ dɩ nal buloŋ kpa sɩɩ gyʋʋ ɩ akuu ɩ aa yaa biibiye wɩya. Amɛ leŋ dɩ ɩ wɩyaalɩya abee ɩ wɩbasɩya abee ɩ kyori abee ɩ laadii abee tɩpʋlʋŋ hʋ ɩ aa kana yaa wɩya nala hʋ aa laa Krisita wɩya di aa sɩ wuwo kɩ kyesi.

english_verse: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Ka dɩ ŋ na ko, kpa ɩ sɩfɩyaŋ buloŋ a kɩ karɩmɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ gyamaa tɩyaŋ, aŋ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya ba aŋ kɩ daga ba mɛ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
translation_verse: Bɔnyɛ kɩŋ hʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa kpaa tɩya ɩ saŋa hʋ nala hʋ aa basɩ wɩya Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ aa basɩ ɩ maakyiye wɩya, ka Krisitabiisi nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ mɛ kpa ba nosi a dɔbɔ ɩ tɩyaŋ, ta ko yeŋŋi ʋ wɩya.

english_verse: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
translation_verse: Kpa ɩ nyuu buloŋ we wɩya no yayɩ tɩyaŋ dɩ ɩ wɩkanɩya buloŋ kɩ mʋ sɩya dɩ nal buloŋ na.

english_verse: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
translation_verse: Kana ɩ tɩɩ weliŋ, a pɔ ɩ tɩɩ abee ɩ wɩdagɩya tɩyaŋ, a leŋ dɩ ɩ sɩɩ fɩyɛsɩ gɛɛ yayɩ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya dɩ ɩ rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa ɩ bee nala hʋ aa gyegile kɩ nɩɩ wɩya hʋ ɩ aa basɩ buloŋ ta.

english_verse: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
translation_verse: Ta nɔsɩ nɩhɩyawʋ abee baaŋ, amɛ fɩyɛlɩ basɩ wɩya tɩya ʋ abee gyɩrɩma anɩɩ ɩ kuwo gɛɛ aŋ kaŋ bapʋwasɩya hʋ mɛ weliŋ anɩɩ ɩ tɩɩ nɩmmabalɩya.

english_verse: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
translation_verse: Kaŋ hanɩhɩyasɩ hʋ mɛ anɩɩ ba yaa ɩ naama rɛ, aŋ kaŋ hatoliye hʋ mɛ abee tɩpʋlʋŋ anɩɩ ɩ naatoliye.

english_verse: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ lohaaŋ nɛ kaŋ biisi koo nihiye, ʋ maga dɩ ba laasɩya yaa wɩɩ hʋ ba wɩɩkyʋwal ŋmanɩɩ aa daga ba rɛ a deŋ ba dɩya nala nyuu tɩyaŋ. Nyɛ rɛ ba sɩ mɩɩgɩ tuŋ ba kuwoma bee ba nɩmma abee ba naabaala, beewɩya nyɛ yaa wɩɩ aa fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ nɛ.

english_verse: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
translation_verse: Lohaaŋ hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ nal buloŋ ʋ kɩ deŋ ʋ, ʋ aa kpa ʋ bayɩyɛla buloŋ we Wɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kɩ sʋla ʋ wɩɩhaa abee tebine buloŋ dɩ ʋ pɛ ʋ.

english_verse: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
translation_verse: Amɛ lohaaŋ hʋ aa kpaa ʋ hakɩla we dʋnɩya sʋma dʋŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ kɛ paalɩ sʋba rɛ aŋ ta weye.

english_verse: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
translation_verse: Basɩ wɩya no polli kɩ tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ, dɩ ba ta kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ nala sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ bee deŋ ʋ lʋlla nyuu tɩyaŋ, amarɩkpatɩya ʋ tɩɩ dɩya nala, ʋ tɩɩna vɩya wɩya hʋ ʋ aa laa di ta rɛ. Nal hʋ gba aa bɩ laa Yesu wɩya di rɛ kyo kpɩya ʋ.

english_verse: For a widow to be put on the list of widows, she must be at least
translation_verse: Dɩ lohaaŋ buloŋ nɛ bɩ para bɩsɩ mɔllɩ boto, a yaa nal hʋ mɛ fa aa bɩ lɩɩ ʋ bala hal, ba ta ko sabɩ ʋ feŋ we lohaana teŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ lohaaŋ buloŋ nɛ ha ko yaa halʋllɩ, ba ta ko sabɩ ʋ feŋ kɩ we lohaana teŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Beewɩya dɩ baala wɩya rɛ ko kyɩl ʋ te gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa kpaa ʋ tɩɩ tɩya Krisita, ʋ bɩl aa kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ yala rɛ.

english_verse: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ mɛ dʋŋ daa. Ba bɩl aa bee laa di ba tʋŋ tʋŋ buloŋ aŋ gɔllɩ kɩ gbɛ nala dɩɩsɩ. Wɩɩ hʋ yaŋ aa marɩ bɔmɔ rɛ yaa, ba aa kɩ gʋnnɩ hagaaha rɛ, a gɔllɩ kpa ba nyʋʋsɩ we nala wɩya tɩyaŋ a kɩ basɩ wɩya hʋ aa bɩ maga dɩ ba kɩ basɩ.

english_verse: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, dɩ ŋ kɛ dʋŋ nɛ ŋ aa baa dɩ lohaana hʋ ha aa yaa halʋlla, ba yal balama, a lʋl biisi, aŋ kɩ deŋ ba dɩya nala nyuu weliŋ. Dɩ á dɔmɔ ta naa ŋmanɩɩ a basɩ wɩbɔŋ buloŋ á lugo tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Look what's already happened to some of the young widows! They have turned away to follow Satan.
translation_verse: Beewɩya lohaana badɔmɔŋ kɛ foŋ vɩya Krisita tɩŋɩɩ rɛ aŋ mɩɩgɩ mʋ kɩ tɩŋ Sɩtaanɩ.

english_verse: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
translation_verse: Dɩ haaŋ buloŋ aa yaa Krisitabiye rɛ ko kaŋ lohaana ʋ dɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ maga dɩ ʋ kɩ deŋ ba nyuu rɛ aŋ ta leŋ dɩ ba mɩɩgɩ yaa kyʋga tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ buloŋ. Dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ Krisitabiisi hʋ mɛ wuwo kyiyeli kɩ deŋ lohaana hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ nala ba kɩ deŋ ba.

english_verse: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Sɩlaala hʋ mɛ aa tʋŋ ba tʋma weliŋ, ʋ maga dɩ Krisitabiisi hʋ buloŋ kɩ tɩya ba gyɩrɩma rɛ aŋ kɩ tuŋ ba weliŋ. Amarɩkpatɩya ba nala hʋ aa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ a kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya aŋ kɩ daga nala mɛ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
translation_verse: Beewɩya ba saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Dɩ ɩ ko kaŋ nʋhʋ kɩ ŋmaa mɩya, ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ɩ vʋwa ʋ nyʋwa tɔ.” Ba bɩl saba rɛ anɩɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ buloŋ maga dɩ ʋ kaŋ ʋ tuno rɛ.

english_verse: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ kpaa kyogisi a tɩya sɩlaal, ta gyegili nɩɩ tɩɩna nyʋwa, see dɩ ba yaa nala balɩya koo boto a yaa wɩɩ hʋ daŋsɩya.

english_verse: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko yaa wɩbɔŋ, basɩ ʋ tɩɩna sɩya wɩya tɩya ʋ Krisitabiisi hʋ sɩɩ tɩyaŋ, dɩ gɛɛ kpa kambɩŋ we nɩkaalɩya hʋ.

english_verse: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ abee Yesu Krisita abee malɩkasɩ hʋ ʋ aa lɩya sɩya tɩyaŋ, ŋ aa sʋla ɩ abee sɩfɩyasɩ dɩ ɩ tɩŋ wɩya no buloŋ ŋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ɩ. Kpa nal buloŋ dɩ ba yaa kɩdɩgɩ ɩ lee aŋ ta kɩ lugisi nala ɩ wɩyaalɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
translation_verse: Fɩyɛlɩ ɩ sɩya, a ta pese kpa ɩ nosi dɔbɔ nal tɩyaŋ a lɩɩ ʋ dɩ ʋ tʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ tʋma. Ta kpaa ɩ noŋ pɛ nal buloŋ wɩbɔŋ wɩkanɩya tɩyaŋ. Kaŋ ɩ tɩɩ weliŋ, a ta leŋ dɩ bisiŋ buloŋ mal ɩ.

english_verse: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
translation_verse: Ta kɩ nyʋwa nɩɩ dʋŋ. Amɛ nyʋwa sɩŋ mʋhʋ mʋhʋ kɩ pɛ, akuu ɩ luwol aa kɩ wɩɩ saŋa buloŋ wɩya.

english_verse: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
translation_verse: Nala badɔmɔŋ wɩbɔmɔ bɩ kaŋ faŋɩɩ, ɛɛwɩya ka dɩ ba gba na di ba sarɩya nal buloŋ aa gyɩma nɩɩ ba laa kyogisi rɛ. Nala badɔmɔŋ wɩbɔmɔ kɛ aa faŋa rɛ amɛ maakyiye kɩdɩgɩ rɛ ba sɩ lɩɩ lɩgyalɩɩ.

english_verse: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ, wɩweliye mɛ bɩ kaŋ faŋɩɩ, koo dɩ ba yaŋ faŋa mɛ, ka ba sɩ maakyiye lɩɩ lɩgyalɩɩ.

english_verse: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ buloŋ aa yaa yosi, ʋ maga dɩ ba kɩ tɩya ba tɩmma gyɩrɩma rɛ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ nal buloŋ ta naa ŋmanɩɩ a kyogi Wɩɩsɩ feŋ koo á wɩdagɩya hʋ.

english_verse: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
translation_verse: Yosi tɩmma hʋ aa yaa Krisitabiisi ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ba yosi kpa sɩɩ gyʋʋ ba, akuu ba buloŋ aa yaa nɩmmabalɩya Krisita tɩyaŋ wɩya. Ʋ gba yaŋ maga dɩ ba marɩ tʋŋ weliŋ kɩ tɩya ba rɛ, beewɩya nala hʋ aa di ba tʋma hʋ tɔnɔ yaa Krisitabiisi rɛ a yaa ba nikyooliye mɛ. Timoti, wɩya no rɛ ɩ maga dɩ ɩ kpa kɩ daga ba aŋ kɩ kpaanɩ ba dɩ ba kɩ yaa ba. Wɩnyɩyɛl ŋmanɩɩ dɩdagɩla abee wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ dɩdagɩla

english_verse: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
translation_verse: ʋ tɩɩna aa daga ʋ tɩɩ rɛ, aŋ bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ buloŋ. Ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ hakɩlbɔŋ nɛ a kyo nyʋʋtaaduwo kɩŋkaŋ aŋ kuu wɩtɔɔnɩ wɩya kɩ kaa kaasɩ. Nyɛ aa leŋ nala kaŋ tɩhɔllɩ rɛ abee dɔmɔŋ, a bee na dɔmɔŋ sɩɩ, aŋ we wɩbɔŋlɔrɩnɩ tɩyaŋ basɩ kɩ tʋʋsɩ dɔmɔŋ, a kɩ yaa dɔmɔŋ sige mɛ.

english_verse: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
translation_verse: Nala no nyuni bɩl bee tɩma, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba aa kaŋ wɩya kɩ tarɩ bee dɔmɔŋ saŋa buloŋ gɛɛ. Ba bɩl bɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ buloŋ. Ba aa bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ wɩɩkyʋwal yaa molbi-kyɛ naaŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ nal sɩɩ rɛ aa su kɩŋ hʋ ʋ aa kana, ɛɛ kɛ ʋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ kyʋwalɩɩ mɛ aa kaŋ tɔnɔ rɛ ʋ tɩya ʋ,

english_verse: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
translation_verse: beewɩya á bɩ kaŋ kɩŋ buloŋ ko dʋnɩya. Ɛɛ wɩya, á bɩl bɩ sɩ kaŋ kɩŋ buloŋ mɛ lɩɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, dɩ ámaa rɛ kaŋ kɩdiiliye abee gannɩ, ʋ maga dɩ á leŋ dɩ ba maga ma rɛ.

english_verse: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
translation_verse: Amɛ nala hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ba kaŋ kɩna dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, Sɩtaanɩ aa wuwo mʋrɩ ba we wɩbɔmɔ iriŋ buloŋ yayɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a leŋ ba bambugi wɩkyɛɛlɩya hʋ aa kyogi ba bɩrɩmɩ barɩgɩ a kaŋ ba. Ba wɩkyɛɛlɩya no aa ko tarɩ ba mʋ we yalmɩɩ abee kyogisi tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ kyo molbiye, wɩbɔŋ iriŋ buloŋ tuwo ʋ bɩ sɩ yaa dɩ ʋ na molbiye. Nala badɔmɔŋ kpaa ba haahii buloŋ we molbiye kyɛyɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kpa ba Wɩɩsɩ laadii ta, ɛɛ leŋ tʋwarɩ-gyamaa gyʋʋ ba, tɩkyogi leŋ ba bembiye bori. Pɔɔl basɩ wɩya kyagɩlɩ Timoti

english_verse: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
translation_verse: Amɛ ɩ kɛ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ nal wɩya, ɩ maga dɩ ɩ lɩɩ ɩ tɩɩ wɩya no buloŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Leŋ dɩ ɩ sɩɩ fɩyɛsɩ dɩ ɩ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, a kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ, a laa ʋ di weliŋ, a kyo nala, a kaŋ mala aŋ pɛ kaŋ sɩfɩyala nala sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
translation_verse: Kɩ lʋga lʋgʋ-welii hʋ ɩ aa lʋgɩ akuu ɩ aa laa Yesu Krisita di wɩya. Kaŋ weliŋ a mʋ na mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii, beewɩya mɩɩbol no wɩya rɛ Wɩɩsɩ yɩrɩ ɩ, saŋa hʋ ɩ aa suri ɩ nyʋwa nala sɩya tɩyaŋ a baa dɩ ɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ.

english_verse: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ, nal hʋ aa tɩya kɩŋ buloŋ mɩɩbol sɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ sɩŋ abee Yesu Krisita, laataal hʋ gyɩ aa sɩŋ nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Pɔŋtiyo Pilato sɩya tɩyaŋ basɩ wɩtɩɩ saŋa hʋ ba aa di ʋ sarɩya hʋ. Wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kpaa kɩ tɩya ɩ rɛ nyɛ:

english_verse: Promise to obey completely and fully all that you have been told until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Kaŋ wɩya no buloŋ weliŋ abee tɩdɩgɩ aŋ ta kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ a mʋ pele kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko.

english_verse: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ Yesu ko saŋa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ aa naa dɩ ʋ maga tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ nɛ yaa nal hʋ aa maga dɩ á kɩ dannɩ ʋ. Ʋ dʋŋ nɛ yaa dee buloŋ Tɩɩna a kɩ deŋ kɩŋ buloŋ abee lee buloŋ. Ʋ rɛ yaa kuworo buloŋ Kuwori abee nɩbala buloŋ Nɩbal.

english_verse: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
translation_verse: Ʋ dʋŋ nɛ bee sʋba, a we pʋlʋŋbal tɩyaŋ, lee hʋ nal buloŋ aa bɩ sɩ wuwo mʋ. Nal buloŋ ha bɩ maakyiye na ʋ, nal buloŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ maakyiye na ʋ. Ʋ maga dɩ nala buloŋ kɩ tɩya ʋ gyɩrɩma rɛ. Ʋ rɛ kaŋ dee maakyiye buloŋ. Amɩ.

english_verse: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
translation_verse: Basɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa kaŋ kɩna dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ abee sɩfɩyasɩ dɩ ba ta kɩ daga ba tɩɩ, a ta kpaa ba bayɩyɛla buloŋ we ba dʋwa tɩyaŋ. Beewɩya kɩna no bɩ sɩ we doŋ deŋdeŋ kɩ mʋ. Amɛ ba kpa ba bayɩyɛla we Wɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ aa tɩya ma á kɩkyɛɛlɩya buloŋ ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ dɩ á kaŋ kɩ nɩɩ sʋma.

english_verse: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
translation_verse: Basɩ tɩya ba weliŋ dɩ ba kaŋ ba kɩna hʋ kɩ yaa wɩweliye, a leŋ dɩ ba wɩyaaweliye yayɩ marɩ yʋga aŋ ta kaŋ bɔŋ koo sɩɩ.

english_verse: This will lay a solid foundation for the future, so they will know what true life is like.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ aa yaa nyɛ, ba tɩɩ rɛ ba kyɛ kɩna biŋ kɩ pɔ maakyiye gɛɛ, ka dɩ ba maakyiye ko na mɩɩbol hʋ aa yaa mɩɩbol tɩɩ mɛ.

english_verse: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
translation_verse: Timoti, wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa we ɩ nosi tɩyaŋ, kana ʋ weliŋ. Lɩɩ ɩ tɩɩ lɩɩ haŋ bambugi nyʋʋtaaduwo ŋmaala hʋ wɩbasɩya aa bee fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ. Ba aa bɩɩnɩ nɩɩ gyɩmaa rɛ ba aa kɩ daga, amɛ ba bambugiliŋ nɛ ba aa kɩ daga gɛɛ.

english_verse: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Nala badɔmɔŋ baa dɩ ba kaŋ gyɩmaa no rɛ, ka ɛɛ tɩɩ leŋ ba nyʋgɩsɩ Krisita laadii ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ sɩ we ma buloŋ lee.

english_verse: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ ŋ bee ŋ naabaala buloŋ aa tɩŋ abee tɩdɩgɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ rɛ. Saŋa kɛ buloŋ dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ŋ aa kɩ liisi ɩ wɩya rɛ.

english_verse: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ liisi gɛɛ hʋ ɩ gyɩ aa wɩɩ sɩnɩɩl saŋa hʋ ŋ beel-ɩ aa ta dɔmɔŋ, ŋ aa kyo dɩ ŋ bɩl na ɩ rɛ a kpʋ yʋwaŋ.

english_verse: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa liisi gɛɛ hʋ ɩ aa laa Krisita wɩya di abee ɩ wɩtɩɩ buloŋ nɛ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ɩ naha Lɔwɩsɩ abee ɩ naa Yunisi mɛ fa laa Krisita wɩya di. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ ha yaŋ sɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ kɩ liisi ɩ dɩ ɩ kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ kɩŋ hʋ kɩ tʋma weliŋ. Bɔnyɛ kɩŋ hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa kpaa tɩya ɩ saŋa hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa kpaa ŋ nosi dɔbɔ ɩ tɩyaŋ, a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩya ɩ hʋ.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, ta leŋ dɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu wɩya basɩɩ yaa ɩ hɩɩsɩ. Aŋ ta leŋ dɩ mɩyaŋ, nal hʋ ba aa kuu ʋ wɩya kaŋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ wɩya mɛ yaa ɩ hɩɩsɩ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ dee tɩyaŋ ɩ mɛ kaŋ weliŋ, a na ɩ tʋwara tol akuu ɩ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ wɩya.

english_verse: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ laa ma ta rɛ, a yɩrɩ ma dɩ á yaa ʋ nala. Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ á wɩyaalɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ tɩŋ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ bampaga abee ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩŋ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a laa ma ta. Ʋ vʋʋlɩ biŋ nɛ faafaa buloŋ anɩɩ ʋ sɩ yaa wɩɩ no tɩya ma, ka dʋnɩya na piili.

english_verse: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
translation_verse: Amɛ nyɛ kɛ, Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ á laataal Yesu Krisita koyi tɩyaŋ nɛ a daga ma ʋ bɔnyɛ. Krisita laa sʋʋ dee buloŋ nɛ, aŋ tɩŋ ʋ wɩweliye hʋ tɩyaŋ a daga ma ŋmanɩɩ hʋ á aa sɩ tɩŋa a kaŋ mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
translation_verse: Wɩweliye no wɩya rɛ Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ ŋ dɩ ŋ yaa kpambɩya, a basɩ ba kɩ tɩya nala, a kpa ba kɩ daga nala mɛ.

english_verse: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa basɩ wɩweliye no rɛ tɩŋ ŋ kɩ na tʋwara no. Amɛ abee tʋwara no ŋ aa naa buloŋ, ka hɩɩsɩ bɩ kana ŋ, beewɩya ŋ gyɩŋ nal hʋ ŋ aa laa di rɛ. Ŋ laa di rɛ anɩɩ ʋ aa wuwo ʋ deŋ wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kpaa we ʋ nosi tɩyaŋ weliŋ nɛ a mʋ pele kyɛɛ hʋ Yesu Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko.

english_verse: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ fa aa daga ɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ wɩya, kaŋ ba weliŋ a kɩ tɩŋ ba. Laadii hʋ bee kyori hʋ ɩ aa kana akuu á bee Yesu Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya, yaa kuwokeri aŋ kaŋ gɛɛ weliŋ.

english_verse: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
translation_verse: Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa we á tɩyaŋ dee tɩyaŋ, kaŋ wɩweliye hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa we ɩ nosi tɩyaŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
translation_verse: Ɩ gyɩma anɩɩ Krisitabiisi hʋ buloŋ aa lɩɩ Esɩya paalʋʋ fáá vɩya ŋ ta rɛ. Haalɩ Figyɛlusi abee Hɛmogyinisi buloŋ mɛ gba fáá vɩya ŋ ta rɛ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ aa sʋl Wɩɩsɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ fá Onisifɔrɔsɩ abee ʋ dɩya nala buloŋ sikii, beewɩya saŋa hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa we nɩtɔdɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ gyɩ ville ko fɩyɛlɩ ŋ bembii rɛ weliŋ. Ʋ gyɩ bɩ fáá hɩɩsɩ anɩɩ ba aa kana ŋ tɔ nɩtɔdɩya tɩyaŋ wɩya.

english_verse: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ aa ko dɩ ʋ pele Roma paalʋʋ, ʋ gyɩ gɔllɩ kyɛ ŋ nɛ abee sɩfɩyasɩ a mʋ na ŋ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ á Tɩɩna Krisita fá ʋ sikii kyɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko. Ka ɩ tɩɩ mɛ naa gɛɛ ʋ gyɩ aa kyiyeli ŋ nɛ saŋa hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa we Ɛfiso tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Ŋ biye, kɩ sʋl Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ʋ tɩŋ Krisita bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ a tɩya ɩ dee.

english_verse: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ buloŋ ɩ aa nɩya dɩ ŋ basa nɩgyamaa tɩyaŋ, ɩ mɛ kpa ba tɩɩ a daga nala aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ dɩ ba mɛ wuwo kpa ba a daga ba dɔŋtɩŋsɩ.

english_verse: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
translation_verse: Ɩ aa yaa Yesu Krisita laalyuwol aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ wɩya, kaŋ weliŋ a mɛ na ɩ tʋwara tol.

english_verse: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
translation_verse: Pɩparɩ hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ tɩɩna, ʋ rɛ maga dɩ ʋ laa sɩya di ʋ baga kɩna.

english_verse: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
translation_verse: Kpa wɩya no ŋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ɩ a we ɩ nyuu tɩyaŋ a kɩ bɩɩnɩ beewɩya á Tɩɩna Yesu sɩ suri ɩ hakɩla dɩ ɩ wuwo gyɩŋ ba memii weliŋ.

english_verse: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
translation_verse: Ta yeŋŋe anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kyisi Yesu Krisita aa yaa Deviti doho nal sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Wɩweliye hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ, ŋ kɩ basɩ rɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
translation_verse: Wɩweliye no basɩɩ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ kɩ na tʋwara nyɛ, ba paalɩ vʋwa ŋ abee kyɔrʋmɔ anɩɩ ŋ aa yaa wɩbɔŋyaal. Amɛ ba bɩ sɩ wuwo kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ kɛ vʋwa.

english_verse: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ wɩɩ buloŋ aa yaa ŋ mɛ, ka ŋ aa kaŋ mala rɛ akuu nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya wɩya, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a laa ba mɛ ta dɩ ba we Wɩɩsɩ lee, a na ʋ gaŋdarɩ hʋ aa we doŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no ŋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ma yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, Dɩ á bee Yesu buloŋ nɛ sʋba, ɛɛ kɛ, á beel-ʋ buloŋ mɛ rɛ bɩl sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ kaŋ mala, á beel-ʋ buloŋ nɛ sɩ di ʋ koro hʋ. Dɩ ámaa rɛ baa á bɩ gyɩŋ Yesu, ʋ mɛ sɩ maakyiye baa dɩ ʋ bɩ gyɩŋ ma.

english_verse: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ bee tɩŋa ʋ abee wɩtɩɩ, ʋ kɛ ha kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ, beewɩya ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo mʋrɩ ʋ tɩɩ. Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ hʋ tʋma aa fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ

english_verse: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
translation_verse: Basɩ tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ buloŋ anɩɩ ba ta ko kɩ yeŋŋi wɩya no kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ, aŋ kʋrɩsɩ ba dɩgɩna abee sɩfɩyasɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ dɩ ba leŋ nyʋʋtaaduwo wɩbasɩɩ bee dɔmɔŋ. Beewɩya wɩya no bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ tɩya nala hʋ aa nɩɩ ba see kyogisi dʋŋ.

english_verse: Keep away from worthless and useless talk. It only leads people farther away from God.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩ tɩɩ lɩɩ wɩya hʋ aa bee fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ basɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Beewɩya wɩya no aa leŋ nala marɩ kpa ba hal yɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ.

english_verse: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
translation_verse: Nala no iriŋ wɩdagɩya aa pɩsa gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ naawal aa kpa nal naŋpʋŋ buloŋ di gɛɛ. Hamineyo abee Filetusi rɛ yaa nala no badɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
translation_verse: Nala no balɩya nyʋgɩsa wɩtɩɩ hʋ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, aŋ kaŋ nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di badɔmɔŋ mɛ hakɩllɩ kɩ vʋgɩmɩ abee wɩya hʋ ba aa basɩ tɩyaŋ. Beewɩya ba aa daga nala rɛ anɩɩ saŋa hʋ nala aa sɩ sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ teŋ para rɛ.

english_verse: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ kɛ sɩna gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ gyememiduwo aa bɩ sɩ maakyiye gyigisi. Wɩɩ hʋ ba aa saba ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ nyɛ: “Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ gyɩŋ nala hʋ aa yaa ʋ nala rɛ,” a bɩl baa, “Nal hʋ buloŋ aa baa ʋ yaa ʋ nal, ʋ tɩɩna maga dɩ ʋ leŋ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ rɛ.”

english_verse: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
translation_verse: Dɩɩbal kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, kɩdigbaŋsɩ iriŋ iriŋ buloŋ nɛ aa we doŋ. Badɔmɔŋ aa yaa salma kɩmarɩya rɛ, badɔmɔŋ yaa sɩlbasɩ, badɔmɔŋ mɛ yaa daasɩ kɩmarɩya, badɔmɔŋ mɛ yaa kyʋl kɩmɔɔlɩya. Ba aa kpa gbaŋsɩ no badɔmɔŋ biŋ nɛ a kaŋ kɩ we kɩdiiliye kyɛbala kyɛɛ dʋŋ, aŋ kaŋ badɔmɔŋ mɛ kɩ we kɩdiiliye kyɛɛ kɛ buloŋ.

english_verse: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ dɩ nal lɛ lɩɩ ʋ tɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kana ʋ tɩɩna kɩ tʋŋ ʋ sɩfɩyaŋ tʋma dʋŋ. Beewɩya ɛɛ daga nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna rɛ a bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ wɩya, ʋ yaa siri rɛ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kana ʋ tʋŋ tʋŋweliye kɛ iriŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
translation_verse: Lɩɩ ɩ tɩɩ a lɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ bapʋwasɩya bee hatoliye aa kɩ yaa tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ɩ bee nala hʋ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ abee ma tɩdɩgɩ buloŋ maga dɩ ma kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ nɛ a sɩŋ ma laadii tɩyaŋ weliŋ a kaŋ kyori abee nyʋʋdɩgɩ.

english_verse: Stay away from stupid and senseless arguments. These only lead to trouble,
translation_verse: Ta kpaa ɩ tɩɩ kɩ mal nala hʋ aa kaŋ nyʋʋtaaduwo laama, beewɩya ɩ tɩɩ gyɩma anɩɩ kaasɩ rɛ yaa wɩya no kateŋ.

english_verse: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
translation_verse: Ka Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ mɛ bɩ maga dɩ ʋ kɩ kaa kaasɩ. Ʋ maga dɩ ʋ kaŋ bɔnyɛ bee nal buloŋ nɛ, a wuwo kɩ daga nala weliŋ, aŋ kaŋ kenyiri mɛ.

english_verse: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
translation_verse: Ʋ maga dɩ ʋ kpa sɩfɩyala rɛ a daga wɩya sɩya a kɩ tɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ sɩŋ ʋ wɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Kapuwo kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ suri ba sɩya dɩ ba bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ a ko gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ.

english_verse: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ba bɩrɩmɩ ba hakɩllɩ a marɩ kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ a kaŋ ba tɩɩ lɩɩ Sɩtaanɩ barɩgɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ʋ fa bara kaŋ ba rɛ, a leŋ ba kɩ tɩŋ ʋ kyɛrɩ.

english_verse: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
translation_verse: Ŋ biye, laa wɩɩ no biŋ nɩɩ aa bee kyuwori doŋ: Saŋa hʋ dʋnɩya tenii aa sɩ ko kpaga, ba sɩ lɔrɩ kɩŋkaŋ a tɩya nala.

english_verse: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
translation_verse: Nala bɩ sɩ kaŋ kyori, a bɩ sɩ kpa wɩya kɩ kyɛ dɔmɔŋ. Ba sɩ kɩ kyogi dɔmɔŋ fene, a bɩ sɩ gyɩŋ ba tɩɩ kanɩɩ, nala sɩ bɔmɔ anɩɩ naakyige, aŋ ha haasɩ wɩɩ buloŋ aa yaa wɩwelii mɛ.

english_verse: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
translation_verse: Ba sɩ kɩ lɩɩ dɔmɔŋ hala, a bɩ sɩ kɩ yaa wɩya bee ba hakɩllɩ, aŋ kɩ daga ba tɩɩ kɩŋkaŋ, a kyo ba dʋŋʋ wɩyaalɩya a te Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
translation_verse: Ba aa kɩ yaa wɩya gɛɛ anɩɩ ba aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, amɛ wɩtɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ba bɩ laa di anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ wɩɩ buloŋ dee rɛ. Ta leŋ dɩ ɩ bee nala no iriŋ pɛ wɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, these people are enemies of the truth. Their minds are sick, and their faith isn't real.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hʋ Gyaanisi bee Gyambɩrɩsɩ gyɩ aa yaŋ bɩ sɩŋ Moosi kɩŋ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nala no mɛ bɩ sɩŋ gbala wɩtɩɩ hʋ. Nala no nyuni bee tɩma, ba aa fugo nyɩya wɩya baa ba laa Krisita wɩya di rɛ.

english_verse: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
translation_verse: Amɛ ba bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa gɛɛ mʋ sɩya, beewɩya nal buloŋ sɩ na ba bambugiliŋ anɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ gyɩ aa puu Gyaanisi bee Gyambɩrɩsɩ. Pɔɔl basɩ wɩya kyagɩlɩ Timoti

english_verse: Timothy, you know what I teach and how I live. You know what I want to do and what I believe. You have seen how patient and loving I am, and how in the past I put up with
translation_verse: Amɛ ɩ kɛ gyɩŋ ŋ wɩdagɩya abee ŋ wɩyaalɩya abee wɩɩ hʋ aa kyɩlɩ ŋ, ŋ mɩɩbol no tɩyaŋ buloŋ nɛ. Ɩ gyɩŋ ɛɛ ŋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ, a gyɩŋ gɛɛ ŋ aa kaŋ kenyiri mɛ. Ɩ gyɩŋ gɛɛ ŋ aa kyo nala rɛ, a bɩl gyɩŋ gɛɛ ŋ aa kaŋ mala mɛ.

english_verse: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di, a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ weliŋ, ba sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ.

english_verse: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
translation_verse: Amɛ nɩbɔmɔ abee nala hʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ mʋrɩ nala, ba wɩbɔmɔ sɩ marɩ lɔrɩ. Ba sɩ marɩ kɩ mʋrɩ nala dɩ nala mɛ kɩ mʋrɩ ba.

english_verse: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
translation_verse: Amɛ ɩ kɛ ha kɩ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ, aŋ kaŋ wɩya hʋ ɩ aa gʋnna a laa di mɛ weliŋ, beewɩya ɩ gyɩŋ nala hʋ lee ɩ aa gʋnnɩ wɩya no rɛ.

english_verse: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
translation_verse: A piili ɩ biibiri tɩyaŋ buloŋ, ɩ gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ aa we Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɩ gyɩma anɩɩ wɩya no rɛ wuwo tɩya ɩ wɩgyʋŋ, a leŋ ɩ laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di, ʋ laa ɩ ta.

english_verse: The Scriptures train God's servants to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ wuwo sɩŋ kpaŋkpaŋ a wuwo tʋŋ tʋŋweliye iriŋ kɛ buloŋ.

english_verse: The time is coming when people won't listen to good teaching. Instead, they will look for teachers who will please them by telling them only what they are itching to hear.
translation_verse: Beewɩya saŋa kɩdɩgɩ sɩ ko pele dɩ nala bɩ sɩ yaa siri dɩ ba gyegili nɩɩ Krisita wɩtɩɩ hʋ. Amɛ ba sɩ kɩ tɩŋ ba tɩɩ hakɩllɩ wɩkyɛɛlɩya tɩyaŋ, a gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩdagɩla yʋga dɩ ba daga ba wɩya hʋ ba tɩɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ba nɩɩ.

english_verse: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
translation_verse: Ŋ basɩ wɩɩ no kɩ tɩya ɩ rɛ beewɩya saŋa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ŋ mɩɩbol teŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ pele rɛ. Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ba aa kpaa ŋ kɩ lɩɩ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ.

english_verse: So a crown will be given to me for pleasing the Lord. He judges fairly, and on the day of judgment he will give a crown to me and to everyone else who wants him to appear with power. Personal Instructions
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no, á Tɩɩna Krisita sarɩdiil hʋ aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ, ʋ marɩ tɩpʋlʋŋ kuworinyupugi bine ŋ nɛ dɩ ʋ kpa siili ŋ kyɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko. Ŋ dʋŋ mɛ yaŋ daa ʋ sɩ yaa gɛɛ tɩya amɛ abee nala hʋ buloŋ aa gyegili ʋ mɩɩgɩ koyi. Pɔɔl sʋl Timoti dɩ ʋ yaa wɩya badɔmɔŋ tɩya ʋ

english_verse: Come to see me as soon as you can.
translation_verse: Yaa ɩ kuwokeri buloŋ aŋ ko ŋ lee lagɩ.

english_verse: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Dimasɩ aa kyo dʋnɩya wɩkanɩya wɩya, ʋ vɩya ŋ ta rɛ aŋ fá mʋ Tesaloniika. Kiresikɛŋ mɛ mʋ Galetiya paalʋʋ rɛ, ka Titusi mɛ mʋ Dalmaatɩya paalʋʋ.

english_verse: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
translation_verse: Luka dʋŋ nɛ ha we ŋ lee daha. Dɩ ɩ rɛ ko kɩ ko ŋ lee, pɛ kaŋ Maakɩ mɛ kɩ ko, beewɩya ʋ kaŋ kyiyelii tɩya ŋ nɛ ŋ tʋma tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
translation_verse: Ŋ tɩŋ Takikusi rɛ ʋ mʋ Ɛfiso.

english_verse: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩ leŋ ŋ gabal hʋ ta Kaapusi lee rɛ Turowasɩ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ɩ ko kɩ ko, laa ko tɩya ŋ. A paa ŋ tenni hʋ mɛ pɛ kaŋ kɩ ko, amarɩkpatɩya tenni hʋ ba aa kaŋ teŋtɩgɩsɩya marɩ hʋ.

english_verse: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
translation_verse: Lugil hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Alizaŋda gyɩ kpʋʋ ŋ nɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa yaa ŋ, Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ nɛ sɩ tun-ʋ.

english_verse: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
translation_verse: Ɩ tɩɩ mɛ kɩ gyɩma ʋ wɩya weliŋ, beewɩya saŋa hʋ á gyɩ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya ʋ gyɩ kpaa nyʋʋtaaduwo kyeŋ ma rɛ weliŋ.

english_verse: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ ba gyɩ aa piile dɩ ba di ŋ sarɩya, nal buloŋ gyɩ bɩ sɩŋ ŋ hal. Ba buloŋ gyɩ fáá vɩya ŋ ta rɛ. Amɛ ŋ aa sʋl Wɩɩsɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ leŋ wɩɩ tɩya ba.

english_verse: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
translation_verse: Amɛ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita gyɩ sɩŋ ŋ hal lɛ, a tɩya ŋ dee ŋ wuwo basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Gyuuma buloŋ nɩɩ, aŋ lɩɩ ŋ sʋʋ bʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita sɩ lɩɩ ŋ wɩbɔŋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, a pɔ ŋ weliŋ, a kana ŋ gyɩŋ mʋ gyʋʋ ʋ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ. Ʋ sɩ na dannɩɩ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ. Amɩ. Kyʋwal kateŋse

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
translation_verse: Kyʋwalɩ Pirisila abee Akula tɩya ŋ, a kyʋwalɩ Onisifɔrɔsɩ abee ʋ dɩya nala buloŋ mɛ.

english_verse: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
translation_verse: Irasitu gyɩ mɩɩgɩ hɔŋ Koriŋti tɩyaŋ nɛ, aŋka ŋ leŋ Turofimɔsɩ mɛ ta Miletu tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ʋ gyɩ bɩ kaŋ laaŋfɩya.

english_verse: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Yaa sɩfɩyaŋ aŋ ko daha, ka dɩ puwo na luri. Yubulusi abee Pudɛŋsɩ abee Liinusi abee Kulodɩya, abee á nɩmmabalɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ buloŋ aa kyʋwalɩ ɩ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩ we ɩ lee. Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ sɩ we ma buloŋ lee.

english_verse: So, at the proper time, God our Savior gave this message and told me to announce what he had said.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyo rɛ, ʋ kpa mɩɩbol no wɩya daga ma ʋ wɩweliye hʋ tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ á laataal lɛ kpaa wɩɩ no we ŋ nosi tɩyaŋ, dɩ ŋ laa basɩ tɩya nala.

english_verse: Titus, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and Christ Jesus our Savior will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! What Titus Was To Do in Crete
translation_verse: Ŋ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ɩ Titusi rɛ. Akuu á buloŋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di wɩya, ɩ yaa ŋ biye tɩɩ rɛ. Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Laataal Yesu Krisita sɩ kyiyeli ɩ a leŋ dɩ ɩ hɔŋ abee laaŋfɩya. Wɩɩ hʋ Titusi aa maga dɩ ʋ yaa Kiriti paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ

english_verse: I left you in Crete to do what had been left undone and to appoint leaders for the churches in each town. As I told you,
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ ŋ leme ɩ Kiriti paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ yaa dɩ ɩ wuwo kaŋ wɩya hʋ fa aa maga dɩ a yaa ka á bɩ wuwo yaa, a pɛ pɛ dɔmɔŋ. Ka dɩ tɔɔ buloŋ tɩyaŋ mɛ dɩ ɩ lɩɩ Krisitabiisi sɩlaala doŋ anɩɩ ŋ aa daga ɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
translation_verse: Kiriti tɩmma vʋgɩl kɩdɩgɩ tɩɩ gba gyɩ basɩ doŋ nala wɩya rɛ a baa, Kiriti tɩmma buloŋ yaa wɩnyɩyɛla rɛ, a yaa nɩbɔmɔ, a yaa naboliŋ tɩmma, a yaa teŋwɩɩ tɩmma mɛ.

english_verse: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa basa yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, nɔsɩ ba abee sɩfɩyasɩ dɩ ba sɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ ba aa laa di tɩyaŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: Don't pay any attention to any of those senseless Jewish stories and human commands. These are made up by people who won't obey the truth.
translation_verse: Bil basɩ tɩya ba dɩ ba ta kpaa ba nyuni we Gyuuma naabaala wɩkanɩya tɩyaŋ, a ta kɩ tɩŋ nala hʋ aa vɩya Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ nyʋwa mɛ.

english_verse: Everything is pure for someone whose heart is pure. But nothing is pure for an unbeliever with a dirty mind. That person's mind and conscience are destroyed.
