translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ, kɩŋ buloŋ mɛ weliye rɛ ba lee. Amɛ bisiŋ tɩmma hʋ aa bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di kɛ lee, kɩŋ buloŋ yaa kɩbɔŋ nɛ. Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ba tɩsɩ bee ba hakɩllɩ buloŋ nɛ birise. Ba bɩ gyɩŋ wɩbɔŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
translation_verse: Ba aa basɩ anɩɩ ba gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, amɛ ba wɩyaalɩya daga anɩɩ ba bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ. Ba wɩyaalɩya lɔrɔ, ba bee nɩɩ nal buloŋ nyʋwa, ba paalɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa wɩwelii buloŋ mɛ.

english_verse: Tell the older women to behave as those who love the Lord should. They must not gossip about others or be slaves of wine. They must teach what is proper,
translation_verse: Basɩ tɩya hanɩhɩyasɩ hʋ mɛ dɩ ba kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa daga anɩɩ ba aa fá Wɩɩsɩ rɛ. Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ba kɩ gaa nala hala, koo dɩ ba yaa sɩnyʋwala. Amɛ ʋ maga dɩ ba kɩ daga wɩya hʋ aa weliye rɛ, dɩ gɛɛ wuwo leŋ

english_verse: so the younger women will be loving wives and mothers.
translation_verse: dɩ ba wuwo daga hatoliye mɛ dɩ ba kyo ba balama abee ba biisi,

english_verse: Each of the younger women must be sensible and kind, as well as a good homemaker, who puts her own husband first. Then no one can say insulting things about God's message.
translation_verse: a wuwo kaŋ ba tɩɩ weliŋ, a ta kɩ yaa wɩlaama, aŋ kɩ deŋ ba dɩya nala nyuu tɩyaŋ weliŋ, a kaŋ bɔnyɛ, a kɩ tɩŋ ba balama nyʋʋsɩ weliŋ, dɩ nal buloŋ ta wuwo basɩ wɩbɔŋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ lugo tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Use clean language that no one can criticize. Do this, and your enemies will be too ashamed to say anything against you.
translation_verse: Leŋ dɩ ɩ wɩbasɩya buloŋ yaa wɩtɩɩ, dɩ nal buloŋ ta wuwo kaŋ wɩɩ tarɩ ba tɩyaŋ. Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ hɩɩsɩ kaŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ sɩŋ ma kɩŋ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ba bɩ sɩ na wɩbɔŋ buloŋ á tɩyaŋ a basɩ.

english_verse: Tell slaves always to please their owners by obeying them in everything. Slaves must not talk back to their owners
translation_verse: Basɩ tɩya yosi mɛ dɩ ba kɩ tɩŋ ba tɩmma nyʋʋsɩ wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ba tɩmma tenni fɩyɛlɩ ba nyuu tɩyaŋ. Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ba laa wɩya kɩ basɩ ba nyʋʋsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: or steal from them. They must be completely honest and trustworthy. Then everyone will show great respect for what is taught about God our Savior. God's Kindness and the New Life
translation_verse: Ba ta kɩ gaa ba tɩmma kɩna. Amɛ ba wɩyaalɩya buloŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ maga dɩ ba leŋ dɩ ba tɩmma laa ba di rɛ anɩɩ ba kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, ɛɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ nal buloŋ gyɩma anɩɩ á Laataal Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ yaa wɩya aa kaŋ tɩŋɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: We are filled with hope, as we wait for the glorious return of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Á aa we dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ nyɛ, á aa gyegili haŋ kyɛbal hʋ á Wɩɩbal abee á Laataal Yesu Krisita, aa sɩ ko abee ʋ gaŋdarɩ rɛ.

english_verse: He gave himself to rescue us from everything evil and to make our hearts pure. He wanted us to be his own people and to be eager to do right.
translation_verse: Á wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ sʋba, dɩ ʋ laa ma ta á wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ tɩyaŋ a pɩɩsɩ á bisiŋ buloŋ ta, dɩ á yaa ʋ tɩɩ nala, a yaa nala hʋ aa kpaa ba nyuu we wɩweliye yayɩ dʋŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Remind your people to obey the rulers and authorities and not to be rebellious. They must always be ready to do something helpful
translation_verse: Bɩl marɩ basɩ tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ anɩɩ ʋ maga dɩ ba kpa ba tɩɩ tɩya ba sɩlaala rɛ abee nala hʋ aa deŋ ba nyuu, a kɩ tɩŋ ba nyʋwa, aŋ yaa siri dɩ ba yaa wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ aa weliye.

english_verse: God our Savior showed us how good and kind he is.
translation_verse: Amɛ saŋa kɩdɩgɩ aa ko pele, á Laataal Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ ʋ bɔnyɛ abee ʋ kyori daga ma rɛ a laa ma ta.

english_verse: He saved us because of his mercy, and not because of any good things we have done. God washed us by the power of the Holy Spirit. He gave us new birth and a fresh beginning.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ anɩɩ á wɩyaaweliye yayɩ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ laa ma ta. Amɛ ʋ aa fáá á sikii wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ laa ma ta. Ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩŋa a sasɩ á wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ ta, aŋ tɩya ma mɩɩbofalɩɩ anɩɩ ba aa marɩ lʋl ma.

english_verse: God sent Jesus Christ our Savior to give us his Spirit.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ á Laataal Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ nɛ a kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii no we á tɩyaŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: Jesus treated us much better than we deserve. He made us acceptable to God and gave us the hope of eternal life.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ leŋ á yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, a yaa ʋ balɩya, a kaŋ bayɩyɛla anɩɩ á sɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: This message is certainly true. These teachings are useful and helpful for everyone. I want you to insist that the people follow them, so that all who have faith in God will be sure to do good deeds.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no paalɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ marɩ basɩ wɩya no weliŋ nɛ a tɩya nala hʋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di, dɩ ba kpa ba nyuni we wɩweliye yayɩ tɩyaŋ saŋa buloŋ. Beewɩya wɩya no yaa wɩweliye rɛ, a kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya nihuwobiŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: But don't have anything to do with stupid arguments about ancestors. And stay away from disagreements and quarrels about the Law of Moses. Such arguments are useless and senseless.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma ta kaŋ wɩtɔɔnɩ kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ. Ma ta dɔgɩsɩ ma tɩɩ a kɩ dɩɩsɩ ma naabatuugo ma fene. Ma yaŋ leŋ hɩyawʋ-hɩyawʋ bee dɔmɔŋ, a ta kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi fa aa saba tɩya ma mɛ wɩya kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ. Beewɩya, wɩya no buloŋ yaa wɩtɔɔnɩ rɛ, a bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ.

english_verse: You know their minds are twisted, and their own sins show how guilty they are. Personal Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Gyɩma weliŋ anɩɩ nal no tɩɩna yaa wɩbɔŋyaal lɛ a bee kyɛ wɩtɩɩ. Ʋ tɩɩ wɩyaalɩya di ʋ sarɩya rɛ, ʋ tele. Wɩkateŋse

english_verse: I plan to send Artemas or Tychicus to you. After he arrives, please try your best to meet me at Nicopolis. I have decided to spend the winter there.
translation_verse: Ŋ sɩ tʋŋ Atɩmasɩ koo Takikusi dɩ ʋ ko ɩ lee. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko ko, yaa kuwokeri aŋ ko kyem-ŋ Nikopoli tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ŋ yaa ŋ hakɩla rɛ anɩɩ ŋ sɩ hɔŋ doŋ dɩ puwo saŋa baŋ mʋ.

english_verse: When Zenas the lawyer and Apollos get ready to leave, help them as much as you can, so they won't have need of anything.
translation_verse: Dɩ Ziina, sarɩdiil hʋ, abee Apolo rɛ ko yaa siri dɩ ba vala ba ŋmanɩɩ hʋ, yaa kuwokeri aŋ pɛ ba tɩyaŋ weliŋ, a tɩya ba kɩŋ hʋ buloŋ ba aa kyɛ.

english_verse: Greetings to you from everyone here. Greet all of our friends who share in our faith. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Ŋ bee nala hʋ buloŋ aa we daha aa kyʋwalɩ ɩ. Kyʋwalɩ á kyaŋsɩ hʋ buloŋ mɛ aa laa Yesu wɩya di tɩya ma. Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyiyeli ma buloŋ.

english_verse: From Paul, who is in jail for serving Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is like a brother because of our faith. Philemon, you work with us and are very dear to us. This letter is to you
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Pɔɔl ba aa kaŋ tɔ nɩtɔdɩyaŋ á tɩɩna Yesu Krisita wɩya, abee á nɩɩnabiye Timoti rɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ɩ Filemɔŋ, á kyaŋkyoolii, abee á tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋ,

english_verse: and to the church that meets in your home. It is also to our dear friend Apphia and to Archippus, who serves the Lord as we do.
translation_verse: abee Krisitabiisi hʋ aa laŋŋɩ ɩ dɩya tɩyaŋ, abee á nɩɩnatoluu Afiya, abee Akipu, nal hʋ á beel-ʋ buloŋ aa lʋgɩ dɩ á leŋ dɩ nala gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Philemon's Love and Faith
translation_verse: Á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ abee ba fɩyɛlʋʋ sɩ we ma lee.

english_verse: Philemon, each time I mention you in my prayers, I thank God.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ saŋa kɛ buloŋ, ŋ aa liisi ɩ wɩya rɛ, a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ.

english_verse: I hear about your faith in our Lord Jesus and about your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, ŋ aa nɩɩ ɛɛ hʋ ɩ aa kyo Krisitabiisi buloŋ nɛ, abee ɛɛ hʋ ɩ aa laa á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita wɩya di.

english_verse: My friend, your love has made me happy and has greatly encouraged me. It has also cheered the hearts of God's people. Paul Speaks to Philemon about Onesimus
translation_verse: Ŋ naabiikpɩyana, ɛɛ hʋ ɩ aa kyo Wɩɩsɩ nala, ʋ yaa ŋ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, a leŋ ŋ teŋ mɛ polli, beewɩya ɩ leŋ Wɩɩsɩ nala bembiye fɩyɛlɩ rɛ. Pɔɔl sʋl Filemɔŋ dɩ ʋ kaŋ Oniisimu weliŋ

english_verse: But I would rather ask you to do it simply because of love. Yes, as someone in jail for Christ,
translation_verse: Ŋ fa sɩ wuwo kpa fɩlɩɩ beewɩya, ŋ yaa nal aa laa Yesu Krisita naasɩ sɩŋ nɛ, ka ba ha kana ŋ tɔ nɩtɔdɩyaŋ gyɩnaŋ ʋ wɩya. Amɛ kyori tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ kpa sʋlɩɩ nyɛ.

english_verse: I beg you to help Onesimus! He is like a son to me because I led him to Christ here in jail.
translation_verse: Ŋ biibaal Oniisimu wɩya rɛ ŋ kɩ sʋla ɩ. Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ŋ tɩɩ biye Krisita tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩŋa a laa Yesu wɩya di saŋa hʋ ŋ aa we nɩtɔdɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Before this, he was useless to you, but now he is useful both to you and to me.
translation_verse: Ʋ fa bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya ɩ. Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no ʋ kaŋ tɔnɔ tɩya ŋ beel-ɩ buloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Sending Onesimus back to you makes me very sad.
translation_verse: Ŋ leŋ ʋ mɩɩgɩ kɩ ko ɩ lee rɛ, amɛ ʋ wɩya dɔbɔ ŋ bembii tɩyaŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: I would like to keep him here with me, where he could take your place in helping me while I am here in prison for preaching the good news.
translation_verse: Ŋ ha aa we nɩtɔdɩya tɩyaŋ Yesu Krisita wɩweliye hʋ wɩya nyɛ, ŋ fa kyo dɩ ʋ we ŋ lee daha rɛ, a fa laa ɩ nyuu kɩ kyiyeli ŋ.

english_verse: But I won't do anything unless you agree to it first. I want your act of kindness to come from your heart, and not be something you feel forced to do.
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ fɩla ɩ dɩ ɩ kyiyeli ŋ. Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ɩ kyiyeli ŋ nɛ ɩ tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ bɩ sɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ dɩ ɩ bɩ laa nyʋwa.

english_verse: Perhaps Onesimus was taken from you for a little while so you could have him back for good,
translation_verse: Kapuwo wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ Oniisimu gyɩ lɩɩ ɩ lee kyɛyɛ baŋmana rɛ yaa dɩ ʋ mɩɩgɩ ko ɩ lee a we doŋ deŋdeŋ kɩ mʋ.

english_verse: but not as a slave. Onesimus is much more than a slave. To me he is a dear friend, but to you he is even more, both as a person and as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Oniisimu fa yaa ɩ yoŋ nɛ. Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, ʋ bɩl bɩ yaa ɩ yoŋ dʋŋ, ʋ tee ɩ yoŋ nɛ. Ʋ yaa á nɩɩnabiye tɩɩ rɛ Krisita wɩya. Ʋ wɩya dɔbɔ ŋ bembii tɩyaŋ nɛ weliŋ. Amɛ ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ wɩya gba kyɩla ɩ te ŋ nɛ, akuu ʋ aa yaa ɩ yoŋ abee ɩ naabiye buloŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu tɩyaŋ wɩya.

english_verse: If you consider me a friend because of Christ, then welcome Onesimus as you would welcome me.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ yaa ɩ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋ Krisita ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ kɛ dɩ ʋ rɛ ko mɩɩgɩ ko, kana ʋ weliŋ anɩɩ ɩ fa aa sɩ kana ŋ tɩɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: My dear friend and follower of Christ our Lord, please cheer me up by doing this for me.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ naabiikpɩyana, ŋ aa sʋla ɩ á Tɩɩna nyubaanɩŋ, yaa wɩɩ no tɩya ŋ. Akuu á aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ Krisita tɩyaŋ wɩya leŋ dɩ ŋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ.

english_verse: Epaphras is also here in jail for being a follower of Christ Jesus. He sends his greetings,
translation_verse: Ɛpafirasɩ mɛ ba aa kaŋ tɔ pɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ akuu Yesu Krisita wɩya mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ɩ.

english_verse: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, who work together with me.
translation_verse: Ŋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Maakɩ abee Arisitaakusi abee Dimasɩ abee Luka mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ɩ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ sɩ we ma buloŋ lee.

english_verse: Long ago in many ways and at many times God's prophets spoke his message to our ancestors.
translation_verse: Faafaa hʋ tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ leŋ ʋ tɩŋdaala tɩŋ ŋmaŋgyamaa rɛ a villi basɩ wɩya a tɩya á naabaala.

english_verse: But now at last, God sent his Son to bring his message to us. God created the universe by his Son, and everything will someday belong to the Son.
translation_verse: Amɛ gyɩnaŋ sɩgballɩya no kɛ, ʋ Biye tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩŋa, a basɩ wɩya tɩya ma. Wɩɩsɩ Biye no tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ tɩŋa a marɩ dʋnɩya kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ a bɩl lɩɩ ʋ mɛ a kpa dʋnɩya kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: God's Son has all the brightness of God's own glory and is like him in every way. By his own mighty word, he holds the universe together. After the Son had washed away our sins, he sat down at the right side of the glorious God in heaven.
translation_verse: Biye hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ á kɩ na Wɩɩsɩ gaŋdarɩ aa maga gɛɛ. Ɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa kɩya, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ biye hʋ mɛ kɩɩ, ka ʋ kaŋ ʋ wɩbii hʋ aa kaŋ dee a kɩ deŋ dʋnɩya kɩna buloŋ. Ʋ aa sasɩ á wɩbɔmɔ ta hal tɩyaŋ, ʋ hɔŋ Bakɔɔ noduu logiŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ rɛ tee Wɩɩsɩ Malɩkasɩ

english_verse: He had become much greater than the angels, and the name he was given is far greater than any of theirs. God's Son Is Greater than Angels
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ rɛ tee malɩkasɩ buloŋ. Feŋ hʋ mɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ʋ, ʋ rɛ tee feŋ hʋ malɩkasɩ hʋ aa kana.

english_verse: God has never said to any of the angels, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!” Neither has God said to any of them, “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son!”
translation_verse: Beewɩya, Wɩɩsɩ ha bɩ maakyiye basɩ tɩya malɩka buloŋ a baa: “Ɩ yaa ŋ Biibaal lɛ, mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa ɩ kuwo gyɩnaŋ.” Ʋ bɩl bɩ basɩ tɩya malɩka kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ mɛ a baa: “Ŋ sɩ yaa ɩ Kuwo, dɩ ɩ mɛ yaa ŋ Biye.”

english_verse: When God brings his first-born Son into the world, he commands all of his angels to worship him.
translation_verse: Amɛ saŋa hʋ ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ ta ʋ Biihɩyawʋ hʋ dɩ ʋ ko tuu dʋnɩya, ʋ basa rɛ a baa, “Malɩkasɩ buloŋ maga dɩ ba kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ rɛ.”

english_verse: And when God speaks about the angels, he says, “I change my angels into wind and my servants into flaming fire.”
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa basa a mʋ tile ʋ malɩkasɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ nyɛ: Ʋ baa, “Ŋ leŋ ŋ malɩkasɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ puwo a leŋ ŋ tʋŋtʋnna mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ diŋgel.”

english_verse: But God says about his Son, “You are God, and you will rule as King forever! Your royal power brings about justice.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa basa a tile ʋ Biye hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ nyɛ: Ʋ baa, “Wɩɩsɩ, ɩ koro sɩ we doŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ. Tɩpʋlʋŋ nɛ sɩ yaa ɩ kuworidaatɩgɩɩ dɩ ɩ kaŋ kɩ deŋ ɩ nala.”

english_verse: You loved justice and hated evil, and so I, your God, have chosen you. I appointed you and made you happier than any of your friends.”
translation_verse: “Ɩ kyo wɩweliye rɛ aŋ haasɩ wɩbɔmɔ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ mɩyaŋ ɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpa ɩ yohuŋ a te ɩ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ buloŋ, a leŋ ɩ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ.

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “In the beginning, Lord, you were the one who laid the foundation of the earth and created the heavens.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩl baa, “Ɩ á Tɩɩna, ɩ rɛ taa taŋha buŋbuŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ, a ta wɩɩsɩnyuu mɛ.

english_verse: They will all disappear and wear out like clothes, but you will last forever.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha buloŋ sɩ nyʋgɩsɩ, amɛ ɩ kɛ ha sɩ we doŋ. Ba buloŋ sɩ bɩrɩmɩ kɩbɩnɩya, a kɔsɩ anɩɩ gannɩ aa kɔsɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: You will roll them up like a robe and change them like a garment. But you are always the same, and you will live forever.”
translation_verse: Ɩ sɩ kaŋ ba kpeme anɩɩ gal. Ba sɩ bɩrɩmɩ kɩbɩnɩya anɩɩ gannɩ. Amɛ ɩ kɛ bee bɩrɩmɩ. Ɩ mɩɩbol mɛ bɩ sɩ maakyiye teŋ.”

english_verse: God never said to any of the angels, “Sit at my right side until I make your enemies into a footstool for you!”
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ bɩl aa basa tɩya ʋ rɛ nyɛ: Ʋ baa, “Ko hɔŋ ŋ noduu logiŋ, ka dɩ ŋ yuwo di ɩ dɔmɔ buloŋ teŋ.” Malɩka bee rɛ Wɩɩsɩ ha maakyiye basɩ wɩɩ no tɩya?

english_verse: We must give our full attention to what we were told, so we won't drift away.
translation_verse: Akuu wɩɩ no wɩya, ʋ maga dɩ á kaŋ wɩweliye hʋ á aa nɩya weliŋ nɛ, dɩ wɩɩ buloŋ ta ko viisi ma mʋ gama.

english_verse: The message spoken by angels proved to be true, and all who disobeyed or rejected it were punished as they deserved.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ malɩkasɩ gyɩ aa basɩ tɩya á naabaala gyɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Dɩ nal lɛ gyɩ vɩya ba tɩŋɩɩ, koo dɩ nal lɛ gyɩ kyogi ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ, Wɩɩsɩ aa dɔgɩsɩ ʋ gɛɛ aa maga rɛ.

english_verse: So if we refuse this great way of being saved, how can we hope to escape? The Lord himself was the first to tell about it, and people who heard the message proved to us that it was true.
translation_verse: Dɩ nyɛ rɛ yaŋ we doŋ, wɩbee rɛ sɩ laa ma dɩ ámaa rɛ kpaa á hal yɩya wɩbal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa yaa a laa ma ta. Á Tɩɩna Yesu rɛ laa sɩya basɩ laatayɩ no wɩya, ka nala hʋ a nɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ mɛ kyosi basɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ ʋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: God himself showed that his message was true by working all kinds of powerful miracles and wonders. He also gave his Holy Spirit to anyone he chose to. The One Who Leads Us To Be Saved
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ mɛ daga anɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ ba aa basa yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, beewɩya ʋ kuu wɩɩ hʋ wɩya rɛ a yaa wɩkperiye abee wɩmagɩla aŋ kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii bɔnyɛ kɩna mɛ tɩya nala ʋ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ. Nal hʋ tɩyaŋ á aa sɩ tɩŋa a na laatayɩ

english_verse: We know that God did not put the future world under the power of angels.
translation_verse: Malɩkasɩ nosi tɩyaŋ daa Wɩɩsɩ kpa taŋhafalɩɩ hʋ aa sɩ ko we. Taŋhafalɩɩ no wɩya rɛ á basɩ kɩ tɩya ma nyɛ.

english_verse: Somewhere in the Scriptures someone says to God, “What makes you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for weaklings such as we?
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ ba baa, “Bekiŋ nɛ yaa nihuwobiŋ, ɩ kɩ bɩɩnɩ ʋ wɩya, bekiŋ nɛ yaa nihuwobiŋ biye mɛ ɩ kɩ deŋ ʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ?

english_verse: You made us lower than the angels for a while. Yet you have crowned us with glory and honor.
translation_verse: Ɩ aa taa nihuwobiŋ, ɩ leŋ malɩkasɩ te ʋ mʋhʋ rɛ kyɛyɛ baŋmana, a leŋ nihuwobiŋ kaŋ feŋ abee yohuŋ.

english_verse: And you have put everything under our power!” God has put everything under our power and has not left anything out of our power. But we still don't see it all under our control.
translation_verse: Ka ɩ kpa kɩna buloŋ mɛ a we ʋ nosi tɩyaŋ. Ɩ aa kpaa kɩna buloŋ we nihuwobiŋ nosi tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ kɩŋ buloŋ bɩl tuwo ʋ aa bɩ kaŋ ʋ dee. Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, á bɩ naa dɩ nihuwobiŋ kaŋ dee kɩna buloŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: What we do see is Jesus, who for a little while was made lower than the angels. Because of God's gift of undeserved grace, Jesus died for everyone. And now that Jesus has suffered and died, he is crowned with glory and honor!
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ fa leŋ ʋ malɩkasɩ rɛ te Yesu mʋhʋ. Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, á naa anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpaa Yesu yohuŋ nɛ, a leŋ ʋ kaŋ feŋ mɛ, beewɩya ʋ naa tʋwara rɛ a sʋba. Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ fa yaa gɛɛ, dɩ ʋ wuwo laa nihuwobisi buloŋ nyuu a sʋba.

english_verse: Everything belongs to God, and all things were created by his power. So God did the right thing when he made Jesus perfect by suffering, as Jesus led many of God's children to be saved and to share in his glory.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ rɛ taa dʋnɩya kɩna buloŋ a kɩ deŋ ba mɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ maga dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ʋ biigyamaa ko ʋ lee, a mɛ yaa gaŋdaala. Ɛɛ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ leŋ Krisita, laataal hʋ tɩyaŋ ba aa sɩ tɩŋa a na laatayɩ sɩŋ lee hʋ aa maga beel-ʋ a na tʋwara, a sʋba, dɩ ʋ wuwo laa ba ta.

english_verse: Jesus and the people he makes holy all belong to the same family. This is why he isn't ashamed to call them his brothers and sisters.
translation_verse: Yesu rɛ aa pɩɩsɩ nala bisiŋ ta, ba yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma. Nal hʋ aa pɩɩsɩ nala bisiŋ ta, abee nala hʋ bisiŋ ʋ aa pɩɩsa ta, ba buloŋ kuwo rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ fa bɩ yaa Yesu hɩɩsɩ abee ʋ aa sɩ yɩrɩ ba ʋ naabalɩya.

english_verse: He even said to God, “I will tell them your name and sing your praises when they come together to worship.”
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ Yesu aa basɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ nyɛ: “Ŋ sɩ basɩ wɩya hʋ ɩ aa yaa a tɩya ŋ naabalɩya. “Ŋ sɩ dannɩ ɩ nala hʋ aa laŋŋa kɩ kyʋwalɩ ɩ tɩyaŋ

english_verse: He also said, “I will trust God.” Then he said, “Here I am with the children God has given me.”
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩl baa, “Ŋ sɩ laa ɩ di wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.” A bɩl baa, “Na ŋ bee nala hʋ buloŋ ɩ aa kpaa tɩya ŋ.”

english_verse: We are people of flesh and blood. This is why Jesus became one of us. He died to destroy the devil, who had power over death.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya Krisita hʋ yaa nihuwobisi rɛ a kaŋ kyal abee teŋbiye. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ Krisita mɛ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ bɩrɩmɩ nihuwobiŋ a kɩɩ ba, dɩ ʋ wuwo tɩŋ ʋ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ a yuwo di Sɩtaanɩ, nal hʋ aa kaŋ sʋʋ dee.

english_verse: But he also died to rescue all of us who live each day in fear of dying.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ ʋ wuwo laa nala ta, nala hʋ aa fá sʋʋ, ɛɛ leŋ ba yaa sʋʋ yosi ba mɩɩbol buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Jesus clearly did not come to help angels, but he did come to help Abraham's descendants.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ malɩkasɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ ko dɩ ʋ pɛ amɛ ʋ ko dɩ ʋ pɛ Abɩraham doho nala tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: He had to be one of us, so he could serve God as our merciful and faithful high priest and sacrifice himself for the forgiveness of our sins.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ bɩrɩmɩ nihuwobiŋ a mɛ kɩɩ ʋ naabiisi hʋ ba wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ ʋ wuwo ko yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ ʋ naabiisi tɩyaŋ, a fá ba sikii ʋ tʋma tɩyaŋ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpa ba wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ba.

english_verse: And now that Jesus has suffered and was tempted, he can help anyone else who is tempted.
translation_verse: Sɩtaanɩ magɩsɩ ʋ rɛ, ʋ na tʋwara weliŋ, ɛɛ wɩya, ʋ aa wuwo ʋ pɛ nala hʋ Sɩtaanɩ aa magɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: My friends, God has chosen you to be his holy people. So think about Jesus, the one we call our apostle and high priest!
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ naabalɩya Krisitabiisi mɛ aa nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ yɩra hʋ, ma kpa ma hakɩllɩ buloŋ we Yesu tɩyaŋ. Ʋ rɛ yaa nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩma dɩ ʋ ko yaa á wɩɩkyʋwal-naaŋ no sɩlaala buloŋ nɩhɩyawʋ.

english_verse: Jesus was faithful to God, who appointed him, just as Moses was faithful in serving all God's people.
translation_verse: Ʋ tɩŋ nal hʋ aa lɩɩ ʋ nyʋwa rɛ abee wɩtɩɩ ʋ tʋma tɩyaŋ, anɩɩ Moosi mɛ gyɩ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa gɛɛ tʋma hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩya ʋ dɩ ʋ deŋ ʋ nala.

english_verse: But Jesus deserves more honor than Moses, just as the builder of a house deserves more honor than the house.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ nal hʋ aa saa dɩya rɛ maga dɩ ʋ laa feŋ a te dɩya hʋ ʋ aa saa. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ feŋ hʋ Yesu aa laa mɛ yʋga te feŋ hʋ Moosi aa laa.

english_verse: Of course, every house is built by someone, and God is really the one who built everything.
translation_verse: Dɩya kɛ buloŋ aa we doŋ, nal lɛ saa. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ taa kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: Moses was a faithful servant and told God's people what would be said in the future.
translation_verse: Moosi fa yaa tʋŋtʋnnɩtɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ nala tɩyaŋ, a tʋma kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ a fa laa sɩya basɩ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ maakyiye basɩ.

english_verse: But Christ is the Son in charge of God's people. And we are those people, if we keep on being brave and don't lose hope. A Rest for God's People
translation_verse: Amɛ Krisita kɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye rɛ a kaŋ wɩtɩɩ, a kɩ deŋ Wɩɩsɩ nala nyuu. Dɩ ámaa rɛ kaŋ bembiduwo, ka dɩ á bayɩyɛla mɛ deye, ɛɛ rɛ á sɩ wuwo yaa ʋ nala. Wiyese hʋ Wɩɩsɩ nala aa sɩ na

english_verse: It is just as the Holy Spirit says, “If you hear God's voice today,
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ basɩ tɩya ma rɛ a baa, “Gyɩnaŋ, dɩ mamaa rɛ ko nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ taal,

english_verse: don't be stubborn! Don't rebel like those people who were tested in the desert. *
translation_verse: ma ta yaa faasɩŋ, anɩɩ ma naabaala gyɩ aa yaa faasɩŋ a lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ hal pogo hʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Haŋ saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ ba gyɩ magɩsɩ ʋ rɛ.

english_verse: For forty years your ancestors tested God and saw the things he did.
translation_verse: Doŋ tɩyaŋ, ma naabaala gyɩ magɩsɩ ʋ rɛ weliŋ, abee ba aa naa ʋ wɩyaalɩya bɩsɩ mɔllɩ balɩya buloŋ.

english_verse: “Then God got tired of them and said, ‘You people never show good sense, and you don't understand what I want you to do.’
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ baaŋ gyɩ sii nala no buloŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, ʋ baa, ‘Ba aa yaa ŋ dawarɩ rɛ, a bee tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa mɛ.’

english_verse: God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ na baaŋ a ŋmɩyɛsɩ a baa, ‘Ba bɩ sɩ maakyiye gyʋʋ lee hʋ ŋ fa aa sɩ leŋ ba na wiyese”’

english_verse: My friends, watch out! Don't let evil thoughts or doubts make any of you turn from the living God.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ma pɔ ma tɩɩ weliŋ dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ta ko kaŋ hakɩlbɔŋ koo hakɩlduwo aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa weye hal.

english_verse: You must encourage one another each day. And you must keep on while there is still a time that can be called “today.” If you don't, then sin may fool some of you and make you stubborn.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kɩ pɛ dɔmɔŋ ma aa we gyɩnaŋ sɩgballɩya no tɩyaŋ dɩ wɩbɔmɔ ta wuwo mʋrɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ, a leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa faasɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We were sure about Christ when we first became his people. So let's hold tightly to our faith until the end.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ á aa laa di buŋbuŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ámaa rɛ kaŋ ba weliŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ á kyɛsʋʋ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ á bee Krisita kɩŋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Who were those people that heard God's voice and rebelled? Weren't they the same ones that came out of Egypt with Moses?
translation_verse: Kɩbeema rɛ gyɩ nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ taal aŋ lɩɩ ʋ hal gɛɛ? Ba daa yaa nala hʋ Moosi gyɩ aa kaŋ lɩɩ Igyipiti paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ hʋ?

english_verse: And who did God say would never enter his place of rest? Weren't they the ones that disobeyed him?
translation_verse: Kɩbeema rɛ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ ŋmɩyɛsɩ tɩya anɩɩ ba bɩ sɩ gyʋʋ lee hʋ ʋ fa aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ba gyʋʋ a na wiyese? Ba aa rɛ yaa nala hʋ gyɩ aa bɩ tɩŋa ʋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: We see that those people did not enter the place of rest because they did not have faith.
translation_verse: Á naa anɩɩ ba aa bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di rɛ tɩŋ ba bɩ wuwo gyʋʋ lee hʋ Wɩɩsɩ fa aa kyɛ dɩ ba gyʋʋ.

english_verse: The promise to enter the place of rest is still good, and we must take care that none of you miss out.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa hʋ ʋ aa wee anɩɩ ʋ sɩ leŋ dɩ á ko ʋ lee á na wiyese hʋ, ʋ ha we doŋ nɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á gyɩŋ tɩya á tɩɩ weliŋ, dɩ wiyese no ta ko buwo á kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: We have heard the message, just as they did. But they failed to believe what they heard, and the message did not do them any good.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ ba aa basɩ tɩya ma, ba gyɩ laa sɩya basɩ ba tɩya á naabaala mɛ rɛ, amɛ ba gyɩ aa bɩ laa di wɩya, wɩya hʋ gyɩ bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ tɩya ba.

english_verse: Only people who have faith will enter the place of rest. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ” God said this, even though everything has been ready from the time of creation.
translation_verse: Amɛ á nala hʋ aa laa wɩya hʋ di, ámaa rɛ naa Wɩɩsɩ wiyese hʋ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa basɩ gɛɛ. Ʋ baa, “Ŋ gyɩ naa baaŋ nɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ gyɩ ŋmɩyɛsɩ anɩɩ ba bɩ sɩ maakyiye gyʋʋ lee hʋ ŋ fa aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ba na wiyese.” Abee ʋ aa basɩ nyɛ buloŋ, ka á gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ teŋ nɛ a lɩɩ saŋa hʋ ʋ taa dʋnɩya buloŋ.

english_verse: In fact, somewhere the Scriptures say that by the seventh day, God had finished his work, and so he rested.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ ba aa basa Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a tile kyɛpɛɛ hʋ kyɛɛ rɛ nyɛ: Ba baa, “Wɩɩsɩ kpaa kyɛyɛ badʋ rɛ a marɩ dʋnɩya teŋ, aŋ wiyesi kyɛpɛɛ hʋ kyɛɛ.”

english_verse: We also read that he later said, “You people will never enter my place of rest!”
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩl basɩ wiyese no tɩɩ wɩya rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ a baa, “Ba bɩ sɩ maakyiye gyʋʋ lee hʋ ŋ fa aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ba na wiyese.”

english_verse: This means that the promise to enter is still good, because those who first heard about it disobeyed and did not enter.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ nala badɔmɔŋ nɛ sɩ na haŋ wiyese hʋ. Amɛ nala hʋ gyɩ aa laa sɩya nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ, ba bɩ naa wiyese no beewɩya ba gyɩ bɩ tɩŋ wɩya hʋ ba aa nɩya.

english_verse: If Joshua had really given the people rest, there would not be any need for God to talk about another day of rest.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Gyoosʋwa gyɩ aa yaa Iziral tɩmma sɩlaal, ʋ gyɩ bɩ wuwo tɩya haŋ wiyese hʋ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ fa wuwo tɩya ba haŋ wiyese hʋ, Wɩɩsɩ fa bɩl bɩ sɩ basɩ wiyese kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ wɩya gɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But God has promised us a Sabbath when we will rest, even though it has not yet come.
translation_verse: Nyɛ daga anɩɩ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ we doŋ, Wɩɩsɩ nala aa sɩ wiyesi anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa wiyese kyɛpɛɛ hʋ kyɛɛ gɛɛ.

english_verse: On that day God's people will rest from their work, just as God rested from his work.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ leŋ ʋ na wiyese, dɩ ʋ tɩɩna ko tʋŋ tʋma teŋ ʋ sɩ wiyesi anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ aa tʋŋ ʋ tʋma teŋ aŋ wiyesi gɛɛ.

english_verse: We should do our best to enter the place of rest, so none of us will disobey and miss going there, as they did.
translation_verse: Faafaa nala hʋ gyɩ aa bɩ tɩŋ ʋ nyʋwa wɩya, ba gyɩ bɩ naa wiyese no. Ɛɛwɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á kɛ we dee a kɩ tɩŋ ʋ nyʋwa dɩ wiyese no ta ko buwo ma mɛ.

english_verse: God's word is alive and powerful! It is sharper than any double-edged sword. His word can cut through our spirits and souls and through our joints and marrow, until it discovers the desires and thoughts of our hearts.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol lɛ. Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kɩweyi, a kaŋ dee mɛ, a di kɩ te takoobii aa di nyʋʋkpara. Ʋ aa wuwo tɔbɔ gyʋʋ nihuwobiŋ nɛ anɩɩ takoobii a tuu mʋ pele ʋ tɩya liluŋii buloŋ, a wuwo gyɩŋ ʋ hakɩla wɩɩ buloŋ abee ʋ tɩbɩɩna buloŋ.

english_verse: Nothing is hidden from God! He sees through everything, and we will have to tell him the truth. Jesus Is the Great High Priest
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya wɩɩ koo kɩŋ buloŋ tuwo a faŋa Wɩɩsɩ lee. Ʋ aa na ba buloŋ nɛ anɩɩ ba aa pɩŋ lɩgyalɩɩ tɩyaŋ penteeŋ. Ʋ rɛ á sɩ maakyiye daga á wɩyaalɩya buloŋ tɩya. Yesu rɛ yaa á wɩɩkyʋwal-sɩlaala buloŋ nɩhɩyawʋ

english_verse: We have a great high priest, who has gone into heaven, and he is Jesus the Son of God. This is why we must hold on to what we have said about him.
translation_verse: Akuu á wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal Yesu aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye, a bɩl yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ buloŋ nɩhɩyawʋ wɩya, abee ʋ aa we Wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ wɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á kaŋ wɩya hʋ á aa laa di weliŋ.

english_verse: So whenever we are in need, we should come bravely before the throne of our merciful God. There we will be treated with undeserved grace, and we will find help.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya ma leŋ dɩ á tarɩ pele Wɩɩsɩ abee tɩdɩgɩ, beewɩya á gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ sɩ fá á sikii, aŋ leŋ dɩ á na ʋ kyiyeli saŋa hʋ buloŋ aa maga.

english_verse: Every high priest is appointed to help others by offering gifts and sacrifices to God because of their sins.
translation_verse: Wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ buloŋ, ba aa lɩɩ ʋ, ʋ nala tɩyaŋ nɛ, ʋ laa nala hʋ naasɩ sɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩkanɩya tɩyaŋ a laa ba kɩna abee ba pʋsɩ kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, dɩ ʋ kpa ba wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ba.

english_verse: A high priest has weaknesses of his own, and he feels sorry for foolish and sinful people.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa gyɩŋ kaŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ gyɩma aŋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ a kɩ nyʋgɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ, beewɩya ʋ tɩɩ mɛ kaŋ gyomo rɛ.

english_verse: But no one can have the honor of being a high priest simply by wanting to be one. Only God can choose a priest, and God is the one who chose Aaron.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo lɩɩ ʋ tɩɩ a yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal. Wɩɩsɩ rɛ aa lɩɩ tɩɩna anɩɩ ʋ gyɩ aa lɩɩ Aarɔŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: This is how it was with Christ. He became a high priest, but not just because he wanted the honor of being one. It was God who told him, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ Krisita mɛ daa lɩɩ ʋ tɩɩ a yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ lɩɩ ʋ a basɩ nyɛ tɩya ʋ: Ʋ baa, “Ŋ biibaal lɛ yaa ɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa ɩ kuwo gyɩnaŋ”

english_verse: In another place, God says, “You are a priest forever just like Melchizedek.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ mɛ ʋ baa, “Ɩ yaa wɩɩkyʋwal-sɩlaal lɛ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ anɩɩ Mɛlkisedɛki fa aa yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal gɛɛ.”

english_verse: God had the power to save Jesus from death. And while Jesus was on earth, he begged God with loud crying and tears to save him. He truly worshiped God, and God listened to his prayers.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ Yesu gyɩ aa we ʋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, ʋ gyɩ suri nyʋwa rɛ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ abee sɩnɩɩl a kpa ʋ wɩkyɛɛlɩya buloŋ biŋ ʋ sɩya, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa sɩ wuwo laa ʋ ta sʋʋ nosi tɩyaŋ. Yesu gyɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ abee sɩfɩyala ʋ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ laa ʋ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ.

english_verse: Jesus is God's own Son, but still he had to suffer before he could learn what it really means to obey God.
translation_verse: Yesu fa yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye mɛ rɛ, amɛ abee gɛɛ buloŋ ʋ gyɩ naa tʋwara rɛ weliŋ, a tɩŋ tʋwara no tɩyaŋ a gʋnnɩ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa tɩŋɩɩ weliŋ.

english_verse: This is because God chose him to be a high priest like Melchizedek. Warning against Turning Away
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ ʋ dɩ ʋ yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ anɩɩ Mɛlkisedɛki gɛɛ. Ma ta ko bɩla hal ma Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Much more could be said about this subject. But it is hard to explain, and all of you are slow to understand.
translation_verse: Á kaŋ wɩya yʋga rɛ á aa basɩ wɩɩ no lugo tɩyaŋ. Amɛ á bɩ gyɩŋ gɛɛ á aa sɩ basɩ wɩya hʋ dɩ ma wuwo nɩɩ ba memii, beewɩya ma wɩya memii gyɩmɩɩ hayɛ rɛ.

english_verse: By now you should have been teachers, but once again you need to be taught the simplest things about what God has said. You need milk instead of solid food.
translation_verse: Ma aa nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ, ʋ saŋa pɩɩsa rɛ a fa maga dɩ ma mɛ kɩ daga nala, amɛ ma ha hɔŋ kɩ kyɛ nal lɛ dɩ ʋ bɩl marɩ daga ma Wɩɩsɩ wɩya lipiilii wɩgʋnnɩya. Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ma aa maga dɩ ma kɩ di kɩdiyoho ka ma ha hɔŋ kɩ kyɛ ɩl dɩ ma ɔsɩ.

english_verse: People who live on milk are like babies who don't really know what is right.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa ɔsɩ ɩl dʋŋ ha yaa biifɩla rɛ, a ha bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa wɩwelii ko wɩbɔŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Solid food is for mature people who have been trained to know right from wrong.
translation_verse: Amɛ kɩdiyoho kɛ, nɩhɩyasɩ rɛ wuwo kɩ di ba beewɩya, akuu ba aa gyʋʋ wɩgyamaa tɩyaŋ saŋa buloŋ wɩya, ba wuwo gyɩŋ wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa wɩwelii koo wɩbɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: We must try to become mature and start thinking about more than just the basic things we were taught about Christ. We shouldn't need to keep talking about why we ought to turn from deeds that bring death and why we ought to have faith in God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á leŋ wɩya hʋ á aa gʋnna á Krisita laadii falɩŋ tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ á gyʋʋ wɩya hʋ nala hʋ laadii aa bɩra Krisita tɩyaŋ aa maga dɩ ba gyɩma. Ma ta leŋ dɩ á bɩl piili kɩ basɩ sʋʋkpʋŋ wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ wɩya abee Wɩɩsɩ laadii wɩya.

english_verse: But what about people who turn away after they have already seen the light and have received the gift from heaven and have shared in the Holy Spirit? What about those who turn away after they have received the good message of God and the powers of the future world? There is no way to bring them back. What they are doing is the same as nailing the Son of God to a cross and insulting him in public!
translation_verse: dɩ nala no rɛ yaŋ gyɩŋ wɩya no buloŋ aŋ ko mɩɩgɩ kpa hal yɩya Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ, wɩɩ buloŋ tuwo nal bɩl aa sɩ yaa dɩ ba bɩl mɩɩgɩ ko Wɩɩsɩ lee. Ba bɩl bɩ sɩ wuwo bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ a mɩɩgɩ ko Wɩɩsɩ lee. Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ba bɩl aa marɩ kpaasɩ Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ, a leŋ ʋ bɩl di hɩɩsɩ nala sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: A field is useful to farmers, if there is enough rain to make good crops grow. In fact, God will bless such a field.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa leŋ taŋha hʋ tɩyaŋ duwoŋ aa nɩɩ kɩ we weliye rɛ. Taŋha no aa lɩɩ kɩweliye aa kaŋ tɔnɔ rɛ a tɩya nala hʋ aa pala ʋ.

english_verse: But land that produces only thornbushes is worthless. It is likely to fall under God's curse, and in the end it will be set on fire.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ɔhɔ abee sɔsɩ dʋŋ nɛ ko mɩɩgɩ nyʋ taŋha hʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ taŋha hʋ bɩl bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ. Amɛ dɩ ɩ ko bɩ gyɩma Wɩɩsɩ sɩ ŋmɩyɛsɩ we taŋha hʋ tɩyaŋ, a leŋ dɩ diŋ kpa ʋ di.

english_verse: My friends, we are talking this way. But we are sure that you are doing those really good things people do when they are being saved.
translation_verse: Á kyaŋkpɩyanama, abee á aa basɩ wɩya no buloŋ mɛ, ka á gyɩma anɩɩ ma we ŋmaŋwelii hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ma sɩ na kɩweliye hʋ buloŋ aa we laatayɩ ŋmanɩɩ no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God is always fair. He will remember how you helped his people in the past and how you are still helping them. You belong to God, and he won't forget the love you have shown his people.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ʋ bɩ sɩ yeŋŋi tʋma hʋ ma aa tʋma tɩya ʋ abee kyori hʋ ma aa daga beel-ʋ, beewɩya ma kyiyele ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di rɛ aŋ ha kɩ kyiyeli ba abee gyɩnaŋ.

english_verse: We wish each of you would always be eager to show how strong and lasting your hope really is.
translation_verse: Á yaŋ kyo dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ kaŋ sɩfɩyasɩ no rɛ, a mʋ teŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ma sɩ gyɩma weliŋ anɩɩ kɩna hʋ wɩya ma aa yɩyɛlɩ, ma kɔnɩ sɩ na ba.

english_verse: Then after Abraham had been very patient, he was given what God had promised.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Abɩraham gyɩ gyegili bee kenyiri a ko mʋ na wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ fa aa wee nyʋwa dɩ ʋ sɩ yaa tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: When anyone wants to settle an argument, they make a vow by using the name of someone or something greater than themselves.
translation_verse: Dɩ nihuwobiŋ nɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ daga anɩɩ wɩtɩɩ rɛ ʋ kɩ basɩ ʋ aa ŋmɩyɛsɩ nal aa te ʋ rɛ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko ŋmɩyɛsɩ gɛɛ, nyʋʋtaaduwo buloŋ aa teŋ doŋ nɛ.

english_verse: God cannot tell lies! And so his promises and vows are two things that can never be changed. We have run to God for safety. Now his promises should greatly encourage us to take hold of the hope that is right in front of us.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa aŋ bɩl ŋmɩyɛsɩ pɛ, ʋ bɩ sɩ maakyiye kaŋ wɩya no balɩya kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩrɩmɩ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ bee nyɩya wɩya. Ɛɛwɩya, á nala hʋ aa fáá gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ ʋ kɩ deŋ á nyuu, nyɛ leŋ á tenni polli rɛ á marɩ kaŋ bayɩyɛla hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ma weliŋ.

english_verse: This hope is like a firm and steady anchor for our souls. In fact, hope reaches behind the curtain and into the most holy place.
translation_verse: Bayɩyɛla no á aa kana rɛ kaŋ á mɩɩbolo sɩgɩ weliŋ. Ʋ rɛ leŋ á wuwo gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ liweelii, lee hʋ patɩɩsɩbal hʋ fa aa boro, nɩwaasɩma bee gyʋʋ doŋ hʋ.

english_verse: Melchizedek was both king of Salem and priest of God Most High. He was the one who went out and gave Abraham his blessing, when Abraham returned from killing the kings.
translation_verse: Mɛlkisedɛki no gyɩ yaa tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Salɛm kuwori rɛ, aŋ fa pɛ yaa Gyoribaŋa Bakɔɔ Wɩɩsɩ nala wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal mɛ. Saŋa kɩdɩgɩ, Mɛlkisedɛki gyɩ kyeŋ Abɩraham nɛ dɩ ʋ mʋʋ yuwo yuwo di taŋhasɩ badɔmɔŋ kuworo aŋ mɩɩgɩ kɩ ko. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ tɩya Abɩraham.

english_verse: Then Abraham gave him a tenth of everything he had. The meaning of the name Melchizedek is “King of Justice.” But since Salem means “peace,” he is also “King of Peace.”
translation_verse: Doŋ nɛ Abɩraham kaŋ kɩna hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa yuwo laa yuwo hʋ tɩyaŋ kpaa leye fi, a kpa lɩdɩgɩ tɩya ʋ. Mɛlkisedɛki feŋ hʋ memii rɛ yaa kuwori hʋ aa kaŋ tɩpʋlʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ʋ bɩl aa yaa Salɛm kuwori hʋ mɛ, ʋ feŋ hʋ memii rɛ yaa kuwori hʋ aa leŋ fɩyɛlʋʋ we ʋ paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We are not told he had a father or mother or ancestors or beginning or end. He is like the Son of God and will be a priest forever.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ fa bɩ gyɩŋ Mɛlkisedɛki kuwo koo ʋ naa. Nal buloŋ mɛ fa bɩ gyɩŋ ʋ doho aa lɩɩ doŋ. Nal buloŋ bɩ gyɩŋ saŋa hʋ ba aa lʋla ʋ, koo saŋa hʋ ʋ aa sʋba. Ʋ kɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ rɛ, beewɩya ʋ mɛ yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal lɛ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: Notice how great Melchizedek was! Our famous ancestor Abraham gave him a tenth of what he had taken from his enemies.
translation_verse: Ma bɩ naa anɩɩ ʋ fa yaa nɩbal lɛ koo? Á naabaa Abɩraham tɩɩ aa yaa nɩbal á lee gyɩ aa lɩɩ yuwo hʋ ko kyeme ʋ, ʋ gyɩ kaŋ ʋ kɩna buloŋ kpaa leye fi rɛ, a kpa lɩdɩgɩ tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: The Law teaches that even Abraham's descendants must give a tenth of what they possess. And they are to give this to their own relatives, who are the descendants of Levi and are priests.
translation_verse: Levi doho nala hʋ aa yaa Iziral tɩmma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala, Wɩɩsɩ mɩra daga anɩɩ Iziral tɩɩna kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ kaŋ ʋ kɩna kpaa leye fi rɛ, a kpa lɩdɩgɩ tɩya ba. Amɛ á gyɩma anɩɩ Levi doho nala hʋ abee Iziral tɩmma nɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ yaa Abɩraham doho nala rɛ, ka Wɩɩsɩ ha basɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Although Melchizedek wasn't a descendant of Levi, Abraham gave him a tenth of what he had. Then Melchizedek blessed Abraham, who had been given God's promise.
translation_verse: Mɛlkisedɛki fa bɩ yaa Levi doho nal, aŋ laa kpaal hʋ Abɩraham, nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ fa aa wee nyʋwa tɩya lee, aŋ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: Everyone agrees a person who gives a blessing is greater than the one who receives the blessing.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ nɩbal lɛ aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ tɩya nɩbiye.

english_verse: The person we are talking about is our Lord, who came from a tribe that had never had anyone to serve as a priest at the altar.
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ, á Tɩɩna Krisita wɩya rɛ ba kɩ basɩ gɛɛ, beewɩya ʋ bɩ lɩɩ Levi doho nala tɩyaŋ. Ʋ doho nala mɛ we ba dʋŋ nɛ, ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ha gyɩ bɩ maakyiye yaa Iziral tɩmma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal aŋka.

english_verse: All of this becomes clearer, when someone who is like Melchizedek is appointed to be a priest.
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ wɩya hʋ á aa basɩ marɩ kyaanɩ tɩya ma rɛ, beewɩya nɩdɩma rɛ ko, a yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal anɩɩ Mɛlkisedɛki aa yaa gɛɛ.

english_verse: That person wasn't appointed because of his ancestors, but because his life can never end.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩna aa ko yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ʋ doho wɩɩ rɛ. Amɛ ɛɛ dee lɩɩ ʋ mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii dee tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say about him, “You are a priest forever, just like Melchizedek.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Teŋ tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ rɛ a baa, “Ɩ sɩ yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ anɩɩ Mɛlkisedɛki gɛɛ.”

english_verse: In this way a weak and useless command was put aside,
translation_verse: Lagɩlagɩ no, á kpaa mɩrɩbɩnɩya hʋ Moosi aa bine ta rɛ, beewɩya ba bɩl bɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ koo yohuŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: because the Law cannot make anything perfect. At the same time, we are given a much better hope, and it can bring us close to God.
translation_verse: Beewɩya mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi fa aa bine bɩ wuwo leŋ nal buloŋ bɩl yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa buŋ marɩ ʋ, ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ. Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, Wɩɩsɩ tɩya ma bayɩyɛl-falɩɩ aa kpɩya rɛ, bayɩyɛla no leŋ á kpaga Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: God himself made a promise when this priest was appointed. But he did not make a promise like this when the other priests were appointed. The promise he made is, “I, the Lord, promise that you will be a priest forever! And I will never change my mind!”
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩɩ Yesu dɩ ʋ yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal, ʋ ŋmɩyɛsa rɛ a basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ ŋmɩyɛsa rɛ, ŋ bɩ sɩ maakyiye bɩrɩmɩ ŋ hakɩla, ‘Ɩ sɩ yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.”’

english_verse: But Jesus will never die, and so he will be a priest forever!
translation_verse: Amɛ Yesu kɛ aa yaa nal aa we doŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ wɩya, ʋ yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal mɛ rɛ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ.

english_verse: He is forever able to save the people he leads to God, because he always lives to speak to God for them.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nala hʋ aa tɩŋa ʋ tɩyaŋ a ko Wɩɩsɩ lee, ʋ aa wuwo laa ba ta rɛ lagɩlagɩ no abee maakyiye buloŋ, beewɩya ʋ we doŋ nɛ saŋa buloŋ, a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya ba.

english_verse: Jesus is the high priest we need. He is holy and innocent and faultless, and not at all like us sinners. Jesus is honored above all beings in heaven,
translation_verse: Yesu aa yaa á wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ wɩya, ʋ wuwo yaa á wɩkyɛɛlɩya buloŋ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ. Yesu yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna rɛ, a bɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii koo wɩbɔŋ buloŋ. Wɩɩsɩ kana ʋ porigi wɩbɔŋyaala tɩyaŋ nɛ, a kana ʋ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩbee, a leŋ ʋ yaa nɩbal doŋ.

english_verse: and he is better than any other high priest. Jesus doesn't need to offer sacrifices each day for his own sins and then for the sins of the people. He offered a sacrifice once for all, when he gave himself.
translation_verse: Yesu bɩ kɩɩ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ. Nala no gyɩ aa kpʋ pʋsɩ kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ rɛ kyɛɛ kɛ buloŋ. Ʋ gyɩ yaa fɩlɩɩ rɛ dɩ ba kpʋ pʋsɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ ba tɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ wɩya aŋ bɩl kpʋ badɔmɔŋ mɛ nala hʋ wɩbɔmɔ wɩya kyɛɛ bee ʋ nyʋwa buloŋ. Amɛ ʋ bɩ yaa falɩɩ dɩ Yesu kɛ yaa gɛɛ. Ʋ kɛ gyɩ kpaa ʋ tɩɩ rɛ a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ dɩgɩ dʋŋ ʋ nala wɩya.

english_verse: What I mean is we have a high priest who sits at the right side of God's great throne in heaven.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ buloŋ á aa basɩ ba wɩnyuu rɛ nyɛ. Á kaŋ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ rɛ, ʋ we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ, a hɔŋ Gyoribaŋa Bakɔɔ Wɩɩsɩ kuworikpasa hʋ noduu logiŋ.

english_verse: He also serves as the priest in the most holy place inside the real tent there in heaven. This tent of worship was set up by the Lord, not by humans.
translation_verse: Ʋ yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Liwelii hʋ tɩyaŋ. Doŋ nɛ yaa wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya tɩɩ, beewɩya nihuwobiŋ daa saa ʋ. Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ saa ʋ.

english_verse: If he were here on earth, he would not be a priest at all, because here the Law appoints other priests to offer sacrifices.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ rɛ fa we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ fa bɩ sɩ yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaal, beewɩya nala we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ a yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala, a laa nala kɩna kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi aa bine aa daga gɛɛ.

english_verse: But the tent where they serve is just a copy and a shadow of the real one in heaven. Before Moses made the tent, he was told, “Be sure to make it exactly like the pattern you were shown on the mountain!”
translation_verse: Wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala tʋma hʋ ba aa tʋŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ, wɩya hʋ aa yaa wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ nɛ ba kyesi kɩ yaa, amɛ wɩya hʋ tɩɩ daa, ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba gyɩ kɩɩ Moosi mɛ tɩyaŋ. Saŋa hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ saa Wɩɩsɩ dɩya hʋ, Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ basɩ tɩya ʋ rɛ a baa, “Fɩyɛlɩ sɩya weliŋ aŋ saa dɩya hʋ dɩ ʋ kɩɩ kɩŋ hʋ ŋ aa daga ɩ dogimo hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: If the first agreement with God had been all right, there would not have been any need for another one.
translation_verse: Dɩ laasɩya nyʋwa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee tɩya ʋ nala hʋ fa bɩ kaŋ gyoŋ buloŋ, ʋ fa bɩl bɩ sɩ we nyʋʋfalɩɩ tɩya ba.

english_verse: But the Lord found fault with it and said, “I tell you the time will come, when I will make a new agreement with the people of Israel and the people of Judah.
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ naa anɩɩ laasɩya nyʋwa hʋ bɩ leŋ ʋ nala wuwo yaa niweliye hʋ ʋ aa kyɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ basɩ ba wɩya aŋ baa, “Saŋa kɩdɩgɩ sɩ pele dɩ ŋ bɩl we nyʋʋfalɩɩ tɩya ŋ nala Iziral tɩmma abee Gyuda doho nala.

english_verse: It won't be like the agreement that I made with their ancestors, when I took them by the hand and led them out of Egypt. They broke their agreement with me, and I stopped caring about them!
translation_verse: Nyʋʋfalɩɩ no bɩ sɩ kɩɩ laasɩya nyʋwa hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa wee tɩya ba naabaala saŋa hʋ ŋ gyɩ aa kaŋ ba lɩɩ Igyipiti paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Ba gyɩ bɩ tɩŋ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa biŋ tɩya ba ŋ beel-ba nyʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ gyɩ kpa hal yɩya ba.

english_verse: “But now I tell the people of Israel this is my new agreement: ‘The time will come when I, the Lord, will write my laws on their minds and hearts. I will be their God, and they will be my people.
translation_verse: Nyɛ kɛ, nyʋʋfalɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa sɩ maakyiye we tɩya Iziral tɩmma, nyɛ rɛ ʋ sɩ kɩɩ: Ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ba gyɩŋ ŋ nyʋwa wɩya weliŋ, a kpa we ba nyuni abee ba tɩsɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ sɩ yaa ba Wɩɩsɩ, dɩ ba mɛ yaa ŋ nala.

english_verse: Not one of them will have to teach another to know me, their Lord.’ “All of them will know me, no matter who they are.
translation_verse: Saŋa no tɩyaŋ, nal buloŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ daga ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna koo ʋ naabiye gɛɛ ʋ aa sɩ yaa a gyɩma ŋ. Beewɩya, nal nal buloŋ nɛ sɩ gyɩma ŋ, biibiisi abee nɩhɩyasɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: I will treat them with kindness, even though they are wicked. I will forget their sins.”
translation_verse: Ŋ sɩ kpa ba wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ba. Ŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ kɩ liisi wɩya hʋ ba aa yaa kyogi ŋ.”

english_verse: When the Lord talks about a new agreement, he means that the first one is out of date. And anything that is old and useless will soon disappear.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa basɩ nyʋʋfalɩɩ hʋ wɩya gɛɛ, ʋ daga anɩɩ laasɩya nyʋwa hʋ kɛ bɩrɩmɩ kɩbɩnɩɩ rɛ gɛɛ. Kɩŋ buloŋ yaŋ aa bɩnɩya, a kyogi, ʋ kpatayɩ rɛ kpaga.

english_verse: The first part of the tent was called the holy place, and a lampstand, a table, and the sacred loaves of bread were kept there.
translation_verse: Ba gyɩ saa wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya rɛ a kaŋ bori dɩɩsɩ balɩya. Ba gyɩ aa yɩrɩ laasɩya lee hʋ ɩ aa mʋ gyʋʋ Dɩɩwelii rɛ. Doŋ nɛ fɩŋtɩŋdaaŋ hʋ abee teebʋl hʋ abee paanʋʋ hʋ ba aa kpa kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ we.

english_verse: The gold altar for burning incense was in this holy place. The gold-covered sacred chest was also there, and inside it were three things. First, there was a gold jar filled with manna. Then there was Aaron's walking stick that sprouted. Finally, there were the flat stones with the Ten Commandments written on them.
translation_verse: Dɩɩsɩya no tɩyaŋ nɛ salma kogu hʋ tɩyaŋ ba gyɩ aa nyɔgɔ wɩsɩnaaŋ sʋwala aa sʋma a kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ hʋ gyɩ sɩŋ. Daga hʋ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ bee ʋ nala nyʋʋfalɩɩ hʋ magɩl mɛ gyɩ sɩŋ doŋ nɛ. Ba gyɩ kpaa salma rɛ a waalɩ tɔ daga no buloŋ. Salma viibiye hʋ gyɩ we daga no tɩyaŋ. Viibiye no tɩyaŋ nɛ ba gyɩ kpa paanʋʋ hʋ gyɩ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu a we. Aarɔŋ daatɩgɩɩ hʋ gyɩ aa tɔsɔ mɛ fa we daga hʋ tɩyaŋ. Bʋtala hʋ balɩya tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ fa aa sabɩ ʋ mɩrɩsɩ we mɛ fa we daga hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: But this is how everything was when the priests went each day into the first part of the tent to do their duties.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ ba gyɩ sɩgɩ wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ tɩya kɩna buloŋ. Wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala hʋ aa villi Laasɩya dɩya hʋ rɛ a kɩ tʋŋ ba tʋma.

english_verse: However, only the high priest could go into the second part of the tent, and he went in only once a year. Each time he carried blood to offer for his sins and for any sins that the people had committed without meaning to.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ dʋŋ nɛ gyɩ maga dɩ ʋ gyʋʋ sɩya dɩya hʋ. Ʋ mɛ gba, dɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ ʋ aa gyʋʋ doŋ bɩna buloŋ. Ʋ aa kaŋ kyal lɛ gyʋʋ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ tɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ abee nala hʋ buloŋ wɩbɔmɔ ba aa yaa aŋ bɩ gyɩma wɩya.

english_verse: All of this is the Holy Spirit's way of saying no one could enter the most holy place while the tent was still the place of worship.
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ kyaasa daga anɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ ba aa tɩŋ kɩ gyʋʋ Dɩɩweliye buloŋ Dɩɩweliye hʋ ha bɩ suro, beewɩya laasɩya wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ ha we doŋ nɛ.

english_verse: These rules are merely about such things as eating and drinking and ceremonies for washing ourselves. And rules about physical things will last only until the time comes to change them for something better.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, kɩdiiliye abee kɩnyʋwalɩya abee bisiŋ pɩɩsɩɩ ŋmaŋsɩ dʋŋ nɛ wɩya no kɩ daga. Wɩya no buloŋ yaa wɩya hʋ á aa kaŋ á nosi abee á sɩya dʋŋ kɩ yaa rɛ. Ba sɩ we doŋ a mʋ pele saŋa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ bɩl aa sɩ biŋ wɩfalɩya.

english_verse: Christ came as the high priest of the good things that are now here. He also went into a much better tent that wasn't made by humans and that doesn't belong to this world.
translation_verse: Amɛ lagɩlagɩ no, Krisita yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ rɛ. Wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa kaŋ ko, ʋ rɛ weliye a te faafaa wɩya hʋ. Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ ʋ aa tʋŋ ʋ tʋma, doŋ nɛ yaa lɩbal, a bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ, a weliye mɛ a te laa sɩya kɩŋ hʋ. Ʋ bɩ yaa wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya nihuwobisi aa saa. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ paalɩ bɩ yaa dʋnɩya no kɩŋ.

english_verse: Then Christ went once for all into the most holy place and freed us from sin forever. He did this by offering his own blood instead of the blood of goats and bulls.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ Krisita aa gyʋʋ wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ, ʋ gyɩ mʋʋ gyʋʋ dɩɩsɩya hʋ rɛ dɩgɩ dʋŋ. Bʋʋna koo nɔbolli kyal daa ʋ gyɩ kaŋ gyʋʋ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ. Amɛ ʋ tɩɩ kyal lɛ ʋ gyɩ kaŋ gyʋʋ tuŋ á wɩbɔmɔ kyɩŋ, a laa ma ta a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ.

english_verse: According to the Law of Moses, those people who become unclean are not fit to worship God. Yet they will be considered clean, if they are sprinkled with the blood of goats and bulls and with the ashes of a sacrificed calf.
translation_verse: Faafaa hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ nal lɛ fa ko yaa wɩbɔŋ koo bisiŋ wɩɩ, ba aa kpa bʋʋŋ abee nɔboliye kyal lɛ a pɛ nɔpɛbiye ba aa fise tʋwɔl tɩyaŋ a mɩsɩ tɩɩna, a pɩɩsɩ ʋ wɩbɔmɔ koo ʋ bisiŋ ta.

english_verse: But Christ was sinless, and he offered himself as an eternal and spiritual sacrifice to God. This is why his blood is much more powerful and makes our consciences clear. Now we can serve the living God and no longer do things that lead to death.
translation_verse: Dɩ wɩya no yayɩ rɛ wuwo pɩɩsɩ nala bisiŋ kɩ ta, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ Krisita kyal kɛ rɛ yaŋ sɩ wuwo pɩɩsɩ nala bisiŋ ta a te bʋʋna koo nʋsɩ kyal. Beewɩya Krisita fa bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ. Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa we doŋ maakyiye buloŋ dee tɩyaŋ, ʋ kpaa ʋ tɩɩ mɩɩbol lɛ a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ á wɩya. Ʋ kyal hʋ rɛ sɩ wuwo sasɩ ŋmaŋtɔɔnɩ tɩŋɩɩ ta á hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ, aŋ leŋ dɩ á wuwo kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa weye.

english_verse: In fact, making an agreement of this kind is like writing a will. This is because the one who makes the will must die before it is of any use.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ ko baa dɩ nal kyaŋ nɛ ɩ di, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ tɩɩna sʋba rɛ, beewɩya dɩ nal bɩ sʋba, ɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo di ʋ kyaŋ.

english_verse: In other words, a will doesn't go into effect as long as the one who made it is still alive.
translation_verse: Dɩ kɩŋ tɩɩna rɛ weye, nal hʋ ʋ aa baa ʋ sɩ di ʋ kyaŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo di kyaŋ hʋ, see dɩ kɩŋ hʋ tɩɩna sʋba.

english_verse: Blood was also used to put the first agreement into effect.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ kpa kyal a we laasɩya nyʋwa hʋ mɛ.

english_verse: Moses told the people all the Law said they must do. Then he used red wool and a hyssop plant to sprinkle the people and the book of the Law with the blood of bulls and goats and with water.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ nala kɩ tɩŋa, ba aa rɛ Moosi gyɩ laa sɩya heeli basɩ tɩya nala hʋ Mɩrɩsɩ hʋ ʋ aa saba tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ ʋ yaŋ kpa nʋsɩ abee bʋʋna kyal, a guwosi nɩɩ tɩyaŋ, aŋ kpa paaponni bee pʋŋfɩyɛsɩ ba aa kaŋ vʋwa pɛ dɔmɔŋ, a yuu kyal hʋ, a mɩsɩ nala hʋ buloŋ abee teŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ ʋ aa sabɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ we.

english_verse: He told the people, “With this blood God makes his agreement with you.”
translation_verse: Aŋ basɩ tɩya nala hʋ a baa, “Kyal no rɛ Wɩɩsɩ kpa we nyʋwa hʋ ʋ aa biŋ tɩya ma dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋa.”

english_verse: Moses also sprinkled blood on the tent and on everything else used in worship.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka Moosi bɩl yaa kyal hʋ a mɩsɩ wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ abee kɩna hʋ buloŋ ba aa kaŋ kɩ tʋŋ Wɩɩsɩ tʋma wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ.

english_verse: The Law says that almost everything must be sprinkled with blood, and no sins can be forgiven unless blood is offered. Christ's Great Sacrifice
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ, Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ buloŋ Moosi aa saba biŋ dɩ nala kɩ tɩŋa, ba daga anɩɩ kyal lɛ sɩ wuwo sasɩ wɩbɔŋ koo bisiŋ wɩɩ buloŋ ta. Dɩ kyal lɛ bɩ lɩya, wɩbɔmɔ kpakyɛyɩ mɛ bee we doŋ.

english_verse: These things are only copies of what is in heaven, and so they had to be made holy by these ceremonies. But the real things in heaven must be made holy by something better.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, kɩna hʋ buloŋ ba aa kyesi Wɩɩsɩbee kɩna a marɩ, ʋ maga dɩ ba kpa pʋsɩ kyal lɛ a sasɩ ba bisiŋ ta. Amɛ kɩtɩɩma hʋ aa we Wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ kɛ, ʋ maga dɩ ba kpa kɩŋ aa weliye te pʋsɩ kyal lɛ a lɩɩ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ a sasɩ ba bisiŋ ta.

english_verse: This is why Christ did not go into a tent made by humans and was only a copy of the real one. Instead, he went into heaven and is now there with God to help us.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Krisita gyɩ bɩ gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ Liwelii hʋ nihuwobisi aa saa. Wɩɩsɩbee wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya rɛ ba gyɩ kyesi a saa dʋnɩya kɩŋ hʋ. Amɛ Wɩɩsɩbee tɩɩ rɛ Krisita gyʋʋ, a sɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya á wɩya, a sʋla ʋ kɩ tɩya ma.

english_verse: Christ did not have to offer himself many times. He wasn't like a high priest who goes into the most holy place each year to offer the blood of an animal.
translation_verse: Bɩna buloŋ Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyawʋ hʋ gyɩ aa kpa pʋna kyal lɛ gyʋʋ wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya hʋ dɩɩsɩya, a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ. Amɛ Krisita kɛ gyɩ bɩ ville kɩ gyʋʋ doŋ bɩna buloŋ, a kpa ʋ tɩɩ kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: If he had offered himself every year, he would have suffered many times since the creation of the world. But instead, near the end of time he offered himself once and for all, so he could be a sacrifice that does away with sin.
translation_verse: Dɩ ʋ rɛ fa yaa gɛɛ, ʋ fa sɩ na tʋwara bɩna kɛ buloŋ a lɩɩ dʋnɩya lipiilii a kaŋ kɩ ko bee gyɩnaŋ. Amɛ ba aa sɩŋ maga nyɛ, dʋnɩya buloŋ tenii kpaga rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ ko dɩgɩ dʋŋ, a kpa ʋ tɩɩ mɩɩbol a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, a laa nala wɩbɔmɔ ta.

english_verse: We die only once, and then we are judged.
translation_verse: Dɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ nal buloŋ sɩ sʋba, ka dɩ gɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ di ʋ tɩɩna sarɩya.

english_verse: So Christ died only once to take away the sins of many people. But when he comes again, it will not be to take away sin. He will come to save everyone who is waiting for him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba kpʋ Krisita mɛ dɩgɩ dʋŋ dɩ ʋ wuwo laa nɩgyamaa wɩbɔmɔ ta. Ʋ sɩ bɩl mɩɩgɩ ko. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko ko, ʋ bɩl bɩ sɩ laa nala wɩbɔmɔ amɛ nala hʋ aa yaa siri a gbala ʋ rɛ ʋ sɩ laa ta.

english_verse: The Law of Moses is like a shadow of the good things to come. This shadow isn't the good things themselves, because it cannot free people from sin by the sacrifices offered year after year.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ Moosi fa aa saba biŋ yaa wɩweliye hʋ aa sɩ ko daaliiŋ nɛ, ba bɩ yaa wɩweliye hʋ tɩɩ. Ɛɛwɩya, ɛɛ hʋ nala aa kaŋ pʋsɩ bee kɩna ko kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ bɩna bɩna buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ba yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma a bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: But the blood of bulls and goats cannot take away sins. It only reminds people of their sins from one year to the next.
translation_verse: beewɩya nʋsɩ abee bʋʋna kyal bɩ sɩ wuwo maakyiye sasɩ nal wɩbɔmɔ ta.

english_verse: Then Christ said, “And so, my God, I have come to do what you want, as the Scriptures say.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ baa, ‘Ŋ Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, na mɩyaŋ, ŋ ko rɛ dɩ ŋ yaa wɩya hʋ aa fɩyɛlɩ ɩ teŋ, anɩɩ ba aa saba gɛɛ biŋ ɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a tile ŋ tɩyaŋ.”’

english_verse: Well, it was to do away with offerings and sacrifices and to replace them. This is what he meant by saying to God, “I have come to do what you want.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka ʋ bɩl baa, “Na mɩyaŋ! Ŋ ko rɛ dɩ ŋ yaa wɩya hʋ aa fɩyɛlɩ ɩ teŋ.” Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ paa faafaa wɩɩsʋllɩ-ŋmaŋsɩ hʋ buloŋ ta rɛ, aŋ mɩɩgɩ kpa Krisita wɩɩsʋlɩɩ hʋ we ba bol tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: So we are made holy because Christ obeyed God and offered himself once for all.
translation_verse: Akuu Krisita aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ wɩya, ʋ aa kpaa ʋ tɩɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ dɩgɩ hʋ dʋŋ wuwo sasɩ á buloŋ wɩbɔmɔ ta rɛ.

english_verse: The priests do their work each day, and they keep on offering sacrifices that can never take away sins.
translation_verse: Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala hʋ aa kɩ tʋŋ ba tʋma rɛ kyɛɛ bee ʋ nyʋwa buloŋ. Ba gyɩ aa we wɩɩsʋlɩ-dɩgɩ dʋŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a villi kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, amɛ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ no bɩ sɩ wuwo sasɩ nala wɩbɔmɔ ta.

english_verse: But Christ offered himself as a sacrifice that is good forever. Now he is sitting at God's right side,
translation_verse: Amɛ Krisita kɛ kpa ʋ tɩɩ mɩɩbol lɛ a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ dɩgɩ dʋŋ, a sasɩ nala wɩbɔmɔ ta. Ʋ aa yaa gɛɛ teŋ, ʋ mɩɩgɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩbee rɛ, a hɔŋ Wɩɩsɩ noduu logiŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: and he will stay there until his enemies are put under his power.
translation_verse: Ʋ hɔŋ doŋ nɛ a kɩ gyegili Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ʋ kpa ʋ dɔmɔ buloŋ we ʋ nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: By his one sacrifice he has forever set free from sin the people he brings to God.
translation_verse: Ʋ aa kpaa ʋ tɩɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ dɩgɩ gɛɛ, ʋ leŋ nala hʋ bisiŋ ʋ aa sasa ta yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit also speaks of this by telling us that the Lord said,
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ mɛ dii wɩɩ no daŋsɩya rɛ. Beewɩya,

english_verse: “When the time comes, I will make an agreement with them. I will write my laws on their minds and hearts.
translation_verse: ʋ baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ basɩ baa, “Saŋa kɩdɩgɩ sɩ pele, dɩ ŋ kpa ŋ nyʋwa tɩya ŋ nala. Ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ba gyɩŋ ŋ nyʋwa wɩya, a kpa ba we ba hakɩllɩ abee ba nyuni buloŋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Then I will forget about their sins and no longer remember their evil deeds.”
translation_verse: Aŋ bɩl baa, “Ŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ kɩ liisi ba wɩbɔmɔ abee ba wɩyaakyogiye buloŋ.”

english_verse: When sins are forgiven, there is no more need to offer sacrifices. Encouragement and Warning
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ kpaa á wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ kyɛ ma, ʋ bɩl bɩ maga dɩ á kpa kɩna kɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ á wɩbɔmɔ wɩya. Ma leŋ dɩ á ko kpaga Wɩɩsɩ

english_verse: My friends, the blood of Jesus gives us courage to enter the most holy place
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ naabalɩya, á kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ á aa sɩ wuwo gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ Dɩɩweliye buloŋ Dɩɩwelii hʋ, beewɩya Yesu sʋba á wɩya rɛ,

english_verse: We have a great high priest who is in charge of God's house.
translation_verse: Á paalɩ kaŋ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala nɩhɩyabal lɛ, ʋ kɩ deŋ ámaa Wɩɩsɩ nala nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: So let's come near God with pure hearts and a confidence that comes from having faith. Let's keep our hearts pure, our consciences free from evil, and our bodies washed with clean water.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á mʋ Wɩɩsɩ lee abee tɩdɩgɩ aŋ leŋ dɩ á bembiye mɛ sɩŋ lɩdɩgɩ abee wɩɩ hʋ á aa laa di tɩyaŋ. Ma leŋ dɩ á yaa nala hʋ wɩbɔmɔ ba aa sasa ta ba tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, ba bɩl bee liisi ba wɩya, a leŋ dɩ á yaa nala ba aa kpaa nɩɩwelii fo ba bisiŋ buloŋ ta.

english_verse: We must hold tightly to the hope we say is ours. After all, we can trust the one who made the agreement with us.
translation_verse: Bayɩyɛla hʋ á aa kana wɩya hʋ á aa laa di tɩyaŋ, ma leŋ dɩ á marɩ kana ʋ weliŋ, beewɩya á laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ anɩɩ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa baa dɩ ʋ sɩ yaa tɩya ma, ʋ kɔnɩ sɩ yaa ba tɩya ma, ʋ wɩtɩɩ nyuniŋ.

english_verse: We should keep on encouraging each other to be thoughtful and to do helpful things.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á kyɩl dɔmɔŋ wɩya, a kɩ pɛ dɔmɔŋ tɩyaŋ abee kyori, a yaa wɩweliye kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Some people have given up the habit of meeting for worship, but we must not do that. We should keep on encouraging each other, especially since you know that the day of the Lord's coming is getting closer.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ á kɩ vɩya dɔmɔŋ laŋŋɩɩ anɩɩ nala badɔmɔŋ aa yaa gɛɛ. Amɛ ma leŋ dɩ á ha kɩ laŋŋɩ, a marɩ basɩ wɩya kɩ pɛ dɔmɔŋ tɩyaŋ weliŋ, amarɩkpatɩya ma aa naa anɩɩ á Tɩɩna Yesu mɩɩgɩ koyi aa kpaga nyɛ.

english_verse: No sacrifices can be made for people who decide to sin after they find out about the truth.
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ ko gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ aŋ vɩya ʋ tɩŋɩɩ, aŋ kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ, wɩɩsʋlɩɩ buloŋ bɩl tuwo aa sɩ leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpa á wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ma.

english_verse: They are God's enemies, and all they can look forward to is a terrible judgment and a furious fire.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ aa kaa rɛ yaa, see dɩ á leŋ kambɩŋ kaŋ ma, dɩ á kɩ gyegili kyɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ di á sarɩya, a leŋ nala hʋ buloŋ aa vɩya ʋ nyʋwa gyʋʋ diŋbal.

english_verse: We know that God has said he will punish and take revenge. We also know that the Scriptures say the Lord will judge his people.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ baa, “Wɩbɔmɔ hʋ nala aa yaa ŋ, ŋ sɩ yaa tuŋ ba kyɩŋ.” Ba bɩl baa, “Tɩɩna hʋ sɩ di ʋ nala sarɩya.”

english_verse: It is a terrible thing to fall into the hands of the living God!
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ ko gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa weye noŋ, ba sɩ lɔrɩ tɩya ɩ.

english_verse: You were kind to people in jail. And you gladly let your possessions be taken away, because you knew you had something better, something that would last forever.
translation_verse: Ma fáá nala hʋ ba aa kaŋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ wulo rɛ. Ka abee ba aa kaŋ ma kɩna fasɩ buloŋ, ma leŋ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ rɛ, beewɩya ma gyɩma anɩɩ ma kaŋ kɩna aa weliye te dʋnɩya no kɩna rɛ, ba bɩl yaa kɩna aa sɩ we doŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ mɛ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “God is coming soon! It won't be very long.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba saba baa, “Mʋhʋ sʋwaa nal hʋ aa sɩ ko sɩ ko. Ʋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: The people God accepts will live because of their faith. But he isn't pleased with anyone who turns back.”
translation_verse: Amɛ nala hʋ buloŋ aa yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma mɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, ba sɩ laa ŋ di, a kaŋ mɩɩbol. Amɛ dɩ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ ko mɩɩgɩ hal, ŋ teŋ bɩ sɩ fɩyɛlɩ ʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: We are not like those people who turn back and get destroyed. We will keep on having faith until we are saved.
translation_verse: Á bɩ yaa nala aa mɩɩga hal, a sʋba ta waasʋ. Amɛ á yaa nala aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ, ʋ laa ma ta.

english_verse: It was their faith that made our ancestors pleasing to God.
translation_verse: Faafaa nala hʋ fa aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ gyɩ fɩyɛlɩ ba nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Because of our faith, we know that the world was made at God's command. We also know that what can be seen was made out of what cannot be seen.
translation_verse: Á aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ tɩŋ á gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ ʋ nyʋwa dʋŋ nɛ a basɩ wɩya dʋnɩya kɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ we doŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, kɩna á sɩɩ aa bee na rɛ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ marɩ dʋnɩya kɩna hʋ buloŋ á sɩɩ aa naa.

english_verse: Because Abel had faith, he offered God a better sacrifice than Cain did. God was pleased with him and his gift, and even though Abel is now dead, his faith still speaks for him.
translation_verse: Abɛl gyɩ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ tɩŋ ʋ gyɩ kpa kɩŋ aa weliye te Keeŋ kɩŋ a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ. Ɛɛ mɛ rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ gyɩ fɩyɛlɩ ʋ wɩɩsʋllɩ-kɩŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ, ka ʋ leŋ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Abɛl sʋba rɛ, amɛ ʋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di nyubaanɩŋ, wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa yaa ha pɩna rɛ.

english_verse: Enoch had faith and did not die. He pleased God, and God took him up to heaven. This is why his body was never found.
translation_verse: Ɛnɔkɩ mɛ gyɩ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di wɩya ʋ gyɩ bɩ sʋba, aŋka Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ kpa ʋ, a kaŋ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩbee, nal buloŋ bɩl bɩ na ʋ. Wɩɩsɩ teŋ gyɩ fɩyɛla ʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ, ka ʋ na kpa ʋ a kaŋ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩbee.

english_verse: Abraham had faith and obeyed God. He was told to go to the land that God had said would be his, and he left for a country he had never seen.
translation_verse: Abɩraham mɛ gyɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa yɩrɩ ʋ a basɩ tɩya ʋ dɩ ʋ lɩɩ mʋ paalʋʋ kɩdɩgɩ ʋ aa wee nyʋwa dɩ ʋ sɩ kpa tɩya ʋ. Ʋ gyɩ sii lɩɩ ʋ bee tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ mʋ paalʋʋ hʋ, aŋ bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ʋ aa mʋʋ.

english_verse: Abraham did this, because he was waiting for the eternal city God had planned and built.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Abɩraham fa aa gyegili dɩ ʋ maakyiye gyʋʋ bee hʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ aa tii naaŋ a saa rɛ. Bee no sɩ we doŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ.

english_verse: Even when Sarah was too old to have children, she had faith that God would do what he had promised, and she had a son.
translation_verse: Abɩraham gyɩ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ tɩŋ ʋ gyɩ wuwo lʋl biye, abee ʋ gyɩ aa hɩyasa kɩŋkaŋ, ka ʋ haaŋ Saara mɛ bɩl yaa hapɩrɩ buloŋ. Ʋ gyɩ laa di anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ aa sɩ yaa wɩɩ hʋ ʋ aa wee nyʋwa anɩɩ ʋ sɩ yaa.

english_verse: Her husband Abraham was almost dead, but he became the ancestor of many people. In fact, there are as many of them as there are stars in the sky or grains of sand along the seashore.
translation_verse: Abɩraham gyɩ hɩyasa rɛ a mʋ kpaga sʋʋ, amɛ abee gɛɛ buloŋ, nala aa lɩɩ badɩgɩ no dʋŋ doho tɩyaŋ wala rɛ a bɩ kaŋ dɩɩsɩɩ anɩɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu kyɩŋwʋlɩya koo fuwobal nyʋwa bumbugulo.

english_verse: Every one of those people died. But they still had faith, even though they had not received what they had been promised. They were glad just to see these things from far away, and they agreed that they were only strangers and foreigners on this earth.
translation_verse: Nala no buloŋ gyɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di rɛ aŋ na sʋba. Kɩna hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa wee nyʋwa baa dɩ ʋ sɩ kpa tɩya ba, ba gyɩ bɩ naa ba aŋ sʋba. Ba gyɩ naa ba rɛ dɩ ba we libolii tɩyaŋ, ba tenni gyɩ fɩyɛlɩ kɩŋkaŋ, aŋ gyɩ leŋ nal buloŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ba yaa nɩhʋwala abee gyʋgyʋʋlɩya rɛ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When people talk this way, it is clear they are looking for a place to call their own.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa baa ba yaa nɩhʋwala bee gyʋgyʋʋlɩya hʋ daga anɩɩ ba aa kyɛ ba tɩɩ taŋha rɛ dɩ ba hɔŋ.

english_verse: If they had been talking about the land where they had once lived, they could have gone back at any time.
translation_verse: Ba bɩl bee bɩɩnɩ taŋha hʋ tɩyaŋ ba aa lɩya wɩya. Dɩ ba aa rɛ fa aa bɩɩnɩ ʋ wɩya, ba fa kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ dɩ ba mɩɩgɩ mʋ doŋ.

english_verse: But they were looking forward to a better home in heaven. This is why God wasn't ashamed for them to call him their God. He even built a city for them.
translation_verse: Amɛ ba fa aa kyɛ dɩ ba hɔŋ taŋha hʋ aa weliye te taŋhasɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, doŋ nɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩbee. Ɛɛwɩya, ʋ bɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ hɩɩsɩ abee ba aa yɩrɩ ʋ ba Wɩɩsɩ, beewɩya ʋ tɩɩ marɩ bee biŋ ba rɛ.

english_verse: Later, when Jacob was about to die, he leaned on his walking stick and worshiped. Then because of his faith he blessed each of Joseph's sons.
translation_verse: Gyeekɔbɩ mɛ gyɩ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ tɩŋ, ʋ sʋʋ gyɩ aa ko kpaga, ʋ mɛ gyɩ tɩga ʋ daatɩgɩɩ sɩŋ, aŋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ, a sʋla ʋ dɩ ʋ pɛ ʋ nihiye Gyosɛfʋ biisi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And right before Joseph died, he had faith that God would lead the people of Israel out of Egypt. So he told them to take his bones with them.
translation_verse: Gyosɛfʋ mɛ gyɩ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di wɩya, ʋ sʋʋ gyɩ aa ko kpaga, ʋ gyɩ basɩ Iziral tɩmma aa sɩ maakyiye lɩɩ Igyipiti paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya rɛ, aŋ daga ba gɛɛ mɛ ba aa sɩ yaa ʋ hogo.

english_verse: Because Moses' parents had faith, they kept him hidden until he was three months old. They saw that he was a beautiful child, and they were not afraid to disobey the king's orders.
translation_verse: Moosi nɩɩna abee ʋ kuwo mɛ gyɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba gyɩ kpa ʋ faŋa peŋsi boto ba aa lʋla ʋ hal tɩyaŋ. Ba gyɩ naa anɩɩ ʋ yaa Biiwelii rɛ, ɛɛ wɩya ba gyɩ bɩ fáá Igyipiti tɩmma kuwori aŋ vɩya ʋ nyʋwa hʋ ʋ aa bine dɩ Iziral tɩmma kpʋ ba biifɩllɩ buloŋ aa yaa boyoŋbiisi.

english_verse: Then after Moses grew up, his faith made him refuse to be called the king's grandson.
translation_verse: Moosi gyɩ aa ko waa teŋ, ʋ mɛ gyɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ gyɩ bɩ laa nyʋwa dɩ ba kana ʋ yɩrɩ kuwori Faaro toluu biye.

english_verse: He chose to be mistreated with God's people instead of having the good time that sin could bring for a little while.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ kpaa nɩɩ ʋ aa naa tʋwara hʋ Wɩɩsɩ nala aa naa, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ʋ aa we Faaro dɩya tɩyaŋ a kɩ nɩɩ sʋma hʋ aa bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ aŋ ha bɩl leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ mɛ.

english_verse: Moses knew that the treasures of Egypt were not as wonderful as what he would receive from suffering for the Messiah, and he looked forward to his reward.
translation_verse: Moosi gyɩ naa anɩɩ dɩ ʋ rɛ pɛɛ na tʋwara hʋ Wɩɩsɩ nala aa naa, akuu Nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya wɩya, ʋ rɛ kaŋ tɔnɔ yʋga a te kɩweliye hʋ buloŋ ʋ fa aa sɩ na Igyipiti tɩyaŋ. Ʋ gyɩ kpaa ʋ hakɩla buloŋ we tuno hʋ ʋ aa sɩ maakyiye na tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: His faith also made him celebrate Passover. He sprinkled the blood of animals on the doorposts, so that the first-born sons of the people of Israel would not be killed by the destroying angel.
translation_verse: Moosi gyɩ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di mɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ gyɩ leŋ Iziral tɩmma di Dɩɩsɩ-parɩ-banɩɩ Kyɛbal hʋ. Ʋ gyɩ leŋ ba kpʋ pʋsɩ rɛ, a yaa kyal hʋ taa ba dimbeenyʋʋsɩ buloŋ. Ba gyɩ aa yaa gɛɛ, malɩka hʋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ aa tɩma dɩ ʋ ko tuu a kpʋ Igyipiti tɩmma biibumo buloŋ Igyipiti paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ gyɩ ko parɩ Iziral tɩmma biibumo ta rɛ.

english_verse: God's people had faith, and when they had walked around the city of Jericho for seven days, its walls fell down.
translation_verse: Iziral tɩmma hʋ gyɩ bɩl aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ tɩŋ ba gyɩ vala baarɩ tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Gyɛriko kyɛyɛ bapɛ, gyebii hʋ ba aa saa baarɩ bee hʋ buloŋ tele.

english_verse: What else can I say? There isn't enough time to tell about Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jephthah, David, Samuel, and the prophets.
translation_verse: Ŋ fa sɩ wuwo dɩɩsɩ wɩya no kɩ mʋ, amɛ ŋ bɩ kaŋ sɩnɩɩ ŋ aa sɩ basɩ Gidiyɔŋ, abee Baraki, abee Samsɩŋ, abee Gyefita, abee Deviti, abee Samuwɛl abee Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ buloŋ wɩya lagɩlagɩ no.

english_verse: and put out raging fires and escaped from the swords of their enemies. Although they were weak, they were given the strength and power to chase foreign armies away.
translation_verse: Ba badɔmɔŋ dɩsɩ diŋbala rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ ba nala hʋ fa aa kyɛ dɩ ba kpʋ ba bee takoobiye nosi tɩyaŋ. Ba gyɩ bɩ kaŋ dee, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ gyɩ tɩya ba dee ba gyɩ ko yaa bembiduwoni tɩmma, a yuwo yuwoni a di taŋhasɩ badɔmɔŋ nala, ba laalyuwolo fá nyʋgɩsɩ.

english_verse: Some women received their loved ones back from death. Many of these people were tortured, but they refused to be released. They were sure they would get a better reward when the dead are raised to life.
translation_verse: Haana badɔmɔŋ gyɩ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ leŋ ba lʋlla sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Nala badɔmɔŋ mɛ gyɩ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di wɩya, ba gyɩ naa ŋmanɩɩ rɛ ba aa sɩ lɩɩ tʋwara tɩyaŋ, ka ba vɩya aŋ leŋ ba dɔgɩsɩ ba kpʋ, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kyisi ba a kpa mɩɩbol aa weliye te dʋnɩya no mɩɩbol a tɩya ba.

english_verse: Others were made fun of and beaten with whips, and some were chained in jail.
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya nala gyɩ mʋŋ badɔmɔŋ nɛ. Ba gyɩ vɩɩrɩ badɔmɔŋ mɛ a vʋwa badɔmɔŋ mɛ abee kyɔrʋmɔ aŋ kaŋ ba tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Still others were stoned to death or sawed in two or killed with swords. Some had nothing but sheep skins or goat skins to wear. They were poor, mistreated, and tortured.
translation_verse: Ba gyɩ yaga badɔmɔŋ nɛ abee bʋwa, a kaŋ badɔmɔŋ keri balɩya balɩya, aŋ kpʋ badɔmɔŋ mɛ abee takoobiye. Ba badɔmɔŋ gyɩ laalɩ piyese abee bʋʋna tenni rɛ, beewɩya ba gyɩ yaa nyaaba rɛ, ba kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ba, ba kɩ na tʋwara.

english_verse: The world did not deserve these good people, who had to wander in deserts and on mountains and had to live in caves and holes in the ground.
translation_verse: Dʋnɩya no gyɩ bɩ weliye maga ba weyi. Ba gyɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ gyʋgyʋʋlɩya a kɩ gɔllɩ taŋhahɩlɩya tɩyaŋ abee dogiŋsi nyuni tɩyaŋ, a gyɩ kɩ gyʋʋ bʋbʋʋsɩ abee taŋha bʋʋsɩ.

english_verse: All of them pleased God because of their faith! But still they died without being given what had been promised.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba basa anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ fɩyɛla nala no buloŋ aa laa ʋ di nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ. Amɛ ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ gyɩ bɩ na kɩŋ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa dɩ ʋ sɩ kpa tɩya ba.

english_verse: This was because God had something better in store for us. And he did not want them to reach the goal of their faith without us.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ mɩɩgɩ kyɛ kɩŋ aa weliye te faafaa kɩŋ hʋ rɛ a biŋ gbala á buloŋ. Wɩɩsɩ wɩkyɛɛlɩɩ rɛ yaa dɩ á beel-ba buloŋ laŋŋɩ yaa niweliye aa bɩ kaŋ wɩbɔŋ anɩɩ gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ á kɩɩ.

english_verse: Such a large crowd of witnesses is all around us! So we must get rid of everything that slows us down, especially the sin that just won't let go. And we must be determined to run the race that is ahead of us.
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa no buloŋ gyɩ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di yaa daŋsɩya tɩmma rɛ a tɩya ma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, á Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ ma leŋ dɩ á paa wɩya hʋ buloŋ aa tɔ á ŋmanɩɩ ta, a leŋ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ buloŋ aa vʋwa ma mɛ yayɩ. Ma leŋ dɩ á kɩ mʋ sɩya a kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa baa dɩ á kɩ yaa abee mala.

english_verse: But you have forgotten that the Scriptures say to God's children, “When the Lord punishes you, don't make light of it, and when he corrects you, don't be discouraged.
translation_verse: Teŋpolli wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa basɩ tɩya ʋ biisi, ma yeŋŋi ba rɛ? Wɩɩsɩ baa, “Ŋ biye, dɩ Tɩɩna hʋ rɛ ko kɩ kyagɩlɩ ɩ gyegili nɩɩ weliŋ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko na baaŋ ɩ nyuu tɩyaŋ a basɩ ɩ sɩya wɩya tɩya ɩ, ta leŋ dɩ ɩ teŋ kɩ yʋwɔrɩ, dɩ ɩ kpa laadii hʋ ta.

english_verse: God corrects all his children, and if he doesn't correct you, then you don't really belong to him.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ biisi buloŋ nɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ ʋ ko bee dɔgɩsɩ ma, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ma bɩ yaa ʋ biisi tɩɩ.

english_verse: Our earthly fathers correct us, and we still respect them. Isn't it even better to be given true life by letting our spiritual Father correct us?
translation_verse: Á buloŋ kaŋ kuwoma rɛ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ ba kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ma, á kɩ tɩya ba gyɩrɩma ɛɛ wɩya. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa we Wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ kɛ rɛ yaŋ maga dɩ á kpa á tɩɩma buloŋ tɩya ʋ, a kaŋ mɩɩbol.

english_verse: Our human fathers correct us for a short time, and they do it as they think best. But God corrects us for our own good, because he wants us to be holy, as he is.
translation_verse: Á dʋnɩya kuwoma mɛ gba aa lʋl ma, ba aa dɔgɩsɩ ma kyɛyɛ baŋmana dʋŋ nɛ ba kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ. Amɛ á tɩɩ weliŋ wɩya rɛ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ma, beewɩya ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ á mɛ ko yaa nɩtɩɩma rɛ, a bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ anɩɩ ʋ tɩɩ aa kɩɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: It is never fun to be corrected. In fact, at the time it is always painful. But if we learn to obey by being corrected, we will do right and live at peace.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ aa dɔgɩsɩ nal, ʋ tɩya aa kyogi rɛ, beewɩya, dɔgɩsɩɩ hʋ aa hayɛ tɩya ʋ rɛ. Amɛ dɩ ʋ rɛ laa dɔgɩsɩɩ hʋ, a kɩ tɩŋ ba abee kenyiri ba sɩ ko leŋ dɩ ʋ wɩyaalɩya degini, dɩ ʋ hɔŋ bee laaŋfɩya. Ma pɔ ma tɩɩ dɩ wɩbɔŋ buloŋ ta ko gyʋʋ ma paga

english_verse: Now stand up straight! Stop your knees from shaking
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma sii sɩŋ bɩŋbaŋ aŋ leŋ dɩ ma tenni polli.

english_verse: Try to live at peace with everyone! Live a clean life. If you don't, you will never see the Lord.
translation_verse: Ma yaa sɩfɩyaŋ dɩ ma bee nal buloŋ wɩya weliye, a yaa nɩtɩɩma. Beewɩya nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ yaa nɩtɩɩ ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo na Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Make sure no one misses out on God's wonderful kindness. Don't let anyone become bitter and cause trouble for the rest of you.
translation_verse: Ma pɔ ma tɩɩ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ hʋ ta ko buwo ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ. Aŋ bɩl pɔ ma tɩɩ dɩ nɩbɔŋ buloŋ ta ko we ma tɩyaŋ a kɩ dɔŋ ma, a mʋrɩ ma gyeniŋ buloŋ we wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You have now come to Mount Zion and to the heavenly Jerusalem. This is the city of the living God, where thousands and thousands of angels have come to celebrate.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di, ma ko pele dogimo hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Zaayɔŋ nɛ. Ma ko pele tɔɔ hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Gyerusalɛm aa we Wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ nɛ. Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa weye sɩya rɛ gɛɛ. Malɩkasɩ tusi tusi tusi mɛ laŋŋa doŋ nɛ abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ.

english_verse: Here you will find all of God's dearest children, whose names are written in heaven. And you will find God himself, who judges everyone. Here also are the spirits of those good people who have been made perfect.
translation_verse: Ma ko lee hʋ Wɩɩsɩ-biihɩyasɩ aa ko laŋŋɩ abee teŋ fɩyɛlʋʋ rɛ. Ba sabɩ ba fene rɛ a biŋ wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ. Ma ko Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ, nal hʋ aa sɩ di dʋnɩya nal buloŋ sarɩya. Lee no tɩyaŋ nɛ tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma hʋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ bee wɩtɩɩ a mʋ teŋ mɛ we.
