english_verse: And Jesus is here! He is the one who makes God's new agreement with us, and his sprinkled blood says much better things than the blood of Abel.
translation_verse: Ma ko Yesu lee rɛ, nal hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩŋa a we nyʋʋfalɩɩ tɩya nihuwobisi. Ʋ sʋba rɛ ʋ kyal gyaasɩ nal buloŋ wɩya. Ʋ kyal hʋ aa gyaasa tɩyaŋ nɛ wɩweliye sɩ tɩŋa a ko, a te Abɛl kyal hʋ gyɩ aa gyaasa.

english_verse: Make sure you obey the one who speaks to you. The people did not escape, when they refused to obey the one who spoke to them at Mount Sinai. Do you think you can possibly escape, if you refuse to obey the one who speaks to you from heaven?
translation_verse: Ma kɩ gyɩma dɩ ma ta ko vɩya nal hʋ aa basɩ wɩya hʋ nyʋwa. Beewɩya nala hʋ gyɩ aa vɩya ʋ nyʋwa taŋha nyuu daha gyɩ bɩ wuwo fá lɩɩ dɔgɩsɩɩ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ ámaa rɛ yaŋ vɩya nal hʋ aa we Wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ taal, á bɩŋ bɩ sɩ kyaŋlɩ.

english_verse: When God spoke the first time, his voice shook only the earth. This time he has promised to shake the earth once again, and heaven too.
translation_verse: Haŋ saŋa hʋ, Wɩɩsɩ taal hʋ gyɩ leŋ taŋha buloŋ gyigili rɛ. Lagɩlagɩ no, Wɩɩsɩ wee nyʋwa rɛ anɩɩ ʋ sɩ leŋ dɩ taŋha bɩl gyigili, amɛ taŋha dʋŋ daa sɩ gyigili. Wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha buloŋ nɛ sɩ gyigili.

english_verse: We should be grateful we were given a kingdom that cannot be shaken. And in this kingdom we please God by worshiping him and by showing him great honor and respect.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ leŋ á we ʋ koro hʋ aa bee gyigisi tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á kɩ fá ʋ, a kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ aŋgyʋwasʋ, aŋ pɛ kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ gɛɛ ʋ aa kyɛ.

english_verse: Our God is like a destructive fire!
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ diŋ aa dii.

english_verse: Keep being concerned about each other as the Lord's followers should.
translation_verse: Ma kyo dɔmɔŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ akuu ma aa yaa nɩmmabalɩya Krisita tɩyaŋ wɩya.

english_verse: Be sure to welcome strangers into your home. By doing this, some people have welcomed angels as guests, without even knowing it.
translation_verse: Ma yaa kuwokeri a kɩ deŋ nɩhʋwala weliŋ beewɩya, nala gyɩ aa yaa gɛɛ rɛ, a laa malɩkasɩ biŋ ba dɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ aŋ bɩ gyɩma.

english_verse: Remember the Lord's people who are in jail and be concerned for them. Don't forget those who are suffering, but imagine you are there with them.
translation_verse: Ma kpa nala hʋ ba aa kaŋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ wɩya anɩɩ ma beel-ba buloŋ nɛ ba kaŋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Nala hʋ ba aa dɔgɩsɩ mɛ, ma kpa ʋ anɩɩ ma beel-ba buloŋ nɛ ba kɩ dɔgɩsɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Don't fall in love with money. Be satisfied with what you have. The Lord has promised that he will not leave us or desert us.
translation_verse: Ma ta kyo molbiye kɩŋkaŋ a mʋ parɩ. Ma leŋ dɩ kɩna hʋ ma aa kana su ma sɩɩ. Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ basa ʋ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Ŋ bɩ sɩ maakyiye vɩya ma ta. Ŋ bɩ sɩ maakyiye lɩɩ ma hal.”

english_verse: This should make you feel like saying, “The Lord helps me! Why should I be afraid of what people can do to me?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, á sɩ wuwo ŋmaa á bembiye a baa, “Á tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa pɛ ŋ tɩyaŋ, Ɛɛ nyuniŋ, ŋ bɩ sɩ fá kambɩŋ wɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Nihuwobiŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa ŋ wɩɩ buloŋ.”

english_verse: Don't forget about your leaders who taught you God's message. Remember what kind of lives they lived and try to have faith like theirs.
translation_verse: Ma liisi ma sɩlaala hʋ gyɩ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya ma wɩya. Ma liisi mʋ pele gɛɛ ba gyɩ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ ba mɩɩbol buloŋ tɩyaŋ, a ko mʋ sʋba. Ma kɩ tɩŋ ba naabʋʋsɩ ma Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Don't be fooled by any kind of strange teachings. It is better to receive strength from God's gift of undeserved grace than to depend on certain foods. After all, these foods don't really help the people who eat them.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ wɩdʋŋsɩ hʋ nala badɔmɔŋ aa daga ma ko leŋ dɩ ma vɩya Wɩɩsɩ ŋmaŋtɩɩ hʋ ta. Dee hʋ aa sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ á tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ, ʋ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ʋ bɩ lɩɩ á aa tɩŋ kɩdiiliye sɩŋsɩ tɩyaŋ, beewɩya, nal hʋ aa tɩŋ sɩŋsɩ no, ʋ bɩ sɩ na tɔnɔ buloŋ a lɩɩ ba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But we have an altar where even the priests who serve in the place of worship have no right to eat.
translation_verse: Gyuuma wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala hʋ gyɩ aa tʋma kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ taŋtɩ-dɩya hʋ tɩyaŋ, ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ gyɩ bɩ kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ ʋ aa sɩ di wɩɩsʋllɩ-kɩna hʋ á aa kpa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ a kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ aŋgyʋwasʋ.

english_verse: This is why we should go outside the camp to Jesus and share in his disgrace.
translation_verse: Yesu gyɩ dii hɩɩsɩ rɛ weliŋ bee hʋ samanɩ tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á lɩɩ mʋ doŋ, dɩ á beel-ʋ buloŋ di haŋ hɩɩsɩ hʋ.

english_verse: On this earth we don't have a city that lasts forever, but we are waiting for such a city.
translation_verse: Beewɩya, á bɩ kaŋ bee aa sɩ we doŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ. Amɛ á aa yɩyɛlɩ á bee hʋ tɩyaŋ á aa sɩ maakyiye we a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ wɩya rɛ.

english_verse: But don't forget to help others and to share your possessions with them. This too is like offering a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Saŋa kɛ buloŋ, ma yaa kuwokeri aŋ yaa wɩweliye kɩ tɩya ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ, a kɩ kyiyeli dɔmɔŋ mɛ. Wɩɩsʋlɩɩ no rɛ aa fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ.

english_verse: Obey your leaders and do what they say. They are watching over you, and they must answer to God. So don't make them sad as they do their work. Make them happy. Otherwise, they won't be able to help you at all.
translation_verse: Ʋ maga dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋ ma sɩlaala nyʋwa rɛ, a kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ ba aa baa dɩ ma yaa. Beewɩya ba aa rɛ aa deŋ ma nyuu tɩyaŋ. Maakyiye kɩdɩgɩ ba sɩ daga gɛɛ ba aa deŋ ma nyuu a tɩya Wɩɩsɩ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa tɩŋ ba nyʋwa, ba sɩ tʋŋ ba tʋma weliŋ abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ. Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ bee tɩŋ ba nyʋwa, ba tɩsɩ sɩ kyogi ma tɩyaŋ. Ʋ gɛɛ bɩ sɩ kaŋ tɔnɔ buloŋ a tɩya ma.

english_verse: I especially want you to pray that I can visit you again soon. Final Prayers and Greetings
translation_verse: Ŋ aa sʋla ma rɛ abee ŋ hakɩla buloŋ dɩ ma kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ŋ mɩɩgɩ ko ma lee lagɩ. Wɩkateŋse

english_verse: My friends, I have written only a short letter to encourage you, and I beg you to pay close attention to what I have said.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ teŋ no ŋ aa saba tɩya ma kɛ bɩ doliye. Ɛɛ wɩya, ŋ aa sʋl ma dɩ ma di kenyiri aŋ gyegili nɩɩ wɩya hʋ ŋ aa saba tɩya ma dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋa.

english_verse: By now you surely must know that our friend Timothy is out of jail. If he gets here in time, I will bring him with me when I come to visit you.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma gyɩma anɩɩ á nɩɩnabiye Timoti ba fa aa kaŋ tɔ dɩya tɩyaŋ, ba lɩɩ ʋ rɛ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ ko ŋ lee lagɩ, ŋ beel-ʋ buloŋ sɩ ko ma lee.

english_verse: Please give my greetings to your leaders and to the rest of the Lord's people. His followers from Italy send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Ma kyʋwalɩ ma nɩhɩyasɩ abee Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ buloŋ tɩya ma. Á tɩyaŋ nala hʋ aa lɩɩ Itali paalʋʋ mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ sɩ we ma lee a leŋ dɩ ma hɔŋ bee laaŋfɩya.

english_verse: From James, a servant of God and of our Lord Jesus Christ. Greetings to the twelve tribes scattered all over the world. Faith and Wisdom
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Gyemsi aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita tʋŋtʋnnɩ rɛ saba teŋ no a kɩ tɩya nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di, aŋ pɩsa we dʋnɩya no logiŋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ŋ aa kyʋwalɩ ma buloŋ. Á tɩɩ kanɩɩ wɩgyʋʋlɩya abee tʋwara tɩyaŋ

english_verse: My friends, be glad, even if you have a lot of trouble.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, dɩ wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ nɛ ko gyʋʋ ma, ma leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa ma teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ,

english_verse: But you must learn to endure everything, so you will be completely mature and not lacking in anything.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ di kenyiri vɔgɔ ma, dɩ ma kaŋ mala a mʋ teŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma wuwo yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma, a bɩ sɩ nyaa gyogiweliye tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If you are that kind of person, you can't make up your mind, and you surely can't be trusted. So don't expect the Lord to give you anything at all. Poor People and Rich People
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ sige, aŋ bɩ sɩŋ wɩdɩgɩ naaŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna ta ko kɩ yɩyɛlɩ anɩɩ ʋ sɩ na kɩŋ buloŋ a lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee.

english_verse: scorched by the burning heat of the sun. The flowers lose their blossoms, and their beauty is destroyed. This is how the rich will disappear, as they go about their business. Trials and Temptations
translation_verse: Beewɩya, Wɩɩsɩ aa ko pɔsɔ, lee buloŋ aa nɩma rɛ parɩparɩ. Ʋ nʋŋ hʋ aa leŋ ɔhɔ hʋ buloŋ hɩla rɛ, Ʋ fɩɩla hʋ buloŋ mɛ yuwori, ka ʋ weliŋ hʋ buloŋ mɛ nyʋgɩsɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ nal hʋ aa kaŋ kɩna mɛ yaŋ kɩɩ. Ʋ ha sɩ we ʋ tʋma tɩyaŋ ka dɩ sʋʋ kana ʋ. Magɩsɩɩ abee wɩgyʋʋlɩya

english_verse: God will bless you, if you don't give up when your faith is being tested. He will reward you with a glorious life, just as he rewards everyone who loves him.
translation_verse: Nyusʋŋtɩɩna rɛ yaa nal hʋ tʋwara aa gyʋwa, aŋka ʋ ha wuwo kaŋ mala ʋ Wɩɩsɩ laadii tɩyaŋ. Ʋ aa yaŋ wuwo kaŋ mala gɛɛ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tɩya ʋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Mɩɩbol hʋ ʋ aa baa dɩ ʋ sɩ kpa tɩya nala hʋ buloŋ aa kyo ʋ.

english_verse: Don't be fooled, my dear friends.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabiikpɩyanama, ma ta kɩ mʋrɩ ma tɩɩma.

english_verse: Every good and perfect gift comes down from the Father who created all the lights in the heavens. He is always the same and never makes dark shadows by changing.
translation_verse: Kɩwelii kɛ buloŋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ. Kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa kyaanɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ ta ba. Amɛ dɩ ba aa rɛ ko gyʋʋ, bilhuu aa we doŋ nɛ. Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩtɩɩ bɩ kɩɩ nyɛ, beewɩya ʋ bee bɩrɩmɩ mʋhʋ buloŋ mɛ dɩ á we bilhuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: He wanted us to be his own special people, and so he sent the true message to give us new birth. Hearing and Obeying
translation_verse: Ʋ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ laa sɩya basɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ aa we ʋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ a tɩya ma dɩ á kɩ tɩŋa. Nyɛ rɛ ʋ yaa á yaa ʋ biisi, ka ʋ kɩmarɩya buloŋ na kɩ tɩŋa. Ma ta kpaa dɩgɩna dʋŋ kɩ nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ

english_verse: My dear friends, you should be quick to listen and slow to speak or to get angry.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabiikpɩyanama, ma gyegili nɩɩ wɩya no weliŋ. Ma leŋ nal buloŋ kaŋ dɩgɩŋgyegil, aŋ ta kɩ tuwoŋi wɩbasɩɩ, a ta kaŋ baaŋ toso mɛ.

english_verse: If you are angry, you cannot do any of the good things God wants done.
translation_verse: Beewɩya nal hʋ aa kaŋ baaŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If you hear the message and don't obey it, you are like people who stare at themselves in a mirror
translation_verse: Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ nɩɩ wɩya no aŋ vɩya ba tɩŋɩɩ, ʋ tɩɩna kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ nal aa kpaa nyagɩsa deŋ na ʋ tɩɩ.

english_verse: and forget what they look like as soon as they leave.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ʋ rɛ ko gɩɩgɩ mʋhʋ, ʋ guu yeŋŋi gɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa kɩya.

english_verse: But you must never stop looking at the perfect law that sets you free. God will bless you in everything you do, if you listen and obey, and don't just hear and forget.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ aa kpaa ʋ hakɩla buloŋ we Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ aa laa nala kɩ ta tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ mala abee ʋ tɩŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ, a bɩ nɩya aŋ kɩ yeŋŋi, aŋ wuwo kana ʋ kɩ tʋŋ tʋma, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ pɛ ʋ tɩɩna abee ʋ wɩyaalɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If you think you are being religious, but can't control your tongue, you are fooling yourself, and your religion is useless.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ baa ʋ aa kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, aŋ bee kana ʋ tɩɩ abee ʋ wɩbasɩya tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ ʋ kɩ mʋrɩ. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ kyʋwalɩɩ mɛ yaa waasʋ rɛ.

english_verse: Religion that pleases God the Father must be pure and spotless. You must help needy orphans and widows and not let this world make you evil.
translation_verse: Wɩɩkyʋwalɩ hʋ á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa daga anɩɩ ʋ rɛ yaa wɩɩkyʋwal kyirikyi abee Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩŋɩɩ tɩɩ rɛ nyɛ: Dɩ ɩ kɩ kyiyeli lohaana abee nɩtaaga abee busuluŋbiisi ba tʋwara tɩyaŋ aŋ lɩɩ ɩ tɩɩ dʋnɩya bisiŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: My friends, if you have faith in our glorious Lord Jesus Christ, you won't treat some people better than others.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, nyɛ kɛ ma aa laa á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita, feŋ bal tɩɩna hʋ, wɩya dɩ nyɛ, ma ta bɩl kɩ lugisi nala, a kɩ tɩya badɔmɔŋ gyɩrɩma aŋ kpa sii gyʋʋ badɔmɔŋ mɛ.

english_verse: Suppose a rich person wearing fancy clothes and a gold ring comes to one of your meetings. And suppose a poor person dressed in worn-out clothes also comes.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa Krisitabiisi rɛ hɔnɔ, dɩ nala balɩya ko gyʋʋ ma tɩyaŋ, dɩ kɩdɩgɩ yaa dʋwaŋ a laalɩ ʋ gaweliye aŋ we ʋ salma nonipɩra, ka dɩ kɩdɩgɩ hʋ mɛ yaa nyaabʋ a laalɩ ʋ gakɔsʋŋsɩ.

english_verse: You must not give the best seat to the one in fancy clothes and tell the one who is poor to stand at the side or sit on the floor.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ma kaŋ nal hʋ a laalɩ gaweliye hʋ weliŋ aŋ tɩya ʋ lɩhɔŋwelii, aŋ mɩɩgɩ basɩ tɩya nyaabʋ hʋ mɛ dɩ ʋ hɔŋ taŋha, koo dɩ ʋ bɩl aa kyɛɛ mɛ, dɩ ʋ sɩ wuwo sɩŋ doŋ.

english_verse: This is the same as saying that some people are better than others, and you would be acting like a crooked judge.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ yaa gɛɛ, ʋ bɩ weliye. Ma daga anɩɩ nala badɔmɔŋ kyo kpɩya badɔmɔŋ nɛ gɛɛ. Ma tɩliisibɔmɔ no rɛ ma aa kpa a kɩ lɩɩ dɔmɔŋ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ kɩɩ nyɛ, ʋ bɩ weliye.

english_verse: My dear friends, pay attention. God has given a lot of faith to the poor people in this world. God has also promised them a share in his kingdom that he will give to everyone who loves him.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabiikpɩyanama, ma gyegile nɩɩ daha. Nala hʋ aa yaa nyaaba dʋnɩya sɩya tɩyaŋ, ba aa rɛ Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ dɩ ba laa ʋ wɩya di, aŋ gyʋʋ ʋ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ. Lee hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa dɩ ʋ sɩ kpa tɩya nala hʋ buloŋ aa kyo ʋ. Nal hʋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di aŋ gyʋʋ ʋ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ yaa kɩna tɩɩna tɩɩ.

english_verse: You mistreat the poor. But isn't it the rich who boss you around and drag you off to court?
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kɛ aa kʋwasɩ nyaaba rɛ. Kɩna tɩmma no daa aa dɩ dee ma nyuni tɩyaŋ, a gʋrɩ ma, aŋ ha kaŋ ma mʋ tɩya sarɩdiile dɩ ba di ma sarɩya gɛɛ?

english_verse: Aren't they the ones who make fun of your Lord?
translation_verse: Na ba aa mɛ rɛ yaŋ bɩl aa kyogi Yesu Krisita feŋwelii hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa tɩya ma.

english_verse: You will do all right, if you obey the most important law in the Scriptures. It is the law that commands us to love others as much as we love ourselves.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba saba rɛ a baa, “Kyo ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna anɩɩ ɩ aa kyo ɩ tɩɩ gɛɛ.” Dɩ mamaa kɔnɩ aa tɩŋ nyʋwa no Gyoribaŋa Bakɔɔ, á Tɩɩna aa biŋ tɩya ma, ʋ yaa wɩwelii rɛ.

english_verse: But if you treat some people better than others, you have done wrong, and the Scriptures teach that you have sinned.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ mamaa rɛ aa lugisi nala, a kpa yohuŋ kɩ tɩya badɔmɔŋ aŋ kaŋ badɔmɔŋ mɛ kɩ kʋwasɩ, Wɩɩsɩ mɩra no daga anɩɩ ma yaa wɩbɔŋyaala rɛ, aŋ yaa mɩrɩ-kyogilo mɛ.

english_verse: If you obey every law except one, you are still guilty of breaking them all.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ hʋ buloŋ, aŋ ko kyogi mɩrɩdɩgɩ mɛ ba tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ kɛ sɩya tɩyaŋ, mɩrɩsɩ hʋ buloŋ nɛ ʋ kyogi gɛɛ.

english_verse: The same God who told us to be faithful in marriage also told us not to murder. So even if you are faithful in marriage, but murder someone, you still have broken God's Law.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa baa dɩ á ta kɩ kyɛɛ nala haana, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ bɩl baa dɩ á ta kɩ kpʋʋ nala. Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaŋ bee kyɛ nala haana mɛ, aŋ ha kɩ kpʋ nala, ma gyɩma anɩɩ ma kyogi Wɩɩsɩ mɩra hʋ rɛ.

english_verse: Speak and act like people who will be judged by the law that sets us free.
translation_verse: Ma wɩbasɩya abee ma wɩyaalɩya tɩyaŋ, ma gyɩŋ tɩya ma tɩɩma weliŋ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa hʋ aa laa nala kɩ ta, ʋ rɛ ʋ sɩ kpa di ma sarɩya.

english_verse: Do this, because on the day of judgment there will be no pity for those who have not had pity on others. But even in judgment, God is merciful! Faith and Works
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ nal lɛ bee fá nala sikii, Wɩɩsɩ mɛ bɩ sɩ fá ʋ tɩɩna sikii saŋa hʋ ʋ aa sɩ di nala sarɩya. Amɛ nal hʋ aa fá nala sikii, ʋ bɩ sɩ fá wɩɩ buloŋ sarɩya hʋ kyɛdiilii. Á Wɩɩsɩ laadii abee á wɩyaalɩya

english_verse: My friends, what good is it to say you have faith, when you don't do anything to show you really do have faith? Can this kind of faith save you?
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, dɩ nal lɛ basɩ baa ʋ laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di rɛ, aŋ bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ, ʋ gɛɛ hʋ kaŋ memii rɛ? Dɩ ʋ Wɩɩsɩ laadii kɔnɩ kɩɩ nyɛ, ma bɩɩna anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa ʋ ta? Ʋ Wɩɩsɩ laadii iriŋ no bɩ sɩ maakyiye laa ʋ ta.

english_verse: you shouldn't just say, “I hope all goes well for you. I hope you will be warm and have plenty to eat.” What good is it to say this, unless you do something to help?
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ma basɩ tɩya ba baa, “Wɩɩsɩ sɩ pɛ ma tɩyaŋ, a tɩya ma kɩŋ buloŋ ma aa kyɛɛ.” Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaŋ basɩ nyɛ aŋ bɩ wuwo dɩ ɩ pɛ ba tɩyaŋ abee ba teŋbii kɩkyɛɛlɩya hʋ, ʋ tɔnɔ rɛ bee?

english_verse: Suppose someone disagrees and says, “It is possible to have faith without doing kind deeds.” I would answer, “Prove that you have faith without doing kind deeds, and I will prove that I have faith by doing them.”
translation_verse: Nal kɩdɩgɩ aa wuwo basɩ baa “Ɩ kɛ laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ, ka ŋ mɛ kɩ yaa wɩweliye.” Ɛɛ rɛ ɩ sɩ wuwo daga anɩɩ ɩ kɔnɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ aŋ bee yaa wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ. Nyɛ bɩ sɩ maakyiye wuwo yaa. Ŋ kɛ, ŋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di rɛ tɩŋ ŋ wuwo kɩ yaa wɩweliye.

english_verse: You can now see that we please God by what we do and not only by what we believe.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ nal wɩyaalɩya rɛ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ʋ Wɩɩsɩ laadii hʋ dʋŋ daa aa wuwo leŋ ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: My friends, we should not all try to become teachers. In fact, teachers will be judged more strictly than others.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ma buloŋ ta kɩ kyɛɛ dɩ ma yaa Wɩɩsɩ wɩdagɩla. Beewɩya dʋnɩya sarɩya hʋ kyɛdiilii, Wɩɩsɩ sarɩya sɩ deye tɩya á nala hʋ aa yaa dɩdagɩla a te á dɔŋtɩŋsɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: All of us do many wrong things. But if you can control your tongue, you are mature and able to control your whole body.
translation_verse: Á buloŋ yaa wɩya kɩ kyogi nala rɛ. Amɛ dɩ nal lɛ we doŋ a bɩ basɩ wɩya kɩ kyogi nala, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ bɩ kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ. Ʋ gyɩŋ ʋ tɩɩ kanɩɩ rɛ abee ʋ wɩyaalɩya buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: It takes strong winds to move a large sailing ship, but the captain uses only a small rudder to make it go in any direction.
translation_verse: Ma bɩl na nɩɩduworiborisi mɛ. Dɩ nɩɩduworiboro yaŋ kyo ʋ maga gɛɛ buloŋ mɛ, dɩ puwobala dʋŋ wuwo kana ʋ kɩ vala. Amɛ kuunyiŋdaabiye nyɛ rɛ boriduworil hʋ aa kaŋ kɩ daga lee hʋ ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ boro hʋ mʋ.

english_verse: Our tongues are small too, and yet they brag about big things. It takes only a spark to start a forest fire!
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nihuwobiŋ nyʋwa mɛ yaŋ kɩɩ. Ʋ bɩ maga wɩɩ buloŋ, aŋ kɩ basɩ wɩbala. Ma yaŋ gyɩma weliŋ anɩɩ diŋgel mɛ bɩ yʋga, amɛ ʋ aa wuwo kyol kaŋ ɔkʋwabal lɛ a kpa ʋ buloŋ di.

english_verse: The tongue is like a spark. It is an evil power that dirties the rest of the body and sets a person's entire life on fire with flames that come from hell itself.
translation_verse: Nihuwobiŋ nyʋwa mɛ yaŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ diŋ. Wɩbɔmɔ iriŋ buloŋ nɛ we ʋ tɩyaŋ. Nyʋwa yaa nihuwobiŋ teŋ lee kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ʋ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ hʋwoŋ sɩ wuwo kyogi nihuwobiŋ teŋbii buloŋ. Ʋ aa kyol diŋ nɛ a dɩ deŋdeŋ nihuwobiŋ mɩɩbol buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Diŋ no buloŋ aa lɩɩ Sɩtaanɩ lee rɛ.

english_verse: All kinds of animals, birds, reptiles, and sea creatures can be tamed and have been tamed.
translation_verse: Nihuwobiŋ wuwo kaŋ pʋsɩ buloŋ dee rɛ: bagɩla abee digibiisi, abee kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa tuuri taŋha, abee nɩɩ tɩyaŋ kɩna buloŋ.

english_verse: But our tongues get out of control. They are restless and evil, and always spreading deadly poison.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal buloŋ tuwo a kaŋ ʋ nyʋwa dee, ʋ aa sɩ wuwo kana ʋ tɔ dɩ ʋ tallɩ. Ʋ yaa kɩbɔŋ nɛ a kaŋ hʋwoŋ hʋ aa sɩ wuwo kpʋ nal.

english_verse: My dear friends, with our tongues we speak both praises and curses. We praise our Lord and Father, and we curse people who were created to be like God, and this isn't right.
translation_verse: Nyʋwa hʋ tɩɩtɩɩ á aa kaŋ kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ tɩɩtɩɩ rɛ á bɩl kaŋ kɩ tʋʋsɩ nala mɛ. Ŋ naabalɩya, ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ma kɩ yaa nyɛ.

english_verse: Can clean water and dirty water both flow from the same spring?
translation_verse: Buldɩgɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo kyala kɩ bulo nɩɩwelii abee nɩɩbɔŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: Can a fig tree produce olives or a grapevine produce figs? Does fresh water come from a well full of salt water? Wisdom from Above
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, tutogo mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ babɩlɩya. Kyʋkyɔyɩ mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ piliye. Ɛɛ rɛ buldɩgɩ mɛ bɩ sɩ wuwo kyala kɩ bulo nɩɩwelii abee nɩɩbɔŋ buloŋ. Wɩɩsɩ wɩgyʋŋ abee dʋnɩya wɩgyʋŋ

english_verse: Are any of you wise or sensible? Then show it by living right and by being humble and wise in everything you do.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ we ma tɩyaŋ a kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ, kɛ ʋ sɩya mɛ suri, ʋ maga dɩ ʋ tɩɩna kɩ yaa wɩweliye rɛ. Dɩ ʋ rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, aŋ kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ, ɛɛ sɩ daga anɩɩ ʋ kɔnɩ kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ nɛ.

english_verse: This kind of wisdom doesn't come from above. It is earthly and selfish and comes from the devil himself.
translation_verse: Wɩgyʋŋ no iriŋ bɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee. Ʋ yaa dʋnɩya wɩɩ rɛ, a lɩɩ dʋnɩya nala bee Sɩtaanɩ tɩbɩɩŋbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Whenever people are jealous or selfish, they cause trouble and do all sorts of cruel things.
translation_verse: Dɩ nala rɛ kaŋ tɩbal abee dɔmɔŋ, ka dɩ ba tɩsɩ mɛ kɩ hɔllɩ dɔmɔŋ, ba sɩ kaŋ nyʋʋlɩyaba, a kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ, aŋka ba kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ iriŋ buloŋ mɛ.

english_verse: Why do you fight and argue with each other? Isn't it because you are full of selfish desires that fight to control your body?
translation_verse: Bee rɛ tɩŋ ma aa gʋla kɩ kaa dɔmɔŋ, a kɩ yuwo yuwo? Ma tɩbɩɩŋbɔmɔ hʋ aa we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ aa kaŋ ba buloŋ kɩ ko.

english_verse: You want something you don't have, and you will do anything to get it. You will even kill! But you still cannot get what you want, and you won't get it by fighting and arguing. You should pray for it.
translation_verse: Ma aa kɩ kyɛ kɩna rɛ, aŋka ma bee na ba. Ɛɛ wɩya ma aa yaa siri rɛ dɩ ma kpʋ sʋʋnɩ. Ma bembiye aa dɔbɔ kɩna tɩyaŋ nɛ yʋga, ka ma bee na ba. Ɛɛ wɩya ma aa kaa dɔmɔŋ, a yuwo yuwo. Ma bee na kɩna hʋ ma aa kyɛɛ beewɩya ma bee sʋla Wɩɩsɩ lee.

english_verse: You people aren't faithful to God! Don't you know if you love the world, you are God's enemies? And if you decide to be a friend of the world, you make yourself an enemy of God.
translation_verse: Ma kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ nal sɔnsɔnnɔ. Ma bɩ gyɩŋ bee baa dɩ nal lɛ baa ʋ kyo dʋnɩya kɩna, gɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ tɩɩna bɩrɩmɩ Wɩɩsɩ dɔŋ nɛ? Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kpaa ʋ hakɩla we dʋnɩya kɩna tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna aa bɩrɩmɩ Wɩɩsɩ dɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: In fact, God treats us with even greater kindness, just as the Scriptures say, “God opposes everyone who is proud, but he blesses all who are humble with undeserved grace.”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ dee hʋ ʋ aa kpaa we á tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ gba yaŋ deye te á tɩɩ teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya hʋ dee. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba sabɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa vɩya dagɩŋtɩɩ tɩmma ta rɛ, aŋ kɩ pɛ nala hʋ aa hʋwɔlɩ ba tɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Come near to God, and he will come near to you. Clean up your lives, you sinners. Purify your hearts, you people who can't make up your mind.
translation_verse: Ma fasɩ ko kpaga Wɩɩsɩ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko fasɩ ko kpaga ʋ, ʋ mɛ sɩ fasɩ ko kpaga ma. Mamaa wɩbɔŋyaala, ma lɩɩ ma nosi wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ. Ma yaa minaafigi tɩmma rɛ, a kaŋ tɩbɩɩŋkpara abee Wɩɩsɩ. Ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩ lɩɩ tɩbɩɩŋbɔmɔ no buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Be humble in the Lord's presence, and he will honor you. Saying Cruel Things about Others
translation_verse: Ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ hʋwɔlɩ Tɩɩna hʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ yaa gɛɛ, ʋ mɛ sɩ kpa ma yohuŋ. Ma ta kɩ kyogi nala fene

english_verse: You should know better than to say, “Today or tomorrow we will go to the city. We will do business there for a year and make a lot of money!”
translation_verse: Ma gyegili daha. Ma nala hʋ aa baa: “Gyɩnaŋ koo kyiye, á sɩ mʋ tɔɔ kɩdɩgɩ, a hɔŋ doŋ bɩna, a yaa bayallɩɩ, a na molbiye yʋga.

english_verse: What do you know about tomorrow? How can you be so sure about your life? It is nothing more than mist that appears for only a little while before it disappears.
translation_verse: Ma gba paalɩ bɩ gyɩŋ ma mɩɩbol kyiye aa sɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ. Ma kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bʋsʋŋ aa tɔɔ. Ʋ aa tɔ rɛ mʋhʋ sʋwaa, aŋ pirigi dɩɩgɩ.

english_verse: You should say, “If the Lord lets us live, we will do these things.”
translation_verse: Ma aa maga dɩ ma baa, ‘Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ laa nyʋwa dɩ á kaŋ mɩɩbol á sɩ yaa nyɛ bee nyɛ.’

english_verse: Yet you are stupid enough to brag, and it is wrong to be so proud.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kaŋ kalɩŋbaanɩ rɛ, aa kɩ daga ma tɩɩ. Dagɩŋtɩɩ no buloŋ bɩ kaŋ ŋmanɩɩ.

english_verse: If you don't do what you know is right, you have sinned.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ ɩ rɛ gyɩŋ wɩweliye hʋ aa maga dɩ ɩ yaa, ka dɩ ɩ vɩya ʋ yayɩ, ɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: You rich people should cry and weep! Terrible things are going to happen to you.
translation_verse: Ma gyegili nɩɩ daha, kɩna tɩmma! Ma maga ma kɩ wɩɩ rɛ, a kɩ ŋmaa nyʋʋsɩ beewɩya tʋwarɩbal lɛ sɩ tele ma nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Your treasures have already rotted, and moths have eaten your clothes.
translation_verse: Ma dʋwa hʋ buloŋ nɛ pʋw, ka tuyi mɛ kpa ma gaweliye hʋ buloŋ di.

english_verse: You refused to pay the people who worked in your fields, and now their unpaid wages are shouting out against you. The Lord All-Powerful has surely heard the cries of the workers who harvested your crops.
translation_verse: Ma bɩ naa! Ma aa kɩ mʋrɩ nala hʋ aa tʋŋ ma bagɩsɩ tʋma rɛ aŋ pɔ dɩ ma bɩ sɩ tuŋ ba. Tʋŋtʋnna hʋ buloŋ aa we ma bagɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, ba ŋmaa wulo kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ á Tɩɩna, dʋnɩya buloŋ Laataal, ʋ mɛ kɔnɩ yaŋ nɩɩ ba wulo hʋ rɛ.

english_verse: While here on earth, you have thought only of filling your own stomachs and having a good time. But now you are like fat cattle on their way to be butchered.
translation_verse: Ma dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ gyʋʋyɩ buloŋ, sʋma abee laaŋfɩya dʋŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ma we, a kɩ yaa ma wɩkyɛɛlɩya dʋŋ. Ma dɩyɛsɩ ma tɩɩ rɛ a nara anɩɩ ba aa dɩyɛsɩ nʋhʋ ʋ nara, ba ko kaŋ kpʋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Be patient like those farmers and don't give up. The Lord will soon be here!
translation_verse: Ɛɛ nyuniŋ, ma mɛ kaŋ kenyiri. Ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ weliŋ aŋ leŋ dɩ ma bayɩyɛla yʋga, beewɩya, á Tɩɩna hʋ kyɛkoolii kpaga rɛ.

english_verse: Don't grumble about each other or you will be judged, and the judge is right outside the door.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, ma ta kɩ nyaŋ dɔmɔŋ, dɩ Wɩɩsɩ ta ko di ma sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ma. Nal hʋ aa sɩ di sarɩya hʋ, ʋ yaa siri rɛ, ʋ koyi mɛ kpaga.

english_verse: My friends, follow the example of the prophets who spoke for the Lord. They were patient, even when they had to suffer.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, na ma naa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ gyɩ aa basɩ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ feŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ? Ba gyɩ naa tʋwara rɛ aŋ ha kaŋ kenyiri abee mala. Ma mɛ gʋnnɩ ba kenyiri abee ba mala hʋ iriŋ ma tʋwara nayɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: In fact, we praise the ones who endured the most. You remember how patient Job was and how the Lord finally helped him. The Lord did this because he is so merciful and kind.
translation_verse: Ba gyɩ aa kaŋ mala wɩya rɛ tɩŋ á kaŋ ba kɩ yɩrɩ teŋfɩyɛl tɩmma. Na ma nɩɩ ɛɛ hʋ Gyɔbɩ mɛ gyɩ aa kaŋ kenyiri abee mala rɛ ʋ tʋwara nayɩ tɩyaŋ. Ma naa gɛɛ Tɩɩna hʋ gyɩ aa kyiyeli ʋ rɛ ba mʋ tenii tɩyaŋ. Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ kɔnɩ kyɩl á wɩya rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, aŋ kɩ fá á sikii mɛ yʋga.

english_verse: My friends, above all else, don't take an oath. You must not swear by heaven or by earth or by anything else. “Yes” or “No” is all you need to say. If you say anything more, you will be condemned.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ rɛ nyɛ: Dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ ko kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ we nyʋwa, ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ɩ kpa ŋmɩyɛsʋʋ. Ma ta ko kɩ ŋmɩyɛsɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu koo taŋha, koo kɩŋ kɛ buloŋ. Dɩ ba ko maga dɩ ma baa “waa,” ma baa waa. Dɩ ba bɩl ko maga dɩ ma baa “aayɩ,” ma baa aayɩ. Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ ta ko di ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ sarɩya, dɩ ɩ tele. Ma laa Wɩɩsɩ di ma Wɩɩsɩ kyʋwalɩɩ tɩyaŋ

english_verse: If you are sick, ask the church leaders to come and pray for you. Ask them to put olive oil on you in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ rɛ ko kɩ wɩɩlɩ, ʋ tɩɩna tɩma dɩ ba mʋ yɩrɩ Krisitabiisi sɩlaala hʋ. Ba sɩ ko kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩya ʋ aŋ tɩsɩ ʋ bee nʋʋ, á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita feŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If you have faith when you pray for sick people, they will get well. The Lord will heal them, and if they have sinned, he will forgive them.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ ko laa di anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɔnɩ sɩ yaa wɩɩ hʋ ba aa sʋla ʋ kɩ kyɛ, ʋ sɩ leŋ dɩ wɩɩla tɩɩna hʋ na laaŋfɩya. Ka dɩ ʋ tɩɩna fa yaa wɩbɔmɔ maga gɛɛ buloŋ mɛ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa ba buloŋ kyɛ ʋ.

english_verse: If you have sinned, you should tell each other what you have done. Then you can pray for one another and be healed. The prayer of an innocent person is powerful, and it can help a lot.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ nyuniŋ, ma pʋllɩ ma tɩsɩ kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ, aŋ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ tɩya dɔmɔŋ. Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ ma na laaŋfɩya. Tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna wɩɩkyʋwalɩ kaŋ dee rɛ weliŋ. Wɩɩ buloŋ ʋ aa sʋla Wɩɩsɩ kɩ kyɛ aa wuwo yaa rɛ.

english_verse: Elijah was just as human as we are, and for three and a half years his prayers kept the rain from falling.
translation_verse: Ma na Ɛlaagya! Ʋ gyɩ yaa nihuwobiŋ nɛ anɩɩ á kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ. Amɛ ʋ gyɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ rɛ baŋbaŋ dɩ ʋ ta leŋ duwoŋ nɩɩ. Duwoŋ mɛ kɔnɩ gyɩ bɩ nɩya paalʋʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ bɩsɩ kpaŋkpaŋ boto abee kyalɩɩ.

english_verse: But when he did pray for rain, it fell from the skies and made the crops grow.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ gyɩ bɩl mɩɩgɩ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ leŋ duwoŋ kyuuri yʋga, taŋha nyuu kɩna buloŋ marɩ weliŋ.

english_verse: My friends, if any followers have wandered away from the truth, you should try to lead them back.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabalɩya, dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ rɛ ko nyʋgɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ wuwo tarɩ ʋ ko,

english_verse: God the Father decided to choose you as his people, and his Spirit has made you holy. You have obeyed Jesus Christ and are sprinkled with his blood. I pray that God will be kind to you and will keep on giving you peace! A Real Reason for Hope
translation_verse: Á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ foŋ gyɩŋ ma wɩya rɛ faafaa buloŋ a lɩɩ ma ʋ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ, ma yaa ʋ nala. Ʋ tɩŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a leŋ ma yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ dɩ ma wuwo kɩ tɩŋ Yesu Krisita nyʋwa, ka dɩ ʋ kyal hʋ sasɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ ta dɩ ma ta kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ sɩ marɩ daga ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩya ma yʋga a leŋ dɩ ʋ fɩyɛlʋʋ we ma lee a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ. Bayɩyɛla hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. God is so good, and by raising Jesus from death, he has given us new life and a hope that lives on.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ rɛ yaa á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita Kuwo abee ʋ Wɩɩsɩ. Ʋ fáá á sikii rɛ kɩŋkaŋ a tɩŋ Yesu Krisita sʋʋ tɩyaŋ mɩɩgɩ-siyi hʋ tɩyaŋ, a tɩya ma mɩɩbofalɩɩ. Nyɛ leŋ á kaŋ bayɩyɛla aa bɩ kaŋ tenii rɛ anɩɩ ʋ sɩ maakyiye kyisi ma mɛ sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God has something stored up for you in heaven, where it will never decay or be ruined or disappear.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, á kaŋ bayɩyɛla rɛ anɩɩ á sɩ na kɩweliye hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa marɩ biŋ ʋ nala wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ. Kɩna no bɩ sɩ maakyiye pʋw koo a kyogi, ba weliŋ mɛ bɩ sɩ maakyiye teŋ.

english_verse: You have never seen Jesus, and you don't see him now. But still you love him and have faith in him, and no words can tell how glad and happy
translation_verse: Ma ha bɩ maakyiye na Yesu Krisita, amɛ ma kyo ʋ rɛ. Abee ma aa bee na ʋ bee ma sii lagɩlagɩ no mɛ, ka ma laa ʋ wɩya di rɛ, ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ fɩyɛlɩɩ hʋ iriŋ ma aa bɩ sɩ wuwo kaŋ nyʋwa basɩ,

english_verse: you are to be saved. This is why you have faith.
translation_verse: beewɩya wɩɩ hʋ wɩya aa tɩŋ ma laa Wɩɩsɩ di, ʋ rɛ yaa laatayɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa laa ma kɩ ta.

english_verse: Some prophets told how God would treat you with undeserved grace, and they searched hard to find out more about the way you would be saved.
translation_verse: Laatayɩ no wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala gyɩ fɩyɛlɩ sɩya gbilli tenni tɩyaŋ nɛ abee sɩfɩyasɩ dɩ ba na gɛɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ laa ʋ nala ta. Ba gyɩ basɩ wɩya rɛ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ a daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa dɩ ʋ sɩ laa ma ta ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The Spirit of Christ was in them and was telling them how Christ would suffer and would then be given great honor. So they searched to find out exactly who Christ would be and when this would happen.
translation_verse: Yesu Krisita Wiyesi Welii hʋ gyɩ aa we ba tɩyaŋ nɛ gyɩ basɩ tɩya ba gɛɛ Krisita hʋ aa sɩ na tʋwara, aŋ na ko na gaŋdarɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ ba gyɩ kɩ lʋga dɩ ba na saŋa hʋ wɩya no buloŋ aa sɩ yaa abee ɛɛ hʋ ba aa sɩ yaa.

english_verse: But they were told that they were serving you and not themselves. They preached to you by the power of the Holy Spirit, who was sent from heaven. And their message was only for you, even though angels would like to know more about it. Chosen To Live a Holy Life
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ kaŋ daga ʋ tɩŋdaala hʋ rɛ anɩɩ ma wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ba kɩ basɩ wɩya no buloŋ ba tɩɩ wɩya daa. Lagɩlagɩ no wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ gyɩ aa basɩ, ba tɩɩ rɛ nala hʋ mɛ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu dee tɩyaŋ mɛ basɩ kɩ tɩya ma. Malɩkasɩ mɛ gba kyo dɩ ba fa gyɩŋ wɩya no memii rɛ. Ma ta kaŋ bisiŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ

english_verse: Always live as God's holy people should, because God is the one who chose you, and he is holy.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa yɩrɩ ma yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna rɛ a bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ, ɛɛwɩya ʋ maga dɩ ma mɛ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma rɛ a ta kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ ma wɩyaalɩɩ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say, “I am the holy God, and you must be holy too.”
translation_verse: Beewɩya ba saba rɛ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ a baa, di Wɩɩsɩ baa, “Ma yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma a ta kaŋ bisiŋ, beewɩya ŋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna aa bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: You say that God is your Father, but God doesn't have favorites! He judges all people by what they do. So you must honor God while you live as strangers here on earth.
translation_verse: Ma aa kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ a kɩ yɩrɩ ʋ ma kuwo. Ʋ rɛ aa di nal buloŋ sarɩya, ʋ bee lugisi, ʋ bee fá nal sɩɩ mɛ. Ʋ aa tuŋ nal buloŋ maga gɛɛ hʋ ʋ tɩɩna aa tʋma maga rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma aa yaa nɩhʋwala a we dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ nyɛ, ma kɩ fá Wɩɩsɩ ma wɩyaalɩya buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You were rescued from the useless way of life you learned from your ancestors. But you know you were not rescued by such things as silver or gold that don't last forever.
translation_verse: Ma tɩɩ gyɩŋ kɩŋ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpa tuŋ laa ma lɩɩ ma wɩtɔɔnɩ hʋ ma naabaala fa aa kpa daga ma tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ kɩna aa sɩ wuwo kyogi anɩɩ salma koo molbiye rɛ ʋ kpa tuŋ laa ma.

english_verse: Christ was chosen even before the world was created, but because of you, he did not come until these last days.
translation_verse: Ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ na marɩ dʋnɩya, dɩ ʋ gyɩ foŋ lɩɩ Yesu Krisita rɛ dɩ ʋ maakyiye ko tuu sʋba a laa ma ta. Lagɩlagɩ no dʋnɩya aa kpaga tenii nyɛ, Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ʋ ko dʋnɩya rɛ ma wɩya.

english_verse: And when he did come, it was to lead you to have faith in God, who raised him from death and honored him in a glorious way. This is why you have put your faith and hope in God.
translation_verse: Ʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ ma tɩŋa a laa Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa kyisi Yesu sʋʋ tɩyaŋ a tɩya ʋ feŋ a di. Ɛɛwɩya ma laadii abee ma bayɩyɛla buloŋ we Wɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: You obeyed the truth, and your souls were made pure. Now you sincerely love each other. But you must keep on loving with all your heart.
translation_verse: Akuu ma aa tɩŋ wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ wɩya, ma pɩɩsɩ ma bisiŋ buloŋ ta rɛ, aŋ kyo ma nɩmmabalɩya hʋ buloŋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di. Ɛɛwɩya, ma marɩ kyo dɔmɔŋ weliŋ abee ma tɩsɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Humans wither like grass, and their glory fades like wild flowers. Grass dries up, and flowers fall to the ground.
translation_verse: Ba sabɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Nihuwobiŋ buloŋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ ɔhɔ. Ʋ weliŋ buloŋ mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ɔfɩɩla. Ɔhɔ hʋ aa sʋba rɛ, ɔfɩɩla hʋ mɛ yuwori.”

english_verse: But what the Lord has said will stand forever.” Our good news to you is what the Lord has said.
translation_verse: Amɛ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ kɛ sɩ we doŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ. Wɩbii no rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ ba aa basa tɩya ma.

english_verse: Stop being hateful! Quit trying to fool people, and start being sincere. Don't be jealous or say cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, á aa yaa nɩfalɩya wɩya, ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩ wɩbɔŋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, a ta kɩ mʋrɩ nala, a ta kaŋ minaafigi mɛ. Ma ta leŋ ma tɩsɩ kɩ hɔllɩ nala a ta kɩ gaa nala hala mɛ.

english_verse: Be like newborn babies who are thirsty for the pure spiritual milk that will help you grow and be saved.
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ maga dɩ ma leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ wɩya kyɩl ma rɛ anɩɩ ɩl wɩya aa kyɩl biifɩla gɛɛ. Dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ma waa weliŋ ma Wɩɩsɩ laadii tɩyaŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ laa ma ta.

english_verse: You have already found out how good the Lord really is.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ma tɩɩ gyɩŋ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ hʋ ʋ aa kpa daga ma rɛ.

english_verse: Come to Jesus Christ. He is the living stone people have rejected, but which God has chosen and highly honored.
translation_verse: Ma ko á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita lee. Ʋ rɛ yaa mɩɩbol buloŋ tɩɩna. Ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bʋyɩ dɩɩsaala aa vɩya ta. Nala vɩya ʋ rɛ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ kɛ lɩɩ ʋ rɛ ʋ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ nal ʋ lee.

english_verse: And now you are living stones being used to build a spiritual house. You are also a group of holy priests, and with the help of Jesus Christ you will offer sacrifices that please God.
translation_verse: Ma mɛ kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ ʋ aa kana rɛ, ɛɛwɩya ma mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bʋwa Wɩɩsɩ aa kpa kɩ saa ʋ dɩya, a leŋ ma yaa ʋ wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala aa bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ dɩ ma tɩŋ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a kpa wɩɩsʋllɩ-kɩna hʋ aa fɩyɛlɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ a sʋla Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: It is just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a choice and precious cornerstone. No one who has faith in this one will be disappointed.”
translation_verse: Beewɩya ba sabɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ baa, ma na, “Ŋ kpa bʋyɩ rɛ a biŋ gyememii Zaayɔŋ tɩyaŋ, Ʋ rɛ ŋ lɩɩ ʋ yaa ŋ sɩfɩyaŋ bʋyɩ, Ɛɛwɩya nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ laa ʋ wɩya di, hɩɩsɩ bɩ sɩ maakyiye di ʋ tɩɩna.”

english_verse: You are followers of the Lord, and this stone is precious to you. But it isn't precious to those who refuse to follow him. They are the builders who tossed aside the stone that turned out to be the most important one of all.
translation_verse: Ma nala hʋ aa laa ʋ wɩya di kɛ lee, bʋyɩ no kaŋ tɔnɔ rɛ a tɩya ma. Amɛ nala hʋ aa vɩya ʋ kɛ lee, ba leŋ wɩya hʋ ba aa saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ko yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ba saba rɛ abaa, “bʋyɩ hʋ dɩɩsaala aa vɩya ta, ʋ rɛ mɩɩgɩ ko kaŋ dɩya hʋ sɩgɩ ʋ deye.

english_verse: But you are God's chosen and special people. You are a group of royal priests and a holy nation. God has brought you out of darkness into his marvelous light. Now you must tell all the wonderful things he has done. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kɛ, Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ rɛ lɩɩ ma dɩ ma yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala a tʋma kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ ma kuwori. Ma yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma rɛ a bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ buloŋ ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Ʋ tɩɩ rɛ tɩŋ ma. Ʋ lɩɩ ma rɛ dɩ ma basɩ wɩkperiye hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa yaa. Ʋ rɛ yɩrɩ ma lɩɩ bilhuu tɩyaŋ a kaŋ ma ko gyʋʋ ʋ pʋlʋŋbal hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: “Once you were nobody. Now you are God's people. At one time no one had mercy on you. Now God has treated you with kindness.” Live as God's Servants Should
translation_verse: Buŋbuŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ, ma fa bɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ nala, amɛ nyɛ kɛ ma yaa Wɩɩsɩ nala rɛ. Ma fa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ sikii-fá, amɛ nyɛ kɛ ʋ fáá ma sikii rɛ.

english_verse: Always let others see you behaving properly, even though they may still accuse you of doing wrong. Then on the day of judgment, they will honor God by telling the good things they saw you do.
translation_verse: Ma guwosi nala hʋ aa bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di tɩyaŋ nɛ, ɛɛ wɩya ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ weliŋ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ basɩ baa ma yaa wɩbɔmɔ mɛ, ma leŋ dɩ ba na ma wɩyaaweliye aŋ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ʋ feŋ yɩrɩ kyɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ di nala sarɩya. Ma kɩ nɩɩ ma sɩlaala nyʋwa

english_verse: You are free, but still you are God's servants, and you must not use your freedom as an excuse for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Ma yaa nala aa tɩŋ ma tɩɩ rɛ. Amɛ ma ta kpa gɛɛ bɩrɩmɩ gyo-gye wɩɩ a gɔllɩ kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ. Amɛ ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa daga anɩɩ ma kɔnɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ yosi rɛ.

english_verse: Respect everyone and show special love for God's people. Honor God and respect the Emperor. The Example of Christ's Suffering
translation_verse: Ma kɩ tɩya nal buloŋ gyɩrɩma. Ma kyo nala hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa laa Yesu wɩya a leŋ dɩ ba yaa ma nɩmmabalɩya. Ma kɩ fá Wɩɩsɩ aŋ kɩ tɩya ma taŋha kuworibal gyɩrɩma.

english_verse: Servants, you must obey your masters and always show respect to them. Do this, not only to those who are kind and thoughtful, but also to those who are cruel.
translation_verse: Ma nala hʋ aa tʋŋ kɩ tɩya nala, ma kɩ tɩŋ ba nyʋwa a kɩ tɩya ba gyɩrɩma weliŋ, dɩ ba yaa nala aa kaŋ bɔnyɛ ka ba wɩya weliye koo dɩ ba yaa nala wɩya aa hayɛ.

english_verse: God will bless you, even if others treat you unfairly for being loyal to him.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyiyeli nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ kyogi ka ba kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ, ka ʋ wuwo kaŋ mala akuu ʋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ di wɩya.

english_verse: You don't gain anything by being punished for some wrong you have done. But God will bless you, if you have to suffer for doing something good.
translation_verse: Dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa wɩbɔŋ dɩ ba ŋmaa ɩ, ka ɩ di kenyiri gɛɛ tɩyaŋ, ʋ bɩ maga dɩ ba tɩya ɩ gyaaŋbiye. Amɛ dɩ ɩ rɛ yaa wɩwelii, ka dɩ ba kɩ dɔgɩsɩ ɩ gɛɛ wɩya, dɩ ɩ wuwo kaŋ mala gɛɛ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyiyeli ɩ.

english_verse: After all, God chose you to suffer as you follow in the footsteps of Christ, who set an example by suffering for you.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya rɛ Wɩɩsɩ paalɩ yɩrɩ ma dɩ ma na tʋwara beewɩya Yesu Krisita tɩɩ mɛ paalɩ na tʋwara rɛ ma wɩya a daga ma gɛɛ hʋ ma aa sɩ tɩŋa ʋ naabʋʋsɩ.

english_verse: Christ did not sin or ever tell a lie.
translation_verse: Ʋ gyɩ bɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ buloŋ, ʋ gyɩ bɩ maakyiye nyɩya wɩya mɛ.

english_verse: Although he was abused, he never tried to get even. And when he suffered, he made no threats. Instead, he had faith in God, who judges fairly.
translation_verse: Abee nala gyɩ aa tʋʋsɩ ʋ buloŋ, ʋ gyɩ bɩ laa tʋʋsɩ. Ba gyɩ bɩl aa dɔgɩsɩ ʋ mɛ, ʋ gyɩ bɩ basɩ baa ʋ sɩ tuŋ kyɩŋ ba nyuu tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ʋ kɛ gyɩ kpaa wɩɩ buloŋ we Wɩɩsɩ nosi tɩyaŋ nɛ beewɩya ʋ rɛ sɩ di nal buloŋ sarɩya abee wɩtɩɩ.

english_verse: Christ carried the burden of our sins. He was nailed to the cross, so we would stop sinning and start living right. By his cuts and bruises you are healed.
translation_verse: Yesu Krisita tɩɩ rɛ laa á wɩbɔmɔ kyʋŋ, saŋa hʋ ba kpaasɩ ʋ mal daagarɩɩ tɩyaŋ dɩ gɛɛ wuwo leŋ á kpʋ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ ta á tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ aŋ kɩ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ wɩya. Ba aa vɩɩrɩ ʋ, ʋ teŋ yaa dʋgʋlɩya hʋ, gɛɛ rɛ leŋ á wɩɩla buloŋ teŋ á tenni tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You had wandered away like sheep. Now you have returned to the one who is your shepherd and protector.
translation_verse: Ma fa kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ piyese aa nyʋgɩsa, amɛ nyɛ kɛ ma mɩɩgɩ ko Pedaal hʋ lee rɛ, nal hʋ aa deŋ ma mɩɩbol nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If you are a wife, you must put your husband first. Even if he opposes our message, you will win him over by what you do. No one else will have to say anything to him,
translation_verse: Haana, ʋ maga dɩ ma mɛ kaŋ ma tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ ma balama lee rɛ a kɩ tɩŋ ba nyʋwa. Dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bala rɛ bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di, ɩ gyogo no dʋŋ sɩ wuwo leŋ dɩ ʋ ko laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di, dɩ ɩ bɩ suri nyʋwa basɩ wɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: because he will see how you honor God and live a pure life.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ba sɩ na gɛɛ ma gyogo aa weliye abee gɛɛ ma aa fá Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Don't depend on things like fancy hairdos or gold jewelry or expensive clothes to make you look beautiful.
translation_verse: Ma ta kpa kpɩyɛra a kɩ daga ma weliŋ, anɩɩ ma nyuni marɩɩ, koo salma kɩna laalɩɩ abee gabala vʋwayɩ.

english_verse: Be beautiful in your heart by being gentle and quiet. This kind of beauty will last, and God considers it very special.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma leŋ dɩ ma weliŋ lɩɩ ma gyogo tɩyaŋ. Ma leŋ ma sɩya fɩyɛlɩ, aŋ kaŋ ma tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ beewɩya weliŋ no iriŋ bee nyʋgɩsɩ aŋ kaŋ tɔnɔ yʋga mɛ Wɩɩsɩ lee.

english_verse: Long ago those women who worshiped God and put their hope in him made themselves beautiful by putting their husbands first.
translation_verse: Faafaa haana hʋ fa aa kpa ba nyuu abee ba bayɩyɛla buloŋ we Wɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, nyɛ rɛ ba fa kɩ daga ba weliŋ. Ba fa aa kaŋ ba tɩɩ hʋwɔlɩ rɛ ba balama lee, a kɩ tɩŋ ba nyʋwa.

english_verse: If you are a husband, you should be thoughtful of your wife. Treat her with honor, because she isn't as strong as you are, and she shares with you in the gift of life. Then nothing will stand in the way of your prayers. Suffering for Doing Right
translation_verse: Ma baala mɛ maga dɩ ma kɩ tɩya ma haana gyɩrɩma rɛ, a kaŋ ma haana weliŋ dɩ ma basɩ wɩya kɩ nɩɩ dɔmɔŋ dɩgɩna. Ma gyɩma anɩɩ mamaa rɛ deye te ba, ɛɛwɩya ma kaŋ ba weliŋ, beewɩya ma beel-ba buloŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ tɩya mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii ʋ bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ. Ma kɩ yaa nyɛ dɩ wɩɩ buloŋ ta leŋ dɩ Wɩɩsɩ vɩya ma kyʋwala nɩɩ. Ɩ aa na tʋwara akuu Ɩ aa yaa wɩya aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ wɩya

english_verse: Don't be hateful and insult people just because they are hateful and insult you. Instead, treat everyone with kindness. You are God's chosen ones, and he will bless you. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ yaa ɩ wɩbɔŋ ta yaa wɩbɔŋ tuŋ ʋ tɩɩna. Dɩ nal lɛ tʋʋsɩ ɩ ta laa tʋʋsɩ, amɛ sʋla Wɩɩsɩ dɩ ʋ kyiyeli tɩɩna, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ ma yaa ʋ nala rɛ dɩ ʋ kyiyeli ma.

english_verse: “Do you really love life? Do you want to be happy? Then stop saying cruel things and quit telling lies.
translation_verse: Beewɩya ba sabɩ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ logiŋ kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ a baa, “Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ nɩɩ sʋma dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ a kaŋ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ, Ʋ tɩɩna ta kɩ basɩ wɩbɔmɔ, a ta kɩ nyɩya wɩya mɛ.

english_verse: Give up your evil ways and do right, as you find and follow the road to peace.
translation_verse: Ʋ tɩɩna maga dɩ ʋ leŋ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ rɛ, aŋ kɩ yaa wɩweliye, a maga dɩ ʋ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ dɩ ʋ bee nal buloŋ sʋma.

english_verse: The Lord watches over everyone who obeys him, and he listens to their prayers. But he opposes everyone who does evil.”
translation_verse: Beewɩya nala hʋ buloŋ aa yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma Wɩɩsɩ aa deŋ ba rɛ, a kpil ʋ dɩgɩna mɛ a kɩ nɩɩ ba wɩɩkyʋwalɩ. Amɛ ʋ kpa sɩya kyeŋ nala hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ rɛ.”

english_verse: Can anyone really harm you for being eager to do good deeds?
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ a kɩ yaa wɩweliye, kɩbee rɛ sɩ wuwo yaa ma wɩbɔŋ?

english_verse: Even if you have to suffer for doing good things, God will bless you. So stop being afraid and don't worry about what people might do.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ gba aa na tʋwara akuu ma tɩpʋlʋŋ wɩyaalɩya wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kyiyeli ma. Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta kɩ fáá nal buloŋ kambɩŋ a ta leŋ dɩ wɩɩ buloŋ mɛ kɩ dɔŋ ma.

english_verse: Give a kind and respectful answer and keep your conscience clear. This way you will make people ashamed for saying bad things about your good conduct as a follower of Christ.
translation_verse: Saŋa kɛ buloŋ, ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa kpa ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ma hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ ma gyɩma anɩɩ ma bɩ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ kyogi. Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, hɩɩsɩ sɩ kaŋ nala hʋ aa kyogi ma feŋ akuu ma aa yaa Krisita hatɩnna a kɩ yaa wɩweliye wɩya.

english_verse: Christ died once for our sins. An innocent person died for those who are guilty. Christ did this to bring you to God, when his body was put to death and his spirit was made alive.
translation_verse: Yesu Krisita tɩɩ sʋba rɛ dɩgɩ dʋŋ a wuwo tuŋ á wɩbɔmɔ buloŋ kyɩŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ. Ʋ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna rɛ aŋ sʋba wɩbɔŋyaala wɩya, dɩ ʋ wuwo kaŋ ma mʋ Wɩɩsɩ lee. Nihuwobisi kpʋʋ ʋ teŋbii rɛ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ leŋ ʋ weye rɛ.

english_verse: Christ then preached to the spirits that were being kept in prison.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ leŋ ʋ mʋ basɩ wɩweliye hʋ a tɩya nɩdʋŋsɩ hʋ ba aa kaŋ vʋwa biŋ nɛ.

english_verse: They had disobeyed God while Noah was building the boat, but God had been patient with them. Eight people went into that boat and were brought safely through the flood.
translation_verse: Nala no rɛ gyɩ vɩya Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Nowa gyɩ aa kpaasɩ nɩɩduworiboribal hʋ. Saŋa no tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ di kenyiri rɛ a kɩ gyegili dɩ ba buloŋ bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ba wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ ka ba vɩya. Nala kyori dʋŋ nɛ gyɩ gyʋʋ nɩɩduworiboribal hʋ. Nɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ tɩŋa a laa ba mɩɩbol.

english_verse: Christ is now in heaven, where he sits at the right side of God. All angels, authorities, and powers are under his control.
translation_verse: Ʋ rɛ lɩɩ dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ a gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩbee a hɔŋ Wɩɩsɩ noduu logiŋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ rɛ aa deŋ malɩkasɩ abee kɩŋ buloŋ aa kaŋ dee a we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: It means you have turned from your own desires and want to obey God for the rest of your life.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ tɩɩna bɩl bɩ sɩ kɩ yaa ʋ teŋbii wɩkyɛɛlɩya ʋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ, amɛ ʋ sɩ kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ.

english_verse: But they will have to answer to God, who judges the living and the dead.
translation_verse: Amɛ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ, ba sɩ daga wɩya hʋ buloŋ ba aa yaa a tɩya Wɩɩsɩ. Ʋ yaa siri rɛ dɩ ʋ dɩ niweye abee sʋʋnɩ buloŋ sarɩya.

english_verse: The good news has even been preached to the dead, so that after they have been judged for what they have done in this life, their spirits will live with God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ Krisita basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩweliye hʋ tɩya nala hʋ aa sʋba mɛ gba. Abee nala no sʋʋ aa yaa tʋwara nihuwobiŋ buloŋ mɛ aa sɩ na, ka ba basɩ Wɩweliye hʋ tɩya ba mɛ rɛ dɩ ba dʋŋsɩ we doŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa we doŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ gɛɛ. Ɛɛ Krisitabiisi aa maga ba kaŋ dɔmɔŋ

english_verse: Everything will soon come to an end. So be serious and be sensible enough to pray.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ dʋnɩya aa sɩ teŋ kpaga rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ weliŋ a leŋ dɩ ma sɩya fɩyɛlɩ, dɩ ma wuwo kɩ kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Most important of all, you must sincerely love each other, because love wipes away many sins.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ aa yaa sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ rɛ nyɛ: Ma kyo dɔmɔŋ abee wɩtɩɩ, beewɩya dɩ mamaa rɛ kyo dɔmɔŋ, ma sɩ kpa wɩgyamaa kɩ kyɛ dɔmɔŋ saŋa buloŋ.

english_verse: Welcome people into your home and don't grumble about it.
translation_verse: Ma kaŋ nal buloŋ aa ko ma dɩya weliŋ abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ aŋ ta kɩ gʋrɩmɩ wɩya.

english_verse: Each of you has been blessed with one of God's many wonderful gifts to be used in the service of others. So use your gift well.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ kɩŋ hʋ iriŋ ʋ aa kpa tɩya nal buloŋ, ʋ kana ʋ tʋma weliŋ a kɩ kyiyeli ʋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ abee wɩtɩɩ dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ba na Wɩɩsɩ kyiyelii.

english_verse: If you have the gift of speaking, preach God's message. If you have the gift of helping others, do it with the strength that God supplies. Everything should be done in a way that will bring honor to God because of Jesus Christ, who is glorious and powerful forever. Amen. Suffering for Being a Christian
translation_verse: Dɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ leŋ nal buloŋ wuwo kɩ basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya, ma tɩya ʋ ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ʋ kɩ basɩ wɩya hʋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee. Dɩ nal lɛ wuwo kɩ kyiyeli nala, ʋ kaŋ dee hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpa tɩya ʋ a kɩ kyiyeli ba. Ma kɩ yaa gɛɛ dɩ nala wuwo tɩŋ Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a kɩ dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ, dɩ ʋ feŋ yɩrɩ wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ rɛ yaa dee buloŋ tɩɩna abee gaŋdaal a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ. Amɩ. Tʋwara hʋ Krisitabiisi aa naa

english_verse: Dear friends, don't be surprised or shocked that you are going through testing that is like walking through fire.
translation_verse: Ŋ naabiikpɩyanama, ma ta leŋ dɩ tʋwara hʋ ma aa naa yaa ma wɩkperii. Wɩya no buloŋ yaa wɩhaanɩ rɛ a kɩ magɩsɩ ma laadii. Ɛɛwɩya ma ta leŋ dɩ wɩya no yaa wɩfalɩya ma lee.

english_verse: Be glad for the chance to suffer as Christ suffered. It will prepare you for even greater happiness when he makes his glorious return.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma leŋ dɩ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ anɩɩ ma mɛ aa na tʋwara anɩɩ Krisita aa naa gɛɛ. Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma tenni marɩ fɩyɛlɩ a mʋ parɩ kyɛɛ hʋ Krisita aa sɩ leŋ dɩ á na ʋ gaŋdarɩ.

english_verse: Count it a blessing when you suffer for being a Christian. This shows that God's glorious Spirit is with you.
translation_verse: Dɩ ba aa rɛ aa tʋʋsɩ ma akuu ma aa yaa Krisita hatɩnna wɩya, ma leŋ dɩ ma tenni fɩyɛlɩ. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa kaŋ gaŋdarɩ we ma tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: God has already begun judging his own people. And if his judgment begins with us, imagine how terrible it will be for those who refuse to obey his message. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya pele rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ nala tɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ʋ sɩ laa sɩya piili. Dɩ ʋ rɛ yaŋ sɩ piili ba tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ rɛ ba yaŋ sɩ kɩɩ nala hʋ aa bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Wɩweliye hʋ kɛ tɩyaŋ?

english_verse: If you suffer for obeying God, you must have complete faith in your faithful Creator and keep on doing right.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nala hʋ buloŋ aa na tʋwara Wɩɩsɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ, ba marɩ kpa ba tɩɩ we ba Tɩtaal Wɩɩsɩ nosi tɩyaŋ, aŋ marɩ kɩ yaa wɩweliye, beewɩya ʋ yaa nal aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Church leaders, I am writing to encourage you. I too am a leader, as well as a witness to Christ's suffering, and I will share in his glory when it is shown to us.
translation_verse: Ŋ kaŋ wɩɩ rɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma Krisitabiisi sɩlaala. Ŋ mɛ tɩɩ yaa sɩlaal lɛ. Ŋ sii tɩyaŋ nɛ Krisita na tʋwara. Ŋ mɛ sɩ na gaŋdarɩ hʋ Krisita aa sɩ na saŋa hʋ ʋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko abee gaŋdarɩ. Ŋ aa sʋl ma sɩlaala hʋ buloŋ aa we doŋ nɛ abee sɩfɩyasɩ,

english_verse: Just as shepherds watch over their sheep, you must watch over everyone God has placed in your care. Do it willingly in order to please God, and not simply because you think you must. Let it be something you want to do, instead of something you do merely to make money.
translation_verse: dɩ ma kɩ deŋ Wɩɩsɩ nala hʋ ʋ aa kpa we ma nosi tɩyaŋ nyuu weliŋ, anɩɩ pedaal aa kɩ deŋ ʋ piyese nyuu tɩyaŋ gɛɛ. Ma ta leŋ dɩ ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ba aa fɩl ma rɛ dɩ ma kɩ deŋ ba, amɛ ma kɩ deŋ ba ma tɩɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ dɩ ma kɩ yaa gɛɛ. Ma leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa nɩɩ ma aa kyɛ dɩ ma tʋŋ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ abee ma dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Krisitabiisi rɛ tɩŋ ma yaa sɩlaala, amɛ ma ta leŋ dɩ ʋ kɩɩ nɩɩ molbiye rɛ ma tʋma kɩ kyɛ.

english_verse: Don't be bossy to those people who are in your care, but set an example for them.
translation_verse: Ma ta kaŋ nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa we ma nosi tɩyaŋ kɩ gyɩŋ. Amɛ ma leŋ dɩ ba na ma gyogiweliye a kɩ tɩŋ ma naabʋʋsɩ.

english_verse: Then when Christ the Chief Shepherd returns, you will be given a crown that will never lose its glory.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa gɛɛ, kyɛɛ hʋ Yesu Krisita, nal hʋ aa yaa pedaalhɩyawʋ hʋ aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko, ʋ sɩ kpa gaŋdaa-kuwori-nyupugi aa bɩ sɩ maakyiye kyogi a siili ma.

english_verse: All of you young people should obey your elders. In fact, everyone should be humble toward everyone else. The Scriptures say, “God opposes proud people, but he helps everyone who is humble.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ mamaa hambiisi mɛ, ʋ maga dɩ ma kɩ tɩŋ ma nɩhɩyasɩ nyʋwa rɛ a leŋ dɩ ma sɩya fɩyɛlɩ abee dɔmɔŋ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ ba saba rɛ a baa, “Wɩɩsɩ kpaa sɩya kyeŋ dagɩŋtɩɩ tɩmma rɛ, aŋ sɩŋ nala hʋ aa kaŋ ba tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ kɛ hal.”

english_verse: Be humble in the presence of God's mighty power, and he will honor you when the time comes.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma kaŋ ma tɩɩ kɩ hʋwɔlɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee. Ʋ rɛ yaa dee buloŋ tɩɩna. Dɩ saŋa hʋ ʋ aa bine rɛ ko pele, ʋ sɩ kpa ma yohuŋ.

english_verse: God cares for you, so turn all your worries over to him.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ aa dɔŋ ma, ma kpa we Wɩɩsɩ nosi tɩyaŋ, beewɩya ʋ kyɩl ma wɩya rɛ.

english_verse: Be on your guard and stay awake. Your enemy, the devil, is like a roaring lion, sneaking around to find someone to attack.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ ma sɩya fɩyɛlɩ, aŋ ka dɩ ma pɔ ma tɩɩ weliŋ. Ma dɔŋ Sɩtaanɩ gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ ma rɛ anɩɩ naakyigi aa gɔllɩ gerisi kɩ kyɛ nal dɩ ʋ kaŋ kyaŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: But you must resist the devil and stay strong in your faith. You know that all over the world the Lord's followers are suffering just as you are.
translation_verse: Ma sɩŋ wɩya hʋ ma aa laa di tɩyaŋ kpaŋkpaŋ aŋ vɩya Sɩtaanɩ, a ta tɩya ʋ ŋmanɩɩ. Ma gyɩma anɩɩ nala hʋ mɛ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ wɩya di a yaa ma nɩmmabalɩya a we dʋnɩya logiŋ kɛ buloŋ, ba mɛ aa na tʋwara no tɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: But God shows undeserved kindness to everyone. That's why he appointed Christ Jesus to choose you to share in his eternal glory. You will suffer for a while, but God will make you complete, steady, strong, and firm.
translation_verse: Tʋwara no ma aa naa bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ. Ʋ gɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa kaŋ bɔnyɛ kɩŋkaŋ, a yɩrɩ ma dɩ ma mɛ ko na ʋ gaŋdarɩ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii akuu ma bee Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ wɩya, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ sɩ kaŋ ma marɩ sɩgɩ, a leŋ dɩ ma sɩŋ weliŋ abee dee.

english_verse: God will be in control forever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ beewɩya ʋ rɛ kaŋ dee a kaŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ. Kyʋwala

english_verse: Silvanus helped me write this short letter, and I consider him a faithful follower of the Lord. I wanted to encourage you and tell you how kind God really is, so you will keep on having faith in him.
translation_verse: Silaasi rɛ kyiyeli ŋ ŋ sabɩ teŋkuubiye no kɩ tɩya ma. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ mɛ yaa á Krisitabii-dɔŋtɩɩna tɩɩ rɛ a kaŋ wɩtɩɩ. Ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma rɛ dɩ ba leŋ ma tenni polli, ka dɩ ŋ leŋ dɩ ma gyɩma anɩɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa basɩ daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ hʋ ʋ aa kana beel-ma kɔnɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma sɩŋ wɩya no tɩyaŋ kpaŋkpaŋ.

english_verse: Greetings from the Lord's followers in Babylon. They are God's chosen ones. Mark, who is like a son to me, sends his greetings too.
translation_verse: Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Baabilɔŋ tɩyaŋ, a mɛ yaa nala Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya anɩɩ ʋ aa lɩɩ ma mɛ gɛɛ, ba aa kyʋwalɩ ma. Ŋ biibaal Maakɩ mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. I pray that God will give peace to everyone who belongs to Christ.
translation_verse: Ma kɩ kyʋwalɩ dɔmɔŋ abee kyori. Ma nala hʋ buloŋ aa laa Krisita wɩya di, Wɩɩsɩ fɩyɛlʋʋ sɩ we ma lee.

english_verse: From Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ. To everyone who shares with us in the privilege of believing that our God and Savior Jesus Christ will do what is just and fair.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Siimɔŋ Piita aa yaa Yesu Krisita kpambɩya, a yaa ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ mɛ, mɩyaŋ nɛ sabɩ teŋ no kɩ tɩya ma nala hʋ buloŋ mɛ aa laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di. Ʋ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ á laataal, tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna hʋ. Akuu ʋ aa bee lugisi nala wɩya, ʋ leŋ ma laa ʋ wɩya di rɛ anɩɩ gɛɛ ʋ aa leŋ á mɛ laa ʋ wɩya di.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to you and will let you live in perfect peace! May you keep learning more and more about God and our Lord Jesus. Living as the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Ŋ aa sʋla á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ leŋ dɩ ma marɩ gyɩŋ ʋ bee á Tɩɩna Yesu dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ ʋ fɩyɛlʋʋ abee ʋ bɔnyɛ we ma lee weliŋ. Gyogo hʋ aa sɩ daga nɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yɩrɩ ma

english_verse: We have everything we need to live a life that pleases God. It was all given to us by God's own power, when we learned he had invited us to share in his wonderful goodness.
translation_verse: Á aa gyɩma ʋ wɩya, Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ ʋ tɩɩ dee tɩyaŋ nɛ a yaa wɩɩ buloŋ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ á wuwo tɩŋa ʋ kyɛrɩ á mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ a tɩya ma. Ʋ rɛ yɩrɩ ma dɩ á mɛ ko kaŋ tol ʋ tɩɩ gaŋdarɩ abee ʋ weliŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Do your best to improve your faith by adding goodness, understanding,
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no tɩɩ wɩya, ma yaa sɩfɩyaŋ aŋ kaŋ gyogiweliye pɛ ma laadii tɩyaŋ, á kaŋ wɩgyʋŋ mɛ pɛ,

english_verse: If you keep growing in this way, it will show that what you know about our Lord Jesus Christ has made your lives useful and meaningful.
translation_verse: Beewɩya dɩ mamaa rɛ kaŋ gyogiweliye no kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ yʋga, ɛɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ ma marɩ gyɩŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita weliŋ ka dɩ ma mɩɩbol mɛ kaŋ tɔnɔ.

english_verse: But if you don't grow, you are like someone who is nearsighted or blind, and you have forgotten that your past sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ kaŋ gyogiweliye no, ʋ tɩɩna kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ nyʋlʋŋ, a bɩ naa wɩya kɩ mʋ sɩya aŋ teŋ yeŋŋi anɩɩ Yesu Krisita sasɩ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ buloŋ ʋ fa aa kana ta rɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you must do all you can to show God has really chosen and selected you. If you keep on doing this, you won't stumble and fall.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ naabalɩya, ŋ aa sʋla ma rɛ dɩ marɩ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ a kɩ yaa wɩya no, a daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yɩrɩ ma a lɩɩ ma dɩ ma yaa ʋ nala. Dɩ mamaa rɛ kaŋ wɩya no weliŋ a kɩ tɩŋ ba, ma bɩ sɩ maakyiye nyʋgɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Then our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ will give you a glorious welcome into his kingdom that will last forever.
translation_verse: Dɩ mamaa rɛ aa yaa wɩya no, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ laa ma we á Tɩɩna abee á Laataal Yesu Krisita Koro hʋ aa sɩ we doŋ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ tɩyaŋ abee teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ.

english_verse: You are holding firmly to the truth you were given. But I am still going to remind you of these things.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ abee ma aa gyɩŋ wɩya no buloŋ a sɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ ba aa daga ma tɩyaŋ weliŋ mɛ, amɛ ŋ ha sɩ kɩ liisi ma wɩya no saŋa kɛ buloŋ.

english_verse: In fact, I think I should keep on reminding you until I leave this body.
translation_verse: Ŋ ha aa we ŋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ nyɛ ŋ naa anɩɩ ʋ yaa wɩwelii rɛ dɩ ŋ liisi ma wɩya no dɩ ma ta yeŋŋi ba,

english_verse: And our Lord Jesus Christ has already told me that I will soon leave it behind.
translation_verse: beewɩya á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita leŋ ŋ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ ŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: This is why I am doing my best to make sure that each of you remembers all of this after I am gone. The Message about the Glory of Christ
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya ŋ sɩ yaa sɩfɩyaŋ wɩya no yayɩ tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko sʋba mɛ, dɩ ma wuwo kɩ liisi ba saŋa buloŋ. Nala hʋ sɩɩ aa naa Krisita gaŋdarɩ

english_verse: When we told you about the power and the return of our Lord Jesus Christ, we were not telling clever stories someone had made up. But with our own eyes we saw his true greatness.
translation_verse: Á gyɩ basɩ tɩya ma gɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko dʋnɩya abee dee rɛ. Wɩya no á aa basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ mʋla rɛ á kɩ mʋla, beewɩya á tɩɩ sɩɩ naa á tɩɩna Yesu Krisita gaŋdarɩ rɛ.

english_verse: We were there with Jesus on the holy mountain and heard this voice speak from heaven.
translation_verse: Á mɛ tɩɩ gyɩ nɩɩ taal no aa lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee rɛ saŋa hʋ á abee á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita gyɩ aa we Wɩɩsɩ dogimo hʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: All of this makes us even more certain that what the prophets said is true. So you should pay close attention to their message, as you would to a lamp shining in some dark place. You must keep on paying attention until daylight comes and the morning star rises in your hearts.
translation_verse: Nyɛ leŋ á marɩ laa di rɛ anɩɩ wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ gyɩ aa basɩ kɔnɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya ma gyɩŋ kaŋ wɩya no weliŋ. Beewɩya ba kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ fɩŋtɩna aa kyaanɩ bilhuu tɩyaŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ sɩgballɩnyʋwa nɔnyʋwa aa sɩ pɔsɔ. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ma kaŋ ba weliŋ a mʋ pele saŋa hʋ Krisita pʋlʋŋ aa sɩ kyaanɩ we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: But you need to realize that no one alone can understand any of the prophecies in the Scriptures.
translation_verse: Ba buloŋ tɩyaŋ sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ rɛ nyɛ, ma gyɩma anɩɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala hʋ gyɩ aa basa, ka ba sabɩ ba biŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ, ba tɩɩ hakɩla tɩyaŋ daa ba lɩɩ.

english_verse: The prophets did not think these things up on their own, but they were guided by the Spirit of God.
translation_verse: Wɩya no kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ lɩɩ nihuwobisi hakɩla tɩyaŋ, amɛ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ rɛ ko gyʋʋ nala tɩyaŋ a leŋ ba basɩ wɩya hʋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee.

english_verse: Sometimes false prophets spoke to the people of Israel. False teachers will also sneak in and speak harmful lies to you. But these teachers don't really belong to the Master who paid a great price for them, and they will quickly destroy themselves.
translation_verse: Faafaa hʋ tɩyaŋ, wɩnyɩyɛla gyɩ we Wɩɩsɩ nala tɩyaŋ nɛ, aa fugo baa dɩ ba yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala rɛ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ wɩnyɩyɛla sɩ we ma tɩyaŋ mɛ a lʋwɔlɩ kɩ daga ma wɩya hʋ aa sɩ kyogi ma, aa paalɩ basɩ anɩɩ ba bɩ gyɩŋ á Tɩɩna Krisita, nal hʋ aa kpa ʋ mɩɩbol tuŋ laa ba ta. Ɛɛwɩya baloo rɛ ba yɩrɩ tɩya ba tɩɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: Many people will follow their evil ways and cause others to tell lies about the true way.
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa sɩ tɩŋ ba hal a kɩ yaa hɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ ba aa yaa. Ba wɩyaalɩya sɩ leŋ dɩ nala basɩ wɩya kɩ kyogi Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ á aa tɩŋ.

english_verse: They will be greedy and cheat you with smooth talk. But long ago God decided to punish them, and God doesn't sleep.
translation_verse: Wɩnyɩyɛl dɩdagɩla no aa kpa ba haahii buloŋ dɔbɔ molbiye tɩyaŋ wɩya, ba aa kpa nyʋʋpɩŋsʋŋ nɛ a firimi kɩ laa ma kɩna. Faafaa buloŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ, ba sarɩdiil, di ba sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya ba, aŋ yaa siri dɩ ʋ dɔgɩsɩ ba.

english_verse: God did not have pity on the angels that sinned. He had them tied up and thrown into the dark pits of hell until the time of judgment.
translation_verse: Faafaa hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ bɩ leŋ wɩɩ tɩya ʋ malɩkasɩ hʋ mɛ gyɩ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ. Ʋ vʋwa ba bee kyɔrʋmɔ rɛ a biŋ bʋʋluŋii aa bile ɩrɩp tɩyaŋ ba kɩ na tʋwara a kaŋ kɩ mʋ saŋa hʋ ʋ aa sɩ di nala buloŋ sarɩya.

english_verse: And during Noah's time, God did not have pity on the ungodly people of the world. He destroyed them with a flood, though he did save eight people, including Noah, who preached the truth.
translation_verse: Saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ Nowa gyɩ aa we ʋ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ, nala hʋ buloŋ gyɩ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ, Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ bɩ kpa wɩɩ kyɛ ba. Ʋ gyɩ leŋ nɩɩ paa nɩbɔmɔ hʋ buloŋ aa we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ nɛ, aŋ gyɩ laa Nowa bee nala bapɛ dʋŋ ta. Nowa gyɩ yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna rɛ a kɩ daga nala Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ.

english_verse: God punished the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by burning them to ashes, and this is a warning to anyone else who wants to sin.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ kyogi Sodɔm abee Gomora mɛ rɛ. Diŋ nɛ ʋ gyɩ kpa nyɔgɔ tɔbala no, ba buloŋ di a mʋ bɩrɩmɩ tʋwɔl. Wɩɩsɩ yaa gɛɛ rɛ dɩ ʋ yaa kyagɩl a daga ma wɩɩ hʋ aa sɩ puu nal hʋ buloŋ aa bee tɩŋa ʋ nyʋwa.

english_verse: Lot lived right and was greatly troubled by the terrible way those wicked people were living. He was a good man, and day after day he suffered because of the evil things he saw and heard. So the Lord rescued him.
translation_verse: Tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna no gyɩ hɔŋ nɩbɔmɔ no tɩyaŋ nɛ á kɩ na aŋ pɛ kɩ nɩɩ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ buloŋ ba gyɩ aa yaa tɔnɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ kyɛɛ buloŋ. Wɩbɔmɔ no gyɩ aa dɔmɔ-ʋ rɛ kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: This shows that the Lord knows how to rescue godly people from their sufferings and to punish evil people while they wait for the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ aa yaa nyɛ, ba daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩŋ ɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ yaa a laa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma ta rɛ, a lɩɩ ba tʋwara tɩyaŋ, a bɩl gyɩŋ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ mɛ ʋ aa sɩ kpa a dɔgɩsɩ nɩbɔmɔ, a mʋ pele kyɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ di dʋnɩya nala sarɩya,

english_verse: The Lord is especially hard on people who disobey him and don't think of anything except their own filthy desires. They are reckless and proud and are not afraid of cursing the glorious beings in heaven.
translation_verse: amarɩkpatɩya nala hʋ aa bɩ deŋ kɩ na Wɩɩsɩ aŋ kɩ yaa ba dʋŋʋ wɩlaama. Wɩnyɩyɛl dɩdagɩla no kaŋ kalɩŋbaanɩ rɛ weliŋ, a kɩ daga ba tɩɩ, á bee tɩya kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ a kaŋ gaŋdarɩ gyɩrɩma, aŋ aa mɩɩgɩ kɩ tʋʋsɩ ba.

english_verse: Although angels are more powerful than these evil beings, even the angels don't dare to accuse them to the Lord.
translation_verse: Malɩkasɩ hʋ gba aa kaŋ dee a te wɩnyɩyɛl dɩdagɩla no ka ba bɩ basɩ wɩya kɩ tʋʋsɩ wɩɩsɩbee kɩna no Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: These people are no better than senseless animals that live by their feelings and are born to be caught and killed. They speak evil of things they don't know anything about. But their own corrupt deeds will destroy them.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ nala no aa bɩ gyɩma ʋ sii, ba aa kaŋ kɩ kyogi rɛ. Ba kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bagɩla aa we doŋ dɩ ba kile kasɩ kɩ kpʋ dʋŋ wɩya. Wɩɩ hʋ kɛ buloŋ aa ko ko ba nyuu, ʋ rɛ ba kɩ yaa anɩɩ bagɩla gɛɛ. Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ ba mɛ sɩ sʋba ta anɩɩ bagɩla.

english_verse: They have done evil, and they will be rewarded with evil. They think it is fun to have wild parties during the day. They are immoral, and the meals they eat with you are spoiled by the shameful and selfish way they carry on.
translation_verse: Tʋwara hʋ buloŋ ba aa leŋ ba dɔŋtɩŋsɩ kɩ na haŋ tʋwara hʋ tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpa tuŋ ba. Ba kɛ lee, sʋma nɩɩ rɛ yaa dɩ ba gɔllɩ kɩ yaa ba dʋŋʋ wɩlaama, haalɩ nala sɩɩ tɩyaŋ mɛ. Ba aa leŋ hɩɩsɩ kaŋ ma rɛ, beewɩya ba aa ko laŋŋɩ ma tɩyaŋ nɛ ma kɩ di kɩna anɩɩ ba aa yaa nɩkyirikyima, amɛ ba ha aa we ba dʋŋʋ wɩlaama hʋ tɩyaŋ mɛ rɛ a kɩ yaa.

english_verse: All they think about is having sex with someone else's husband or wife. There is no end to their wicked deeds. They trick people who are easily fooled, and their minds are filled with greedy thoughts. But they are headed for trouble!
translation_verse: Saŋa kɛ buloŋ, ba aa kɩ deŋ nɛ dɩ ba na haaŋ gara kɩ baŋ. Ba bee lɔlɔ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ ko na nal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ laadii aa bɩ deye, ba aa mʋrɩ ʋ kɩ we wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ba kaŋ tɩbal lɛ kɩŋkaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ bɩ sɩ maakyiye leŋ wɩɩ tɩya nala no iriŋ.

english_verse: They have left the true road and have gone down the wrong path by following the example of the prophet Balaam. He was the son of Beor and loved what he got from being a crook.
translation_verse: Nala no vɩya Wɩɩsɩ ŋmanɩɩ rɛ aŋ kɩ tɩŋ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ Beyɔ biibaal Beelam gyɩ aa tɩŋ. Beelam gyɩ kyo dɩ ʋ tɩŋ wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ a na molbiye.

english_verse: But a donkey corrected him for this evil deed. It spoke to him with a human voice and made him stop his foolishness.
translation_verse: Amɛ ʋ gyɩ aa yaa gɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ ʋ kokumo basɩ ʋ sɩya wɩya tɩya ʋ abee nihuwobiŋ abee kokusi aa bee basɩ wɩya buloŋ, ɛɛ leŋ ʋ leŋ ʋ bambugiliŋ hʋ.

english_verse: These people are like dried up water holes and clouds blown by a windstorm. The darkest part of hell is waiting for them.
translation_verse: Wɩnyɩyɛl dɩdagɩla no kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bulli aa hɩɩsa, a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ taalsiime puwo viise ta. Wɩɩsɩ marɩ lee bilhuu aa bɩ kaŋ bigisii rɛ biŋ ba.

english_verse: When they learned about our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they escaped from the filthy things of this world. But they are again caught up and controlled by these filthy things, and now they are in worse shape than they were at first.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ ko laa á Tɩɩna abee á Laataal Yesu Krisita wɩya di, a kaŋ ʋ tɩɩ lɩɩ dʋnɩya wɩbɔmɔ hʋ aa kyogi ʋ tɩyaŋ, ka dɩ ʋ tɩɩna bɩl ko leŋ dɩ dʋnɩya wɩbɔmɔ no kaŋ dee ʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ba lɩmʋtenii tɩyaŋ, ba sɩ mɩɩgɩ lɔrɩ ʋ tɩɩna tɩyaŋ a te gɛɛ hʋ ʋ fa aa kɩya aŋ na ko laa Yesu wɩya di.

english_verse: They would have been better off if they had never known about the right way. Even after they knew what was right, they turned their backs on the holy commandments they were given.
translation_verse: Ʋ fa aa bɩ gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ, ʋ rɛ kpɩya ʋ aa gyɩma aŋ kpa hal yɩya Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa wɩya hʋ ba aa basɩ tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: What happened to them is just like the true saying, “A dog will come back to lick up its own vomit. A pig that has been washed will roll in the mud.”
translation_verse: Namagɩsɩ badɔmɔŋ tɩyaŋ ba baa “Vaha aa ugo rɛ aŋ mɩɩgɩ gʋla paa di.” “Dɩ ɩ kaŋ poriku fo nɩɩ mɛ, ʋ bɩl aa mɩɩgɩ ʋ mʋ ŋmaa kyɔgʋŋ nɛ.” Nala no aa yaa nyɛ daga anɩɩ namagɩsɩ no yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: what God's prophets said would happen. You must never forget what the holy prophets taught in the past. And you must remember what the apostles told you our Lord and Savior has commanded us to do.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma kɩ liisi wɩya hʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala gyɩ aa basa faafaa buloŋ nɛ abee wɩya hʋ á Laataal abee á Tɩɩna Yesu aa leŋ ámaa ʋ kpambɩsɩ hʋ aa we ma lee basɩ tɩya ma.

english_verse: But first you must realize that in the last days some people won't think about anything except their own selfish desires. They will make fun of you
translation_verse: Wɩɩ hʋ ŋ aa kyɛ ma laa sɩya gyɩma rɛ nyɛ: Saŋa hʋ dʋnɩya aa sɩ ko kpaga tenii, nala badɔmɔŋ sɩ kɩ tɩŋ ba tɩɩ dʋŋʋ wɩyaabɔmɔ tɩyaŋ. Ba sɩ kɩ yaa ma sɩya abaa,

english_verse: They will say this because they want to forget that long ago the heavens and the earth were made at God's command. The earth came out of water and was made from water.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa basɩ wɩya no paalɩ paga rɛ a bee kyɛ dɩ ba laa di anɩɩ faafaa buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa wɩbasɩya rɛ leŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha we doŋ, a bee kyɛ dɩ ba laa di mɛ anɩɩ nɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋa a marɩ taŋha, a kaŋ taŋha lɩɩ nɩɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Later it was destroyed by the waters of a mighty flood.
translation_verse: Nɩɩ mɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ leŋ ʋ tɔ faafaa dʋnɩya hʋ gyɩ aa we doŋ a kyogi ʋ buloŋ.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't forget that for the Lord one day is the same as
translation_verse: Amɛ ŋ naabiikpɩyanama, ma ta yeŋŋi sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ no. Wɩɩsɩ kɛ lee, kyɛdɩgɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bisi tusi, bisi tusi mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kyɛdɩgɩ.

english_verse: The Lord isn't slow about keeping his promises, as some people think he is. In fact, God is patient, because he wants everyone to turn from sin and no one to be lost.
translation_verse: Nala badɔmɔŋ aa bɩɩnɩ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ fɩyɛla rɛ abee wɩya hʋ ʋ aa baa ʋ sɩ yaa tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ɛɛ daa, ma wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ʋ kɩ di kenyiri, beewɩya ʋ bee kyɛ dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ko nyʋgɩsɩ. Ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ nal buloŋ bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ʋ wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: The day of the Lord's return will surprise us like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a loud noise, and the heat will melt the whole universe. Then the earth and everything on it will be seen for what they are.
translation_verse: Amɛ kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko ʋ sɩ ko pirigi ma tɩyaŋ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ gaal. Haŋ kyɛɛ hʋ wɩɩsɩnyuu sɩ nyʋgɩsɩ abee hʋʋrɩbal kɩdɩgɩ. Kɩna buloŋ aa we wɩɩsɩnyuu abee taŋha buloŋ mɛ sɩ di diŋ a tʋwɔlɩ.

english_verse: But God has promised us a new heaven and a new earth, where justice will rule. We are really looking forward to this!
translation_verse: Amɛ á kɛ, á aa gyegili wɩɩsɩnyufalɩɩ abee taŋhafalɩɩ hʋ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ aa wee nyʋwa rɛ, lee hʋ tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma dʋŋ aa sɩ we.

english_verse: My friends, while you are waiting, you should make certain the Lord finds you pure, spotless, and living at peace.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ kyaŋweliye, ma aa kaŋ wɩya no bayɩyɛla nyɛ, ma yaa sɩfɩyaŋ a leŋ dɩ ma gyogo weliye, ka dɩ kyɛɛ hʋ rɛ ko pele, dɩ ma ta kaŋ wɩkyogii buloŋ, ka dɩ ma bee Wɩɩsɩ wɩya mɛ weliye.

english_verse: Don't forget that the Lord is patient because he wants people to be saved. This is also what our dear friend Paul said when he wrote you with the wisdom God had given him.
translation_verse: Ma gyɩma weliŋ anɩɩ wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ kɩ di kenyiri rɛ yaa ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ leŋ nal nal buloŋ na ŋmanɩɩ rɛ a na ʋ laatayɩ. Wɩya no tɩɩ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ tɩya á nɩɩnabiikyoolii Pɔɔl wɩgyʋŋ ʋ mɛ basɩ tɩya ma ʋ tenni hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa saba tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Paul talks about these same things in all his letters, but part of what he says is hard to understand. Some ignorant and unsteady people even destroy themselves by twisting what he said. They do the same thing with other Scriptures too.
translation_verse: Wɩya no tɩɩ rɛ ʋ aa kɩ sabɩ ʋ tenni hʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ tenni hʋ tɩyaŋ wɩya badɔmɔŋ we doŋ a yaa wɩduwoni. Nala aa bɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩ buloŋ abee nala hʋ aa bɩ sɩŋ wɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ, ba aa kaŋ wɩya no kɩ vʋgɩmɩ rɛ anɩɩ gɛɛ ba aa kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ teŋ wɩkaalɩya hʋ buloŋ mɛ kɩ vʋgɩmɩ. Ba aa yaa nyɛ baloo rɛ ba yɩrɩ kɩ tɩya ba tɩɩ gɛɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you have been warned ahead of time! So don't let the errors of evil people lead you down the wrong path and make you lose your balance.
translation_verse: Ma kɛ, ŋ kyaŋweliye, ma gyɩŋ wɩya no buloŋ nɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma pɔ ma tɩɩ dɩ nala hʋ aa bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa ta ko wuwo mʋrɩ ma dɩ ma tɩŋ ba wɩnyɩyɛl hʋ, aŋ kpa wɩtɩɩ hʋ ma aa laa di ʋ kaŋ ma sɩgɩ weliŋ hʋ a ta.

english_verse: Let the gift of undeserved grace and the understanding that come from our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ help you keep on growing. Praise Jesus now and forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma marɩ kɩ na á Tɩɩna abee á Laataal Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ hʋ ʋ aa kpa kɩ daga ma yʋga rɛ, aŋ marɩ gyɩma ʋ weliŋ mɛ. Ʋ rɛ maga dɩ á kɩ dannɩ ʋ a lɩɩ gyɩnaŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ. Amɩ.

english_verse: The Word that gives life was from the beginning, and this is the one our message is about. Our ears have heard, our eyes have seen, and our hands have touched this Word.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa we doŋ a lɩɩ dʋnɩya piilii tɩyaŋ buloŋ, ʋ wɩya rɛ ŋ sabɩ kɩ tɩya ma nyɛ. Á nɩɩ ʋ wɩbasɩɩ rɛ, a na ʋ mɛ. Á naa ʋ rɛ abee á sɩya, a dige ʋ mɛ abee á nosi. Ʋ rɛ yaa Yesu Krisita, Wɩbii hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: The one who gives life appeared! We saw it happen, and we are witnesses to what we have seen. Now we are telling you about this eternal life that was with the Father and appeared to us.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ kpaa nal no aa tɩya mɩɩbol hʋ aa lɩɩ ʋ tɩɩ lee rɛ a daga ma, á na ʋ. Lagɩlagɩ no, ʋ wɩya rɛ á kɩ di daŋsɩya, a heeli basɩ kɩ tɩya ma anɩɩ ʋ rɛ aa tɩya mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Ʋ gyɩ we á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ, ka ʋ ko kpa ʋ daga ma.

english_verse: We are telling you what we have seen and heard, so you may share in this life with us. And we share in it with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ á tɩɩ aa naa abee á sɩya, aŋ nɩɩ ʋ wɩbasɩɩ mɛ abee á dɩgɩna, ʋ wɩya rɛ á basɩ kɩ tɩya ma. Á basɩ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, dɩ ma mɛ wuwo ko pɛ á nala hʋ bee Wɩɩsɩ abee ʋ biye Yesu Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We are writing to tell you these things, because this makes us truly happy. God Is Light
translation_verse: Á aa kyɛ dɩ á teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ no ko yaa teŋfɩyɛl-piliŋ nɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma. Wɩɩsɩ yaa kyaanʋʋ rɛ

english_verse: Jesus told us God is light and doesn't have any darkness in him. Now we are telling you.
translation_verse: Duwoso hʋ Wɩɩsɩ biye hʋ tɩɩ aa kpaa tɩya ma, á mɛ heeli basɩ kɩ tɩya ma, ʋ rɛ nyɛ: Wɩɩsɩ yaa kyaanʋʋ rɛ, bilhuu mʋhʋ buloŋ tuwo ʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If we say we share in life with God and keep on living in the dark, we are lying and are not living by the truth.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ ámaa rɛ yaŋ baa á bee Wɩɩsɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, aŋka á ha we bilhuu tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ á yaa wɩnyɩyɛla rɛ, aŋ bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa mɛ.

english_verse: But if we live in the light, as God does, we share in life with each other. And the blood of his Son Jesus washes all our sins away.
translation_verse: Amɛ dɩ ámaa rɛ we kyaanʋʋ tɩyaŋ, anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ aa we kyaanʋʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ á bee á dɔŋtɩŋsɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, ka Wɩɩsɩ biye Yesu Krisita kyal leŋ á yaa tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩmma.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we are fooling ourselves, and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ ko baa á bɩ kaŋ wɩbɔŋ, á tɩɩ rɛ á kɩ mʋrɩ, ka Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ mɛ tuwo á tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar, and his message isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ ko baa á bɩ yaa wɩbɔŋ buloŋ, ɛɛ kɛ, á kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ yɩrɩ wɩnyɩyɛl lɛ gɛɛ. Nyɛ mɛ yaŋ daga anɩɩ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa basɩ tɩya ma mɛ tuwo á hakɩllɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: My children, I am writing this so you won't sin. But if you do sin, Jesus Christ always does the right thing, and he will speak to the Father for us.
