translation_verse: Ŋ balɩya, ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma rɛ, dɩ ma ta kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ. Amɛ dɩ ma kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ nɛ ha ko yaa wɩbɔŋ, á kaŋ nal lɛ, ʋ sɩŋ á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ sɩya, a sʋla ʋ kɩ tɩya ma. Nal no rɛ yaa Yesu Krisita, Tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna hʋ.

english_verse: When we obey God, we are sure we know him.
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ ko kɩ tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ á gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ.

english_verse: But if we claim to know him and don't obey him, we are lying and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ nal lɛ baa ʋ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, aŋ bee tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa, ʋ tɩɩna yaa wɩnyɩyɛl lɛ, ka Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ hʋ mɛ tuwo ʋ tɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: We truly love God only when we obey him as we should, and then we know we belong to him.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ kɛ buloŋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa, ʋ tɩɩna kyori suwo rɛ abee Wɩɩsɩ. Dɩ ámaa rɛ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa, ɛɛ rɛ á sɩ wuwo kpa gyɩma anɩɩ á bee Wɩɩsɩ kɔnɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: If we say we are his, we must follow the example of Christ. The New Commandment
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa baa ʋ bee Wɩɩsɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, ʋ tɩɩna maga dɩ ʋ kɩ tɩŋ Yesu Krisita naabʋʋsɩ rɛ ʋ mɩɩbol buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ baa dɩ á kyo dɔmɔŋ

english_verse: My dear friends, I am not writing to give you a new commandment. It is the same one you were first given, and it is the message you heard.
translation_verse: Ŋ kyaŋweliye, mɩra no ŋ aa saba kɩ tɩya ma, ʋ bɩ yaa wɩɩ ma ha aa bɩ maakyiye nɩɩ. Haŋ mɩrɩbɩnɩɩ hʋ ma aa gyɩma a lɩɩ saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ ma aa laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di buloŋ, ʋ rɛ ha. Mɩra no yaa faafaa buloŋ wɩɩ rɛ, ʋ rɛ yaa duwoso hʋ ma foŋ aa nɩya.

english_verse: But it really is a new commandment, and you know its true meaning, just as Christ does. You can see the darkness fading away and the true light already shining.
translation_verse: Abee gɛɛ buloŋ, ʋ bɩrɩmɩ mɩrɩfalɩɩ rɛ ŋ biŋ kɩ tɩya ma. Yesu Krisita mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ wɩyaalɩya daga anɩɩ ʋ yaa mɩrɩfalɩɩ rɛ, ma mɛ tɩɩ mɩɩbol tɩyaŋ wɩyaalɩya daga anɩɩ ʋ kɔnɩ yaa mɩrɩfalɩɩ rɛ, beewɩya, kyaanʋʋ tɩɩ hʋ teŋ piili kɩ kyaanɩ rɛ, ka bilhuu hʋ kɩ nyʋgɩsɩ.

english_verse: If we claim to be in the light and hate someone, we are still in the dark.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko baa ʋ we kyaanʋʋ hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, aŋ ha haasɩ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ tɩɩna ha we bilhuu tɩyaŋ nɛ, abee gyɩnaŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: But if we love others, we are in the light, and we don't cause problems for them.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyo ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna, ʋ tɩɩna we kyaanʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ. Wɩɩ mɛ buloŋ tuwo ʋ tɩyaŋ aa sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ ŋmaa naaŋ.

english_verse: If we hate others, we are living and walking in the dark. We don't know where we are going, because we can't see in the dark.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa haasɩ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna, ʋ we bilhuu tɩyaŋ nɛ. Ʋ aa vala bilhuu tɩyaŋ nɛ, a bɩ gyɩŋ lee hʋ ʋ aa mʋʋ, beewɩya bilhuu hʋ leŋ ʋ nyʋlɩmɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because your sins have been forgiven in the name of Christ.
translation_verse: Ŋ balɩya, Wɩɩsɩ kpaa ma wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ma rɛ Yesu Krisita nyubaanɩŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma.

english_verse: Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Kuwoma, ma gyɩŋ nal hʋ aa we doŋ a lɩɩ dʋnɩya piilii tɩyaŋ buloŋ nɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma. Bapʋwasɩya, ma yuwo di Sɩtaanɩ rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma mɛ. Ŋ biikyooliye, ma gyɩŋ á kuwo Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because you have known the Father. Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you are strong. God's message is firm in your hearts, and you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Kuwoma, ma gyɩŋ nal hʋ aa we doŋ a lɩɩ dʋnɩya piilii tɩyaŋ buloŋ nɛ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma. Bapʋwasɩya, ma Wɩɩsɩ laadii sɩŋ weliŋ nɛ, Wɩɩsɩ wɩbii hʋ mɛ we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, ma yuwo di Sɩtaanɩ, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma. Ma ta kpaa ma hakɩllɩ we dʋnɩya kɩna tɩyaŋ

english_verse: Don't love the world or anything that belongs to the world. If you love the world, you cannot love the Father.
translation_verse: Ma ta kpaa ma hakɩllɩ we dʋnɩya bee ʋ kɩna tɩyaŋ. Dɩ nal lɛ kpaa ʋ hakɩla we dʋnɩya kɩna tɩyaŋ, ɛɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ bɩ kyo á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Children, this is the last hour. You heard that the enemy of Christ would appear at this time, and many of Christ's enemies have already appeared. So we know the last hour is here.
translation_verse: Ŋ biikpɩyanama, dʋnɩya no tenii kpaga rɛ! Á gyɩ laa sɩya basɩ tɩya ma rɛ anɩɩ dɩ dʋnɩya no tenii rɛ ko kpaga, Yesu Krisita dɔŋ hʋ sɩ ko. Ka lagɩlagɩ no, á naa dɩ Yesu Krisita dɔmɔ yʋga rɛ a we doŋ. Nyɛ rɛ tɩŋ á gyɩma anɩɩ dʋnɩya hʋ tenii kɔnɩ kpaga rɛ.

english_verse: These people came from our own group, yet they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But they left, which proves they did not belong to our group.
translation_verse: Nala no gyɩ we á tɩyaŋ nɛ, amɛ á beel-ba gyɩ bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba gyɩ lɩɩ á tɩyaŋ. Dɩ á beel-ba gyɩ fa yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, ba fa bee lɩɩ á tɩyaŋ. Amɛ ba aa lɩya hʋ, ɛɛ leŋ nal buloŋ gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ á beel-ba kɔnɩ bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ.

english_verse: Christ, the Holy One, has blessed you, and now all of you understand.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kɛ gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ rɛ, beewɩya Krisita kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ma tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: I did not need to write you about the truth, since you already know it. You also know that liars do not belong to the truth.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ma aa bɩ gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ŋ sabɩ teŋ no kɩ tɩya ma nyɛ. Amɛ ma aa gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ŋ sabɩ ʋ kɩ tɩya ma. Ma yaŋ bɩl gyɩma rɛ anɩɩ wɩnyɩyɛl bee wɩtɩɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo tɩŋ dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: I am writing to warn you about those people who are misleading you.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ba mʋrɩ ma wɩya rɛ ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma.

english_verse: But Christ has blessed you with the Holy Spirit. Now the Spirit stays in you, and you don't need any teachers. The Spirit is truthful and teaches you everything. So stay one in your heart with Christ, just as the Spirit has taught you to do. Children of God
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kɛ, Yesu Krisita kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ma tɩyaŋ nɛ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko leŋ dɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ma tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ, ma bɩl bɩ sɩ kɩ kyɛ nɩdɩma buloŋ dɩ ʋ dagɩ ma. Beewɩya ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa wuwo dagɩ ma wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ nɛ. Wɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa dagɩ ma yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ʋ bee mʋrɩ ma. Ɛɛ nyuniŋ, ma kɩ tɩŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dagɩɩ, a kpa ma tɩɩma abee ma wɩɩ buloŋ a we Yesu Krisita nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Children, stay one in your hearts with Christ. Then when he returns, we will have confidence and won't have to hide in shame.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ rɛ, ŋ balɩya, ma leŋ dɩ á marɩ kpa a tɩɩ we Yesu Krisita nosi tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ámaa rɛ yaa gɛɛ, haŋ kyɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ maakyiye ko, kambɩŋ bee sɩhɩɩsɩ bɩ sɩ kaŋ ma dɩ á gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ lɩfaŋɩya.

english_verse: Think how much the Father loves us. He loves us so much that he lets us be called his children, as we truly are. But since the people of this world did not know who Christ is, they don't know who we are.
translation_verse: Ma na á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa kyo ma maga gɛɛ! Ʋ kyo ma rɛ kɩŋkaŋ, haalɩ a kaŋ ma kɩ yɩrɩ ʋ biisi. Wɩtɩɩ, á mɛ kɔnɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi rɛ. Dʋnɩya nala bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ á yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi, beewɩya ba bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ tɩɩ.

english_verse: My dear friends, we are already God's children, though what we will be hasn't yet been seen. But we do know when Christ returns, we will be like him, because we will see him as he truly is.
translation_verse: Ŋ kyaŋweliye, lagɩlagɩ no sɩɩ bʋwaŋ, á yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi rɛ. Amɛ gɛɛ hʋ á aa sɩ maakyiye kɩɩ, Wɩɩsɩ ha bɩ leŋ á gyɩma mʋ teŋ. Amɛ, á gyɩma anɩɩ saŋa hʋ Yesu Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko, á mɛ sɩ mɩɩgɩ kɩɩ ʋ, beewɩya á sɩ na ʋ, a gyɩŋ nal hʋ iriŋ ʋ aa yaa.

english_verse: Everyone who sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ, ʋ tɩɩna aa kyogi Wɩɩsɩ mɩrɩsɩ rɛ, beewɩya wɩbɔŋ yayɩ rɛ yaa ɩ aa kyogi Wɩɩsɩ mɩra.

english_verse: and people who stay one in their hearts with him won't keep on sinning. If they do keep on sinning, they don't know Christ, and they have never seen him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nal hʋ buloŋ bee Yesu Krisita aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ, ʋ bɩ vɩya aŋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ. Ɛɛ mɛ daga anɩɩ nal hʋ buloŋ aa vɩya aŋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ, ʋ tɩɩna ha bɩ maakyiye na Yesu Krisita koo a gyɩŋ nal hʋ ʋ aa yaa.

english_verse: Anyone who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil. He has sinned from the beginning, but the Son of God came to destroy all that he has done.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ ha aa vɩya aŋ kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ, ʋ tɩɩna yaa Sɩtaanɩ noŋ nal lɛ, beewɩya Sɩtaanɩ kɛ paalɩ yaa wɩbɔŋyaal lɛ, a lɩɩ dʋnɩya piilii tɩyaŋ buloŋ. Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ ko tuu dʋnɩya rɛ nyɛ: Ʋ ko dɩ ʋ kyogi Sɩtaanɩ wɩkanɩya buloŋ ta rɛ.

english_verse: God's children cannot keep on being sinful. His life-giving power lives in them and makes them his children, so they cannot keep on sinning.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ biye, ʋ bɩ vɩya aŋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ, beewɩya ʋ mɩɩgɩ kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ gyogo rɛ. Ʋ bɩ sɩ wuwo vɩya aŋ ha kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa ʋ kuwo.

english_verse: You can tell God's children from the devil's children, because those who belong to the devil refuse to do right or to love each other. Love Each Other
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no rɛ á sɩ wuwo kpa gyɩŋ nala hʋ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi abee nala hʋ aa yaa Sɩtaanɩ biisi. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bee yaa wɩweliye abee wɩya hʋ aa kpaa ŋmanɩɩ, koo a bɩ kyo ʋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biye. Ma kyo dɔmɔŋ

english_verse: From the beginning you were told we must love each other.
translation_verse: Duwoso hʋ ma aa nɩya a lɩɩ saŋa hʋ tɩyaŋ ma aa laa Yesu wɩya di rɛ yaa dɩ á kyo dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Don't be like Cain, who belonged to the devil and murdered his own brother. Why did he murder him? He did it because his brother was good, and he was evil.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ maga dɩ á kɩɩ Keeŋ. Keeŋ gyɩ yaa Sɩtaanɩ noŋ nal lɛ, a gyɩ kpʋ ʋ naabiibaal Abɛl. Bee rɛ tɩŋ Keeŋ gyɩ kpʋ ʋ naabiye hʋ? Wɩɩ hʋ aa tɩŋ nɛ nyɛ: Keeŋ wɩyaalɩya buloŋ gyɩ bɩ kpaa ŋmanɩɩ, ka ʋ naabiye hʋ kɛ gyɩ kɩ yaa wɩweliye.

english_verse: My friends, don't be surprised if the people of this world hate you.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ naabalɩya, ma ta leŋ dɩ ʋ yaa ma wɩkperii dɩ dʋnɩya nala rɛ ko haasɩ ma.

english_verse: Our love for each other proves we have gone from death to life. But if you don't love each other, you are still under the power of death.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ á kɛ lɩɩ sʋʋ bʋwa tɩyaŋ nɛ a mɩɩgɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Á aa kyo á dɔŋtɩŋsɩ rɛ tɩŋ á gyɩŋ nyɛ tɩyaŋ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ kyo ʋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ, sʋʋ ha kaŋ dee ʋ nyuu tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: If you hate each other, you are murderers, and we know murderers do not have eternal life.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa haasɩ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna, ʋ yaa nɩkpʋʋl lɛ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Na ma yaŋ gyɩma anɩɩ nɩkpʋʋl kɛ buloŋ bɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii?

english_verse: We know what love is because Jesus gave his life for us. This is why we must give our lives for each other.
translation_verse: Yesu Krisita aa kpaa ʋ mɩɩbol lenni sʋʋ á wɩya rɛ leŋ á gyɩŋ gɛɛ kyori aa kɩya. Ʋ yaŋ maga dɩ á mɛ kpa á mɩɩbolo kɩ lenni sʋʋ á dɔŋtɩŋsɩ wɩya rɛ.

english_verse: If we have all we need and see one of our own people in need, we must have pity on that person, or else we cannot say we love God.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ kaŋ kɩna, aŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna aa kyɛ kɩŋ kɩdɩgɩ, ka dɩ ʋ yaa tahaa, a bɩ kyiyeli ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna hʋ abee kɩŋ hʋ ʋ aa kyɛ, ɛɛ rɛ ʋ sɩ yaa baa dɩ ʋ kyo Wɩɩsɩ rɛ?

english_verse: When we love others, we know we belong to the truth, and we feel at ease in the presence of God.
translation_verse: Dɩ ámaa rɛ kyo dɔmɔŋ wɩtɩɩ tɩyaŋ nyɛ, ɛɛ rɛ á sɩ kpa gyɩma anɩɩ á aa tɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ rɛ. Nyɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ kambɩŋ ta kaŋ ma Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ, haalɩ

english_verse: But even if we don't feel at ease, God is greater than our feelings, and he knows everything.
translation_verse: dɩ á hakɩllɩ rɛ aa dagɩ ma anɩɩ á yaa wɩɩ kyogi mɛ rɛ. Beewɩya, á gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ rɛ tee á bee á hakɩllɩ buloŋ, a gyɩŋ á wɩɩ buloŋ mɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, if we feel at ease in the presence of God, we will have the courage to come near him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ kyaŋweliye, dɩ á hakɩllɩ rɛ ko bɩ daga ma anɩɩ á yaa wɩɩ kyogi rɛ, á bɩ kaŋ wɩɩ á aa sɩ kɩ fá hɩɩsɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: God wants us to have faith in his Son Jesus Christ and to love each other. This is also what Jesus taught us to do.
translation_verse: Sɩfɩyaŋ wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kyɛ dɩ á yaa rɛ nyɛ: Dɩ á laa ʋ biye Yesu Krisita di, aŋ kyo dɔmɔŋ anɩɩ ʋ aa baa dɩ á kyo dɔmɔŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: If we obey God's commandments, we will stay one in our hearts with him, and he will stay one with us. The Spirit he has given us is proof that we are one with him.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa, ʋ tɩɩna bee Wɩɩsɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we á tɩyaŋ nɛ tɩŋ á gyɩma anɩɩ á bee Wɩɩsɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't believe everyone who claims to have the Spirit of God. Test them all to find out if they really do come from God. Many false prophets have already gone out into the world,
translation_verse: Ŋ kyaŋweliye, wɩnyɩyɛla rɛ suu lee buloŋ, a gɔllɩ kɩ mʋrɩ nala anɩɩ ba yaa Wɩɩsɩ wɩdagɩla rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, ma ta pese laa nala hʋ aa baa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya rɛ ba kɩ basɩ buloŋ kɩ di. Amɛ ma sʋnnɩ ba weliŋ na dɩ wɩya hʋ baa aa dagɩ kɔnɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ koo ba bɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee.

english_verse: But when someone doesn't say this about Jesus, you know this person has a spirit that doesn't come from God and is the enemy of Christ. You knew this enemy was coming into the world and now is already here.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal hʋ kɛ buloŋ aa baa dɩ Yesu Krisita bɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee a ko tuu bɩrɩmɩ nihuwobiŋ, ʋ tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ ʋ aa basɩ yaa wɩnyɩyɛl lɛ. Ʋ yaa Krisita dɔŋ hʋ noŋ nal lɛ, ʋ duwoso hʋ mɛ lɩɩ ʋ lee. Ba foŋ laa sɩya basɩ Krisita dɔŋ noŋ nala no koyi wɩya rɛ. Lagɩlagɩ no sɩɩ bʋwaŋ, ba we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ daha.

english_verse: Children, you belong to God, and you have defeated these enemies. God's Spirit is in you and is more powerful than the one who is in the world.
translation_verse: Amɛ, ŋ balɩya, ma kɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi rɛ, a kaŋ wɩnyɩyɛla no dee, ba bɩ wuwo mʋrɩ ma, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa we ma tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ tee Sɩtaanɩ hʋ aa we dʋnɩya nala tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: These enemies belong to this world, and the world listens to them, because they speak its language.
translation_verse: Wɩnyɩyɛla no kɛ, ba yaa dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ nala rɛ, aa kaŋ dʋnɩya no hakɩla a kɩ basɩ wɩya. Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ dʋnɩya nala mɛ aa gyegili kɩ nɩɩ ba wɩbasɩɩ.

english_verse: We belong to God, and everyone who knows God will listen to us. But the people who don't know God won't listen to us. This is how we can tell the Spirit that speaks the truth from the one that tells lies.
translation_verse: Amɛ á kɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi rɛ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ aa gyegili kɩ nɩɩ á wɩbasɩɩ rɛ. Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biye, ʋ bɩ laa nyʋwa gyegili kɩ nɩɩ á wɩbasɩɩ. Wɩɩ no rɛ á sɩ kpa gyɩma dɩ nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ wɩdagɩya lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa yaa wɩtɩɩ tɩɩna lee rɛ, koo dɩ ʋ wɩdagɩya lɩɩ Sɩtaanɩ, nal hʋ aa yaa wɩnyɩyɛl lee rɛ. Ma leŋ dɩ á kyo dɔmɔŋ

english_verse: My dear friends, we must love each other. Love comes from God, and when we love each other, it shows we have been given new life. We are now God's children, and we know him.
translation_verse: Ŋ kyaŋweliye, ma leŋ dɩ á kyo dɔmɔŋ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ lee rɛ kyori lɩɩ. Ma nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyo ʋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ, ʋ tɩɩna yaa Wɩɩsɩ biye rɛ, a gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ mɛ.

english_verse: God is love, and anyone who doesn't love others has never known him.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ kyo ʋ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa kyori.

english_verse: God showed his love for us when he sent his only Son into the world to give us life.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ taa ʋ biidɩgɩ dʋŋ nɛ ʋ ko tuu dʋnɩya dɩ á tɩŋa ʋ tɩyaŋ a kaŋ mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii. Nyɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ daga tɩya ma anɩɩ ʋ kyo ma rɛ.

english_verse: Real love isn't our love for God, but his love for us. God sent his Son to be the sacrifice by which our sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Nyɛ rɛ yaa kyori tɩɩ: Ʋ bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ ámaa rɛ fa kyo Wɩɩsɩ. Amɛ ʋ rɛ kyo ma, a ta ʋ Biye, ʋ ko tuu a kpa ʋ tɩɩ mɩɩbol lɩɩ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ, Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ a kpa á wɩbɔmɔ kyɛ ma.

english_verse: Dear friends, since God loved us this much, we must love each other.
translation_verse: Ŋ kyaŋweliye, Wɩɩsɩ aa kyo ma kɩŋkaŋ nyɛ, ʋ maga dɩ á mɛ kyo dɔmɔŋ gɛɛ rɛ.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. But if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is truly in our hearts.
translation_verse: Nal buloŋ ha bɩ maakyiye na Wɩɩsɩ abee ʋ sɩɩ. Amɛ dɩ ámaa rɛ kyo dɔmɔŋ, á bee Wɩɩsɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, beewɩya ʋ leŋ á kyo dɔmɔŋ anɩɩ ʋ aa kyɛ gɛɛ rɛ.

english_verse: God has given us his Spirit. This is how we know we are one with him, just as he is one with us.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ aa kpaa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we á tɩyaŋ nɛ tɩŋ á gyɩma anɩɩ á bee Wɩɩsɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: God sent his Son to be the Savior of the world. We saw his Son and are now telling others about him.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ mɛ dʋŋ daa. Á naa Yesu Krisita mɛ rɛ, a di daŋsɩya kɩ tɩya nala mɛ anɩɩ ʋ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biidɩgɩ dʋŋ hʋ ʋ aa taa ʋ ko tuu yaa dʋnɩya Laataal.

english_verse: God stays one with everyone who openly says Jesus is the Son of God. This is how we stay one with God
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa di, a suri ʋ nyʋwa basɩ anɩɩ Yesu rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biye hʋ, ʋ tɩɩna bee Wɩɩsɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: and are sure God loves us. God is love. If we keep on loving others, we will stay one in our hearts with God, and he will stay one with us.
translation_verse: Kyori hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa kana beel-ma, á tɩɩ paalɩ gyɩma ʋ rɛ, a yelli ʋ mɛ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ rɛ yaa kyori. Ma nal hʋ buloŋ aa we doŋ a kaŋ kyori, ʋ tɩɩna bee Wɩɩsɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: A real love for others will chase those worries away. The thought of being punished is what makes us afraid. It shows we have not really learned to love.
translation_verse: Lee hʋ kyori aa wee, kambɩŋ tuwo doŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ á kyori rɛ suwo abee Wɩɩsɩ, ɛɛ aa lɩɩ kambɩŋ buloŋ ta á tɩyaŋ nɛ. Nal hʋ aa gyɩma anɩɩ ba sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ʋ, ʋ rɛ kambɩŋ aa kana. Ɛɛ daga anɩɩ nal hʋ buloŋ aa fá Wɩɩsɩ kambɩŋ, ʋ kyori ha bɩ suwo abee Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: But if we say we love God and don't love each other, we are liars. We cannot see God. So how can we love God, if we don't love the people we can see?
translation_verse: Dɩ nal lɛ baa ʋ kyo Wɩɩsɩ rɛ, aŋ haasɩ ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna, ʋ tɩɩna yaa wɩnyɩyɛl lɛ. Beewɩya, ɛɛ rɛ ɩ sɩ yaa kyo Wɩɩsɩ, nal hʋ ɩ aa bee na abee ɩ sɩɩ, aŋ haasɩ ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna, nal hʋ ɩ aa na?

english_verse: The commandment that God has given us is: “Love God and love each other!”
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ mɩra hʋ ʋ aa kpa biŋ ma rɛ nyɛ: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kyo Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ maga dɩ ɩ kyo ɩ dɔŋtɩɩna mɛ rɛ.

english_verse: If we believe Jesus is truly Christ, we are God's children. Everyone who loves the Father will also love his children.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa di anɩɩ Yesu rɛ yaa Krisita, laataal hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa lɩya, ʋ tɩɩna yaa Wɩɩsɩ biye tɩɩ rɛ. Dɩ nal lɛ kyo biye kuwo, ʋ aa kyo biye hʋ mɛ rɛ.

english_verse: If we love and obey God, we know we will love his children.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ ámaa rɛ ko kyo Wɩɩsɩ, a kɩ tɩŋa ʋ nyʋwa mɛ, ɛɛ rɛ sɩ daga anɩɩ á kɔnɩ kyo Wɩɩsɩ biisi mɛ rɛ.

english_verse: Every child of God can defeat the world, and our faith is what gives us this victory.
translation_verse: Beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ biye buloŋ kaŋ dʋnɩya no dee rɛ. Á aa laa di anɩɩ Yesu yaa Wɩɩsɩ Biye rɛ tɩŋ á kaŋ dʋnɩya no dee.

english_verse: No one can defeat the world without having faith in Jesus as the Son of God. Who Jesus Is
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa laa di anɩɩ Yesu rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biye hʋ, ʋ tɩɩna dʋŋ nɛ kaŋ dʋnɩya no dee.

english_verse: In fact, there are three who tell about it.
translation_verse: Wɩɩ no daŋsɩya diile yaa boto rɛ. Ba aa rɛ nyɛ:

english_verse: If we have faith in God's Son, we have believed what God has said. But if we don't believe what God has said about his Son, it is the same as calling God a liar.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nal hʋ buloŋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ biye hʋ wɩya di, ʋ tɩɩna gyɩma ʋ tɩya tɩyaŋ anɩɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa basa a tile ʋ Biye hʋ tɩyaŋ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ. Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa bɩ laa Wɩɩsɩ di wɩɩ no tɩyaŋ, ʋ tɩɩna daga anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ yaa wɩnyɩyɛl lɛ, beewɩya ʋ bɩ laa daŋsɩya wɩɩ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa basa ʋ biye hʋ lugo tɩyaŋ di.

english_verse: God has also said he gave us eternal life and this life comes to us from his Son.
translation_verse: Daŋsɩya wɩɩ hʋ rɛ nyɛ: Wɩɩsɩ kpaa mɩɩbol aa bɩ kaŋ tenii tɩya ma rɛ. Ʋ Biye hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ á tɩŋa a na mɩɩbol no.

english_verse: And so, if we have God's Son, we have this life. But if we don't have the Son, we don't have this life. Knowing about Eternal Life
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, nal hʋ buloŋ bee Wɩɩsɩ biye hʋ aa yaa kɩdɩgɩ, ʋ tɩɩna kaŋ mɩɩbol no rɛ. Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ mɛ bee Wɩɩsɩ biye hʋ aa bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ kaŋ mɩɩbol no. Mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii

english_verse: All of you have faith in the Son of God, and I have written to let you know you have eternal life.
translation_verse: Ŋ sabɩ wɩya no kɩ tɩya ma nala hʋ aa laa Wɩɩsɩ biye hʋ wɩya di rɛ, dɩ ma gyɩma anɩɩ ma kaŋ mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii rɛ.

english_verse: And if we know God listens when we pray, we are sure our prayers have already been answered.
translation_verse: Á yaŋ aa gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ aa laa á sʋlɩɩ rɛ wɩɩ buloŋ á aa sʋla ʋ kɩ kyɛ tɩyaŋ nyɛ, ɛɛ kɛ á gyɩma anɩɩ ʋ yaa á wɩkyɛɛlɩya buloŋ mɛ kɩ tɩya ma rɛ.

english_verse: Everything that is wrong is sin, but not all sins are deadly.
translation_verse: Wɩyaakyogii buloŋ yaa wɩbɔŋ nɛ, amɛ wɩbɔmɔ badɔmɔŋ we doŋ a bɩ yaa wɩya aa sɩ leŋ dɩ nala sʋba mʋ gyʋʋ diŋ.

english_verse: We are sure God's children do not keep on sinning. God's own Son protects them, and the devil cannot harm them.
translation_verse: Á gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ biye buloŋ bɩ vɩya aŋ yaa wɩbɔmɔ kɩ mʋ deŋdeŋ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ Biye hʋ aa sɩŋ pɔ ʋ rɛ. Ɛɛwɩya, Sɩtaanɩ bɩ sɩ wuwo yaa ʋ wɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: We are certain we come from God and the rest of the world is under the power of the devil.
translation_verse: Sɩtaanɩ kaŋ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ nala buloŋ dee rɛ, amɛ á gyɩma anɩɩ á kɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ biisi rɛ.

english_verse: We know that Jesus Christ the Son of God has come and has shown us the true God. And because of Jesus, we now belong to the true God who gives eternal life.
translation_verse: Á bɩl gyɩma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ biye hʋ ko suri á hakɩllɩ rɛ, a leŋ á gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ hʋ. Á bee Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ hʋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ, á bee ʋ biye Yesu Krisita mɛ yaa kɩdɩgɩ. Ʋ rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩɩ hʋ, ʋ rɛ bɩl yaa nal hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii mɛ.

english_verse: Children, you must stay away from idols.
translation_verse: Ŋ biikpɩyanama, ma lɩɩ ma tɩɩ vʋga tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: From the church leader. To a very special woman and her children. I truly love all of you, and so does everyone else who knows the truth.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ, ma nɩhɩyawʋ rɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ma Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we doŋ. Ŋ kyo ma rɛ weliŋ abee ŋ wɩtɩɩ buloŋ. Ŋ dʋŋ mɛ yaŋ daa kyo ma gɛɛ, amɛ nala hʋ buloŋ aa gyɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ mɛ kyo ma rɛ.

english_verse: We love you because the truth is now in our hearts, and it will be there forever.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ hʋ aa we á tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ tɩŋ á kyo ma gɛɛ. Wɩtɩɩ no sɩ we á tɩyaŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and Jesus Christ his Son will be kind and merciful to us! May they give us peace and truth and love. Truth and Love
translation_verse: Á aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ, a kyo dɔmɔŋ nyɛ, á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee ʋ Biye Yesu Krisita bɔnyɛ tɩyaŋ, ba sɩ fá á sikii, a leŋ dɩ á hɔŋ abee laaŋfɩya.

english_verse: I was very glad to learn that some of your children are obeying the truth, as the Father told us to do.
translation_verse: Ŋ teŋ fɩyɛla rɛ kɩŋkaŋ beewɩya ŋ naa ma badɔmɔŋ nɛ dɩ ba aa tɩŋ wɩtɩɩ hʋ anɩɩ á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa daga ma gɛɛ.

english_verse: Dear friend, I am not writing to tell you and your children to do something you have not done before. I am writing to tell you to love each other, which is the first thing you were told to do.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ nala, ŋ aa sʋla ma, ma leŋ dɩ á kyo dɔmɔŋ. Wɩɩ no bɩ kɩɩ nɩɩ mɩrɩfalɩɩ rɛ ŋ sabɩ kɩ tɩya ma. Mɩra no rɛ á tɩŋa a lɩɩ saŋa hʋ á aa laa Yesu Krisita wɩya di tɩyaŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: Love means we do what God tells us. And from the beginning, he told you to love him.
translation_verse: Kyori tɩɩ rɛ yaa á aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa á mɩɩbol buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ nyʋwa hʋ ʋ aa tɩya ma a lɩɩ piilii hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ nɛ yaa dɩ á kaŋ kyori abee dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: Many liars have gone out into the world. These deceitful liars are saying Jesus Christ did not have a truly human body. But they are liars and the enemies of Christ.
translation_verse: Wɩnyɩyɛla rɛ suu lee buloŋ, a gɔllɩ kɩ mʋrɩ nala. Wɩnyɩyɛla no aa baa dɩ Yesu Krisita bɩ ko tuu dʋnɩya a bɩrɩmɩ nihuwobiŋ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa kaŋ hakɩla no iriŋ, ʋ tɩɩna rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa mʋrɩ nala, Krisita dɔŋ hʋ.

english_verse: So be sure not to lose what we have worked for. If you do, you won't be given your full reward.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ma pɔ ma tɩɩ weliŋ, a ta leŋ dɩ kɩŋ hʋ wɩya ma aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ ko gɛ ma, ka dɩ Wɩɩsɩ kpa ma tuno buloŋ tɩya ma.

english_verse: Don't keep changing what you were taught about Christ, or else God will no longer be with you. But if you hold firmly to what you were taught, both the Father and the Son will be with you.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa bee daga wɩya hʋ Krisita aa daga dʋŋ, aŋ daga wɩdʋŋsɩ kɩ pɛ, ʋ tɩɩna bee Wɩɩsɩ bɩ yaa kɩdɩgɩ. Amɛ nal hʋ buloŋ aa tɩŋ wɩya hʋ Krisita aa daga ma dʋŋ, ʋ tɩɩna bee á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee ʋ Biye hʋ yaa kɩdɩgɩ rɛ.

english_verse: If people won't agree to this teaching, don't welcome them into your home or even greet them.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko ma lee a bee daga wɩya no, ma ta leŋ dɩ ʋ tɩɩna gyʋʋ ma dɩya. Ma ta paalɩ lɔllɩ ʋ mɛ gba.

english_verse: Greeting them is the same as taking part in their evil deeds. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko lɔllɩ ʋ, ʋ mɛ yaa ʋ dɔŋtɩɩna rɛ, a pɛ ʋ tɩyaŋ ba kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ.

english_verse: I have much more to tell you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink. I want to come and talk to you in person, because this will make us really happy.
translation_verse: Ŋ kaŋ wɩya yʋga rɛ a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ma. Amɛ ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ sabɩ ba buloŋ teŋ tɩyaŋ. Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ tɩɩ ko ma lee rɛ dɩ á hɔŋ basɩ ba. Ɛɛ rɛ sɩ leŋ dɩ á teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ hʋ yaŋ yaa teŋfɩyɛl-piliŋ.

english_verse: Greetings from the children of your very special sister.
translation_verse: Ma nɩmmabalɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we daha mɛ aa kyʋwalɩ ma weliŋ.

english_verse: From the church leader. To my dear friend Gaius. I love you because we follow the truth,
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ, ma nɩhɩyawʋ rɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ɩ Geyosi. Ŋ kyo ɩ wɩya rɛ abee ŋ wɩtɩɩ buloŋ.

english_verse: dear friend, and I pray all goes well for you. I hope you are as strong in body, as I know you are in spirit.
translation_verse: Ŋ kyaŋwelii, ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ɩ wɩkanɩya buloŋ sɩŋ weliŋ nɛ ɩ bee Wɩɩsɩ paga tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛwɩya, ŋ wɩɩsʋlɩɩ rɛ yaa dɩ Wɩɩsɩ leŋ dɩ ɩ teŋ mɛ kaŋ laaŋfɩya, ka dɩ ɩ na weliŋ ɩ wɩkanɩya buloŋ tɩyaŋ mɛ.

english_verse: Nothing brings me greater happiness than to hear that my children are obeying the truth. Working Together
translation_verse: Wɩɩ buloŋ bɩ leŋ ŋ teŋ fɩyɛlɩ a maga ŋ aa nɩya anɩɩ ŋ biisi aa tɩŋ wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ rɛ.

english_verse: Dear friend, you have always been faithful in helping other followers of the Lord, even the ones you didn't know before.
translation_verse: Ŋ kyaŋwelii, ɩ wɩtɩɩ suwo rɛ abee gɛɛ hʋ ɩ aa deŋ á nɩmmabalɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ, abee ba nala hʋ aa yaa nɩhʋwala ɩ lee buloŋ.

english_verse: They have told the church about your love. They say you were good enough to welcome them and to send them on their mission in a way God's servants deserve.
translation_verse: Ba basɩ kyori hʋ ɩ aa kana wɩya a tɩya á Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we daha tɩyaŋ nɛ. Yaa kuwokeri aŋ kyiyeli ba abee kɩŋ buloŋ ba aa sɩ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba kaŋ vala ŋmanɩɩ hʋ. Kyiyeli ba gɛɛ hʋ aa sɩ yaa Wɩɩsɩ teŋfɩyɛlʋʋ,

english_verse: When they left to tell others about the Lord, they decided not to accept help from anyone who wasn't a follower.
translation_verse: beewɩya Krisita tʋma rɛ ba lɩɩ dɩ ba tʋma. Tʋma no tʋmɩɩ tɩyaŋ, ba bɩ laa nyʋwa laa kɩŋ buloŋ nala hʋ aa bɩ yaa Krisitabiisi lee.

english_verse: We must support people like them, so we can take part in what they are doing to spread the truth.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, ʋ maga dɩ ámaa Krisitabiisi rɛ kɩ kyiyeli nala no iriŋ, dɩ gɛɛ leŋ dɩ á yaa ba tʋŋtʋnnɩ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ wɩtɩɩ tʋma tʋmɩɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I wrote to the church. But Diotrephes likes to be the number-one leader, and he won't pay any attention to us.
translation_verse: Ŋ laa sɩya sabɩ teŋ tɩya ma Krisitabiisi aa we doŋ nɛ. Amɛ Diyotirifi bɩ yaa siri dɩ ʋ gyegili nɩɩ wɩya hʋ á aa basɩ beewɩya ʋ lʋgʋ buloŋ nɛ yaa dɩ ʋ yaa ma sɩlaal.

english_verse: So if I come, I will remind him of how he has been attacking us with gossip. Not only has he been doing this, but he refuses to welcome any of the Lord's followers who come by. And when other church members want to welcome them, he puts them out of the church.
translation_verse: Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko ko, ŋ sɩ basɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ ʋ aa yaa a tɩya ma. Ʋ kpa hagaaha rɛ a kɩ kyogi á feŋ. Ɛɛ mɛ dʋŋ daa, ʋ aa sɩ marɩ yaa wɩɩ hʋ ʋ lɔrɩ rɛ yaa: Dɩ Krisitabiisi rɛ yaa nɩhʋwala ko, ʋ bɩ sɩ laa nyʋwa laa ba biŋ ʋ dɩya tɩyaŋ, haalɩ aŋ bɩl aa pɔ dɩ nal buloŋ mɛ ta laa ba biŋ. Dɩ nal buloŋ nɛ ko kɩ kyɛ dɩ ʋ laa ba biŋ, ʋ aa kile tɩɩna ta ba laŋŋɩɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Dear friend, don't imitate the evil deeds of others, but follow the example of people who do kind deeds. They are God's children, but those who are always doing evil have never seen God.
translation_verse: Ŋ kyaŋwelii, ta kɩ kyesi nala hʋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ. Amɛ kɩ kyesi nala hʋ aa yaa wɩweliye, beewɩya nal hʋ buloŋ aa yaa wɩweliye, ʋ tɩɩna yaa Wɩɩsɩ biye rɛ. Nal hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa yaa wɩbɔmɔ, ʋ tɩɩna bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ.

english_verse: Everyone speaks well of Demetrius, and so does the true message that he teaches. I also speak well of him, and you know what I say is true. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Dɛmitiriyo kɛ yaa nɩtɩɩ rɛ, nal buloŋ kɩ basɩ ʋ wɩyaaweliye wɩya. Ɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa tɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩtɩɩ ŋmanɩɩ hʋ mɛ daga anɩɩ ʋ yaa nɩtɩɩ rɛ. Á mɛ tɩɩ yaa ʋ wɩyaaweliye daŋsɩya diile rɛ. Ma gyɩma anɩɩ wɩya hʋ buloŋ á aa basɩ yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink.
translation_verse: Ŋ kaŋ wɩya yʋga rɛ a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ basɩ tɩya ɩ. Amɛ ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ sabɩ ba buloŋ teŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I hope to see you soon, and then we can talk in person.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ tɩɩ ko pele ɩ rɛ kyɛɛ no buloŋ, dɩ á hɔŋ basɩ wɩya.

english_verse: I pray that God will bless you with peace! Your friends send their greetings. Please give a personal greeting to each of our friends.
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ fɩyɛlʋʋ we ɩ lee. Ɩ kyaŋsɩ hʋ aa we daha buloŋ aa kyʋwalɩ ɩ. Ɩ mɛ kyʋwalɩ á kyaŋsɩ hʋ aa we doŋ kɩdɩgɩ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ tɩya ma.

english_verse: From Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ and the brother of James. To all who are chosen and loved by God the Father and are kept safe by Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Gyuudi aa yaa Yesu Krisita tʋŋtʋnnɩ, a yaa Gyemsi nɩɩnabiye rɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ma nala hʋ á Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ aa kyo, a lɩɩ ma, ka Yesu Krisita mɛ kɩ deŋ ma nyuu tɩyaŋ weliŋ.

english_verse: I pray that God will greatly bless you with mercy, peace, and love! False Teachers
translation_verse: Wɩɩsɩ sɩ fá ma sikii, a leŋ dɩ ʋ fɩyɛlʋʋ abee ʋ kyori we ma lee weliŋ. Gyuudi basɩ wɩnyɩyɛl dɩdagɩla wɩya

english_verse: Some godless people have sneaked in among us and are saying, “God treats us much better than we deserve, and so it is all right to be immoral.” They even deny we must obey Jesus Christ as our only Master and Lord. But long ago the Scriptures warned that these godless people were doomed.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ma sɩŋ pɔ wɩya no weliŋ nɛ, beewɩya nala badɔmɔŋ aa bɩ gyɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ lʋwɔla gyʋʋ ma tɩyaŋ nɛ. Nala no kpa Wɩɩsɩ bɔnyɛ hʋ ʋ aa kana beel-ma bɩrɩmɩ gyo-gye wɩɩ rɛ a marɩ kɩ yaa bisiŋ wɩya. Ba vɩya Yesu Krisita nal hʋ dʋŋ aa yaa á Tɩɩna abee á nɩhɩyawʋ rɛ. Ba saba Wɩɩsɩ teŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ faafaa buloŋ anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ nala hʋ aa yaa wɩya no iriŋ.

english_verse: Don't forget what happened to those people the Lord rescued from Egypt. Some of them did not have faith, and he later destroyed them.
translation_verse: Ma foŋ gyɩŋ wɩya no ŋ aa basɩ buloŋ nɛ. Amɛ ŋ aa kyɛ dɩ ŋ liisi ma anɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ gyɩ laa ʋ nala ta Igyipiti paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ, ka ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ ʋ kpʋ ba nala hʋ aa bɩ laa ʋ wɩya di.

english_verse: The people I am talking about are behaving just like those dreamers who destroyed their own bodies. They reject all authority and insult angels.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nala no aa lʋwɔlɩ gyʋʋ ma tɩyaŋ mɛ aa fugo baa dɩ ba naa wɩya ba duwoso tɩyaŋ nɛ a tɩŋ gɛɛ tɩyaŋ a yaa wɩlaama kpa bisiŋ dige ba tɩɩ. Ba vɩya Wɩɩsɩ dee rɛ, aŋ kɩ tʋʋsɩ malɩkasɩ hʋ aa kaŋ gaŋdarɩ.

english_verse: Even Michael, the chief angel, didn't dare to insult the devil, when the two of them were arguing about the body of Moses. All Michael said was, “The Lord will punish you!”
translation_verse: Amɛ malɩkasɩ nɩhɩyawʋ Maakɩl mɛ gba gyɩ bɩ laa nyʋwa kpa kyogisi tɩya Sɩtaanɩ koo a tʋʋsɩ ʋ saŋa hʋ ʋ beel-ʋ gyɩ aa kaŋ Moosi teŋbii wɩya kɩ kpa dɔmɔŋ. Amɛ wɩɩ hʋ ʋ gyɩ aa basa buloŋ nɛ yaa, “Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩ dɔgɩsɩ ɩ.”

english_verse: But these people insult powers they don't know anything about. They are like senseless animals that end up getting destroyed, because they live only by their feelings.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩ kɛ buloŋ nala no aa bɩ gyɩma ʋ sɩɩ, ba aa baa ʋ yaa wɩtɔɔ rɛ. Ba aa yaa wɩya gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bagɩla aa bee bɩɩnɩ wɩya. Wɩɩ hʋ buloŋ aa ko ba nyuu, ʋ rɛ ba kɩ yaa. Wɩya no tɩɩ rɛ aa kpʋ ba.

english_verse: Now they are in for real trouble. They have followed Cain's example and have made the same mistake that Balaam did by caring only for money. They have also rebelled against God, just as Korah did. Because of all this, they will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Ʋ sɩ lɔrɩ tɩya ba kɩŋkaŋ, beewɩya ba paa Keeŋ naabʋʋsɩ rɛ. Ba aa kuu molbiye wɩya mɛ rɛ a kɩ yaa wɩbɔmɔ anɩɩ baal kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Baalam gyɩ aa yaa gɛɛ. Ba lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ hal mɛ rɛ anɩɩ bal kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Koora mɛ gyɩ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ hal gɛɛ. Ɛɛ wɩya Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kpʋ ba mɛ.

english_verse: These people are filthy minded, and by their shameful and selfish actions they spoil the meals you eat together. They are like clouds blown along by the wind, but never bringing any rain. They are like leafless trees, uprooted and dead, and unable to produce fruit.
translation_verse: Dɩ ma ko laŋŋɩ dɩ ma di nyʋʋdɩgɩ kɩdiiliye, nala no aa kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bisiŋ kɩna ma tɩyaŋ. Dɩ ba ko kɩ di kɩna hʋ, ba dʋŋ wɩya rɛ ba aa kyɩla aŋ bee fá sɩhɩɩsɩ buloŋ mɛ. Ba kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ duwoŋ aa tɩna, ka puwo kile ʋ, ʋ bɩ nɩya. A bɩl kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ tɩɩsɩ nɔnɩɩ saŋa aa pele ka ba vɩya nɔnɩɩ, ba kyuri ta, ba sʋba ba buloŋ.

english_verse: Enoch was the seventh person after Adam, and he was talking about these people when he said: Look! The Lord is coming with thousands and thousands of holy angels
translation_verse: Faafaa buloŋ nɛ baal kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Inɔkɩ gyɩ basɩ nala no wɩya Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ dee tɩyaŋ. Ʋ gyɩ yaa Adama nihiliyarɩ bʋpɛ tɩɩna rɛ. Ʋ gyɩ baa, “Ma deŋ na, á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kaŋ ʋ malɩkasɩ hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ bisiŋ tusi tusi a ko,

english_verse: to judge everyone. He will punish all those ungodly people for all the evil things they have done. The Lord will surely punish those ungodly sinners for every evil thing they have ever said about him.
translation_verse: a di nal buloŋ sarɩya a kpa kyogisi tɩya nɩbɔmɔ buloŋ, akuu wɩbɔmɔ hʋ ba aa yaa abee wɩbɔmɔ hʋ buloŋ ba aa basa kyogi Wɩɩsɩ wɩya.”

english_verse: These people grumble and complain and live by their own selfish desires. They brag about themselves and flatter others to get what they want. More Warnings
translation_verse: Nala no aa kɩ gʋrɩmɩ wɩya rɛ saŋa buloŋ, a kɩ leeni nala. Ba dʋŋʋ wɩyaabɔmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ ba aa kɩ tɩŋa a kaŋ dagɩŋtɩɩ abee nyʋʋpɩŋsʋŋ, a kɩ firimi nala ba tɩɩ weliŋ wɩya.

english_verse: My dear friends, remember the warning you were given by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma kɛ ŋ kyaŋweliye, ma kɩ liisi wɩya hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita kpambɩsɩ hʋ gyɩ aa basa tɩya ma.

english_verse: They told you that near the end of time, selfish and godless people would start making fun of God.
translation_verse: Ba basa rɛ anɩɩ dɩ dʋnɩya hʋ tenii rɛ ko kpaga nala hʋ aa bee fá Wɩɩsɩ aŋ kɩ yaa ba dʋŋʋ wɩyaabɔmɔ sɩ kɩ yaa ma sɩya.

english_verse: And now these people are already making you turn against each other. They think only about this life, and they don't have God's Spirit.
translation_verse: Nitesi no rɛ aa leŋ nala kɩ porigi dɔmɔŋ. Ba aa kɩ yaa wɩya anɩɩ dʋnɩya no tɩyaŋ nala rɛ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ tuwo ba tɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And keep in step with God's love, as you wait for our Lord Jesus Christ to show how kind he is by giving you eternal life.
translation_verse: Ma kaŋ Wɩɩsɩ kyori kpaŋkpaŋ, a kɩ gyegili kyɛɛ hʋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita aa sɩ mɩɩgɩ ko a fá ma sikii, a tɩya ma mɩɩbol hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ tenii.

english_verse: Be helpful to all who may have doubts.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa yaa sige ba laadii tɩyaŋ, ma kɩ fá ba sikii.

english_verse: Rescue any who need to be saved, as you would rescue someone from a fire. Then with fear in your own hearts, have mercy on everyone who needs it. But hate even the clothes of those who have been made dirty by their filthy deeds. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Ma korigi lɩɩ nala hʋ aa mʋ dɩ ba gyʋʋ diŋ, a laa ba ta. Nala badɔmɔŋ mɛ we doŋ a kɩ yaa ba dʋŋʋ wɩyaabɔmɔ dʋŋ, ma kɩ fá ba sikii. Amɛ ma gyɩŋ tɩya matɩɩ weliŋ dɩ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ ba aa yaa ta ko daagɩ ma.

english_verse: Offer praise to God our Savior because of our Lord Jesus Christ! Only God can keep you from falling and make you pure and joyful in his glorious presence. Before time began and now and forever, God is worthy of glory, honor, power, and authority. Amen.
translation_verse: Ma leŋ dɩ á tɩŋ á Tɩɩna Yesu Krisita tɩyaŋ a dannɩ Wɩɩsɩ beewɩya ʋ dʋŋ nɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ á laataal. Ʋ rɛ yaa gaŋdaal, a tɩŋ koro abee dee, a tɩŋ kɩŋ buloŋ a kɩ deŋ ba nyuu mɛ, a lɩɩ piili hʋ a kaŋ kɩ ko gyɩnaŋ, a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ. Amɩ.

english_verse: This is what God showed to Jesus Christ, so that he could tell his servants what must happen soon. Christ then sent his angel with the message to his servant John.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ aa we teŋ no tɩyaŋ yaa wɩya Yesu Krisita aa kpaa daga rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ rɛ kpaa ba daga Yesu Krisita dɩ ʋ mɛ kpa daga ʋ hatɩnna, a leŋ dɩ ba gyɩŋ wɩya hʋ aa sɩ yaa kyɛɛ no buloŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu Krisita mɛ tɩma ʋ malɩka dɩ ʋ ko basɩ wɩya no tɩya mɩyaŋ, ʋ tʋŋtʋnnɩ Gyɔɔŋ.

english_verse: And John told everything he had seen about God's message and about what Jesus Christ had said and done.
translation_verse: Ŋ mɛ laa wɩya hʋ buloŋ ŋ aa naa, a sabɩ biŋ. Wɩya no yaa duwoso hʋ aa lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ lee abee wɩtɩɩ hʋ Yesu Krisita aa kpaa daga ŋ nɛ.

english_verse: May kindness and peace be yours from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness. Jesus was the first to conquer death, and he is the ruler of all earthly kings. Christ loves us, and by his blood he set us free from our sins.
translation_verse: Yesu Krisita rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ daŋsɩyadiil hʋ aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ. Ʋ rɛ yaa nal hʋ aa laa sɩya sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ rɛ yaa dʋnɩya kuworo buloŋ kuwori. Ʋ kyo ma rɛ, a sʋba á wɩya, a lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: He lets us rule as kings and serve God his Father as priests. To him be glory and power forever and ever! Amen.
translation_verse: Ʋ rɛ kaŋ ma ko gyʋʋ ʋ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ a leŋ á yaa kuworibiisi abee wɩɩkyʋwal-sɩlaala, a tʋma kɩ tɩya nal hʋ aa yaa ʋ Wɩɩsɩ abee ʋ Kuwo. Yesu Krisita yaa gaŋdaal lɛ abee dee buloŋ tɩɩna a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ. Amɩ.

english_verse: Look! He is coming with the clouds. Everyone will see him, even the ones who stuck a sword through him. All people on earth will weep because of him. Yes, it will happen! Amen.
translation_verse: Na! Ʋ tɩŋ taala tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ ko. Nal buloŋ nɛ sɩ na ʋ, haalɩ abee nala hʋ aa kpaa siye tɔbɔ ʋ hʋ buloŋ. Ʋ koyi no tɩyaŋ nala iriŋ buloŋ aa we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ sɩ wii. Wɩɩ no rɛ kɔnɩ sɩ yaa. Amɩ.

english_verse: The Lord God says, “I am Alpha and Omega, the one who is and was and is coming. I am God All-Powerful!” A Vision of the Risen Lord
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ Dee buloŋ tɩɩna baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ lipiilii abee wɩɩ buloŋ lɩtenii. Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa dee buloŋ tɩɩna, nal hʋ aa we doŋ gyɩnaŋ, abee nal hʋ aa we doŋ faafaa buloŋ abee nal hʋ aa sɩ we doŋ maakyiye buloŋ.” Gyɔɔŋ naa Krisita anɩɩ duwoso tɩyaŋ

english_verse: I am John, a follower together with all of you. We suffer because Jesus is our king, but he gives us the strength to endure. I was sent to Patmos Island, because I had preached God's message and had told about Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ, ma nɩɩnabiye Gyɔɔŋ nɛ sabɩ teŋ no a kɩ tɩya ma. Ŋ aa yaa Yesu Krisita hatɩnnɩ wɩya, ŋ beel-ma buloŋ nɛ kaŋ kenyiri a kɩ na tʋwara hʋ nala hʋ aa we ʋ koro hʋ tɩyaŋ aa naa. Ŋ aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya hʋ abee wɩtɩɩ hʋ Yesu Krisita aa kpaa daga ŋ wɩya rɛ tɩŋ ba kana ŋ kaŋ gyol fuwo mʋ ta fuwokpoŋii kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ Paatimɔsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: On the Lord's day the Spirit took control of me, and behind me I heard a loud voice that sounded like a trumpet.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna kyɛbii kɩdɩgɩ rɛ Wiyesi Welii hʋ ko we ŋ tɩyaŋ a laa ŋ tɩŋa. Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ nɩɩ taabal ŋ hal aa kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ba aa mʋʋ kabɩl.

english_verse: When I turned to see who was speaking to me, I saw seven gold lampstands.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ mɩɩgɩ galdaasɩ ŋ hal dɩ ŋ na nal hʋ aa basɩ wɩya hʋ tɩya ŋ. Ŋ aa galdaasɩ gɛɛ, ŋ na salma fɩŋtɩŋdaasɩ bapɛ.

english_verse: There with the lampstands was someone who seemed to be the Son of Man. He was wearing a robe that reached down to his feet, and a gold cloth was wrapped around his chest.
translation_verse: Ka kɩŋ kɩdɩgɩ sɩŋ ba tʋtʋʋ a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nihuwobiŋ, a laalɩ gadoliidolii, ʋ tuu yɩ ʋ naasɩ, ka ʋ kpa salma kɩrɩsa a vʋwa ʋ bembii.

english_verse: His head and his hair were white as wool or snow, and his eyes looked like flames of fire.
translation_verse: Ʋ nyupʋna buloŋ pʋrɩsɩ gɛɛ pogipogi anɩɩ kuluŋ, ka ʋ sɩya kɩ kyol gɛɛ anɩɩ diŋgel.

english_verse: His feet were glowing like bronze being heated in a furnace, and his voice sounded like the roar of a waterfall.
translation_verse: Ʋ naasɩ mɛ fɩyɛsɩ gɛɛ hololo anɩɩ ba aa kpaa hɔgɩ we diŋ. Ʋ taal mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kyuuribal aa kyuuri.

english_verse: He held seven stars in his right hand, and a sharp double-edged sword was coming from his mouth. His face was shining as bright as the sun at noon.
translation_verse: Ka ʋ kol kyɩŋwʋlɩya bapɛ ʋ noduu noŋ tɩyaŋ, ka takoobii aa di ʋ nyʋʋsɩ balɩya buloŋ lɩɩ ʋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ a ko lɩɩ. Ka ʋ sɩya buloŋ kɩ tʋla gɛɛ anɩɩ wɩɩsɩ aa maga nyutʋtʋʋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead person. But he put his right hand on me and said: Don't be afraid! I am the first, the last,
translation_verse: Ŋ aa na ʋ gɛɛ, ŋ tuu tele ʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, a pɩŋ doŋ gɛɛ anɩɩ ŋ aa sʋba. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ kpa ʋ noduu noŋ dɔbɔ ŋ tɩyaŋ aŋ basɩ tɩya ŋ abaa, “Ta leŋ kambɩŋ kana ɩ. Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa wɩɩ buloŋ lipiilii abee wɩɩ buloŋ lɩtenii.

english_verse: and the living one. I died, but now I am alive forever, and I have the keys to death and the world of the dead.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa nal hʋ aa weye. Ŋ fa sʋba rɛ, amɛ lagɩlagɩ no ŋ weye rɛ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ, ŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ sʋba. Ŋ kaŋ sʋʋ abee lalɩyabee buloŋ dee rɛ.

english_verse: Write what you have seen and what is and what will happen after these things.
translation_verse: Ɛɛwɩya, sabɩ wɩya hʋ ɩ aa naa, wɩya hʋ aa yaa lagɩlagɩ no, abee wɩya hʋ aa sɩ maakyiye yaa.

english_verse: I will explain the mystery of the seven stars you saw at my right side and the seven gold lampstands. The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the lampstands are the seven churches.
translation_verse: Wɩya hʋ ɩ aa naa, ba yaa wɩfaŋɩya rɛ. Kyɩŋwʋlɩya hʋ bapɛ ɩ aa naa ŋ noduu tɩyaŋ abee salma fɩŋtɩŋdaasɩ hʋ bapɛ, ba memii rɛ nyɛ. Kyɩŋwʋlɩya bapɛ hʋ rɛ yaa sɩlaala hʋ aa deŋ Krisitabiisi hʋ aa kɩ laŋŋɩ Esɩya paalʋʋ tɔnɩ bapɛ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Salma fɩŋtɩŋdaasɩ hʋ bapɛ mɛ rɛ yaa Krisitabiisi hʋ aa kɩ laŋŋɩ Esɩya paalʋʋ tɔnɩ bapɛ hʋ tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Ephesus: I am the one who holds the seven stars in my right hand, and I walk among the seven gold lampstands. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ŋ abaa, “Sabɩ wɩɩ no tɩya sɩlaal hʋ aa deŋ Krisitabiisi hʋ aa laŋŋɩ Ɛfiso tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ no lɩɩ mɩyaŋ nal hʋ aa kol kyɩŋwʋlɩya hʋ bapɛ ŋ noduu noŋ tɩyaŋ, a kɩ vala salma fɩŋtɩŋdaasɩ hʋ bapɛ paga tɩyaŋ lee rɛ.

english_verse: I know everything you have done, including your hard work and how you have endured. I know you won't put up with anyone who is evil. When some people pretended to be apostles, you tested them and found out they were liars.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩŋ ma wɩyaalɩya buloŋ nɛ. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma aa tʋŋ nɛ abee ma dee buloŋ, a gyɩŋ mala hʋ mɛ ma aa kana. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma bɩ laa nyʋwa ma bee nɩbɔmɔ kɩ laŋŋɩ dɔmɔŋ. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma sʋnnɩ nala hʋ aa baa dɩ ba yaa Yesu kpambɩsɩ a na rɛ, a na anɩɩ ba yaa wɩnyɩyɛla rɛ.

english_verse: You have endured and gone through hard times because of me, yet you have not given up.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma kaŋ mala rɛ tʋwara hʋ ma aa naa akuu ma aa laa ŋ di wɩya, amɛ ma bɩ mɩɩgɩ hal.

english_verse: But I do have something against you! And it is this: You don't have as much love as you used to.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ ma kɩ yaa ʋ bɩ fɩyɛlɩ ŋ teŋ. Kyori hʋ ma fa aa kana saŋa hʋ ma aa buŋ laa ŋ wɩya di, ma kpaa ʋ ta rɛ.

english_verse: Think about where you have fallen from, and then turn back and do as you did at first. If you don't turn back, I will come and take away your lampstand.
translation_verse: Ma liisi mʋ na lee hʋ tɩyaŋ ma fa aa we aŋ na ŋmaa naaŋ? Ma bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ a mɩɩgɩ kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ ma fa aa yaa buŋbuŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ gɛɛ daa, ŋ sɩ ko kaŋ ma fɩŋtɩŋdaaŋ hʋ kpa ʋ lɩsɩnɩɩ.

english_verse: But there is one thing you are doing right. You hate what the Nicolaitans are doing, and so do I.
translation_verse: Amɛ wɩɩ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ rɛ ma kɩ yaa a maga dɩ ŋ bigisi ma: Ma haasɩ Nikɔlaata nala hʋ wɩyaalɩya rɛ anɩɩ ŋ mɛ aa haasɩ ba wɩyaalɩya gɛɛ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. I will let everyone who wins the victory eat from the life-giving tree in God's wonderful garden. The Letter to Smyrna
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa kaŋ dɩgɩna, ma wuwoli ma dɩgɩna a nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa basa tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Esɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ wuwo yuwo di, ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ di tɩya hʋ nɔnɔ aa tɩya mɩɩbol aa we Wɩɩsɩ dipolo hʋ tɩyaŋ.” Wɩya hʋ ba aa saba tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ aa laŋŋɩ Sɩmɛɛna tɩyaŋ

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Smyrna: I am the first and the last. I died, but now I am alive! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ŋ a baa, “Sabɩ wɩɩ no tɩya sɩlaal hʋ aa deŋ Krisitabiisi hʋ aa laŋŋɩ Sɩmɛɛna tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ no lɩɩ mɩyaŋ nal hʋ aa yaa wɩɩ buloŋ lipiilii abee wɩɩ buloŋ lɩtenii lee rɛ. Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa nal hʋ aa sʋba aŋ bɩl sii sʋʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I know how much you suffer and how poor you are, but you are rich. I also know the cruel things being said about you by people who claim to be God's people. But they are not really God's people. They are a group that belongs to Satan.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩŋ wɩgyʋʋlɩya hʋ aa gyʋʋ ma rɛ. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma yaa nyaaba rɛ amɛ Wɩɩsɩ kɛ lee, ma yaa kɩna tɩmma rɛ. Ŋ gyɩŋ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ nala badɔmɔŋ aa kpaa kɩ kyogi ma feŋ nɛ. Nala no kpaa ba tɩɩ anɩɩ ba yaa Gyuuma rɛ aŋ bɩ yaa Gyuuma. Ba yaa Sɩtaanɩ noŋ nala rɛ.

english_verse: Don't worry about what you will suffer. The devil will throw some of you into jail, and you will be tested and made to suffer for ten days. But if you are faithful until you die, I will reward you with a glorious life.
translation_verse: Ma ta leŋ dɩ tʋwara kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ ma aa kyɛ dɩ ma na wɩya yaa ma kambɩŋ. Ma gyegili nɩɩ daha! Sɩtaanɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ba kasɩ ma badɔmɔŋ tɔ dɩɩsɩ tɩyaŋ. Wɩya no buloŋ tɩyaŋ, ʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ magɩsɩ ma na rɛ gɛɛ. Ma sɩ na tʋwara kyɛyɛ fi dʋŋ. Dɩ ba aa rɛ ko kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba kpʋ ma mɛ, ma kɛ ha sɩŋ ŋ hal. Dɩ mamaa rɛ yaa gɛɛ, ŋ sɩ kpa mɩɩbol a siili ma.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. Whoever wins the victory will not be hurt by the second death. The Letter to Pergamum
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa kaŋ dɩgɩna, ma wuwoli ma dɩgɩna a nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa basa kɩ tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Esɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ wuwo yuwo di, ʋ bɩ sɩ sʋba sʋʋbʋlɩya hʋ.” Wɩya hʋ ba aa saba tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ aa laŋŋɩ Pɛgamɔŋ tɩyaŋ

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Pergamum: I am the one who has the sharp double-edged sword! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ŋ a baa, “Sabɩ wɩɩ no tɩya sɩlaal hʋ aa deŋ Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Pɛgamɔŋ tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ no lɩɩ mɩyaŋ nal hʋ aa kaŋ takoobii hʋ nyʋʋsɩ balɩya buloŋ aa di nyamanyama lee rɛ.

english_verse: I know you live where Satan has his throne. But you have kept true to my name. Right there where Satan lives, my faithful witness Antipas was taken from you and put to death. Even then you did not give up your faith in me.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩŋ lee hʋ tɩyaŋ ma aa wee rɛ. Doŋ nɛ yaa lee hʋ Sɩtaanɩ kuworikpasa aa sɩna. Amɛ ma kaŋ wɩtɩɩ rɛ abeel-ŋ. Haalɩ abee saŋa hʋ ba aa kpʋʋ Aŋtɩpasɩ, nal hʋ aa basɩ ŋ wɩya abee wɩtɩɩ buloŋ mɛ, ka ma ha bɩ vɩya ŋ hal tɩŋɩɩ doŋ.

english_verse: I do have a few things against you. Some of you are following the teaching of Balaam. Long ago he told Balak to teach the people of Israel to eat food that had been offered to idols and to be immoral.
translation_verse: Ma aa yaa kuwokeri rɛ, amɛ wɩya baŋmana rɛ ma kɩ yaa ŋ teŋ bɩ fɩyɛla. Nala badɔmɔŋ we ma tɩyaŋ a kɩ tɩŋ wɩya hʋ Baalam gyɩ aa daga. Ʋ gyɩ daga kuwori Balaki rɛ ɛɛ hʋ ʋ aa sɩ mʋrɩ Iziral tɩmma we wɩbɔmɔ yayɩ tɩyaŋ, ʋ gyɩ mʋrɩ kaŋ ba we ba kɩ di kɩna ba aa kpaa marɩ vʋga, aŋ kɩ sɔnnɩ mɛ.

english_verse: Now some of you are following the teaching of the Nicolaitans.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ tɩɩ rɛ nala badɔmɔŋ we ma tɩyaŋ a mɛ kɩ tɩŋ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ Nikɔlaata nala hʋ aa dagɩ.

english_verse: Turn back! If you don't, I will come quickly and fight against these people. And my words will cut like a sword.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, ma bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ wɩya no tɩyaŋ, dɩ gɛɛ daa ʋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ ka dɩ ŋ ko ma tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ takoobii hʋ aa lɩɩ ŋ nyʋwa tɩyaŋ, dɩ ŋ bee nala hʋ aa yaa wɩya no kyeŋ dɔmɔŋ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. To everyone who wins the victory, I will give some of the hidden food. I will also give each one a white stone with a new name written on it. No one will know that name except the one who is given the stone. The Letter to Thyatira
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa kaŋ dɩgɩna, ma wuwoli ma dɩgɩna a nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Esɩya paalʋʋ tɩyaŋ. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa wuwo yuwo di Sɩtaanɩ, ŋ sɩ kpa kɩdiiliye hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ mana aa faŋa wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ badɔmɔŋ a tɩya ʋ, a kpa bʋpʋlʋŋ mɛ a tɩya ʋ. Ŋ sɩ sabɩ feŋfalɩɩ a mal bʋyɩ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ gyɩŋ feŋ hʋ, see nal hʋ aa laa bʋyɩ hʋ dʋŋ.” Wɩya hʋ ba aa saba tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ aa laŋŋɩ Tiyatira tɩyaŋ

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Thyatira: I am the Son of God! My eyes are like flames of fire, and my feet are like bronze. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ŋ abaa, “Sabɩ wɩɩ no tɩya sɩlaal hʋ aa deŋ Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Tiyatira tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ no lɩɩ mɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ Biye lee rɛ, mɩyaŋ nal hʋ sɩya aa kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ diŋgel, ka ŋ naasɩ mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kɔlɩɩ ba aa waaga ʋ kɩ tʋla kɩŋkaŋ.

english_verse: But I still have something against you because of that woman Jezebel. She calls herself a prophet, and you let her teach and mislead my servants to do immoral things and to eat food offered to idols.
translation_verse: Ma aa yaa kuwokeri rɛ. Amɛ wɩya baŋmana rɛ ma kɩ yaa ŋ teŋ bɩ fɩyɛla. Haaŋ kɩdɩgɩ rɛ we ma tɩyaŋ a kɩ daga wɩbɔmɔ, ba kɩ yɩrɩ Gyesibɛl, ka ma bɩ kile ʋ ta. Haaŋ no aa mʋrɩ nala rɛ anɩɩ ʋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaal lɛ. Ʋ aa daga ŋ nala rɛ a mʋrɩ ba we ba kɩ sɔnnɩ aŋ kɩ di vʋga kɩna mɛ.

english_verse: I gave her a chance to turn from her sins, but she did not want to stop doing these immoral things.
translation_verse: Ŋ tɩya haaŋ no ŋmanɩɩ rɛ dɩ ʋ bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ʋ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ tɩyaŋ, ka ʋ vɩya aŋ ha kɩ yaa nɩlaaŋ wɩya.

english_verse: I am going to strike down Jezebel. Everyone who does these immoral things with her will also be punished, if they don't stop.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ pɩŋ wɩɩla. Nala hʋ mɛ buloŋ aa kana ʋ kɩ sɔnnɩ, ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ba mɛ na tʋwara yʋga, dɩ ba aa rɛ ko bɩ bɩrɩma lɩɩ ba wɩbɔmɔ hʋ ba aa yaa tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I will even kill her followers. Then all the churches will see that I know everyone's thoughts and feelings. I will treat each of you as you deserve.
translation_verse: Ŋ sɩ kpʋ ʋ hatɩnna mɛ buloŋ, dɩ nala hʋ aa laa Yesu wɩya di buloŋ gyɩma anɩɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ gyɩŋ nal buloŋ hakɩla abee ba tɩbɩɩna, a gyɩma mɛ anɩɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ sɩ tuŋ nal kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ a maga gɛɛ ʋ tɩɩna aa tʋma.

english_verse: Some of you in Thyatira don't follow Jezebel's teaching. You don't know anything about what her followers call the “deep secrets of Satan.” So I won't burden you down with any other commands.
translation_verse: Amɛ ma nɩkaalɩya hʋ aa we Tiyatira tɩyaŋ a bee tɩŋ wɩya hʋ haaŋ no aa dagɩ aŋ bɩ gʋnnɩ wɩbɔmɔ hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Sɩtaanɩ wɩfaŋɩya memiye aa luŋiye, ŋ bee kyɛ dɩ ŋ kpa kyʋgɩyoho kyʋgɩ ma. Wɩɩ no dʋŋ nɛ ŋ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ kpa tɩya ma:

english_verse: But until I come, you must hold firmly to the teaching you have.
translation_verse: Wɩtɩɩ hʋ ma aa tɩŋ, ma kɩ tɩŋa ʋ weliŋ a mʋ pele kyɛɛ hʋ ŋ aa sɩ ko.

english_verse: I will give power over the nations to everyone who wins the victory and keeps on obeying me until the end.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ wuwo yuwo di, aŋ kɩ tɩŋa ŋ kyɛrɩ, a kaŋ kɩ mʋ dʋnɩya lɩtenii, dee hʋ ŋ kuwo aa kpaa tɩya ŋ, ʋ tɩɩ rɛ ŋ mɛ sɩ kpa tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches.
translation_verse: Nala hʋ aa kaŋ dɩgɩna, ma wuwoli ma dɩgɩna a nɩɩ wɩya hʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa basɩ kɩ tɩya Krisitabiisi hʋ.”

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Sardis: I have the seven spirits of God and the seven stars. Listen to what I say. I know what you are doing. Everyone may think you are alive, but you are dead.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ŋ abaa, “Sabɩ wɩɩ no tɩya sɩlaal hʋ aa deŋ Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Saadiisi tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ no lɩɩ mɩyaŋ nal hʋ aa kaŋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa kaŋ de-iriŋma bapɛ abee kyɩŋwʋlɩya bapɛ hʋ lee rɛ. Ŋ gyɩŋ ma wɩyaalɩya buloŋ nɛ. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma kaŋ feŋbal lɛ anɩɩ ma weye rɛ, amɛ ma sʋba rɛ.

english_verse: Wake up! You have only a little strength left, and it is almost gone. So try to become stronger. I have found that you are not completely obeying God.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, ma sii sɩŋ bɩŋbaŋ, a marɩ kaŋ wɩkaalɩya hʋ ma aa kana ma laadii tɩyaŋ ba mɛ kɩ kyɛ dɩ ba sʋba hʋ weliŋ, dɩ ba mɛ ta ko sʋba teŋ. Beewɩya ŋ naa anɩɩ ma wɩyaalɩya ha bee su Wɩɩsɩ hʋ ŋ aa tɩŋ sɩɩ.

english_verse: Remember the teaching you were given and heard. Hold firmly to it and turn from your sins. If you don't wake up, I will come when you least expect it, just as a thief does.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, ma liisi wɩya hʋ ba aa daga ma abee wɩya hʋ ma aa nɩya a laa di. Ma kɩ tɩŋ ba weliŋ aŋ bɩrɩmɩ lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ. Dɩ mamaa rɛ ko bɩ sii sɩŋ bɩŋbaŋ, ŋ sɩ lʋwɔlɩ ko ma tɩyaŋ anɩɩ gaal. Ma paalɩ bɩ sɩ gyɩŋ saŋa hʋ ŋ aa sɩ ko.

english_verse: A few of you in Sardis have not dirtied your clothes with sin. You will walk with me in white clothes, because you are worthy.
translation_verse: Abee gɛɛ buloŋ, nala baŋmana ha we Saadiisi tɩyaŋ a yaa nala aa bɩ leŋ bisiŋ laga ba. Ba aa rɛ sɩ laalɩ gapʋllɩ, a kɩ tɩŋa ŋ hal, beewɩya ba maga gɛɛ rɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will wear white clothes. Their names will not be erased from the book of life, and I will tell my Father and his angels that they are my followers.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa wuwo yuwo di, ʋ tɩɩna mɛ sɩ laalɩ gapʋlʋŋ. Ŋ bɩ sɩ dɩsɩ ʋ feŋ ta Mɩɩbol Teŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ŋ sɩ suri ŋ nyʋwa ŋ Kuwo Wɩɩsɩ abee ʋ malɩkasɩ sɩya tɩyaŋ a basɩ anɩɩ ʋ yaa ŋ nal lɛ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Philadelphia: I am the one who is holy and true, and I have the keys that belonged to David. When I open a door, no one can close it. And when I close a door, no one can open it. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ŋ abaa, “Sabɩ wɩɩ no a kaŋ mʋ tɩya sɩlaal hʋ aa deŋ Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Filadelfiya tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ no lɩɩ mɩyaŋ nal hʋ aa yaa Tɩpʋlʋŋ tɩɩna abee Wɩtɩɩ tɩɩna lee rɛ. Mɩyaŋ nɛ kol Deviti koro hʋ saafɩɩbii. Dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko kaŋ ʋ dimbee suri, nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo kana ʋ tɔ, dɩ mɩyaŋ nɛ ko kaŋ ʋ dimbee tɔ mɛ, nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo kana ʋ suri.

english_verse: I know everything you have done. And I have placed before you an open door no one can close. You were not very strong, but you obeyed my message and did not deny you are my followers.
translation_verse: Ŋ gyɩŋ ma wɩyaalɩya buloŋ nɛ. Ŋ gyɩma anɩɩ ma bɩ kaŋ dee yʋga, amɛ ma tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa rɛ a bɩ tʋwa mɛ anɩɩ ma yaa ŋ nala rɛ saŋa no buloŋ. Ɛɛ nyuniŋ, ŋ kaŋ boro rɛ a suri tɩya ma, nal buloŋ bɩ sɩ wuwo kana ʋ tɔ.

english_verse: Now you will see what I will do with those people who belong to Satan's group. They claim to be God's people, but they are liars. I will make them come and kneel down at your feet. Then they will know that I love you.
translation_verse: Ma gyegili nɩɩ daha! Haŋ Sɩtaanɩ noŋ nala hʋ aa nyɩya wɩya anɩɩ ba yaa Gyuuma rɛ aŋ bɩ yaa Gyuuma hʋ, ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ba ko tuu gbinni ma sɩya tɩyaŋ, dɩ ba gyɩma anɩɩ ŋ kyo ma rɛ.

english_verse: You obeyed my message and endured. So I will protect you from the time of testing everyone in all the world must go through.
translation_verse: Akuu ma aa tɩŋa ŋ nyʋwa a kaŋ mala hʋ ŋ aa baa ma kana wɩya, ŋ mɛ sɩ pɔ ma weliŋ a lɩɩ ma tʋwara hʋ aa sɩ ko dʋnɩya nala buloŋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ magɩsɩ nala buloŋ aa we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ na.

english_verse: I am coming soon. So hold firmly to what you have, and no one will take away the crown you will be given as your reward.
translation_verse: Ʋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ ka dɩ ŋ ko. Wɩɩ hʋ ma aa kana, ma marɩ kana ʋ weliŋ, dɩ nal buloŋ ta ko kaŋ kuworinyupugi hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa sɩ kpa siili ma a fasɩ.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will be made into a pillar in the temple of my God, and they will stay there forever. I will write on each of them the name of my God and the name of his city. It is the new Jerusalem my God will send down from heaven. I will also write on them my own new name.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ buloŋ aa sɩ wuwo yuwo di, ŋ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ligi Wɩɩsɩ hʋ ŋ aa tɩŋ wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya tɩyaŋ, lee hʋ ʋ aa bɩ sɩ maakyiye lɩɩ. Ŋ sɩ sabɩ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ ŋ aa tɩŋ feŋ a mal ʋ tɩyaŋ, a sabɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɔbal hʋ feŋ mɛ mal ʋ tɩyaŋ. Tɔbal no rɛ yaa Gyerusalɛm falɩɩ hʋ aa sɩ lɩɩ wɩɩsɩbee ko tuu. Ŋ sɩ sabɩ ŋ tɩɩ feŋfalɩɩ mɛ a mal ʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Laodicea: I am the one called Amen! I am the faithful and true witness and the source of God's creation. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ŋ abaa, “Sabɩ wɩɩ no tɩya sɩlaal hʋ aa deŋ Krisitabiisi hʋ aa we Lawudisɩya tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩ no lɩɩ mɩyaŋ nal hʋ aa leŋ Wɩɩsɩ wɩbasɩɩ buloŋ yaa lee rɛ. Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ daŋsɩyadiil hʋ aa kaŋ wɩtɩɩ, abee nal hʋ tɩyaŋ Wɩɩsɩ aa tɩŋa a ta kɩŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: You claim to be rich and successful and to have everything you need. But you don't know how bad off you really are. You are pitiful, poor, blind, and naked.
translation_verse: Ma aa daga ma tɩɩ rɛ anɩɩ ma kaŋ kɩna rɛ, a bɩ kyɛ kɩŋ buloŋ kɩ lɔlɔ. Amɛ ma bɩ gyɩma anɩɩ ma yaa nyaaba rɛ, a yaa sikii nala, a yaa nyʋlɩma, a kaŋ teŋ bɩl mɛ.

english_verse: Buy your gold from me. It has been refined in a fire, and it will make you rich. Buy white clothes from me. Wear them and you can cover up your shameful nakedness. Buy medicine for your eyes, so you will be able to see.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ wɩya, ŋ aa kyagɩlɩ ma rɛ dɩ ma ko ŋ lee a yɔbɔ salɩŋtɩɩma ba aa wasa lɩɩ, a yaa kɩna tɩmma, a yɔbɔ gapʋllɩ mɛ a laalɩ tɔ ma hɩɩsɩ hʋ, a yɔbɔ sɩya luliye mɛ a we ma sɩya a wuwo kɩ na.

english_verse: Listen! I am standing and knocking at your door. If you hear my voice and open the door, I will come in and we will eat together.
translation_verse: Ma na, ŋ sɩŋ dimbeenyʋwa hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ a kɩ ŋmaa. Nal hʋ buloŋ aa ko nɩɩ ŋ taal a kaŋ boro hʋ suri, ŋ sɩ ko gyʋʋ ʋ lee, dɩ ŋ beel-ʋ buloŋ di kɩna.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will sit with me on my throne, just as I won the victory and sat with my Father on his throne.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa sɩ wuwo yuwo di, ŋ sɩ tɩya ʋ ŋmanɩɩ dɩ ʋ pɛ hɔŋ ŋ kuworikpasa hʋ tɩyaŋ anɩɩ ŋ mɛ aa yuwo di a pɛ hɔŋ ŋ Kuwo kuworikpasa hʋ tɩyaŋ gɛɛ.

english_verse: After this, I looked and saw a door that opened into heaven. Then the voice that had spoken to me at first and that sounded like a trumpet said, “Come up here! I will show you what must happen next.”
translation_verse: Wɩya no buloŋ aa yaa hal tɩyaŋ, ŋ bɩl deŋe dɩ ŋ naa dɩ dimbeenyʋwa suro wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ bɩl nɩɩ taal hʋ fa aa laa sɩya basɩ wɩya kɩ tɩya ŋ, a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ba aa mʋʋ kabɩl hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ŋ a baa, “Ko gyɩŋ daha dɩ ŋ daga ɩ wɩya hʋ aa sɩ yaa wɩya no hal tɩyaŋ.”

english_verse: Right then the Spirit took control of me, and there in heaven I saw a throne and someone sitting on it.
translation_verse: Haŋ lagɩlagɩbiye hʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ ko we ŋ tɩyaŋ a laa ŋ tɩŋa, a leŋ ŋ na wɩɩsɩbee, a na Wɩɩsɩ kuworikpasa hʋ dɩ ʋ sɩŋ doŋ, nal hɔŋ ʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The one who was sitting there sparkled like precious stones of jasper and carnelian. A rainbow that looked like an emerald surrounded the throne.
translation_verse: Nal hʋ fa aa hɔŋ kuworikpasa hʋ tɩyaŋ kɩ tʋla gɛɛ anɩɩ sɩfɩyaŋ bʋwa badɔmɔŋ ba aa yɩrɩ gyasɩpa abee kanɛɛlɩyaŋ. Ka dosiye mɛ baarɩ kuworikpasa hʋ ko baŋ a kɩ tʋla gɛɛ anɩɩ sɩfɩyaŋ bʋyɩ hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ ɛmaraldi.

english_verse: Twenty-four other thrones were in a circle around that throne. And on each of these thrones there was an elder dressed in white clothes and wearing a gold crown.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka ŋ na kuworikpasɩnɩ mɔlɩya abee banaa mɛ dɩ ba sɩŋ gol kuworikpasa hʋ. Nɩhɩyasɩ mɔlɩya abee banaa hɔŋ ba tɩyaŋ, a laalɩ gapʋllɩ, a kyige salma kuworinyupugini.

english_verse: Flashes of lightning and roars of thunder came out from the throne in the center of the circle. Seven torches, which are the seven spirits of God, were burning in front of the throne.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka kuworikpasa hʋ lɩsɩnɩɩ kɩ lɩgɩsɩ anɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ duwoŋ, ka kyagɩŋsɩ mɛ aa kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ duwoŋ aa nɔsɔ lɩɩ kpasa hʋ lee. Ɛɛ rɛ ka fɩŋtɩŋsɩ bapɛ ba aa kyolo mɛ sɩŋ kuworikpasa hʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ. Fɩŋtɩŋsɩ no rɛ yaa Wɩɩsɩ Wiyesi Welii hʋ aa kaŋ de-iriŋma bapɛ hʋ.

english_verse: Also in front of the throne was something that looked like a glass sea, clear as crystal. Around the throne in the center were four living creatures covered front and back with eyes.
translation_verse: Ka kɩŋ kɩdɩgɩ pɩŋ kuworikpasa hʋ sɩya a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ mpʋwɔnʋʋ, a pʋrɩsɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ duwoŋbʋyɩ, aŋ kyaanɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nyagɩsa. Ka kɩweye banaa badɔmɔŋ sɩŋ baarɩ kuworikpasa hʋ ko baŋ, ka sɩya tɔ ba hala abee ba sɩya dɩɩlaŋ buloŋ.

english_verse: The first creature was like a lion, the second one was like a bull, the third one had the face of a human, and the fourth was like a flying eagle.
translation_verse: Kɩweye banaa hʋ kɩdɩgɩ gyɩ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ naakyigi, kɩdɩgɩ mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nɔboliye, kɩdɩgɩ sɩya mɔgɩ mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nihuwobiŋ sɩya, ka kɩdɩgɩ mɛ kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kakyuu aa gyaarɩ.

english_verse: “Our Lord and God, you are worthy to receive glory, honor, and power. You created all things, and by your decision they are and were created.”
translation_verse: “Á Tɩɩna abee á Wɩɩsɩ, ʋ maga dɩ á kɩ kyʋwalɩ ɩ rɛ, á kɩ dannɩ ɩ, a kɩ yɩrɩ ɩ feŋ, Ɩ rɛ yaa Dee buloŋ Tɩɩna. Ɩ rɛ taa kɩŋ buloŋ, Ɩ kyɛrɩ tɩyaŋ nɛ ɩ ta ba, ba kaŋ mɩɩbol.”

english_verse: In the right hand of the one sitting on the throne I saw a scroll that had writing on the inside and on the outside. And it was sealed in seven places.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka ŋ bɩl na dɩ nal hʋ aa hɔŋ kuworikpasa hʋ tɩyaŋ, dɩ ʋ kol teŋkulii ʋ noduu noŋ tɩyaŋ. Ba sabɩ kɩna we teŋ hʋ tɩya abee ʋ hal buloŋ tɩyaŋ, aŋ kpa kel taarɩ tɔ teŋ hʋ leye bapɛ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I saw a mighty angel ask with a loud voice, “Who is worthy to open the scroll and break its seals?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ na malɩkaduwo kɩdɩgɩ dɩ ʋ heele a kɩ pɩyɛsɩ, “Kɩbee rɛ maga ʋ aa sɩ wuwo kaŋ kelni hʋ ba aa kaŋ taarɩ teŋkulii hʋ tɔ a tɔrɩ, aŋ suri teŋ hʋ?”

english_verse: No one in heaven or on earth or under the earth was able to open the scroll or look inside it.
translation_verse: Amɛ nal buloŋ fa tuwo wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ, koo taŋha nyuu tɩyaŋ koo taŋha memii tɩyaŋ a maga ʋ aa sɩ wuwo suri teŋ hʋ, a deŋ ʋ tɩya.

english_verse: I cried hard because no one was found worthy to open the scroll or look inside it.
translation_verse: Ŋ aa naa dɩ nal buloŋ tuwo a maga ʋ aa sɩ wuwo suri teŋ hʋ, koo a deŋ ʋ tɩya gɛɛ, ŋ wɩɩ weliŋ.

english_verse: Then one of the elders said to me, “Stop crying and look! The one who is called both the ‘Lion from the Tribe of Judah’ and ‘King David's Great Descendant’ has won the victory. He will open the scroll and its seven seals.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ kɩdɩgɩ basɩ tɩya ŋ a baa, “Ta kɩ wiye. Deŋ na! Nal hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ Gyuda doho nala Naakyigi hʋ, Deviti nihii hʋ aa yaa nɩbal, ʋ yuwo di rɛ, ɛɛwɩya ʋ aa wuwo ʋ tɔrɩ kelni hʋ bapɛ ba aa kaŋ taarɩ teŋ hʋ tɔ rɛ, aŋ suri ʋ.

english_verse: Then I looked and saw a Lamb standing in the center of the throne surrounded by the four living creatures and the elders. The Lamb looked as if it had once been killed. It had seven horns and seven eyes, which are the seven spirits of God, sent out to all the earth.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ deŋ a na Pebiye dɩ ʋ sɩŋ kuworikpasa hʋ abee kɩweye hʋ banaa abee nɩhɩyasɩ mɔlɩya bee banaa hʋ tʋtʋʋ, a kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ba fa aa kpʋ ʋ. Ʋ fa kaŋ nyɩŋdaasɩ bapɛ rɛ abee sɩya bapɛ. Sɩya hʋ bapɛ rɛ yaa Wiyesi Welii aa kaŋ de-iriŋma bapɛ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa taa ʋ ko tuu dʋnɩya logiŋ kɛ buloŋ.

english_verse: The Lamb went over and took the scroll from the right hand of the one who sat on the throne.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pebiye hʋ mʋ laa teŋ hʋ nal hʋ aa hɔŋ kuworikpasa hʋ nyuu noduu noŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: You let them become kings and serve God as priests, and they will rule on earth.”
translation_verse: Ɩ leŋ nala hʋ ɩ aa yɔbɔ yaa kuwori doho rɛ a yaa wɩɩkyʋwal sɩlaala a tʋma kɩ tɩya Wɩɩsɩ. Ba sɩ kɩ deŋ taŋha buloŋ.”

english_verse: As I looked, I heard the voices of a large number of angels around the throne and the voices of the living creatures and of the elders. There were millions and millions of them,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ nɩɩ malɩkasɩ aa pele tusi tusi aa sɩŋ gol kuworikpasa hʋ abee kɩweye hʋ abee nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ dɩ ba aa yɩɩ yɩɩla ba kɩ gyɩŋ,

english_verse: and they were saying in a loud voice, “The Lamb who was killed is worthy to receive power, riches, wisdom, strength, honor, glory, and praise.”
translation_verse: a baa: “Pebiye hʋ ba aa kpʋwa rɛ maga dɩ ʋ kaŋ dee. Ʋ rɛ maga dɩ ʋ kaŋ dʋwa, abee wɩgyʋŋ, abee dee kɩŋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ʋ rɛ maga dɩ ʋ kaŋ feŋbal, dɩ nala kɩ dannɩ ʋ a kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ.”

english_verse: Then I heard all beings in heaven and on the earth and under the earth and in the sea offer praise. Together, all of them were saying, “Praise, honor, glory, and strength forever and ever to the one who sits on the throne and to the Lamb!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka ŋ nɩɩ kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa we wɩɩsɩbee tɩyaŋ, abee kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa we dʋnɩya tɩyaŋ, abee kɩna hʋ aa we taŋha memii tɩyaŋ, abee kɩna hʋ buloŋ aa we mpʋwɔnʋʋ tɩyaŋ, abee kɩŋ kɛ buloŋ aa we doŋ dɩ ba aa yɩɩ yɩɩl a baa, “Nal hʋ aa hɔŋ kuworikpasa hʋ tɩyaŋ abee Pebiye hʋ, ba aa rɛ maga dɩ á kɩ kyʋwalɩ ba, a kɩ tɩya ba feŋ, a kɩ dannɩ ba. Ba aa rɛ kaŋ dee kɩŋ buloŋ nyuu tɩyaŋ, a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ.”

english_verse: The four living creatures said “Amen,” while the elders knelt down and worshiped.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ kɩweye hʋ banaa mɛ yaa amɩ kɩ we, ka nɩhɩyasɩ mɔlɩya bee banaa hʋ mɛ tuu gbinni a kyʋwalɩ ʋ.

english_verse: At the same time I saw the Lamb open the first of the seven seals, I heard one of the four living creatures shout with a voice like thunder. It said, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ na dɩ Pebiye hʋ kaŋ kelni bapɛ hʋ laasɩya kɩŋ a kaŋ tɔrɩ. Nyɛ rɛ ŋ nɩɩ dɩ kɩweye hʋ banaa kɩdɩgɩ yɩra, ʋ taal kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ duwoŋ aa nɔsɔ, a baa “ko!”

english_verse: Then I saw a white horse. Its rider carried a bow and was given a crown. He had already won some victories, and he went out to win more.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ deŋ, a na gyapʋlʋŋ. Nal hʋ aa gyɩna ʋ kol too, ka ba kpa kuworinyupugi tɩya ʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ lɩɩ mʋ anɩɩ bayuwol aa yuwo kɩ di saŋa buloŋ, dɩ ʋ yuwo yuwo a di ʋ dɔmɔ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the second seal, I heard the second living creature say, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pebiye hʋ bɩl kaŋ kelni hʋ kɩlɩya tɩɩna a kaŋ tɔrɩ. Doŋ nɛ ŋ bɩl nɩɩ dɩ kɩweye hʋ banaa lɩya tɩɩna mɛ yɩra a baa, “ko!”

english_verse: Then another horse came out. It was fiery red. And its rider was given the power to take away all peace from the earth, so people would slaughter one another. He was also given a big sword.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ gyaagʋ kɩdɩgɩ mɛ ko lɩɩ, a yaa gyafɩyaŋ. Doŋ nɛ ba kpa dee tɩya nal hʋ aa gyɩna ʋ, dɩ ʋ kaŋ yuwo ko dʋnɩya, dɩ nala kɩ yuwo dɔmɔŋ a kɩ kpʋ dɔmɔŋ. Ba gyɩ kpaa takoobibal lɛ a tɩya ʋ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the third seal, I heard the third living creature say, “Come out!” Then I saw a black horse, and its rider had a balance scale in one hand.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pebiye hʋ bɩl kaŋ kelni hʋ kɩtoo tɩɩna a kaŋ tɔrɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ nɩɩ dɩ kɩweye hʋ too tɩɩna mɛ yɩra a baa, “Ko!” Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ deŋ, a na gyabiŋ. Nal hʋ aa gyɩna ʋ kol sanɩya ʋ noŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: I heard what sounded like a voice from somewhere among the four living creatures. It said, “A liter of wheat will cost you a whole day's wages! Three liters of barley will cost you a day's wages too. But don't ruin the olive oil or the wine.”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ nɩɩ wɩɩ aa kɩɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nal taal, a lɩɩ kɩweye hʋ banaa tʋtʋʋ tɩyaŋ, a baa, “Ba sɩ yallɩ nasaarɩmɩya kʋrʋba a maga baadee tʋŋtʋnnɩ kyɛpiliŋ tuno, ka dɩ ba yallɩ mɩkʋrʋba boto mɛ a maga baadee tʋŋtʋnnɩ kyɛpiliŋ tuno. Amɛ ma ta kyogi nʋʋ bee sɩŋ yalɩɩ kɛ nyɛ.”

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth living creature say, “Come out!”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Pebiye hʋ bɩl kaŋ kelni kɩnaa tɩɩna a kaŋ tɔrɩ. Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ nɩɩ dɩ kɩweye hʋ kɩnaa tɩɩna mɛ yɩra a baa, “ko!”

english_verse: Then I saw a pale green horse. Its rider was named Death, and Death's Kingdom followed close behind. They were given power over one fourth of the earth, and they could kill its people with swords, famines, diseases, and wild animals.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ deŋ a na gyakɔŋ-kpɩlɩlɩ kɩdɩgɩ. Nal hʋ aa gyɩna ʋ feŋ nɛ yaa Sʋʋ, ka lalɩyabee kɩ tɩŋ ʋ hal. Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ tɩya ba dee dɩ ba kpa yuwo abee losi abee wɩɩla abee ɔhɔ-kɩna a kpʋ nihuwobisi buloŋ aa we dʋnɩya ba aa kaŋ kpaa leye banaa lɩdɩgɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: When the Lamb opened the fifth seal, I saw under the altar the souls of everyone who had been killed for speaking God's message and telling about their faith.
translation_verse: Pebiye hʋ aa kaŋ kelni hʋ kɩnɔɔ tɩɩna a kaŋ tɔrɩ, ɛɛ rɛ ŋ deŋ a na nala ba aa kpʋwa dʋŋsɩ dɩ ba we kogu hʋ ba aa kpaa wɩɩsʋllɩ kɩna kɩ nyɔgɔ memii tɩyaŋ. Nala no fa aa basɩ Wɩɩsɩ wɩya rɛ abee wɩtɩɩ aŋ bɩ bɩla hal, ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba kpʋ ba.

english_verse: They shouted, “Master, you are holy and faithful! How long will it be before you judge and punish the people of this earth who killed us?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba ŋmaa nyʋwa baŋ baŋ baŋ a baa, “Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩgyoribakɔɔ, Ɩ yaa Tɩpʋlʋŋ Tɩɩna rɛ a kaŋ wɩtɩɩ mɛ, kyɛbee rɛ ɩ tɩɩ sɩ di dʋnɩya nala hʋ aa kpʋ ma sarɩya, a dɔgɩsɩ ba?”

english_verse: Then each of those who had been killed was given a white robe and told to rest for a little while. They had to wait until the complete number of the Lord's other servants and followers would be killed.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wɩɩsɩ kpa gapʋlʋŋ a tɩya ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ aŋ basɩ tɩya ba dɩ ba gyegili mʋhʋ tʋlɩɩ, dɩ ba kpʋ ba tʋŋtʋnnɩ-dɔŋtɩŋsɩ abee ba nɩmmabalɩya hʋ badɔmɔŋ mɛ anɩɩ gɛɛ ba aa kpʋʋ ba, a maga gɛɛ Wɩɩsɩ aa magɩlɩ biŋ.

english_verse: When I saw the Lamb open the sixth seal, I looked and saw a great earthquake. The sun turned as dark as sackcloth, and the moon became red as blood.
translation_verse: Pebiye hʋ aa kaŋ kelni hʋ kɩdʋʋ tɩɩna a kaŋ tɔrɩ, ŋ na dɩ taŋha gyegile yʋga. Ɛɛ rɛ wɩɩpɔsɩɩ buloŋ bil gɛɛ timm anɩɩ gabiŋyohi, pene buloŋ mɛ fɩyɛsɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ kyal.

english_verse: The stars in the sky fell to earth, just like figs shaken loose by a windstorm.
translation_verse: Ka kyɩŋwʋlɩya lɩɩ wɩɩsɩnyuu a ko tuu kɩ tele taŋha anɩɩ puwoduwo aa kyɩrɩ pil-huwoni kɩ lo taŋha gɛɛ.

english_verse: Then the sky was rolled up like a scroll, and all mountains and islands were moved from their places.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ wɩɩsɩnyuu buloŋ nyʋgɩsɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ ba aa kaŋ wasa kulo kpa dɩgɩ dʋŋ. Dogiŋsi abee fuwokpoŋiye buloŋ sii ba liweeliye tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The kings of the earth, its famous people, and its military leaders hid in caves or behind rocks on the mountains. They hid there together with the rich and the powerful and with all the slaves and free people.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ dʋnɩya kuworo, abee paalʋʋ didenne, abee laalyuwolhɩyasɩ, abee kɩna tɩmma, abee nɩbala, abee nala buloŋ, yosi abee nala hʋ aa tɩŋ ba tɩɩma, ba buloŋ fá gyʋʋ faŋa dogiŋsi bʋbʋʋsɩ abee bʋpagɩsɩ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Then they shouted to the mountains and the rocks, “Fall on us! Hide us from the one who sits on the throne and from the anger of the Lamb.
translation_verse: Aŋ kɩ yɩrɩ dogiŋsi hʋ abee bʋwa hʋ abaa, “Ma tele tɔ ma dɩ nal hʋ aa hɔŋ kuworikpasa hʋ nyuu ta naa ma, dɩ Pebiye hʋ mɛ ta dɔgɩsɩ ma,

english_verse: That terrible day has come! God and the Lamb will show their anger, and who can face it?”
translation_verse: Beewɩya kyɛɛ hʋ ba aa sɩ daga ba baaŋ dʋnɩya nala nyuu tɩyaŋ pele rɛ. Nal buloŋ tuwo aa sɩ wuwo sɩŋ ba sɩya.”

english_verse: from Benjamin. People from Every Nation
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa hʋ aa bɩ kaŋ dɩɩsɩɩ

english_verse: After this I saw four angels. Each one was standing on one of the earth's four corners. The angels held back the four winds, so that no wind would blow on the earth or on the sea or on any tree. These angels had also been given the power to harm the earth and the sea. Then I saw another angel come up from where the sun rises in the east, and he was ready to put the mark of the living God on people. He shouted to the four angels,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ka ŋ na malɩka kɩdɩgɩ dɩ ʋ lɩɩ wɩɩpɔsɩɩ dɩɩlaŋ a ko kɩ gyɩŋ wɩɩsɩnyuu, a kol kɩŋ hʋ Wɩɩsɩ hʋ aa weye aa kaŋ magɩlɩ ʋ nala. Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ huwori yɩrɩ malɩkasɩ hʋ banaa Wɩɩsɩ fa aa tɩya ba dee dɩ ba kyogi taŋha abee mpʋwɔnʋʋ hʋ,

english_verse: “Don't harm the earth or the sea or any tree! Wait until I have marked the foreheads of the servants of our God.”
translation_verse: a basɩ tɩya ba abaa, “Ma ha ta ko kyogi taŋha koo mpʋwɔnʋʋ koo tɩɩsɩ, see dɩ á magɩlɩ á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnna ba tilli tɩyaŋ a teŋ.”

english_verse: Then I heard how many people had been marked on the forehead. There were
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ba daga nala hʋ Wɩɩsɩ aa magɩla nyʋwa a tɩya ŋ. Ba yaa tusi kɔɔ abee tusi mɔllɩ balɩya bee banaa rɛ (

english_verse: and said, “Amen! Praise, glory, wisdom, thanks, honor, power, and strength belong to our God forever and ever! Amen!”
translation_verse: a baa, “Amɩ. Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ kaŋ dee rɛ abee wɩgyʋŋ abee gaŋdarɩ. Ma leŋ dɩ á kɩ dannɩ ʋ, a kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ aŋgyʋwasʋ, a kɩ kpa ʋ yohuŋ a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ. Amɩ.”

english_verse: After this, I saw a large crowd with more people than could be counted. They were from every race, tribe, nation, and language, and they stood before the throne and before the Lamb. They wore white robes and held palm branches in their hands,
translation_verse: Ɛɛ hal tɩyaŋ nɛ ŋ deŋ a na nɩgyamaa badɔmɔŋ nal buloŋ aa bɩ sɩ wuwo dɩɩsɩ. Ba lɩɩ dʋnɩya logiŋ kɛ buloŋ nɛ a lɩɩ taŋhasɩ iriŋ iriŋ buloŋ, abee nihuwobisi doho iriŋ iriŋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ, a kɩ basɩ taanɩ iriŋ iriŋ buloŋ. Ŋ na dɩ ba sɩŋ kuworikpasa hʋ abee Pebiye hʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, a laalɩ gapʋlʋŋdoliye doliye, a kol abɛɛ paaponni ba nosi tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: as they shouted, “Our God, who sits upon the throne, has the power to save his people, and so does the Lamb.”
translation_verse: Nɩgyamaa hʋ yaa kyagɩŋsɩ yʋga abaa, “Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ aa hɔŋ kuworikpasa hʋ nyuu abee Pebiye hʋ, ba aa rɛ laa ma ta.”

english_verse: The angels who stood around the throne knelt in front of it with their faces to the ground. The elders and the four living creatures knelt there with them. Then they all worshiped God
translation_verse: Ka malɩkasɩ hʋ buloŋ sɩŋ gol kuworikpasa hʋ abee nɩhɩyasɩ mɔlɩya bee banaa hʋ abee kɩweye banaa hʋ. Ɛɛ rɛ malɩkasɩ hʋ aa tuu kyige pumpuŋ kuworikpasa hʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ

english_verse: One of the elders asked me, “Do you know who these people are that are dressed in white robes? Do you know where they come from?”
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ nɩhɩyasɩ hʋ kɩdɩgɩ pɩyɛsɩ ŋ a baa, “Kɩbeema rɛ laalɩ gapʋlʋŋdoliye hʋ gɛɛ, lee rɛ ba lɩɩ?”

english_verse: “Sir,” I answered, “you must know.” Then he told me: “These are the ones who have gone through the great suffering. They have washed their robes in the blood of the Lamb and have made them white.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ basɩ tɩya ʋ a baa, “Ŋ nɩhɩyawʋ, Ɩ rɛ gyɩma.” Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ŋ a baa, “Nala no rɛ Wɩɩsɩ lɩɩ tʋwarɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ. Ba aa rɛ sasɩ ba gannɩ Pebiye hʋ kyal tɩyaŋ, ba lɩɩ peretete.

english_verse: And so they stand before the throne of God and worship him in his temple day and night. The one who sits on the throne will spread his tent over them.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ tɩŋ ba sɩŋ Wɩɩsɩ kuworikpasa hʋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, a tʋma kɩ tɩya ʋ kyɛɛ bee ʋ nyʋwa buloŋ ʋ Wɩɩkyʋwaldɩɩbal hʋ tɩyaŋ. Nal hʋ aa hɔŋ kuworikpasa hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ sɩ we ba lee a kɩ pɔ ba.

english_verse: They will never hunger or thirst again, and they won't be troubled by the sun or any scorching heat.
translation_verse: Losi bɩl bɩ sɩ kaŋ ba, nɩɩnyʋwasɩ mɛ bɩ sɩ kaŋ ba, wɩɩnʋŋ bɩl bɩ sɩ nyɔgɩ ba, nʋŋ mɛ bɩl bɩ sɩ kaŋ ba.

english_verse: “The Lamb in the center of the throne will be their shepherd. He will lead them to streams of life-giving water, and God will wipe all tears from their eyes.”
