translation_verse: Malɩka hʋ gyɩ magɩsɩ bee hʋ gyebii mɛ rɛ anɩɩ nihuwobisi aa magɩsɩ kɩna gɛɛ, dɩ ʋ gyɩnɩɩ yaa naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa kɔɔsɩ balɩya abee fi bee badʋ.

english_verse: The wall was built of jasper, and the city was made of pure gold, clear as crystal.
translation_verse: Bʋyɩ hʋ ba aa yɩrɩ gyasɩpa rɛ ba kpa saa gyebii hʋ aa baarɩ bee hʋ, aŋka bee hʋ tɩɩ buloŋ kɛ yaa salma, ʋ buloŋ kyaanɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nyagɩsa.

english_verse: the fifth was onyx, the sixth was carnelian, the seventh was chrysolite, the eighth was beryl, the ninth was topaz, the tenth was chrysoprase, the eleventh was jacinth, and the twelfth was amethyst.
translation_verse: nɔɔ tɩɩna hʋ feŋ nɛ onisi, dʋʋ tɩɩna hʋ mɛ feŋ nɛ kanɛɛlɩyaŋ, pɛɛ tɩɩna hʋ mɛ feŋ nɛ kirisolati, kyori tɩɩna hʋ mɛ feŋ nɛ bɛril, nibi tɩɩna hʋ mɛ feŋ nɛ topasɩ, fi tɩɩna hʋ mɛ feŋ nɛ kirisopirasi, fi bee kɩdɩgɩ tɩɩna hʋ mɛ feŋ nɛ gyasinti, fi bee balɩya tɩɩna hʋ mɛ feŋ nɛ amɛtisi.

english_verse: Each of the twelve gates was a solid pearl. The streets of the city were made of pure gold, clear as crystal.
translation_verse: Pagɩsɩ fi bee balɩya hʋ buloŋ yaa gyiiŋbiweliye ba aa yɩrɩ pɛɛlɩsɩ fi bee balɩya rɛ, ba kpa pɛɛl-dɩgɩ a marɩ paga buloŋ. Ŋmaŋbal hʋ aa pɩŋ bee hʋ tɩyaŋ buloŋ mɛ yaa salɩŋtɩɩ dʋŋ nɛ, a kɩ kyaanɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nyagɩsa.

english_verse: I did not see a temple there. The Lord God All-Powerful and the Lamb were its temple.
translation_verse: Ŋ fa bɩ naa wɩɩkyʋwaldɩya buloŋ bee hʋ tɩyaŋ beewɩya á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, dee buloŋ tɩɩna abee Pebiye hʋ tɩɩtɩɩ we doŋ nɛ ba kɩ kyʋwalɩ ba lee kɛ buloŋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: And the city did not need the sun or the moon. The glory of God was shining on it, and the Lamb was its light.
translation_verse: Wɩɩpɔsɩɩ koo pene daa leŋ bee hʋ kyaanɩ, beewɩya Wɩɩsɩ gaŋdarɩ rɛ kyaana kɩ we ʋ tɩyaŋ, Pebiye hʋ mɛ yaa ʋ fɩŋtɩna.

english_verse: Nations will walk by the light of that city, and kings will bring their riches there.
translation_verse: Ʋ pʋlʋŋ tɩyaŋ nɛ dʋnɩya nala buloŋ sɩ we. Dʋnɩya kuworo buloŋ mɛ sɩ kaŋ ba dʋwa ko gyʋʋ ʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Its gates are always open during the day, and night never comes.
translation_verse: Ba bɩ sɩ maakyiye kaŋ bee hʋ paga tɔ kyɛɛ kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ, beewɩya tebine tuwo doŋ.

english_verse: The glorious treasures of nations will be brought into the city.
translation_verse: Ba sɩ kaŋ paalʋʋsɩ buloŋ nala dʋwa abee ba gaŋdaa-kɩna ko gyʋʋ doŋ.

english_verse: But nothing unworthy will be allowed to enter. No one who is dirty-minded or who tells lies will be there. Only those whose names are written in the Lamb's book of life will be in the city.
translation_verse: Amɛ kɩŋ kɛ buloŋ aa kaŋ bisiŋ, koo nal buloŋ aa yaa hɩɩsɩ wɩya koo a kɩ nyɩya wɩya, ba kɩdɩgɩ buloŋ bɩ sɩ maakyiye gyʋʋ bee no, see nala hʋ fene ba aa saba we Pebiye hʋ Mɩɩbol Teŋ hʋ tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The angel showed me a river that was crystal clear, and its waters gave life. The river came from the throne where God and the Lamb were seated.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ malɩka hʋ bɩl daga ŋ fuwo hʋ nɩɩ aa tɩya mɩɩbol. Ŋ na nɩɩ hʋ dɩ ʋ pʋlla gɛɛ peretete aŋ kyaanɩ gɛɛ anɩɩ nyagɩsa, a pallɩ lɩɩ Wɩɩsɩ abee Pebiye hʋ kuworikpasa hʋ tɩyaŋ,

english_verse: Then it flowed down the middle of the city's main street. On each side of the river are trees that grow a different kind of fruit each month of the year. The fruit gives life, and the leaves are used as medicine to heal the nations.
translation_verse: a tɩŋ tɔbal hʋ ŋmaŋbal tʋtʋʋ kɩ tuu, ka Mɩɩbol Tɩya hʋ mɛ sɩŋ fuwo hʋ kyolli balɩya hʋ buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Tɩya hʋ aa nɔnɔ naaŋsɩɩnyʋwa fi bee balɩya rɛ bɩna buloŋ. Ɛɛ daga nɩɩ pene buloŋ, ʋ aa nɔnɔ rɛ. Tɩya hʋ paaponni yaa luliye rɛ paalʋʋsɩ buloŋ nala ba kpa kɩ tɩɩbɩ ba tɩɩ.

english_verse: God's curse will no longer be on the people of that city. He and the Lamb will be seated there on their thrones, and its people will worship God
translation_verse: Kɩŋ kɛ buloŋ aa yaa Wɩɩsɩ sɩna bɩ sɩ we bee no tɩyaŋ. Wɩɩsɩ abee Pebiye hʋ kuworikpasa hʋ sɩ sɩŋ doŋ, ka ʋ nala kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ.

english_verse: and will see him face to face. God's name will be written on the foreheads of the people.
translation_verse: Ba sɩ na Wɩɩsɩ abee ba sɩbii, ka dɩ ʋ feŋ we ba tilli tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: Never again will night appear, and no one who lives there will ever need a lamp or the sun. The Lord God will be their light, and they will rule forever. The Coming of Christ
translation_verse: Tebine bɩl bɩ sɩ we doŋ, dɩ ba bɩl kɩ kyɛ fɩŋtɩŋsɩ koo wɩɩpɔsɩɩ, beewɩya á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ rɛ sɩ yaa ba pʋlʋŋ, ka dɩ ba di koro a kaŋ kɩ mʋ maakyiye buloŋ.

english_verse: Then I was told: These words are true and can be trusted. The Lord God controls the spirits of his prophets, and he is the one who sent his angel to show his servants what must happen very soon.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ malɩka hʋ bɩl basɩ tɩya ŋ a baa, “Wɩya no yaa wɩtɩɩ rɛ, a maga dɩ nal buloŋ laa ba di. Á Tɩɩna Wɩɩsɩ, nal hʋ aa kpa ʋ Wiyesi Welii hʋ we ʋ tɩŋdaala tɩyaŋ, ʋ rɛ tɩma ŋ dɩ ŋ ko basɩ wɩya hʋ aa bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ aŋ yaa a tɩya ʋ nala.” Yesu koyi

english_verse: Remember, I am coming soon! God will bless everyone who pays attention to the message of this book.
translation_verse: Yesu baa, “Ma na! Ŋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ ka dɩ ŋ ko! Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa tɩŋ wɩya hʋ ba aa basa teŋ no tɩyaŋ anɩɩ ba sɩ yaa lagɩlagɩ no abee maakyiye.”

english_verse: My name is John, and I am the one who heard and saw these things. Then after I had heard and seen all this, I knelt down and began to worship at the feet of the angel who had shown it to me.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ Gyɔɔŋ nɛ yaa nal hʋ aa nɩɩ aŋ na wɩya no buloŋ. Ŋ aa nɩɩ aŋ na wɩya no buloŋ ko teŋ, ŋ tuu gbinni malɩka hʋ aa kpaa wɩya no daga ŋ sɩya tɩyaŋ, a kɩ kyɛ dɩ ŋ kyʋwalɩ ʋ.

english_verse: But the angel said, Don't do that! I am a servant, just like you. I am the same as a follower or a prophet or anyone else who obeys what is written in this book. God is the one you should worship.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ ʋ basɩ tɩya ŋ abaa, “Ta yaa gɛɛ! Ŋ beel-ɩ, abee ɩ dɔŋtɩŋsɩ Wɩɩsɩ tɩŋdaala abee nala hʋ buloŋ aa tɩŋ wɩya hʋ aa we teŋ no tɩyaŋ, á buloŋ yaa Wɩɩsɩ tʋŋtʋnna rɛ. Wɩɩsɩ dʋŋ nɛ maga ɩ kɩ kyʋwalɩ ʋ.”

english_verse: Then I was told: I am coming soon! And when I come, I will reward everyone for what they have done.
translation_verse: Yesu baa, “Ma na! Ŋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ ka dɩ ŋ ko! Ŋ sɩ ko tuŋ nal buloŋ a maga wɩya hʋ ʋ aa yaa.

english_verse: I am Alpha and Omega, the first and the last, the beginning and the end.
translation_verse: Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa Alfa abee Omega, nal hʋ aa laasɩya abee nal hʋ aa laa hal, wɩɩ buloŋ lipiilii abee wɩɩ buloŋ litenii.

english_verse: God will bless all who have washed their robes. They will each have the right to eat fruit from the tree that gives life, and they can enter the gates of the city.
translation_verse: Nyusʋŋtɩmma rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa sasɩ ba gannɩ ba kyaanɩ, dɩ ba na ŋmanɩɩ a tɩŋ tɔbal hʋ pagɩsɩ a gyʋʋ bee hʋ a di mɩɩbol tɩya hʋ nɔnɔ.

english_verse: But outside the city will be dogs, witches, immoral people, murderers, idol worshipers, and everyone who loves to tell lies and do wrong.
translation_verse: Amɛ nala no iriŋ kɛ rɛ sɩ sɩŋ bee hʋ gyaŋhal tɩyaŋ. Ba aa rɛ yaa nala hʋ aa yaa bisiŋ wɩya, abee daaluliye tɩmma, abee sɔŋsɔnnɔ, abee nɩkpʋʋla, abee vʋgɩmarɩla, abee nala hʋ buloŋ aa kyo wɩnyɩyɛl a kɩ nyɩya wɩya.”

english_verse: I am Jesus! And I am the one who sent my angel to tell all of you these things for the churches. I am David's Great Descendant, and I am also the bright morning star.
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu baa, “Mɩyaŋ nɛ tɩma ŋ malɩka ma lee dɩ ʋ ko basɩ wɩya no tɩya nala hʋ aa laa ŋ wɩya di a kɩ laŋŋɩ lee buloŋ tɩyaŋ. Ŋ yaa Deviti doho nal lɛ. Mɩyaŋ nɛ yaa nɔnyʋwa aa kyaanɩ sɩgballɩnyʋwa.”

english_verse: The Spirit and the bride say, “Come!” Everyone who hears this should say, “Come!” If you are thirsty, come! If you want life-giving water, come and take it. It's free!
translation_verse: Ɛɛ rɛ Wiyesi Welii hʋ abee haaŋ hʋ Pebiye hʋ aa kyɛ dɩ ʋ kpa basɩ abaa, “Ko.” Nal hʋ buloŋ aa nɩɩ wɩɩ no, ʋ mɛ baa, “Ko.” Nal hʋ buloŋ nɩɩnyʋwasɩ a kana, ʋ ko. Nal hʋ buloŋ mɛ aa kyɛ, ʋ laa nɩɩ hʋ aa tɩya mɩɩbol ba aa kpaa kɩ tɩya waasʋ waasʋ. Wɩkateŋse

english_verse: If you take anything away from these prophecies, God will not let you have part in the life-giving tree and in the holy city described in this book.
translation_verse: Dɩ nal buloŋ mɛ rɛ ko lɩɩ wɩdɩgɩ ta wɩya no tɩyaŋ, tol hʋ ʋ aa kana Mɩɩbol Tɩya hʋ wɩya ba aa basa teŋ no tɩyaŋ nɔnɔ tɩyaŋ, Wɩɩsɩ sɩ kaŋ ba laa, aŋ bɩ sɩ leŋ dɩ ʋ gyʋʋ Wɩɩsɩ tɔbal hʋ wɩya mɛ ba aa basa teŋ no tɩyaŋ.

english_verse: The one who has spoken these things says, “I am coming soon!” So, Lord Jesus, please come soon!
translation_verse: Nal hʋ aa dii wɩya no buloŋ daŋsɩya, ʋ basa rɛ abaa, “Wɩtɩɩ rɛ! Ŋ bɩ sɩ pɩɩsɩ ka dɩ ŋ ko.” Ɛɛ rɛ ŋ baa, “Amɩ! Ko, á Tɩɩna Yesu.”

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: Á Tɩɩna Yesu bɔnyɛ sɩ we Wɩɩsɩ nala buloŋ lee. Amɩ.
